title: Gas Station - Stick Simulator
description: Gas Station - Stick Simulator is a tycoon game where you run your own gas station! Complete tasks, grow your business from scratch, and watch your income increase. Have your own Shell in the middle of the highway with mindful business investments. Service cars, fill up with gas, earn coins, and build even bigger in this idle tycoon game! Controls Mouse: Interact WASD or the Arrows: Move On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. Gas Station - Stick Simulator Overview Have you dreamed of having your own famous gasoline brands, such as Shell or BP? Then, welcome to the Gas Station - Stick Simulator ! Here, your main goal is to grow your gas station from scratch. Fill up cars with gas, earn in-game currencies, and invest to grow bigger. Over time, you will be able to open a store, a restroom, a cafe, and even a hot dog delivery service in this tycoon game! Refuel Cars As you create space for gas, drivers will stop by your gas station to refuel. Fill up cars with gas and earn money to grow your station. Make sure that the vehicles are filled up with the correct type of gas. Collect your money after the filling-up process. As you progress, you will be able to hire employees for these tasks! Open a Restroom To grow your station bigger, open a restroom at your place. This way, cars that do not need fuel also stop by and use your place. People constantly come by and pay you more for further services. You can also open up a coffee or a hot dog delivery service over time. You can multiply your income with each facility you add to your station! Tips & Tricks for Gas Station - Stick Simulator ⛽ Refuel cars quickly for coins. 🤑 Invest earnings into new facilities. 🧻 Open restrooms to attract visitors. 🤓 Hire employees for faster service. 💡 Expand wisely to multiply income. Developer Mirra Games is the developer of Gas Station - Stick Simulator. Similar Games Jungle Mart is another simulator game that suits your tastes well! For more options, feel free to visit our Simulator Games Online tag at the link. Don’t forget to leave a comment in the comments section below to share your gaming experiences with others!

title: GT Traffic Racer
description: GT Traffic Racer is a 3D driving game inspired by Highway Traffic. Drive 6 excellent sports cars in the flow of traffic while trying to overtake slow cars. Play three unique game modes on three landscape highways. To get the most out of your vehicle, upgrade and customize it as you wish. Share your best records with us in the comments section below! Controls WASD or the Arrows: Drive/Steer/Brake C: Change Camera View F: Activate Nitro How to Play GT Traffic Racer In GT Traffic Racer , get in your sports car’s driver's seat and start the engine! You will drive your vehicle through three different landscape highways: Desert Dunes, Japan Fuji, and Night City. Explore each of these landscapes on One Way, Two Way, and Bomb modes. Try to overtake slow cars on the highway and earn points for each vehicle you closely pass. However, avoid crashing into any other cars to continue your driving journey safely! Perform Close Overtakes While driving on the highway, your main goal is to overtake slow cars in the flowing traffic. Each overtake you perform earns you +100 points, while the closest ones grant you +133. Moreover, if you manage to create combos and fast past vehicles consecutively, you will earn the highest score possible! Game Modes in GT Traffic Racer There are three game modes in GT Traffic Racer: One Way, Two Way, and Bomb. Each of these modes has its own objectives and challenges. Learn more about the game modes below! One-Way: Traffic flows in one direction, requiring you to overtake vehicles one at a time. Two-way: Traffic flows in both directions, making it harder to overtake consecutive vehicles. Bomb: The vehicle carries a bomb that is very sensitive to crashes. When an accident happens, it explodes. Developer Fuego! Games developed GT Traffic Racer. Looking for More? If you enjoy playing GT Traffic Racer, you may also give Lambo Traffic Racer a chance! For more options, check out our Driving Games Online category at the link. Don’t hesitate to contact us if you have any suggestions or a wishlist! We will be happy to hear from you.

title: Night Club Security
description: Night Club Security is a simulator game where you play as a security guard of a famous nightclub! Check visitors carefully and decide who is eligible to enter the club. Don’t let the people with prohibited items enter inside. Since you have the ultimate power as the security guard, have fun with the visitors by using your imagination! Controls WASD or Arrows: Move E: Use Items Q: Interact F: Drop Items P: Pause TAB: View Rules Night Club Security Overview In Night Club Security , your main objective is to admit visitors to the nightclub if they are eligible per the given rules. Read the rules carefully, scan the visitors, and accept only those in compliance. However, keep in mind that if you accept the wrong people, you will get in trouble. Don’t forget to have some fun with the visitors, try different items on them for ultimate joy! Items to Use in Night Club Security Analyzer The Analyzer helps you measure visitors’ blood alcohol levels. If the alcohol meter is too high when you check it, you may not let them into the nightclub. However, the rules should be your guidance. If the rules say to admit only those with high blood alcohol levels, you must let the visitor in! Temperature Detector The Temperature Detector helps you measure visitors' temperatures. If their temperature is high, they are sick. When the rules say you should not let sick people in, you should not let high-temperature visitors into the club! Scanner The Scanner helps you to search for visitors with an X-ray. You can see whether they carry prohibited items, such as weapons or food, by using the scanner. Take the items from them and sell their belongings to the store to make extra cash! Developer Night Club Security was developed by Mirra Games. More Games Like This Did you enjoy playing Night Club Security ? Try playing Airport Security , where you are a security officer at the airport. Check out our Simulator Games Online page by following the link for more options! Keep coming back to discover newly added games.

title: Find Hidden Cats
description: Find Hidden Cats is a puzzle game in which you try to spot hidden cats on black-and-white scenes. In each scene, there are 20 mischievous cats to find. When you spot them, they purr at you! Find all of them and move to the next scene. Discover the finesse of European cities while trying to spot these cute kittens! Controls Mouse: Spot Mouse Wheel: Zoom In/Out On Mobile Devices : Tap on the screen to interact. How to Play Find Hidden Cats In Find Hidden Cats , you need to find all 20 cats in each black-and-white screen of iconic European cities! Scan the scene carefully, use your observation skills, and try to spot all of them. Some are easy to find, while the rest are tricky. Take your time and search every corner. In this hidden object game, enjoy the satisfying thrill of discovering each well-hidden feline. Try not to miss a single one! Finding the Tricky Cats Some felines are easy to spot, but others are tricky to find. Search carefully in every corner to discover our cute little animals. Zoom in or out by using the mouse wheel if you are having trouble finding them. Additionally, you can use your hint chances to see where the felines are located. Use the lens in the bottom-left corner of the screen to access hints. Discover Iconic European Cities There are six iconic European cities to explore while finding the cats! From Paris to Istanbul, check the cities to spot furry felines. In each city, there are three levels to pass. Once you complete spotting the cats in all three levels in a city, you can fly to the next city. Uncover all the kittens in the streets of Paris , Athens , Amsterdam , Istanbul , Brussels , Warsaw , Budapest , and Barcelona . Developer Find Hidden Cats was developed by GameBerry Studio. You May Also Like If you enjoyed playing Find Hidden Cats, you may also try playing Hidden Objects ! For more options, feel free to check out our Puzzle Games Online category. There are dozens of free online games at your disposal on www.onlinegames.io! Keep coming back to discover newly added games.

title: Golf Bit
description: Golf Bit is an online golf game in which you play as a golfer on a golf course! Grab your golf club, aim precisely, and hit the golf ball. Try to hit the ball when the indicator is in the middle of the green area. Sink the ball into the holes on the course to score. This sports game is a perfect fit for golf lovers! Controls LMB or Spacebar: Hit the Ball On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to hit the ball. Golf Bit Overview In Golf Bit , your main objective is to hit the ball when the indicator is in the middle of the green area. Timing is everything to make good shots in this golf game, so pay close attention to the indicator before hitting the ball. Try to sink the ball in a hole on the golf course to level up and gain rewards. Cover the longest distance possible with the upgrades you take! Sink the Golf Ball If the ball falls close to a hole on the golf course after your shot, you will try to sink the ball into the hole. Aim precisely with your golf club and try to sink it into the hole for leveling up! Keep in mind that you have only one shot option. Try not to waste it! Unlock New Golf Courses Initially, you will play on a classic golf course on planet Earth. However, you can unlock new planets as you gain coins with your successful shots! There are different kinds of planets to play in: Planet Mars, Planet Moon, Planet Mercury, and Planet Saturn. Upgrades in Golf Bit There are some upgrades you can invest in to strengthen your golfer’s abilities: Strength, Speed, and Bounce. Strength: It helps you make sharper shots. Speed: It allows the ball to reach high speeds while in flight. Bounce: It allows the ball to bounce further distances when it hits an object. Developer FreezeNova is the developer of Golf Bit. Similar Games Try playing Golf Orbit if you like playing golf games like this! For additional game options, you are always welcome to visit our Sports Games Online page at the link. Don’t forget to bookmark this website in your browser to easily come back!

title: Jumper's Quest
description: Jumper’s Quest is an exciting puzzle game featuring colorful graphics and jumping gameplay. In this Halfbrick game, you need to take control of the blue cube with an eye and jump it. Continue jumping until you reach the top by overcoming obstacles on each course. Try not to fall from platforms if you don’t want to restart the level! Controls LMB: Jump On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to jump. How to Play Jumper’s Quest In Jumper’s Quest , there is a wide range of unique obstacles. Your job is to conquer all levels with diverse challenges by jumping the blue cube. Learn the dynamics of each level, move up by jumping on platforms, and reach the top by collecting all the coins. However, you need to be aware of the dangers. Avoid falling down, and stay away from the spiky objects to survive! Obstacle Types in Jumper’s Quest Crushers Some levels contain crushers on the platforms, making it hard for you to reach the top. If you are stuck between the walls of the crushers, they will squeeze the cube. So, you need to take quick action to avoid crushers. Portals You will encounter portals on some levels. When the cube gets into a portal, it will teleport to the other portal. You need to act mindfully so you don't fall. Try to guess where the cube will exit when it enters the first portal! Toggle Toggling platforms will make things a little harder for you! With each move your cube makes, all the platforms on the course toggle. It means that while some platforms are activated, others are disabled. Take action according to the toggles. Developer Jumper’s Quest was developed by Halfbrick Studios. Looking for More? Slingshot Fortress is another game that suits your tastes well! Use your slingshot to launch stones and shurikens to destroy towers. For more options, visit our Puzzle Games Online category at the link. Do not forget to share your gaming experiences with us in the comments section below!

title: Two RX7 Drifters
description: Two RX7 Drifters is a 3D drift game with a 2-player option. Take your seat, start the engine, and explore different modes of this excellent car game. Drive your Mazda RX7-like car and perform the longest drifts that you can. You can also challenge yourself with a friend on the same device in the 2-Player Mode! Controls Player 1 WASD Keys: Drive/Steer/Brake Player 2 Arrow Keys: Drive/Steer/Brake Two RX7 Drifters Overview In Two RX7 Drifters , your main goal is to perform the perfect drifts with your Mazda RX7. Drive your supercar in three different game modes: Challenges, Checkpoints, and Drift Mode. Feel free to showcase your drifting skills in any of these modes with different objectives. Also, you can customize your vehicle as you wish with the credits you earn by completing various missions in this car game. Single Player Modes Challenges In the Challenges, you need to accomplish specific drifting tasks before the timer goes up. Read the specified objective in the upper-left corner of the screen and try to complete it before you run out of time. Checkpoints In the Checkpoints, you need to reach the targeted points within the given time. However, keep in mind that every second counts when completing missions at the Checkpoints. Keep checking your timer! Drift Mode In the Drift Mode, you need to beat the target drift points. There are three cups to get: Bronze, Silver, and Gold. Each cup requires you to reach specific drift points. Check the points necessary, and try to reach the points for the cup you want to get! 2-Player Modes Drift Mode In the 2-Player Drift Mode, you challenge a friend on the same device with a split screen. Both of you have Mazda RX7 vehicles to showcase your drift skills. The one who has the most drifting score wins the game! Race Mode In the Race Mode, you will race with your friend on a city map. Both of you steer the wheels of the powerful RX7s. The one who reaches the finish line wins the gold cup! Stunt Mode In the Stunt Mode, your friend’s objective is to perform the best stunts with your supercars. Fly your car in the air, score stunt points, and be the one who scores the most to win before the timer goes up! Developer Two RX7 Drifters was published by Fuego! Games. More Games Like This Did you enjoy playing Two RX7 Drifters? You may also try playing i8 City Driver ! For additional options, check out our Drift Games Online page by following the link. Do not forget to share your gaming experiences with us in the comments section below!

title: i8 City Driver
description: i8 City Driver is a browser-friendly driving game in which you drive a BMW i8-like car and complete missions. Complete drifting tasks, take your part in survival mode, execute successful stunts and accept kill challenges for pumping some adrenaline! Or, you can wander in the neon-lit city streets to hang out in the nightlife with your puppy leisurely. Have fun! Controls WASD or the Arrows Keys: Steer Mouse: Look Around Spacebar: Brake Left-Shift: Activate Nitro C: Change Camera View E: Interact How to Play i8 City Driver In i8 City Driver , your main objective is to drive your i8 vehicle in the neon-lit city streets and accept various missions to gain money. You can engage in drift challenges, perform excellent stunts with your car, and try to escape from the police for fun. In any case, keep an eye out for your vehicle’s fuel bar! If it reaches zero, you can not move your vehicle. Head to the gas station to fuel up before the gas runs out… Three Driving Challenges Drift Challenge In the Drift Challenge, your goal is to make target drift points before the timer goes up. Reach the necessary score to beat the challenge by burning your tires at high speeds with your supercar. Try not to crash into other vehicles in the flowing traffic while drifting! Survival Challenge In the Survival Challenge, beat the police as long as you can by evading them. The more you dodge them, the more you will be paid in this challenge. Check how many cops are following you from the upper right corner of the screen. Try not to get busted by them! Kill Challenge In the Kill Challenge, run over the target pedestrians with your supercar. Once you run over more than one pedestrian, the cops will be following you. You need to dodge them and avoid getting caught. Otherwise, the mission will fail while trying to reach your target! Tips & Tricks for i8 City Driver 🚗 Use nitro wisely during long pursuits. 💨 Drift smoothly to avoid crashing into traffic. ⛽ Watch your fuel bar and refill often. 🚓 Take sharp turns to escape police cars. 🎯 Practice stunts to improve vehicle control. Developer Fuego! Games developed i8 City Driver. Looking for More? If you enjoy playing driving games like this, you may also try out Charger City Driver ! Additionally, you can visit our Driving Games Online page at the link. There are dozens of free online games at your disposal on www.onlinegames.io!

title: Jump Master
description: Jump Master is an arcade game with cute graphics in which you try to jump from one block to another without falling into the gaps. Control your chess piece: jump with LMB and try to cover the longest distance. Try to avoid dropping the chess piece, or you will need to restart the game! Controls Press LMB: Accumulate Power Release LMB: Jump On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. Jump Master Overview In Jump Master , your main objective is to jump the chess piece from one block to another and make it move. However, you should be careful not to make the piece fall into the gaps between the blocks. If you accumulate more or less power than necessary, it will definitely fall. So, adjust the power and try to cover the longest distance that you can. Also, as you progress, you will unlock new kinds of pieces in different shapes! Land on the Center Normally, you get a +1 score for each successful landing. However, if you manage to land exactly on the center of the blocks, you will get +2 scores. Furthermore, you can double up the scores by creating combos. It goes as +2, +6, +11, +17 as you move forward without breaking the combo. Keep in mind that consecutive landings on the block’s center will give the most out of the scores! The Music Boxes There are dozens of blocks on the road, varying in different colors and shapes. In addition to these normal blocks, music boxes will appear as blocks from time to time. These music boxes are called “Somy”. Listening to the song playing and taking a short coffee break will earn you at least +30 extra points! Wait until the song disappears and take your easy scores. Tips & Tricks for Jump Master 🐇 Hold longer, leap much farther. 🎯 Aim center for bigger combos. 💡 Release carefully, avoid dangerous gaps. 🎶 Pause on Somy, earn extra points. ♟️ Unlock new pieces with progress. Developer Jump Master was published by MOVISOFT. Similar Arcade Games If you enjoy playing arcade games like this, you may also give Stack Fire Ball a chance! Continue viewing our Arcade Games Online tag at the link for additional options. Do not forget to share your gaming experiences with us in the comments section below!

title: Brainrots Lava Survive Online
description: Brainrots Lava Survive Online is an online Italian brainrot game where you try to collect rare characters in your base. However, it will not be easy to pick up an Italian brainrot, because the area occasionally fills with lava. You need to be fast and mindful as you carry it to your base! Avoid lava, and fill your base with the rarest brainrots in this multiplayer game. You can also try playing Brainrots Lava Survive Online in the 2-Player mode with a friend of yours! Controls Player 1 WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump E: Pick Up F: Fight Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move L: Jump J: Pick Up K: Fight How to Play Brainrots Lava Survive Online In Brainrots Lava Survive Online , your main goal is to collect the rarest brainrots in your base. To do that, the first thing you need to do is to go to the area where the Italian Brainrots are placed. But keep in mind that this area is frequently filled with lava. If the lava touches you, your Obby character is no longer alive! Keep checking the lava bar to avoid being caught in the burning flames. Once you reach and pick up an Italian Brainrot, head to your base immediately. Upgrade the Speed & Capacity You can upgrade your Obby character’s speed to easily run away from the lava. Additionally, increased speed allows you to go further in the Italian Brainrot zone. This way, you can easily go forward and pick up the rarest Brianrots, which are in the farthest area in the zone. Besides speed, you can increase your Obby's capacity. Each +1 carrying capacity lets you carry more than one Brainrot! Upgrade Your Base You can place many more Brainrots in your base by upgrading it. You will see a signboard with a house icon on it in front of the base. Click on it to unlock new slots for Brainrots, and you will get stairs and an extra floor in your base. Each upgrade to your base unlocks a new slot. You can easily be a billionaire in Brainrots Lava Survive Online with the upgrade choices you have! Tips & Tricks for Brainrots Lava Survive Online 🌋 Watch the lava bar constantly. ⚡ Upgrade speed to escape danger faster. 🧠 Carry rare Brainrots for bigger profits. 🏠 Expand your base for more slots. 👥 Play co-op mode with a friend. Developer Brainrots Lava Survive Online was developed by CursoraLabs. You May Also Like Steal Brainrot Arena is another game that you may like if you enjoyed playing Brainrots Lava Survive Online! Do not forget to check out our Brainrot Games Online page by following the link for more game options. Keep coming back to discover newly added games on this website!

title: Escape from the Portal
description: Escape from the Portal is a horror game where your soul is trapped between worlds. To escape the underworld, you must activate an ancient portal. Explore the gloomy catacomb, avoid traps and fight monsters to survive. Try to uncover secrets of the past to find a way to the exit. Learn magical artifacts to activate the portal in this adventure game! Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Mouse: Look Around 1-2 Numeric Keys: Activate Magic E: Interact with Objects TAB: Open the Inventory Escape from the Portal Overview In Escape from the Portal , your main objective is to escape from the underworld in which your soul is trapped. To free your soul, you need to explore the dark catacombs, collect hints and find your way to the ancient portal. A lady soul will guide you throughout the catacombs. Watch carefully what she says, as she will grant you magical powers which you will need the most in the catacombs. Use Magical Artifacts The lady guiding you will share some of her magical powers. These powers include Freeze, Magic, Transformation, Supervision and Invisibility. You will need these powers to progress through the catacombs. Use them to collect hints to solve mysteries. However, keep in mind that you can use each of the magical powers for a short time. Use them efficiently! Fight with Strange Creatures While exploring the rooms, you will encounter strange creatures and horrifying demons. You need to eliminate them in order to make progress. Otherwise, they may attack you. Give attention to the Lady Soul; she will give you hints about how to deal with them. Also, do not forget to search every corner, as the things you find may help you dodge these creatures! Tips & Tricks for Escape from the Portal 👂 Listen to the Lady Soul. 🪄 Use magical powers wisely. 👀 Search every dark corner. 🧐 Avoid traps, watch closely. 👹 Defeat demons, unlock progress. Developer Escape from the Portal was published by Mirra Games. More Games Like This Did you like playing Escape from the Portal? Survive the Night is another game that suits your tastes well! Do not forget to check out our Horror Games Online tag to get access to more games like this. There are dozens of free online games at your disposal on this website!

title: Smash Defense
description: Smash Defense is an arcade game where you shoot the baseball to knock down flying monsters attacking your base. Swing your baseball bat, take aim, and hit the ball at them. Eliminate the creatures one by one before they enter your base. After each battle, get your cards to upgrade your power to defend your base profoundly! Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Mouse: Move On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. How to Play Smash Defense In Smash Defense , your main goal is to defend your base against the incoming flying monsters in waves. You need to move your hero, swing the baseball bat and hit the ball to defeat all the monsters. Make sure that you take aim well while striking the ball. Try to eliminate them before they reach your base by using power-ups you gain with each level you pass. Power-ups in Smash Defense Attack Boost Attack Boost increases the damage you deal to the monsters up to +40%. It enables you to hit them with higher devastation, causing them to lose a large amount of HP. Multi Shot +1 Multi Shot +1 gives you an extra yellow ball in addition to the baseball you have. It allows you to strike the monsters with two balls in total, enabling you to hit two monsters at once. Piercing Shot With the Piercing Shot, the balls you have will be able to pierce through a monster and hit another one at the same time. HP Boost HP Boost increases your base's health bar by up to 40%. The base will gain greater endurance against monster attacks with this power-up. Bouncy Wall +1 Bouncy Wall +1 makes the balls bounce off walls instead of going in vain. This power-up prevents the balls from going to waste if they don't hit the target. Developer Smash Defense was developed by Mao Games. Looking for More? If you enjoy playing Smash Defense, you may also try Push IO , where you wield your boomerang to push other players off into the water. For more, please check out our Arcade Games Online category by clicking on the link. Do not forget to bookmark this website in your browser to easily come back!

title: Push IO
description: Push IO is a multiplayer battle game in which you use your boomerang and try to push other players with it. Move carefully on the arena, aim well and wield your boomerang to push the rivals off. Dodge incoming attacks because the longer you survive, the higher the rank. Be the last one standing by eliminating all other players in this io game! Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Drag Mouse: Move Spacebar or RMB: Attack On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. Push IO Overview In Push IO , your main objective is to knock off other players from the arena by wielding your boomerang. Take aim with the boomerang and attack them until they reach the edge. Afterward, you can send them to the water with one last boomerang move. However, keep in mind that they will also attack you. Try to dodge incoming attacks to be the one who survives! Upgrade and Unlock Weapons Until unlocking a new weapon, upgrade your boomerang to increase its force, speed, lock speed and accuracy. This way, you can easily knock rivals into the water! Also, each upgrade you make to your weapon will get you close to unlocking a new and powerful one. In total, complete 5 consecutive upgrades and grab the new weapon. Collect Power-ups You will see power-up icons on the arena from time to time. You need to collect them when you see their icons in the arena. There are three power-ups in total: Red Gloves, Blue Guard, and Lightning Strike. Each of these power-ups comes with unique features. Red Gloves: Increases the attack force. Blue Guard: Protects you in the short term. Lightning Strike: Lets you attack everyone nonstop. Tips & Tricks for Push IO 🪃 Aim carefully before every throw. 💡 Dodge attacks to survive longer. 💪 Upgrade boomerangs for stronger pushes. 🥊 Collect power-ups whenever possible. 💦 Push rivals off the arena. Developer Push IO was developed by Mao Games. Similar IO Games Did you like playing Push IO? You may also give Survival Race a chance! Drive your car on the arena at full speed and crash into others. Moreover, you are always welcome to check out our io Games Online tag at the link. Keep coming back to discover newly added games on this site!

title: Bloxd io
description: Welcome to Bloxd io , an ultimate online Minecraft game with diverse modes. Whether you're interested in a peaceful building session or intense PvP battles, you will find what you expect from Bloxd io. Each game mode has its own objective, such as survival, building, battling, or even solving murder mysteries. Learn about the game modes below. You can choose to play solo or with a friends online. Controls Move Forward: W Move Backward: S Move Left: A Move Right: D Run: Shift Break Block: Left Click Place Block: Right Click / E Open Inventory / Craft: Tab Drop Item: Q Jump: Space Crouch: Control / C / CapsLock Pick Block (creative): Middle Mouse Button / Alt+Left Click Zoom: V Bloxd io Game Modes Explained So, let's get you acquainted with the game modes you can choose. We split modes into 6 sub-categories to ease the selection. Open World Modes Survival: Survival mode allows players to engage in PvP and explore an open world. The player should take down other players. Collect resources and outlast others. Peaceful: No PVP in peaceful mode. Dig, carve and create whatever your heart desires. No danger to worry about. Enjoy the pure exploration. Creative: Find all the building blocks in your inventory and start building. Whether a cathedral, a shelter or an island for yourself. Sandbox gameplay with fly mode on. PvP Team Modes Bed Wars: Similar to capture the flag of FPS games. Keep your team bed safe, and don't let any opponent approach it. The battle is in the sky, so try not to fall down. You can play Bedwars mode with 2x2 or 4x4 players. Pirates: PvP mode where you destroy enemies' ships to win. Dig enemy spawn blocks first and take down enemies themself later! Hide and Seek: This one is certainly our favorite. Players split into two teams: hiders and seekers. Before the time runs out, explore the map and find a perfect place to hide. You will hide as a block, so choose the block you want to be according to the theme of the place you'll hide. A bookshelf in the woods would reveal itself, wouldn't it? If you get caught, be a seeker and look for any suspicious behavior on the map. You have 15 chances to find hiders. Building-Centered Modes One Block: Experience the Big Bang virtually! You will start with only one block and dig it to generate new blocks. With a single block and hard work, you can build an island of your own. Doodle Cube: Build anything that matches the theme of a map within the time limit. When time is up, go vote for other buildings and try to win the competition. Plots: Build whatever you like without someone approaching. Everyone's builds are safe in this mode. Build a plot on private land. Free For All Modes Sky Wars: 12 players spawn on islands with 2-3 chests containing random items in them. Players must bridge to other islands and fight until only one player is left. If a player dies, they lose the game, and the killer gets 10 coins. The winner of this Battle Royale match gets 30 coins. Cube Warfare: Cube Warfare is very similar to Pixel Survival. You will enter a battle to eliminate other players to earn coins and obtain powerups. Free-for-all game mode with FPS perspective. Infection: Apocalypse world with zombies trying to hunt you down in every corner. Run, escape and survive on the map! Parkour Maps Evil Tower: Climb through a challenging tower without any checkpoints. It's cruelly evil, isn't it? Bloxd Hop: Hop and jump on blocks. Just like the Only Up game, you'll climb through rough parkours. Other Modes Greenville: Similar to Sims, you need to work to live in Greenville mode. Be a miner, lumberjack, or even a street fighter to earn coins. Play mini-games and go to the market to buy and sell items to multiply your winnings. Murder Mystery: You can choose to play as an innocent detective or murderer in this mode. Survive as an innocent or collect ten moonstones to get a gun to kill the murderer. The murderer's goal is to kill everyone without getting shot. The detective has a gun to kill the murderer, but it takes five seconds to reload if they miss. Worlds: Create your own world and choose the game mode you'd like. Create lobbies and shape the game to your taste. Developer Arthur Baker created this game. You May Also Like If you like online Minecraft games like Bloxd io another alternative is Miniblox , a crafting game with even more game modes, miniplays and tons of different blocks. title: Geometry Arrow 2
description: Lightning-fast reflexes are a must when dodging cubes and triangles, especially while switching between arrow and ball forms. In Geometry Arrow 2 every portal is a chance at victory, but one wrong move sends you right back to the start. Can you keep your focus, avoid the corners, and conquer each level? The tunnel won’t make it easy… but you won’t give up, right? Game Overview In Geometry Arrow , you’ll have to cross through a tunnel of geometric cubes and triangles, dodging obstacles and while changing between an arrow and ball. The goal is to survive each level and make it to the ending portal. But beware: if you fail a level, you’ll need to try again from the start of the level before moving on. Only victory unlocks the next stage! Game Features Two mode gameplay: Arrow Mode (fly) and Circle Mode (jump). Level-based progression: beat one level to unlock the next. Customizable cosmetics for arrows, circles, and obstacles, earned through achievements. How to Play Geometry Arrow 2? PC Controls Arrow Mode Fly up: press Click/ SPACE Fly down: release Click/ SPACE Circle Mode: Jump: Click or SPACE Mobile Controls Move / jump: tap the screen Mechanics Arrow Mode : Guide your arrow through gaps, avoiding corners and spikes. Circle Mode : Tap to jump over spikes, pits, or on other tiles. Portals: Passing through a portal switches your shape between Arrow and Circle . Good to Know! Timing is everything! Tap or click too early, and you’ll crash into corners ⎼ too late, and spikes will hit you. Don’t be afraid to retry! Practice makes progress, and every failed run teaches you more about the level. Similar Games Fell in love with Geometry Arrow 2 but craving a change? Strap on a pair of wings and take off in Flappy Bird , where you can fly like a bird. The sky might be the limit… but it’s also your biggest challenge!

title: Love Tester
description: Do you want to know how much your crush falls for you? Here is a way to test the love of the one and only. Love Tester is an online game where you fill out your and your crush's names. Then, let the tester do all the calculations about how much they love you, miss you during the day, or have any second thoughts about you. We have to warn you. You may not always get the results you hoped for. Hold your head up! You can always test your other crushes' names and reconsider someone you have been unsure about. How to Play Love Tester? Open Love Tester on OnlineGames.io. Enter your name and the name of the person whom you want to test the love of. Hit the big heart at the center, and you will get the love calculator's compatibility results in seconds. You will see your results in percentages and get an evaluation of the potential associated with the couples you entered. Maybe the result will encourage you! About expressing your love… 😉 How to Know If Someone Loves You? Throughout history, people have been inclined and eager to receive insights into the future. Some consulted seers, some consulted tarot readers or stars… Especially in romantic matters, people have tried and are trying to relieve their desperation in these ways. If you need a test on how to know if someone loves you here is an online love tester for you. We can say that Love Tester is the 21st-century version of those ancient methods of fortune telling. Think of it like a computerized version of old tarot and oracle games. Is Love Tester True? We would really like to give you exact results on how much your loved one cares about you. However, you are the only person that can truly understand this. If you desperately want to know if someone has feelings for you or not, look at all the signals they are giving. Are they happy, cheerful and excited when you are with them? Trust your instincts on this. Remember, nothing can measure true love! It can only be felt. Just enjoy the Love Tester and have fun! What to Play Next? You may continue to play our Love Games to have a great time online. Another popular love game is Romantic Secret Kiss . Follow the link to try it out.

title: Stack Fire Ball
description: Reach the end by guiding the ball through each stage, avoiding the dark tiles. This game is a combination between relaxation but also keeping attention to details. With modern graphics, you will enjoy knocking down the colorful tiles as fast as you can. Let the ball bounce and complete all the stages. Play Stack Fire Ball now! Features: Addictive gameplay Collisions and bounces Controls: Tap to play C to change camera view

title: Life Simulator
description: Do you need a break from your own life? Would you like to act like a completely different person with a new family, friends, and a job? Try Life Simulator , an online living simulator game where you take control of a stranger from birth to death. Make important decisions for them, let them choose their occupancy, manage finance, where to live, and whom to fall in love with. Life Simulator is an amazing simulator game comprising many aspects of real life. Be who you want to be: a criminal trying his way out of trouble or a decent person living life fully as you have always dreamed of. Anybody, from kids to older adults, would enjoy playing this simulation game. Kids can try out living a life with responsibilities and consequences while adult players can have a rare old time living a life they regret they didn't. In Life Simulator , you have the freedom to set your own goals. You will decide whether you want to be a famous actor, a musician, marry into royalty, travel the world or even win the lottery. The choice is yours. You can make an effort to achieve your goals or go on a journey to explore, experience, and carpe diem in Life Simulator . What is Life Simulator ? Life Simulator is a free online simulator game where you control a human being from birth to old age, help them make critical decisions, and have a happy and healthy life. Controls Use your mouse to move and left-click to interact. You do not need to remember any key. Monitoring System It would be best if you kept an eye on the following: Personal Information If you need some brief information (name, job, sex, location, etc.) about your character, check out the info section on the top left. Bank Balance You will see how much money you have on the top right. While making binding financial decisions, you should watch the numbers there. You may have no or little money before having a job. Happiness Bar You will see your char's happiness level here. Happiness level varies a lot depending on many things that your char is living through: love life, family relations, career, money, a sudden death of someone they like... Health Bar It's another vital part of the game. You should see a doctor when your health bar is too low. If you cannot afford to visit an M.D., consider alternative options such as a chiropractor or a witch doctor. Remember, happiness level can affect your health if your char gets into depression. Smarts and Looks These may vary depending on your age and school or career life. These traits have an effect on your love life as well. Actions in Life Simulator Age: Press it to get one year older. Occupation: At the bottom left, you will see school or occupation buttons depending on the age. You can control the school and career life there. Assets: Go to the assets sections on the bottom left to buy and sell real estate and cars. Relationships: This section is where you manage relations with your family and friends. Activities: At the bottom-right, you can access activities, a section with many possibilities for your char. You can choose to visit a casino, emigrate to another country, commit a crime, or make a doctor's appointment when your health bar is low. It is all you must know. You are ready to explore the endless possibilities that Life Simulator offers. More Games Like This Great simulator games just like Life Simulator are awaiting you in the Simulator tag on OnlineGames.io.

title: Eagle DuckCraft
description: Eagle DuckCraft is a browser-friendly sandbox game in which you have endless options to build up your own world. This Minecraft game is filled with so many details and features that it makes you feel completely free to dig, carve and build whatever you like. Find a nice spot on the extensive map and start crafting yourself an environment that you take pleasure in living in in Creative Mode. Or, accept the challenge and fight for staying alive in the Survival Mode or the Hardcore Mode! 🛠 Controls WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump LMB: Attack RMB: Use an Item Scroll Wheel: Pick an Item Left-Shift: Sneak Q: Drop T: Chat E: Inventory TAB: List Players How to Play Eagle DuckCraft Whether you build up your imaginative world on the Singleplayer or engage with other players worldwide on the Multiplayer, Eagle DuckCraft offers you unique sandbox experiences. Regardless of the option you choose to play, start exploring the map after spawning. Collect resources to craft necessary materials to survive and build yourself a basic shelter or a mansion to stay in when the night comes. As it is a player-driven Minecraft game, you have the option to choose how to play it in this open world. Game Modes in Eagle DuckCraft Survival Mode 👊 In Survival Mode, you must seek resources and collect materials to craft tools. You also need to manage your character’s hunger and health bars to stay alive. Watch out for the dangerous creatures, Mobs, especially when the sun goes down! You can begin by crafting a torch, as you will need a light source at night. Collect wood and coal to make torches. Keep in mind that you have a respawning option in this mode if your health bar drops to zero. Hardcore Mode 🐑 The Hardcore Mode is more challenging than the Survival Mode, as you have only one life to survive, unlike the latter one. If you take damage or get hungry, the health bar starts to drop. Keep an eye on the hunger bar, and when you see it decrease, you can go hunting for animals, such as sheep and fish. Building a shelter is essential for protecting yourself from monsters. In the Hardcore Mode, you have no respawning option. So, you'd better stay alert! Creative Mode 🔨 Apart from Survival and Hardcore modes, Creative Mode features peaceful terrain. You do not have to fight for your life in this mode. There is no need to struggle to stay alive. All you need to do is use your imagination and build structures with unlimited resources. You don’t need to wander around and collect building materials; you have full access to dozens of items in your inventory. Open inventory, choose the item you want to use and place it on the hotbar. That’s it! Developer MOJANG developed the Eagle DuckCraft version of Minecraft. Looking for More? CubeCraft Survival is another game that you may give a try to! Wander around the blocky island, and dig and carve the materials you need to survive. For more options, check out our Sandbox Games Online game category, which we carefully curated! Keep coming back to explore newly added games by bookmarking this website in your browser.

title: Extreme Run 3D
description: Ever find yourself so immersed in a game that you start moving along with your character, shaking your legs and swaying side to side? Not every game pulls you in like that, but Extreme Run 3D does. Extreme Run 3D is one of the most fast-paced running games online. Take control of a rolling ball and face various obstacles as you race through 11 levels. The environment is designed to give you a VR-like experience without the headset. Start playing and test your reflexes now! Controls Left & Right Arrow Keys: Move left or right Up Arrow/Spacebar: Jump C: Change camera angle H: Hide controls info How to Play Extreme Run 3D Begin with Level 1 to get a feel for the controls and the pace of the game. The ball moves at a steady speed, and your main objective is to dodge obstacles by either moving sideways or jumping over them. There are four difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, Hard, and Extreme . Each difficulty features 11 levels , with the speed and types of obstacles increasing as you progress. To beat the game, you'll need to master all 44 levels across these difficulties. If you can finish the first 11 levels, you've beaten the Easy mode—but there's still plenty more! Extreme Run 3D Levels Walkthrough Each level introduces new challenges to keep you on your toes. Here's a breakdown of what you can expect: Level 1: Learn Controls The easiest of the game, but still requires very fast reflexes. Get comfortable with movement and jumping. Hold the spacebar for longer jumps and reach the finish. Level 2: Spikes Sharp spikes appear on the ground in this level. You must dodge and jump over them at the right time. If you jump on spikes, you need to start over the level. Level 3: Hidden Walls Invisible walls come out of nowhere, testing your memory and reflexes. Keep an eye on patterns to avoid getting trapped. Level 4: Circulars Red circular platforms rotate and shift, cutting through the ground. Your goal is to pass through the holes in these moving platforms. White circles on the screen mark your path, showing where it's safe to jump. Time your move carefully—when the white circles align with the holes in the red platforms, jump and pass through to the next section. Level 5: Hammers Huge hammers that change direction when you jump! Watch out for the unpredictable swings and plan your jumps carefully to avoid getting crushed. This is one of the hardest and game changer obstacles of Extreme Run 3D Level 6: Lasers Laser lights beam across the path, creating barriers you must avoid. Quick reflexes are essential as you time your jumps and movements to safely pass between the laser beams without getting hit. Level 7: Train You'll run in a tunnel like platform this time, with all the obstacles introduced in previous levels. Level 8: Run A stair-style level with wide gaps between platforms. Adjusting for distance is crucial to making it to the next platform. It's one of the most demanding levels. Level 9: Sink or Float Moving platforms with blocks that either drop or float. You must quickly figure out which platforms will hold your weight and which will disappear beneath you. Level 10: Kitchen Sink A mix of everything you've encountered so far—spikes, lasers, hammers, and more! You'll need to use all the skills you've learned to survive this chaotic level. Level 11: Master of Sadism In this boss level, a ghost haunts the platform. He'll be dropping blocks and throwing bombs at you. Dodge his attacks while navigating to the finish line. This is the ultimate test of endurance and strategy! Developer AlienWebGames created Extreme Run 3D. More Running Games Love intense obstacle games like Extreme Run 3D? You'll also enjoy other fast-paced running games on OnlineGames.io. In case this game is too extreme for you, try Run 3 Space and enjoy overcoming obstacles in a mildly easier gameplay.

title: Traffic Jam 3D
description: Are you ready to overtake vehicles at full speed on the highway? Traffic Jam 3D is a 3D driving game where you can steer your vehicle on the endless road across various modes. As you can guess, there will be heavy traffic on the road! You must drive your car well without crashing any car. Keep your eyes wide open and act like a circus monkey on this endless highway in this simulator game! Try not to scare other drivers too much.😈 Controls Desktops and Laptops Arrow Keys: Steer the Car N Key: Use Nitro ESC: Pause Mobile Devices Use the virtual buttons on the screen to steer the car. Traffic Jam 3D Overview Pick your car and set for a ride in this racing game! Four game modes are at your disposal: Career, Infinite, Time Against and Free . You are free to experience all four of them. After selecting the game mode you want to play, you will find yourself on the highway with flowing traffic . Your main objective is to fulfill the tasks given to you by navigating your car masterfully on this road. While trying to do that, you cannot let any accident happen! Avoid hitting any vehicle . Otherwise, you may restart from the beginning. Game Modes in Traffic Jam 3D Traffic Jam 3D offers you four unique modes. Play each one and choose your favorite. Career Mode: You will progress level by level. You need to reach the checkpoints in time. Infinite Mode: You can choose a game map among your three options: Highway, Desert, and City. Try to go as far as you can in this mode. Time Against Mode: You must cover the longest distance before your time runs out. Free Mode: You can drive your car on the highway without needing to accomplish any task. Set Your Scenario This driving game allows you to set your own road scenario. Choose your favorite game map: Highway, Desert, or City. Decide whether you want to drive in the morning, at dusk, or at night. You can also decide whether the road will be one-way or two-way. The choice is yours! Troubleshooting Having trouble starting the game? Try disabling your ad blocker or opening the game in incognito mode. If the issue persists, visit our support page for further assistance. Developer Great Games made the Traffic Jam 3D. What is More? If you enjoy playing Traffic Jam 3D, you may also like playing Mr. Racer . In the game, you are free to participate in various races. Take part in six unique race modes and burn your tires on the road! For additional options, you may look up the traffic games online tag on OnlineGames.io. Please share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below. We would be happy to hear from you!

title: Rooftop Run
description: Rooftop Run is an online running game where you jump from one roof to another. Navigate your character, who never tires of running, and reach the finish line in each level. Overcome all the obstacles on your way one by one by maneuvering your character. Adrenaline has never felt so real! 🏃 Controls Drag: to Move the Camera How to Play Rooftop Run When you enter this parkour game, you will find yourself on the roof of skyscrapers. Your character starts to run automatically once you tap to play. All you need to do is guide him through the obstacles on the way. Jump from one roof to another, slide under barriers like butter, and dive into offices! Try not to fall off the roofs. Otherwise, you need to start from the beginning. The Orange Men 🙎 You need to avoid any contact with orange men. They will try to catch you! Find a way to get around them while moving forward relentlessly. Try to reach the finish line before the orange men get you. You can use different strategies to dodge them. For example, zigzagging may help you get rid of them. Tower Cranes 🚧 The most challenging part of the parkour is the tower cranes. They are very narrow and long, and you may need to move over multiple tower cranes. So, controlling your character on any of these parts will get trickier. Adrenaline will double up! But, hey! You can handle this with precise aiming. Developer Playgama developed Rooftop Run. You May Also Like Did you like playing Rooftop Run? You may also give Extreme Run 3D a chance! In the game, take control of a rolling ball and move forward by overcoming obstacles on the way. It’s like a VR-like experience. For more exciting challenges, feel free to view our Running Games Online game category. There are hundreds of online games at your disposal on onlinegames.io !

title: Golf Orbit
description: Golf Orbit is an online golf game where one powerful shot can send your ball flying across the course and even into outer space! With just a single tap, you can launch the ball as far as possible, collect coins, and upgrade your golfer’s abilities. The goal is to hit the ball farther with each shot. Just try not to land in a bunker, smack into a tree, take a surprise bath in the water… or, you know, get snatched by an eagle or abducted by a UFO. Weird things may happen in Golf Orbit. ⛳ Controls On Computers Click or tap when the arrow is in the green zone for a perfect shot. If the ball stops near the hole, holdthe left click to aim and release to putt. How to Play Golf Orbit Your goal in Golf Orbit is to launch the ball as far as possible and, if you're lucky (or just really good), sink it into the hole. When you start a round, a swing meter appears, moving back and forth like a metronome. There’s a green zone in the middle, this is where you want to stop the meter for a perfect stroke. Tap at the right moment, and your golfer will send the ball soaring. As the ball flies, it might bounce off trees, roll into bunkers, or take an unexpected dive into the water. If it stops close to the hole, you get a second shot. This time, the mechanics change: instead of a timing-based meter, you'll see an arrow indicating the ball's path. Tap and release at the right moment to sink the putt. Score a Hole-In-One Landing a hole-in-one is the ultimate goal in Golf Orbit, and if you pull it off, you’ll be rewarded generously. If you manage to send the ball straight into the hole in a single shot, you’ll score an eagle, multiplying your earnings by 10x. This means a massive coin boost, allowing you to upgrade your golfer faster and hit even farther in the next round. However, not every shot is perfect. If your ball lands near the hole, you’ll get a second chance. At this point, a more precise aiming mechanic kicks in—you’ll see a guiding arrow showing the ball’s path. Tap to set your shot and release at the right moment to putt the ball into the hole. If you make it on the second attempt, you’ll score a birdie, which triples your earnings. Upgrade The Stroke Coins earned from each round can be spent on three key upgrades: Strength : Boosts your golfer’s power for stronger swings. Speed : Makes the ball travel through the air faster. Bounce : Increases how far the ball rebounds off surfaces. Upgrading these abilities is key to hitting longer shots and setting new records. The farther you hit the ball, the more coins you collect, allowing you to improve your stats even further. The challenge increases as you go, with more difficult landscapes and obstacles appearing. Trees, sand traps, and water hazards can slow you down or stop your progress, so learning the best angles and power levels is important. Timing your swing perfectly is the key to mastering the game. Ready to Become a Golf Champion? If you love fun and simple golf games, Golf Orbit is the perfect game for you. Challenge yourself to hit new distance records, upgrade your golfer, and try to land the perfect hole-in-one. Play for free now on OnlineGames.io! If you're looking for other sports games online , we have a great collection of them. Explore them all now!

title: Pixel Path
description: Pixel Path is a fun and challenging game where you guide your pixelated hero through 50 levels, each with a new twist. Try to reach the portal, but you need to be careful because getting there won’t be a walk in the park. The terrain is really unstable, there are many unforgiving traps, and sometimes your own body might grow uncontrollably to enormous sizes, warping how you play. What looks like solid ground might crumble beneath you, and those spikes? They move pretty fast. This is a game of quick reflexes, sharp thinking, and serious patience. Every mistake sends you back to the start with no second chances. Will you keep your cool, or will the chaos break you? Controls Move: Arrow Keys / WASD Menu: Esc Why will you enjoy this game? Pixel Path brings unique physics and mechanics that change as you progress through levels. The game design is a minimalist retro art with a clean and colorful layout. You can never get bored because unexpected hazards keep you active and challenge your instincts. For the perfectionists and thrill-seekers, global leaderboards and speedrun modes offer an extra layer of competition. Pixel Path dares you to master the unexpected. The rules are simple. The journey is not. Developer Starodymov Games created this game.

title: Drift King
description: Drift King stands out among online drift games, offering a unique experience where you can witness the smoke you leave behind from the rearview window. This game surrounds you in every realistic detail, from its premium 3D visuals to the choice of 10 sports cars and 6 maps. The comprehensive tuning options further enhance the game, making it a complete package for drifting enthusiasts. Controls WASD or arrow keys: Move car M: Rearview Mirror C: Change Carnera R: Reset Car U: Toggle between KMH and MPH I: Start/Stop Engine P: Fullscreen How To Play Drift King The traditional approach in a car game would be to give zero cash to the player at the beginning. This means waiting and playing for a long time to use any cool feature a game might offer. However, we told you Drift King is different. Here's a step-by-step guide to get you started. Drift King puts 30,000 coins in your pocket, right as you enter the game. This allows you to buy most of the cars in the garage, upgrade the parts, and tune them as you like before you. So, our suggestion is to first hang out in the garage a bit. Find the car you like the most, explore upgrades and tuning options. If you're not sure how to tune your car, find our complete guide on tuning . Then move on to maps. You have six options in the maps section. Select a map that will describe your drifting experience, your environment preferences, and what you expect from the game. Some of maps have racetracks while some are long countryside roads with slight curves. It's up to you. If you spawn onto the map, now aim for the longest drift. Keep the speed high and perform manji drifts and donuts. Or go freestyle and follow the curves of the road while leaving S-shaped marks behind you. Explore Garage In the garage, there are a bunch of options to customize your car to your liking. You can upgrade car parts such as the engine, turbo, gearbox, handling, and weight. Paint your car in any color you like Tune front and rear heights and cambers, and adjust brake sensitivity. Buy cool wheels with your in-game currency. Multiplayer Drifting One of the coolest features Drift King has its multiplayer rooms. After you select multiplayer mode, enter your nickname, choose a map and create a room to hang out with your drifter friends. Race with each other, make drifting competitions or chase after each other to experience crashes and chaos. More Games Like Drift King For an ultimate drifting experience, you should try Drift Hunters 2 —an epic game with even more maps and cars in the garage. But be warned, making combos in that game is not as easy as in Drift King. Take up this challenge and drive adrift. Have fun on OnlineGames.io, mates!

title: Paper io 2
description: Welcome to the colorful world of Paper io 2! Paper io 2 is a free online game where you have plenty of white areas. Start drawing your lines as your opponents do. You need to establish your own territory by turning these areas into your color. Claim your areas as soon as possible while keeping other players from capturing your territory! This is the key strategy. How to play Paper io 2? You can start by writing your player’s name. Then click to play on the opening section. Conquer the map by drawing lines around your territory. Eliminate other players by slicing to capture their area, too. Keep an eye on the right side of the play screen, indicating your and other player’s position. Get a place on the leaderboard by having a significant amount of the paper and give your message to the whole Paper io world! Tips for Paper io 2 Remember to claim your territory by turning your way back to your starting point. Otherwise, all of your efforts would go in vain. The more territory you conquer by coloring it, the more score you earn. However, try not to expose your tail outside for an extended period. Be careful of other colors (players)! If they capture your tail, they have the right to wipe off your whole territory in a second. Prevent the players from eliminating you. Bonus! Do not attempt to kill your own self by eating your tail. Keep track of how much of the map you colored and the total kills on the top left corner. Can I play Paper io 2 on my mobile? Yes, you can play Paper io 2 on your desktop, mobile, tablet and Chromebook. Is Paper io 2 free? You can play Paper.io 2 for free on OnlineGames.io without downloading. It is one of the most popular io Games. We bet you will get addicted to it! Is Paper io 2 safe? No worries. Paper io is safe and suitable for all ages. The game is free of violent visuals and fear themes. Developer Paper io 2 was created by Voodoo. Controls Draw a line using WASD or arrow keys. You can use your mouse as well. You May Also Like If you like Paper.io 2, we recommend you to look at io Games , and Multiplayer Games.

title: Skribblio
description: Scribble, scribble, scribble!✍✍✍ Skribblio is a great online game for word game lovers with extensive drawing skills. Draw the given word, and let the other participants guess the word correctly as fast as possible. When you are done with the scribbling, it's your turn to guess. Be as quick as possible in both drawing and guessing; then, you will gain more points. How to Play Skribblio? At first, pick a username and enter a room. You will see a number of players in the room. When it's your turn, you will draw the given word. If not, try to guess the word. Don't forget to chat with others while playing. Have a great time! Learn about how to draw and make a guess below. Draw The Given Word You will see several word options if it's your turn to scribble. Choose a word that you can draw well. You have 80 seconds to draw the word. You will see the toolbox at the bottom. Choose the color and size of the pen. Start drawing your word and let them guess as soon as possible. Using different colors beautifies your drawings and increases your chances. If you misdraw something, you can undo or clear the board. To erase a part of the drawing, use the swap. Use the hotkeys to draw faster. Hotkeys U : Undo the last action B : Choose the brush F : Fill / Color the area C : Clear the board S : Swap between brush and eraser Guess the Word Before Others While the other players draw, you must guess the word in the right-hand chat section. You can guess as many times as you want. No limit on that. The number of letters is at the top of your screen. Consider that while guessing the word. The faster you find the word, the more points you get. If you find the word, make your guess before others and get the points! Use like and dislike buttons to show your satisfaction with a player's drawing. Create A Private Room in Skribblio If you'd like, you can make Skribble.io a private experience. Create your own room and send the invitation link to your friend(s). Set the language, draw time, number of players and rounds. You can even set a bunch of custom words and play only with them. Some inside jokes would perfectly fit here, huh? Select the word mode: Normal, Hidden and Combination In hidden word mode, you will only see question marks instead of hints while guessing. In combination mode, you must draw or guess 2 words at once. Challenge yourself in combination mode if you think you are a pro scribbler. How many players are there in Skribblio? A minimum of 2 and a maximum of 20 players can participate in a Skribblio room. You may notice some players leave or enter while the game continues. Can you use a tablet pen with Skribblio? Yes, you can use a tablet pen with Skribblio. In order to do that, connect your drawing tablet to your computer. Arrange your settings so that you can move your cursor by dragging your tablet pen. Then, you are ready to show off your drawing skills in Skribblio. How do I change the line size and colors in Skribblio? The toolbox is at the bottom of the screen. Its functions include showing your pen's color and size, as well as an eraser and an undo button for when you misdraw. Which languages are available in Skribblio? Skribblio is most commonly played in English. However, you can play Skribblio in 28 languages, including German, French, Italian, and Japanese. Choose your language before entering a room. If you select a less-spoken language, you may need to wait for other players to join the game for a while. If you want to play it immediately, invite your friends to play together. Can you spectate in Skribblio? Unfortunately, you can't. There is no spectator mode in Skribblio yet. If you are too shy to participate or draw in a Skribblio room, don't worry. Your turn will only take 80 seconds. It will get much easier and more fun when you play along. Give yourself a couple of rounds to get used to it. How do I kick someone out in Skribblio? At Skribblio, there is a democratic atmosphere. If you did not like a player's behavior in the game, you may vote to kick them by clicking on the pax. If the majority votes for kicking that player, he is out of the room. If you have created the room, you can kick anyone without voting. Which game is Skribblio inspired by? Skribblio is inspired by the famous board game Pictionary. Some consider Skribblio as an online version of Pictionary. Developer Skribblio was created by ticedev. Similar Games If you like drawing games, test your hand at Draw the Bridge . Or else, continue the fun by playing our fantastic Drawing Games collection. Follow the links to play for free on your browser.

title: Smash Karts
description: Imagine a 3D multiplayer go-kart bonanza where the track isn't just for racing, but for full-on vehicular mayhem! Welcome to Smash Karts , where elegance meets anarchy, and every turn could lead to either a victory parade or a spectacular kart-smashing spectacle. Smash Karts is a online driving battle game, as you hit the start button, you're zooming through a kaleidoscope of maps, from candyland nightmares to neon-lit cityscapes. But it's not just about who crosses the finish line first; it's about who remains un-smashed! You'll encounter a barrage of weaponry from your fellow kart jockeys—guns, missiles, mines, and yes, even nukes. Your mission? Stay alive, smash others, and rack up those sweet, sweet XP points. Just keep an eye out for those gift boxes; they're your lifeline for arming up with random weapons. Controls Up Arrow or W: Gas Down Arrow or S: Brake Left Arrow or A: Steer Left Right Arrow or D: Steer Right Space: Fire How to Play Smash Karts Head over to OnlineGames.io, find Smash Karts, and dive in by clicking that big, shiny "Play" button. Use your arrow keys or WASD to steer, but remember, in this game, driving straight might be the quickest way to your kart's funeral. Collect those question-marked boxes for a surprise weapon. You only carry one at a time, so choose your moments wisely. Got a mine? Drop it where the traffic's thickest. Gun or nuke? Aim true and obliterate the competition. Each box you drive through is like a Christmas present from a slightly unhinged Santa. Mines, nukes, guns—oh my! Use them to climb that leaderboard. If you're the last kart standing, you win! It's like musical chairs, but with more explosions. Earn coins and gems to deck out your kart with the craziest skins and characters. Fancy a clown driving a disco ball kart? Here's your chance. Game Modes Explained There are three game modes you can choose in custom multiplayer rooms. Apart from modes you can enable teams, set round duration between 3 to 20 mins, customize weapons and more. Free For All (FFA): It's every kart for themselves! Collect weapons from those mysterious boxes and use them to smash opponents. The player with the most kills at the end of the round wins. It's pure, unadulterated kart chaos. Gem Collector: Scattered around the arena are gems. Your mission is to collect more gems than your rivals before time runs out. Think of it like a treasure hunt, but with a lot more explosions. Hat Holder: One hat to rule them all! Find and hold onto the hat for as long as you can while everyone else tries to take it from you. You can't use weapons while carrying the hat, so it's all about evasion and cunning. The Arena of Anarchy: Smash Karts io Game Maps Dive into an colorful and chaotic maps, each with its own flair for destruction. These tracks are not just for racing; they're battlefields where every corner hides the potential for either glory or a hilarious wipeout. Graveyard Graveyard CTF Lava Pit Lava Pit CTF Skate Park Sky Arena Dropzone Sky Arena Pinball Sky Arena Showdown Sky Arena Temples Sky Arena Tunnels Slick 'n Slide Smash Fort Smash Fort CTF Smash Island Snow Shrine Snowpark Snowpark CTF Space Station Space Stations Steky's Speedway The Gravel Pit The Old Graveyard Developer Smash Karts io was brought to life by TallTeam, who unleashed this game on March 25, 2020. More io Games If you're into the global io game scene with a side of cartoonish carnage, check out other io games like Snow War io , where winter warfare is served with a side of snowballs. So, strap in, rev up, and prepare for a no-holds-barred battle where the only rule is there are no rules. Welcome to Smash Karts, where every race is a riot!

title: Magic Tiles 3
description: Magic Tiles 3 is a rhythm-based music game where you can play your favorite music by tapping on the screen or the relevant keys on the keyboard. There are more than +45,000 songs at your disposal to play! Choose the ones that you love listening to and start playing them on the piano by following the tiles. 🎶 Controls Mouse: Tap on the tiles. FGHJ Keys: To tap the tiles in the corresponding lanes. Magic Tiles 3 Overview Are you ready to lose yourself in the rhythm of the music? Sit down at the piano. It’s your turn to play in Magic Tiles 3! In the menu, you will see a wide range of songs listed. From well-known pop songs to R&B, hip-hop, and rock music. Pick one of them and start to play it without missing any notes. Try to score the best by tapping on the piano tiles in the corresponding lanes. Flex Your Fingers When you start the song, the tiles will slide across the screen in four lanes. You need to catch each tile by pressing the key for the relevant lane. We recommend using FGHJ keys because sometimes there are two tiles on the screen you need to catch. Using the mouse may cause you to miss a note. You need to press the piano keys at exactly the right time to achieve the highest score. Neither too early nor too late! Tap the black tiles and avoid the black ones. The Longer Notes There are two kinds of notes in Magic Tiles 3: the short notes and the longer ones. When you see a short note, it is okay to press the relevant key. However, when there is a long note, you need to hold the piano key until it disappears. The Song List You can browse the songs by scrolling down the screen. There are tons of music from many different genres in the database. Additionally, you will see a label next to each song. These indicate the difficulty level of playing the song. The difficulty levels are, in order: “Easy, Normal, Hard, and Expert.” Sunflower by Post Malone Bad Romance by Lady Gaga Blinding Lights by The Weeknd Starboy by The Weeknd ft. Daft Punk If I Were a Boy by Beyoncé Baby One More Time by Britney Spears FAQs I can enter the game, but the loading symbol keeps spinning on the screen. Why? An ad blocker most likely causes this. We recommend disabling the ad blocker from the “Extensions” tab. Are my scores saved automatically? Don’t worry. Your scores are saved automatically, so you can pick up where you left off. Developer Amanotes developed Magic Tiles 3. Similar Music Games Magic Tiles 3 is a magical music game. If you are searching for more, give Friday Night Funkin' a try. Compete with the lively characters by following on-screen notes and defeat your competitors!

title: Cookie Clicker
description: Cookie Clicker is an idle clicker game in which your greatest challenge is to bake the best cookies in the Shiny Giraffe’s Bakery! Tap on the giant cookie on the screen, and watch the cookies multiply. Keep in mind that the more you click, the more delicious cookies you get. Visit the Store to produce even more chocolate chip cookies with the help of grandmas, farms and mines! Controls LMB: Click on the Cookie On Mobile Devices: Tap on the cookie to produce more. Cookie Clicker Overview In Cookie Clicker , the main goal is to click the giant cookie with chocolate chips to produce more of them. As you progress, you can build your own cookie company! Imagine having the most famous cookie brand with yummy cookies everywhere. To have that brand, build cursors, hire grandmas to bake your cookies with their old but gold recipes, and unlock farms to grow cookie plants from cookie seeds! Visit Cookie Clicker Store To grow your cookie brand, you need to produce a great deal of chocolate chip cookies per second. Luckily, you can increase the number of cookies that are produced with every click and per second with the help of buildings in the Cookie Clicker Store! Cursor: Autoclicks once every 10 seconds. Grandma: A nice grandma to bake more cookies. Farm: Grows cookie plants from cookie seeds. Mine: Mines out cookie dough and chocolate chips. Factory: Produces large quantities of cookies. Upgrades in Cookie Clicker To increase the cookie production in your buildings, you can unlock upgrades to increase their production capacity. Our mascot, Gamie , listed some of the upgrades below for you! Check them out for easy access to more cookies. :) Reinforced Index Finger: The mouse and cursors are twice as efficient. Forwards from Grandma: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Cheap Hoes: Farms are twice as efficient. Sugar Gas: Mines are twice as efficient. Sturdier Conveyor Belts: Factories are twice as efficient. Top Cookie Clicker Cheats The “OpenSesame” Menu Click on your bakery name in the top-left corner. Click “Customize”. Add “ saysopensesame ” to the end of your name (e.g., OnlineGames saysopensesame). Confirm. A small menu icon will appear top-left, giving you access to all debug tools, including building spawning, golden cookies, and instant upgrades. Console Commands (Browser Version) Open Console (F12) and type Game.cookies = [Number]; to set your cookies. Game.cookies = Infinity; for unlimited cookies. Game.RuinTheFun(1); unlocks everything. Game.lumps = amount; to add sugar lumps. Time Manipulation (Offline Income) Save your game, close the tab, change your computer’s date to several years in the future, and reopen the game to gain massive “offline” production. Developer Cookie Clicker is developed by DashNet. Similar Clicker Games If you like playing clicker games like this, you may also give Spacebar Clicker a chance! For additional options, feel free to visit our Clicker Games Online page by following the link. Bookmark this website in your browser to easily come back!

title: Highway Traffic
description: Highway Traffic game is centered around driving down the highway, dodging other cars, and avoiding accidents. It gets tricky because other vehicles are slowing down, speeding up or stopping abruptly, so you always have to keep your attention and be ready to make a quick maneuver. The longer you go without hitting other cars, the more points you collect and the more upgrades you can get. Highway Traffic gets challenging very quickly, so you must build up crazy driving skills to reach higher levels! Controls W or up arrow: accelerate A/D, or left/right arrow: steer the car Space bar: use handbrake Left shift or F: use car boost Road Options You can choose various car models and styles and set weather options to increase the challenge in Highway Traffic. Enjoy the sunny road, brighten the night with your headlights or slide on a wet road on a rainy day. Game Modes Highway Traffic also has several modes to make the game even more fun and complex. It comes with 4 modes, each having its own significant challenges. One way: The cars are driving in one direction without any concern for oncoming traffic. Two-way: This allows vehicles to travel in either direction. Riskier than the one-way but brings more points and coins if you drive on the wrong way. Time attack: As the name says, your time is limited in this mode. Survive the traffic without making any accidents until the time is up. Be prepared; it gets pretty wild quickly. Speed Bomb: You need to be careful how you drive the bus. When you drive slower than the lower limit or collide with other cars, the bomb might bring the end of the game. The bus explodes. Display Features While playing, you can check your progress on the display screen. Score, speed, distance, camera, high speed, and combos will be on for you to keep track. Similar Games If you liked playing this car game, try Highway Racer Pro , a traffic game that's just right out of the oven! With improved graphics and garage options, you'll keep the fun alive!

title: Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting
description: Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting is a 3D shooting game where you take down the most wanted criminals with your sniper rifle! Accept special missions and save the civilians from the hands of mafia members from afar using a sniper. Try to precisely aim at the criminals and avoid shooting innocent people. Eliminate mafia targets by completing the high-risk missions in this FPS game! Controls W Key: Zoom In S Key: Zoom Out LMB or RMB: Shoot How to Play Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting In Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting , you are the coldest sniper in the entire city. The FBI wants to collaborate with you on special missions. Accept the missions, and save the city from the mafia members one by one. However, you should be careful, as there are innocent people around the criminals while you are on duty. You must avoid accidentally shooting the civilians, or the mission will fail. If you are ready, grab your sniper rifle and get to your place on a rooftop! Game Modes in Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting Leader In the Leader mode, your goal is to shoot down the mafia leaders. The missions in Leader mode are harder than the Campaign and Hunt Down modes. However, the money and gold bars you get from these missions are much higher in amount. Mostly, you will need to take down more criminals at once in the Leader mode. Hunt Down Hunt Down mode requires you to eliminate the wanted criminals as designated by the FBI. Each one of these criminals breaks the law by taking different actions. You need to stop them immediately before they commit another offense. Read the information about them and know your targets better. Campaign Campaign mode lets you handle various situations that threaten innocent people. Stop the criminals before they hurt any civilians. Save the victims from the hands of the villains with your precise aiming skills.
