Restoring safety in the city is your main objective in the missions of the Campaign mode. Tips & Tricks for Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting 🎯 Aim carefully, avoid innocent civilians. 🤓 Use zoom for precise sniper shots. ⏳ Eliminate targets before they escape. 🕹️ Take different missions from three game modes. 🫣 Stay hidden and strike from rooftops. Developer Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting was developed by bestgames.com. Looking for More? Check out Block Sniper if you are looking for more! Complete various missions in a pixelated world. Furthermore, do not forget to view our Shooting Games Online tag for additional game options. Share your gaming experiences with us in the comments section below!

title: Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY
description: Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY is an online dress-up game in which you pick up exhilarating outfits from the DIY paper dolls! Use the wardrobe featuring 1000+ fashion items and choose the latest in trendy attire to shine as a fashionista among others. Mix & match styles, select diverse hairstyles, and finish off your look with makeup touches in this fashion game! Controls LMB: To Interact On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to interact. Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY Overview In Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY , your goal is to prepare your paper doll for diverse occasions. Help her get ready by picking up the finest dresses and shiny accessories. Remember that each decision you make should turn your paper doll into a true fashion icon! Your styling choices not only reflect your unique taste but also guide your doll’s journey through thrilling adventures and challenges. Game Modes in Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY New Story In the New Story mode, you actually step into Elsa’s shoes and experience her life firsthand. Get Elsa ready for her first day of high school, make sure she looks her best for her appointments, and help her to be the one who has the craziest costume at the Halloween party on campus. All eyes on Elsa! Contest In the Contest mode, your objective is to choose a style and prepare your paper doll for a contest. If you manage to stick with the style you choose, you will get the most points and win the contest. Show everyone that you are the fashion queen of the town by winning every contest you take part in! Tips & Tricks for Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY 👗 Mix styles for unique outfits. 🥇 Match themes to win contests. ✨ Experiment with bold accessories. ✂️ Hairstyles complete every fashion look. 📖 Follow story goals for rewards. Developer Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY is developed by Bravestars Games. You May Also Like Did you like playing Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY ? Check out Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary , where you play as a talented tailor. For more game options, feel free to visit our Dress Up Games Online category at the link. Don’t forget to share your gaming experiences with us in the comments section below!

title: Slingshot Fortress
description: Slingshot Fortress is an online puzzle game inspired by Angry Birds. Use your slingshot to launch stones, bombs, and shurikens to destroy towers. Collapse all the structures in a level and uncover all the hidden enemies. Try to score the highest points to get all three stars by using your weapons efficiently! You can also engage in the PVP mode with a friend of yours and duel with them on the same device. Controls LMB: Aim Drag the Mouse: Pull Back Release: Launch Click LMB: Activate Effect Slingshot Fortress Overview In Slingshot Fortress , your main goal is to use your slingshot and launch projectiles to destroy structures. Just like you do in Angry Birds, you need to eliminate all the hidden enemies to pass every level. Pull back the slingshot, aim precisely, and launch the projectiles one after another to collapse towers. Keep in mind that you will unlock new kinds of projectiles such as bombs, rockets and shurikens as you make progress in this puzzle game! Projectiles in Slingshot Fortress In the first levels, you have rocks that collapse structures. However, you will unlock new and advanced projectiles as you progress through the levels. Each projectile you unlock comes with a special effect and has its own pros and cons. Rock: A basic rock. Ice Shuriken: Tap to split into 3 clones. Missile: Tap to reach distant targets. Bomb: Tap to explode. Yoyo: Tap to make it come back. Magnet: Tap to attract, and tap again to repulse. Ghost: Tap to make it scream. Gun: Tap to shoot three times. Unlock New Slingshots When you pass each level successfully, you will earn coins to unlock new kinds of slingshots. Besides the default slingshot, you can get Ice, Wood, Stone and Royal ones. Each of them works well on different materials; for example, the Ice slingshot increases damage against icy plates, while the Stone can easily get through rock plates. Tips & Tricks for Slingshot Fortress 🎯 Aim before releasing projectiles. 💥 Trigger effects at impact. 💡 Target weak tower supports. ⭐ Save weapons for stars. 🚀 Master each projectile type. Developer Slingshot Fortress was developed by Mao Games. More Games Like This Try playing Bullet Master , where you try to clear enemies by indirect shots if you like playing Slingshot Fortress. For more game options, feel free to visit our Puzzle Games Online page at the link. Do not forget to share your gaming experiences with us in the comments section below!

title: Five Nights At Freddy's 2
description: Five Nights at Freddy's 2 ( FNaF 2 ) is a popular horror game with a spooky environment and a thrilling narrative. If you have the courage for it, play it now for free on OnlineGames.io! Controls Desktops Interact with lights: Mouse Turn on flashlight: Hold Space Wear a mask and access cameras: Hover the Mouse Over Two Panels What is the story of Five Nights at Freddy's ? Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria opened with wild enthusiasm. The initial aim was to serve delicious pizzas and entertain customers' children with animatronics. However, the opening was followed by a series of tragic events . Reports of missing children after visits to Fazbear's Pizza began to surface. These reports caused widespread concern among the residents. Rumors about murders and horror stories started spreading. Some people claimed that the animatronics were haunted and even bit children to death. In one incident, an animatronic bit a security guard , resulting in his death. These rumors led to the closure of the restaurant, and the missing children were never found. In the sequel, Five Nights at Freddy's 2, the pizzeria reopens and needs new staff. They quickly find waiters and chefs but struggle to fill the night security guard position. No one wants to work the night shift in a haunted restaurant. But here you are on this singular page. Perhaps thinking, "What could go wrong? These must be just rumors. I need to pay my bills, and this job pays very well. I'll give this place a chance." Welcome to your new job: night shift security guard at Fazbear's Pizza . Keep your eyes open, we're beginning! Let's give you an onboarding before the mission! How to Play FNAF 2 Take on the role of a night security guard. You must survive five consecutive shifts at Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria, working from 12 AM to 6 AM . You may not feel nervous now, but this place gets very dark at night. Remember the rumors about the haunted animatronics? It's best to keep an eye on the security cameras to ensure none are approaching your location. Stay Alive Your aim is to survive for five nights. The main threat is the animatronics, which can attack if you're not careful. Use the security cameras to track their movements. They can only move when you're not watching, so stay on alert. Manage Resources You have a flashlight , but its battery is limited . Use it wisely and only when necessary. Get Ready for Jumpscares! While monitoring the cameras, an animatronic might suddenly appear right in front of you. Prepare yourself for jump scares and play safely in this thrilling horror game !

title: Impostor
description: Impostor is an online arcade game inspired by Among Us, where you play as the impostor. The game takes place on a spaceship drifting through space, with a crew trying to survive. Your goal is to sabotage their work before they finish their tasks, all while keeping your identity hidden. Be careful—one wrong move could expose you, so stay sneaky. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Press the Buttons: Sabotage / Vent / Kill How to Play Impostor In Impostor, you’re on a spaceship with several crewmates, each working on tasks to keep the ship running. You are the impostor, and your job is to sabotage their efforts so they can’t fix the ship. Use the vents to move around and take out crew members one at a time. Remember to stay hidden so no one discovers you’re the impostor. Take Impostor Actions Pretend to do tasks so the crew doesn’t suspect you. Use the vents to move around the ship, and when you find a crew member alone, sabotage the machines. After you sabotage, there’s a short cooldown, but you can still eliminate crew members during this time. Avoid Being Ejected When someone finds a dead body, the crew votes to eject someone from the spaceship. If they figure out you’re the killer, you’ll be kicked out. That’s why you need to be careful. Try to catch crew members alone and eliminate them quietly. Tips & Tricks for Impostor 🫣 Blend in by faking crew tasks. 👻 Use vents to move unseen quickly. 😈 Sabotage systems to create perfect chaos. 🔪 Strike only when completely alone nearby. 💡 Stay calm during meetings, avoid suspicion. Developer Impostor is published by DRA. More Games Like This Did you enjoy playing Impostor ? You might also like Impostor Among Us: Escape from Prison , where you try to escape a space prison by getting past all the traps. For more games, visit our Arcade Games Online page. Press CTRL + D to bookmark this site and come back anytime!

title: Five Nights At Freddys
description: Freddy Fazbear's Pizza restaurant opens its doors to the customers! They needed a night watchman and you got the job. Five Nights at Freddy's (FNAF) is a 2D action game where you work as the security guard of this legendary restaurant. You must be on duty for five consecutive nights from midnight to 6 am. However, you need to be careful! The animatronics are wandering around the lobbies in this survival game! Controls Desktops and Laptops Mouse: Look Around Left-Click: Interact with Lights and Doors Hover the Mouse Over (at the bottom of the screen): Open the Camera Panel Mobile Devices Use the touchscreen to play the game. About FNAF WARNING! This horror game contains flashing lights, loud noises and lots of jumpscares! The legendary restaurant has opened and will start serving. They need a security guard who will work between 12 am and 6 am. And now you got that job. You will be responsible for the safety of Freddy Fazbear's Pizza restaurant . But this won't be easy. Because when night comes, animatronic characters will start wandering in the lobbies. Watch them on camera, and close the doors when they approach. Don't let the sounds startle you. Monitor Animatronics There are four animatronics in this horror game. Their names are Freddy Fazbear, Bonnie, Chica and Foxy . They will wander around the restaurant at night. You must avoid getting in touch with them as they can easily jumpscare you. If you jumpscare, you will restart from the beginning. Ensure that they can't reach you! To survive, you must monitor the security cameras from the camera panel. There are eleven cameras to check. And you need to keep checking them one by one frequently until your watch is over. Turn off the doors and lights when they approach you! Use the Power Properly To guard yourself from the animatronics, you need to keep the doors shut. You will also need to use lights from time to time. But they work with power. If the battery reaches zero it will not be possible to use them. Just a reminder to use the power responsibly in the restaurant. Only use it when needed to save energy . You can keep an eye on the battery level in the lower left corner of the screen. What is More? You may also try playing Horror Granny if you enjoy playing this action game. You need to run from the eyes of the Granny to survive. Will you be able to escape from her and the demonic spirits? For additional options, you may look online horror games on OnlineGames.io. If you have any suggestions or a wishlist, please do not hesitate to contact us! We would be very happy to hear from you.

title: Hexanaut io
description: Get ready to be an expansionist, conquer and defend your territory in Hexanaut io! Hexanaut io is an online browser game where you find yourself capturing more and more honeycombs with your little snake. Be careful not to be cut by other players or cut your own tail. It's always safe in your area. But, when you leave your home made of hexagons in your color, try to keep your tail short to protect yourself from enemies. Since they will be closely watching to cut you and get your land. Move gradually, get the various totems on the map and be the King of Hexanaut.io. Unlock and try out tons of different skins and badges to show your style on the map. Colorblind mode is also supported. You can turn the mode on by navigating the settings on the main menu. How to Play Hexanaut.io? Choose a color and icon of yours before starting. Enter the game and use your cursor or arrow keys to navigate on the Hexanaut io map. You will begin with 7 hexagons. Wander outside of your home to get more land. You will see your tail growing while you are out of your home. Keep your tail safe. If it gets sliced, you have to start over. Be careful the tail can be cut by other players and yourself. Also, try not to collide with other snakes' heads, then both of you get eliminated. As you get more land, you will level up and gain speed bonuses. Protect your land by acquiring precious totems. If you get more than %20 of the map, you will be the King of the Hexanaut io. Reaching that level is difficult enough, but maintaining it is just as challenging. Totems There are 5 types of totems on the Hexanaut io map. Speed Totem: You will receive an extra boost in speed. Spy Dish: The minimap displays the territories of other players. Spreading Totem: Automatically catches nearby areas for you Teleport Gate: Teleports you to the farthest point on your territory Slowing Totem: Create a misty region that hinders your opponents' movement. Game Modes Free For All: Play solo and try to rank on the leaderboard Duo: Play with a teammate to share and enlarge a territory together. You will not collide with your teammate. Developer Hexanaut io was created by Exodragon Games. More Games Like This If you enjoy Hexanaut io, check out our selection of io Games . Gamers obsessed with hexagon shape, we have good news! Now you can find other Hexagon Games on the dedicated tag!

title: FamiDash
description: FamiDash is a rhythm-based platformer game where you guide your cube on extremely challenging obstacle courses. Master controlling your cube, dodge all kinds of obstacles on the way, and try to reach the finish line in every level in this Geometry Dash-inspired game. Keep your eyes wide, and stay away from the spiky objects to avoid restarting the levels! Controls Upper Arrow: Jump Alternatively, you can use the Z Key to jump. Enter: Pause the Game On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to jump. FamiDash Overview In FamiDash , your main goal is to jump your cube when necessary to avoid crashing into any object on the obstacle courses. Dodge all obstacles by taking control of the cube, and try to reach the finish line without crashing into objects. Also, there are 22 modes with unique courses, and each one is harder than before. Explore each mode, listen to the music carefully, and lose yourself to the beats to easily complete levels! Game Modes in FamiDash Stereo Madness Stereo Madness in FamiDash is the primary game mode where players jump, fly, and navigate obstacles across various forms, including cube, ship, and ball. Jump over spikes and obstacles, control a flying ship by holding to go up and releasing to go down. Back on Track Back on Track is the second game mode in FamiDash, and it is more challenging than Stereo Madness. Overall, all FamiDash levels require precise movements and timing. However, Back on Track demands quick decisions to survive through the obstacle course. Tips & Tricks for FamiDash ⏳ Time jumps with rhythm beats. 💡 Stay sharp, dodge spike traps. 🕹️ Master cube control for survival. 🧐 Learn patterns, react instantly, always. 🤓 Focus hard, finish every level. Developer Kandowontu developed the FamiDash, inspired by Geometry Dash. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing games like Geometry Dash, you may also try playing Jump Dash , in which you can create your own level! For more options, feel free to check out our Arcade Games Online page at the link. There are dozens of free online games at your disposal on www.onlinegames.io!

title: Idol Livestream Doll Dress Up
description: Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up is an online fashion game where you prepare your character for the livestream audition. Dress her up in such a way that juries can not deny your character’s charm! Earn stars from the auditions and unlock new outfits, hairstyles and accessories. You can even decorate your home! Controls Mouse Click: to Pick Up Outfits and Mix Styles Tap on: Virtual Buttons on Smartphones and Tablets How to Play Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up Dress up your doll character for the highly competitive fashion contests and try to get the highest points from the juries. Or, you can help her get ready for the livestream that she will get likes! However, take into account the stage where she will be part of the livestream while preparing her. You must increase the gift package bar to get the highest number of likes. Check the bar on the left side of the screen! Fashion Contests You can enter a fashion contest by clicking on the “V.S” button on the menu. This way, you can be paired with another doll and appear before the jury. There are three outfits, hairstyles, accessories and shoes options for you to choose from. Pick the best ones to make your doll look elegant and get the most points from the juries. Livestream Fashion Show Your doll loves going live on her social media. Click the “Prepare” button in the menu to dress her for a livestream fashion show. The game randomly selects one of the scenes, ranging from Christmas, Halloween, and the beach to Valentine's Day and more. Prepare her accordingly for the selected scene, and you will get the highest likes! Decorate the Doll House You will earn stars from the fashion contests and the livestream shows. You can use them for decorating the house. Click on the “Furniture” section and start decorating your very own home. Choose the floors, wallpapers, and beds, and place a window to let in fresh air! Place a teddy bear on your bed. Get shelves for your fashion magazines. Developer Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up is published by Bravestars Games. Similar Dress Up Games Enjoyed playing Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up? You may also try Fashion Holic . Complete your modelling tasks by preparing your fashionista in accordance with the dress codes! For similar dress-up games online , visit our game library using the link. There are dozens of free online games at your disposal!

title: Football Bros IO
description: Football Bros IO is an arcade-style sports game with straightforward controls and quick matches, letting you dominate the football field with ease. Cartoonish graphics add an extra level of fun while trying to score a goal. Choose the best team and enter the field to outsmart the opponents. You can play with a friend on the same device if you wish. Controls 1 Player WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar: Pass/Dive/Stiff Arm 2 Players Player 1 WASD Keys: Move G: Pass/Dive/Stiff Arm Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move L: Pass/Dive/Stiff Arm How to Play Football Bros IO Kansas City, Pittsburgh, San Francisco, Chicago, Dallas, and Green Bay teams are ready to enter the football field with you! Select the team you want to win matches side by side. Customize your players’ outfits to your taste, then click the “Ready!” button when everything is set up. To win the matches, you must act strategically and knock your opponents down to reach their goal. The closer your players are to the opponent’s side, the higher the chances of scoring! Game Modes of Football Bros IO 🎮 Franchise Mode 🏆 In the Franchise Mode, your main aim is to win the Super Bro Bowl! You must engage in a 17-week season to win the Great Cup. Pick a team and choose the players you want to enter the matches with based on their speed, skill, and age. Quick Play 🏈 Quick Play Mode lets you play short, fast-paced matches. The matches continue in two halves, each lasting two minutes. Carry the ball to the opponent’s side and shoot it to score a touchdown! Do not let the rival team knock you down as you move forward. 2 Players Same PC 💻 Challenge yourself with a friend on the same device with the 2 Players Same PC Mode. Both of you need to select a team from the available teams and customize your players as you see fit. Check out the controls for the 2-Player Mode in the relevant section. Developer Blue Wizard Digital developed the Football Bros IO. More Games Like This Rocket Goal IO is another game that suits your tastes well! Steer your car on the football field and hit the giant ball at high speeds to score. Additionally, you can check out free online soccer games on this website by clicking on the link. Keep coming back to discover our newly added games!

title: CS Online
description: Everyone knows the famous Counter Strike game, 2000's online battle arena with online players. CS Online, inspired by Counter-Strike , is a multiplayer shooting game where terrorists and counter-terrorists combat and kill each other with multiple weapon options. It is the online and free version of the original game, and you can access the CS Online on your web browser without downloading or purchasing anything. All you need to do is join an available room and start to play! Since this is a multiplayer online game, you can start the game by first creating your profile and then joining an available room. When you press the "start" button from the menu, the rooms will appear in a list. From here, you can see which map the game is played on and in which mode it is played. Choose the one that appeals to you and start playing. Or create your very own room. How to Play CS Online? Launch the game and join one of the available rooms. If you prefer, you can also create a room of your own. Choose the map you'd like to play in (available maps are Sanctum, Yarimar, Sumerra). Select the weapon policy such as "all weapons," "crazy mode," and "all no RPG." Select the game mode (Free for All, Team Deathmatch). Set the maximum number of players. Move your mouse to look around and shoot using left click. If you need further instructions about controls of the game, have a look at the controls section below. If not, h it the button and dive into action! Weapons The weapons you can access by pressing the numbers between 1 and 9 in the game are listed below. Ballistic Knife Deagle MP5KA4 STW-25 M87T Blaser R93 RPG M79 M67 Controls WASD/ Arrow Keys: Move Left mouse button: Shoot Right mouse button: Aim R: Reload C: Crouch Space bar: Jump Hold shift: Run P: Pause 1-9 key: Change weapon T: Open chat Enter: Send message Tab: Open the menu What to Play Next? If you enjoy games similar to Counter-Strike, we have tons of free shooting games io on OnlineGames.io. Crazy Strike Force : Try this game for another great battle experience with fantastic visuals. Bullet Force : The most popular shooting game on OnlineGames.io. Intense action in this game is loved by thousands. Bullet Force is definitely a must-play. Mini Nova Shooters : For the ones who are fond of action but want to play without hiccups on mobile or budget-friendly devices

title: Stickman Parkour
description: Stickman Parkour is an online platformer game that you can play on your browser, embracing the easy-to-learn but hard-to-master mechanics. Collect keys, open chests, pass levels and help him find his way out across 30 levels. What is Stickman Parkour about? Imagine Stickman, a tiny stick figure who decides one day to go on this epic adventure. He's on a mission to find these super special golden keys. These keys aren't just for opening doors; they unlock these ancient, mysterious gates that might be hiding treasures as cool as a room full of candy! Stickman doesn't have to worry about school or chores, so he's all in for this adventure. His journey is full of crazy challenges like dodging sharp spikes, swinging on ropes like a monkey, and even swimming like he's in a stick figure Olympics. Each key he finds opens a new gate, leading to more challenges. The big dream? To find the very last gate with the final golden key in his pocket! Controls For Computers: Move: Left/Right Arrows or A/D Jump: Up Arrow/W Slide/Dive: Down Arrow/S For Mobiles: Use on-screen buttons to control Stickman How to Play Stickman Parkour Use your keyboard or the buttons on the screen to make Stickman jump over dangers, swing on ropes, and swim through water. It's like playing a superhero in a stick-figure world! Your job is to help Stickman grab these golden keys. They're like the ultimate treasure map pieces! Get Stickman to the end of each level, which is marked by a funny squiggle. Developer Stickman Parkour game was created by FreezeNova Games Studio. Explore More Adventures If you're all about Stickman's high-flying escapades, you'll definitely want to try Fancy Pants . In this side-scrolling game, you control a stick figure with an epic hairdo and even fancier pants, running through worlds that are as wild as Stickman's obstacle course but with its own unique twist of humor and style. It's like if Stickman decided to get a wardrobe upgrade and a new set of challenges.

title: Police Simulator
description: Ever dreamed of being a cop just to drive a super cool police car? Police Simulator makes it happen. Hop in, turn on the sirens, and show your driving skills as you zoom through the city to catch the bad guys. Keep the streets safe and have fun being the coolest cop out there. Game Overview Police Simulator is an exciting driving game where you get to live the life of a real cop on duty. Patrol the streets, take on tough missions, and show that you can handle anything the city throws at you. Every mission is a new challenge, and some are timed, so stay alert and act fast! Complete missions, earn rewards, unlock awesome police cars, and rise to the top as the best officer in town. Whether you’re racing against time, helping people, or catching bad guys, every move you make brings you closer to becoming a legendary cop! How to Play Police Simulator? The gameplay is simple: choose your car, hit Play , and start driving. You’ll get calls to take on missions, and it’s up to you to accept or decline them. The more missions you complete, the more rewards you’ll earn. Choose from 10 cars, each with different features, and take control of the streets to catch the bad drivers. It’s time for some real police action! Drive: WASD / ⬅️⬆️⬇️➡️ Pause / ESC / Garage: ESC Good to Know! Precision matters! Avoid cones and obstacles to keep your streak going. Collect rewards! Complete missions to level up, earn coins, and rise through the police ranks. Catch bad guys in style! The better you play, the faster and cooler your police cars become. Complete missions, earn money, and use it to buy new police cars. Then make it your own and customize it however you like. You can give it your personal touch by painting it, changing its wheels, or doing both. Be fierce! You have to stop the cars you’re chasing by crashing into them again and again until they can’t escape. Don’t let bad drivers take over the streets. FAQs Will my progress be saved? Yes! All your progress is saved, including every police car you unlock in your garage. You can always come back and keep playing right where you left off. What if I fail a mission? Don’t be disappointed! You’ll get more calls and new chances to complete missions and keep moving up the ranks. Does the police car make a difference? Yes! Each car has different acceleration, speed, and handling, so picking the right one can help you complete missions faster and catch bad guys more easily. Similar Games If you feel ready for more police action, try Police Real Chase Car Simulator . Get in your cop car, explore a big city, take mission calls, and chase bad guys in exciting street races, all wrapped up in a more realistic gameplay experience this time.

title: Stickman GTA City
description: You've been digging the internet for ages, looking for a free GTA game to play on your browser, only to end up with games that disappoint faster than a balloon losing air. You might have given up hope, reminiscing about the days of cruising through GTA San Andreas or Vice City with your bro. Think of how much you missed even hearing that iconic sound, the one that plays right as the screen fades to black with a bold "Wasted!" slapped across it? Ah, the good old days. But wipe that frown off your face because your miserable search ends here! We have brought you an online GTA game that captures the essence of San Andreas as much as possible. Stickman GTA City is a 3D action adventure game that you can play on your browser, absolutely free. You'll be stealing cars, dodging cops, and probably accidentally running over some stick pedestrians who didn't look both ways. And tanks? Helicopters? It's like Santa's gone rogue in the crime world! Whether you're following orders from your Mafia Boss or just exploring the vast open world, Stickman GTA City lets you play it your way. Have fun! Controls Movement W, A, S, D: Move Spacebar: Jump LMB: Look Around Shift: Sprint C: Crouch F: Enter or exit vehicles Shooting / Attacking Z: Aim RMB or Ctrl: Shoot/Attack R: Reload 1-9 or Q key or Mouse Scroll: Switch Weapons J, K, L Keys: Rocket Launcher, RDP and Barret ⚠ Mature Content Warning Stickman GTA City is recommended for mature players due to frequent violence, crime-focused missions, and intense action sequences. These elements may be unsuitable for younger audiences. If you prefer a more casual or family-friendly experience, check out other free games on our site. Player discretion is advised. How to Play Stickman GTA City Start by picking a place to spawn on the GTA city map. You'll begin with your first mission of evading the police and driving to the mafia escape house. After completing the first mission, you're free to follow mafia missions or explore the city at your own pace. You can access main and side missions using Stickman's phone. Completing missions will bring lots of cash. Use your Stickman's skills to steal vehicles, take down enemies, and evade the cops. Collect money and weapons scattered across the city. Check your Stickman's health level often. If health is zero, you need to start over! Note: Remember there's no one-size-fits-all approach to playing open-world games. So, grab the controls, go out there and find your own way. Maybe you can tell us about your story in the comment section below. Cheats Let's face it; sometimes you just want to fly around in a jetpack without all that pesky "earning it" stuff. Experiment with cheats using your in-game phone to make the game even more exciting. You can spawn tanks, helicopters and even jetpacks, fill your ammo or unlock new weapons without writing down those rusty cheat codes like GIVEUSATANK or GUNSGUNSGUNS. Stickman Skins Last but not least, you change your Stickman's skin in the shop. Each avatar comes with different power, health and attack stats, so you can decide if you want to be the Usain Bolt or the Hulk of stickmen. Developer Stickman GTA City is developed by FreezeNova. More Free GTA Games In the end, Stickman GTA City is the love child of chaos and simplicity, wrapped in a stick-figure blanket. It's not taking itself seriously, and neither should you. It's where you can enjoy the thrill of GTA without the guilt of actual crime - unless you count stick-figure murder and grand theft auto as crimes. Dive in, laugh a lot, and maybe learn that even stickmen have dreams of becoming crime lords. If you enjoy Stickman GTA City, don't forget to check out our other free GTA games for more action-packed fun! Play now and embrace the chaos!

title: Italian Brainrot Bike Rush
description: In Italian Brainrot Bike Rush , there’s no real rush because the road to victory never seems to end. Your goal is to master your bike skills and be ready for whatever comes next. You have to jump fast and avoid every crazy obstacle, or you might evaporate and have to start all over again! Game Overview Italian Brainrot Bike Rush is a wild bike game where the viral TikTok meme meets an endless parkour track filled with surprising jumps and tricky obstacles. Choose one of the funny brainrot characters, ride across floating platforms, avoid traps, and test how fast your reflexes are. The game gets even more exciting with the choice of one-player or two-player modes. You can race on your own or challenge a friend for extra fun! How to Play Italian Brainrot Bike Rush? The gameplay is simple: ride your bike along a long sky-high road, try not to fall, stay clear of obstacles, and collect coins to unlock new skins. The game has five levels: Easy , Medium , Hard , Very Hard , and Insane . You can play alone or challenge a friend for extra fun. Whenever you start playing, you can choose between Normal mode, Challenge mode, or One Life . Normal Mode Ride your bike through the endless, exciting path. After reaching checkpoints, if you fall, you restart from your last checkpoint. Challenge Mode You are timed. Try to beat your best score. This mode is even more fun when you race against a friend. One Life Just like the name says: if you fall, it’s game over. Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Parkour! One Player Move: WASD / ⬅️⬆️⬇️➡️ Jump: SPACE Turbo: Shift + W / Shift + ⬆️ Two Player Move: WASD / ⬅️⬆️⬇️➡️ Jump: SPACE / L Turbo: Shift + W / Shift + K + ⬆️ Others Main Menu / Restart: ESC View: Right Mouse Button Good to Know! Checkpoints matter: they are your safety nets. Each time you reach one, your progress is saved, so if you fall later, you don’t have to start all the way from the beginning. Instead, you’ll continue from the last checkpoint you touched. The more checkpoints you reach, the closer you get to the finish line. Control is the key! Balance and timing are everything. Unless you’re playing in Challenge Mode , there’s no need to rush. Focus on every move and plan your jumps carefully. Higher levels will test your reflexes and control, so be patient and steady. If you move too fast, you might speed straight into the abyss and have to begin again. Collect your coins! Gather as many as you can, especially to buy silly skins. The more coins you collect, the more ways you’ll have to customize your character and make your game even more fun and exciting. Spin the wheel of luck! If you’re feeling lucky, give it a spin to see what prizes you can win. You might earn extra coins, unlock new skins, or even get a special surprise! Claim your daily gifts! Since your progress is saved, you can return anytime to collect your daily rewards. Keep coming back each day to earn new prizes and stay ahead on your parkour journey. The more days you play, the better your rewards become! Take a break! If you need a rest from all the action, relax and watch a few short ads. This quick pause gives you extra spins or helps you unlock new silly skins that make the game even more chaotic and fun. A short break can help you come back refreshed and ready for another round of wild parkour! FAQs Will my progress be saved? Yes. Your levels, skins, characters, and best times are saved, so you can always come back and keep playing right where you stopped. What if I fall? No worries. You can always try again. If you reach a checkpoint, you’ll restart from there. But in One Life mode, falling means the run is over unless you watch an ad to keep going. Can I play with friends? Yes. There is a two-player split-screen mode where you can race a friend and see who reaches the finish line first. Is this game mobile-friendly? Yes. You can play Italian Brainrot Bike Rush on both computer and mobile, so you can enjoy parkouring anywhere you want. Similar Games Enjoyed the chaos of Italian Brainrot Bike Rush ? Then you’ll love Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour ! Take your meme skills off the bike and onto your own two feet as you run across sky-high tracks filled with tricky jumps, wild traps, and endless brain-rot fun.

title: Masked Special Forces
description: Masked Special Forces is a multiplayer first-person shooter game with a myriad of customization options. The game puts you in the shoes of a commander in the battle arena. As a talented warrior, team up, strategize, and take down the opponents one by one. Access to an array of upgradable weapons, armory, kill messages, and victory dances on the main menu. Ultra-realistic visuals and smooth gameplay will give you a feel at least as captivating as an iconic console game. In this fast-paced action game, you get to dive into an intense battle immediately. Or you can customize your gaming experience thoroughly before the gunfight. Select between available rooms, or create your own by selecting between detailed maps. Masked Special Forces is a game that stands out among all shooter games online thanks to its lifelike details. The game has been loved and played by thousands since its initial release. So, it happened to be a pioneer of a whole sequel with six different FPS games. If you are wondering about other games on the Masked Forces, we highly recommend you try your hand at Masked Forces Zombie Survival . We invite you to a virtual shooting experience. Start playing with other players all around the world, or keep reading this post about Masked Special Forces to prepare for the battle. Learn about the armory, game modes, HUD and more about the game. If you need further guidance on how to get better at FPS games , we have picked the best advice from our top gamers. ⚠ Content Advisory This game includes mature elements such as intense action, strong language, or violent sequences. Player discretion is advised. If you’re looking for a different type of gameplay, explore our family-friendly game selection. How To Play Masked Special Forces You can begin the game by joining a room made by other players, or you can create one yourself. To do that, you must give a name to the room, choose the maximum players, game mode, round time, bot count and map. After entering a room, the battle starts immediately. Take your position and start eliminating enemies. Learn about how to aim and shoot, other controls, display, armory, and maps below. Controls WASD or arrow keys to move Left mouse click to fire Right mouse click to aim Space to jump Q to slide while running Left shift to run 1, 2, 3 (or scroll) to change weapon E or F to interact/pick up a weapon G to throw available dynamite H to use available medkits T to chat L to toggle cursor lock C to crouch Hold Tab to show the scoreboard Escape to pause HUD BP & Health (displayed on the top left) Kill feed (displayed on the top left) Map (displayed on the top right) Ammo (displayed on the bottom right) Maps Four different maps with realistic visuals and hidden gems are as follows. Choose your favorite and create your room on the map. Abandoned House Factory Killhouse Warehouse Game Modes The game has 6 insane modes you can choose from, and these are: Team Death Match Free For All (Battle Royale) Capture the Flag Gun Game Arcade Doom Online Player vs Player (PvP) mode Armory Section You have 2 load-outs to fill with epic weapons. Pick between various shotguns, rifles and melees to equip yourself with a great combination. Available weapons are as follows: MP5K N870 SC-AR SC-DMR AX-50 MGL Tommy SC-L M4A1 AWP Crossbow CZ75 PPK Magnum Knife Axe Frag Grenade Syringe Helmets 1-8 Armor 1-8 Perks Unlock potent Perks to gain an edge in the arena: Quickdraw ammo Bolt Runner Silence Walker Explosion Master Bomber Man Samurai UAV Ghost Sitrep Fast Drawer Kill Message You noob! LOL! Good try! You picked the wrong house! That's not how the soldiers do! Why so serious? Wrong way, sir! Emotes Victory 1 Victory 2 Victory 3 Chicken Dance Robot Hip Hop Dance Macarena Dance Wave Hip Hop Dance Tut Hip Hop Dance Boogaloo Dance Thank you! Profile Section In the profile section, you will be able to change the nickname and load/save code (only experience can be saved through this code. You can replace your current load code with another one that loads a higher value.) It will include the following details: K/D Rate, Games Played, Total Play Time, Kills, Scores, Wins, Headshot Counts, Knife Kills, and Assist Counts. Store Section Rewarded Ads: Gold +5000, Diamond +1000 Loot Box: Common Case (available with 500 diamonds) Rare Case (available with 1000 diamonds) Legendary Case (available with 2000 diamonds) Developer FreezeNova developed Masked Special Forces. More FPS Games Online Loved Masked Special Forces but want to try new maps? OnlineGames.io is a heaven for gamers. Take a look at dozens of shooting games online that come with different scenarios and graphics. We upload new games regularly, so stay in touch to learn about recent releases. Bookmark this website (Ctrl +D) so as not to lose your progress.

title: Hunter Underwater Spearfishing
description: Hunter Underwater Spearfishing is a browser-friendly simulator game where you hunt sea creatures deep beneath the ocean. Use your speargun, take aim, and take down sea turtles, seals, shrimps and more. However, you should use your speargun’s arrows wisely, as you have a limited amount of them. Get ready for the immersive underwater adventure in this 3D simulator game! Controls WASD Keys: Move LMB: Look Around Left-Shift: Sprint F Key: Shoot Hunter Underwater Spearfishing Overview In Hunter Underwater Spearfishing , your main objective is to dive into the ocean with your speargun and hunt sea creatures. In each level, you will hunt a new kind of animal specified at the top left corner. Try not to waste your shots, since you have a limited amount of arrows. Get close to them, and aim at their head so that the damage can be at maximum levels. As you complete missions, you will get coins to buy new spearguns in this simulator game! Sea Creatures With this simulator game, you will be able to explore the depths of the ocean. You will encounter common and uncommon sea creatures under the deep water. Every level requires you to hunt a new species of sea animals such as mosasaurus, arowanas, and orcas. Don’t forget to read the information about the species at the top left corner of the screen and learn about the marine animals! Unlock New Spearguns With each level you complete, you will earn in-game currencies. You can use your coins to unlock new and advanced spearguns at the shop. In later levels, it will be important to use strong spearguns with a high attack range. You will need to hunt marine predators such as tiger sharks and saltwater crocodiles. Tips & Tricks for Hunter Underwater Spearfishing 🎣 Aim carefully, conserve limited speargun arrows. 🎯 Get close, headshots deal maximum damage. 🐬 Learn species behavior before each hunt. 🤑 Unlock new spearguns using earned mission coins. 🦈 Explore depths, hunt rare ocean predators. Developer bestgames.com developed Hunter Underwater Spearfishing. Similar Simulator Games Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat is another game that suits your tastes well! Get in the shoes of a mischievous orange cat and knock the plates to the floor. Additionally, you are always welcome to visit our Simulator Games Online page by following the link. Bookmark this website in your browser to easily come back!

title: Dig out of Prison
description: Dig out of Prison is a 3D escape game in which you are in the shoes of a prisoner. Help him break free from the prison by digging out a hole. However, you must remain alert at all times. As the guard constantly wanders around. You will feel like you are Michael Scofield from the popular TV series Prison Break while playing this exciting simulator game! ⛏ Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar: Climb up E Key: Take/Hide Items X Key: Sleep/Let the Guard Go Dig out of Prison Overview You wake up and find yourself in a prison cell, just like in Prison Break. You need to get your freedom back as soon as possible. You look around the cell to find a way to break free. And suddenly, you see the carpet on the floor. When you lift the carpet, you notice that the ground beneath is full of sand. By digging here, you might find a way out for yourself. Dig out a big hole under the carpet. Keep checking the guard as he wanders around the cells. You should never let him catch you digging a hole! Leave No Trace 🤫 After digging out the ground, there will be dirt on the floor. You must flush all the dirt down the toilet, close the rug, and hide the spoon under the bed. If the guard sees any of the traces, you are in great trouble! You must avoid getting noticed. Our mascot, Gamie, suggests you keep checking the Guard’s returning time from the upper right side of the screen. Sell the Items to the Guard 🧻 While digging the hole, you will cover hidden items such as boots, phones and alarm clocks. Take them into your backpack. There is a room for 5 items in it. Put them on the bench and call the guard. He buys them in exchange for toilet paper. You can use these toilet papers to buy new items from other prisoners, or take food to increase your energy. Developer IncrediGames developed the Dig out of Prison. Looking for More? JailBreak Prison Escape is another game that suits your tastes well if you enjoy exciting challenges! Break codes and find hidden keys to escape from the prison without being caught. Additionally, you are always welcome to visit our Escape Games Online game tag for more options.

title: Obby But You're on a Bike
description: Hop on your bike and start riding in the wild world of Obby But You're on a Bike ! This fun 3D platformer game allows you to tackle crazy obstacle courses as your Roblox character rides through ramps, loops, and narrow parkour . Each of the 8 worlds is packed with hundreds of flags to collect, making every ride an adventure. But there's a twist—you have only 8 lives per level. Fall off the platform, and you'll lose a life. Use them all, and you'll have to restart that level from the beginning. Upgrade your bike, unlock boosters, and prove you're the ultimate Obby master. Don't wait—start your riding journey on OnlineGames.io today! 🚴✨ Controls Computer: Use WASD keys to move. Press and hold the right mouse button, then move the mouse to look around. Press the Spacebar to jump. Mobile: Move with the joystick on the left side of the screen. Drag across the screen to look around. Tap the button on the right side of the joystick to jump. How to Play Obby B ut You're on a Bike Hop on your bike and head into world 1 by entering that green door. Ride through ramps, loops, and tricky platforms to reach the finish line. Each level gives you 8 lives. Falling off the platform costs one life, and losing them all means starting the level over. Collect as many flags as you can to boost your score. Upgrade your bike to improve speed and handling, and collect boosters to ride faster because, let's face it, your character's legs aren't getting any stronger.🚴 Complete all 8 levels to claim victory and brag about your Obby skills! Game Features Unlock better bikes to improve your chances of success. Use powerful boosts to clear tough jumps and obstacles. Unlock different skins like Barry, policeman and more. Spin wheels to grab prizes or complete missions to claim your award. Developer Obby But You're on a Bike is created by GingerPlay. More Obby Games If you enjoyed this epic bike adventure, try Only Up Obby ! because going up is the only direction when you've already mastered falling down in this one! 😁Climb your way to the top in this parkour game where every step counts. It's perfect for players who love obby adventures.

title: Obby Highest Jump Ever
description: Obby Highest Jump Ever is a Roblox-inspired clicker game where you train your Obby character at the gym center. Run on the treadmill, jump on the trampoline and jump to the highest tower to win trophies. Keep in mind that the higher the building, the bigger the reward! Grow your jump power from scratch to new heights in this skill game to move ahead of other players. Controls Player 1 WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump Left-Shift: Sprint Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move L Key: Jump K Key: Sprint How to Play Obby Highest Jump Ever Your main objective in Obby Highest Jump Ever is to train your Obby character to jump as high as possible. Grow its jump power by running on the treadmill and jumping on the trampoline with constant clicks. Then, head to the towers and try to reach the highest point of any tower to take the trophies. You can collect trophies and use them to get pets, enabling you to increase your jumping ability with each click. Try to get the rarest Pets and watch them boost your clicks! GYM Area Start by growing your Obby’s jump power with training. Otherwise, it will not be able to jump high and reach new heights. In the GYM Area, you will see treadmills and trampolines. You can use them to make your Obby more athletic and boost its jump capability. However, if you are not in the mood for workouts, you can simply click on the Obby and watch the jump bar increase. Furthermore, you can activate the auto-clicks by pressing the Q Key. Climb Up the Towers After workouts, your Obby will be able to jump high. Begin by exploring Greenland and complete the missions by climbing the towers. There are 8 towers in each land: Small Tower, Wall Tower, Green Tower, Lava Tower, Wall Tower-2, Earth Tower, Purple Tower, and Big Jump Tower. Conquer all of these towers by climbing on top of them, and collect your trophies to move to the next land! Tips & Tricks for Obby Highest Jump Ever 🤸 Train first, jump higher later. 💪 Trampoline boosts jump power quickly. 🏆 Collect trophies for stronger pets. 🗼 Climb towers for bigger rewards. 🖱️ Use auto-click for faster growth. Developer Obby Highest Jump Ever was developed by gameVgames. You May Also Like Did you like playing Obby Highest Jump Ever ? You may also give Steal Brainrot Heist a chance and collect the rarest Brainrot characters in your base. For more, please check out our Obby Games Online category. Keep coming back to discover newly added games on this site!

title: Backflip Dive 3D
description: In Backflip Dive 3D , you’ll take a leap of faith and jump from towering heights across a variety of terrains. With each level, the jumps get riskier, the heights scarier, and the landings more precise. Can you master the art of the backflip? Game Overview The thrill of the jump never ends! In Backflip Dive 3D , you’ll launch your character off platforms, buildings, and cliffs, performing flips before hitting the ground. But it’s not just about jumping—you’ll need to time your rotations and land safely to progress. From rooftops to mountain edges, every new height pushes you to the limit. Game Features 14 terrains, 7 levels each: Unlock higher and higher jumps as you progress. 3D physics-based gameplay: Experience realistic flips, spins, and landings. Progressive difficulty: Each level brings greater heights and trickier landings. Challenging tasks: Complete objectives to sharpen your skills and test your limits. How to Play Backflip Dive 3D? Jump / Spin: Hold Left Click. First click and hold - helps you balance and prepare for the jump. Second click and hold - controls the number of spins, so the longer you hold, the more you’ll spin. Release left click - stop spinning and aim for the landing. FAQs Is Backflip Dive 3D endless or level-based? It’s level-based. Each terrain has 7 increasingly difficult jump heights to conquer. Can I customize my character? No. There are no avatar customization options in this game. What happens if I fail a landing? You’ll need to retry the level until you land successfully. Similar Games If you enjoy Backflip Dive 3D but want to try something different, our Clicker Games Library is waiting for you with plenty more fun challenges. Try Flip Bottle , where instead of flipping yourself through the air, you’ll be flipping a bottle and landing it perfectly on any surfaces.

title: Geometry Arrow
description: When you hit start, you don't just fire the arrow; you become itself. Race through a dark, hidden tunnel in Geometry Arrow . It’s a super sleek, rhythm-driven platformer game like Geometry Dash online that puts your reflexes to the test. You guide a simple white arrow through a maze of sharp angles and spikes. You'll be rising and falling with a single tap. Across 12 difficult levels plus a hidden bonus stage, each set to its own upbeat music, you'll race against geometry itself. With clean, minimal graphics and instantly graspable controls, Geometry Arrow is a free browser game you can play online whenever you need a quick thrill on the go. Just a friendly reminder: take a breather when the rage becomes too intense. Trust me, you'll need it. Controls PC: Left mouse button or Spacebar: hold to ascend, release to descend Mobile: Touch anywhere on the screen: press to lift, let go to drop How to Play Geometry Arrow From the moment your arrow appears at the left edge, it's all about timing. Press and hold (or tap and hold) to gently rise. Release when you need to fall. Early levels ease you in, introducing one hazard at a time, like simple spikes, sawblades, and split ramps. You'll learn that a quick tap clears a small spike while a longer hold soars over tall spikes. Pay attention to the beat: each level's music isn't just background noise. A rising drumroll often hints at a tall barrier ahead, and a sudden bass drop might mean you need to let go and dive under a low overhang. As you progress, obstacles compound. You'll navigate narrow corridors of spikes by tapping so fast your arrow darts in rapid zig-zags to slip past. You'll see your progress in the bar at the top. Don't trust if you're near the end because of one little mistake, and you're back at the beginning. No checkpoints. Developer Geometry Arrow is distributed by Playgama. It's perfect for fans of quick-play Geometry Dash games. Similar Games If you love the minimalist challenge and rhythm-based jumps in Geometry Arrow, give Space Waves a try. In Space Waves, you guide a glowing orb through neon tunnels, timing your moves to electronic beats as obstacles surge and recede. It shares the same one-tap control scheme and pulse-pounding soundtrack but with more colorful visuals.

title: Idle Breakout
description: Idle Breakout is a free online clicker game with arcade mechanics. The aim is to break all the bricks in a room. With hundreds of levels, this brick-breaker game provides endless gameplay. Click on the bricks or employ balls. Upgrade balls' power and speed, use lasers, and get all the ribbons! When you pass all the levels, proceed to the next prestige to be an ultimate brickbreaker! How to Play Idle Breakout Start destroying blocks by clicking on them. When you have enough coins, buy a basic ball from the top left. Upgrade balls, use power-ups and pass as many levels as you can. The number on the brick indicates how many times it needs to be hit to break. As you pass more and more levels, you will see much higher numbers on bricks. So you should increase the clicking power, as well. Balls In the game, you can acquire balls using your coins. Whenever you get the first ball of each type, a new type of ball unlocks. In addition, you can improve your balls' speed range and power. Max them up in the Upgrades section. Learn about the types of balls below. Basic: Very slow and ineffective alone. Upgrade the speed and power of the ball and employ a number of them to get results from the basic ball Plasma: Much faster than the basic ball, it will cause splash damage to bricks. You should improve its range. Sniper: Bounces of Walls towards the nearest brick. Fast and powerful. Scatter Ball: $10000 to unlock the first one. Creates additional single-hit balls. Very effective in cleaning the rooms. Cannon Ball: Smashes through bricks and vital after 2nd and 3rd prestige. Poison Ball: The last ball to unlock. When a poison ball hits a brick, the brick becomes infected and takes double the damage from any other ball. Achievements The achievement section will guide you on what to aim for in the game. There are 12 of them that you can acquire. 1 million total damage with basic ball 1 million total damage with plasma 1 million total damage with sniper 1 million total damage with cannonball 1 million total damage with poison ball Use all power-ups. Prestige 5 times. Have 10 of each ball. Break 1.000 black bricks. Reach level 250 Unlock all 4 lasers. Break 1 million bricks. Power-Ups You have 5 power-ups that you can use throughout the game. Except for the x2 Gold power-up, they all boost the brick-breaking performance for 30 seconds. Access them in the upgrades section as well. Cashed Up: Earn double the money. Click Frenzy: Clicks spawn scatter balls or do x10 damage. Demon Core: Deals waves of damage. Very effective and lets you pass a few levels at once. Snow Ball: Gains power and speed with every bounce. 2X Gold: Can only be used on a gold brick Save Progress in Idle Breakout You haven't played Idle Breakout for hours, only to lose your progress when you close the tab. Your progress is saved in your browser cache, so you can continue where you left off next time and enjoy some passive income in the game. By any chance, if you'd like to save the progress locally and delete your browser history, head over to the settings section and click export to back up your progress . Copy the code given in the pop-up. Import by pasting the same code the next time you enter the game. Controls Computers Left-click on bricks to break Mobile and Tablet Tap on bricks to break Developer Kodiqi made Idle Breakout. What to Play Next? Check out our newest release if you enjoy playing idle games like this. Spacebar Clicker is a game in which you employ boomer moms and booster monkeys to press the spacebar. It's absolutely absurd and a fun way to waste some time while waiting for a meeting to end or a bus to arrive at your stop. We hope you have fun playing the games we offer. If you have any inquiries, do not hesitate to contact us!

title: Checkout Frenzy
description: Have you ever stood in line at a store and wondered, “What exactly are the cashiers doing on that screen?” All those bippity boppity beeps and flashing buttons... What do they even mean? Okay, we'll solve that mystery. Checkout Frenzy takes that cashier job and turns it into a super fun online game. Now, you get to be the one behind the register, running your own mini-mart from scratch. You're stocking chips, checking out customers, or hiring helpers. Everything's in your hands. This online game lets you experience the chaos and challenge of being a cashier and a store manager at the same time. From scanning groceries to calculating change, from setting prices to placing shelves. It’s all about building the busiest store on the block. If you've ever imagined running your own shop, now’s your chance to do it for real (without leaving your browser and spending a penny!) Controls WASD: Move around the store Drag left click: Look around Left Click: Pick up boxes, scan items, place goods, rotate furniture, confirm purchases Starting Your Store When you first enter the game, it’s just you, a register, a computer and an empty space. But that’s about to change fast. Walk up to the computer (in the corner of the store). Use it to order furniture like shelves, fridges, or freezers. Don’t forget to order the products too, things like chips, soda, ice cream, and milk. Boxes will appear outside your store in afew seconds. Go grab them and bring them in. Stock Shelves with Goods Now it's time to get your goods in place. Dry goods (chips, candy) go on regular shelves. Cold items (milk, eggs) go in the fridge. Frozen foods (ice cream, frozen pizza) belong in the freezer. Fruits and vegetables go in the grocery shelves. Tip: You can rotate shelves to make your store layout smarter. Make space for customers to walk around and create a more natural look! Set Prices Every product has a base price, but you get to decide what to charge. Hover on the price tag and click set price button on top right. Here you'll see the current price, market price, and profit. Drag the slider to adjust your price. Raise the price to earn more—but don’t go too high over the market price. Customers will walk out if they think it’s too expensive. Try finding that sweet spot: profit + happy customers = store success. Check Out Customers When you're ready, head to the front door. Flip the sign from “Closed” to “Open”. Watch as customers start rolling in with their shopping carts! Here’s where the real checkout frenzy begins.Customers come to your register. Click on each item to scan it, listen for that classic “beep”. Check how they want to pay an click on the car or cash they're holding. Be fast but careful! Giving the wrong change costs you money. Card: Punch in the total amount correctly in POS Cash: Choose the correct bills and coins to give the right change Hire Cashiers Once your store is booming, it can be hard to keep up. Go to the computer and hire a cashier to handle checkouts or a cleaner to keep the place tidy. Keep in mind: they’re hired for one day only. If you got some extra cash? Buy more floor space! You can fit more shelves, attract more customers, and make more money. Who Made Checkout Frenzy? This game was published by FreezeNova, a game studio known for fun, creative online games. More Cashier Games Like This If you enjoy Checkout Frenzy, you might love other tycoon games including Supermarket Simulator. It also lets you manage a store, but adds more complexity with multiple shops. You can also try other business-style games where you run restaurants, cafes, or even music studios! Bottom Line Checkout Frenzy is like being dropped right into the middle of a store rush, but in the best way possible. It’s fast, fun, and gives you a real taste of what cashiers deal with every day.(Even those nagging customers included.) Whether you want to master the checkout line or build a mini-mart empire, this online game has you covered. Ready to hear that “beep” and make some cash? Jump into Checkout Frenzy and start your retail adventure!

title: A Small World Cup
description: Forget all those other soccer games where players throw the ball toward the goalposts. This time, we're throwing the players at the ball and crossing our fingers it somehow turns into a goal! A Small World Cup is a funny 2 player soccer game with pixelated visuals where the players (yes, the ragdoll ones) do all the heavy lifting... or slamming. Instead of carefully lining up a shot, you'll aim your ragdoll footballer, pull back, and release for a full-speed dive at the ball. It's chaotic, it's funny, and it's as unpredictable as it sounds! Prepare to laugh, strategize (kind of), and accidentally score on yourself—because in this game, anything can happen! You can pick your national team and compete in 1v1 matches to win cups like the Euro Cup 2024, World Cup, America Cup and more. Controls For Computers: Hold LMB to aim, release to send For Mobiles: Tap and hold to aim release to send How to Play A Small World Cup Pick from 8 glorious tournaments: World Cup Classic, World Cup 2022, Euro Cup 2024, America Cup, or dive into club territory with options like Euro Clubs, Italian Clubs, English Clubs, and Other Clubs. Pick your mode: normal or golden goal. Normal Mode: Classic 45-second matches to prove you're the best—or bump it to 90 seconds if you like dragging out your victories. Golden Goal Mode: One goal wins it all. Quick, brutal, and perfect for those who live on the edge. Choose from a range of countries, and don't worry—your choice just changes the shirt color, not your skill level. The game then kindly assigns you a random opponent who is equally as clueless. When the Match Starts Hit the start and let the madness begin! It's a 1v1 showdown where YOU are the offense and the defense. Aim your ragdoll footballer by dragging your mouse (or tapping if you're on mobile). Release and watch as your player launches at the ball with all the grace of a flying potato. Go easy on the power, or you might score an own goal. Your opponent will thank you. Outscore your opponent, move through the rounds, and lift the trophy like the ragdoll legend you are! Developer RujoGames created A Small World Cup. More World Cup Games The roar of the crowd, cheers, vuvuzelas, and whistles.. If you like the spirit of soccer, you're invited to explore other online World Cup games on OnlineGames.io.

title: Madalin Stunt Cars Pro
description: Are you open to experiencing luxury? The 3D driving game Madalin Stunt Cars Pro features excellent graphics for lifelike experiences. You can choose from various vehicles in Madalin Stunt Cars Pro, from the most opulent sports cars to a police cruiser, in three distinct map areas. How to play Madalin Stunt Cars Pro? Start by choosing your favorite car from the options and then decide the color of the vehicle. After that, select your track from the upper side of the screen. There are 3 different maps. Each one offers you a particular driving experience. Pick one and start the fun! Controls Use the Arrow keys or WASD to steer the vehicle Use the Space key to handbrake Use the Shift key to use nitro Use the Ctrl key to change your car Use the M key to see the rearview mirror Use the H key to turn the police lights on (You can only use this feature when you select the police car.) Use the C key to change the camera view Use the R key to reset the car Use the U key to change KMH to MPH Use the I key to start/stop the engine Solo or Multiplayer You can play Madalin Stunt Cars Pro on your own or create a room for multiplayer options. You can play with your pals by selecting 'Multiplayer' from the main menu. Before making a new room, choose your username from here. Then, decide on the name of the room. That is it! How can I enjoy the Madalin Stunt Cars Pro the most? You can experience an exclusive adventure on each track. Choose the atmosphere that appeals to you the most. There are numerous ramps and loops on the rails. Use them and roam freely on the never-ending road. Take a city tour if you want to avoid traveling on the highway. What brands of vehicles are available in Madalin Stunt Cars Pro? Do you know which automobile to choose? The following is a list: Bugatti Veyron, Lamborghini Veneno, Pagani Zonda, LaFerrari, Ford GT, Huracan, Aventador, Ford Mustang Shelby Cobra GT and numerous other models are available. Plus, you have one police car option. Light your police lights on and wander the streets. Play More Games Like This To find more games like Madalin Stunt Cars Pro , look up all Drift Games on OnlineGames.io.

title: Unpacking
description: Hey there, neat freaks! We are offering you a great mess to tidy up! Unpacking is a free online home decoration and organization puzzle that you can play on your browser. You have just arrived at your new home, and it is time to open the boxes and unpack!📦 As you may have known from your mom's words, "Everything has its own place in this house. And they should be stored so." Solve tens of unpacking puzzles and tidy up this home. How to Play Unpacking? This place looks like a jam. Everything is tangled. We need your help in this. Organize the rooms and put every item in its unique place. If you are ready, let's start on how to tidy up this place properly! Unpack Furniture In the room section, there are lots of boxes and 11 eleven rooms in total waiting to be organized. Go to the rooms section from the main menu and choose a room to start with. The kitchen, bath, living room, bedroom, kids room, and even garden needs some unpacking. You will see the items disarrayed on the right side of your screen. Select one of the items and figure out where you should place it. When you find the correct place, the item's position will be locked. Repeat until you have nothing left on the right. Don't forget to take a screenshot of your work and share it with your friends. If you unpack the room in less than 90 seconds, you will be rewarded with 3 stars. And if you finish the level in over 150 seconds, you will only get 1 star. Get to the next level to organize the place in detail. Drawers, closets and wardrobes need more attention. Keep reading to learn how to organize them. Organize Shelves If you have unpacked the big boxes and placed the furniture, it is time to fill the closets and shelves. In the main menu, click on the "Memory". Choose among the rooms to decorate in this section. You have items waiting to be sorted out in the right. Find the places for these small items waiting on the right side. Drag the item to find where it belongs. If you place it correctly, the position will be locked as in the rooms puzzles. Arrange Drawers Navigate to the main menu and select "Classic Mode" to start arranging drawers. You have items waiting to be sorted out in the right. You have boxes in various sizes in this puzzle. You should find the box with the correct size to store the items. You may see several of the same items. So it is better to divide them into groups at first. Drag the item to the desired place. If you find the correct box for that item, the position will be locked as in the rooms puzzles. Tips for Unpacking It is completely normal to feel stuck sometimes. You can get hints by watching a short ad. In the hints, you will see a picture of the decorated room for a limited time. If you successfully solved all the rooms, challenge yourself one more time to get all the stars you can. It is always better to start with bigger furniture. Some items should be placed in the correct order. For example, if you are searching for where to put the pillow, you should first set the bed or sofa. Then, you will be able to place the pillow onto the bed properly. Don't worry. There are no hard-to-solve puzzles. Think of it like it's your own home. Where would you place the TV? Across the sofa, right? Simple as that, but fun to play. In conclusion, Unpacking is a free online cozy game that is easy on the eye and mind. Perfect for those times when you feel overwhelmed. Fill your cup with hot tea. Get a warm blanket and start organizing the sweetest home ever. To find more free cozy games and guidance on how to be a cozy gamer, browse the Cozy Games page on OnlineGames.io. Controls PC: Use your mouse to navigate. Hold the left-click to drag an item. Mobile: Tap on the item to select. Drag it to move the item to the desired place. Similar Games If you like free decoration games, you can play Home Makeover 2: Hidden Objects . You will help people find lost items in storage and decorate your home with the money you earned. Follow the link to find more online puzzle games .

title: Velocity Rush
description: Velocity Rush is a fast-paced arcade game where you control a golf ball through challenging obstacle courses. There are many obstacles and traps to overcome in order to reach the finish line. Use your quick reflexes and get past every kind of challenge you encounter. Keep in mind that skills and agility are crucial for playing this arcade game without dropping the ball! Controls A/D or Left/Right: Move W/Up/Spacebar: Jump ESC: Pause C: Change View Velocity Rush Overview In Velocity Rush, your goal is to take control of the golf ball moving at high speed on diverse obstacle courses. As you move forward, you will encounter many obstacles and traps. Dodge them by jumping the ball or steering it left to right. To reach the finish line in each level, you should avoid dropping the ball or crashing into any obstacle. Since the difficulty level increases gradually, you need to rely on your quick reflexes to move to the following levels in this arcade game! Leap to New Heights To pass through obstacles, you may need to jump higher. It’s good to know that when you press and hold the spacebar key, the golf ball jumps to higher altitudes. You need to adjust your movements to account for the obstacles in front of you. For example, if there isn’t a very high obstacle, jumping too high may cause you to drop the ball. React at Lightning Speed To overcome obstacles as you move forward, you need to react at lightning speed. If the golf ball touches the obstacle even slightly, it results in a restart of the level you are in. So, quick reflexes are beneficial for you to pass any challenges in the courses. Our mascot, Gamie, suggests practicing the courses to sharpen your reflexes. Tips & Tricks for Velocity Rush ⏳ Master timing to avoid tricky obstacles. 🦘 Hold jump for higher controlled leaps. 🎯 Stay centered to prevent sudden falls. 💡 React fast to dodge incoming traps. 🧐 Practice levels to sharpen reflex skills. Developer Velocity Rush is published by FreezeNova. Looking for More? If you enjoy playing arcade games like this, you may also try playing Snaker io ! Grow your little snake by collecting the neon pellets on the arena. Additionally, feel free to visit our Arcade Games Online category to reach dozens of exhilarating online games. Don’t hesitate to contact us if you have a wishlist or suggestions!

title: Spacebar Clicker
description: Try not to wear out the key button you use a lot in Spacebar Clicker ! It is a 2D clicker game where you press the space key as many times as you can. This way, you will earn points. Use them to get booster monkeys and boomer moms. They will help you gain more in the idle game! 🐒 About Spacebar Clicker There is a huge space bar in cream color on the screen. Your objective in this clicker game is to hit it and earn points. Every time you click on the key, you will get a +1 point. When you collect specific figures of points, you can get boosters. They will greatly benefit you by allowing you to gain more. To accelerate hitting speed, you can use both the space key on the screen and the actual button on your computer at the same time. It will double up your earnings. Or, you can try other combinations to get fast. The Boosters of Spacebar Clicker As you tap on the bar and get enough points, you will see boosters on the screen. There are many of them and as you earn scores, they will show themselves under each other. You can find brief explanations about them below. Monkey: This monkey doesn’t know where the key button is, but it randomly hits all the buttons. It achieves success every 5 seconds. Boomer Mom: Boomer Moms don’t know much about computers. So, they will constantly click on the screen. Each one of them will earn you 3 points in a second. Gen Z Kid: These children grew up with computers, but they do not generally use key buttons. They only know how to scroll down, but they can get you 20 points in a second. Keyboard Upgrade: When you click on the bar, Keyboard Upgrade will earn you a double score. Speed Up Your Hitting Until you acquire boosters, you will earn points very slowly. To accelerate your hit speed, you can combine different tapping combinations with each other. While pressing the spacebar with your index finger, you can also perform a double hit by using the mouse pad with your thumb. Controls Desktops and Computers Space Key/Mouse: Earn Points Mobile Devices Use the virtual bar on the screen to score. Developer Spacebar Clicker was developed by CrociDB. What is More? Idle Dev Startup is another game you may enjoy. In it, you code and make money by clicking on the computer. To expand your business, we recommend hiring new employees. For more idle games , look through OnlineGames.io. And keep in mind that if you stay tuned, you will always find new and thrilling games on the site.

title: Geometry Vibes X-Arrow
description: Geometry Vibes X-Arrow is an online arcade game in which you guide your X-shaped arrow through geometric paths. Reach the portal at the end of each level without coming into contact with any objects on the way! The game offers 2-, 3-, or 4-player options for those who want to duel with a friend. 🆙 Controls Left Mouse Button/Spacebar: Accelerate Upward Release the button to move downward. In 2-3-4 Player mode, use the H Key , L Key and Up Arrow . On smartphones and tablets, you can use the touch controls. How to Play Geometry Vibes X-Arrow 🕹 There are five game modes to choose from: Classic , Spam , 2-3-4 Player , Endless and Challenge . After selecting the game mode you want to play, the next thing to do is to customize your arrow. You have four different arrow shapes, four neon light options and a color palette to use your creativity. Create your precious arrow before beginning the journey. Then, you can start guiding your arrow through geometric paths. Try not to hit any dangerous objects on the way to the portal! Game Modes of Geometry Vibes X-Arrow 🎮 Classic Mode Classic Mode has a leveling system. In each level, you have to reach the portal at the end of the route. There are 10 levels, ranging from easy to insane. These levels will really test your reflexes! Spam Mode In the Spam Mode, you will try to survive between two walls located upside-down. These walls will move towards each other as you make progress, trying to squeeze your arrow. Do your best and try to survive between these walls as long as you can! 2-3-4 Player You can play this arcade game with your friends if you wish. The game lets you challenge yourself with a friend or up to 4 players. They can also customize their arrows according to their own taste! Endless Mode The Endless Mode requires you to take the longest distance while avoiding contact with any objects. You need to be very careful around objects that flick! Your goal is to break your own record with each try. Challenge Mode The Challenge Mode also has a leveling system. There are 5 levels to complete. Each level will test your precise aiming and timing skills. You must especially avoid coming into contact with any of the TNTs in this mode, as there are lots of them! Developer Geometry Vibes X-Arrow was developed by gameVgames. You May Also Like You can continue exploring the Geometry Vibes game series by trying Geometry Vibes 3D . Control your arrow through floating cubes, rotating spikes and twisting tunnels. For more options, visit our Arcade Games Online game tag by following the link!

title: Fragen
description: Step into the warzone with Fragen , a modern first-person shooter with action, strategy, and fast-paced gameplay. Choose your gear, sharpen your reflexes, and jump into explosive urban combat. Controls Here’s how to control your soldier: WASD to move Left mouse button to shoot Right mouse button to aim Spacebar to jump R to reload C to crouch G to throw a grenade Hold Shift to run faster Hold Shift + W + C to slide Scroll to switch weapons Esc/Tab to open the menu How to play? Fight in competitive matches across gritty, war-torn city maps. Earn kills, assist your squad, and climb the ranks across seasonal events. Each match rewards you with experience and currency to unlock new weapons, gear, and more.
