You can choose between two distinct game modes: Team Deathmatch - Team up with allies and dominate the enemy. Free For All - Trust no one. It's every soldier for themselves. Do you have what it takes to survive and rise to the top? Daily Rewards Log in daily to claim free cash, gear, and new weapons. Customize Your Loadout Choose your favorite weapons, upgrade your armor, and set your preferred combat style. Fragen is a must-play for fans of tactical shooters, military warfare games, or competitive FPS combat. With responsive controls, deep customization, and regular rewards, it’s time to grab your gear and join the fight. Love this game? There’s more where that came from! Check out even more action-packed titles at OnlineGames.io in the Shooting or FPS section. Highly recommended: Masked Special Forces - a standout shooter with lifelike visuals and gripping combat, perfect for fans of realistic military games.

title: Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat
description: Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat is a browser-based simulator where you play as a mischievous orange cat. Experience the world through his eyes, cause trouble by knocking plates to the floor, and drive Granny mad! Avoid getting caught, or she’ll hurl slippers your way. This immersive first-person simulation truly lets you embody a mischievous cat. Controls WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump E: Scratch LMB: Attack RMB: Hold How to Play Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat In Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat, your main objective is to complete tasks from a cat’s perspective and irritate your owner. Beware: when Granny gets upset, she becomes relentless and chases you, waving her slippers in anger. As long as you evade her, you can continue your mischief! Break plates, throw books off shelves, and when finished, end each level by retreating to the cat’s bed. Be a Naughty Cat Tasks range from smashing a flower pot to popping balloons. After completing all the tasks, Granny becomes furious and gives chase. If she catches you, you fail. Dash to the sleeping bed and fall asleep instantly to progress. If reaching the bed is impossible, try escaping upstairs. Provoking the Granny You can monitor Granny's anger on the bar at the top of the screen. This bar reflects how enraged she is and how dangerous she can become. Once full, expect her to attack you with a pan. If attacked, all your progress on that level is reset. Tips & Tricks for Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat 🐈‍⬛ Break objects fast before Granny notices. 😠 Watch the granny anger bar to stay safe. 🏃 Run quickly upstairs after mischief. 🦘 Use jumping to escape Granny's attacks. 🔪 Break glasses and plates to create chaos. Developer Bravestars Games is the publisher of Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat. Similar Simulator Games If you enjoyed Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat , you might love Jungle Mart , where you play as a monkey farmer running your own market! Want even more fun? Explore our Simulator Games Online page and remember to bookmark it so you can keep coming back to play.

title: Run 3
description: Run 3 is an endless platformer game, with its gravity defying gameplay set within crumbling cylindrical tunnels in space. This captivating game offers players a wide array of challenges, with its meticulously designed levels, precise platforming, and a variety of characters, each with their different abilities. Game Overview Run 3 focuses upon an alien character that the player is meant to guide through an endless runner and platformer. Players will guide this alien through gravity bending cylindrical tunnels designed in space. You will be avoiding gaps, crumbling platforms, and manipulating gravity at will, to run on the floor, the walls, and even the ceiling. A core feature of this game are its rotating tunnels, which makes this platformer a gem amongst its competing titles. Quickly jumping from floor to ceiling will make players almost feel like a superhero, gliding through space. This elevates the game from being a simple platformer to spatial puzzle, testing your awareness at every given point. Controls Arrow Keys/WAD : Jump/Move Left or Right Space Bar : Jump R : Level Reset P/Esc : Pause Game Modes Explore Mode This mode offers players with over 300+ levels that have been arranged in your galactic travels. Each level is crossed once the last tile has been jumped over. Most levels include several different paths, however the end destination remains the same. During their journey players will also encounter hidden tunnels that will be added to your map for later exploration. This mode also serves as the story mode, where players will meet and unlock new playable characters, each with their own distinct abilities. So keep progressing to unlock new tunnels, characters, and find out the reason why all the planets are disappearing through a montage of cutscenes! Infinite Mode This endless mode offers a randomly generated linear tunnel which becomes increasingly difficult as players progress forward. The only aim of this mode is to survive for as long as possible, without falling off into space. This mode creates a high score for players that is later displayed on the leaderboard. List of Characters Run 3 has a total of ten unlockable characters, each of which have their own unique abilities. The list of characters and all their abilities have been stated down below. Runner She is the default character that the players can choose, and is a very well balanced character with stats that can beat any level designed within the game. This makes her a very easy character to use that can be relied upon in any given situation. Skater He is one of the fastest characters in the game, thanks to his rollerblades that glide across the tunnel. Skater however does have a lower than average jump height, however being faster, allows him to go farther. One weakness he suffers from is his low maneuverability, so levels that require sideways movement will pose a threat. Lizard He is the slowest character in the game, but also possesses an uncontrollably high jump. This pair makes Lizard a preferable choice since he also has a significantly higher maneuverability. Though in cases where he fails a level a lot, he would become slower, until eventually going back to sleep after becoming frustrated. Bunny Bunny is the fastest runner, and highest jumper in the game, and also has high maneuverability but it does not make him the easiest character to control. Since bunny never stops bouncing, controlling him is very tough. However, to get around this problem players can press jump which would slow down their speed. Gentleman Equipped with an electromagnet, Gentleman has the special ability to be magnetized towards powercells. This ability is activated by pressing the jump button, which automatically attracts him towards the power cell, though this ability takes quite some time to master. Duplicator The Duplicator makes the game much more forgiving by creating projections of himself, which can be called his “duplicates”. This ability can be used to create up to 6 total duplicates that mimic his actions, and in case he falls down into space, it would switch his position with one of the duplicates. Child Child is considered to be one of the only “light weight” characters in the game since he has the ability to run on cracked tiles without breaking them. However, Child has very low maneuverability which makes it harder to move him from side to side, despite being a very slow character. Pastafarian She has the unique ability to create a bridge of bright tiles that can fill up empty spaces. Though players cannot run on these imaginary tiles forever since her bridge has a limited range around solid tiles. This ability is very useful since it allows players to cross levels by running on areas that would normally be empty. Student Student is one of the slowest characters in the game, equipped with the ability to simply disable gravity every time she jumps. Her speed, and gravity disabling abilities makes her the most convenient choice to speed run and clear all levels. However, strategy is required since she can float into space, resetting your progress. Angel Though a seemingly simple character, Angel has the ability to dash mid air, and gain a significant amount of speed which he will retain for a short while once he lands back onto his feet. Jumping mid dash will also move much farther. However, this ability can only be used once before Angel has to land back onto the ground. Tips and Tricks Light Taps vs. Holds Make sure to use a mix of both light taps, and holds depending upon if you want to make a short hop, or make a long leap. Precision is key to winning this game, which means that your jumps not only have to be timed right, but also need to be taking you far enough. Character Matching Different characters will have different advantages in levels. Play around with the players until you find the perfect one, to make a level significantly easier. This is beneficial since it allows players to explore and apply the different abilities of all the different characters. Infinite Practice Utilize infinite mode with all the different characters to platform better and learn how to fully learn to utilize their abilities to your advantage. This helps in creating muscle memory, and finger stamina to jump rapidly and accurately. FAQs How do I unlock new characters? Some characters will automatically be unlocked once players have cleared certain levels. Though if a player wishes, they can collect enough money to buy them as well. What difference does the explore and infinite mode have? The only difference between explore and infinite mode is that explore has a story mode attached to it, while infinite is simply just an endless platformer. How many levels are available? The levels available in the game are well over 300 in number. A new level is only unlocked once its predecessor has been cleared. Also, these levels are arranged in an easiest, to hardest difficulty setting. Are my characters customizable? Your unlocked characters are not customizable in this version of the game. Is there a storyline in this game? Yes, there is a storyline in this game, and it is motivated by the missing home planet of all our beloved aliens that has led to this ever-going space tunnel exploration. Leaving so soon? In case you haven’t found your home planet yet, but are itching to float into a different direction, it might be a good idea to set your GPS to Extreme Run 3D , and explore a neon themed tunnel and survive for as long as you can.

title: TB World
description: In TB World, your creativity has no limits! This free online kids game takes the core fun of Toca Boca World and gives you instant access to every item and feature. ALL ARE UNLOCKED! No more waiting for special unlocks or in-game currency. Instead, you dive right in and and start decorating the Toca Boca World with any item on the store. You set the rules here. Not your level, not in-app purchases. So, if you love making up stories, decorating houses, and customizing unique Toca Boca characters, then TB World is the game for you. It's like playing house on your tablet with an infinite amount of dolls and toy furniture. The best part is the game is mobile compatible, so it doesn't matter if you're on a computer or a tablet, you can play this browser game. Start designing your dream scenarios anytime. Prepare to create your own imaginative world and share it with friends! Ready to begin your big adventure? Hop onto OnlineGames.io and start playing TB World right in your browser. Design houses, dress up your characters, and let your creativity shine in this free game online. Try it now and see what fun stories you can create! Controls Computer: Use your mouse to drag and drop objects around the screen. Mobile: Tap and hold to pick something up, then release to place it. How to Play TB World In TB World, you can be the director of your very own universe. It's like playing Sims 2D with the cutest visuals ever. Start by picking or creating characters. Give them silly hairstyles or funky outfits. Customize the look with eye, nose and eyebrow shapes. Give them a nice smile and move on to the next character. You can save up to 10 Toca Bocas in your slots. Next, choose a cozy place on the map for them to live. You can decorate a small apartment or even a spacious beachside home. It's all up to you. After dragging your characters inside, add furniture, paintings, and other fun items to spice up the rooms. Remember, everything is unlocked, so you don't have to grind or level-up for anything. Want to celebrate your new home? Throw a virtual party at the park! To customize your story even more, click on the emoji icon on the bottom left. Choose an expression and drag it onto a character. Make them talk, express themselves, laugh, or get mad! You can snap in-game photos or come up with little adventures. The only limit here is your imagination. Have fun! Game Features Character Creator: One of the best things about TB World is the powerful character creator. You can pick hairstyles, change outfits, and choose eye shapes. It's a total playground for anyone who likes designing their own avatars. Unlimited Furniture: Ever dream of having giant bean bags or a fancy kitchen? You'll find everything you need to fill your virtual home. You can even mix and match styles to make your house truly one-of-a-kind. Multiple Homes: Multiple houses are available on the map! Experiment with different looks and themes. Turn one home into a bohemian paradise and another into a futuristic pad. Emotions and Expressions: Your characters can show how they feel, whether that's joy, surprise, or even a little grumpiness. This makes your story scenes come to life. Ready-Made Characters: If you'd rather skip customizing from scratch, you can use pre-made characters. They're all set to jump into your world. Tips & Tricks for Toca Boca World Sometimes, putting together items that don't look like they match can lead to unexpected and awesome room designs. Don't be afraid to experiment! Invite multiple characters to a house at once and give them their own roles—like a chef, a guest, or a musician. It's a fun way to make the game feel more alive. Use the in-game photo booth feature for quick snapshots. You can document your creations and even share them with your friends. Make your characters react to events. Got a kitchen fire (pretend, of course)? Show them freaking out or calling for help. It's a small touch that goes a long way in storytelling. You might find hidden items or unique decorations that aren't obvious at first glance. Take your time to look around! You can even get pets! Developer Originally, TB World was inspired by the popular Toca Boca World series created by the Swedish game studio Toca Boca. Toca Boca's games are known for their creative flair and child-friendly designs. This is a special fan-made version, where everything is unlocked from the start, letting you test out all sorts of possibilities. Other Kids Games If you enjoy TB World, you might also like PopTropica . It's another great kids game online where you can create characters and go for platformer, puzzle adventures. As Poptropica has great dialogues and a storyline, it is perfect for learning or improving English skills as well!

title: Zero to Millionaire
description: Zero to Millionaire! is an online idle game where you start from poverty. However, taking control of your life and rising in status is in your hands! Start working as a janitor to make money. But, hey! As you work hard, you will get much more prestigious jobs in this simulator game. Show everyone that a good life is created not by luck, but by hard work. Controls Mouse: Use your cursor to interact with the game. Game Overview Actually, in Zero to Millionaire!, you were born as a rich son. But, over time, problems begin to surface between you and your father, a wealthy businessman. Then, he decides to take back all the investments he made in you. Now, you are completely broke. You don’t have a house nor a car. You don’t even have anything to wear. You look like a complete homeless! Your main responsibility in this simulator game is to start from zero and become a millionaire. To show your dad that you don’t need his money! Start from Zero In the beginning, you need to start working as a janitor to gain income. As you complete the tasks, you will gain status points. And this way, you will find better jobs for yourself. If you make investments for your education and pass your exams successfully, you will get professional jobs for yourself. Education The best way to make more money is to educate your character. Enter the Education section from the menu, and you will see a bunch of courses. From getting a driving license to graduating from college, you need to acquire the necessary courses here. Below, you can find some of the courses that you can unlock. College Accounting Courses Auditor Courses Financial Education Graduate School of Management Developer Zero to Millionaire is developed by GamePush. You May Also Like Do you like life simulator games like this? You may also give a chance to We Become What We Behold . This time, you will play as a news reporter whose task is to observe the lives of the people of a town.

title: Dublix
description: Dublix is an online multiplayer game with its exciting Roblox-inspired World! Wander in the maze to find the exit, take your part in the parkour and drive a car in the race-track to earn coins. The best way to end the night is to dance freely at the music festival. Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump Left-Shift: Run E Key: Interact How to Play Dublix Well, Dublix offers its players a free Roblox-inspired world. It means that you can decide how to play this game as you want. There are various activities that you can take part in: Race Track, Maze, Parkour, and the Music Festival. However, the best way to play this multiplayer game is to collect coins from the activities and use the coins for decorating your house and customizing your character from the Wardrobe section. Activities in Dublix The easiest way to earn coins is to participate in activities. There are four activities that your Roblox-like character enjoys taking part in. Race Track: There is a race track in the upper right corner of the map. Go and find an available car and start driving along the track. You will see coins on the way. Drive over them and it automatically collects the coins. Maze: Does it sound scary? When you enter the portal of the maze, you will find yourself in a labyrinth. Try to find a way out by trying different turns. Don’t worry if you can’t find the exit. You can leave the labyrinth at any time by pressing the E key. Parkour: We must say, this parkour is quite challenging! It will really test your parkouring skills with its multiple sections. Run, jump, leap, but try not to fall! Fortunately, even if you fall, you can continue running from where the flag is after managing to reach the flag in each section. Music Festival: Time to show your moves on the dance floor! Get your fellows with you and go to the music festival at night. Dance freely while the DJ shuffles music throughout the night. The festival is located on the shore! Developer FreezeNova developed Dublix. Similar Games Did you like playing Dublix? You can also try out GTA Simulator where you can freely wander around the city, drive your car or accomplish the tasks given to you! For more options, click to the given link to see our Multiplayer Games Online . There are dozens of free online games on OnlineGames.io that you can take part in.

title: Stickman Kombat 2D
description: Can you KO all the bad guys? Stickman Kombat 2D brings fast and thrilling fights, cool moves, and action fun. Get ready for wild battles where your speed and skills decide if you win or lose. Show everyone you’re the real champ! Game Overview Stickman Kombat 2D is an exciting fighting game where you control a super quick character and face different enemies during the battles. Every fight is full of powerful hits, cool combos, and awesome special moves. The goal is to beat every opponent, stay alive, and be the breaker in all the battles like a great fighter. The more you fight, the more challenging it gets, but that’s what all the fun is about. How to Play Stickman Kombat 2D? The gameplay is simple: you just need to follow the in-game instructions for a better understanding of how the moves work. Once you pass the training stage, you can fight your way through each level and take down every enemy that comes at you. Use your fighting skills to punch, kick, and perform special attacks. You can play alone or challenge a friend on the same computer. Try to chain your attacks to make awesome combos and take down your opponent fast. Watch your timing, stay quick, and keep moving so you can distract your rival and score a KO. Controls Breaker! K… O! 1 Player Move: WASD Attack: K Move I: J Move II: A + K Air Attack: D + W & hold K Uppercut: S + J 2 Player Player 1 Move: WASD Attack: G Move I: F Move II: A + G Player 2 Move: IJKL Attack: Quote Key Move I: Colon Key Move II: L + Quote Key Game Modes Stickman Kombat 2D is way more fun than any other combat game, mostly because of its amazing effects, cool interface, and exciting game modes. It’s full of surprises, so it’s harder to get bored with this thrilling combat experience. Training Whenever you feel like you need more practice before the battles, jump into Training mode and work on your fighting skills. Improve your moves and reaction time so you’ll be ready to face even the fastest opponents and knock them down. 1 Player This is the classic game mode. Choose your character and get ready to face your opponents. Be careful because there are two rounds, and if each of you wins one, a third round will decide who the real winner is. Towers Towers are full of tough battles and unexpected opponents. Win them all, climb to the top, and you’ll earn the chance to unlock powerful new characters. Each tower is a new challenge waiting to test your skills! Mode-Fight Let the roulette decide everything about your battle. It picks your fighter, powers, effects, and even your opponent. This mode is all about spontaneous fun and surprises. You can play alone or with a friend, so you’ll both be unprepared for the fun waiting ahead. 2 Players In the two-player mode, you can challenge a friend on the same computer and fight against them. Use your skills, move faster than your buddy, and show how quick you are. Good to Know! Raise the difficulty! Think it’s too easy? Prove you’re a real fighter. Switch the difficulty from Auto to Chick , Weakling , Fighter , Berserker , or Demon and see if you can still handle it. Unlock new fighters: each fighter comes with special moves and effects that make battles even more exciting. Unlock them all to find your favorite, learn their tricks, and plan your moves better for the next fight. Use your coins or complete Tower challenges to get new fighters. Watch for rewards: take a short break and watch an ad to earn bonus coins or get a second chance after being knocked out. FAQs How are the fighters different? Each fighter has their own special moves, powers, and weapons. Some are fast, others hit hard or have cool, sharp weapons. Try them all to see which one you like the most. What if I lose? An ad can be a blessing in this situation. It gives you another chance to prove you’re not that easy to knock out. Can I play with a friend? Yes, you can play with a friend on the same computer and fight against each other to see who’s the better fighter. Similar Games If you enjoyed Stickman Kombat 2D , you might also like Stick Fighter 3D . It brings the same thrilling combat energy into a neon 3D arena where every punch, kick, and combo feels new and interesting. Try it out and see if your learned fighting skills apply to this challenge!

title: Minecraft Classic
description: All times best-selling game Minecraft is now available on your browser for free. Minecraft Classic is a player-driven sandbox game with endless possibilities. If you like playing games that improve creativity, you will find a lot to enjoy in this game. This version of Minecraft is filled with so many details, options, and features that you will not miss any feature of the original Minecraft game. You are free to dig, carve and build whatever you like: a mansion for yourself or a whole new city. It's all in your hands. There are no monsters, enemies, or urgency to gather resources. Take it easy and discover the stress-free world of crafting. You can play this game consisting of a creative mode of Minecraft for free on OnlineGames.io without downloading a single file. How to Play Minecraft Classic? Open Minecraft Classic on OnlineGames.io and start generating a new level. There are two kinds of land: Flatgrass and Vanilla. Flatgrass is an open world on a large flat map filled with grass, as the name suggests. The Vanilla Map has a more diverse environment in terms of geography. This heaven-like map has plants, lakes, and even a beach. After entering the map, feel free to explore every part of it. Left-click to break and right-click to build blocks around. You can see a more detailed list of keys to control at the bottom of this page. Minecraft Classic is a highly customizable game. You can change almost anything in the game to your preferences: graphics, texture packs, hotkeys, and even the color of the clouds. There are also nostalgia options that allow you to feel like you are playing pre-classic Minecraft in terms of both functionality and appearance. Just head over to the options menu and discover all the alternatives you have in this fantastic crafting game. Explore, Imagine and Build Your Dreams There are no levels, no mission to accomplish. The sky is the limit in Minecraft Classic. Explore a large map filled with numerous kinds of blocks. Decide where and what you'd like to build. You have 65 different types of materials to choose from. Don't worry about running out of materials. You have unlimited resources here in this game. Blocks, Mines, Plants Options You can access the blocks menu by pressing B while playing. We have listed all block types below. Choose your favorites and add them to your favorites to use them with hotkeys. Blocks, mines and other building materials are as follows with their ID numbers: Stone (1), Grass (2), Dirt (3), Cobblestone (4), Wood (5), Sapling (6), Bedrock (7), Water (8), Still Water (9), Lava (10), Still Lava (11), Sand (12), Gravel (13), Gold Ore (14), Iron Ore (15), Coral Ore (16), Log (17), Leaves (18), Sponge (19), Glass (20), Dandelion (37), Rose (38), Brown mushroom (39), Red Mushroom (40), Gold (41), Iron (42), Double Slab (43), Slab Brick (44), TNT (45), Bookshelf (46), Mossy Rocks (47), Obsidian (48), Cobblestone slab (49), Rope (50), Sandstone (51), Snow (52), Fire (53), Ice (60), Ceramic Tile (61), Magma (62), Pillar (63), Crate (64), Stone Brick (65) Color blocks are as follows with their ID numbers: Red (21), Orange (22), Yellow (23), Lime (24), Green (25), Teal (26), Aqua (27), Cyan (28), Blue (29), Indigo (30), Violet (31), Magenta (32), Pink (33), Black (34), Gray (35), White (36), Light Pink (55), Forest Green (56), Brown (57), Deep Blue (58), Turquoise (59) Don't Forget to Save Your Progress After playing for a while, in case you'd like to save your progress in your browser cache or download it to your computer. To save your progress, open the menu by pressing ESC while playing and hit the "save level..." button. Create a name for your level to keep it on the cache, or download it to your computer. Next time, you can continue where you left off by loading the .cw file. How to place blocks in Minecraft Classic? Press B and choose which type of block you want to construct in the inventory. Decide where you want to place the block and right-click there to build. Can you fly in Minecraft Classic? Of course, you can — press the Z key to fly in Minecraft Classic. Use Q and E to move up and down while flying. You can also maximize jump height in the hacks menu. This extremely high jump is another cool move that feels like flying. Controls WASD: Move Left-Shift: Run Left-Click: Break Right-Click: Place Z: Fly Q and E: Up and down while flying X: Glitch through solid structures Spacebar: Jump G: Drop blocks B: Open inventory T: Open the chat menu R: Spawn Enter: Set a spawn point 1-9 or scroll: Switch between blocks ESC: Open the menu T: Toggle fog More Games Like Minecraft Classic Minecraft is so influential that it gave birth to a whole new genre of online games. If you'd like to taste modes of Minecraft other than sandbox, play MiniBlox.io in survival mode. There are plenty of games you might also enjoy in Crafting Games and other Block Based Games . Follow the links to explore and enjoy for free on OnlineGames.io.

title: Survival Race
description: It's a race of survival. The one who stays in the arena wins the game. Steer on the platform at full speed, crash other cars, and drop them out. Survival Race is a free online car game offering a thrilling experience. Make stunts or roll over holes and collect coins in this battle royale racing game! Controls Desktops and Laptops Steer Left: A/Left Arrow Steer Right: D/Right Arrow Jump: W/Up arrow/Spacebar/LMB Fly: Double press W/Up arrow/Space How to Play Survival Race? The race starts immediately after pressing the play button. Steer your car over the arena. The aim is to kick out all other cars to be the winner. Stay away from corners to be on the safe side. When another player drives on the arena, blocks will go down after it, leaving holes in the platform . When a hole emerges in front of you, jump by pressing W . You can also fly for a short period by pressing W twice. Collect coins and power-ups on your way. Coins will bring you better cars, while powerups will make your car more resilient to attacks. There are dozens of sports cars to unlock in the garage. If you'd like to change the color of your car, simply go to the garage in the main menu and select the color to stand out from the crowd in the arena. Game Modes Practice: Free race without opponents Battle: Survive in the arena Parkour: Collect stars Autoball: Soccer played bar cars. Score goals to win. Tips and Tricks for Survival Race Roads are slippery. Don't oversteer ; otherwise, your car will drift in a crazy way, resulting in a fall out of the arena. Go to options to set your steering and drift levels . Sharp steering and minimum drifting will provide you with more precision. You May Also Like Survival Race, is a 3D car racing game that offers a unique racing experience and has a special place in the hearts of web gamers. If you'd like to play more games like Survival Race, our recommendation is Crazy Car Arena . Achieve the highest score, you'll need to maneuver through narrow turns, loops, steep slopes, and fiery hoops. This game features great 3D visuals, and the music intensifies the need for speed. Various challenges will push your driving abilities to the limit. However, alternatives don't end here. OnlineGames.io offers hundreds of free car games , diligently selected by our editors. Look at all your options in the dedicated tag. Bookmark this website (Ctrl + D) to access it easily next time!

title: Car Crash Test: Abandoned City
description: Car Crash Test: Abandoned City is a 3D sandbox game where you experience crazy crash scenes. It is a world of chaos and destruction with its realistic crash effects. Drive your car on every street of the Abandoned City, or perform stunts as you wish. You can also join a race to show everyone who is the real driver in this city! ⚒ Controls WASD: Move Spacebar: Handbrake Left-Shift: Nitro C: Change Camera N: Next Car K: Repair Car R: Reset Car B: Time Slow Down TAB: Pause Car Crash Test: Abandoned City Overview Welcome to the Abandoned City! You are invited to roam around the deserted streets of this city freely or race with others. There are two modes to select: the Sandbox and the Race. In the Sandbox, you can drive your car through the highways or crash it into the press machine. With its realistic crash effects, you can experience destruction to the utmost! In the Race mode, you can race with other cars by following the blue points. Be the one who reaches the last blue point to win any race. Next Car ➡️ There are four cars at your disposal to choose from and customize. If you want to climb the hills, you can select the red pickup truck just like the Ford Ranger. Do you want to burn the tires at high speed like in The Fast and the Furious? You can choose the one that resembles the 1995 Nissan Skyline GT-R R34. There is also this car that reminds you of the Mercedes-Benz SL-Class. The choice is yours! Slow Down the Time ⏳ If you are willing to create some chaos, the slowdown option will make it more dramatic! After selecting the car you want to destroy, drive it near the press machine or the swinging sledgehammers. Press the B key to activate the time slowdown; everything gets in slow motion with a click. Your destruction experiments will be much more enjoyable in this way! Developer Playgama developed the Car Crash Test: Abandoned City. You May Also Like Tiny Crash Fighters is another option for you to explore if you liked playing Car Crash Test: Abandoned City. In Tiny Crash Fighters , craft your vehicle with weapons to destroy your opponent’s car. For more options, feel free to check out our free online destroy games by following the link!

title: Crazy Plane Landing
description: Paper-airplanes and daydreams, but this time louder. Crazy Plane Landing is a 3D stunt flight game where you launch a plane off a ramp, try to keep it in one piece and land on the runway. Until you arrive at the finish, every barrel roll, every extra meter adds to your payout. Spend those coins on a beefier Engine, a longer Boost, or a bigger Bonus multiplier, then keep chasing that distant finish line on different terrains. Play free, right in your web browser, on OnlineGames.io, no installs, just click and fly. (And try to land. In one piece.) Controls Left Click & Hold: Fire the plane down the ramp and keep holding to burn boost fuel. A / D Keys or mouse move: Steer left or right for mid-air steering and barrel rolls. Launch and Fly Hold the mouse button as the countdown hits zero. The boost bar drains fast. You can also tap it in pulses instead of one long blast. Use A and D to tilt. A barrel roll scores coins. If you over-rotate, you’ll kiss the canyon wall. The green boost bar is your lifeline. Spend it too early and you’ll stall before the landing strip. Spend it too late and you might overshoot the target entirely. A checkered runway marks the end of each level. Cross it on your wheels and move on to the next level. Clear the levels from sun-baked canyons to snowy peaks, coastal cliffs, or neon city nights. Each new scene resets the finish line even farther out. Upgrade Planes After landing (or crashing), the game tots up distance, stunts, and landing quality. Longer flights plus flashier rolls equal bigger rewards. Three upgrade cards sit under your plane: Engine: Adds raw speed off the ramp. Boost: Extends the fuel bar so you stay airborne longer. Bonus: Multiplies every coin you earn, making later runs pay off faster. Prices climb each level. Engine Level 5 costs more than Engine 4, so plan your spending. When you’ve saved enough, swap in a sleeker jet. New planes start basic but scale higher, letting you push way past your old records. Developer BoomBit S.A. built Crazy Plane Landing. Another cool game by them is Super Hero Driving School . When you’re ready for a different kind of sky adventure, you can also pop any of our plane games online . But start with Crazy Plane Landing to get the hang of boosting, rolling, and landing like a pro.

title: Drift Boss
description: Say hi to an easily controlled and captivating game! Drift Boss is a 3D driving game where you steer your little car over sharp bends. No brakes are holding you. Drift through the corners and swing into high gear. The aim is to drive as long as possible without falling into space. Drift Boss makes such a deep addiction that you will be surprised how simple mechanics make this possible. Don't forget to share your highest score with us in the comment section below! How to Play Drift Boss? Hit the start button and activate a booster if you have one. Press the spacebar (or left click) to turn right and release the control to turn left. The path you drive on has no ends, so you set your own goals. Beat your highest score, or challenge your friends and be the boss of drifting! Drift Like a Boss: Boosters Three kinds of boosters are available in Drift Boss: Double score, car insurance, and coin rush. You can activate the boosters for only one run, and they will make your run easier for a while. You need to set the booster before driving. Car Insurance: This booster will insure your car for one fall in a run. If you fall into space, you can continue where you left off by using your insurance. Double Score: This will double your score through the run. Coin Rush: This booster will fill your roads with coins. A great option if you are planning to buy a new vehicle. How do I earn boosters in Drift Boss? If you are out of boosters, you can buy them with your coins💰 you can turn the spin wheel and cross your fingers for the best 🎰 check in every day to take daily prizes🎁 Need Some Tips? Here are the tips and tricks for Drift Boss: Don't steer too early. Wait until when you are close to the bend, then make your turn. Are you frustrated falling down over and over? Try to buy a new vehicle; more expensive cars have better grip. Then, you will enjoy a longer ride without thinking about the sliding distance. You can turn your car on the air if you come across a bend right after jumping. Remember to get your daily rewards and practice. You will soon be an Ultimate Drift Boss! Features Easy controls and simple mechanics Daily rewards and spin wins Different boosters available Range of vehicles to unlock Mobile compatible Completely free to play Controls Desktop: Press space or left click to turn right, release to steer left Mobile: Touch and hold the screen to turn right, and release it to turn left Developer Drift Boss was created by MarketJS. Similar Games Fan of endless games like Drift Boss? Head over to the Endless Games tag to find more. Electron Dash is another game for the ones who trust their reflexes. Try it out, and let us know your opinions in the comments.

title: Basket Random
description: Basket Random is a pixelated arcade game where you participate in basketball games online against the CPU or a friend. The basketball players have limited mobility. Direct your character with only one key and perform the most dunks to the hoops to win. Basket Random will give you great pleasure with changing characters and environments as one of the most favorable sports games ! How to Play Basket Random There will be two teams in a match, and each team will have two members. Controlling the player will be the utmost challenge, as you can only use one key to control the stickman. You can not easily guess which way the character will move. But once you learn to control your man, no one can beat you anymore! When you get the ball, try to dunk it directly to the opposite side's hoop without losing it. The one who gets the five scores wins the game. The Dunker or The Defender Each team consists of two players: a dunker and a defender. With each of your moves, you actually move both players. To shoot baskets, use the dunker player, as he will be closer to the rival's hoop. He can also easily grab the ball from the opponents. The defender is responsible for guarding the hoop. He is behind the dunker. He must prevent opponents from scoring a goal. Game Modes in Basket Random The game offers you two game modes: 1 Player and 2 Player. 1P mode will create a match against the computer. Don't underestimate the CPU, as it will test your basketball skills extremely. On the other hand, if you want to challenge yourself with a friend, you can play in the 2P mode. It's always fun to play with a buddy. Make your selections from the menu according to your desires. Changing Environments and Physics Each time you or your opponent scores a basket, the players' uniform and playing field will change. You will engage in matches with different themes, such as a snowy scene or a sandy beach. The players will wear suits or basic basketball uniforms from time to time. Even the ball will have different shapes. For example, the iron ball will make it harder for you to make precise dunks. In contrast, the light ball can get out of control quickly. Players' arms and hoops can randomly lengthen or shorten, as well. Controls Player 1: W Key Player 2: Upper Arrow Key Developer Basket Random was developed by RHM Interactive. What is More? If you enjoy playing Basket Random, you may also try Basketball Slam Dunk . The players' arms will fly in the air in the game. Control the arms before they intertwine, and try to score as many as possible! For further options, you may look for other basketball games for free on OnlineGames.io. Keep coming back to explore new and thrilling games. Making new discoveries with free browser games at Online Games is very easy.

title: Escape Car
description: Do you remember the very first Grand Theft Auto ? That old-school, top-down chaos. Think of that and give it a fresh coat of chunky 3D graphics. Next, drop that straight in your browser. Yes, it's Escape Car , a free online GTA game where you bolt through a mini-city, dodge police cars, tanks, helicopters and scoop up stacks of cash. Every tight drift, every split-second fake-out, and every totaled police cruiser bumps your score higher. Hang on long enough, and you’ll leave with pockets full of upgrade money and a grin wider than the avenue. Controls A or Left Arrow to steer left D or Right Arrow to steer right. How to Play Escape Car The moment you touch A or D, the police chase begins. Drive as long as you possibly can without letting the cops box you in. Grab the cash piles on the road for extra money. The BUSTED bar at the top fills with every bump; solid red means game over. The longer you survive, the faster the score counter on the top left ticks. Watch the stars next to your score; each new star means tougher cops and bigger points. First more cars show up, then heavy trucks, and later even tanks and helicopters. When you finally bite the curb, your score instantly converts to money for upgrades. Unlock a new faster car from the garage and repeat. Hit restart and see if that next run tops your record. Unlock Cool Cars Money burning a hole in your pocket? Slide over to the Garage and spend it on a random mystery car. You might pull: a tuner that slides around corners like butter, a muscle car that turns cruisers into scrap, or a sports coupe perfect for weaving through traffic. Collect them all and build the dream garage you brag about in the comments. No two runs feel the same once you start swapping rides. Developer Escape Car comes from FreezeNova Games, the studio behind one of the most popular games on OnlineGames.io: Police Chase Drifter . Think of Escape Car as its bigger, shinier 3D cousin, with the same tense pursuits, way more polish. Ready to floor it? Click Play and prove you can outrun the law and maybe unlock that perfect supercar while you’re at it.

title: Granny
description: Granny is a horror-puzzle game where your survival skills, quick thinking, and stealth will be working non-stop. This scary game takes place in a Granny's eerie house, where you wake up in a bloody bed and realize you're trapped. Your room's door is locked from the outside, and your ultimate goal is to escape from this hell. But it's not that simple. Granny has a surprisingly sharp hearing for her age. She is always on the hunt and has a knack for finding you. This game is a mix of fear, strategy, and problem-solving that will keep your heart racing and your mind working overtime. So, if you're ready for jumpscare moments, wear your headphones, hit the play button and see if you can escape from Granny's House! ⚠ Mature Content Warning This horror game features intense fear-based elements, graphic imagery, and disturbing themes. It is intended for mature audiences and may not be suitable for all players. If you’re sensitive to frightening content, please explore our other free games . Player discretion is advised. Controls For Computers: WASD: Move Mouse: Look around E: Interact C: Sit/Stand R: Hide Space: Throw objects F: Escape traps For Mobiles: Joystick (Left): Move Touchpad (Right): Look around Hand Icon: Interact Chair Icon: Sit/Stand Bed Arrow Icon: Hide Item Drop Icon: Throw objects How to Play Granny If you're new to the game or just want to explore without the heart-pounding chase, try Practice mode. Here, Granny is away, giving you a chance to plan your escape. For those seeking a challenge, there are five difficulty levels to choose from, ranging from easy to extreme. Pick the level and hit start. You have five attempts to succeed. Granny hears every sound, so tread carefully and avoid noisy mistakes like knocking over objects or stepping on creaky floors. The house is filled with mysterious items like keys, closets, books, and tools. Press E to interact with them. Each item has a purpose, but you'll need to figure out how to use them to unlock doors or access hidden areas. Explore the house, find clues, and solve puzzles. Remember that there is no single way of escaping. In order to make a great getaway, you can try one of the multiple escape routes available. You can aim to unlock the front door or try fixing up the old car in the garage... It's up to you. Tips for a Smooth Getaway Avoid making noise at all costs—Granny reacts to even the faintest sounds. Beds, closets, and chests make great hiding spots if Granny is nearby. Be mindful of where you drop items, as they can create noise and reveal your location. Watch your step! Granny's traps can slow you down or leave you vulnerable. Use weapons sparingly—they can hinder Granny, but only for a brief time. You can gain five additional attempts to escape by watching ads. More Jumpscare Games If eerie sounds, dim lighting, suspenseful gameplay and lots of JUMPSCARES are what you look for in a game, you might love other horror games online . Each title will test your wits and nerves in a different terrifying scenario. Try them all, and let us know which is your favorite in the comment section.

title: Stealing the Diamond
description: Henry Stickmin Stealing the Diamond is a point-and-click adventure game where you help Henry Stickmin (the famous criminal) attempt the biggest art heist of his life. He wants to sneak (or bust) into a museum and steal a precious diamond without getting caught. This free flash game is perfect for anyone who enjoys comedy animations mixed with some action. You can play it right in your browser on OnlineGames.io, so there’s no need to download any file or flush plugin. It’s simple to start playing, and the silly moments keep you smiling from start to finish. Every choice you make leads to a different path. With funny situations, silly animations, and plenty of LOL moments, Henry Stickmin Stealing the Diamond is kind of a game you'll want to play again and again. Unlike regular cartoons, you're in control of the action. So expect lots of funny surprises. Try it once, and it’ll quickly become one of your favorite online games! Controls Use the mouse to click on different options as they appear. Follow any on-screen prompts during some quick-time events How to Play Stealing the Diamond Guide Henry through his bold museum heist. You’re presented with choices on how to proceed. For example, do you want to sneak in quietly or crash through with a disguise? Each option comes with funny outcomes. And let me give you a secret: not all of them are successful! Sometimes you’ll fall flat on your face if you pick the wrong tool or plan, but don’t sweat it. Give it a good laugh and just click “Retry” to go back and try another path because failing is part of the fun here. You can also collect all the fails if you want a completion challenge. This is a perfect browser game for anyone who likes interactive stories, comedy, and wacky crime adventures. Developer Henry Stickmin: Stealing the Diamond was created by PuffballsUnited and released on July 8, 2011. The Henry Stickmin series is known for its humor, cartoonish style, and silly storytelling. Although the game was highly popular during its era, it lost some of its popularity due to Adobe discontinuing Flash in 2020. PuffballsUnited later co-founded Innersloth, the studio behind the popular game Among Us. PuffballsUnited also worked on other Henry Stickmin episodes, each with its own unique theme. You can still enjoy Stealing the Diamond for free on OnlineGames.io, supporting indie creators who pour their hearts into their work!​ Other Henry Stickmin Games If you’re enjoying Henry Stickmin Stealing the Diamond, there are other funny point-and-click adventures worth checking out. Escaping the Prison and Infiltrating the Airship are also part of the Henry Stickmin series. They have a similar style and sense of humor. You can also explore other free browser games like Papa’s Pizzeria for a more casual, food-based challenge or Help the Hero for a slightly puzzling vibe. Each offers a unique twist but still sticks to the quick-play style, perfect for players who want fast-paced fun. Bust or Sneak in the Museum Henry Stickmin Stealing the Diamond is a fantastic game if you love short 5-minute games with lighthearted comedy and interactive storytelling. With its amusing fail scenes, quirky style, and multiple endings, it’s easy to see why this browser game has stayed popular. Head to OnlineGames.io and play right now to see if you can help Henry pull off the biggest art heist without totally messing up! Enjoy the silly mishaps, experiment with different plans, and share the laugh-out-loud moments with your friends. This is one free game that will keep you and your buddies entertained for hours. Have fun and good luck grabbing that diamond!

title: DTA 6
description: DTA 6 is a free browser-based game inspired by the iconic open-world crime genre. You play as Jack, a daring gang member, navigating a snow-covered city filled with endless opportunities for adventure, mischief, and chaos. Explore the streets, drive stolen cars, evade police or engage in intense shootouts. DTA 6 offers free, action-packed gameplay that brings the excitement of console games like GTA straight to your browser. ⚠ Mature Content Warning DTA 6 may feature intense open-world action, graphic violence, strong language, and adult themes. This game is intended for mature audiences and may be inappropriate for younger players. If you’re seeking a more family-friendly experience, please check out our other titles. Player discretion is advised. Controls WASD: Move Mouse: Look around and aim Scroll Wheel: Change weapon E: Enter/Exit vehicles, pick up items Q: Open phone Shift: Use nitro in cars F: Slow time C: Handbrake X: Look back P: Reload last save How to Play DTA 6 Getting Started Begin your adventure as Jack, a gang member in a snowy city. Use the controls to move around and explore your home and surroundings. Go out and familiarize yourself with the map, nearby vehicles, and accessible shops. Making Money Collect cash scattered across the city streets or pick it up from people. Engage in more daring activities like robbing stores or stealing cars for a big payout. Press Q to open your mobile and use your phone to manage your money or purchase upgrades. Exploring the City Walk, ride or drive through the city to discover new areas, shops and hidden items. Find special vehicles or unique spots to unlock exciting opportunities. Keep an eye out for hidden Easter eggs throughout the city for bonus rewards or just for fun. Engaging in Crimes To rise through the ranks, commit crimes like stealing vehicles or messing up with pedestrians. Be prepared to fight back if the police come after you. Avoid drawing too much attention unless you’re ready to face the cops. Regularly visit the shop for better weapons and gear to stay ahead. Evading the Police Keep track of your Wanted Stars in DTA 6. The more crimes you commit, the more the police will hunt you down. Use nitro for a quick getaway or to outpace the cops during high-speed chases. Lose Wanted Stars by evading the cops, finding a safe spot, or fighting back. Killing cops can reduce your Wanted Stars, but it might also escalate the tension! Buying Weapons and Vehicles Visit the weapon shop to purchase guns and ammo. Use your in-game phone to buy new vehicles and upgrade your inventory. Using Special Abilities DTA 6 Jack has 2 special abilities Slow Time: Use the F button to slow down time and gain an edge in critical moments. Nitro Boost: Press Shift while driving to activate nitro for high-speed chases or getaways. Saving Your Progress Save your game through the Save Button on your phone or walk in your house. Always save before risky missions or confrontations to avoid losing progress. If you fail or want to restart, press P to reload your last saved game. Developer DTA 6 is created by Vsegon. Free GTA Games DTA 6 is the perfect pick for fans of crime-filled, open-world adventures. Whether you’re stealing cars, battling the police, or simply exploring the city, this browser-based game delivers all the thrills without the need for downloads or expensive hardware. Let the chaos begin, and see how long you can survive as Jack, the ultimate gang member! If you enjoyed DTA you may also like other GTA games such as Stickman GTA City , offering more mission-based gameplay where you can also explore a mafia city with cars, tanks, helicopters and more!

title: Papa's Donuteria
description: What’s an adventure park without a sweet spot? This Papa Louie Arcade adventure begins in Powder Point and takes you on a ride through the highest peaks of the culinary rollercoaster ⎼ right in Papa’s Donuteria . Luckily (or maybe not), the hiring line at Papa’s donut shop was empty, so you got in faster than expected. Now the question is: can you meet the customers’ expectations? Game Overview The employee jump-run pass brought you straight into Papa’s Donuteria ! Even though it might not look like it at first, having so much responsibility also means the fun never ends. You’ll cook fresh donuts every day and unlock plenty of new ingredients to create the sweetest, puffiest treats around. Celebrate fun holidays with seasonal flavors, dress up in themed costumes, and decorate your shop to match the festive vibe. The more effort you put in, the more your customers will enjoy the experience. But be careful ⎼ some picky eaters are harder to please! Make sure their orders are done just right to earn tips. You’ll need that money to upgrade your shop, buy useful items, and make your work easier and faster. Step by step, you’ll turn Papa’s Donuteria into the sweetest spot in the whole adventure park! Game Features Play through 12 holidays with special seasonal ingredients, like Red Icing for Christmas or Cinnamon Sugar for Thanksgiving. Unlock over 115 menu items, 90 customers, and earn 110 badges to prove your mastery. How to Play Papa’s Donuteria? This game is all about clicking, really! Pay attention to the in-game instructions! Completing the basic training is essential to learn how the donuts are perfectly doughned, fried, and built. Good to Know! Create a custom worker! In Papa’s Donuteria , the protagonists you can choose are Tony and Scooter , but you can also rewrite the story with your very own character. Ready for some thrilling adventure park fun and delicious donuts? Earn tips and upgrade your kitchen! Cook boosters, alarms, or cooking guides will make your cooking easier. Invest wisely in them and see how quickly you can complete your orders. Decorate your shop for extra bonuses! Decorating your shop according to the current holiday means customers will have extra patience. Your “Waiting” score is more likely to hold up. Dress accordingly! Dressing to match the ongoing holiday vibe creates a more festive atmosphere, and customers will surely appreciate your effort! Win game tickets! Good orders bring good fortune! Use the tickets you earn after successfully completing orders to play Papa’s mini-games. You can win great prizes like clothes, furniture, or decorations ⎼ or, in case of misfortune, just a few bucks. Try to please the “Closers”! They are very picky customers who, if not satisfied, have the nerve to leave the store without leaving any tips! Donut mess with the critic! Jojo , the well-known critic, can’t walk past Papa’s donut shop without tasting the products! He’ll notice even the tiniest flaws, so make sure his order is prepared perfectly. Do it right, and you’ll be rewarded with your well-deserved achievement while customers admire your accomplishment! FAQs Will my game progress be saved? Beautiful things take time… just as building your donut empire does! Luckily, the game is flexible, so you can leave the shop anytime and continue right where you left off. All your unlocked customers, badges, upgrades, and decorations will stay with you. Similar Games How about some baking? Or maybe you’re craving something salty. Either way, our Papa’s Games library has plenty of gourmet-quality fun to satisfy your appetite. For more exotic flavors, try Papa’s Sushiria . Or, if you want to juggle with dough, give Papa’s Bakeria a try. No matter what you choose, we assure you ⎼ you’re in for a true cooking thrill!

title: Wave Dash
description: Wave Dash is an online arcade game where you control an icon through geometric platforms. It’s inspired by the well-known game Geometry Dash! You must guide your arrow icon through the courses full of obstacles. Avoid crashing with any of the objects in the levels and reach the portal at the end. Your quick reflexes will save you from multiple possible crashes! ▶️ Controls Tap/Spacebar: Guide Arrow Icon On smartphones and tablets, you can use the touch controls. Wave Dash Overview Are you up for defying gravity? Wave Dash has 80 challenging levels that require you to dodge obstacles by jumping your icon arrow. Try not to come into contact with any spiky objects while trying to reach the portal at the end. You can collect the coins on the geometric platforms. The coins you collect will enable you to unlock new icons from the shop menu. You can also customize your icon within the same section. Four colors are available for free! The Moving Platform 🤪 In this arcade game, not only do the objects on any level move in a direction, but the complete platform also moves and sometimes turns left or right without any notice! To win a specific level, you must adapt quickly to the changes on any course. Gravity is working against us! Changing Icons 🔺 In the first few levels, you will guide an arrow-shaped icon through tight corridors. As you progress, you will encounter many icons of varying shapes that control the platform in the following levels. For example, you need to navigate a heavy gear that spins constantly. Because it’s heavy, it takes time to move it between the objects. Level Editor 🎨 The fascinating feature of Wave Dash is that you can create a level as you wish! From the main menu, there is the “Level Editor” button. Click on it, and then give this custom-made level an original name. After pressing the “Create” button, you can customize it. Add blocks, spikes and other objects by selecting the items from the panel. You can also pick music from the upper section of the screen. Finalize your level by adding an END section. There you go! Developer GameBiz developed the Wave Dash. Similar Games If you enjoy playing Wave Dash, Geometry Vibes X-Arrow is another game that you can check out! Controlling your customizable X-shaped arrow through geometric paths is your main aim. For additional options, you can visit our Arcade Games Online game category.

title: Archers Random
description: Archers Random is an online stickman game that you can play with a friend with its 2-player option. Set your target and draw back the bow! Shoot your opponents with precise aiming and hit them in the heart. Try not to tire your arm while drawing the bow, as you will need your power! Controls 1 Player Left Mouse Button: Control the Archer 2 Player Player 1 W Key: Control the Archer 1 Player 2 Upper Arrow: Control the Archer 2 Archers Random Overview Welcome to the world of flying arrows! Keep your bow with you wherever you go in this shooting game, as you will need it most. There are 2 game modes: 1 Player and 2 Player. Choose what you want: Duel with a friend or fight against dozens of archers alone. In either case, an exciting adventure awaits you! Draw Back the Bow! You must shoot all your opponents one by one to move to the next stage. Take aim, draw the bow and let the arrow fly. However, your stickman’s arm will get tired from constantly drawing the bow. You need to check the Arm Power barometer in the upper left corner of the screen. If this bar gets too low, your stickman may not be able to perform a precise hit. Unlock Special Arrows As you eliminate other rival archers, you will unlock new kinds of arrows with special abilities. It’s important to unlock them as the basic arrow allows you to create a moderate impact on the opponents. With special arrows, you might take down the rivalries even with one arrow hit! You can find the special arrows listed below. Fire-blazing Arrow Electrified Arrow Pixelated Arrow Tracking Arrow Poisoned Arrow Explosive Arrow Thunderstrike Arrow Saw Arrow Rocket Arrow Freeze Arrow Meteor Strike Arrow Developer Goolandia developed Archers Random. More Games Like This Did you like playing Archers Random? You may also try playing Get on Top . Wrestle colorful stickmen, try to get on top, and be the winner! There are dozens of free online games at your disposal on onlinegames.io . Visit our Stickman Games Online library for further adventures.

title: Get On Top
description: Remember those days when you and your brother used to wrestle for hours until one of you cried and complained to Mom? It was a real duel, wasn't it? You would flip over together like a human ball, with arms and legs flying in the air. So, we've brought sibling wrestling to the virtual realm. When Mom gets sick of your fights and forbids wrestling in the house, you can take your duel to the Get On Top game and resume your challenge in a less physical way. You read that right: Get on Top is a 2-player stickman game where players combat with a friend, trying to get on top and make the opponent's head touch the ground. Controls Computers Left Player: A, D, W keys to control stickman Right Player: Left, right and up arrows to control stickman Mobile Devices Use the relevant arrow buttons on the screen. How to Play Get On Top? Two game modes to choose: 1 Player against AI and 2 players The goal is to take control of the ragdoll and make it jump over the opponent. You win the round if the opponent's head hits the ground . Score a point in 11 rounds to be the winner of the game. Attack But Remember to Defend If you get zoned to attack your opponent, things may not go as you desire. Get On Top is a game with interesting physics; you may flip and hit your head to the ground while trying to attack your rival. So, defense is also crucial . Try to keep your head and neck away from the floor . Move leftward and rightward to adjust the head skillfully in each position. Use your body mass as an advantage and shift it strategically. Take down your opponent! Developer Neplin Game Studio made this game. Technology Construct 3 What is Next? Did you know that rough play can actually help us safely explore and better understand our own aggression ? It's true! On this basis, are you ready to take on the next exciting challenge? Head over to Boxing Random , another 2-player fighting game where you can seek revenge from your opponent.

title: Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary
description: Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary is an online dress-up game where you play as a talented tailor and stylist! Create your model, dress her up in your closet, and post her images on Instagram to get followers. Tailor excellent dresses for her to accomplish missions in the Story mode in this fashion game! Controls LMB: To Interact On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to interact. How to Play Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary Welcome to the glamorous world of Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary ! In this dress-up game, your main goal is to design spectacular outfits for your clients. Use your creativity: cut, sew, and style beautiful clothes so they can shine. Mix and match trendy fabrics, add sparkly accessories, and create personalized looks that fit every occasion. Each accomplished mission grants you fame, new outfits and diamonds to unlock new fabrics. Game Modes in Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary Dress Up Start every day by creating an elegant look for your fashion model before meeting up with your clients. Dress Up mode enables you to prepare your model for the day with dozens of dresses, pants, skirts, tops, shoes, bags, and accessories. Remember that you can always design a new outfit from scratch! Story Time to meet with your clients face to face! Talk with them, understand what kinds of outfits they're asking for, and start designing for that specific occasion. Keep in mind that you need to create a personalized look for each client, and the outfit you create for them should be appropriate for the occasion. Tips & Tricks for Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary 👒 Match outfits to every occasion. ❣️ Earn fame through story missions. 📸 Post stylish looks for followers. 💎 Unlock fabrics with earned diamonds. ✨ Accessorize models for extra sparkle. Developer Bravestars Games is the developer of Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary. More Dress Up Games If you enjoy playing Tailor Stylist: Fashion Diary , you may also try playing Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up ! Additionally, you can visit our Dress Up Games Online page by following the link to access more games. Keep coming back to discover newly added games on www.onlinegames.io!

title: Capybara Clicker Pro
description: Capybara Clicker Pro is an idle clicker game in which you tap on the adorable Capybara to collect Capybara coins. Increase the number of coins you make by clicking on the cute animal every second and every click to achieve more significant figures! The goal of this game is to tap and earn coins. As you progress, you'll also be able to unlock new great characters! How to Play Capybara Clicker Pro The gameplay is simple. Tap on the Capybara to get coins. You can increase your earnings per second or click by purchasing the boosters on the right. As you earn more coins, you will be able to unlock more characters. You can see these wonderful characters by hitting the t-shirt icon at the top of the game screen. Boosters in Capybara On the right side of the screen, you'll notice boosters stacked one on top of the other. You must invest your Capybara coins here in order for the game to advance. These boosts will significantly assist you in raising your revenue. Earn +100 capybaras per click with the Professional Clicker ! Make +200 capybaras every second using the Robot . Glitch Clicker booster gives you an extra +1000 capybaras for every click you make. The Factory booster will add +5000 capybaras to your idle coins every second. Cute Capybara Characters As you go through the game, you will unlock new Capybara characters. They're all sweeter than the last! These lovely critters can be found by clicking on the t-shirt icon. You can find the following characters here. Capycorn Kapybaru Capybored Camobara Cosmic Capybara Weather Conditions Did you know that you can change the weather conditions of the Capybara? You can see the weather conditions you can unlock by clicking the cloud icon at the top of the screen. It is possible to see rainy, snowy, sunny and even starry weather here! The Pink Bar When you earn many coins by clicking on the Capybara repeatedly, a pink bar appears in the lower left corner. When you fill this bar completely, you earn twice the coins you would normally earn. Controls Tap on the Capybara to earn coins. Other Idle Games If you like Capybara Clicker Pro, you might also like Cookie Tap , in which you manufacture your own cookies with the help of Cookie Grandma. You can also seek up more idle games on OnlineGames.io to get additional game options. If you stay connected, you will constantly find new, exciting idle games!

title: Stand on the Right Color, Robby!
description: Stand on the Right Color, Robby! is an online running game inspired by Roblox. Move your Robby on the colored tiles. Avoid falling by reacting to color changes. When colors change, jump to a safe tile with the matching color. Beat rivals to the finish by standing on the right color. Watching other players fall will make you laugh out loud! Controls Mouse: Look Around WASD or RMB: Move Spacebar or LMB: Jump On Mobile Devices: Use the virtual joysticks. Stand on the Right Color, Robby! Overview In Stand on the Right Color, Robby!, your goal is to reach the finish line by safely moving forward across colored tiles. When the timer ends, most tiles disappear, except those that match the announced color. To avoid falling, stand on the correct color before time is up, then keep jumping forward from tile to tile until you finish the course in this Roblox game! Beat Rivals to the Finish Be the first to reach the finish line to win the race. Move Robby across colored tiles and jump to safe tiles with matching colors to dodge falling tiles. React quickly to color changes to stay ahead of your rivals! Unlock New Robby Skins You get coins each time you complete a race. There are also coins on the colored tiles. Pick them up, win races, and get a new Robby skin from the shop. There are crazy outfits, shining accessories, and weapons to customize your Obby. Tips & Tricks for Stand on the Right Color, Robby! 💡 React quickly to colors to avoid falling. 🎨 Jump between tiles matching colors to survive. 💨 Stay alert and outrun rivals to be the winner. 🪙 Collect coins to unlock new Robby skins. 🖱️ Use WASD or the RMB for precise movement. Developer Playgama is the developer of Stand on the Right Color, Robby!. You May Also Like If playing Stand on the Right Color, Robby! gives you pleasure, try the Obby Yard Sale. In the Obby Yard Sale , you can open your trade in your house’s yard! Also, visit our Roblox Games Online tag to find the best free online games on this website.

title: Mona Lisa Fashion Experiments
description: Mona Lisa Fashion Experiments is an online dress-up game where you are the stylist of Mona Lisa! Dress her up with the craziest outfits at your disposal, and step out of the painting at the Louver and bring her to life. Mona Lisa Gioconda trusts your taste in this fashion game. Try mocking trends and memes on her! Controls LMB: To Interact On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to interact. Mona Lisa Fashion Experiments Overview Mona Lisa Gioconda, who has spent her entire life watching people from a painting at the Louver Museum, grows tired of it and wants to make her mark in the real world. In Mona Lisa Fashion Experiments, dress her up nicely, do her makeup, pick out some accessories, and let her walk around the streets like a real person. Feel free to mix & match styles on her to shine her beauty in different ways! Prepare Mona Lisa for the Real World The whole world knows that the Mona Lisa is naturally beautiful. But she wants to put on a little makeup. Choose a nice shade of blush, lipstick, and eyeshadow for her. Then apply some false eyelashes to make her eyes stand out. After the makeup process, you can continue with selecting a hairstyle for her, from colorful curly hair to short green hair or a simple braided style. Crazy Costumes for Mona Lisa You can try different mocking trends and memes on Mona Lisa! There are dozens of costumes for her to choose from, ranging from a modern office suit to a superhero costume. Also, you can find the craziest accessories for her, like the Vendetta mask. Try experimenting with different styles on her to see how she might look if she were alive in the 21st century! FAQs About Mona Lisa Who painted the Mona Lisa? The Mona Lisa is a portrait painting by the Italian artist Leonardo da Vinci. Why is the Mona Lisa smile so famous? The Mona Lisa is primarily famous for its 1911 theft, which turned it into a global media sensation, and for Leonardo da Vinci’s masterful use of sfumato (hazy shading), which creates an elusive, shifting smile. How much is the Mona Lisa worth? While some experts estimate its market value at upwards of $2.5 billion, it cannot be sold because it belongs to the French public. Developer Mona Lisa Fashion Experiments is developed by DL-studio. Similar Dress Up Games Did you enjoy playing Mona Lisa Fashion Experiments ? Try out Valentine’s Day Couple Date , in which you prepare Ben & Ellie for the day! Additionally, you are always welcome to check out our free online dress-up games on this website. Keep coming back to discover newly added games!

title: Real Flight Simulator
description: Real Flight Simulator is a realistic game that gives you the ultimate flight experience. There is the possibility to choose the aircraft you want and start to control the plane. You will become an expert in controlling the planes, reaching the heights and exploring skies. You will be able to test the following aircrafts: • A-10 • A-29 • F-35 • KC-10 • M-262 Follow the instructions to make the aircraft fly: 1. Turn on the aircraft lights (Press Z) - optional, may cause lag issues 2. Lower flaps and slats if available (Press X) 3. Start-up the engines and wait for the startup sequence to complete (Press C) 4. Throttle up the engines (Press and hold R or V to increase engine power) 5. Release parking brakes (Press B) 6. Rotate once takeoff speed is reached - above 150 knots (Press Down arrow) 7. Raise landing gear above 100ft (Press M) 8. Continue with normal flight... Real Flight Simulator controls: AD to roll WS to pitch QE to yaw RF for Engine Throttle (Power) 1 to change weapon 2 to lock target Space to fire Escape or F2 to main menu H to hide controls info

title: Charger City Driver
description: Charger City Driver is a 3D driving game where you steer a Dodge Charger-like muscle car. Accept the drifting challenges, perform successful stunts and escape from the police cars! Wander around the city streets at night with your puppy sitting in the passenger seat. Feel free to customize and upgrade your beloved vehicle however you like! 🏎 Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Drive/Steer/Brake Mouse: Look Around Left-Shift: Nitro C: Change Cameraview E: Enter/Exit the Car How to Play Charger City Driver You are invited to show your drifting, racing and stunt skills in a city map at night! There are three modes to conquer: Drift Mode, Kill Mode and Police Mode. Use these racing modes to earn extra cash. Drive into the trigger points to start the missions. However, try not to run over pedestrians while driving your powerful car! If you hurt two pedestrians, the police will chase you in the neon-lit city streets. Additionally, keep checking the fuel bar. If you run out of fuel, drive over to the nearest gas station to get fuel! Charger City Driver: Game Modes Drift Mode ⚡ To activate the Drift Mode, click on the relevant button in the lower right corner of the screen. Then, you can drive your car over a drift trigger point to start a mission. For example, you can earn +1750 CR from a point if you can manage to get 3500 drift points! Stunt Mode 🏴 Activate the Racing Mode by clicking on the Stunt Mode button on the screen. By performing successful stunts, you can earn a significant amount of cash. Go over a speed trigger point at high speeds. You can see a sign indicating how fast you should drive to earn CR. Accelerate your muscle car, pass a speed trigger point, then drive it over a ramp to pull off the best stunts! Developer Fuego! Games published the Charger City Driver. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing Charger City Driver, you may also like playing Vice City Driver ! Play in the shoes of Tommy Vercetti and drive your Ferrari-like sports car to explore the city. We have an extensive selection of online driving games . By following the link, you can discover new, thrilling games!

title: Snaker io
description: Snaker io is a multiplayer snake game in which you guide your little snake on an arena full of neon food pellets. To grow the snake, collect as many pellets as you can while trying to survive in the arena with many other snakes. Avoid crashing into others or eating your own tail to live longer in this snake classic arcade game! Controls Mouse: Control the Snake Spacebar/Left-Shift/LMB: Speed Up Alternatively, you can use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys to steer. Snaker io Overview In Snaker io, your main goal is to grow your snake as much as you can by collecting the neon food pellets on the ground. However, it won’t be easy! Since there are other snakes hunting for food. Additionally, the difficulty level in this snake classic arcade game will increase gradually over time, making it harder to dodge other snakes. Try not to crash into them to survive longer in the arena. Also, you need to refrain from accidentally eating your own tail. Otherwise, you need to restart from the beginning. Random Speed-Ups While you are trying to hunt food pellets in the arena, random speed-ups will occur. During these speed-up moments, your snake moves much faster, making it more difficult to steer accurately. If you don't react quickly and control your snake well, you may crash into other snakes more easily. These sudden bursts of speed are challenging and require extra attention to avoid mistakes like running into other snakes or your own tail in Snaker io! Upgrade the Snake You can enhance your snake's abilities using coins you earn. There are three enhancements available: Size , Boost , and Magnet . To dominate the arena, our mascot Gamie suggests upgrading these enhancements to make it easier to reach higher scores. Size: Allows players to increase the snake's starting length by +1 points. Boost: Increases the boost capacity by +5 and the boost regeneration by %2. Magnet: Extends the magnetic field at the snake's head, which pulls food pellets. Tips & Tricks for Snaker io 💡 Collect pellet clusters but avoid crowded zones. ⚡ Use short boosts for better control. 🧐 Keep an escape path at all times. 🚩 Watch out for tricky speed-ups. 🧲 Upgrade Magnet first for faster growth. title: Ultimate Flying Car
description: Can you imagine if a car could fly? Let's take flight! Ultimate Flying Car is a 3D driving game that features many elegant sports cars with wings. However, you can still fly with a car in Ultimate Flying Car without facing real danger. You have many stylish flying car options.
