title: Gulper io
description: Gulper io is a multiplayer snake game where your aim is to collect Tron light cycles to get bigger in size. But you must avoid getting into contact with any other snakes or walls. Otherwise, you will have to start from scratch. Dominate the playground by being the biggest gulper among others, and write your name on the leaderboard in one of the most challenging io games! How to Play Gulper io Gulpers are deep-sea eels that have enormous jaws. You will take the place of one of them in this arcade game! Terrifying, right? There are many other gulpers on the playing field. Like you, they will also try to take the light cycles and grow in size to rule the sea. Any contact with them or walls will cause you to start as a little gulper again. Avoid them as much as possible, especially the larger ones. You can easily escape from the little ones, but the bigger gulpers are real threats. Change Your Gulper’s Color Before joining the game, give your gulper a nickname and determine its color from the slider in the lower right corner of the screen. When you scroll by holding down the left mouse button, you will see the color change. Choose your favorite color for the gulper, and then you will be ready to engage in snake wars! It will be a very colorful war for the eyes. Accelerate the Gulper You can speed up your snake by clicking the left mouse button or the spacebar. The accelerated speed can help you dodge other players in the quickest way possible when you encounter one of them. In addition, you can easily take up many light cycles in a shorter period by accelerating. When a snake is eliminated, it will drop all its eaten pellets. To collect them quickly before others do, use this speed-up to your benefit! Trap Your Adversaries Move forward strategically! As you get bigger and longer in size, you can use these against your opponents. You can easily trap them by drawing circles around them. It will block them from slipping away through your snake’s body. Move in a way that leaves others no escape route. Remember that if there are two giant snakes on the playing field, this means limited movement space for the little gulpers and the big ones. Rooms in Gulper io You have the option to join one of the available rooms. Or you can create one. After entering your nickname into the input field, add the @ sign and enter the name of the game room. If enough players join the room, it can be successfully created when the same name is entered in the input field during a certain time. These kinds of rooms are called private rooms. Public rooms are accessible to every player just by entering a nickname. Controls Mouse: Move Left-Click or Spacebar: Accelerate Touchscreen: for Mobile Devices Developer Gulper io was developed by tonsomar. title: Fruit Ninja
description: Fruit Ninja is an online arcade game where you pull out your blade and slice fruits. This famous slicing game is available on your browser now! title: Kirka io
description: Imagine participating in battles set in a Minecraft-inspired world. Exciting, huh? Kirka.io is a 3D io game where you will combat with online players in blocky battlefields. There are various modes and maps to choose from. Select your preferred options and enter the battlefield with your chosen loadout in this shooting game! Try to keep the highest kill score. About Kirka.io The first thing to do in Kirka.io is to decide on the game mode and map among many alternatives. You can play this FPS game solo or team up with other online players. Or you can choose the Parkour mode and show off your jumping skills. Moreover, you can fight your enemies using only a melee weapon in Knife Only mode. Make your choices from the Selection menu and click on the “Play” button. The game will automatically open a room for you to match your selections. Setting up your own room is also an option. Alternatively, you can join one of the available rooms in the “Servers” section. When you enter the battling field, pick up your weapon in the Change Weapon section and start facing your enemies! Game Modes in Kirka.io There are seven unique game modes in Kirka.io. Each comes with different objectives. We will leave you a brief information about the modes below. Solo: This is a free-for-all mode. Everyone is alone here. Team: There are two teams: Red and Blue. Fight alongside your friends. Point: Reach the flag zone and conquer the point. You must protect the zone at all costs to win. Parkour: Strive to reach the end of the parkour within a short period of time. Physics: The mode in which you violate the law of gravity. You will move faster in it. Sabotage: You must destroy your opponent team’s gems with your knife before they do. Knife Only: There are no heavy weapons here. Only melee weapons are accessible for fighting. Customize the Loadout When you enter the game map, you must determine which weapon you will use to combat the online players. From five options, choose the one that best suits your playstyle. Remember that you can change your weapon whenever you want by opening the Change Weapon menu. Additionally, don’t worry about running out of bullets. You will have an infinite number of them. Vita: A Sniper Rifle Mac-10: A SMG Weatie: A Shotgun LAR: An Assault Rifle M60: A Heavy Weapon Controls Desktops and Laptops WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump P/ESC: Change Weapon Menu Left-Click: Shoot Right-Click: Aim Shift: Crouch E: Dash 1,2,3: Switch Weapons Mobile Devices Use the virtual buttons on the screen. Developer Pierre-Eli developed Kirka.io. Similar Online Games Tribals io may also catch your attention. In the game, you play as a caveman on an island with nothing in your hands. You must gather the necessary stuff to survive! Look up other free io games on OnlineGames.io for more alternatives. There are dozens of free online games on the site. To access them easily, please bookmark this website!

title: Infiltrating the Airship
description: Henry Stickmin: Infiltrating the Airship is the fourth exciting episode in the famous Henry Stickmin series. This time, Henry finds himself in trouble and is offered a chance to redeem himself by aiding the government in capturing the infamous Toppat Clan. It's a notorious criminal organization known for their daring heists and outrageous schemes. The Toppat Clan has taken control of a massive airship. Now, it's your job to help Henry sneak aboard the airship and put a stop to their criminal activities. You can choose to connect to a tech assistant who is having a hard time understanding your commands, leading to even funnier situations. Or go solo and meet quirky characters, and solve out clever puzzles. One thing is for sure, this free game will make you think outside of the box. Every decision you make can drastically change the flow of the story: Henry’s triumph or another epic fail So get ready to infiltrate the airship and save the day. Play Henry Stickmin: Infiltrating the Airship now and experience all the fun twists and turns! Controls Use your mouse to select choices and interact with objects. How to Play Infiltrating the Airship At each step, you'll be presented with various choices on how to help Henry proceed. Click on an option and watch the outcome unfold. If your choice ends in failure, you can retry the previous decision or retry from beginning to explore different flows. Henry's goal is completing the mission by capturing the Toppat Clan leaders, but your goal is to have fun. So enjoy failures, laugh and explore all multiple endings. Developer Henry Stickmin: Infiltrating the Airship was developed by PuffballsUnited, well-known for creating funny stick-figure animations with storytelling. Similar Games If you enjoy this game and haven't played the prequels yet, you'll love the previous games in the Henry Stickmin series, including Breaking the Bank , Escaping the Prison , and Stealing the Diamond . Each of these free online games delivers the same mix of comedy, creativity, and strategic decision-making fun. Check them out and keep laughing as you play through the entire Henry Stickmin saga online at OnlineGames.io!

title: Elastic Man
description: What is the best way to let off steam? There is only one answer to this question. Elastic Man is a stress-relieving arcade game where you can play with Morty's unbreakable face. What is Elastic Man? Elastic Man is a physics arcade game where you stretch and pull Morty's face. We know it sounds weird, but that's the fun of it. No matter what you do, sweet Morty's face will return to its original state. You can change the quality of the game from medium to high quality for a better playing experience. It is optional. Just tap to the high mode from the upper right side of the play screen. How to play Elastic Man? There are no ABCs to play Elastic Man. You are free with everything. Feel free to pull, poke, and hold this man's face. Grab it and stretch it towards the infinitive! You only need to use your cursor to play Elastic Man. Tips for Making Elastic Man Even Funnier There are ways to make this fun game more enjoyable and hilarious. We recommend you play Elastic Man with sound on! Morty's funny sounds will make you laugh a lot. The nose and mouth of Morty are very foolish. The movements you make in these areas will make you chuckle. Especially the fact that Morty's mouth is always open can make even the long faces laugh. Morty's eyes will follow your cursor when you move it around him. You can grab the eyes and pull them to the corners. Those eyes are way more flexible than you think they are! You can't deform Morty because he has so much elasticity that he can't be hurt or broken. It's impossible for this to happen. So you are very free to mess with it. Features of Elastic Man High-quality graphics and sounds. Straightforward gameplay. A unique game with a hilarious side. No rules and missions to follow. Great way to reduce stress. Developer Elastic Man was created by David Li. Another fantastic game by David Li is Blob Opera . More Games Like This If you enjoy Elastic Man, there are many other games to try. You can look up Crazy Games or Kids Games on OnlineGames.io.

title: Valentine's Day Couple Date
description: Valentine's Day Couple Date is an online dress-up game where you help a cool couple get ready for their Valentine’s Day! Make their date outstanding by preparing them for breakfast with a view, a couple's workout, and finally a rooftop dinner surprise. Help the handsome Ben arrange all these to surprise his beloved, Ellie, in this fashion game! Controls LMB: To Interact On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to interact. How to Play Valentine’s Day Couple Date In the Valentine’s Day Couple Date , your objective is to help Ben wow his girlfriend on Valentine’s Day! The first thing to do is to get the couple ready for breakfast with a view of the Eiffel Tower. Afterward, they will go for a couple’s workout and finalize their day with a rooftop dinner. Step by step, select elegant outfits for both Ben and Ellie. Make sure that they look fabulous on all three occasions! Prepare the Couple for Valentine’s Day Start by preparing their breakfast on Valentine’s Day, and organize a nice breakfast for them on this special day. Pick out a satin nightgown for him and his girlfriend. After breakfast, they want to go for a workout together. Select nice sportswear for them and make them look like real athletes! After the workout, you’ll need to get them ready for the evening. A Dreamy Rooftop Dinner Ben & Ellie will go to a dreamy rooftop dinner on the evening of Valentine's Day. So, you need to glam up Ellie with elegant dresses and accessories. And, of course, Ben wants to look handsome next to Ellie. Choose a suit for him and a present for Ellie. Ben & Ellie will be the most stylish couple among the couples at the rooftop dinner! Tips & Tricks for Valentine’s Day Couple Date 👔 Match outfits for perfect couple style. 🎀 Choose elegant looks for every date. 🎁 Plan surprises to impress Ellie. 🎽 Balance sporty and classy fashion. 🍽️ Finish strong with rooftop glamour. Developer Gamerina is the publisher of Valentine’s Day Couple Date. Looking for More? If you like playing dress-up games like this, you may also try playing Paper Doll Diary: Dress Up DIY ! For additional options, you are always welcome to visit our Dress Up Games Online page. Don’t hesitate to contact us if you have any suggestions or a wishlist!

title: Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll
description: Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll is a 2D sandbox game in which you try to destroy a green ragdoll looking like a Minecraft Mob! You’re completely free to throw arrows, knives, and many other weapons at him. Just click on the mob, and watch him lose his health until he gets destroyed. Enjoy this clicker game by unlocking new weapons, characters, and backgrounds! Controls LMB: Attack Ragdoll On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to attack. How to Play Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll In Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll , your main goal is to destroy the Minecraft mob with a weapon you choose. Start with arrows, click on the mob to attack it, and gain in-game currencies. The more you click, the more damage the mob takes in one of the most exciting clicker games! As you progress, you will be able to unlock new gears such as bombs, TNTs, and rockets. Feel free to try new tactics on the mob to increase the enjoyment! Attack the Minecraft Mob In every level, you need to attack the Minecraft mob to destroy it. You have arrows in the beginning, and every damage you make on the mob grants you in-game currencies. Use your money to unlock new and advanced weapons. There are 17 weapons at your disposal. Unlock each one, and start decreasing the health bar of the mob! Unlock New Minecraft Mobs to Attack As you progress level by level, you can unlock new and crazier Minecraft mobs. 15th level, 25th level, 35th level and 45th level enable you to unlock new characters to attack. Additionally, new settings await you every 5 levels! With new characters to deal with and new settings in the background, excitement never fades away in this sandbox game! Tips & Tricks for Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll 🗡️ Unlock new weapons for more serious damage. 🖱️ Click rapidly to maximize damage. 💵 Save currency for stronger gears. 💣 Test bombs and explosive tactics. 👾 Unlock mobs to keep gameplay fresh. Developer Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll is published by TheVladGame. Looking for More? If you are looking for more clicker games, this website is the best one out there! Try Kick the Zombie , where you try to knock out an ugly zombie. For additional game options, you are always welcome to visit our Clicker Games Online page at the link. Share your gaming experiences with us in the comments section below!

title: Basket Hoop
description: In Basket Hoop , gravity is your only challenge, and tapping is your sole weapon. Your goal is simple make the ball jump and send it inside the hoop. The charm of the one button games peaks in Basket Hoop online. Make as many baskets as you can in a limited amount of time. This game brings the same joy of playing Skeeball in arcade rooms, but with an extra: longer play sessions than you'd get with a single token. Controls Computer: Use your mouse to shoot the ball. Mobile: Tap to shoot the ball How to Play Basket Hoop Tap or click on anywhere on the screen to dunk the ball. You can jump the ball mid-air as well. Control the angle to land the ball in the hoop. You have 5 seconds to make a score. If you miss a score within the time limit, the ball will return from the other side for another chance. Each successful shot will create a new net in a different position for your next attempt. Continue tapping to jump and shoot as many baskets as possible before the time runs out. If you run out of time without scoring enough baskets, restart and aim to beat your personal best! Ball Shop We know the game name is "Basket Hoop" and it takes place in a basketball field, but that doesn't mean you have to stick with a traditional ball! Explore the Ball Shop by tapping on the shop icon. You'll find 27 unlockable balls. From tennis balls and volleyballs to golf balls and Pokéballs, there's a wide range of choices that offer faster gameplay than the default ball. Use your in-game coins to purchase these unique options and complete your collection. Tips and Tricks Pay close attention to the rhythm of your taps. Timing is key to making those perfect shots! At the beginning of the game you'll see the pathway the ball should follow for perfect shots. Try to stick with that path for high scores. Try out different balls from the Ball Shop. Each type has its unique speed and trajectory, which can help you find the best fit for your playstyle. Unlock new fields that comes with extra time limit. Even though you have five seconds to perform the dunk in the default field, you can unlock 5 more fields that come with extra seconds. Beating high scores will be much easier when you have more time. Try to chain successful baskets together (streaks) for bonus points. The faster you score, the more points you'll rack up! Developer Basket Hoop was created by FreezeNova. Compatibility Basket Hoop is perfectly compatible with mobile phones including iOS and Android. However if you'd like to play the game in portrait mode on your mobile, then try Tap Tap Shots . More Online Sports Games Looking for even more fun? We got your back, take a look at the other sports games on Online Games.io! Soccer, football, tennis, pool and many other sports games await you!

title: Crazy Traffic Racer
description: Crazy Traffic Racer is an online driving game in which you can get in the seat of six supercars! Take a ride on the highway, speed at high rates and overtake other vehicles on the way. The best feature of the Crazy Traffic Racer is its cockpit view. It provides you with a real driving experience. Time to start the engine! 🏎 Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Drive/Steer/Brake F Key: Activate Nitro C Key: Change Camera View Crazy Traffic Racer Overview The engine is roaring! Can you hear it? There are three game modes in this driving game to select from: One Way, Two Way and Time Attack modes. The main aim of each game mode is to overtake other vehicles on the road to make a score. Without crashing, you must pass a car as close as possible to get the highest points. The score you earn will help you customize and upgrade your current vehicle. Or, you can unlock a new supercar from the menu. Supercars to Unlock in Crazy Traffic Racer 🔓 There are six supercars to get with the money you earn from the overtake races. Each vehicle was actually designed with inspiration from the most beloved models of well-known brands such as Lamborghini, Ferrari, Porsche, and McLaren. Vortex GT: Free Phantom R5: Buy for ＄5000 Nova Pursuit: Buy for ＄10000 Apex Velocity: Buy for ＄15000 Inferno X: Buy for ＄20000 Tempest V12: Buy for ＄25000 Overtake Slow Cars 🏁 As you know from Highway Traffic, your goal should be to overtake as many slow cars as possible to make a score. Each vehicle you overtake earns you +100 points. If you can create combos and leave vehicles behind one after another, the points will double. Speeding at high rates will also increase the points when you overtake. Gamie suggests unlocking the nitro in the customization section for ＄2500. This way, you can easily accelerate your car to high speeds. Activate the nitro by pressing the F key. You May Also Like Charger City Driver is another game option for you to check out! Drive your precious Dodge Charger-like muscle car in the neon-lit city streets. Additionally, you can visit our Driving Games Online catalogue to explore more. Keep coming back to dive into the newly added free online games.

title: Tic Tac Toe
description: Tic Tac Toe is a 2D board game with a 2-player option. To win, the player must consecutively leave 3 marks with X or O letters on a 3x3 grid. The letters can be placed side by side, diagonally, or vertically. Play this old but gold game with a friend or against the AI. The choice is yours! How to Play Tic Tac Toe In this game, players take turns putting their chosen symbol, X or O, on any empty grid space. The main goal? Be­ the first to line up three­ of your symbols, up, down, or diagonal. That's how you win! Rules of Tic Tac Toe One side is X, and the other is O. At the beginning of the game, the player can choose which mark to play with. The player's goal is to make 3 marks in a row on a 3x3 grid. The side that chooses the letter X usually starts the game. The game is a draw if all 9 squares on the grid are marked, but neither the letter X nor the letter O can be marked in a row. A Few Tips If you want to win a game against an AI or a friend, you have to use a way of thinking. This includes the steps to success. Planning to get three X's in a row is an important part of the game. It's also important to prevent an AI or a friend from hitting three O's in a row. Once you've put X in a square, it's time to plan ahead and figure out the best location for your next X. Controls Use the mouse click to leave a mark on a square. Other Board Games If you are interested in board games , you can also try the games given below. Stay tuned for more new board games! Ludo Hero is a strategic board game for two or four players. You can play Ludo Hero with online players worldwide or with a Bot for fun.

title: Miniblox io
description: Miniblox io is a multiplayer sandbox game where you can play with mini blocks to boost your creativity. You can discover parkour maps, survival maps and other mini game maps. Each map comes with its special features. Try all of them and find your favorite one. You can even duel with other online players by trying to knock them off the bridge! You will love this game, like Minecraft, a lot. 🧱 How to Play Miniblox io Like every sandbox game, it is entirely up to your creativity to play Miniblox io. Game offers various open worlds in each map, and you will create your gaming experience on them. In Survival and Survival (Keep Inventory) maps, you survive in nature. In Creative and Superflat maps, you can use your imagination to create your own world with many items. Additionally, there are two parkour maps: Jump Parkour and Spiral Parkour. These maps challenge your as you need to jump long leaps and avoid obstacles on winding tracks. Keep reading and learn about the maps and controls of Miniblox.io. Be the King of Crafting: Sandbox Worlds In Survival and Survival (Keep Inventory) maps, you will survive in the wild nature. Collect resources and start crafting. Your character will be hungry in time, so you need to hunt chickens, pigs and sheep to collect their meat. It may also be helpful to collect chickens’ feathers and sheep leather. You will encounter green monsters, and they may attack and hurt you. Avoid them as much as you can. You may see lakes and wetlands on the maps. But be careful while moving on them as you may get caught by the current. The current can take you places you do not want. As game offers survival experience in these maps, watch out for your character's health and hunger status from the bars. You can see the bars at the bottom right of the screen. Let Your Imagination Run Wild: Creativity Maps What you will need most is your creativity in the Creative and Superflat maps. These modes enable you to create your own world with endless item options. Tap to the E key to search for the items. You will see planks, ores of various precious stones, logs of different tree species, and saplings. And many more things to discover. Choose which item you want to use and add it to your inventory to be able to use and create. Improve Your Reflexes: Parkour Maps You will find two different parkour maps in the game: Jump Parkour and Spiral Parkour. They will challenge your character-controlling skills as you will have to perform long jumps and overcome many blocks to move between spiraling tracks. Do not forget to reach the golden checkpoints to save your progress. Give A Mini Break From Blocks: Minigames You can find many maps to combat with other players. You will have a knife for close combat and an arch for remote attack. You may also duel on red and blue bridges connecting the two sides in the Bridge Duels. Knock your opponent off the bridge. Try to survive among the furious players! PitPvP Skywars Spleef Bridge Duels Social Gaming Features There will be many online players around the world. So, you can be friends with them and act together or combat with them. You may search for players and add them as friends from the Friends section in the menu. You can also view your friend requests here. But to play with friends, we recommend you sign in. Controls You can change the controls in the options menu. Default controls are as follows: To move, use the WASD keys. Use the Space key to jump. To crouch, press the Left CTRL key. Use the Left Shift key to sprint. To sneak, press the Left Alt key. Press the Tab key to list players. Press the Enter key to open the chat. Use the Slash to open the command. Use the Q key to drop selected items. Press the E key to open/close inventory. Use the 1-9 number keys to switch between hotbar slots. Games Like Minecraft If you enjoy playing survival games, you may also try Survival Craft . You can dig, carve and whatever you like in this sandbox game. Just use your creativity and decide what you will build. For more options, you may look up the free Minecraft games collection on OnlineGames.io. You can access dozens of games that you can enjoy with one click!

title: Fireboy and Watergirl
description: Have you heard the saying "Opposites attract"? We want to introduce you two best friends that can never be together: Fireboy and Watergirl . Fireboy is hydrophobic and can only pass through flames. Watergirl loves to be wet and evaporate when she touches fire. Fireboy and Watergirl: Forest Temple is a popular arcade-style game that can be played on your browser without downloading. The game mechanics might look simple at first but will get challenging at the end of the 30+ levels. How to Play Fireboy and Watergirl? Fireboy and Watergirl is initially released as a multiplayer game. It would be much easier and more fun to play with a friend. However, you can challenge yourself to play on your own with two hands on the keyboard. You can control Fireboy with the arrow keys and move Watergirl with the AWD keys. Fireboy and Watergirl's love is so deep that if one of them dies, you have to start over on that level. Bring Fireboy and Watergirl to their individual doors to complete a stage. The doors might be apart from each other in some cases. One of them might arrive at their gate first. The door will open when the right character stands in front. However, Watergirl and Fireboy will wait for each other to exit and finish a stage. If you think you made a mistake while playing, you can always retry that level from the beginning by clicking the pause button on the top right. Lakes, Flames, and Green Goos While moving Fireboy, be sure that this little hot man does not touch a single drop of water. And protect Watergirl from fires in case she burns. Also, avoid all green lakes since both sinks in green goo. Buttons, Levers, and Boxes Before starting a stage, look through all the obstacles and buttons, and plan your moves ahead before acting. On some levels, it is essential to schedule which buttons to push and where and when to use the elevators. The use of levers is also a critical element while playing. The levers will remain as you leave them and don't move. As it is impossible to use the lever and be on the elevator at the same time, Fireboy and Watergirl will assist each other to elevate to different floors. There will be some levels that you will have limited time to press a button or certain buttons to avoid entirely. Unlike levers, buttons will not stay pressed as you leave. You have to hold the button to keep the position of the switch-connected elevator. Watergirl can push the boxes for different purposes. You can make use of boxes to climb on higher floors. If you come across lakes or flames that are too long to jump over, turn boxes into little islands that Fireboy and Watergirl can use as a waypoint. Other than that, you can use the boxes to hold a button. Collect as much as diamonds and rings. You will need them to reach certain stages. Blue diamonds can only be taken by Watergirl, while red ones are collectible by Fireboy. Be creative. There might be more than one way of passing a level. Enjoy FireBoy and Watergirl online with a friend! It is one best multiplayer games online. Developer Fireboy and Watergirl was created by Oslo Albet. Similar Games If you liked this game, we suggest you browse our Arcade Games tag to find more options. Great platformer adventures await you at OnlineGames.io!

title: Mega Lamba Ramp
description: Ever dreamed of launching your car into the sky from giant, death-defying ramps? Your time has come! Mega Lamba Ramp is a thrilling, free-to-play stunt driving game where the skies are your playground, and you can test your limits when it comes to crazy tricks with your car. Choose your favorite character and fasten your seatbelt. Precision and courage are your best tools. Want to land that perfect flip over a skyscraper? Floor it. Want to unlock your dream car? Drift like a maniac. Controls On PC Move: WASD/Arrow Keys Enter Vehicle: F Flip Vehicle: R Boost: Shift Control View: Mouse Click & Drag On Phone Steer: Move the on-screen steering wheel Accelerate/Brake: Tap the forward or backward buttons Why is Mega Lamba Ramp cool? If you like fast cars and over-the-top racing, Mega Lamba Ramp is made for you. Compete against yourself for the highest scores, explore epic tracks in the sky, and make the craziest drifts in the city. Unlock fan-favorite Italian Brainrot icons like Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Bobrito Bandito, Ballerina Cappucina, and many more! Visit the Garage to buy crazy new cars anytime. Two Game Modes Stunt in Air: Master the ramps, hit turbo, and pull off mid-air flips and spirals to collect max points. Each level gets harder, so bring your best reflexes! Drift in City: Will be unlocked after you complete Level 3 in the first mode. Here, you start making money to unlock new cars and fan-favorite characters. Make as many drifts as possible, as these bring you cash. If you crave an adrenaline rush or just want to watch a muscle car do backflips in space, Mega Lamba Ramp delivers non-stop, over-the-top fun. The sky isn’t the limit, it’s just the beginning. Developer This game was created by Mirra Games.

title: Tag Run
description: Tag Run is the online version of the classic tag game everyone knows and loves. All you have to do is run super fast, pass the bomb to someone else, and make sure it doesn’t come back to you before it explodes! Game Overview Tag Run is a fun and fast game where you race around colorful maps like Pixel , Winter , Lava , Jungle , Candy , and Night . All you have to do is run around and pass the bomb to someone else before it explodes. It’s the perfect online version of the classic tag game, so if it’s rainy outside and you can’t play with your friends, gather together for a session of Tag Run and have the same fun and thrilling experience right on your screen! How to Play Tag Run? The gameplay is simple: keep running from corner to corner, jump, and stay away from other players so the bomb doesn’t stick with you. If you get unlucky and end up with it, move fast and pass it to someone else before it explodes! You can play solo or with up to four friends, either working together or competing against each other. Tag, you’re it! 1 Player Move: WAD / ⬅️⬆️➡️ Multiplayer Player 1 Move: WAD Player 2 Move: ⬅️⬆️➡️ Player 3 Move: TFH Player 4 Move: IJL Good to Know! Ad, you’re out! Ads might be a bit boring, but they’re the easiest and free way to earn extra coins to buy or unlock cool stuff. Just a couple of minutes of waiting can get you a rare outfit or awesome item! Style it up! Make your character stand out with awesome outfits and funny looks! Use the coins you earn or watch ads to unlock cool new skins. Watch out for the jelly: once you bump into it, it creates a smoky cloud that makes it hard to see where the bomb is. Stay alert and keep your distance so you don’t end up with the bomb! The void to chaos: look out for the spinning void holes because they can suddenly teleport you to another corner of the map. Sometimes they help you escape, but other times they might trap you with the bomb. Use them wisely! FAQs Will my progress be saved? Yes! Your progress is saved automatically, so you won’t lose your coins, unlocked maps, or outfits. You can come back anytime and keep running right where you left off! How do I unlock new maps? You can unlock new maps by using the coins you’ve earned or by watching ads. Similar Games If you’re in for more challenging running fun that keeps your adrenaline high, then you should try Cat Escape ! It’s a clever and sneaky puzzle game where you play as a cute cat trying to escape from granny guards and tricky rooms. Use your brain, move fast, and find smart ways to sneak past obstacles. If you love the thrill of Tag Run , you’ll totally enjoy being a sneaky cat in Cat Escape !

title: LOLbeans io
description: Some of you may recall the epic TV show Total Wipeout. In that hilarious contest, players had to complete an obstacle course filled with hoops, wrecking balls, slingers, and more. Those who fell into the water or mud failed the course. Not the extreme athletes, but ordinary people ran, jumped, raced, and risked it all for a chance at glory and a good laugh on those absurd courses. Players showcased over 1000 unique falling styles. Total Wipeout was a ridiculous show, indeed. For those who'd love to play Wipeout but would rather stay dry and keep their bones solid, give Lolbeans a chance! It's a funny online platformer game inspired by Total Wipeout. In Lolbeans io , players control a tiny jelly bean character on an obstacle course . The courses are at least as funny and challenging as Total Wipeout settings. Start running as soon as the race begins and make your way through the championship. Prepare for tons of obstacles on the path! Players of all ages looking for a good laugh can play Lolbeans io. The game features mechanics and visuals similar to the famous console game Fall Guys . So, why wait? Compete with your friends in silly races, and get ready to cross the finish line! How to Play Lolbeans io? Open the game and wait for the next round to start. It will not take long as the game has thousands of online players. Keep your hand on the keyboard and start running by pressing the W key as soon as the round begins. Jump over the obstacles using the spacebar and make use of levers and swings. Stay away from bouncing red balls. You have limited time to finish the course. Choose the easiest side of the path, and don't lose any time. Try not to fall while running. And if you fall once or twice, it's fine; you will respawn again, but you may fall behind other players. Players who finish the course before time pass the next course with the first-round winners. Reach the finish line of different courses until you become the ultimate bean who eliminates all other contestants. The aim is to be the only bean that survives and collects the coins. To add more excitement to the race, play with your friends. Uplift Your Bean With A New Style Don't be lost in the mob! Shine like a star with customizable bean skin options. Click on the bean in the main menu to see options in the shops. Skins: Let the other players envy your dazzling outfit. Be a space fighter or a dragon! Hats: Don't let your bean run around under the sun without protection! Wear a baseball cap or bunny ears. Pick a gorgeous hat to stand out from the crowd. New Features New Exotic Skins: Good news for Lolbeaners! Now, you can select new exotic skins and race in your own style. Choose between Axolot, Barrel, Chicken, Corn, Space Fighter, Sunflower, and other bouncy beans. New Hats: New hat options are available now! Put on a racing helmet or a Sombrero. Pick the funniest hat from the new collection and start racing! New Maps: You can enjoy exploring new seasonal maps. The most recent releases are Monster Manor, Dash Cup, and Lava Lake maps. Try them out now! Skins and Hats Menu in LolBeans Explore the Maps Discover vibrant courses filled with exciting challenges that will put your skills to the test. Beware of the numerous traps and obstacles that line the tracks. Hammer swings, enormous windmills, and bouncing angry balls will come over you. You will face tiny bridges and traps to cross over without falling. Publish Your Own Levels If you are into game design you can build your very own chaotic course. Click Community Level below the play button, and hit " Create a Level ". Press play and start editing the level. If you are new to game design, read the documentation, explore and experiment with the editor. Then, you can share your level with the community. You can also choose between courses created by the community. Give a chance to Stairway to Heaven, a wonderful map created by King Bob. How To Earn Coins You can earn coins by playing and passing more and more rounds. Check out the shop if you want to spend your coins on buying new hats and skins. If you need more coins, there are various coin packs that you can buy with discount options. How to Join A Party in Lolbeans You can play lol beans in party mode with your friends. To do that, create a private room by clicking the "Party" button in the main menu (on the top right of your screen). Copy the invite code or room name and send it to your friends. You can play with up to 30 players in a party room. If a friend has already created a room and invited you, enter the room code to join the room. Chat with your friends until all players gather up in the room. When you are ready, start racing with your friends. It's much more fun that way! Controls WASD or arrow keys: Move Spacebar/ Right-click: Jump Mouse: Look around Developer Lolbeans io was created by Big Boss Dolphin. Similar Games If you like battle royale running games similar, we strongly recommend you play Fall Boys . Race with other online players and overcome various obstacles in this game. Don't fall, boys! Please bookmark OnlineGames.io (Ctrl+D), and you will always find the newest games to play on your browser ! Showcased map is Lighthouse in the Isle

title: Car Parking City Duel
description: Car Parking City Duel is a free online driving game where you can play solo or on split-screen with a friend. It has a 3D open-world city and combines realistic driving physics with a variety of fun game modes. So, you're not limited to just parking. This game also lets you race through traffic, drift, crash into cars, complete timed missions, and freely explore the map without rules. What makes this car game stand out is how it wraps up different driving games into one big package. So, let's say you want to show off your drifting skills. There's a mode for that. Want to just roam the city and mess around? You can do that too. There's even a crash mode where smashing into other cars actually earns you points. You earn coins by completing tasks or collecting money bags randomly scattered on the map. Head to the garage to unlock better, faster cars with your coins. Solo or local two-player. Mission-based or free roam. Your rules, your game. Car Parking City Duel offers something for every kind of driving fan. Controls Player 1 Move: W, A, S, D Switch Camera: C NOS: Left Shift Brake: Space Restart: R Look Back: T Player 2 Move: Arrow keys Switch Camera: K NOS: O Brake: P Restart: U Look Back: L Race with Friends Race mode puts you on the starting line against your friend and two CPU-controlled cars. There are 10 unique tracks designed with tight corners, city traffic, and open stretches. The first to cross the finish line wins, but if you crash or fall behind early, catching up can be tough. Timing your NOS boost and cornering correctly can make all the difference. Missions Mode Test your parking precision with timed goals in 20 different realistic parking scenarios. These aren't just casual drop-offs. You'll need to maneuver around tight corners, avoid barriers, and complete the parking mission before the clock runs out. Every bump damages your car, so be gentle. Your health bar on the top right of your screen is always watching. Parking Challenges This is where things get really specific. You'll need to drive through small checkpoints and park perfectly in highlighted spots. It's a true test of control, and every level gets more complex, and the time limit shrinks. You'll need patience. You'll perform some smooth operations here. Crash Mode In Crash Mode, your mission is to hit as many cars as possible. Every crash earns you points. And even if you slightly bump, the other cars explode. It's like playing with the tank in GTA. The more cars you explode, the more coins you'll get when the round ends. It's not about speed, but it's about destruction and smart targeting. Overtake Challenges Speed through busy traffic lanes and overtake civilian cars without crashing. Each overtake adds to your score so you can drive with better sports cars in the next run. It's one of the most rewarding modes of all. Drift Mode Speed over 80 km and steer sharply to pull off long drifts around corners and collect drift points. You'll need smooth entries, tight control, and the ability to maintain your angle without slamming into walls. Rack up a high score and prove your drifting skills. If you need a guide on how to drift, read our article on drift games online. Free Roam No goals. No pressure. Just you and the city. Drive wherever you want, explore ramps, jump off rooftops, take in the scenery, or practice tricks. This mode is great for experimenting or just relaxing between intense challenges. If you want, collect some money bags on the street. Features 7 different game modes Split-screen 2-player mode or solo play Coin system lets you unlock new, faster cars Vehicle health bar Realistic drifting and crash physics Richly detailed 3D city environment Multiple language support Developer Car Parking City Duel was developed by RHM Interactive, known for making competitive and co-op games perfect for browser play. They've mastered the split-screen formula, and it shows here that every mode feels tailor-made for two players or solo fun. Other Car Games If you enjoy city driving in Car Parking City Duel, you'll want to try other traffic games or parking games on OnlineGames.io. We have lots of titles, each offering a unique urban driving experience, letting you explore the city while completing stunts, missions, or simply cruising with realistic traffic. They're all playable online for free. So fuel up, grab a friend, and hit the road.

title: Highway Cars
description: Highway Cars is a 3D driving game where you steer your car on the highway in the flow of traffic. The key point here is dodging the other cars without any accident. The more cars you dodge, the more points you get. Passing the cars as close as possible will be an adrenaline-pumping challenge in this car game, which is inspired by the popular game Highway Traffic! How to Play Highway Cars You have 2 available cars to choose from at the beginning: the red sedan and the light blue hatchback. But the others need to be unlocked with the in-game currency you earn from the highway. Select one of the cars before getting on the road. You may give your car one of the basic colors or pick a two-color option. Upgrade your car’s speed, brakes, engine, and other performance features from the customization section by tapping the spanning icon. There are 3 game modes: One-Way, Two-Way and Level Selection. Decide which game you want to play and hit the road! One-Way Highway Road In one-way mode, all the cars on the highway go in the same direction. There will be many cars moving forward near you. You need to pass the cars as closely as possible in order to get scores. And these scores will make you in-game currency. But, you will lose if you crash with any car in the flowing traffic. Two-Way Highway Road This road is a bit challenging as traffic flows from both sides. You must be extra careful not to hit a car. But the advantage is you can bypass many cars at once. Advance Level by Level Highway Cars also offers you a level selection mode. There are 50 levels divided into 5 sections. You will move to a different environment when you complete each section completely. For example, you will drive your car near a desert in the first 10 levels. It is possible to encounter snowy and tropical regions in the following sections. Unlock New Game Maps As you earn currency by bypassing cars on the way, you will be able to unlock new maps. We briefly explain which game map you can unlock for how many dollars below. Snowy Highway: 1500$ Tropical Highway: 2000$ Forest Highway: 5000$ Urban Highway: 8000$ Controls To steer the car, use the WASD or the Arrow keys. To change the camera view, use the C key. Other Traffic Games If you love playing Highway Cars, you may also try Highway Traffic . Always keep your attention and be ready to dodge cars with a quick maneuver in this game. You will face many cars on the road. The traffic will get challenging when you make progress in the game. Show off your driving skills! Or, you may look up other traffic games on OnlineGames.io for further options by clicking on the link. If you have any suggestions or wishlist, do not hesitate to contact us!

title: FlowBall
description: FlowBall is a 3D arcade game in which you control a flowing ball in a tunnel located in outer space. This tunnel leads to the Earth; however, it has many obstacles and traps. Move forward in this tunnel by dodging all kinds of obstacles, and try to cover the longest distance that you can to reach Earth. Don’t forget to share your best records with us in the comments section below! Controls A/D or Left/Right Arrows: Move Spacebar: Upside Down Alternatively, LMB can be used to move. FlowBall Overview In FlowBall, which takes its inspiration from Run 3, your main goal is to avoid crashing into any obstacles in the tunnel or falling through the gaps in it by guiding your flowing ball. Don’t forget that the more you travel in outer space, the higher your score will be. So, steer the ball left or right to dodge obstacles, watch for incoming gaps and jump when necessary. However, keep in mind that when you jump, the tunnel turns upside down! Glowing Dots in FlowBall While moving forward in the tunnel with your flowing ball, you will see shiny objects. These are glowing dots that grant you a specific number of scores. See the bulleted list below for further information about the glowing dots! White Dots: Each one you collect earns you +10 points. Red Dots: Grant you +1000 points, but the controls work in reverse. Blue Dots: Give you +500 points, and help you collect the white lights. Green Dots: Get you short-term protection against obstacles while increasing the score by +750 points. Defy the Laws of Gravity In the tunnel, there are various obstacles, traps and chasms to overcome. Try not to drop the flowing ball through the gaps. Otherwise, it gets lost in the depths of space. You should also watch out for the flying meteors; if the ball hits one, the game is over. Keep your eyes wide open and your reflexes sharp to cover the longest distance in this tunnel. Tips & Tricks for FlowBall 🌍 Dodge obstacles, keep forward momentum. 💡 Flip wisely, gravity becomes advantageous. 👀 Collect dots, boost score rapidly. 👽 Anticipate gaps, react with precision. 🧐 Stay focused, survive longer distances. Developer Mirra Games is the developer of FlowBall. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing FlowBall , you may also try playing Velocity Rush , where you take control of a golf ball through diverse obstacle courses! Additionally, you are always welcome to visit our Arcade Games Online page at the link. There are dozens of free online games at your disposal on www.onlinegames.io!

title: DuckCraft
description: DuckCraft is a browser-friendly sandbox game with various multiplayer and single-player game modes. Feel free to dig, carve, and build your own world with unlimited block options. Play with friends around the world in multiplayer modes, or build your own imaginative world at your own pace in the single-player modes. Inspired by the original Minecraft game, DuckCraft offers you in-depth gaming experiences! 🦆 Controls WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump LMB: Attack RMB: Use an Item Scroll Wheel: Pick an Item Left-Shift: Sneak Q: Drop T: Chat E: Inventory TAB: List Players How to Play DuckCraft Decide how you want to play this online sandbox game and teleport to the blocky world for an endless game experience! If you want to play with other players around the world, connect to the server and choose your desired game mode: DuckCraft Online, DuckCraft Survival, and DuckCraft Mystic. But if you are the type who likes to go solo, Singleplayer Survival and Singleplayer Creative modes are perfect for you. Game Modes in DuckCraft DuckCraft Online Meet with other players around the world in the DuckCraft Online mode. Explore the extensive game map and duel other players while trying to survive in the wild. You need to manage your character’s health and food bars in order to survive! DuckCraft Mystic DuckCraft Mystic features spooky creatures under the shining stars. Dodge their attacks and try to survive by using your iron sword or axe to guard yourself. Remember to hunt animals like sheep or cows to feed your character. DuckCraft Survival DuckCraft Survival is the hardcore multiplayer survival mode in which you need to gather necessary materials to craft tools and build structures. To stay alive in the wild, our mascot Gamie suggests you build a shelter to stay warm. You can also hunt animals to get food and craft wool outfits! Singleplayer Survival You have an empty inventory in the Singleplayer Survival mode. Wander around the blocky world map, gather resources and craft tools and weapons to survive. Keep in mind that you are all alone. Watch out for the Minecraft mobs, especially when the night comes! Singleplayer Creative Singleplayer Creative offers you an unlimited inventory so that you can build your imaginative world without the need for collecting blocks from nature. Use your creativity and build structures like castles or mansions. There are no restrictions in this mode! Developer FreezeNova is the developer of DuckCraft. Similar Games If you enjoy playing DuckCraft , you may also try playing Eagle DuckCraft ! Try its Hardcore Mode to prove your survival skills. For additional options, feel free to visit our Sandbox Games Online category, which we diligently curated on www.onlinegames.io. There are dozens of free online games on this website at your disposal!

title: Aventador Vice Crime City
description: Aventador Vice Crime City is one of the most thrilling car-driving games available. It combines a dynamic open-world experience with realistic city environments and four exciting game modes. This is not just another driving game. It's an urban adventure you won't forget! Take your loyal dog companion and get in the car. Explore the city, admire its realistic streets and take on wild missions. It's time for some adrenaline! Controls Drive: WASD or Arrow Keys Handbrake: Spacebar Nitro: Left Shift Camera View: C Slow Motion: G Start your journey with a 5,000 CR welcome gift. Earn more CR by drifting, hitting high speeds, making impossible tricks on stunts, completing missions, or… taking out pedestrians (but watch out for the police!). Game Modes The game offers four different game modes, each unlocked with 250 CR. As you progress through levels, the entry fee increases by 250 CR. But don't worry, your rewards grow even bigger with each level! Drift - Make the craziest drifts to earn maximum points before the time runs out Stunt - Push your speed and skill to the limit with dangerous stunts Police - You broke the law. Now, try to escape from the relentless police chases Kill - Hit pedestrians to earn more cash, but beware because after 2 hits, the cops are coming for you! 🔧Customize and Upgrade Your Car Change your vehicle's body and rim color, and add eye-catching neon lights. Make your car match your vibe and you'll become unstoppable. If you want to go even further, upgrade key performance stats like Fuel, Nitro, Drift Factor, and Engine. ⚡Power-Ups and Extra Features Energy Drinks Get drunk and boost your points multiplier (x2, x3, x4, and so on) Daily Rewards Log in every day to earn free CR and keep the progress going Repair/Reset Car Too many drifts made your vehicle crash? Fix your car anytime, for free Gas Station Keep an eye out for the fuel pump icon on screen. When it shows up, it’s time to refill Customize. Upgrade. Drift. Stunt. Escape. Explore. All in one epic game. Ready for a new adventure? If you enjoyed this game, check out more like it in our Driving Games Online section! Love the crazy action? Then don’t miss our games in the Drift or Police categories, full of high-speed chases, insane drifts, and wild city chaos.

title: Teacher Simulator
description: Teacher Simulator is one of the funniest simulator games in which you are in the shoes of a teacher. You need to mark their exams and ensure they behave in a good manner at school. Complete the tasks, manage students and take your paycheck when the school bell rings. If you are ready, choose the lesson and start sharpening your pencil now! 👨‍🏫 Controls Left Mouse Button: To Interact On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to interact. Teacher Simulator Overview In this role-playing game, you take charge of a classroom as a teacher. Choose the class, from general knowledge to business, from the menu. Prepare your pencils and enter the classroom when ready. Your responsibilities include identifying cheating during exams and marking students' exam papers. Walk the halls during breaks and address disrespectful behavior when it occurs. Occasionally, test your students' knowledge with quizzes. While managing students, ensure you act fairly. Monitor the Halls 👀 You are responsible not only for students in the classroom but also for their behavior during school breaks in the halls. Some students may act inappropriately. If you find a student hurting another student, you can take disciplinary measures. These may include sending them to the principal’s office or using alternate in-game consequences. Check the Exam Papers 📄 Give students a test and mark their exam papers according to their answers to the questions. If they give a wrong answer, check the box with an X. If their answers are correct, mark the box with a check mark. However, keep in mind that you need to avoid mistakes while checking their exam papers. Otherwise, students will complain about you! Tips & Tricks for Teacher Simulator 👀 Watch students carefully during exams. ✅ Check exam papers carefully and correctly. 🔔 Patrol the school halls during breaks. 📏 Punish students who break the rules. 💲 Complete all tasks to earn your paycheck. Developer Kwalee developed the Teacher Simulator. You May Also Like Did you like playing Teacher Simulator? You may also give Life Simulator a try! Take control of a stranger from birth to death in this living simulator game. For more options, you are always welcome to check out free online simulator games on www.onlinegames.io. Leave a comment in the comments section below to share your gaming experience with us!

title: FPS Strike
description: If you feel like playing a quick FPS match but all the hassle (finding a game, installing it, and customizing your player or loadout before the battle) is way too much, you're in the right place. Enter FPS Strike , load the game and press the start button and voila! You'll find yourself in the middle of the battlefield in seconds. FPS Strike is a free online shooter game you can play on OnlineGames.io. Offering both Free-for-All (FFA) and Team Deathmatch (TD) game modes, FPS Strike combines realistic mechanics with fun, competitive gameplay. With five unique maps, 18+ weapons, and multiplayer rooms for honing your skills, this game is perfect for shooter fans looking for a quick fix for their FPS cravings anywhere, anytime. Controls Move: WASD or Arrow Keys Fire: Left Mouse Click Aim: Right Mouse Click Jump: Space Change Weapon: 1, 2, 3, 4 or Mouse scroll Reload: R Crouch: C Show Scoreboard: Hold Tab Weapon Shop: B Pause: Escape Tips & Tricks for FPS Strike Start with pistols like the USP-S for precision or unleash chaos with the P90's rapid fire. Upgrade to rifles like the M4A1 for balanced gameplay or the AWP for one-shot dominance. Reloading mid-fight can get you killed. Instead, switch to your secondary weapon when your primary runs out of ammo to keep the pressure on your opponents. Use offline mode to memorize map layouts, weapon recoil patterns, and grenade throw distances. Practice headshot consistency by focusing on precise aim rather than spraying bullets. In Team Deathmatch, the scoreboard reveals enemy player activity. Use this to predict where opponents might spawn or regroup during the match. Control the rooftops on maps like Ice World for an advantage, but don’t linger in one spot. Use the Scout for mobility or the AWP for high-damage shots. Always check for opponents trying to sneak up behind you. Grenades are free and excellent for softening enemy clusters. Throw one into chokepoints like narrow alleys in Dust or staircases in Aztec to gain the upper hand before rushing in. Developer FreezeNova created FPS Strike. More FPS Games If FPS Strike has you hooked, you'll love WarStrike . The game offers a campaign mode where you complete missions to destroy an evil terrorist Tal Brody as an elite MI-6 soldier. Ready to take on the challenge? Jump into the action now, and let us know your favorites in the comments!

title: Burnout City
description: Burnout City is a place where the night never ends. The streets of a hill-climbing city will be your playground. Your toys? Eleven awesome cars with lots of tuning options. Here in Burnout City, you'll be playing more than a plain online racing game . Chasing thrills, pulling off insane drifts, dodging the fuzz in epic mafia-style chases and many other challenges await you! Controls Throttle: W Brake: S Steering: A/D Handbrake: Space NOS: F Gear Neutral: N Change Camera: C Look Back: B Low Beam Lights: L High Beam Lights: K Gear Shift Up: Shift Gear Shift Down: Control Indicator Hazard: Z Indicator Left: Q Indicator Right: E Start/Stop Engine: I Respawn: R Gear 1-5: Press number keys from 1-5 How to Play Burnout City With 11 vehicles, from monstrous trucks to sleek F1 cars, pick the beast that matches your style. Peek into the garage to scope out each car's stats and upgrade potential. Need for speed? Seek a lightweight car like the Porsche 993. Prefer engine power on those hills? Monster Truck comes to the help. Or Would you like to master maneuvers on those tight turns? Then, stick with a car with extreme handling performance. Customization Options Next, head to the customization menu and make your car scream your personality. Explore them all, from slick paint jobs to neon underglow. You have an unlimited supply of in-game currency, so make sure your car stands out without any budget concerns. If you run out of money, simply go back to the main menu and click "add money" button. It's like magic! A car game cheat has never been this obvious. So, go all out to enjoy your ride! Here's what you've got in the customization menu: Paint: From matte black to neon green, paint your ride to reflect your soul. Wheels: Choose rims that spin right or wide or just look downright wild. Mechanic: Tune your cambers, suspension, and brakes. Make every part sing your tune. Upgrades: Max out your car's potential. Leave no part left behind. Spoilers: Add some air to your flair. Make your car cut through the wind and look cool doing it. Decals: Slap on some street cred with decals that just look rad. Neons: Light up the night with underglow that turns heads and lights up the streets. Pro Gamer Tip: neon lights look awesome, especially on the Midnight City map. Game Modes After picking your car and upgrading it to its full potential, enter the map. You'll see multiple circles, each presenting a game mode. Drive over the circle to enter that game mode. You have 5 game mode options. You've got Race Mode to outpace AI for glory, Pursuit Mode to chase down a nemesis, Trailblazer for precision cone hitting, Checkpoints for a timed challenge, and Free Ride for mission-free and stunt-filled exploration. Developer Burnout City was created by FreezeNova. More Car Games Online Craving More Asphalt Tearing? Check out our latest release in online car games: Super Car Driving , a game where speed meets chaos. Buckle up, hit the gas, and let's make some noise!

title: Obby Rainbow Tower
description: Obby Rainbow Tower is an online parkour game in which you will find yourself on a winter-themed tower. Customize your Roblox-like character and head to the tower. Overcome each obstacle one by one until you reach the 25th stage. Avoid falling into the void to make it to the finish line. Keep in mind that you can play with a friend side by side in the 2 Player mode! 🤡 Controls Player 1 WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump Spacebar X2: Double Jump Shift: Sprint Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move L: Jump L X2: Double Jump K: Sprint Mobile Controls: Use the on-screen buttons on smartphones and tablets. How to Play Obby Rainbow Tower Welcome to the colorful world of Obby Rainbow Tower! In this platformer game, your main aim is to reach the 25th stage by overcoming icy tiles, moving platforms, spinning lava bars, snowstorms and snowball portals. Try not to fall into the void as you move forward. Otherwise, you need to begin from the 1st stage again. Break your own best score at each try. You can also duel with a friend of yours in the 2 Player mode. Rainbow Obby 🌈 In Rainbow Obby, you need to watch out for the snowball portal. It launches giant snowballs to knock you into the void. You must dodge all the snowballs to reach the next stage. Do not let these huge rolling balls smash you. Of course, the most challenging hurdles in this Roblox Obby are not only the snowballs, but some snowstorms can throw you into the void. Collect Gold Tickets and Diamonds 💎 While you are moving through the Obby (obstacle course), you will see gold tickets and diamonds on the icy tiles. Collect them to unlock new accessories for your Roblox character. You can get brand new clothes, a pair of eyeglasses, and a cute pet who follows you wherever you go. With its colorful and cute world, this is why this game is called Rainbow Obby! Developer GameVGames developed the Obby Rainbow Tower. You May Also Like If you like playing Roblox-like games or Obby games, you may also try playing Obby But You’re on a Bike . Ride your bike through ramps, loops and narrow roads to collect the flags! Additionally, feel free to visit our Obby Games Online game category for more options.

title: Steal Brainrot Duel
description: Steal Brainrot Duel is an online Italian brainrot game where you need to hunt rare Brainrot characters and collect them in your base. However, you need to be alert all the time! As thieves are waiting to raid. You must protect your base with all your might. You can also play this game with a friend of yours in 2 Players mode ! Controls Player 1 WASD: Move Space: Jump E: Buy or Steal F/LMB: Hit Left Shift: Sprint Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move L: Jump O: Buy or Steal K: Hit J: Sprint How to Play Steal Brainrot Duel When you first enter the game, create your character from the customization section. Then, let’s get started! You will find yourself in a big room. Some legendary Brainrot characters will pass by the red carpet without stopping. When you collect these characters and move them to your base, they will make money for you. In the first place, you can start with picking up Noobini Pizzanini , as it is the cheapest one. Brainrot Characters Noobini Pizzanini is the best choice to collect in your base if you are a newbie. When you see one of them on the red carpet, go over to it and press E. It will go to your base automatically. In there, the characters you collect or hunt earn you money. Yes, you heard right! When the protection bar drops, you can enter other players’ bases and steal their characters. Noobini Pizzanini Tralalero Tralala Cocofanto Elefanto Graipussi Medussi Protect Your Base Keep in mind that just as you can hunt others’ collected characters, they can also raid your base and steal yours. So, you have to protect your base. When you enter your area, you will see a Protection Area. Go over it, and it automatically locks your base. However, the protection is time-limited. You need to check it constantly. Developer gameVgames developed Steal Brainrot Duel. Similar Brainrot Games If you enjoy playing Steal Brainrot Duel, you may also like Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker . In the game, you will find all the famous meme characters’ baby versions. Click on them and start making money!

title: Basketball io
description: Want to play a Basketball Game but tired of complicated controls? Basketball io is an exciting online basketball game with simple controls but awesome 3D visuals. You will be fascinated by the slam dunks of players. Customize your team according to your style. Choose a field you like: a classic basketball field with a grandstand, an outdoor street basketball court, or play on the beach next to the palms. You will receive stars and diamonds based on your playing style if you win five matches. Achieving a high rank will also allow you to purchase items from the shop section. Team Players You'll be surprised by the range of players you can play. Open the shop to select the style of your team. You can have a team of NBA players, cheerleader girls, skeletons, monsters, and even bears. If you are wondering how it would look if bears could play basketball, you should try bearball. Balls You can buy 10 different types of balls with diamonds you earned. You can also obtain them by completing some tasks in the game. For example, you must steal the ball from your opponent 50 times to get the rainbow ball. You can even play with a fireball if you'd like. Pick one to your liking and enjoy juggling your new ball. Fields There are 4 different fields where you can play Basketball io. Indoor basketball court Streetball court Beach basketball field The private court in the forest How to Play Basketball io? Hit the start button to begin the match immediately. Use arrow keys to move around in the field. Go over the player with the ball to steal it. Run beyond the free throw line to slam dunk. Customize the players, balls, and courts in the shop section. Controls WASD or arrow keys to move across the field Use your cursor to switch between menus Esc to pause the game More Games Like This If you like Basketball io, you can try our other Basketball Games .

title: Drift Hunters
description: Drift Hunters is a thrilling drift game where you will get into the driver's seat of the best vehicle brands and set for a ride. You have two types of game map options: Tracks and Playgrounds. Decide which map you want to drive on and run your beloved car in one of the best driving games ! How to Play Drift Hunters Select your car from the Cars section and choose your racetrack from the Race menu to start. In the beginning, you only have access to a car similar to Toyota AE86. As you perform drifts and earn money equal to your scores, you will be able to unlock new cars. You have 26 vehicle options. You also have 10 spectacular game maps to drive on. Make your choices and hit the road! Cars Menu The drift game offers you cars inspired by many well-known brands. We recommend that you unlock each of them and experience their drives. Each has unique features, from engine power to brakes. See your options from the Cars section with the key icon. These cars are familiar to you from the famous movie series The Fast and The Furious! Now, we are offering you to get behind the wheels of them. Toyota Trueno GT-Apex (Cost: Free) Datsun 240Z (Cost: 8500 CR) Nissan 240SX (Cost: 10500 CR) BMW M3 E30 (Cost: 12800 CR) Mitsubishi Evolution (Cost: 14700 CR) Subaru Impreza WRX (Cost: 15100 CR) BMW M3 E36 (Cost: 17500 CR) Nissan Silvia 240SX (Cost: 19800 CR) Nissan Silvia S15 (Cost: 24200 CR) Honda S2000 (Cost: 25500 CR) Mazda RX7 (Cost: 29400 CR) BMW M3 E46 (Cost: 32100 CR) Toyota GT86 (Cost: 33500 CR) Toyota Supra (Cost: 40200 CR) BMW 1M Coupé E82 (Cost: 46000 CR) Infiniti G35 Coupé (Cost: 52000 CR) Mercedes Benz AMG CLA C45 (Cost: 63300 CR) Ford Fiesta ST (Cost: 71600 CR) Nissan 370Z (Cost: 84300 CR) Nissan Skyline GTR R34 (Cost: 90100 CR) Lexus GS (Cost: 95700 CR) Dodge Challenger Hellcat (Cost: 99400 CR) Ford Mustang (Cost: 102300 CR) BMW 335i F30 (Cost: 116700 CR) Nissan GTR (Cost: 128400 CR) Porsche 911 (Cost: 134300 CR) Wall Tap Glitch If you'd like to hack Drift Hunters and earn cash faster, you can use a glitch in Wall Tap bonuses. Please follow the steps mentioned below: Select the Honda S2000 specified in the picture. Adjust the tuning settings exactly as shown in the picture. Navigate to the city map and drive beyond the city limits. Once you reach the edge of the map, start drifting, and you will earn a significant amount of wall tap bonuses randomly. Strengthen the Performance The Parts section is there for you to enhance your car's performance levels. Your vehicle has stock-level performance regarding the brakes, weight, gearbox, turbo, and engine powers. But you have the option to strengthen its power from stock-level to pro. In addition, you have the chance to adjust the settings of your car's physical appearance, such as cambers, heights, and offsets. View the Tuning section from the menu to modify. Tuning the Details Give your car a style by giving it a body color and choosing the rims. The glossy, metallic, matte and chrome color options await you to pick. You are the designer of your vehicle here. Read our full drifting guide to learn what is the best tuning settings and how to master Drift Hunters and Drift Hunters 2 . Manual or Automatic: Select Your Gearbox You can change the gearbox type of your vehicle in the Drift Hunters. From the main menu, click on the Options section. Make your adjustments according to your wishes. You have the automatic and manual gearbox types. You can also set the graphics quality in this section. Controls WASD / Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar: Brake C: Camera View Left Shift: Gear Up Left Ctrl: Gear Down Developer Drift Hunters was developed by Ilya Kaminetsky. All the games in the collection have been selected elaborately for you. Remember to bookmark this website to come back easily!

title: Tank Stars
description: Tank Stars is an online battle game in which you engage in tank warfare! Take control of your war machine, launch missiles at your enemy, and remove them from the battling arena. You can also invite your friend and challenge them in one of the most exhilarating tank games in the 2-player mode. Or, you can go for the Online PvP to battle with worldwide players! 🚀 Controls A or Left Arrow: Move Left D or Right Arrow: Move Right LMB or Spacebar: Launch a Missile Virtual Joystick: Take Aim On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls to interact. Tank Stars Overview Get ready for an action-packed 2D tank warfare! Your main goal in this tank game is to shoot your enemy by using your tank’s iron force in turn. The secret to winning each battle is finding the right shooting angle. Once you find it, launch the missile and watch the enemy tank’s health bar go down. The tank with zero health loses the game. So, our mascot Gamie suggests you move left or right on your turn to avoid missiles! Finding the Shooting Angle To make the perfect shot, you need to take precise aim at the enemy tank. Use the virtual joystick in the lower right corner of the screen to take aim. Move this joystick to find the perfect shooting angle, and press the “Fire” button to launch the missile. Or, you can use the spacebar key to shoot your enemy. Unlock New Powerful Tanks Visit the Hangar section to unlock new powerful tanks. Keep in mind that each new tank comes with a unique ability. Use your in-game currencies to get a more advanced tank to battle relentlessly. You can also upgrade your current tank’s features so that you can enhance the impact of your attacks. Tips & Tricks for Tank Stars 🎯 Adjust your shooting angle carefully. 🚀 Move your tank to avoid incoming missiles. 💥 Watch your enemy’s position before firing. 💡 Use the terrain to your advantage when positioning shots. 🆕 Try different tanks, each one has unique abilities. Developer Tank Stars is released by StoreRider. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing tank games like Tank Stars , you may also like Tank War Simulator ! In Tank War Simulator, you will find yourself in a 3D tank war. For additional game options, feel free to reach out to our Tank Games Online category on this website.
