title: Friday Night Funkin
description: Friday Night Funkin is a rhythm-based music game where you compete with lively characters who are crazy for music. You must let yourself flow with the rhythm of the music playing, from nu-jazz to Vocaloid beats. Follow the on-screen musical notes and defeat your competitors in this challenging arcade game! Win your girlfriend's heart by dominating the stage.🎶 How to Play Friday Night Funkin We will keep the Guitar Hero's spirit alive with this game! We recommend you try the tutorial to get used to the game. There are weekly competitions that take place every Friday. And you are one of the top people in these contests. No matter what, you must win against your musical opponents as you are taking your girlfriend with you! Go on stage with confidence in your delicate ears. Catch the Notes You must catch the flowing notes on the screen to play the music. You need to be pretty fast. Catching them won't be easy. It may even take some time to adjust yourself to the speed. Give yourself time! Each arrow sign you see corresponds to a musical note. Press the relevant arrow keys on your keyboard when the time is right! Feel the Music The key to achieving success in FNF is surrendering to the music. Before entering the contests, you can listen to the songs to become familiar with the rhythm. The names of the tracks are written on the left side of the week selection screen. We recommend you track your rival's notes, too. As it will help you make progress. The musical notes you see on the screen, whether your turn or the competitor's, belong entirely to one specific song. Who Are Your Opponents? You will see 6 different weekly competitions. In each of them, you will fight with another funky character. For example, your opponent in Week 1 is your girlfriend's father! You have to show him how strong you are. Otherwise, he may not let you hang out with his daughter. You can't take that risk! Week 1: Daddy Dearest Week 2: Spooky Month Week 3: Pico Week 4: Mommy Must Murder Week 5: Red Snow Week 6: Hating Simulator FT. Moawling Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Play the notes + and the -: Increase/decrease the volume 0 Number Key: Mute Enter Key: Select ESC Key: Go back Developer Friday Night Funkin FNF was developed by Cameron Taylor, David Brown, Isaac Garcia, and evilsk8r. More Games Like These If you like playing Friday Night Funkin, you may also try Blob Opera . You get to be an orchestra chef in the game. Blobs are great singers. Lean on your fine ears to create the dream opera. For further game options, you can see all tags on OnlineGames.io by clicking on the link. If you stay tuned, you will always find new and thrilling games on the site!

title: Pool Challenge
description: Pool Challenge is a 2D pool game where players try sending their balls to the holes on the billiard table. One must be able to aim very well with the cue when playing billiards. It requires skill to be able to put all the balls into the hole one by one without missing a shot. Are you ready to shoulder this challenge with this online 8 ball pool game? How to Play Pool Challenge Your main task is to put the balls into the holes individually without fouling, then send the number 8 ball into a hole and win the game! Start with deciding the difficulty level of the game from the main menu and get behind the cue. There are 3 levels: easy, normal and hard. The first type of ball you enter into one of the holes when you start the game becomes your assigned ball throughout the game. You will see 7 straight balls, 7 striped balls and one black ball (number 8). 15 balls in total. You can see the aim intensity bar at the bottom left of the game screen. Sending Balls to a Hole Aim with your mouse to strike, then hold and drag the cue to pull the cue backward. Release the cue to make the shot. The further back you pull the cue, the greater the shooting intensity. Aiming well is the key. By following the lines that appear on the tip of the cue, you can get an idea of ​​where the ball could potentially go. Pool Rules If the black ball enters the hole before all of your other balls do, you lose. If the cue ball does not make contact with any of your balls or if you send it into the pot instead of your own ball, it is your opponent's turn. After the cue ball is in the hole, your opponent is allowed to position it anywhere they choose. When you reach the end of the game, and only the black ball remains, if you send this ball into the hole with the cue ball, your opponent wins the game. Tips and Tricks for Billiards It's a good idea to decide on the kind of balls you'll use before you start the game. Choose the solid or striped ball with the fewest barriers to make your task easier. It could help to begin launching the balls with simple strokes. By striking the balls in the perfect spot without any obstacles in front of them, you can lessen the number of balls gathered around the pool table. In this game, you might have to use some strategy. You can make it harder for your rival to stop him from putting his balls into the pots as fast as possible. Make things difficult for them. Controls Use your mouse to send the balls to the holes. Discover Other Pool Games If you like playing Pool Challenge, you may try 8 Ball Pool Billiard . You can play this online pool game against AI opponents or with other players. Playing pool against artificial intelligence seems like an interesting concept, isn't it? Alternatively, you can look up other online ball games and strategy games on OnlineGames.io for further options. Contact We adore hearing from our gamers! Please use our Contact Us page to send us a message if you have any questions or to share any gaming-related stories.

title: 99 Nights in the Forest
description: 99 Nights in the Forest is an online survival game where you find yourself in a deserted forest. To be able to survive for 99 nights, you need to guard yourself from all possible dangers, including werewolves. Craft tools by collecting wood and other materials that you can find in the forest. Light a campfire to stay warm at night! 🔥 Controls WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump Swipe Mouse: Look Around Left-Shift: Run RMB: Attack F Key: Grab C Key: Crouch Press 1: Show Weapon Press 2: Throw Wood 99 Nights in the Forest Overview Get ready for a 99-day survival adventure in 99 Nights in the Forest! Grab your axe and start the journey. Get wood from the trees using your axe as you need to stay warm at night. You need to wander around the forest and collect valuable materials to craft weapons and tools to survive. Manage your hunger by hunting rabbits and werewolves. You also need to take care of your Roblox-like character’s health to stay alive for 99 nights. Find the Missing Child 🧒 The forest can be very cruel to vulnerable humans, especially for children. Your first mission in this survival game is to rescue a child who was captured by the werewolves. The werewolves kidnapped her and locked her in a cave. Find the Child’s Cave, defeat the werewolves and get the key to unlock the cave. Bring back hope to this deserted forest by saving the life of an innocent child! Watch out for the Red Deer 🦌 You need to prepare yourself for all kinds of dangers at night. Werewolves and red deer show up and try to attack you. Defend yourself by using your weapon. Red deer are a real threat to those who live in this deserted forest. With only one attack, they can reduce your health bar from 100 to 80. When you see a red deer, attack before it does. Keep your eyes wide! Developer FreezeNova developed the 99 Nights in the Forest. Looking for More? Frost Land Snow Survival is another game that suits your tastes well! Survive through the harsh winter by building your shelter and expanding your base. Additionally, you can visit our Survival Games Online game category to explore more online games. Keep coming back to discover newly added games!

title: Ultimate Flying Car 2
description: Ever imagined racing high-speed cars that can fly? In Ultimate Flying Car 2 , you'll experience the perfect blend of ground-pounding races and gravity-defying stunts. Explore sprawling cities or challenge your friends in epic competitions. This game offers everything a car gamer could dream of. With jaw-dropping visuals, detailed and diverse maps, and unique physics, it is even more advanced than the first installment of the series, Ultimate Flying Car. Last but not least, there are two exhilarating game modes: free ride and racing. So, it's time to buckle up and let your imagination take the wheel! Controls Player 1 Move: Use W, A, S, D o NOS: Press Left Shift. Explode: Press F. Camera: Press C. Look Back: Press T. Reset: Press R. Player 2 Move: Use Arrow Keys. NOS: Press M. Explode: Press J. Camera: Press O. Look Back: Press L. Reset: Press U. Free Drive Mode In Free Drive, you're not bound by tracks or time limits. It's all about exploration and creativity. Drive through massive open-world cities, complete with ramps and teleport points that let you fly your car and unlock new areas. Gather gems scattered throughout the world to unlock hidden surprises or upgrades. Launch your car off ramps and glide through the skies. Flying your car mid-air feels as thrilling as it sounds! Head to the stadium in the city and switch gears to an entirely different game—car football! Smash, dash, and score goals while driving your vehicle. From bustling urban landscapes to industrial zones where you can drive in the mining fields, there's always something new to discover in San Saint Cali and White Forest State. Find teleportation points scattered around the map to zip across the world in seconds, giving you access to harder-to-reach areas or simply saving time. Racing Mode Racing Mode takes the adrenaline to a whole new level. Compete in thrilling four-player races where the action is nonstop, and every second counts. Play against your friends in split-screen mode, keeping the competition close and the action intense. Navigate through tracks teeming with barriers, hazards, and unexpected twists. Clear the way by destroying obstacles with a press of a button—Player 1 can use F, and Player 2 uses J. Time it right for maximum impact! Each track is designed to test your reflexes, strategy, and driving skills. Whether you're racing solo against AI or battling your friends, every race is a unique challenge! 2-Player Split-Screen Car Game Ultimate Flying Car 2 shines with its split-screen mode. Grab a friend and compete in Free Drive or Racing Mode on the same screen. Whether you're working together to explore or going head-to-head in a race, the split-screen feature enhances the fun tenfold. In Free Drive , team up to uncover hidden gems or pull off synchronized stunts for double the excitement. In racing mode , face off and see who has the best driving and tactical skills. Explore More Car Games Ultimate Flying Car 2 is more than just a racing game—it's a playground for adventurers alike. Fly through ramps, smash through obstacles or score goals in car football; the gameplay is so diverse that it'll keep you hooked at your desk. If you ever like to play a similar split-screen challenge, take a look at the 2 player Crazy Racer . Remember, boredom ends when OnlineGames.io opens. Have fun, pals!

title: Chess
description: Chess, which is all times the most played board game, is an amazing pastime and an excellent way to sharpen your mind. The possibilities with 32 pieces on 64 squares are endless. The chess game first originated in India 1500 years ago. Since then, the game itself has changed significantly, but its popularity remained the same. Now in the modern world, local, national, and international federations and championship tournaments have been established upon checkered boards. Needless to say, playing Chess will improve your concentration, strategic planning skills, and overall mental health. Why is online Chess better? You may be having a hard time finding an opponent within your ability. Play Chess online on OnlineGames.io either with friends, or against a computer. Online Chess is much quicker. If you don't like the positions, you can start from the beginning with just a click. Setting out before the game or taking the pieces off at the end is too much work and distraction. You do not have to deal with the chess set and tiny little pieces always missing. Playing with ruminators might be boring if you like fast-paced games and looking for Bullet Chess or Blitz Chess. If you need more time to think about possible moves before acting or enjoy chitchatting while playing, a rusher rival might disturb you. You can set the maximum duration for a move on Online Chess. You will have a rival with the exact same game preferences. You can chat on the right side of the screen and make friends on Chess. How to Play Chess? If you are new to Chess, here is a brief guideline for you without diving into confusing details: The game is played by two persons, or against a bot. Players take turns moving the pieces across the boards. Each type of piece has its individual name and moving directions. You will have 16 pieces consisting of 1 king, 1 queen, 2 bishops, 2 knights, 2 rooks, and 8 pawns. Here is a piece of great news for you. You cannot miscalculate a destination square for a piece in an online Chess game. When you click on the piece, you will see possible squares the piece can go into. The aim is to set a trap for your opponent king that he cannot escape from and checkmate. Before starting a game you can choose who you want to play with: solo, a friend by your side, a friend online, a random online opponent, or a computer. Set the difficulty, speed, and duration in the menu and start playing. You can take moves back twice in a game by watching an ad while playing against a bot. Chess is a game with endless possibilities and has a rich history and deep theories about it. Discovering these possibilities is a long and enjoyable journey. You May Also Like If you like Chess, you can check out our other Board and Strategy games.

title: Fast Food Rush
description: You're at Burger King, sinking your teeth into a juicy cheeseburger and finishing it off in about 15 minutes flat. But just this once, before you head out, pause and take a quick look around. Employees are rushing nonstop, flipping sizzling patties, taking orders at the counter, pouring ice-cold drinks, and wiping down tables. At this point, running your own burger joint might seem pretty appealing, at least to some people. Think about it: flipping burgers, serving happy customers, making money from your own fast food business. It all sounds simple, satisfying, and fun. But before you get overly excited and pour thousands of dollars into your burger empire dreams, how about giving it a test drive first? Let’s play a game. It’s called Fast Food Rush . Here, you’ll experience firsthand what running your very own fast-food restaurant feels like. Starting small with Burger Blitz and 2,500 coins, you'll hire employees, unlock exciting upgrades, and turn your tiny burger stand into a full-on fast-food empire with 3 branches. Step into the world of burgers, coffee, and donuts, and discover just how far your American dream can take you! Controls On Computers WASD / Arrow Keys / Drag Mouse: Move your character around Mouse Scroll: Zoom in or out On Mobile Tap and Drag: Move your character Start with the Burger Blitz When you begin this free game, you’ll have 2,500 coins to get started. Your first goal is to unlock the first seating by stepping on the white marker showing the 75 $ cost. Then add a counter table so your customers can place orders and check out. Next walk over the 85$ sign to unlock the grill. This will open the doors to serving your first customers. As soon as you start grilling burgers, bringing them to the counter and check out customers, coins start flowing in automatically. Unlock Upgrades Coins come in steadily when customers are happy, so make sure you spend them on the right upgrades. You’ll see white rectangles scattered around the restaurant. Walking on these markers let you invest in some upgrades: Improve Grill Speed: Faster burger production means more burgers to sell. Add/ Upgrade Checkout Table: Speed up how quickly customers pay. Hire Cashiers: Automate the payment process so you can focus on bigger tasks. Add/Upgrade Seating and Tables: More places to sit equals more customers served, which means bigger profits! Plus, you can gather more tips by upgrading to more comfortable seating. Manage Employees Once your burger operation is underway, walk over the room at the corner. You’ll unlock the HR manager there. She'll help you in hiring workers and boosting their skills. Walk in this room to increase your employees’ speed, carrying capacity, and overall efficiency. A well-trained team is the secret to raking in coins without breaking a sweat. Lastly, unlock the general manager in the next door. He'll guide you improve your walking speed, capacity and profit rates. Keep Tables Clean A clean restaurant keeps customers happy. Make sure to walk around the dining area and clear dirty tables. If tables stay messy for too long, new customers won’t sit down, costing you sales. A quick swipe to clean up can make a big difference in your daily income. Expand to New Branches After your burger spot becomes a local hit, it’s time to grow! Go to map by clicking on the top left of your screen. You can unlock: Coffee Shop: Serve yummy hot drinks. New upgrades, new machines, and a chance to grow your empire even more. Donut Place: Finally, add sugary sweets to your menu. This branch is the last big step in your fast-food journey, offering a fresh set of challenges and money-making opportunities Developer Fast Food Rush was created by FreezeNova, a developer known for making enjoyable, casual titles. This free game stands out with its blend of idle-style income generation and active management, making it a great fit for anyone who loves a mix of strategy and quick fun. Tycoon Games Online If you like the playful vibe of Fast Food Rush, check out other free browser games on OnlineGames.io that focus on business management and fun upgrades. Titles like Checkout Frenzy and Where's my Pizza? are great choices if you’re looking for even more business chaos and expansion challenges.

title: Crazy Shooters
description: Let's play one of the most captivating shooting game, Crazy Shooters . First you need to adapt in any circumstance, move fast, jump, hunt and shoot every enemy that appears in sight. You must prove you have confidence to shoot and to score the biggest number of kills. The weapons you choose will make your mission eassier. Enjoy the intense gameplay and trust your abilities to win. Before being able to play the game you first need to create a room. You can name the room, choose the maximum players that can join and select the game mode FFA or Team. You can also join other players' rooms. There are 4 maps : • Factory • Arena • Towers • GasPlant Weapons: • BallisticKnife • Deagle • MP5KA4 • STW-25 • M87T • Blaser R93 • RPG • M79 • M67 Crazy Shooters Display • Kill feed (displayed on the top right) • Weapons (displayed on the center) • Health & Ammo (displayed on the bottom right) • Time & leading player (displayed on the center) • Chat (displayed on the center left) Statistics Section In statistics you will see the following details: • Number of games played • Number of wins • Number of kills • Score Controls WASD or arrow keys to move Left mouse button to fire Right mouse button to aim R to reload Space to jump Hold shift to run 1-9 key to change weapon T to open chat and Enter to send C to crouch

title: Five Nights At Freddy's 3
description: FNAF 3 (Five Nights at Freddy's 3) is an online horror game that takes you back to Fazbear's Fright, a horror attraction built around the mysteries of Freddy Fazbear's Pizza. As in the prequels, you will play as the night guard tasked with monitoring cameras. FNAF 3 feels like revisiting your childhood nightmares, but this time, they've upgraded to HD horror. You will survive 5 tense nights where you try to balance your paranoia and tech management. Reboot this, check that, all while a killer animatronic is playing "guess who" with you. If you loved the first two FNAF games, you will love this installment with more adrenaline than ever. So, if you're ready, hit the start button and see if you can uncover the secrets while making it through the five nights. Controls Mouse: Look around, navigate cameras, interact with buttons, and open the maintenance panel. Spacebar: Seal vents. How to Play Start your shift at Fazbear's Fright and monitor the security cameras. You need to spend 5 consecutive nights without getting caught by an animatronic. Open the cameras and check if everything is okay and that no animatronics are moving around. Use the audio devices to lure Springtrap away from your office. Keep an eye on system errors and reboot them quickly from the maintenance panel. Watch out for phantom animatronics—they can disable your systems temporarily. Survive until 6 AM to move to the next night. Developer Scott Cawthon created FNAF 3. More Horror Games If you're looking for a game where every click could be your last, FNAF 3 delivers that wrapped in a haunted animatronic suit. In case you're looking for a similar thrill? Play other FNAF games on OnlineGames.io or explore Horror Granny for more survival horror fun. There's always more terror to uncover!

title: Highway Road Racing
description: Join the challenge and speed the car to complete missions in Highway Road Racing . Experience the risky overcomes while you enjoy the dynamic environments and powerful graphics. Win every race and reach the best score ever. Select your machine There 12 cars ready to be tested.Every car has a specific level of speed, handling and brake. Select your mode • One Way • Two Ways • Time Attack Select your theme • Grand Canyon • Santa Monica • Bryce Canyon Highway Road Racing Display includes: • Score (displayed on the top left) • Camera, Pause, Speed and Distance (displayed on the top right) • Wrong Way (displayed on the center left) Make sure you don't crash your car. If it happens you will be able to see the final score details: • Total Distance • Near Miss • Keep Above 100kmph • Opposite Direction Highway Road Racing Controls Use Arrow keys/WASD to control the car

title: Love Tester Story
description: Find the One for You! Horoscopes, tarot cards, crystal balls, or dream readings—humans have been curious about the unknown since the dawn of time. We have developed endless methods just to glimpse the future and act accordingly. From interpreting patterns in tea leaves, coffee grounds, or wine sediments, cultures have found various ways to predict future events. Loves Me, Loves Me Not! However, as we immerse ourselves in the digital world of the 21st century, we replace old-school fortune-telling methods with new ones. Inevitably, love testers also evolve beyond the traditional games like Loves Me, Loves Me Not! Love Tester Story offers a fun and interactive experience that lets you test your crush's feelings . No more picking leaves from daisies, no more complex tarot readings, or endless astrology interpretations. Just enter your name in Love Tester Story and get love compatibility results in percentage. But that's not all! Love Tester Story features a unique story mode where you can reveal the story of high school girl Grace by making decisions on her behalf. If you're intrigued, keep reading to learn more about Love Tester Story. What to Expect from Love Tester Story? Story Mode The story mode is the most romantic of all. You'll step into the shoes of high school girl Grace and make decisions about her love life . You'll learn valuable life lessons about love, friendship, and courage. Your choices matter! Enter the mode, choose your path, and reveal one of the multiple endings of this love story . Mix and match your decisions to explore all the endings . The Perfect Match In this mode, you'll be given a random name and try to find a perfect match for that name based on your instincts . Who would date whom? If you trust your matchmaking skills, try this mode, and you'll have a hard time stopping giggling. Love Tester Mode The third game mode is the original love tester with improved accuracy. Enter your name and your crush's name, press the big heart on the screen, and retrieve the results in seconds. If you'd like to stir things up a bit, enter the names of the couples you know and reveal the secrets of their relationships. Controls Use you mouse or tap on to navigate. Use your keyboard to type Developer FreezeNova Games created Love Tester Story. Disclaimer Even though Love Tester Story is a fun and interactive app, it doesn't guarantee true results. It's designed for giggling purposes only. 😁 More Online Games If you'd like to keep playing, choose based on your satisfaction with the Love Tester results: A. I am Very Satisfied with Love Tester Results Congratulations! Great to hear this! Would you like to play a wedding game and get everything down to a T in a virtual setting before the big day? B. I Hate This App We're sorry to hear that. We'll try our best to give you the results you're looking for. In the meantime, would you like to play an online crash game and blow off steam caused by the love tester results? Break a few cars, kick a dummy, or mess with stickman ragdolls. We bet you'll feel better afterward.

title: Fortzone Battle Royale
description: Fortzone Battle Royale is a web-based shooter game where you battle with online players from around the world! The most-liked game, Fortnite, inspires it. With its cartoonish characters and multiple game modes, it will be a thrilling experience to fight with others. The game's rich graphics add an extra layer of action. You are welcome to play with your friends by sharing your player IDs with each other. ⚔ Controls WASD: Move Left Mouse Button (LMB): Shoot Right Mouse Button (RMB): Aim Spacebar: Jump 1-6 Number Keys: Item Selection C: Crouch M: Map R: Reload F: Interact V: Exit Vehicle Drag the Mouse: Steer Vehicle T: Chat TAB: Pause How to Play Fortzone Battle Royale Start customizing your character before joining in any battle! After all, you can begin by playing this shooter game in the Single Battle Royale mode. You must be the last man standing to be the winner. Jump from the Flying Bus and use your wings to land in a specific area on the map. Collect weapons and bullets so that you can fight with other players tremendously. As you level up, you will be able to unlock the Team Battle Royale and the Royale Duel modes. The Flying Bus 🚍 After you join a match, you will find yourself in the Flying Bus. All of the players will be on that bus, waiting to jump. Choose your landing area wisely, as you will have no weapon but a pickaxe at the beginning. You must search for weapons, bullets and food as soon as you land. Otherwise, you will be vulnerable to any attack. As the storm is closing in fast, you need to act at lightning speed. Storm is Coming! ⚡ In any game mode, the map will start to shrink over time. If you stay out of the circle, you will lose your health. Keep checking your map by pressing the M key to see where the circle begins shrinking. As the game progresses, head to the circle base if you are far from there. You can use the vehicles to go to the designated area quickly. Make sure that you have enough fuel to start the engine! Developer Fahrenheit Develop published the Fortzone Battle Royale in 2025. More Games Like This Vortex 9 is another game that suits your tastes well! In the game, you will find yourself in the Vortex 9 dimension, consisting of engaging team matches, points to capture, and relentless fighting in the Mayhem. For additional options, feel free to check out our free online shooting games by following the link.

title: ASMR Pet Treatment
description: ASMR Pet Treatment is an online simulator game where you are a veterinarian. In the game, you need to take care of the kitties and puppies brought to your clinic. However, be careful! They are very shy. Approach them with compassion and love. Examine the little felines with care and cure their illnesses in this girl game! Controls Mouse: To examine and cure cute animals. ASMR Pet Treatment Overview These little kitties and puppies are covered in dirt, and they are a little sick. People outside found them on the street and brought them to your veterinary clinic. They are shivering from fear and cold. Let’s go and treat them! First of all, they need a bath. Wash them with lukewarm water. Dry with a hair dryer. Clean their fleas from their little bodies. Help them get back their full health in this lovely animal game! Treat the Puppy Start with treating the puppy. He needs a decent shower time as he is covered with dirt. Use the shower and clean his little body. Don’t forget to dry him with a blow dryer. Remove fleas from him and use puppy nail clippers for pawdicure! Wipe his nose with a napkin to get rid of the booger. Clean his ears and now he is completely well! Finally, spray him with perfume and dress him in nice costumes. Now, he has a style. The Shy Kitty You also need to clean the kitty, but she is afraid of water. If you use the shower, she gets aggressive. So, wet a cloth and clean the shy kitty that way. When she starts to scream, give her a snack. It will be useful. Catch all the fleas on her and remove them from her body. There is a frog under her belly. Find it and take it out. Treat her wounded tail with medicinal cream. Then, wrap her tail with a bandage! Developer iclickgames developed ASMR Pet Treatment. You May Also Like Enjoyed playing ASMR Pet Treatment? You may also like Cat Doctor . Even though they have 9 lives, they still need affectionate treatment. Examine the cats and treat them with kindness in this lovely cat game.

title: Stick War Saga
description: Stick War Saga is an online strategy game where you command your stickman army. To conquer the enemy lands, you must be a brilliant commander. Mine resources and build your army —attack on the rival stickman in a strategic way to capture their tower. Lead your army in the best way possible in this epic action game! 🤴 Controls Mouse click or tap to play. How to Play Stick War Saga Before building your army, you need to mine resources. The miners you deploy will help you collect gold and crystals. Use these resources to create your troop. Then, you can launch Swordsmen, Shooters, Spartans, and Mages. The first thing to do in this tower defense game is to create an army that can outsmart the rival troop. Be sure that you have enough soldiers before attacking. Otherwise, you may need to defend your tower! It is a must to command the army strategically. Build Your Stick Army 💂 Your army consists of stickmen. Creating an army from soldiers with different characteristics can be a logical war strategy! There is a wide array of soldiers that you can unlock as you level up. Their skills may vary from magicians to giants. You can start by deploying Swordsmen and shooters. Then, make your way up to Spear Angels! Enhance Your Army 🏅 From the “Deck” section, you can upgrade your soldiers’ power. Invest in their troop, skill and blessing powers to lead them effectively in the battle area. This way, you can enhance their attack and defense power. Below, you can find some of the skills that can be unlocked. Multiple Arrow: This skill is for shooters. It enables them to launch several arrows at the enemy. Wind Speed: All your soldiers’ speed and attack speed increase for 10 seconds. Craze Dig: Miners’ collection ability and movement speed increase for 30 seconds. Fantasy: When it is activated, this skill revives HP for all the allied soldiers under your command. Developer YAD.com developed the Stick War Saga. Similar Games Stick Guys Defense is another game that you can enjoy playing if you like tower defense games. There will be a non-stop invasion, and you need to stop the enemies from entering your castle! Additionally, feel free to view our Strategy Games Online game library for further options. Don’t forget to share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below!

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 2: Light Temple
description: Welcome to the second edition of the Fireboy and Watergirl series! Fireboy and Watergirl: Light Temple is a 2D puzzle platform game. In the game, you will bend lights and use mirrors a lot. To overcome the obstacles, you need to take control of the reflections. Direct the beams and take action with a fellow. Enjoy moving through labyrinths in this two-player game! Our Review “Fireboy and Watergirl: Light Temple is a challenging escape game. You must overcome many obstacles to get Fireboy and Watergirl to their gates. The way to the gates is to direct the lights with mirrors. Controlling the lights will enable them to pass doors and move elevators. The players must use their logic before making any movement. And, to get the victory, they need to act together.” - OnlineGames Editor. Basics of Fireboy and Watergirl: Light Temple The game has 40 challenging levels. The goal is to get the lights to the detectors, which can be done by passing the levels. They will activate platforms on a labyrinth. No objects should be before the detectors; otherwise, they will fail to work properly. When the light is fully received, the platforms move. To direct the lights, you will use boxes. They have mirrors at the edges. These mirrors will enable you to bend the beams. You and your mate can move through the maze by activating the platforms and other devices. Manipulate the lights and overcome all the obstacles on your way in this cooperative game. Remember to collect the diamonds at the temple. Fireboy can collect the red diamonds, and Watergirl can collect the blue ones. In addition, both of the heroes can take up the green diamonds. To Bend Lights The main aim of this adventure game is to make the Fireboy and Watergirl reach their gates. To achieve this task, they must join their forces and act together. The ancient temple has many elevator platforms. To activate them, you need to pull the levers to rotate boxes, flip the switches, and press the buttons. You can also move the mirrored boxes to bend lights to activate the platforms. The Mirror Slider Besides the switches, detectors, and levers, the temple has sliding buttons. These buttons, the mirror sliders, let you move the more accurate mirrors with four edges. The standard mirror can only be moved at a 90-degree angle. When you slide the mirror sliders, they will start to rotate in the direction you move. This way, you direct the mirror and send the light to the detectors. You must make sure that light passes clearly through both detectors. Controls Desktops and Laptops WASD Keys: To move Watergirl Arrow Keys: To move Fireboy Mobile Devices Use the arrows on the touchscreen to move the heroes. Switch between Fireboy and Watergirl by tapping on them. Developer Oslo Albet created Fireboy and Watergirl: Light Temple. What is Next? If you enjoy moving through labyrinths, play the original game Fireboy and Watergirl: Forest Temple . Try to pass lakes, lavas, and green goo areas to make the fire and water reach their gates. To achieve success in the game, you must move forward cooperatively. View the other Co-Op games online on OnlineGames.io. The site offers many free online games and is constantly trying to expand its range. Please contact us if you have any suggestions or wishlists!

title: Obby Bike Trials
description: Ready to jump, race, and roll through crazy floating platforms? Obby Bike Trials is the ultimate parkour bike game where every level is packed with wild stunts, tricky traps, and exciting surprises. Ride your bike across floating platforms, climb giant ramps, jump gaps, and dodge moving obstacles, all while trying not to fall off! Is it hard? You’ll start easy, but every level gets trickier. You’ll need balance, quick reactions, and smart moves to make it to the end. It’s a perfect mix of challenge and fun! Controls Player 1: Move: W, A, S, D (or Arrow Keys in 1 Player game mode) Jump: SPACE Run: Left Shift Camera: Move mouse + Right-click Zoom: Mouse scroll Player 2: Move: Arrow Keys Jump: L Run: K What game modes are there? 🕹️ Normal Mode - Ride at your own pace, no timer, just pure fun! ⏱️ Challenge Mode - Beat the clock and race your way to the finish line! 👥 2 Player Mode - Compete with a friend and see who’s the better biker! Can I play with my friend? In 2 Player mode , you and your friend can race each other on the same screen. It’s the best way to see who has the real bike parkour skills! Can I customize my character? In Obby Bike Trials , you can totally personalize your character to make them look awesome while riding through the sky! Choose from: Facial expressions - Smile, grin, or show off a serious game face! Clothing colors - Mix and match your shirt and shorts with bold, bright colors. Hats - Look cool and stay safe with fun headgear. Glasses - Style up your rider and look like a real pro. Wings - Yes, wings! Add a touch of magic and flair as you jump across platforms. Bonus Surprise: You Can Buy a New Bike! Want to level up your ride? You can unlock and buy brand-new bikes with fresh designs and awesome wheels. Ride in style and show off your upgraded bike to your friends!

title: Stickman Destruction
description: How many parts can you divide a virtual character into? Stickman Destruction is an action-oriented stickman ragdoll game in which you tear the virtual character apart a million times. The whole point of this game is to break the Stickman’s bones as much as possible by hitting him from right to left! Use your creativity and strategically calculate how you can get the most points. Break as many bones as you can and earn points! How to play Stickman Destruction? The whole purpose of Stickman Destruction is to increase the damage the character takes and gain points by creating as many obstacles as possible. You have 22 different map options, and every one of them has various obstacle alternatives. By earning points, you can get these map options and create a more dangerous environment. How can I create obstacles in Stickman Destruction? You can create obstacles in numerous ways. As mentioned, you can unlock new levels like Big Stairs or Free Slide. These maps offer you a variety of hurdles. Thus, allows you different damage setups. You can change the character’s jump positions by clicking Next Pose or Prev Pose and choosing whichever is best for significant damage. Adjust the jump speed by tapping and holding to Start. The faster the jump, the greater the damage the Stickman takes. Like unlocking new levels, you can unlock different vehicles, too. There are 11 vehicles. You can choose one of them and increase the number of broken bones. You have two aid tools, Magnet and Vane Bamboo, which you can get from the left side of the screen. You can get them with your points or by watching videos. Additionally, various tools named Props are at your disposal to deal the most damage. Vehicles You can find the types of vehicles in the game listed below. Each vehicle creates a different impact according to its characteristics. Power Cart Boss Seat Baby Scooter Hospital Bed Hoverboard Motor Bike Jeep SUVs Sport Bike Roadster Jeep Bombs Bulldozers Controls Click on Start on the playing screen, hold it until it reaches a specific speed, and then release it. It will cause your Stickman to burst. PvP Stickman Destruction provides you with a multiplayer game experience. You can create a room or join one available to play with others. More Games Like This If you take pleasure in playing Stickman Destruction, you should definitely try Stickman Ragdoll on OnlineGames.io.

title: Deadshot io
description: Take aim, fire, and dominate the battlefield in Deadshot io, a free io shooter game. Compete against players worldwide, test your accuracy, and climb to the top of the leaderboard. Whether you're sniping from afar or engaging in close combat, precision and strategy are key. Can you prove you're the deadliest shot? If you're ready, let's get to the grips of how to play Deadshot io and what your options are regarding game modes and maps. Controls Move: WASD Slide: Shift Crouch: Ctrl Aim Down Sights (ADS): L Shoot: K Jump: Space Reload: R Inspect Weapon: F Toggle Leaderboard: Tab Enter Chat: Enter Game Modes When setting up a private room in DeadShot io, you can choose which mode best fits their desired experience. You can also set the time limit among three options (5 min, 10 min, 20 min) and strategize accordingly. Game modes in DeadShot io is as follows FFA (Free For All): In this mode, every player is on their own, fighting against everyone else. There are no teams, and the objective is to have the highest kill number by eliminating others. TDM (Team Deathmatch): Players are divided into teams. The goal is to accumulate points by killing members of opposing teams. Point: The Point game mode in DeadShot.io introduces a strategic layer to the traditional (TDM) format by incorporating area control as a primary objective. Here, teams don't just aim to eliminate each other but also to secure and hold specific zones on the map for as long as possible. Confirm: Players not only need to eliminate their opponents but also collect the dog tags (or badges) dropped by the opponents they kill. Team KC (Team Kill Confirmed): This might be similar to Team Deathmatch but with an added objective, like collecting dog tags from killed enemies to confirm kills, similar to certain game modes in other shooters like Call of Duty. Dom (Domination): This mode involves controlling points or zones on the map, with teams trying to capture and hold these areas. Maps in Deadshot.io Deadshot.io features a variety of maps, each with unique environments and challenges to keep the gameplay fresh and strategic. Learn the layouts, master the terrain, and use each map to your advantage: Neo Tokyo: Fight in the bustling underground subway system with neon lights. Navigate tight corridors, use cover behind train cars, and ambush opponents around corners. Factory: This industrial-themed map is filled with machinery, crates, and open spaces. Stay alert for long-range battles and use the environment for quick escapes. Refinery: A complex layout of pipes, tanks, and platforms. Height advantages and sharp corners make this map perfect for sneaky strategies and sniper duels. Snow Fall: Set in a snow-covered town, Snow Fall combines narrow streets and open areas. Use buildings for cover and keep moving to avoid being an easy target in the wintry landscape. without the battles on it, the whole map would look like a cozy Christmas celebration. Forest: Dense trees and scattered obstacles make Forest a mix of stealth and action. Stay hidden, flank enemies, and control key pathways to dominate the match. Vineyard: Battle through open vineyards and winding trails. The wide-open spaces favor sharpshooters, but quick movement and awareness can turn the tide in close combat. More FPS io Games If you enjoy the intense action and great graphics of Deadshot.io, you'll love Krunker io . This popular multiplayer shooter combines fast-paced gameplay with smooth controls and a variety of maps and game modes. Run and gun, snipe from afar, or perfect your movement skills, Krunker.io might be your next fave game!

title: Ragdoll Football 2 Players
description: Want to try soccer with a funny twist? Ragdoll Football 2 Players is a cool online game where you control floppy stickman players on a football field. Instead of regular moves, you'll flop, jump, and kick your way around the pitch. You can play against a friend or go up against the computer. Matches can be hilarious, tricky, and totally random. Score surprising goals, use clever boosters, and just have fun. It’s football but a bit sillier and way more unpredictable. Controls Player 1 Move: W, A, S, D keys Headbutt: Q Kick: E Player 2 Move: Arrow keys Headbutt: < Kick: > Mouse or gamepad and mobile controls are also supported. You can change the controls before the match. How to Play Ragdoll Football 2 Players Score more goals than your opponent before time runs out! Control your stickman ragdoll carefully (or chaotically) to dribble, shoot, and defend your net. Choose your game mode: Training, Classic Match, 2 Players, Penalty Shootout, or Tournament. Choose to play on either the standard football field or spice things up with the matrix field. Control your ragdoll stickman to bump and kick the ball into your opponent's goal. You can also make use of wild boosters: Ball Size Reducer: Make scoring harder for your rival (but also for you). Freezer: Temporarily freeze your opponent in place. Bigger Gate: Increase the size of your opponent’s gate for easy shots. Goalkeeper: Get some extra help defending your goal. Developer The game is developed by AdelikDev. Explore Soccer Games If you like Ragdoll Football 2 Player, you might also enjoy other funny physics games like Soccer Random Pro , Pill Soccer, or Head Soccer. Each of these games offers their own unique and humorous twist on football gameplay, so there’s plenty more online fun to discover at OnlineGames.io

title: Vortex 9
description: Vortex 9 is a multiplayer shooting game set in a strange universe. John and Jane found themselves in the Vortex 9 dimension. Grab your weapons and enter the battlefield with your chosen character. Engage in team deathmatches, capture the points and fight against everyone in Mayhem! 🌀 Controls WASD/Arrow Keys: Move LMB: Shoot RMB: Aim Space: Jump M: Map F: Pick Up C: Squat R: Reload 1,2,3,4,5: Change Weapon TAB: Menu How to Play Vortex 9 Ready for a battle with crazy characters and insane weapons? Welcome to the strange universe of Vortex 9. There are no boring heroes or simple guns in this crazy battle game. You will fight against Marvin McSpy, Mr Goodboy, Jess Purrfect, and many more eccentric characters in the battling field. Pick up your gun and join a team deathmatch. As you make progress, you will be able to unlock Capture the Point and Mayhem! Heroes of Vortex 9 🦹‍♂️ Jane and John woke up in Vortex 9 dimension. They are two siblings who love playing games. Choose the one you want to play with and enter the battlefield. As you earn coins from the matches, you can unlock strange characters such as Marvin McSpy and Jess Purrfect. Marvin McSpy: A little-known scientist, Brownie accidentally created Marvin. He was trying to invent a time machine, but Marvin was born as a robot. Mr Goodboy: He loves businesses and runs one of the two giant corporations in Vortex 9 dimension. Jess Purrfect: She is a special agent with claws who works for Thunder Nyan Industries Corporation. Hellen D. Mon: She works as a maid for the current Lord, which she does not enjoy. She wants revenge on Beelzebox. Mercydroid: She is another invention of Professor Brownie. She is made of steel tempered with liquid nitrogen. Beelzebox: He was the heir to the Vortex 6 dimension. But, exiled to the Vortex 9. He hides his face as he does not want to be recognized by Hellen! Wacky Weapons 🔫 Your first rifle is the Recruit’s Gun in the beginning. You also have the Cop’s Gun and the Simple Knife. As you gain Silvers and Coins, you can unlock many more upgraded wacky weapons. The weapons are classified into four categories: Common, Legendary, Epic, and Special. You can find some of them listed below. Clockwork Orange: Common, Costs 3050 Silvers Red AK: Common, Costs 11680 Silvers Minigun Glove: Legendary, Costs 840 Coins Scarab: Legendary, Costs 3000 Coins Photonic Rifle: Special, Costs 46100 Silvers Good Eye: Epic, Costs 1070 Coins Developer Mirra Games developed Vortex 9. You May Also Like Deadshot.io is another game that you can enjoy playing. It features a variety of game maps, including Neo Tokyo, Factory, and Vineyard. For further engagements, feel free to check our Shooting Games Online library for action-packed experiences!

title: Moto Road Rash 3D
description: In Moto Road Rash 3D , you’ll race through highways, dodge traffic, and push your motorcycle to its limits. Whether you’re on a one-way road, weaving through two-way traffic, or cruising in free ride mode, every second counts. Upgrade your bike, master your speed, and prove you’re the fastest rider out there. Game Overview In Moto Road Rash 3D , you’re not just riding, but also racing against time, traffic, and your own reflexes. Choose your mode: complete career missions, challenge endless roads, or simply take a free ride to feel the thrill. Every decision matters. Will you risk squeezing between trucks at top speed, or play it safe and lose precious seconds? The choice is yours. Game Features Multiple Game Modes: Career, Endless Run, Time Trial, and Free Ride (one-way or two-way traffic). Customizable Motorcycles: Upgrade engines, change styles, or unlock new bikes with the cash you earn. High-Speed Action: Dodge cars, trucks, and buses at insane speeds. Crash & Respawn System: Collide with something and you’ll respawn, but you will lose time. Progressive Difficulty: The further you ride, the faster and more dangerous the roads become. How to Play Moto Road Rash 3D? Left: ⬅️ Right: ➡️ Accelerate: ⬆️ Brake: ⬇️ Tip: The closer you pass vehicles, the more points and money you earn! FAQs Is Moto Road Rash 3D endless or level-based? Both! Career mode is level-based, while Endless and Free Ride modes let you race infinitely. What happens if I crash? You’ll respawn quickly, but you’ll lose valuable time. If the clock runs out, you’ll have to restart. Similar Games If you love the speed and danger of Moto Road Rash 3D , check out other racing challenges in our Driving Games library. And when you need a break from the adrenaline rush, relax with Idle Coffee Business, instead of dodging traffic, you’ll be brewing coffee and managing your very own café.

title: Supermarket Simulator
description: Ever walked into your local Walmart and thought, “Wow, it would be awesome to run a place like this”? Now you can, thanks to Supermarket Simulator on OnlineGames.io! You’ll start off with a whopping 10,000 coins, so you’re already on your way to creating the supermarket of your dreams. Think of all the gum, candy bars, and snacks you could buy with that! But here, you’re not just shopping, you’re the one behind the counter, the cashier, the shelf-stocker, the floor-sweeper, the box-carrier, and probably even the person who forgot to order more donuts. From picking the perfect location for your supermarket to hiring friendly employees, updating price tags to ordering new batch of goods, every decision is up to you. This free online game is your chance to build, manage, and have fun all at once. Controls WASD / Arrow Keys: Move around. Shift: Sprint Mouse: Look around. E: Interact with objects, boxes, and chat with townsfolk. Left-Click: Stock your shelves with goods. Tab: Open your main menu to access building or cleaning tools. Esc: Opens the settings. M: Brings up the map. How to Play Supermarket Simulator Roam around the town until you see a vacant shop that calls your name. With your 10,000 coins, you can rent it on the spot and give it a creative name sign. Use the cleaning tool to wipe off dusty floors, pick up trash, and show off your store’s fresh look. Nobody likes shopping in a dirty market! Step outside and meet the local supplier. Trade with them for shelves, registers, and the first batch of items to sell. You can also invest in more advanced equipment as you level up and once you get your profits rolling. Arrange your shelves, place your checkout counter, and decorate the interior to match your vibe. Do you like bright, cheerful aisles or a cozy, hometown feel? It’s up to you. Order supplies through your menu. Boxes of products will appear outside your store. Bring them in, fill up your shelves, and watch your stock turn into big profits. Flip the sign from “Closed” to “Open,” and customers will stroll in. Being the cashier and calculating changes is fun, but you can keep the line moving fast at the cash register by hiring someone to do it for you. If you get tired go and sleep in the bed outside of your supermarket. It's crazy but real! With your growing success, why stop at one store? Use your savings to rent a second location and spread your supermarket empire around town. Run Your Own Supermarket You can discover all the tiny secrets and tricks yourself in Supermarket Simulator. But we've gathered every little detail and insider tip here. So you can turn your small-town shop into a booming business faster than Walmart opens new stores! Just remember to follow the these steps: Pick every detail from the store name to the shelf placement. Show off your personal taste. Get to know the town’s seller. They offer the best deals on goods to help your market stand out. But some goods will be unlocked as you level up When an item sells like crazy, stock up more. Less popular items might just collect dust on the shelves, lower their prices to sell them faster. Bring in a cashier or cleaning staff to handle the busywork while you focus on making big decisions. The cleaning staff will work in both stores if you open the branch. If your store is jam-packed, it might be time for a tiny price bump. If it’s empty, consider lowering prices. Nobody wants to shop in a messy store. Sweep floors, pick up trash, and keep everything looking great. Take a stroll outside, chat with folks, and enjoy that small-town charm while your staff is racking up the profits for you. Developer Supermarket Simulator is developed by FreezeNova, known for creating other exciting browser games. Explore Tycoon Games If you’re itching for more management fun after playing this online game, check out other popular simulators on OnlineGames.io. Love building up your own empire? You might enjoy Idle Startup Tycoon or any of our other free games that let you test your business smarts. Now’s your chance to step up and show everyone you’ve got what it takes to run the coolest supermarket in town. Ready to rack up those sales and become the ultimate store manager? Play Supermarket Simulator now on OnlineGames.io and dive into a world where you call all the shots!

title: Snow Rider 3D
description: New Year's Eve is approaching. Everything is covered in white. It might be fun to slide on some snow during this period. Snow Rider 3D is a realistic 3D snowboarding game where you glide through millions of obstacles on a snow-covered mountain. While sliding, you must escape from the snow masses and pieces of wood approaching you. If you hit any one of them, you lose the game. It might be more fun to play with the sound turned up! Top View of Snow Rider 3D When you enter the game, tap on the sleigh to start sliding. You are on a fast-moving sleigh and will face many obstacles while moving forward. You have to make intelligent moves. There will be blocks you need to jump over when necessary. You will need to sneak through moving snow globes. Every obstacle you overcome will be recorded as a score on the left side of the screen. Collect the Gift Boxes The game does not end with overcoming obstacles while sliding. At the same time, you need to collect the gift boxes that appear on the game screen. You can use these to replace your sled with new ones. Dodge Snowy Objects Our keyword for achieving high scores in this game is concentration. Because things will get complicated as you progress, you must jump and make sudden maneuvers left and right to avoid hitting any objects. While playing the game, your primary focus should be your slide and the obstacles around you. By acting aware of everything around you, you will likely overcome the challenges that come your way efficiently. Like everything else, practicing in this game will make your job easier. It may seem not easy at first, but you will see your score increase over time. It will get better with practice. Snow Rider 3D Key Benefits Playing Snow Rider 3D improves concentration and helps you develop multi-functioning abilities. While playing the game, you must control your speed, the sled's direction and other obstacles at the same time. You will encounter obstacles that will require you to make sudden maneuvers. Therefore, serious hand-eye coordination is needed here. It will improve as you practice. Playing challenging games like this also stimulates brain activity. Sleigh Options Toboggan (Cost: Free) Metal Sleigh (Cost: 50 Gift Boxes) Evil Sleigh (Cost: 75 Gift Boxes) Plastic Sleigh (Cost: 50 Gift Boxes) Santa Sleigh (Cost: 200 Gift Boxes) Round Sleigh (Cost: 75 Gift Boxes) Chroma Sleigh (Cost: 75 Gift Boxes) Eskimo Sleigh (Cost: 50 Gift Boxes) Ancient Sleigh (Cost: 50 Gift Boxes) Modern Sleigh (Cost: 50 Gift Boxes) Hill Racing Sleigh (Cost: 100 Gift Boxes) FAQ What is the best sled in Snow Rider 3D? Actually, there is no such thing as the best sled in Snow Rider 3D. There are a wide array of slides ranging from plastic ones to Santa's original sled. And all the sleds offer you great sliding experiences. The only difference between them is their designs. The sliding capability of them is the same. How much is the Santa Sleigh in Snow Rider 3D? Santa Sleigh costs 200 gift boxes, and it is the most expensive sled. Controls A or Left Arrow Key: Steer Left D or Right Arrow Key: Steer Right W, Upper Arrow or the Space Key: Jump Developer Snow Rider 3D was created by New Gamer. Other Snow Games If you haven't checked out our other sports games and want to try something different, we recommend playing Xmas Slope . You will be sliding on Santa's sled in the game. Collect all the gift boxes for the kids while steering the sled down the hills. You can also look at Snow games that may interest you on OnlineGames.io.

title: Tunnel Road
description: Tunnel Road is a 3D avoid game where you navigate in a sci-fi, spinning tunnel full of twists, turns, and sudden obstacles. It's all about surviving as long as you can. The game starts off manageable. But, as the tempo picks up, so does the pressure. If you hit an obstacle, you're back at level 1... unless you choose to use one of your limited revivals. It's a kind of game that pulls you in and doesn't let go. Since the early days of browser arcades, tunnel games have been around with us. They take inspiration from classic endless runners and even some retro sci-fi games where you fly through wormholes. But Tunnel Road takes that concept and gives it a slick, colorful makeover with smooth controls, randomized levels and competitive 2-player support. So, it is a pure test of your reflexes wrapped up in a brand new package. Smoother than ever before. Let's start our journey in the wormhole! Controls 1-Player Mode: Move left: Press A or Left Arrow Move right: Press D or Right Arrow 2-Player Mode: Player 1: A / D Player 2: Left / Right Arrows How to Play Tunnel Road Start by choosing whether you want to play alone or against a friend. Once you're in, your only goal is simple: stay alive. Your ball speeds forward through a swirling tunnel filled with unexpected blockades and gaps. You must steer left or right to dodge everything in your path. Each time you complete a run, you progress to a new level, but hit just one obstacle and you're forced to restart from level 1. That is unless you opt to revive with an ad and keep your streak going. The real challenge is keeping up with the speed. It increases little by little, pushing your limits. No power-ups, no invincibility, no brakes and definitely no slow motion. It's just you, your reflexes and the tunnel ahead... Explore Tunnel Road With a Friend Tunnel Road gets even more exciting when you bring in a second player. In 2-player mode, both players race through the same tunnel side by side. The goal is to stay alive longer than your opponent. You and your friend will each control a separate ball on your half of the screen, dodging obstacles in parallel tunnels. If one player crashes, the other player instantly wins the round. To start the game, select 2-Player Mode from the main menu. The screen will split vertically Player 1 plays on the left, Player 2 on the right. Player 1 uses A (left) and D (right). First one to crash loses the round! Developer Tunnel Road was developed by gamevgames. The game's design blends traditional endless tunnel racing with modern arcade polish. It runs smoothly in your browser. Other Skill Games to Play Online If Tunnel Road keeps you on the edge of your seat, try Extreme Run 3D next. It's another high-speed "avoid-obstacles" challenge with flashy visuals and faster curves. Both games will test your reflexes, but Extreme Run 3D leans even harder into intensity, speed and variety of dynamic obstacles like spikes and wrecking balls. Great for fans who want to push the limits of their gaming skills.

title: Snow Rush 3D
description: Miss winter fun? With Snow Rush 3D, you can enjoy icy adventures anytime! Hop on your sleigh, race through the snowy wild, and avoid trees, rocks, and snowmen while grabbing as many presents as you can. But watch out! Sliding on snow is tricky, so you'll need fast reflexes to stay in the game. Think you've got what it takes to master the ice? Let's find out! Game Overview Snow Rush 3D is a fun and fast sleigh-riding game where you race through snowy hills and icy paths. Avoid trees, rocks, and snowmen while collecting as many presents as you can. The more you slide, the tougher it gets, so stay focused and keep your reflexes sharp. It's easy to play but takes skill to master. How far can you go before the snow gets you? How to Play Snow Rush 3D The gameplay is simple: control your sleigh and slide through the snow while avoiding trees, rocks, and snowmen. Try to stay alive as long as you can and beat your best score every time you play. Collect gifts to unlock new sleighs and make your ride even cooler. You can play solo or challenge a friend to see who's the real sleigh master! Sleigh all the way! Controls 1 Player Move: WASD / Arrow Keys 2 Player Move Player 1: WASD Move Player 2: Arrow Keys Good to Know Glow up your sleigh! Got too many gifts? Trade them for brand new sleighs. There are 11 awesome models waiting for you. Watch out! The snowy path isn’t all fun and snowflakes. You will need a quick reflex to avoid all the tricky stuff on your way. Don’t worry though, most dangers are marked with a warning symbol so you’ll know when to be extra careful. FAQS Will my progress be saved? Yep! The game saves your progress automatically so you can keep going anytime. It also saves your sleigh and your best score, so you’ll know what score to beat next time! What kind of obstacles are waiting for me out there? There are rocks, rolling snowballs, snowmen, trees, and super slippery icy spots. If you’re not careful, you can fall into the void or crash your sleigh, so keep your eyes on the trail! Similar Games If you like games with a three dimensional view, you should check out Crazy Plane Landing . Now’s your chance to try flying a plane like a real pilot! You’ll do cool flips in the air and try to land safely on the runway. It’s very similar to Snow Rush 3D, but this time the adrenaline reaches new heights!

title: Slope Rolling
description: Ready for some quick slopey fun? Play Slope Rolling, an online game where you guide your rolling ball down a never-ending track filled with twists, sharp turns, and sudden drops. Watch out! The further you roll, the faster you go, and obstacles appear more often. How far can you roll before your skills are put to the ultimate test? Controls Movement: Use the Left and Right arrow keys (or A and D keys) to steer your ball. Power-ups: J - Activate Invincibility (temporarily immune to obstacles). K - Activate Magnet (automatically collect nearby diamonds). L - Activate Double Income (earn double diamonds for a limited time). How to Play Slope Rolling Roll down a twisting slope and stay alive as long as possible. The game starts easy, allowing you to get comfortable with the controls. But don't relax too much because soon you'll speed up, and obstacles will come flying at you! Dodge blocks, leap across gaps, and handle sudden sharp turns with precision. Stay centered on the slope for quicker reactions to sudden changes. Try to look ahead so you're ready for upcoming obstacles. And don't forget to move steadily and avoid sudden, sharp turns when moving at high speeds. Use Power Ups Along the way, collect diamonds scattered on the path. These diamonds let you unlock new ball skins and special power-ups like invincibility, magnet, and double income. And, use power-ups wisely (JKL keys) to boost your score and extend your run. Keep rolling and aim for a new high score each time you play! Developer Slope Rolling was developed by CursoraLabs. Other Ball Games If you enjoyed playing Slope Rolling, you might also love similar online games such as Extreme Run 3D for a bit more extreme challenge and Crazy Roll for a fresh theme OnlineGames.io. These games offer the same exciting experience with challenging gameplay. Give them a try and keep the fun rolling!

title: WarStrike
description: In the ocean of shoot-'em-all games, finding an online shooter that meets your console gamer expectations can feel impossible. After playing legends like Counter-Strike or Far Cry, other online FPS games may seem bland, lacking an immersive story. But believe it or not, WarStrike will give you the taste of playing Call of Duty: Modern Warfare, all from the comfort of your browser. WarStrike 's campaign mode takes you deep into a critical mission as an elite MI-6 Special Soldier. You'll complete duties across 24 chapters, unraveling a story of global threats, deadly viruses, and seeking justice. Each chapter unfolds like a blockbuster action movie with its cleverly designed scenario and diverse missions. Not ready for a long-term commitment to another shooter game? Try quick multiplayer battles; they'll give you some clues about how epic WarStrike is. So either way, you've got a game that delivers on all fronts. Have fun striking! ⚠ Mature Content Advisory This game contains themes that may not be suitable for all players, including intense action, violence, or strong language. Please proceed with discretion. If you're looking for family-friendly games, check out other free games on our site. Controls Move: WASD keys Jump: Spacebar Left Shift: Run Aim: Right Mouse Button Shoot: Left Mouse Button Reload: R key Crouch: C key Change Weapon: 1 and 2 keys Melee Attack: Q key or 3 key Pick-up Weapon: E Throw Grenade: G key or 4 Key Use Medkit: H Use Pill: J Unlock Cursor: L Pause Game: Tab key An Epic Mission: Eliminating Tal Brody In campaign mode, you play as an elite MI-6 tasked with stopping a global catastrophe. The year is 2012, and your mission is to capture TAL BRODY, an international terrorist responsible for countless attacks. His latest threat is a deadly virus capable of killing instantly or turning survivors into zombies. The stakes couldn't be higher. Clear zones, place bombs, complete sniper duties, and do whatever it takes to take down the ultimate enemy, Tal Brody. Each mission is crafted to challenge you with different skills. But, as you level up, you will improve your soldier's skills, and unlock weapons and parts for more intense battles. Team DeathMatch Opt for Multiplayer Mode and pick from maps like Dockyard, Pool Party, Farm House, Crash Site, or Overpass. Team up with friends and score over 20 kills before your opponents. Collaborate with teammates, strategize, and dominate the competition in team deathmatches. You can earn cash and gold in both campaign and multiplayer modes to unlock and upgrade an arsenal of weapons, including the Sniper PXed, UMP, and HMG. You can improve your gear with parts like scopes, silencers, and grips, or change the weapon's aesthetic with skins. Developer WarStrike was created by FreezeNova. title: Pacman 30th Anniversary
description: Who is not afraid of ghosts? Pac-man is! In the neon glow of 1980s arcades, a little yellow character with the shape of a pizza missing a slice was born. This little guy is scared by ghosts, like every other kid. But when he eats energizers, he threatens all ghosts. The creator of the original game, Toru Itawani, describes the relationship between Pac-Man and ghosts as the ones Tom & Jerry have. The world's most-known game, Pac-Man, is released as a Google Doodle to celebrate the 30th Anniversary of the game's initial release. You can even see the Google logo implemented in the maze on the first level. How cool is that? Google’s special version of the game brought better graphics and HUD, as well as easy access via browser. While Pacman's fame is undeniable, there was a clear need for an ultimate guide that covered everything you needed to know about this iconic character. Keep reading this post to learn how to play, explore fun facts and world records, and find answers to frequently asked questions about the game itself and the Google Doodle version. Table of Contents Pacman 30th Anniversary How to Play Pac-Man 30th Anniversary Controls Pacman 2 Player Pac-Man's Fame Fun Facts Guinness World Records World Records Held By Pac-Man World Records Held by Fans FAQ What is Pac-Man Google Doodle? How old is Google Pacman? When was Google Pacman released? Who developed Google Pacman? How many levels are in Pac-Man Doodle? How does Pac-Man end? What is level 256 in Pac-Man? Why is Pacman's 256th level glitched? How to play 2 player Pac-Man on Google? Inserting the Last Coin Pacman 30th Anniversary Play Pacman Doodle How to Play Pac-Man 30th Anniversary For a retro feel of arcade machines, open the link provided above to start the game. You will control a little yellow character in a maze. Guide him through the maze to collect all the dots. Avoid your archenemies: four crazy ghosts named Blinky, Pinky, Inky, and Clyde. Each ghost has different colors and behaviors, but all share the goal of catching you. Eat power pellets (bigger dots) to make the ghosts turn blue, making them defenseless against Pac-Man. When the ghosts turn blue, they will start to run away from you, and Pac-Man will be the one chasing. Gobble ghosts to clear the maze. But be quick; the pellet's effect will fade out soon. Collect all dots in a maze to pass a level. You may see fruits appearing in the maze once in a while. Eating fruits will boost your game score as it affects your health in real life. If a ghost(s) catches him, you have to start over. The game gets trickier as you go, with faster ghosts and shorter energizer effects. Outsmart the ghosts and break records with your scores. Controls Left-Click: Insert Coin Arrow Keys: Move Pacman WASD: Move Ms. Pacman Pacman 2 Player Play Pacman 2 Player Pac-Man's Fame The game is not only the most famous video game of all time, but it is an icon of pop culture. It has brought its fame into sequels, music, and TV Shows. A hit song called "Pac-Man Fever" by Buckner & Garcia got into the list of 100 Greatest One Hit Wonders of the 80s. Posters, mugs, t-shirts, and a wide range of objects featuring Pac-Man are sold for millions. Business folks use the term "Pac-Man defense" for a hostile takeover move. This term has taken its place in the curriculums of management courses in business schools. A technique used in math and physics is called "Pacman renormalization." The game entered The Strong National Museum of Play's Hall of Fame in 2015. When Google first released the Pacman Doodle, it was played for 500 million hours by visitors, in the first 48 hours. The Google Pacman craze caused businesses to lose 122 million $ in such a short time. Fun Facts The game was first called "Puck Man" in Japan, referring to the character's open mouth and eating habits. However, it changed to "Pac-Man" later in North America. The idea for Pac-Man's look came from a pizza with a slice missing. 🍕 Ghosts in the game were inspired by Casper the Friendly Ghost and the Japanese cartoon Little Ghost Q-Taro. In 1982, a kid got a letter from President Ronald Reagan for a world-record score. The game holds eleven Guinness World Records, including the most successful coin-operated game record. Keep reading to learn about records held by Pacman. Guinness World Records Pac-Man is super famous that it has dozens of World Records recognized by Guinness. The game itself acquired 11 Guinness certificates. However, the game opened the way for other records for fans worldwide, such as the highest score or fastest completion. Learn about them below. World Records Held By Pac-Man Most recognizable videogame character Most collected arcade coin-op machine Best-selling videogame of the second-generation consoles Most successful US-made arcade machine First videogame for Android phones Most profitable arcade cabinet First videogame character merchandise First arcade game to use Google's geometric data Highest-grossing arcade videogame First videogame mascot First videogame with power-ups World Records Held by Fans First Perfect Score: Billy Mitchell - 3,333,360 Points Longest standing Record: Shannon Ryan - 3,213,900 points Smallest Maze: 500 x 900 micrometers Largest videogame: 4,014,144,000 pixels Most Popular Pac-Man Song: Pac-Man Fever Largest Arcade Machine: Billboard with a 4.5657 square meters size Most Costly Game: Google Pacman Doodle Largest Human Image of Pac-Man: 351 participants Largest re-enactment of Pac-Man: Pac-Manhattan fan team - 171,029m² First virtual reality (VR) Pac-Man videogame First Pac-Man game based on a TV show: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures FAQ What is Pac-Man Google Doodle? Pac-Man Google Doodle is a re-make of the retro arcade game Pac-Man to celebrate the 30th Anniversary of the game's initial release in May 1980. How old is Google Pacman? As of 2024, Google Pac-Man is 14 years old while the original Pac-Man is 44 years old. When was Google Pacman released? Google released the game in May 2010 in 30th anniversary of the original game. Who developed Google Pacman? Pacman's 30th Anniversary Doodle was made by Google . The original Pacman game was created by Toru Iwatani in 1979. How many levels does Pac-Man Doodle have? As in original Pacman, there are 256 levels in Pac-Man Doodle, with increasing difficulty. How does Pac-Man end? A level in Pac-Man ends if a ghost catches the character. Then, the player should start over from the beginning. However, no player could reach the end of the final level , known as Map 256. What is level 256 in Pac-Man? Level 256 is the final and hardest level of the game. The map is also known as the split-screen level because, in this stage, the screen splits into two parts. While the left side stays as usual, the right side is filled with random numbers, letters and symbols. In this map, the player needs to collect 244 Pac-dots to beat the level. However, as the right side is filled with a mess of symbols and lacks Pac-dots, it is impossible to reach 244 dots. The most points earned in this kill level is 155,875, which was scored by Marc Cohen on the PS4. Why is Pacman's 256th level glitched? When a player finishes a level, a bonus fruit appears in the screen's bottom right corner. After the 8th level, each time you pass a level, the last icon in the bottom right corner changes to show you which map the player is on. Retro arcade machines could only remember a small amount of information, like a single byte. This meant they could only count up to 255. Each level in the game is given a number from 1 to 255. When you reach Level 256, the game tries to use the number 0. In this case, the game ends up trying to show all 255 fruits from the previous levels on the screen , leading to a glitch on the right side of the game. How to play 2 player Pac-Man on Google? You can bust ghosts with a friend on the co-op mode of Pac-Man. Open Pacman 2 Player above and click the "Insert Coin" button twice . Then, Mrs. Pac-Man also appears on the screen. You can control Pacman with arrow keys and Mrs. Pacman with WASD keys. Inserting the Last Coin Pac-Man is not just a game; it's a cultural milestone, a soundtrack, a fashion statement, and a lesson in strategy that extends the pixels on the screen. title: Master Chess
description: Master Chess is an online board game in which you must utilize your strategic abilities and chess knowledge to win. You can play the game with a companion or against the computer. It is all up to you. Enjoy the fun of the classic board game on the digital platform! How to Play Master Chess Choose whether to play with a friend or against artificial intelligence, select the difficulty level, and let the game begin! That's all there is to it. At the bottom of the screen, where you choose the game mode, you will find star ratings. The most challenging level belongs to the three-star rating. Basics of the Master Chess It is to the advantage of every player to know the basic chess rules in order to play this classic board game. But, there are indicators in the game where you can see in which direction you can move the chess pieces when you click on them. The board is an 8x8 board, numbered 8 from bottom to top and A to H from left to right. Player 1 and the player playing against the AI ​​always take the white pieces. The time spent by players making moves is recorded in the lower right corner and upper left corner of the screen. The score equivalent to this recorded time is deducted from the 5000 stars initially awarded to the player. What is the objective of the chess game? In chess, the goal is to checkmate the opposing King. Checkmate occurs when a king is attacked without the ability to move to a safer square. How do I checkmate my opponent's King piece? Generally speaking, there is more than one way to checkmate your opponent's King piece. The secret is to carefully corner the King of your adversary. You can push them in the direction of the last corner after you have moved their King to one of the board's edges. Controls Use your mouse click to move your chess pieces.
