Pass through all the traps, eliminate all crewmates and get your freedom back. Complete +100 varied levels to break out of prison. Among Us has never been this colorful! ⚠️ Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move On Mobile Devices: Use the virtual buttons on the screen. Impostor Among Us: Escape from Prison Overview The traitor ended up in a space prison, and he needs your help! Guide the impostor and help him get through all the traps in each level. Eliminate crewmates one by one and deactivate the red lasers to move on to the next level. From time to time, you may need to solve tricky puzzles to pass a level. You never know what you will encounter in this version of Among Us! But you can be sure of this: it’s very colorful here. Deactivate Red Lasers 👿 To be able to pass any level, you must deactivate the red lasers. Otherwise, you will get burned trying to move forward. The only way to deactivate the lasers is to eliminate all the crewmates in a level. Attack the crewmates by using your knife or gun. You should not leave anyone alive but yourself! Use your mind and find a way to get rid of the lasers. Complete Logic Tasks 🧠 This escape game has over 100 varied levels to complete. Each level comes with a specific task. For example, in a level, the impostor woke up on the wrong side of the bed, and his mobility has been reversed. When you press the A key, he jumps instead of moving left. Your main goal is to figure out a way to eliminate all the crewmates and deactivate the red lasers to move forward despite all obstacles. Developer Stickman vs Monster School Team developed the Impostor Among Us: Escape from Prison. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing this game, you may also try Dig out of Prison ! Dig a hole and help the prisoner break free. For additional options, feel free to check out our free online escape games by following the link. There are dozens of games at your disposal on www.onlinegames.io !

title: Cat Simulator
description: Purrr! Cat Simulator is a game where you purrr a lot. You are playing as a cat. You have the option to choose your cat's species. All you need to do is unlock other cat breeds by earning coins. As you level up, your earnings and difficulty levels will increase simultaneously. How to Play Cat Simulator? Use the W or Up Arrow key to move forward Use the S or Down Arrow key to move backward Use the A or Left Arrow key to move left Use the D or Right Arrow key to move right Use the Space key to jump Use the Shift key to gain speed Use the F key to attack your enemies with your claws Game Modes When you open the game, there will be an opening screen with many game mode options. Each one has unique features. Choose whichever is best for you, and have fun! Cat Stunt Mode: There is parkour in this mode, and you should jump and cross over the hurdles. It is like Wipeout but with a cat! Maga XP: You are given a limited time and lots of coins in this mode. You can collect coins as much as you can within a short period. Career: As you can expect, it is all about career development. Yes, cats have careers, too. There will be some quests, and you will be expected to fulfill these tasks. Destruction: The cat's paws are itching. It needs to break some things, to drop them. Just tour the venue. Maga Kill: There are squirrels, tortoises, and spiders in this survival mode. And you need to scratch them before running out of health. When you kill an animal, coins drop. Take them and tease other animals. Pool Mini Game: You have 50 seconds! Use this span to claw animals gliding on the water's surface. But avoid catching dangerous animals like lobsters, squirrels and tortoises. You may end up dying. Features This game offers you many options. You can select the game mode mentioned above as you wish. Also, you can choose your main character's breed. There are 13 different cat breeds there. Each species comes with varying portions of health percentage, damage and power ability. Or, you can customize your cat's outfits by buying a hat with your coins. Additionally, you can design the room you are playing in with TVs, paintings, shelves, vases, curtains, etc. More Games Like This If you like the Cat Simulator, you can find more games by browsing other cat games and pet games online on our platform.

title: Street Traffic Racer
description: Driving with incredible speed but getting stuck in traffic? In Street Traffic Racer that’s impossible with you behind the steering wheel. Upgrade your car to your liking and drift through the lanes. Avoiding crashes won’t be a problem for you! Game Overview After a long day, you get in your car and need some speed. In Street Traffic Racer you start drifting through traffic and earn money while doing it. The cash will come in handy at the car workshop, where you can buy upgrades and customizations. Choose where your next drive will be and what challenge to face. But beware ⎼ if you hit too many cars, your drive will end, along with your thrill. Ready… Set… Go! Game Features Triple mode gameplay: One-Way Drive / Two-Way Drive / Time Drive Multiple terrains to choose from: Desert / Morning City / Grassland Customizable cars: Aesthetic changes and performance upgrades using in-game currency from your drives How to Play Street Traffic Racer? Left: A / ⬅️ Right: D / ➡️ Accelerate: W / ⬆️ Brake: S / ⬇️ Nitro: F Change Camera: C Good to Know! The more you hit other cars, the fuller your crash bar will get. The severity depends on the strength of the collision. If you know you can’t avoid a hit, try braking to minimize the damage. FAQs Can I turn the car in the opposite direction? No, you can’t take turns, only drive the car forward. Does the game get harder over time? Yes. The longer you drive, the faster your car becomes, and the more cars appear in traffic to block your way. Is there a finish line? No. You can drive for as long as you want and can, but once the crash bar is full, your drive will end. Similar Games Love cars and fearless driving? If you conquered Street Traffic Racer without a scratch, try Drift Hunters 2 for even better drifting, or Traffic Jam 3D for a different driving challenge.

title: Drunken Fighters
description: Drunken Fighters is a hilarious sports game where you kick and punch your opponent in a ring. With its cartoonistic graphics and funny characters, you will laugh out loud a lot while trying to beat up the CPU, or a friend of yours! Defend yourself when it’s necessary, take action when you find the right opportunity in each round to become the champion of this free boxing game. 🥊 Controls Player 1 Press A: Defend Press S: Kick Press D: Punch Player 2 Right Arrow: Defend Left Arrow: Punch Down Arrow: Kick You can use the virtual buttons on the screen of smartphones and tablets. How to Play Drunken Fighters Step into the ring with your ragdoll character for a crazy boxing experience! You can fight the CPU or duel a friend on the same device using the 2 Player Mode option. The key in both game modes is to master when to switch to defense and when to attack to win! Balance is everything in any boxing match. With this method, you can easily win each round and gain coins, enabling you to unlock new ragdoll characters. Choose Funny Mode 🤪 You have five funny mode options to boost the thrill: Big Head, Stretch Punch, Stretch Kick, Super Punch, and Big Punch. Switch on the mode you want to apply to the matches from the bottom of the screen. You can mix specific features as you wish. For example, your ragdoll character will have a huge head and extended legs when you apply the Big Head and the Stretch Kick options. Use Your Stamina Efficiently 💪 You will see two bars in the upper left corner of the screen. These bars indicate your health and stamina. As you kick and punch your opponent, your stamina will gradually decrease. After a brief rest, you will regain your stamina. When you run out of stamina, we recommend you retreat and switch to defense until it refills! Developer Goolandia developed the Drunken Fighters. Similar Games Golf Orbit is another game option for you to explore! Launch the ball as far as possible and try to sink it into the hole. Moreover, you are always welcome to visit our free online sports games category. Don’t forget to leave a comment in the comments section below!

title: Tank War Simulator
description: Tank War Simulator is a 3D battle game where the player is in control of an armored war tank. You will steer your tank in a foggy forest. As you slowly progress through this forest, you will see your enemies on the other side. It is inevitable that a war will occur. You need to protect your oldest friend from the missiles of other machines and open fire on them. You will witness the biggest tank wars between two teams! How to Play Tank War Simulator When you open the game, tap the "Play" button and begin to fight with enemies. Work together as a team to get a tactical edge in the crowded battlefield. Yes, the other side will be a little crowded. But we think you can handle any challenging battle. You can try to use the misty forest to your advantage. Since fog will cover your machine at a distance, you will reduce your enemy's viewing quality. Prepare for chaotic warfare! Using the Radar Map You will see a circular radar map in the upper right corner of the game screen. The people displayed here with green triangles are your teammates, while red triangles symbolize your enemies. Follow both allies and adversaries, by keeping a close eye on the circular radar map located in this corner. Effectively checking on this map is essential for playing strategically. Some enemies can enter your and your team's territory in no time. The more you keep this place under control, the better you can filter out the enemies that get in there. Missile Reloading It may be a little difficult to send missiles to your enemies in rapid succession in the game. Because they are heavy bullets, reloading takes some time. You can view whether refilling has occurred or not from the bottom right corner of the screen. If you see 1, it means the filling is complete. Aiming the Enemies While responding your enemy with a missile, shoot from a long distance. This will ease aiming. You can aim by clicking on the right side of your mouse. A giant aiming screen will appear. This will help you aim accurately. Tank's Health Bar You can also see the plus icon on the lower-left corner. This shows you the health status of your tank. 200 is the full value. Naturally, the value of this bar decreases when exposed to bullets and missiles. When it drops to zero, you lose. Controls Use the WASD or the Arrow keys to move. Use the Left Mouse click to shoot. Use the Right Mouse click to aim. Use the Q key to change weapons. Use the Tab key to pause. Similar Games If you are a fan of tank games, just like in Tank War Simulator, you should also check Tank Racing. Tank Racing is a driving game where you move the vehicle in a military area. Or else, you may look up other online battle games on OnlineGames.io for more options. Keep coming back to discover new games ! Tank War Simulator by OnlineGames.io

title: Super Car Driving
description: Super Car Driving is an online car game where you get to drive super-performing high-end models like Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and more. This online driving game offers a full package with 3 game modes that can appeal to every taste. Adrenaline seekers can enjoy completing stunt challenges while skill gamers maneuver their supercars in the lots of parking levels. Meanwhile, free spirits can hit the road on a GTA ViceCity-like map and test their sports cars' performance. All 3 in one game. So, what are you waiting for? Start playing it! Happy driving, gamers! Controls Drive : WASD or Arrow keys Handbrake : Spacebar Change Camera View : C Look Back : B How to Play Super Car Driving Choose a car among 13 supercars, pick a game mode and start driving. Drive your car using WASD or arrow keys. Press space to pull handbrakes and initiaete drifts. There are 4 epic camera modes you can pick among: first-person driver, cinematic rear wheel view, third person and top-down views. Press C to switch between views. Complete tasks to rack up coins and buy more agile and dynamic-looking cars. If you'd like, you can modify your car in the garage, add some texture to the coat, change the colors and lights, or even buy spoilers. Stunt Levels Unleash your inner daredevil with 20 exhilarating stunt challenges set in breathtakingly surreal landscapes. Each challenge is designed to test the limits of your vehicle, featuring mind-bending ramps, intricate loops, and gravity-defying twists. Get ready to drive through epic environments that challenge your precision and skill. This mode will push both you and your supercar to the edge. Parking Challenges Think you're a parking pro? Test your skills with agile, hard-to-control cars in challenge! Tackle 22 intense levels of precision parking tasks that will push your control and accuracy to the limit. All levels are unlocked from the beginning so you can choose the difficulty. Follow the red arrows to find the designated parking spot. The map changes in each level introducing new places and tricky obstacles. Airport, city street, mall parking lot and many more. Explore them all and collect in-game coins! Free Roam Drive in the city in free roam mode and discover the open roads with light traffic at your leisure. If you're interested, you can take on fun missions like racing through speed cameras. Or else you can be a taxi driver and collect passengers just like you did in GTA before. Each task comes with rewards determined by its level of difficulty. More Car Games Online Super Car Adventures doesn't end here. Play Crazy Parking Fury , park cars while evading police in a coastal city setting, with gameplay escalating through ten levels of increasing difficulty. You can also steal cars and explore in a free roam mode, but always watch out for the cops. It's a 3D, free-to-play game that mixes parking challenges with a touch of GTA-style evasion.

title: Crazy Strike Force
description: Join the ultimate battle competition in the Crazy Strike Force game. You can customize your character with a unique style and resist opponents. With a great selection of weapons, you will be able to shoot anybody. The enemies must be taken down, and do not hesitate to create your own strategy. Controls WASD or arrow keys: Move Left click: Fire Right click: Aim Space: Jump Q: Slide while running C: Crouch Left shift: Run 1, 2, 3: Change between weapons E or F: Interact or pick up a weapon G: Throw dynamite H: Use medkit T: Chat L: Toggle cursor lock Hold Tab: Show the scoreboard Escape: Pause What armors are available in Crazy Strike Force? There are more than 20 armors in Crazy Strike Force. Most knowns are Magnum, MP5K, M870, SC-AR, MGL, Tommy, M4A1, AWP and Crossbow… Additional skills will also increase damage against opponents and protect your life. Some of them are Quickdraw ammo, silence walker, samurai, UAV Ghost, and Sitrep. You will be able to choose between kill messages after slaughtering your enemy. How can I change my nickname? Where can I see my gaming history? Go to the profile section to change the nickname, and load/save the code. You can replace your current load code with another load with a higher value. You can follow your gaming history details, such as K/D rate, games played, scores, wins, headshots, knife kills, etc. in the profile section. How can I earn gold in Crazy Strike Force? You can earn gold and diamonds by watching ads. Rewarded ads will bring you +5000 gold and +1000 diamonds. You may also get a loot box having 500-2000 diamonds inside. How to create a room in Crazy Strike Force? You can begin a game by joining a room made by other players or create a room yourself. To create a room, you must give a name to the room and decide on the maximum number of players. After that, choose the game mode, round time, bot count, and map. 🔞 Important Notice This game features content intended for a mature audience, including action-packed scenes, violence, or strong language. If you're sensitive to such material, we recommend checking out our other free online games .

title: HOTGEAR
description: HOTGEAR is an online driving game where you race flashy Hot Wheels-like cars through city streets. Tackle action-packed chase missions or cruise in free roam mode and explore the city at your own pace. The driver's seat of a blazing Hotgear car awaits—ignite your tires and take off! 🏎 Controls A or Left Arrow Key: Steer Left D or Right Arrow Key: Steer Right W or Up Arrow Key: Speed S or Down Arrow Key: Slow Down How to Play HOTGEAR Experience the ultimate adrenaline rush! In Missions mode, this driving game challenges you to sprint to the map's destination before rockets slam into your car. A helicopter relentlessly pursues you until you cross the finish line. It launches rockets to blast your Hot Wheel-like car. Weave away from every rocket and reach the goal no matter what! Skip the chases if you want and switch to Free Roam mode. Drift through the city streets with no one on your tail. Explore the city’s day and night scenes as you please. Watch out for the Rockets 🚀 Take on 24 demanding missions in HOTGEAR. In each mission, a helicopter stalks you relentlessly. It fires rockets, aiming to demolish your car. Red signs flare up on the road before rockets strike. Avoid those danger zones to protect your car. The healthier your car, the bigger your paycheck! But let your health bar hit zero, and you’ll need to restart the mission. Unlock New Hotgears 🔓 Unlock new Hot Wheels-like cars with fierce designs and revved engines in the garage. Rake in dollars through missions to claim new rides. Upgrade your vehicle for more power and resilience. Customize your car to perfection and make every chase pulse with even more excitement! Tips & Tricks for HOTGEAR 🎯 Missions are spicy. Buckle up. 🚁 The helicopter is rude. It follows you. 🔴 Red spots mean nope. Do not drive there. 🚘 Keep car health high. More money, yay. 😌 Free roam is chill mode. Just vibe. Developer Lucky Try developed the HOTGEAR. You May Also Like If you enjoy chasing simulators like this, you can also try playing Escape Car ! Police officers are trying to arrest you and chase you with their police cars. Dodge them with drifts, and try not to get busted. For more games, please check out our Driving Games Online category by following the link.

title: Time Shooter 2
description: Imagine a world where time stops until you start moving! Everything around you suddenly pauses if you stand still. These brilliant game mechanics were first introduced by the famous game SuperHot and have been loved by millions of gamers since. GoGoMan combined their unique, funky art style with the game mechanics inspired by SuperHot to create Time Shooter ! When fans of Time Shooter requested a sequel with more maps, levels, and new types of weapons, GoGoMan responded with Time Shooter 2 in March 2022, offering an enhanced game where you can smash enemies to pieces and dodge attacks. With its clever concept and unusual art style, Time Shooter 2 definitely stands apart from other Shoot 'Em All games. Control the flow of time as you strategize your every move. Use your pistol to smash enemies to pieces, fire with a rifle, and take down multiple foes with a gas cylinder explosion. Grab weapons from enemies and throw objects at your opponents. Everything moves in slow motion if you're playing slowly! Controls Move Mouse: Aim WASD: Movement LMB: Pick up / Shoot RMB: Throw How to Play Time Shooter 2 Start from level 1 by pressing start. You'll spawn behind a table with different types of weapons on it. Pick your weapon with the left mouse button. Use WASD to move around. You'll see that foes will come closer as you move. For long-range enemies, use rifles and shotguns. Aim with the mouse and shoot by left-clicking. Use the right mouse button to throw objects (such as rocks, axes, etc.) at enemies. Be careful not to throw any guns with ammo, as they will break and waste all the ammunition. Remember, you can hold only one weapon at a time. When you run out of ammo or throw a weapon, pick up the nearest one to keep going. Tips and Tricks One of the best features of Time Shooter 2 is that you have lots of reaction time when enemies attack if you move slowly. As you progress through the levels, enemies will become better armed and increase in number. So, it's wise to use your weapons based on the enemies' positions. Avoid wasting bullets on close-range enemies and save them for long-range encounters. To clear multiple enemies at once, throw a gas cylinder to create an explosion. Collect weapons from defeated foes if you need them. Developer Time Shooter 2 was developed by GoGoMan , known for creating funny shooter games with quirky characters and unique gameplay mechanics. If you enjoy GoGoMan's style, you can also try You vs 100 Skibidi Toilets , where you face off against a horde of strange toilets in a fast-paced and funny shooter game online. More Games Like This If you enjoy Time Shooter 2, you'll also like Funny Shooter Bro , which brings a humorous twist to the shooter genre with bizarre maps and sound effects. This lighthearted game contrasts relaxing animations with chaotic gameplay for online gamers!

title: Highway Racer Pro
description: For our community, who have played for hours and loved our Highway Traffic game, we know you've been asking us for an even more advanced version for some time. And we're proud to say that we've delivered just that. Ladies and Gentlemen, we are introducing Highway Racer Pro , the ultimate driving-in-traffic game, offering a great gameplay experience that's sure to satisfy even the most demanding drivers. As you drive through heavy traffic, you'll have the same opportunity to cut up cars and make your way to the top as you did before in other traffic games . But this time, we've taken it to the next level with a range of features that will take your gameplay to the extreme. Controls Gas: W or Up Arrow Steer: AD or Left and Right Arrow Keys Brake: S Key or Spacebar Nitro: Left Shift Honk: K Toggle Headlights: L Change Camera: C Pause: Esc What’s new in Highway Racer Pro? First and foremost, we've improved the graphics and sound effects to make them even more realistic . You'll feel like you're right there in the driver's seat, with the sights and sounds of the city coming alive around you. Second, we've expanded the garage with a range of vehicles inspired by real-life brands , giving you even more options to choose from. But what really sets Highway Racer Pro apart is the amount of tuning options available. Whether you want to focus on grip or drift, you'll have the tools at your fingertips to fine-tune your ride and make it your own. And finally, the multiplayer rooms . Now, you'll be able to race against friends and other players from around the world in shared traffic. With realistic traffic scenarios and intense gameplay, Highway Racer Pro will fulfill your fantasies of dominating the road. How to Play Highway Racer Pro To start your dodging in-traffic adventure, first, hop into the garage and choose your ride. You can customize your car to suit your style, whether you're a speed demon or a drifting master. Once you've got your car just right, you're ready to select a road to match your gameplay preferences. Highway Racer Pro offers four unique roads to put your driving skills to the test. One Way : Take it easy and get familiar with the game in this relaxed mode. Two Way : Reverse the direction and earn bigger rewards, but be prepared for increased risk. Time Attack : Show off your skills in this 100-second sprint, performing daring stunts and maneuvers. Speed Bomb : Keep your speed up or risk exploding - it's a road of challenge! Remember, no matter which mode you choose, your goal is to drive as long as possible. You'll be earning coins by performing near-misses, speeding, and driving in the wrong direction. Keep an eye on your health bar at the bottom - collisions will drain it, and when it's gone, your ride ends. Online Multiplayer Racing In the Multiplayer mode of Highway Racer Pro, invite friends to join you in a shared traffic environment. Create a room, pick your car, and compete to see who can master the chaos of this crowded highway. With friends as your rivals, you'll need to stay sharp and focused to come out on top. Grip or Drift? Get under the hood of your car and fine-tune its performance to suit your driving style. Adjust the suspension, camber, and tire settings to boost grip and stability at high speeds. Or, if drifting is your thing, tweak the rear and front heights, spring force, and damp levels to make your car slide like a pro. If you're new to tuning, don't worry - we've got an ultimate guide for tuning to help you get started. Developer Highway Racer Pro was developed by FreezeNova Games Studio . Release Date August 2024

title: Soccer Random
description: Soccer Random is a fun and chaotic two-player soccer game where physics takes over the field! With just one button, you control a team of ragdoll-like players who jump, flip, and kick in unpredictable ways. The objective is to score 5 goals before your opponent. But there's a twist! After each score, the game changes, bringing new fields, weather conditions, and even different types of soccer balls. Controls Computer Press W to jump and kick (Player 1). Press Up Arrow to jump and kick (Player 2). Mobile Tap the on-screen button to jump and kick. How to Play Soccer Random The game begins with two ragdoll soccer players on each team. They are constantly swinging. Press the button to make your players jump and attempt to kick the ball. The physics-based movement makes it tricky but fun! Get the ball into the opponent's net before they score on you. First to 5 goals wins the round. Every round, the field, ball, and even the player models may change, adding a new challenge. Keep scoring to win the match and move on to the next chaotic round! Game Features Play on different fields with changing weather and themes. Kick anything from regular soccer balls to beach balls and more! The unpredictable ragdoll movements make every goal attempt unique. Challenge a friend on the same device and see who can handle the chaos better. Who Created Soccer Random? Soccer Random was developed by RHM Interactive, a studio known for its fun and physics-based sports games. More Ragdoll Games If you love the wild gameplay of Soccer Random, you might enjoy other physics-based sports games like Basket Random and Soccer Masters . Each one offers unpredictable fun with simple controls!

title: Eggy Car
description: Eggy Car is a game easy to control but hard to play. Drive a car along a hilly way while carrying a loose egg. Do not drop the egg, or else you have to start over. This extremely fragile cargo might drive you crazy, so better to drive slow and sure. Collect the coins and power-ups on the way to buy better cars that will make you run towards world records. Beat your own record or challenge your friends. Play Eggy Car for free on OnlineGames.io now! How to Play Eggy Car? Use the right arrow or D key to accelerate and the left arrow or A key to brake. Do not speed up or brake suddenly. Carry the egg safely to the farthest possible point. Vehicles There 5 types of vehicles with prices ranging between 200 to 1000 coins. You can choose between the default car, a racing car, an SUV, a truck, and a bus. Big wheels will ease driving on steep slopes. Power-Ups You will come across 2 different power-ups in Eggy Car: Diamonds freeze the egg for a limited time, and you can enjoy going as fast as possible without consequences. Magnets attract all the coins along the way. Are there any levels in Eggy Car? No, there are no levels in Egg Car. The only aim of the game is to drive and carry the egg as far as possible. Developer Eggy Car was created by BeedoGames. Similar Games If you like Eggy Car, we encourage you to have a look at our massive collection of Driving Games . The best fits for Eggy Car fans might be the ones below: Neon Racer Drift Boss Moto X3M

title: ArmedForces.io
description: Prepare for epic battles! ArmedForces.io is a 3D action game where you will combat enemy forces on various game maps with multiple game mode choices. Arrange your loadouts from eight unique weapons at your disposal. Try to survive among fierce rivals alongside your team or against everyone else. Furthermore, you can customize your arsenal with silencers or weapon sights as you progress in this first-person shooter game ! WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Left-Shift: Run Spacebar: Slide Number Keys: Change Weapons Left-Mouse Button: Fire Right-Mouse Button: Aim E or F: Interact / Pick up a Weapon G: Throw a Dynamite H: Use MedKit T: Chat L: Toggle Cursor Lock C: Crouch N: Show Scoreboard ESC: Pause How to Play ArmedForces.io Start with arranging your loadout from the Equipments section before participating in any online battles in this io game. There are eight weapons of any kind to unlock in this section. You can pick the Micro Mac-10 or the R840. Or, you can choose the SKS. You are free to enter any battle with two different loadouts with these eight options. After grabbing your guns, you are ready for intense battles! You can quickly enter the battling field by clicking the "Battle" button. Choose the game mode you want to play and tap on "Confirm and Play." Whatever path you choose, your main goal in this multiplayer game is survival! Capture the Flag or Bomb Defuse? ArmedForces.io offers you 5 game modes. And each mode has a different purpose. In the Team Deathmatch mode, you will fight against the enemies alongside your team. You will try to be the last soldier standing in the Free For All mode. On the other hand, you need to take the flag from your opponent's area and bring it to your area in Capture the Flag mode. Try to explore each of the given modes in this action game! Team Deathmatch Free for All Capture the Flag Bomb Defuse Gun Game Equipment Section in ArmedForces.io We have listed below what you can find in the equipment section: MP5 Micro Mac-10 R840 AKM SG554 Minimi SKS M40A3 P226 Combat Knife Basic Armor Frag Grenade Syringe Check Your Stats! In the profile section, you can change the nickname and load/save code (only experience can be saved through this code. You can replace your current load code with another one that loads a higher value.) And it will appear the following statistics: Kills Deaths Scores K/D Rate Win Lose W/L Rate Games Played Total Play Time Headshot Counts Knife Kills Assist Counts Developer ArmedForces.io was developed by FreezeNova. Similar Online Games Crazy Strike Force may also be of interest to you. Create a style for your soldier and enter the battling arena with all your might in the game. Use additional skills to eliminate your enemies more powerfully. You may look for the action games online tag on OnlineGames.io for further options. Our community constantly tries to expand its online game range. Keep coming back to discover new and thrilling games!

title: Obby Gym Simulator
description: Getting buff is no easy task, even in the online world, and Obby Gym Simulator proves it. In this gym-prison, players must train hard and stay dedicated to grow stronger; only then can they face powerful monsters and survive. The stronger you get, the closer you are to escaping the prison, so hurry up ⎼ it’s time to hit the gym! Game Overview In this game, players navigate a gym-prison hybrid where the goal is simple: transform yourself from a tiny lifter into a muscle machine. Click your way through endless bicep curls and watch your character grow stronger with every rep. More than just an obstacle course, this game is a true test of patience and endurance. Use different gym machines and activities to bulk up, defeat powerful monsters, unlock helpful items, earn trophies, and ultimately escape the prison. How to Play Obby Gym Simulator? Gameplay Features Muscle Building The muscle-building mechanic is simple: just tap the mouse to perform a bicep curl or use any of the machines to grow stronger. Based on their strength level, players are divided into categories, starting from skinny, to athlete, to jock, and many more. Let’s build some muscles! Move around the gym: WASD / Arrow Keys Jump: SPACE Look around: hold the Right Mouse Button Build muscles: hold the Left Mouse Button Good to Know! Fight the monsters and win trophies: you can fight against different monsters (or so-called bosses) in the game, and if you win, you will be awarded trophies. These trophies can be used to unlock new levels or pets. Each boss is arranged according to your strength, and stronger bosses drop more trophies than weaker ones. Use your companion: pets are used to multiply strength points by a certain amount. The better the pet, the higher the multiplier will be. Each level offers players better and stronger pets that significantly help them grow stronger. Train in style: players who cross the first level gain access to the customization shop, which allows them to trade their strength points for customization options. These include different clothes, hairstyles, wings, and much more. More than that, it also unlocks access to better pets! Sit in the hall of fame! Notable players are proudly displayed on the leaderboard within the first level. This leaderboard is titled “Best players: rebirth.” Maybe one day, when you’re buff enough, your name will also be displayed in the hall of fame. Power up through the levels! Each bicep curl pushes you closer to the next level. Levels are measured by strength, so unlocking a new physical condition won’t cost trophies, but it will make you feel like a newbie again, as every stage raises the difficulty and demands even more power to conquer. Gym Advice Bicep Curls Bicep curls may seem nothing special at first, but they’re the fastest way to gain strength points, especially when you’re still noodle arms. Even later, when you think you’re too cool for them, they still contribute to leveling up. Ads Ads are always a good way to help you level up. Each time players press the ad button, they are rewarded with a certain number of strength points depending on their level. Higher levels reward more points. It’s also an easier option if you’ve grown tired of constant exercise and want a break. Mix & Match Mixing up multiple exercises, from basic bicep curls to running while lifting extra weights, keeps the game interesting and offers new ways to earn strength points. Explore the entire gym and discover different ways to grow stronger, such as watching ads or spinning the lucky wheel. All these activities help keep the game from becoming monotonous. FAQs Is there a stamina mechanic in the game? No, there is no stamina mechanic in the game, because your character can train like a maniac for hours, performing endless bicep curls to get buff. Will customization consume my strength? Yes, customization consumes the player’s accumulated strength points, knocking them down a few levels. So before rushing to customize your character, remember the cost. Is Obby Gym Simulator online? Obby Gym Simulator is an online game that requires an internet connection to play with others. Every player you meet will be a real person from around the world. Is there a way to gain strength points quicker? A good way to gain strength points quickly is by watching ads or spinning the wheel. The points earned from ads vary depending on the player’s strength level, while the wheel gives a random amount of points. Similar Games Even if you are done building your muscles, that does not mean the adventure has to end. Now that you are all built up, you can use your strength to break the rules and find your way to freedom in JailBreak Prison Escape . It’s time to see how strong you really are!

title: OvO
description: You are faced with time! OvO Game is a strategic arcade game that requires stamina. It would help if you had a fast adaptation. Only some people can handle it. If you believe in yourself, come join us! But keep in mind that there are many ups and downs and slides. It comes with dizziness. However, it is well worth it. How to Play the OvO Game? Feel free to use your Arrow keys. Use Arrow Up to move forward Use Arrow Down to move backward Use Arrow Left to move left Use Arrow Right to move right Use the Spacebar to jump Tips and Tricks OvO is a complicated and enjoyable game, but by playing it correctly, you can get more from it. The following hints, techniques, and suggestions will improve your gameplay and make the experience more pleasurable. Learn the controls. Spend a few minutes getting acquainted with the game's rules before playing. Swiping in various directions will be necessary to move the ball and avoid obstacles. Be careful! Many of the barriers in OvO can potentially make you lose the game, so be careful. Plan your movements properly and watch for spikes, fire pits, and other dangers. Use your power-ups. Power-ups are there for you to help you get through a challenging level. They will be helpful for you to use them efficiently. Collect coins. Build your way up to collect the coins in the game, as you may use them to buy a new outfit for your character. What is the OvO Game? OvO is a free online web browser game with arcade mechanics and simple visuals but addictive gameplay. Power-ups Power-ups are another game feature that helps you move through the levels. These power-ups can increase your speed, render you invulnerable, or give you the ability to jump over obstacles. You must strategically use these power-ups in order to accomplish the missions. How many levels are in OvO? There are 7 level differences and 52 levels in total. The journey begins with Basics and continues with Getting Serious, Higher Order, Mechanics, OvO Space Program, Journey through the Portal, and Community Levels, respectively. Each level is getting harder and harder. You will see a variety of obstacles in your way. So, you need to remain firm. How do you dive into the OvO Game? If you want to dive into the OvO, you should press down while running. How do you smash in the OvO Game? You can jump in place while running and press down to smash the ground to pass the transparent areas. Developer OvO was created by Dedra Games. title: Drift City
description: If you'd like to learn drifting techniques, improve them, or test your drifting skills by completing missions, you're in the right spot. Drift City is a browser-based driving game that'll challenge you with diverse missions then reward you with coins and customization cards. Controls Steer: WASD or Arrow Keys Brake: Space Key Change Camera Angle: C Key Telemetry: Y Key How to Play Drift City Start by selecting a car from the garage and customize it. Your options will be limited with the initial 25,000 coins and 5 tuning cards at your account. Spend them as you like in garage to get ready for the missions. Then, pick a game mode to rack up your coins and unlock new vehicles or upgrade your car even further: Crash Mode: Destroy all the marked bricks on the road before time runs out. 7 levels of difficulty are available with handsome rewards. Career Mode: Take on seasonal challenges like Classic Drift, Perfect Drift, and Flag Capture to earn stars and advance through three seasons. There are main missions and additional ones in each challenge that will reward you with coins or tuning cards. Some of the missions are as follows: Get 250 drift points without interruption, max 3 crashes, capture 6 flags and more. The time limit shortens as you progress across seasons. Free Run: Explore any of the four unique city maps: Port City, Snow City, Province, and Business City. Explore at your own pace. You can also complete the missions available on each map to multiply your earnings. Tuning Cards Earn tuning cards from loot boxes and daily rewards to upgrade and customize your vehicle. You can polish your car's look in the customization section and improve performance in the upgrade section. Customization Section: Install spoilers, add tinting to windows, change the colors of your car, swap rims, add neon lights or a colorful smoke. Each purchase requires one tuning card. Upgrade Section: Improve your car's engine, turbine, mass and tires up to 5th level. You can use your coins instead of tuning cards to upgrade the car parts. Developer Drift City was developed by MeyaGames. More Drift Games If you like the concept and gameplay of Drift City, next play Burnout Racers and enjoy a wide array of tuning options plus multiplayer rooms.OnlineGames.io is the perfect place to inhale the smell of burning tires! Let the drift begin!

title: Steal Car Duel
description: Steal Car Duel is an online Italian brainrot game where you collect valuable cars at your base. While hunting for new vehicles, you need to protect your base from thieves. Open your eyes wide shut! Your precious garage will attract other players. We suggest keeping the protection lasers active at all times in this Roblox-inspired world! 🚗 Controls 1 Player WASD Keys: Move Space: Jump E: Steal/Buy LMB or F: Hit Left-Shift: Sprint 2 Player Arrow Keys: Move L: Jump O: Steal/Buy K: Hit J: Sprint Steal Car Duel Overview After customizing your Roblox-like character, you are ready to collect cars in your garage. There will be cars on the red carpet moving forward. Start buying the simple ones first. The vehicles you collect will make you money every second. Use your money to invest in more upgraded vehicles. Besides creating a whole new garage, you must be cautious about the heists! When the protection bar goes off, your garage will be defenseless. The Garage Base 🔧 Build your garage with fantastic vehicles. Start by collecting standard cars, then work your way up to the premium ones. As you get more advanced cars, you will be able to earn more money through them. Here is the rule: The higher the vehicle's class, the more money you earn! Classes of the cars are as follows: Standard Custom Street Track Premium Watch for the Heists 🚨 Your precious garage will be under the threat of other players! The protection bar gets active for 60 seconds. After this time period, the bar goes off, and you will be defenseless. They may raid your premium cars. If any rival tries to steal your car, approach them and press LMB. It will automatically drop the car. To reactivate the protection, go to the yellow protection area in your garage! Developer gameVgames developed Steal Car Duel. More Games Like This Steal Brainrot Duel is another game that you can enjoy playing. In the game, collect funny brainrot characters in your base. Or, you can steal from others! For more Italian Brainrot games , feel free to follow the given link. Keep coming back to explore new thrilling games!

title: Mega Shark
description: Mega Shark is an online adventure game in which you act as a wild shark! Explore the deep sea and hunt for delicious fish. Try to survive for 60 seconds to move to the next stage. Eat as many fish as you can while wandering around the sea full of dangers, just like in the 1980s Jaws movie directed by Steven Spielberg. Watch out, not all fish are food for you! 🐟 Controls Hold & drag the mouse to control the shark. Press the left mouse button to attack. On smartphones and tablets, swipe to control the shark and press on the virtual button to attack. How to Play Mega Shark Ready for hunting? Play as a big shark under the deep sea and eat fish to get bigger in size. As you get bigger, you can hunt wild creatures in the deepest waters. In each round, you will have 60 seconds to survive in this survival game. You must hunt as many fish as you can in this timeframe. However, you need to be cautious! Because not all fish are afraid of this mega shark. Some sea creatures may hunt you if they are bigger than you. Don’t be prey for them while hunting. Watch out for the Explosives 💥 Besides the fish, there are many mines under the sea. If your shark comes into contact with the mines, they will explode, and the mega shark loses the game. So, you must avoid the mines while maneuvering your wild animal. Stay away from the fish swimming near these explosives for your benefit. Upgrade the Mega Shark 🦈 As you successfully finish each round, you will get trophies and coins. You can use your coins to upgrade your predator’s power, speed and protection abilities. From the main menu, click on the relevant buttons on the screen to enhance your shark. This way, you can hunt with much more power! Developer Inlogic Software developed the Mega Shark. You May Also Like If you enjoyed playing Mega Shark, you may also try playing Duck Life Adventure . Train the little duckling so that it can be a real adventurer! Moreover, feel free to visit our Adventure Games Online category, which we created especially for our players.

title: M5 City Driver
description: M5 City Driver is a 3D driving game that allows you to drive a BMW M5 on the neon-lit city streets. Collect money by accepting drift and stunt challenges, and customize your sports vehicle as you wish. Explore the city map day & night with your puppy sitting next to you. Try not to kill pedestrians while driving to avoid police chases in this exhilarating car game! 🚘 Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Drive/Steer/Move Spacebar: Brake Mouse Orbit: Look Around C Key: Change Camera View E Key: Enter/Exit Car Left-Shift: Activate Nitro/Run M5 City Driver Overview Get in the driver's seat of your BMW M5 vehicle, and take your puppy with you! The neon-lit city map lets you take day & night car rides through its shiny streets. Besides cozy car rides, you can engage in various missions in different modes and earn money. Use the money to customize your sports vehicle to your tastes, and remember to refuel its tank. Additionally, keep in mind that if you hit a pedestrian while driving your car, the police will chase after you! Game Modes in M5 City Driver Drift Mode Drift Mode allows you to engage in specific drift challenges. After activating the drift mode, you will see that there are drift trigger points on the roads. If you enter these points with the score required, you will earn a great amount of in-game currencies. Do your best, and perform the longest drift! Stunt Mode Stunt Mode requires you to reach a specific speed while entering designated speed trigger points. Hit the gas, drive at the highest speeds possible, and earn money through speed challenges. You can also perform stunts by using the ramps on the roads. Feel free to do the craziest car stunts ever with your precious M5! Kill Mode Kill Mode gives you a task that demands driving over targeted pedestrians with your car. However, you should not get caught, no matter what happens. Beat the score, avoid police cars, and get your payment through kill challenges! Police Mode Police Mode consists of police challenges in which you have to escape from the police cars chasing you. You must dodge the police with your car within a limited time. When you beat the timer and manage to escape, you will earn points and credits! Developer Fuego! Games published M5 City Driver. You May Also Like Vice City Driver is another driving game that matches your preferences. Play as Tommy Vercetti and drive your Ferrari-like sports car around the city. title: Hill Climb Racing Scratch
description: Are you ready to tackle steep hills? Hill Climb Racing Scratch is a 2D driving game where you are in charge of controlling a car on a track with many ups and downs . You must steer your vehicle artfully on this bumpy road . Your vehicle can be a blue motorcycle or a red car. Choose your favorite one among your two options and hit the road, Jack! Collect the score points to be the top driver on the leaderboard in this car game. Controls Right Arrow Key: Accelerate or Rotate counterclockwise Left Arrow Key: Brake or Rotate Clockwise V Key: Swap Vehicles and Level Overview of Hill Climb Racing Scratch This racing game will test your car driving skills to the utmost with its difficult roads. No matter what, you can't let any hill or pothole affect your steering ability! If you lose your control, your driver's neck can be broken by hitting the ground. Your first duty is to drive in a controlled manner to move safely on the road. The second one is to collect the score points on the way. Strive to break your highest record each time you set off the track in this driving game! Rotate in the Air If you drive through any pothole or hill too fast, your car will tend to rotate. You can flip over vehicle by steering left or right while in the air. You must learn how to balance your vehicle to master performing rotations. If you manage to flip over successfully, you will get bonus points . However, keep in mind that you can't let your driver's neck get broken while trying to take all these actions. Otherwise, you will get back to the beginning! Take Gasoline Cans You must also be careful not to run out of gas in your car in order to take the longest distance in these difficult conditions. Keep checking the green fuel bar on the upper left corner of the screen. But don't worry! You will come across many gasoline cans on the road. When you take them, you will see that the fuel bar will fill up. Don't pass by without taking any petrol that you see. What is the best car in Hill Climb Racing Scratch? There are two vehicles to pick at your disposal: a blue motorcycle and a red car. You don't need to unlock any of them. Both are available, and they have the same power. Press the V key to switch between them. Developer Griffpatch developed Hill Climb Racing Scratch. What is More? You may also try playing Crazy Karts . You need to drive your kart vehicle in an arena full of other karts. Collect the gift boxes and get the necessary weapons to shoot your rivals, whether real players or AI bots. For additional options, look for other car games on OnlineGames.io. Please share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below! We want to hear from you.

title: Free City Drive
description: Free City Drive is a car simulator that allows you explore the open roads. Take control of your car and begin to drive in the virtual world. With complete freedom you can have maximum speed. Select a car and modify the following parts : • Color • Plate • Spoiler Game Modes • Free Drive • Missions and Events - Complete all 30 missions and gain prizes. • Test Area and Entertainment Free City Drive Controls : • WASD to control car • Left Shift to use nitro • Space for handbrake • Escape or Tab to toggle pause • C to change camera

title: Car Football
description: Are you ready to breathe new life into football? Car Football is a 2 player car game where you can kick a goal to the opponent's side with your favorite monster truck. There are 6 cars listed for you, two available in the first place. To open the rest, you need to earn coins via the games you have played. How to Play Car Football? It is very simple to play Car Football. Use the W key or the Upper arrow key to jump. Use the A key or the Left arrow key to move backward. Use the D key or the Right arrow key to move forward. What is Car Football? Car Football is a 2-player car game with 30 levels to achieve. Playing with a friend always makes the game more fun. Each game lasts two minutes. To win a match, you can modify the vehicle's speed at any time and make it jump in the air to reach the ball. Try to hinder your opponent's movements by blocking them! How to win gold coins in Car Football? To win gold coins in the game, you must score as many goals as possible in the opponent's zone within the given time. For each goal, you get 10 gold coins. With these coins, you can buy yourself new cars. But remember that you can not get coins if you lose. Can I play Car Football with my friend? You can play Car Football with your friend on the same device. Player 1 Controls : Use the W key to jump Use the A key to move backward Use the D key to move forward Player 2 Controls : Use the Upper arrow key to jump Use the Left arrow key to move backward Use the Right arrow key to move forward Additionally, you can select the location of your game when you play with your friend. There are five different environments that you can choose from. Tips and Tricks Here are a few tips to make your job easier while playing the game. The more you prevent your vehicle from turning over, the better for you. Because during your inactivity, you allow your opponent to score a goal in your area. Shooting too hard can hinder the goal score. It is best to adjust the shot intensity according to the distance to the opponent's goal. To slow down the ball's velocity, try to catch the ball by making the car jump. Similar Games If you enjoy Car Football, take the fun further by playing Crazy Car Arena . For more games with duo player option, look up 2 Player Games .

title: Cake Match Puzzle
description: Cake Match Puzzle is an addictive free game where you become a bakery chef. You’ll play with cake slices on a 4x4 tray, merging them to create full cakes. The goal is simple: make as many cakes as possible before you run out of moves. It’s all about strategy, smart placement, and a little bit of luck! Match slices, clear space, and keep the tray from filling up. With six types of cakes to complete and colorful visuals, you’ll have a blast stacking your way to delight. Controls Use your mouse to play How to Play Cake Match Puzzle Drag and drop slices onto the tray. Matching slices merge into larger pieces. Get six slices together to make a full cake! Full cakes disappear, freeing up space for more slices. Watch out for mixed plates with slices from two different cakes—they’ll test your skills! If the tray fills up, it’s game over. The more cakes you complete, the more coins you earn. Use those coins to unlock upgrades, adding cool toppings and decorations to your cakes. It’s as satisfying as it sounds! Don’t forget to log in daily and spin the wheel for awesome rewards. Coins, boosters, or even exclusive cake designs could be yours! Boosters to Save the Day Stuck? No problem! Use these boosters: Hammer: Smash a slice to clear some room. Filler: Instantly finish a nearly complete cake. Reroll: Swap your current slices for a fresh batch. Developer FreezeNova is the creator of this sweet puzzle game. What Are Match Games? Match games are all about pairing or grouping similar items to achieve a goal, like clearing space, earning points, or completing objects. They’re popular because they combine puzzle mechanics with creativity and a bit of luck. Plus, they offer a rewarding and relaxing gameplay experience. These games come in many themes—candies, gems, cakes, or even plants—each giving players that satisfying “aha!” moment when matches align perfectly. If you already feel overwhelmed with the burden of the daily chores, playing a relaxing merge game for free might help you deal with stress. In Cake Match Puzzle, matching cake slices into full cakes is especially satisfying, especially with all the delightful designs. Pro Tips for Match Games Plan a few moves ahead to avoid running out of space in your tray Prioritize larger combinations for more rewards. Place small pieces on the edges to keep the center open. Regularly make matches to free up space and clear the board. Set up chains by aiming for moves that trigger multiple matches in a row. Deal with blockers or mixed pieces quickly. Use boosters only when absolutely necessary. Otherwise, save them for later! Take your time to spot the best moves. More Match Games Love the merging fun in Cake Match Puzzle? Dive into other merge games like Sweet Sugar Match or explore more puzzles that challenge your strategy skills. Match games are all about finding joy in simple yet creative gameplay so they are perfect for players of all ages!

title: Crazy Motorcycle
description: If Minecraft ever had a wild cousin who ditched mining for motorbikes, Crazy Motorcycle would be it. In this crazy bike game, you'll take a Minecraft-style noob (we call him Nubik), give him a shiny motorcycle, and drop into a floating obstacle course in the sky. There are no roads, no rules, and definitely no safety rails. Just pure blocky platformer. That's the energy this game brings. It's almost like a kid built a racetrack in creative mode, added a few too many stone walls and trees, and then dared you to race through it with a bike. You'll recognize the pixelated grass blocks, chunky trees, mossy stone pillars, ice blocks and floating islands. Even though the theme feels like it's pulled straight out of a Minecraft server, there's no building or mining mode here. Your job is to dodge, jump, and reach the red portal at the end of the level. And there's something extra funny about seeing this square-headed daredevil wipe out in the most dramatic ways. So start playing Crazy Motorcycle now, and then you'll want to play again and again. Controls PC: Move: W / A / S / D or Arrow Keys Jump: Spacebar Mobile: Use the on-screen joystick and buttons to steer and jump. How to Play Crazy Motorcycle Your mission is to drive the noob to the red portal block without crashing. Each level is a floating track in the sky. If you fall off, you'll start from the last flag. You'll face tight turns, sudden jumps, moving obstacles and a forest of stone pillars and trees. Drive carefully without crashing your bike. The red target cube marks your finish line. Touch it to complete the level and unlock the next challenge. Developer Crazy Motorcycle is a browser-based platformer game built by AM-Games. If you've played other "Noob" or voxel racing titles, you'll feel right at home. The developers focused on making a challenging but playful experience with short levels and instant retries. More Platformer Games You'll Love If Crazy Motorcycle grabbed your attention, try Obby But You're on a Bike . It's another sky adventure where you ride and jump and try not to fall off platforms. But this time, it has a Roblox-inspired theme instead of Minecraft. Perfect if you enjoy stunt games with a side of comedy.

title: Pixelmon Town
description: Pixelmon Town is an online sandbox game inspired by Minecraft. With your unlimited material options, you are invited to create your own world and build whatever you desire, whether it is a castle or a warm home! Dig, carve and build structures with various blocks ranging from stone to gold. Choose Flatgrass or Vanilla maps, then start breaking blocks and building your dreamy world! 🔨 Controls WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump Mouse: Look Around LMB: Break Blocks RMB: Place Blocks Left-Shift: Sprint B Key: Open Inventory T Key: Open Chat Z Key: Fly 1-9 Number Keys: Select Items Pixelmon Town Overview In Pixelmon Town, you can find everything that you search for in the Creative Mode of Minecraft Classic. Start playing by choosing your favorite game map: Flatgrass or Vanilla. Flatgrass has plain land, enabling you to build structures without needing to destroy unnecessary blocks on the field. Vanilla features a map with hills, forests and lakes. Whichever map you choose, find a nice spot and begin building the most creative buildings with dozens of blocks at your disposal! Dig and Build ⛏ Dig and empty the area you want to build structures on, choose the blocks among 58 unique ones, and place them to create the most splendid structures. You can break blocks using the left mouse button and place blocks using the right mouse button. There are no restrictions or limits in this Minecraft game. Let your creativity shine on the blocks! Do not forget to save the level so you can easily come back. You can save it by clicking on the ESC key and then pressing the “Save Level” button. Safe Area 🏳 In both maps, there are no hostile creatures or Minecraft mobs that can attack you. You can feel totally safe in this sandbox game! This is why there is no weapon in your inventory. You will not need any sword or pickaxe to guard yourself in any case. Without the pressure of being threatened, you can feel at ease to dig, carve and build structures with your creativity. Just imagine it, and do it. You can easily reach your inventory by pressing the B Key. Tips & Tricks for Pixelmon Town 🐦 Press Z to fly and build high places easily. ⚡ Use Flatgrass to start building faster. 🌲 Choose Vanilla for hills, lakes and forests. 🧐 Plan your build before you start. 🎨 Mix different blocks for better designs. Developer FreezeNova developed Pixelmon Town. Similar Minecraft Games If you like playing Pixelmon Town , you may also give DuckCraft a chance! Engage in multiplayer modes to play with other players from around the world, or enter the single-player modes to play by yourself. For more options, feel free to reach our Minecraft Games Online category at the link.

title: Steal Brainrot Eggs
description: Steal Brainrot Eggs is a steal-a-brainrot game where you collect eggs into your base to get precious Italian Brainrot characters. Buy surprise eggs, wait for them to crack and get your silly brainrot. Each character you collect earns you idle money, with which you can buy new rare ones. Be the first billionaire in this version of Steal a Brainrot Roblox! You can also challenge yourself with a friend of yours in the 2-player mode.🐣 Controls Player 1 WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump E Key: Buy / Steal LMB or F Key: Attack Left-Shift: Sprint Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move L Key: Jump O Key: Buy / Steal K Key: Attack J Key: Sprint How to Play Steal Brainrot Eggs In this steal-a-brainrot game, you need to collect surprise eggs instead of classic Brainrot characters! Put the eggs to hatch in your base, and wait for them to crack. You will get random Italian Brainrots emerging from eggshells. You might get the most expensive characters, or simpler ones. It depends on your luck! Begin by collecting common eggs and start earning coins. Make your way to the epic and legendary ones as you progress. Keep checking your base while collecting eggs since the raiders are everywhere! Surprise Eggs 🥚 The most enjoyable part of this steal-a-brainroat is the surprise eggs. Even the common eggs can surprise you with a precious Italian Brainrot. You can pay an egg for 250 coins, but the character you get might be worth 10K coins! Show some patience and wait for the hatching process. You can wander around and collect golden tickets while waiting for your egg to crack. Make sure that your base is under protection. Customize Your Obby 👑 When you earn a significant amount of money from your Italian Brainrots, you can customize your Obby character from the Customization section. As you know, Obby loves to show off. Put on glamorous clothes, and get shining wings to show everyone how wealthy you are. You can also get a mascot that follows you wherever you go. Mascots look cute and silly. Tips & Tricks for Steal Brainrot Eggs 🤩 Start with small eggs. Small egg, big surprise. 🧐 Check your base a lot. Thieves love free eggs. 🤑 Save your coins. Being broke is not cool. 👀 Steal smart. First look, then grab fast. 💎 Dress fancy later. Eggs come before dripping. Developer gameVgames developed the Steal Brainrot Eggs. Similar Games If you enjoy playing Steal Brainrot Eggs, you may also try Catch a Fish Obby ! Collect the Brainrot sea creatures in your base, and turn your base into a money-making machine. Additionally, you can check out our free online Brainrot games by following the link. Keep coming back to discover newly added games!

title: Ping Pong Air
description: Ping Pong Air is a 3D sports game where you play table tennis. You will control a bat to serve the ball. After the opening, use your bat cleverly and try not to lose any chance to catch the ball! The first person who scores 11 is the winner. Let’s see who is the absolute table tennis master. 🎾 Controls Control the bat with your mouse. Ping Pong Air Overview Time to get to the tennis table with this arcade game! Pick up your tennis bat and start playing. You can control your bat by moving the mouse left and right. You and your opponent will receive the ball in order. The one who drops the ball from the table wins a score. If you manage to reach 11 scores, you will be the winner! You can unlock new bats as you make progress. You can also get new bats using your earned crystal balls. Hit the Target 🎯 In the Challenge mode, you can practice by trying to hit the targets. There are no opponents here. Just you and the CPU, which automatically sends the ball. When you hit a target, its location will change. Keep your eyes wide open and aim precisely to score the most points in this endless mode. Halloween Haunt 👻 Keep the Halloween spirit alive! In the Halloween Haunt mode, you will try to banish spirits on the tennis table. However, it will not be easy as the ghost, the spider, the coffin, the pumpkin and the bat (the animal one) constantly move in one way or another. Hit them with the ball, and they will disappear one by one! Developer GamePush developed the Ping Pong Air. Similar Sports Games Golf Orbit is another game that you can enjoy playing! In the game, your goal is to hit the ball farther with each shot. To view more games, check out our online sports games by following the link. There are dozens of free online games at your disposal on onlinegames.io !

title: Obby Prison Escape
description: Welcome, brave escape artist! Obby Prison Escape is an online parkour game where the world's most secure prison meets the universe's most insecure guard: Barry! Today's the day the prisoner Noob has been waiting for. Barry, the not-so-clever guard of the jail, has taken over the watch. He's more likely to spill his coffee than to notice your escape plan! Noob's mission, should you choose to accept it, involves navigating through a labyrinth of hilarious, hair-raising parkour levels in the prison. Help Noob in the obby breaking away from Barry's prison! Controls For PC: Arrow keys: Move around Mouse: Look around Space: Jump Tab: Open options C: Change character V: Skip stage On phones: Use the virtual joystick and on-screen buttons for movement and actions. How to Play Obby Prison Escape Noob's jailbreak is not just a stroll in the park; it's a full-blown parkour marathon filled with jumps, slides, and maybe even a moonwalk or two (with a bit of exaggeration). Each level is designed with unique obstacles you haven't even seen in Shawshank Redemption. From ventilation shafts to sewage tunnels, you'll find yourself in situations where Noob's agility is the only key to freedom. It's okay if Noob falls over spikes or lava; you can continue from the last checkpoint. Don't forget to collect coins along the way to unlock cooler skins and costumes. After all, Noob can't walk around outside in a prison jumpsuit, right? Grab him a proper pair of jeans and a leather jacket for his big escape. Reach the grand finale by skillfully navigating the Noob on obby. It's not just about getting out; it's about doing it with style. Plus, Barry might wave at you, mistaking your escape for a friendly flyover. Customize Avatar As you collect coins, why not jazz up your avatar? You can customize Noob's body part an save him from being such a noob guy! Body: From beefy to breezy, get the physique that screams "I can outrun Barry!" Clothes: Dress to impress or to camouflage. Want to blend in with the prison walls? There's a brick suit for that. Or dress up as a prison guard instead. Hairstyle & Hair Color: Whether you're going for the 'just escaped' look or the 'I've been planning this for years', your hair can reflect your escape strategy. Face: Customize Noob's expression for that perfect escape photo. After all, you might want to look good for the newspaper when they report your escape. More Parkour Games Obby Prison Escape is a Roblox-like game that allows you to customize, jump, slide, and fly your way out of Barry's Prison. If you'd like to play a similar parkour game, Only Up Obby might get your attention!

title: Dragon World
description: Experience the life of the dragon in the natural world. Spread your wings and fly high over the fantastic landscapes in Dragon World . When it's battle time, prepare to shoot with flames any enemy. Learn how to survive the battle, but before that, let's see the dragons you can choose. How to play Dragon World? First, you need to create a room or join other players' rooms. Enter a room name and decide if it will be private or not. Choose the maximum number of players that can join. You can have 20 players at most. Choose the modes between explore, DM, TDM, and Batlle Royale. Select a map: Draze Isle, Kutuma Lake or Myst Swamp. Then start the journey with your scary dragon. Check your level, experience, total kills, and coins on the main menu. Keep coming back, and remember to collect your daily reward. While playing, keep an eye on your kill feed (displayed on top left, controls (bottom corners), town map (top right). Controls WASD or arrow keys to move the dragon Space tab to fly up Left shift for sprint Q to jump C to fly down R to dodge Shift + left mouse click for breathing fire Left mouse click to throw fireballs Right mouse click for melee attack T to chat M to show map Esc, tab for pause menu Which dragons can I choose in Dragon World? There are 8 dragons you can choose from in Dragon World. Each has its own great specialties. As you progress in the game and level up, you will be able to try them all. Some might require hard work to acquire them, such as Chivi the Dragonlord or Uldross Lord of Fire. The dragons, by their full appellations, are Soteonth The Warrior, Fyminth The Chosen, Gossalo Eater of Sheep, Piessierth The Eternal One, Marvolth The White One, Zosass The Tiran, Chivi The Dragonlord, Uldross Lord of Fire. Developer Dragon World is created by FreezeNova. Similar Games We have multiple dragon games. Search for dragon or browse our Adventure Games for more games like Dragon World.

title: Hidden Objects
description: Hidden Objects is an online puzzle game with its rich content and visually stunning graphics. This game will take you to completely different parts of the world! You must find all hidden objects as you explore beautifully detailed scenes. When all the hidden objects are found within a level, what would be the next geographical region? Controls Click on : to Find Objects How to Play Hidden Objects In each level, you will find yourself in the most beautiful scenes of the world. The first scene where hidden objects are found is during the Christmas season in the United States of America. You need to find pine tree decorations, Santa Claus ornaments, and deer-shaped cookies. Unlike other hidden object games, it won’t be easy here! Keep your eyes peeled and find every hidden item. Check the Numbers of the Objects There is a panel at the bottom of the screen. You will see the hidden objects that need to be found there. Also, you will see numbers written under each item. These numbers indicate how many of that object you need to find. You should find them all without exception to proceed to the next scene! Use the Hint In the case of struggling to find a specific object, you can use the hint option. However, keep in mind that you have limited hint options. We suggest you use them cleverly. Because the following levels will get harder to find items, each scene will test your observation skills! Playing this game will help you sharpen your perception without any doubt. The Stunning Scenes The scenes of Hidden Objects are truly very special. They have visually stunning graphics. We’ll list some of these scenes below for you! Notre-Dame de Paris Bodiam Castle Brooklyn Paris Hawaii Venice Grand Kanyon Maldives Developer Hidden Objects is published by TapNation. What is More? Did you like playing Hidden Objects? Let’s dive into the world of Hidden Objects: Brain Teaser . Locate five essential items in a messy place by channeling your Sherlock Holmes personality to this cozy game! For further online puzzle games , check out our game library by following the given link. There are dozens of free online games at your disposal on OnlineGames.io .

title: Draw Bridge Puzzle
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle is an online puzzle game with two game modes: Car Mode and Save Mode. In both game modes, you need to draw a specific object to accomplish the given task by using your puzzle-solving skills. Keep in mind that the tasks vary in every level, ranging from rescuing your stickman from getting hit by lightning to saving him from the hands of devils! 🧩 Controls Left Mouse Button: To Draw On Mobile Devices: Tap & drag to draw objects. Draw Bridge Puzzle Overview In Draw Bridge Puzzle, your main goal is to draw safe paths and complete thrilling rescue missions. Use your logic to help the stickman reach the final point with his motorbike in the Car Mode. Or, try to save him from possible dangers by drawing objects in the Save Mode. If you feel ready, choose your desired game mode, and join our stickman’s puzzle adventure in this challenging puzzle game! Game Modes in Draw Bridge Puzzle Car Mode In the Car Mode levels, your stickman rides a motorbike. However, there are gaps on the road that can make the stickman fall. Use your logic to draw a bridge so the stickman can cross safely. Make sure that the bridge is strong enough to carry the motorbike and the stickman! Save Mode In the Save Mode levels, you need to complete thrilling rescue missions. There are dangers in each level that can hurt the stickman. Save your stickman by drawing a strong object in accordance with the situation he is in by using your puzzle-solving skills! Developer Draw Bridge Puzzle is developed by PuzzleGame.Com. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing puzzle games like this, you may also give Pixel Path a chance! In Pixel Path, guide your pixelated hero through 50 challenging obstacle courses and reach the portal at the end. For more options, check out our free online puzzle games on www.onlinegames.io. Bookmark this website in your browser to easily come back!

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 5: Elements
description: Think of an indie game with endless replayability—a game that shaped a generation's childhood memories and taught millions the importance of teamwork. Yes, we're talking about Fireboy and Watergirl . Fireboy and Watergirl 5: Elements takes the popular duo on a new adventure filled with puzzles that require teamwork. Throughout 62 great levels , you'll learn valuable life lessons about teamwork (or simply discover how your partner reacts under pressure :D), while enjoying a fantastic game. The levels are set in temples themed after different elements , and the game introduces a new set of obstacles and mechanics. Players control both characters, using Fireboy's ability to pass through lava and Watergirl's power to move through water. From levers and boxes to light sensors and crystal teleporters, each puzzle requires complex problem-solving skills and cooperation. Controls Computers Move Fireboy: Arrow keys Move Watergirl: W, A, S, D keys Mobiles Tap and swipe controls for movement On-screen button to switch characters How to Play Fireboy and Watergirl Elements Guide Fireboy and Watergirl through temples by solving puzzles and avoiding hazards. Fireboy can walk on lava, while Watergirl can move through water, but none can walk through green goo. Most of the puzzles require both characters to interact with the environment by moving boxes, activating switches, or reflecting light with mirrors. If you're playing solo (yes, it's doable), you'll need to switch between characters to progress through each level. Regular levels include optional red and blue diamonds to collect, while white diamond levels require players to find a specific white diamond to proceed. Elemental Temples In the fifth game, developer Oslo Albet introduces us to the 7 great temples. Forest Temple: Both characters should move cooperatively to finish levels. Tools and obstacles are the same with the other FBWG games: Lava, lake, goo, boxes, and switches. This temple contains 10 levels. Fire Temple: In this temple, Fireboy is completely free to move around. It's all lava. So he will assist Watergirs by carrying boxes and toggling switches to help her overcome lots of obstacles on her way. Fire Temple has 8 levels. Water Temple: Tables are turned in the Water Temple. This time, WAtergirl can go everywhere in the level as there are many lakes. She'll help and guide Fireboy to the end gate. Water Temple contains 9 levels. Light Temple: Lights activate things in the level. Characters will use mirrors to redirect light and open gates or activate switches in levels. Light Temple has 9 levels in total. Ice Temple: The ice obstacle comes in the temple. Fireboy can slide quickly on ice but can't climb snowy slopes; meanwhile, Watergirl can walk through water and climb snow but is slowed by ice. This temple introduces melting and freezing lights players can utilize. There are 9 levels in total. Wind Temple: In this, characters will use wind blowers to reach higher spots. But the wind also block their path sometimes. This mechanic creates both an advantage and blockage in the levels, which players should master by using it. Wind Temple has 8 levels. Crystal Temple: In Cyristal Temple, both characters can use portals to teleport to different spots on the level. However, some of the portals need to be activated with switches. 9 levels are available in this temple. Editor's Note Fireboy and Watergril brings back my childhood memories of when me and my sister used to huddle together in front of our old, chunky desktop. Back then, we would spend hours—sometimes giggling and other times bickering—as we tackled every level we could find online. On a deeper level, Fireboy and Watergirl is a game that beautifully illustrates the power of cooperation. We know that each of us has our own strengths and weaknesses, but when we combine a weakness with someone else's strength, we create a powerful synergy. It's a reminder that no mission is impossible when we work together. To this day, Fireboy and Watergirl has captured the hearts of many and been the reason for falling in love with gaming. We're both proud and excited to introduce you to the fifth installment of the series, available for free on OnlineGames.io. We hope you enjoy playing the game as much as I and my sister enjoyed it years ago! Developer Fireboy and Watergirl 5: Elements was developed by Oslo Albet. This fifth game of the series was released in January 2019. Other Games of the Series You can also access prior games of the FBWG series on OnlineGames.io. Reach the other games using the links below and please let us know which one is your favorite in the comment section down below. Fireboy and Watergirl 1: The Forest Temple Fireboy and Watergirl 2: The Light Temple Fireboy and Watergirl 3: The Ice Temple

title: Pixel Survival
description: Pixel Survival is an online pixelated browser game similar to Minecraft's survival mode. In Pixel Survival, you have to survive in the wild, the unknown world. You will be in the jungle, and you have water, food and weapons at your disposal. The challenge will be to shoot the zombies coming for you. How to Play Pixel Survival? Before you start playing, you must select a level and character. You can have a quick training to get used to controls in Training Mode. Select SandBox mode to explore without concerns. Or else, you choose Zombie Land and will have to overcome numerous challenges. Each character has its own toolset. For example, Policeman spawns with a gun while the farmer has a farming tool.
