Sports Girl has everything necessary. Try Salaryman, Medic, Sports Girl, Farmer or Policeman and decide who suits your personality more. You can see the percentage for drink, food and life on the left screen. Eat and drink enough to provide energy for the character. Choose between equipment on the bottom of your screen. Pixel Survival Controls WASD or arrow keys to move Left mouse click to shoot Right mouse click to aim I or E to open inventory F for picking things Tab for score Spacebar to jump Shift to run P or Esc to pause the game Developer Pixel Survival is created by FreezeNova. More Games Like This Browse our Pixel Games or Minecraft Games to try many games like Pixel Survival.

title: Riddle Transfer
description: Riddle Transfer is a Flash game created by JonBro as a spin-off to the point-and-click adventure game series Riddle School. It was released on June 6th, 2011. As in the previous games in the series, Phil Eggtree’s escape adventures are inspired by Tom Fulp’s Flash game Pico’s School. After Phil destroys the red alien Viz while returning to Earth in Diz's spaceship, the FBI agents intercept and arrest him and his friends. They are brought to Zone 5.1, where you must explore, follow speech bubbles, and solve puzzles to help Phil save his friends and escape. 👽 Controls Left Mouse Button: To Interact Click & Drag: Combine Items How to Play Riddle Transfer In Riddle School 5, Phil destroys Viz. While they are heading to Earth in Diz’s spaceship, it gets controlled and brought to Zone 5.1. FBI agents arrest the kids and Diz, imprisoning them in the zone. Phil wakes up and finds himself locked in his cell. He needs to find a way out of the cell and rescue his friends, Phred Whistler, Smiley Sundae, and Zach Kelvin. Start by exploring Phil’s cell and looking for useful items. Carefully read Phil's speech bubbles to get hints that may help. Search Phil’s Cell 🔍 The code displayed on the TV screen is Phil’s cell escape password. However, Phil’s arm can’t reach the dial pad to enter the code. Explore his cell by clicking on every object you see. Open your eyes wide; there might be things that can help. Carefully read what Phil says next. Gamie has something to tell you: “Check the area around the toilet thoroughly. The item that will be useful to you is hidden here.” After successfully exiting the cell, Phil needs to rescue Phred, Smiley, Zach, and Diz! Find the Elevator Key 🔑 The cells of Phred, Smiley, Zach and Diz are in different parts of Zone 5.1. To rescue his friends, Phil needs to find the elevator key. After escaping the cell, guide Phil to the storage room on the right side of his cell. Search the storage room well to find the key. It is hidden under some objects. Click everything, open every box and try to locate it. Once you find the key, use the elevator and visit each floor. You need to overcome obstacles and solve puzzles to save the kids on every floor you visit! Tips & Tricks for Riddle Transfer 🖱️ Click everything. Yes, even the weird toilet. Especially the weird toilet. 🧠 If you see a code, remember it. Your brain is your best inventory slot. 🗽 Rescue Phil’s friends fast. Nobody likes waiting in FBI jails. 👁️‍🗨️ Pay attention to hints. The game whispers secrets. Listen carefully. 🤔 Stay curious. Curiosity did not hurt Phil. It saved him. Developer Riddle Transfer is a Flash game made by JonBro. Other Games in This Series If you enjoyed Riddle Transfer , try the rest of the Flash game series. Each game has fun puzzles, hidden school secrets, and the classic point-and-click style. Riddle School Riddle School 2 Riddle School 3 Riddle School 4 Riddle School 5 Riddle Transfer Riddle Transfer 2 Play every game to see the whole story and join Phil on his wild escapes again and again.

title: Bubble Shooter HD
description: Bubble Shooter HD is an online arcade game where you shoot bubbles with bubbles! Guide the cannon-like ball, take aim and shoot the bubbles with the matching colors. Group three or more bubbles to pop them up and make them vanish. The more bubbles you blast, the higher the score you get. Remove all the bubbles from the screen before they reach the bottom! Controls Mouse: Take Aim Left Mouse Button: Shoot On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls to play. How to Play Bubble Shooter HD In Bubble Shooter HD, your main goal is to pop up all the bubbles on the screen by using the cannonball that changes color with every shot. Match three or more same-colored bubbles to blast and vanish them. However, keep in mind that if you fail to detonate bubbles, you get a foul. More than several fouls result in a new line of bubbles appearing at the top! Drop Large Clusters Focus on dropping large groups of bubbles rather than small groups. Prioritizing big clusters helps you to blast many bubbles at once, earning you the greatest amount of scores. So, it is good to plan your next moves by looking at the upcoming bubble color and aiming at the available large clusters. Don’t Miss Too Often After several missed shots, the game automatically adds a new row of bubbles at the top. Our mascot, Gamie, suggests that you do not miss your shots, so you can easily remove all the bubbles on the screen before they multiply. The fewer shots you miss, the higher the chances of wiping all the bubbles from the screen. Tips & Tricks for Bubble Shooter HD 🎯 Aim carefully for matching bubble colors. 🎈 Pop three bubbles to clear groups. 💡 Target large clusters for higher scores. 🧐 Avoid misses to prevent new rows. 🧠 Plan shots using the next bubble color. Developer Azerion Games is the publisher of Bubble Shooter HD. Similar Arcade Games Did you enjoy Bubble Shooter HD ? Try playing Bubble Game 3 , where you blast bubbles in a different way! Additionally, feel free to check out online arcade games at www.onlinegames.io. Don’t hesitate to contact us if you have a wish list or suggestions! We value your opinions.

title: Legendary Sniper
description: Legendary Sniper is an online sniper shooter game where you follow the commands of your general. War has begun! You are the most talented sniper of the squad. The fate of the battle is in your hands. Complete the missions. Prove your legendary aiming skills to your commander. Take your sniper rifle now. You need to eliminate the enemies with headshots! How to Play Legendary Sniper Hit the play button and select a level on the map. We suggest you start with the first level to adjust to the gameplay. While the first levels only require beginner-level skills, things get messier in the later levels. Climb up the roof after level selection. Get your commands. You need to take them off with headshots. Right-click to aim your target. Hold your breath and left-click to shoot when you find the perfect window. Repeat until you fulfill your tasks and get to the next one! Make precise shots and honor your squad! Need Some Tips? When you enter the arena, have a brief look at your targets. Decide which ones are fuss-free and which are not. Remember, the easy targets are those nearest you or who move less frequently. The soldiers who run constantly and hide behind barricades or other objects require more focus and patience. You don't have infinite ammo. So, take your shots wisely. You are free to take your time. There is no limit on that. However, if you idle around too much, your health level will drop because of the attacks. If you consume all your ammo before performing your duty, you need to start over. Legendary Sniper HUD You can see how many bullets are left in your ammo on the bottom right of your screen. Look at the top-right to see the total number of kills. Check out your health level on the top left. The mission will be displayed in the center. Controls Right Click: To aim Left Click: To shoot Developer Legendary Sniper is created by FreezeNova. What to Play Next? If this game is too hard for you, you can first train your hand in Sniper Elite . If you find it too easy, it means you are ready for FPS games more intense in action. Tell us how far you could get in Legendary Sniper game in the comment section below. If you have any wishes or inquiries, please do not hesitate to contact us !

title: Obby Tower Parkour Climb
description: Obby Tower Parkour Climb is a parkour game with a cool Roblox vibe. You'll climb up colorful platforms and obstacle courses to reach the top. The game has three maps named Tunnel, Tower and Stairs. The best part of this obby game is you can play alone or race with a friend in split-screen mode. Plus there are two different modes on each map: normal and challenge. Learn about them below. Editor's Review I've played a lot of parkour games, and Obby Tower Parkour Climb is a nice one that mixes Roblox elements with climbing challenges. It's fun, especially when you play with a friend. It's not too intense, but it keeps you coming back to beat your last climb. Controls Single Player Mode: Move: Use W, A, S, D or the Arrow Keys Jump: Press SPACE Sprint: Hold L-SHIFT Look Around: Move your MOUSE to look, scroll to zoom Two Player Mode: Player 1: Move: W, A, S, D Jump: SPACE Sprint: L-SHIFT Player 2: Move: Arrow Keys Jump: L Sprint: K How to Play Obby Tower Parkour Climb First, choose if you'd like to go solo or 2 player. In Two Player Mode, you and a friend compete side by side. Each player uses different controls. The first one to reach the top wins. It's a fun way to see who can master the tower faster. Next, choose a map to start: Tunnel, Tower and Stairs maps are available with increasing difficulty. We suggest you start with Tunnel if you're new to Obby games. Your goal is to climb to the top of the tower. Use the controls above to move, jump, and sprint. Look around by moving your mouse to plan your next moves. There's no time limit, so focus on understanding the layout and mastering your moves. You can check how far you climbed on the progress bar in the top left corner of your screen. If you choose the challenge mode, this adds a timer to your climb. You need to reach the top as fast as possible. Practice the routes in Normal Mode to find the quickest way up. This mode is great for testing how fast you can complete the climb without any mistakes. Developer This game is made by CurcoraLabs. Similar Games If you like this game, you might also enjoy Roblox Games Online . Explore these games that are also inspired by Roblox and offer lots of jumping and climbing. One popular game in this category is Only Up Obby . Play it now for free!

title: Geometry Vector
description: Geometry Vector is an online arcade game where you guide an arrow icon through challenging obstacle courses. You need to avoid getting in contact with spikes and traps to reach the portal at the end of each level. Follow the rhythm, dodge obstacles, and reach the finish point by taking control of your arrow. Collect the coins on the way to unlock new arrow designs! Controls Left Mouse Button / Spacebar: Control the Arrow On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls to control the arrow. How to Play Geometry Vector In Geometry Vector, your main goal is to reach the portal at the end of each level by dodging spiky objects and traps along the way. You can use the left mouse button or the spacebar key to control your arrow on desktops. Move forward on diverse obstacle courses on each level without crashing into any object and reach the finish point to move to the next level. Keep in mind that the difficulty level increases every 10 levels! Overcome Obstacles There are many spikes and traps on every level. You must overcome all obstacles one by one by guiding your arrow accordingly on the obstacle course. Here is a tip from our mascot Gamie: “Follow the rhythm on each level and act to the rhythmic pattern to easily reach the finish, just like you do in Geometry Dash!” Unlock New Arrow Icons Try to collect all the coins you see on the obstacle courses while moving forward. The coins you have collected will allow you to unlock new arrow icons from the shop section. There are 10 different arrow designs to choose from. Choose the icon that suits your tastes best, and pick a shiny color from the color palette for free! Tips & Tricks for Geometry Vector 🎶 Follow the rhythm to dodge obstacles easily. 💨 Avoid spikes and traps at all costs. 🤑 Collect coins to unlock new arrows. 🤓 Stay focused as levels get harder. ⏳ Time your moves with each pattern. Developer FreezeNova is the developer of Geometry Vector. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing Geometry Vector , you may also try playing Wave Dash , where you control an icon through geometric platforms! For more options, feel free to visit our Arcade Games Online page by following the link. Don’t forget to share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below!

title: Shell Shockers.io
description: In Shell Shockers.io game you have an egg character ready to join the battles against other opponents. Create your own strategy in this funny shooting game and survive from all dangerous insights. You can play public matches or with friends but first you need to create a private game mode and choose a server. Available servers : • Germany • Us East • Us Central • Us West • Chile • Singapore • Sydney Profile Section Here are presented the following details about the egg character. • Stats • Lifetime • Monthly • Game Mode - Kills, Deaths • Weapons - Kills, Deaths Inventory in Shell Shockers.io Here you will be able to choose the weapons and the color of the egg. Weapons: • Eggk-47 • Scrambler • Free Ranger • Rpegg • Whipper • Crackshot • Tri-Hard Shop Section You are able to buy different items and accessories for the egg. • Premium hats and weapon • Stickers for the egg • Pile O'Eggs • Basket O'Eggs • Big Box O'Eggs Game Modes • Teams mode -play in the team of eggs against others • Captula The Spatula - join other chefs in the kitchen • Free for all - complete freedom to shoot everyone • King of the Coop - become rooster royalty Shell Shockers.io Controls • WASD to move • Left click to shoot • E to change weapon • Q to throw a grenade • R to reload • Space bar to jump • Shift bar to zoom and aim

title: Rummikub
description: Rummikub is a free online version of an old Romanian tile game. We ensure that you will be addicted to Rummikub when you get used to the rules. You can play Rummikub in groups of 2,3 or 4 people. You may also play to choose against the computer. How to Play Rummikub? You will be given 14 tiles at the beginning. The aim is to eliminate all of your tiles before anyone does. You must arrange your tiles in groups or runs. A group consists of a minimum of 3 tiles with the same number of colors. (e.g., 5 of blue, 5 of yellow, 5 of red) A run is a minimum of 3 consecutive numbers of the same color. (e.g., 4,5,6 of blue) When you reach a total of 30 points with your groups or runs, you can make the initial meld. After making the initial meld, you can manipulate all the tiles on the board to discard more of your tiles from your deck. If you can not play a tile at your turn, you need to draw a tile from the pool. You don't need to waste your time arranging your tiles. Just press 777 to auto-arrange by groups and 789 to create runs. When a player gets rid of all their tiles from the deck, the round comes to an end. Points are calculated by subtracting the total of remaining tiles from zero. The winner earns a point equivalent to the total of all the remaining tiles of the rest of the players. Features Tutorial mode: available for new players to adjust to rules of the game Multiplayer Mode: Play solo against computer or with your friends Private Mode: Play only with your Facebook friends or invite others with a code. Custom Mode: Adjustable turn time and count of players Auto-arrange tiles with just a click Recent tiles on the board will be highlighted so you can distinguish new tiles easily. Developer Rummikub was created by Kinkajoo. Similar Games If you like board games, you can try Uno Online , Skribblio , or Chess . Or you can select what to play next by browsing our Board Games and Strategy Games .

title: Poop Clicker
description: Yes, we know it's a bit of a messy situation, but we need your plumbing skills! Play Poop Clicker , a free idle game with an odd twist; you get to be a dedicated plumber. Click on the poo-poo on the screen to earn fantastic rewards! While your friends dream of glamorous careers and having cool jobs like astronauts or athletes, you've chosen a different path for being a sewer guy! You aren't afraid to get your hands dirty. After all, it's great for your immune system, isn’t it? OnlineGames.io brings a new and interesting level of fun every day for free of charge. And the Poop Clicker game is the proof of that. Start playing it and explore it yourself. Or read this guide to get to the grips of this quirky world and how to play this unusual clicker game. Controls Click or tap on the poop to earn coins. How to Play Poop Clicker? Click on the poop to clean the very first poo-poo as a plumber. This is just the beginning of a nasty job! With each click, your earnings will increase, bringing you closer to becoming poop king! Unlock a range of achievements, skins, and poop cleaners. Pick among all the clickers and boosters displayed on the right side of the screen. Purchase them individually or in bulk by clicking on the x1, x10, and x100 buttons on the top right. Boosters will unlock as you earn enough coins to afford them. These boosters and clickers work for different purposes. Use poop clickers to boost poop per click, including bonus poop, multiple clicks, expert clickers, and more. On the other hand, autonomous clickers toilet systems improve your clicking power. Learn about how to strategically choose between them below. Make a streak to multiply your clicking power. Click consecutively and keep the blue bar on the left full for faster poop cleaning. Monitor Poop Cleaning Stats At the bottom of your screen, monitor your stats to determine which cookie makers to invest in based on your strategy. If you prefer to earn coins based on your own clicking, it's best to employ per-click boosters instead of automatic ones. On the other hand, if you'd like to earn an idle income and watch your coins grow with minimal effort, then your choice should be on automatic clickers. Industrialize your business, employ machines, and lay back to see your profits increase. For a more balanced approach, try to find a level where clicking power is equal to poop per second. Poop Comes In Various Forms Unlock new poop characters with funny costumes as you progress through the game. You can unlock different characters, such as Shiny, Doctor, Ugly and even Rainbow poop. Keep an eye out for golden poops passing through your screen randomly. Click on them to earn a substantial amount of dollars. Developer Poop Clicker is created by FreezeNova, by Construct 3 technology. More Clicker Games If you enjoy quirky idle games, take a look at all your options on the Clicker Games Online page. Online Games.io has a lot to offer to appeal to different tastes and preferences. From cookie clickers to mining businesses , you'll find your next occupation on this platform.

title: CubeCraft Survival
description: CubeCraft Survival is an online survival game inspired by Minecraft. The survival of the players depends on their strategy and crafting skills. In a dynamic open world, players are supposed to explore, craft and battle against the hostile creatures. There are as many dangers as there are opportunities in this blocky world! Controls WASD: Move Space: Jump LMB: Interact/Mine/Attack RMB: Place Block TAB: Inventory I: Profile T: Open Bench P/ESC: Pause CubeCraft Survival Overview CubeCraft Survival offers its players a world of creativity. However, the potential for survival is in the hands of the players. Their main responsibility in this Minecraft-inspired game is to wander around the blocky island, dig and collect the necessary materials for crafting vitals. For example, the players need to hunt pigs and get their meat for dinner. To make Fries and Meat, collecting meat, 2 potatoes and a coal ore is a must. Craft Vitals for Surviving The players should gather the basic resources before crafting an object. This open world has many things to mine and collect. Wandering through forests and mountains, every player can easily find necessary materials such as iron bars, sticks, coal ore, and much more. There is a wide range of items that can be crafted. For example, a player can craft an Iron Axe with three iron bars and a stick. Zombies of the Night When the night comes, there will be Zombies roaming around the isolated areas of the blocky island. To survive, a player needs to be prepared for encountering one of these wild creatures. Having an axe or a sword makes it easy for the player to fight zombies. There are many other weapons that players can craft. We will list some of them below. Gold Axe Diamond Sword Moonstone Shovel Stone Pickaxe Gold Bow Block Cutter Building a Shelter Having a warm place to call home is important. Creating a simple shelter using wooden bricks to build walls is important, as well. This shelter can save a player from the dangers of the outside world, where zombies roam freely. Over time, stronger structures can also be built with solid materials such as Ultra Compressed Stones and Hyper Compressed Granites. Developer FreezeNova developed CubeCraft Survival. Similar Minecraft Games Minecraft Classic is another option for you if you are fond of Minecraft games. In Minecraft Classic, there are no restrictions or limits. There is a wide range of bricks and blocks you can use to build your dream mansion. You can also search for our Minecraft Games Online library for further engagement.

title: Drift Rider
description: Drift Rider is a 3D drift game where the players can customize their vehicle and then hit the road. There are 5 distinct racetracks that the player can drift on. You may drive on a highway or in the streets of a city. Or, take the task of navigating a curving and narrow intercity route by drifting. This game will increase your adrenaline level! Take control of your vehicle and challenge your driving skills in one of the drift games with the highest graphic quality. How to Play Drift Rider The aim of Drift Rider is to make the longest drifts and earn coins. When you reach a certain speed, suddenly applying the brakes causes your vehicle to drift. With the coins you earned, customize and tune your vehicle fully. Customizing your car is the coolest part of drifting games like this. To improve the look and performance of the auto, head over the Parts, Tuning, and Paints sections from the main menu. Parts Section You can improve the performance of your car with the modifications you make in the Parts area. For instance, you can improve the car's turbocharger, engine and rear wheels in this part. We can say that the improvements you will make here are three-level. The primary strength of the car part is at Stock level. You can take this power up to Street, Racing and Pro. Tuning Section You can adjust your car's brake and height-lowness settings under the Tuning section. Attempt to give your automobile a rebellious appearance by adjusting the back height. Here, you can modify the following. If you'd like to learn the best tuning settings for drifting, read our full guide on drifting . Front Height Rear Height Front Camber Rear Camber Brake Balance Brake Pressure Paint Section The Paint section is our favorite section, with the most options. In the Paint section, select the color of your automobile and wheels! You have quite a large color spectrum. Above all, you can choose whether your car will have a glossy, matte, metallic, or chrome finish. Purchase New Cars In addition to customizing your vehicle, this game allows you to purchase 10 vehicles. You can find the most popular sports cars and even a Rolls Royce among them. You can invest the money you earn by drifting via purchasing a new vehicle. You can find the automobiles in the Cars section of the main menu. Controls To steer the vehicle, use the Arrow or WASD keys. To brake, press the Space key. To reset the vehicle, press the R key. To make the screen larger, press the P key. To switch the camera view, press the C key. To toggle mirror view, press M key. Similar Games If you found playing Drift Rider enjoyable, you should definitely try Madalin Stunt Cars Pro . It has superb visuals for realistic experiences. In the game, you can select from a variety of vehicles ranging from the most luxurious sports cars to a police cruiser. Or, you may look up other free drifting games on OnlineGames.io for more options. Keep checking the website to get fast access to the newest and most thrilling drift games!

title: Police Real Chase Car Simulator
description: Police Real Chase Car Simulator is the game where you have a lot challenges and difficult missions to complete while you are driving a police car. You can show your driving skills in a realistic city traffic navigating and hunting the bad guys. Become an expert driver and also you have the opportunity to be a good police officer. In the garage you have 7 police cars to choose. To enter a mission you need to follow the yellow flags and will lead you to blue portals. There you will be given the instructions and time to start the mission. Police Real Chase Car Simulator Controls: • W -Accelerate • S -Backward • A -Steer Left • D -Steer Right • C -Change Camera • R -Reset Car • Space – Jump • L -Shift – Sprint / Nitro • M -Map • F -Car Enter/Exit • I -Instructions • P/Esc -Pause • H -Police Siren • Q -Roll • E -Inventory • Z -Missions

title: Only Up Obby
description: Only Up Obby is a parkour game that is playable on your browser. The goal is not just surviving the whims of the Roblox-like universe but also outmaneuvering other players. You can guide your character on various obby paths (obstacle courses) such as parkour, colorful floor, glass bridge and others. Each mode brings a mix of fun and daring challenges! Don't look down! Controls Desktop: Move: WASD Jump: Spacebar Camera: Move Mouse Smartphone: Move: Use the joystick on the left side of the screen Jump: Press the button on the bottom right of the screen Camera: Move your finger on the right side of the screen How to Play Only Up Obby You'll begin in the town's square. Each building represents a mini game. Enter a door you like and start guiding your blocky avatar on his adventures up in sky. Use WASD keys to move and space to jump. Finish the race at first and collect coins. You have several mini game options with unique mechanics. Parkour Imagine you're an acrobat and you're not just navigating; you're dancing with danger, a ballet of near misses and triumphant leaps. Sounds like a recipe for both frustration and exhilaration. Colorful levels where you go only up might be the game you're looking for when you're away from your Roblox-installed phone. Colorful Floor Begin the race with 29 other players in front of colorful tiles. Your goal is to step on tiles whose color is displayed at the top of the screen. As soon as the color changes, you must find another tile matching the color on the top. Otherwise, you're out of the game. Winning the race is not just finding a tile to step on but moving forward to finish the course. This mode turns the game into a visual disco where the floor is indeed lava, but only if it's the wrong color. It's like playing musical chairs, but if the music was colors, and the chairs were colorful tiles. Glass Bridge Here's where your existential dread meets probability. In Glass Bridge mode you need to choose which glass tile to jump on, but one will break, and the other will remain. You're not just playing; you're living out a scene from "Squid Game". Choose wisely, or face the humiliation of falling into the void of your own misjudgment. Falling Plates Falling Plates mode of Only Up Obby is an unlockable mini-game where you have to run to the finish course on a platform up in the sky. Here is the twist: the plates you've already run on will fall down and disappear after a second. So, be careful. Each step is a commitment, a testament to your belief in your timing. It's less about physical prowess and more about your inner clock. Rain of Blocks You must evolve into some sort of block-dodging ninja because it's raining blocks! The universe is testing you, not just with static challenges but with dynamic chaos. Finish the course without getting crushed by a block! More Parkour Games If you're enjoying parkour challenges, you might also like LOLBeans.io ! You'll chuckle at how bizarre the beans look while trying to dodge obstacles in Wipe Out themed whimsical tracks!

title: Tow N Go
description: Hook it, haul it, and smash it for cash! In Tow N Go , you’ll take the wheel of a tow truck and head out into town to pick up abandoned, broken-down, or high-value cars. Can you become the ultimate tow master? Game Overview In Tow N Go the road is paved with cars! Drive through city streets, pick up vehicles, and deliver them to the crusher. The more valuable the car, the more money you earn. But be careful, because not every vehicle is worth your time. Use your cash to customize your tow truck, unlock stronger vehicles, and pick as many cars up as you can. Game Features Pick up & smash gameplay: Tow cars and flatten them in the graveyard to earn cash. Car variety: Expensive cars mean big money. Avoid police and ambulance vehicles that earn nothing. Truck upgrades: Personalize your pickup and unlock more powerful trucks for bigger hauls. How to Play Tow N Go Move: Hold Left Click . Pick Up: Stop next to a car and hook it. Pass Barriers: Pay cash to push forward. Get Paid: Deliver your haul to the junkyard and smash for profit! FAQs What happens if I pick up police or ambulance vehicles? You won’t earn any money from them, so focus on high-value cars instead. What if I don’t bring any cars to the graveyard? You’ll lose the level and have to try again. Similar Games Love hauling in Tow N Go ? Try other games in our Car Games Library, like Taxi Driver , where you’ll pick up passengers, race through the city, and feel the thrill of the engine roar.

title: Geometry Vibes
description: In Geometry Vibes , sharp corners and tricky tunnels will push your reflexes to the limit. One wrong tap and you’re sent back. Can you keep control and reach the portal? Game Overview Geometry Vibes challenges you to guide an arrow through levels filled with cubes, spikes, and narrow paths. Complete levels to unlock the next stage, survive as long as you can in endless mode, or test your skills in race mode against 2–4 players. Game Features Level-Based Progression: Clear one level to unlock the next. Endless Mode: Play for as long as you can and set new records. Multiplayer Races: Compete with 2, 3, or 4 players to see who lasts the longest. Arrow Customization: Change your arrow’s form and color to match your style. Challenging Obstacles: Spikes, corners, and walls that demand precise timing. How to Play Geometry Vibes? PC Controls Fly up: Hold SPACE / Click Fly down: Release SPACE / Click Mobile Controls Tap the screen to fly up or let go to fall Good to Know! Timing is key: Tap too early and you’ll crash; too late and you’ll hit the spikes. Endless practice: The more you play, the sharper your reflexes become. Similar Games Enjoyed Geometry Vibes ? Explore our Clicker Games library, where similar challenges are waiting, including Geometry Arrow 2 , set in the same arrow-verse but with a twist.

title: Hoop World 3D
description: Get ready to flip, jump, and dunk your way through wild levels in Hoop World 3D ! This 3D basketball game isn’t your average dunk contest, it’s a high-flying, time-your-jump-right kind of ride with trampolines, wormholes, and some seriously wacky physics. You'll bounce across floating platforms like a legendary NBA player, fly through space portals, and try to land the perfect slam dunk... all while doing as many flips as possible. The more flips you pull off, the more coins you earn, and the cooler you look when you finally dunk it. Every level brings a new challenge. Some jumps are short and sweet, others launch you through entire worlds. Mess up your timing, and you’ll go crashing into the ground (with some pretty funny falls, honestly). But stick the landing, and you’ll feel like a hero. In case you'd like to keep on dunking after playing Hoop World 3D, you can try Basketball io for free on OnlineGames.io! Controls Computers: Hold left click or spacebar to flip in the air Release to attempt a dunk Mobile Devices : Tap and hold anywhere on the screen to flip Release your finger to dunk How to Play Hoop World 3D Start a level, hold left click to launch yourself into the air. Hold to keep flipping, every extra spin earns you more coins. If there's a wormholes, try to enter it during flight. They’ll teleport you into new scenes for even bigger jumps. When you're near the hoop, release mouse click go just in time to slam dunk into the basket. Earn coins, move to the next level, and get ready to fly again. Every level gets a bit trickier, with longer gaps, requiring more spins, and tricky hoops. Save your coins to unlock cooler NBA players in the shop. Or perhaps you'd like to jump and dunk as Hulk, Superman or Spiderman? Developer Hoop World 3D was developed by TapNation. If you'd like to play another sports game by them, you can play Golf Orbit for free on OnlineGames.io Editor’s Review At first, I honestly thought Hoop World 3D was just one of those games where the flips happen on their own and you just kinda watch. I didn’t expect to have much control. But nope, I was totally wrong. The timing actually matters a lot, and if you mess it up, your player just faceplants in the funniest way possible. It took me a few tries to figure out the rhythm, but once I did, it got super fun and kind of addicting. I caught myself saying, “Okay, last level,” like five times in a row. The wormholes that launch you into different places mid-air are such a cool touch, and unlocking characters like Hulk or Spiderman makes it even better. It’s got that perfect mix of silly physics and satisfying challenge. And believe me, this one has over the top graphics compared to average stickman ragdoll games. So yes, this game’s a great way to kill time in the best way. Definitely one of those browser games you come back to. So… ready to flip, fly, and dunk like a pro? Technical Info Game Provider: TapNation Languages: English Release Date: 2024 (Web-GL), 2021 (iOS & Android) Genre: Sports, Arcade Mode: Singleplayer Platforms: Web browser (desktop and mobile), Android, iOS Controls: Mouse Save: Saved in browser cache

title: Watermelon Game
description: Ever stumble upon a game so simple yet so addictive that it sneaks into your day every chance it gets? That's exactly how I felt when I discovered the Watermelon Game or (popularly known as Suika , meaning Watermelon in Japanese). It started innocently enough, just a quick try to see what it was all about. And suddenly, I was a full-blown fruit-merging strategist, plotting the perfect spot for every blueberry, dreaming of the glorious watermelon that awaited at the end. If you've never played it, here's the premise: you start with tiny blueberries that, when paired, merge into strawberries. Keep merging to create bigger and juicier fruits like peaches, plums, and lemons all the way up to the ultimate prize: a giant juicy watermelon. But beware! Let the bowl overflow, and it's game over. Controls Hold the left mouse button to move the fruit Release to drop A Satisfying Casual Game Yes, we’re stacking fruits (but not in the fridge after a big grocery haul, before our next big diet. Cuz that's no fun 😅) And please, please turn the volume on while playing. There's something oddly satisfying about the sound effects as fruits merge. That little "pop" when two fruits become one is the perfect blend of ASMR and accomplishment . And then there's the strategy: you can't just toss fruits in willy-nilly. You have to plan ahead, keeping space for future merges and positioning fruits to trigger chain reactions. The game's beauty lies in its simplicity. There are no time limits, no power-ups, just pure, unfiltered fruit-merging joy. It's the kind of game you can play while waiting for your coffee to brew, (or for hours on a lazy Sunday afternoon without realizing where the time went (guilty!). What Not to Do in the Watermelon Game: My Mistakes and Tips I'll admit, I wasn't very good at first. My bowl kept filling up with mismatched fruits, and I never got past the coconut stage. But then I learned a crucial tip: keep your bigger fruits in the center of the bowl. It sounds simple, but it changed everything. Suddenly, I was creating chain reactions like a pro, watching oranges turn into coconuts, coconuts into pineapples, and finally... finally.. a honeydew melon appeared. The moment I unlocked the watermelon for the first time felt like I'd won a marathon, haha! What a pride, huh? 🫠 Oh, and there was this one time I thought I'd be clever and stack all my fruits on one side to create room. Bad idea. The bowl almost tilted (ofc metaphorically) and it was a mess. Lesson learned: symmetry is your best friend in this online watermelon game. Merge Game Fun: Stacking Fruits Watermelon Game (or Suika Watermelon Game) is a fun exercise in strategy and patience wrapped up in cheerful colors and satisfying gameplay. Whether you're looking to kill a few minutes or dive into a full-on merging marathon, this game is sure to deliver. And it's surprising how effortlessly it appeals to players of all ages, from kids to seniors. It's rare to find a game that truly feels universal, but this one nails it. So, you can play the game with your kid, siblings, parents and even grandparents, and share fruit merge strategies. Or perhaps you may bicker over questionable moves that threaten to overflow the bowl. Anyway, Suika Watermelon is a free merge game that sparks fun and conversation, no matter your age. And hey, if you've managed to get to the watermelon stage, let me know in the comments below! I'm always looking for new strategies to master the art of fruit merging. 🍓🍍🍉

title: Masked Shooters Assault
description: Get ready for action and shooting in Masked Shooters Assault . The goal of the game is to shoot the opponents and survive in the dangerous environments. Take every challenge with excitement and have fun testing your skills. With modern battlefields you will become an expert shooter with experience. Hide from the enemies, hunt them, run fast and shoot to become the first player. In order to start playing the game you first need to create a room. You can name the room, choose the maximum players that can join and select the game mode FFA or Team. You can also join other players' rooms. There are 4 maps : • Factory • Arena Towers • Gasplant Weapons: • BallisticKnife • Deagle • MP5KA4 • STW-25 • M87T • Blaser • RPG • M79 • M67 Masked Shooters Assault Display • Kill feed (displayed on the top right) • Weapons (displayed on the center) • Health & Ammo (displayed on the bottom right) • Time & leading player (displayed on the center) • Chat (displayed on the center left) Statistics Section In statistics, you will see the following details: • Number of games played • Number of wins • Number of kills • Score Controls WASD or arrow keys to move Left mouse button to fire R to reload Space to jump Arrow keys to switch weapons

title: Home Design
description: Calling all designer-spirited gamers! Home Design is a cozy unpacking game where your task is to organize a home from top to bottom. Your objective is to design 20 unique spaces, ranging from bedrooms to zen gardens. If you're ready for the challenge, let's start flipping this place together! Controls Drag and drop items in the room and place them in the correct locations. How to Play There are 20 levels to unlock in the Home Design game . Start with the teen room; start organizing all the furniture, accessories, plants and all other belongings. Make this house ready for the homeowners before they arrive. You have a full 3 minutes to complete each level. We advise you to unpack all the furniture first by pressing on the box. Begin by placing the big furniture such as beds, sofas, tables, and closets. When you're done with the rough work, move on to placing books, electronics, plants and other belongings. When you place the items in the correct spots, their location will be locked. Complete the look within the time limit and close the doors. Another room or exterior design awaits you on a new level. Take Extra Time to Design It's all okay if you can't finish the level in 180 seconds. You can watch a short ad to get an extra 60 seconds to furnish the look. Need a little help? Click on the bulb icon on the top right of your screen to get a hint. The hint will show you the complete look of the place, guiding you in your design choices. Developer Simplegame created this game. Game Features 20 unique home design puzzles Nice drawings and artwork Simple gameplay Cozy atmosphere No download, no installation People Also Played Home Design players, you're not alone in your love for organizing games. Join the community of gamers who also enjoy Unpacking Online . In this game, you can organize not only furniture but also closets, drawers, and many different items. And that's just the beginning. OnlineGames.io offers a variety of organizing games , from cleaning and painting houses to transforming entire neighborhoods. Explore these games, share your experiences, and let us know your opinions in the comments. Your voice matters to us!

title: JailBreak Prison Escape
description: Nobody dreams of being a villain ⎼ but let’s be honest: Prison Break made us all wonder what it takes to escape. Do you have the strategy and the skills to outsmart the guards, overcome every obstacle, and slip away unnoticed? In JailBreak Prison Escape , you’ll need brains, sneakiness, and courage. Prepare yourself for the sweet escape with this challenging game ⎼ the ultimate breakout starts now! Game Overview JailBreak Prison Escape is a thrilling problem-solving game that captures a prisoner’s journey to escape. Along the way, you’ll need strategy and puzzle-solving skills to break codes, find hidden keys, and time every move to avoid being caught by the guard. With multiple chapters to play, you’ll experience diverse challenges and test your escaping techniques in different environments. Only by playing smart can you light the way to freedom. How to Play JailBreak Prison Escape? Find your way to freedom! ● Move: WASD / Arrow Keys ● Pick-up objects: E / Left Click ● Jump: SPACE Watch out for the guard! Use the mouse to move the camera. Unlock rewards: complete missions and collect badges. Good to Know! Customize your character: unlock funny skins that will make your character look cooler and not-so-imprisoned by finding them in-game or unlocking them in Customization by watching ads. Get some help: collect in-game items that will support you in your escape mission. Get rewarded: earn coins and use them to unlock special missions. Grab the candies: candies (or badges) will help you recover if you fail a mission. FAQs Can I play the chapters in any order? Yes, the chapters can be played in any order that the player prefers. However, it is suggested to play them in the given order since the difficulty level increases gradually according to the chapter, and level. What kind of puzzles are in the game? Expect a wide range of puzzles including, time-based evading, extreme platforming, security code breaking, and much more. Is there a multiplayer mode available in JailBreak Prison Escape? Currently there is no multiplayer mode available in JailBreak Prison Escape , however it might be added in some of the future updates. When is JailBreak Prison Escape chapter 4 coming out? There is no release date set for JailBreak Prison Escape chapter 4 right now, since it is in the development phase, but we will keep you guys updated. Do any of the skins provide a boost in stats? No, the skins available in the game do not provide any boost in your stats, since they have been designed purely as an entertainment/customization purpose for the player. What are the visuals like in the game? The game features a Roblox-inspired world with blocky 3D graphics and bright, contrasting colors, making puzzle pieces easier to spot. How does the soundtrack affect gameplay? The light, whimsical background music creates a cheerful atmosphere while adding a sense of suspense, without distracting the player. Similar Games Did you find your way to freedom? If you are looking for something slightly different, but just as thrilling, make sure to check out Stickman GTA City . Maybe it is time to give your character in JailBreak Prison Escape a little backstory.

title: Chess FreezeNova
description: Chess FreezeNova is an online chess game where you can outsmart your worldwide opponents, friends or AI on a chess board. Whether you are a beginner or a professional chess player, you will enjoy playing this feature-rich chess journey. Set your own game settings as you wish in this board game and showcase your chess skills to everyone! Controls Mouse: Use your mouse to move your chess pieces. How to Play Chess FreezeNova Chess FreezeNova provides a board game that lets you play with your friends or against players across the globe. If you are a beginner, you can also play against AI. Training Mode is for those who want to improve their chess-playing skills. Furthermore, this is a user-friendly game. So, you can set the game settings as you wish. Adjust the time limit and difficulty level, and pick white or black pieces. Change the board and piece colors however you like! Strategic Thinking Puzzles In the menu, there is a “Puzzles” section. Enhance your strategic thinking with Puzzle Training or Puzzle Streak under this section. You can easily learn chess moves that you can use when playing chess with a real person using Puzzles. Play Offline Did you meet up with your friend, and you don’t have a chess set with you? Don’t worry! Play this board game in offline mode using a single device. Play Offline is a turn-based mode you can play with a friend. VS. Friend Create a room by clicking the “Vs Friend” button on the main menu, then share the room code with your friend. Or invite someone to play by sharing the URL. This way, you can both play the same game while sitting in your own homes. Let’s see who plays better! Developer FreezeNova created Chess FreezeNova. More Games Like This Do you like to checkmate? Then, we have a recommendation for you. Try playing Chess Fill . It is unlike other chess games. Your goal is to paint the chessboard by strategically moving the given chess piece. Be sure to paint every square! Feel free to play our brain games online that require strategic thinking by following the link for more.

title: Block Blast
description: Tetris is all fun and games, but the pressure of dropping blocks quickly? Oh, it's not what we love in a chill puzzle game, right? So, we've created Block Blast Online , offering endless Tetris fun without any time limits. Take it easy, and place the blocks in the grids in peace. No mechanics will rush you. Just fill a row or a column in the grid to clear the blocks. It's puzzle-solving at your own pace! Block Blast is a 2D puzzle game where you stack blocks neatly in an 8x8 grid. You can play it on your browser for free on OnlineGames.io. Controls Drag and drop blocks into the grid. How to Play Block Blast Online Block Blast offers two distinct modes, each with a twist on the core mechanic of fitting blocks into an 8x8 grid: Classic Mode You begin with a clean slate - an empty 8x8 grid, and at the bottom, three blocks beckon to be placed. These blocks come in shapes reminiscent of Tetris: I, L, T, Z, S, and a few chunky surprises as you advance. Drag and drop these blocks onto the grid. After every three moves, a new trio of blocks awaits your command. Your mission is to create full vertical or horizontal lines without any gaps. Once a line is complete, it vanishes, clearing space for more blocks. Keep this dance going until the board is too cluttered for any more moves. Adventure Mode Here, the grid might not be so forgiving. Levels start with pre-placed blocks, setting the stage for your strategic maneuvers. Each level presents unique goals. Perhaps you need to clear a certain number of tiles, or maybe you're on a gem hunt. As levels escalate, so does the objectives' complexity, with more blocks already on the grid to navigate around. Every cleared line nets you 10 points, but the real fun begins with combos and streaks. Chain together line clears for bonus points, turning each move into a potential score multiplier. In both modes, the essence of Block Blast remains a puzzle game where your wits and planning determine how long you can keep the blocks dancing on the grid. Developer Block Blast Unblocked game was created by FreezeNova. Explore Online Block Games Dive into a world where blocks aren't just for building but for battling, solving, and creating! We've got a treasure trove of block games online for every puzzle enthusiast. You can reminisce about the good old days with timeless games like Bloxorz , where you'll tilt the world to fit a rectangular block into a square hole. It's simplicity meets strategy. Or perhaps you can enter a Candy Crush-like adventure in Gummy Blocks with glossy, candy-colored pieces that you'll be eager to align.

title: Kiki World
description: Kiki World is an online home design game where you act as an interior architect. Your main goal in this game is to organize and redecorate old rooms. Give the messy rooms fresh air! Decorate your friend’s kitchen, bedrooms and living rooms to get diamonds & stars. Use your earnings to renovate your own house completely! 🏡 Controls Left Mouse Button: Mix and Match Furniture Kiki World Overview Old items straight into the trash can! Now is the time to create your dream home in Kiki World. Start by decorating your bedroom. Choose a floor type, get some wallpaper, and place a comfy bed in your room. Don’t forget to add a window so plenty of sunlight can come inside. There is so much furniture and home design accessories at your disposal. Mix and match them to create a cozy ambience! Design Orders 🎨 Accept the design orders to earn diamonds and stars. Organize your friend’s house by cleaning the rooms, removing old items and replacing them with stylish furniture. Open packages and choose furniture that fits well in the room. Everything you touch turns to gold. Bring a light to dull rooms with your special design skills! You are really a great interior architect, aren’t you? Unlock New Rooms 💒 As you level up, you can unlock new rooms besides your bedroom. You will start with organizing and designing your bedroom. With so many furniture options and different pattern choices, making a decision can be a bit challenging! Later, you need to decorate your kitchen, living room and many more… Step by step, creating your dream home is in your hands! Developer CyberNex Studios developed Kiki World. Similar Games If you enjoy playing home design games like this, we suggest you play Home Design . Organize a home from top to bottom by unpacking furniture. Place beds, sofas, and wardrobes one by one! For further engagements, feel free to check our Organizing Games Online game library. There is a wide array of online games at your disposal on onlinegames.io !

title: Marble Run: Ultimate Race
description: Controlling a ball in Marble Run: Ultimate Race is a real challenge. You need to stay steady, roll carefully through narrow paths, and avoid bumping too hard into other players, or you might slip and fall out of the race. Game Overview Marble Run: Ultimate Race is a super fun yet difficult racing game where you control a marble rolling through bright and twisty tracks. Your main goal is to reach the finish line without falling. The path is full of turns, ramps, and thin spots that really test how well you can control your marble. The smoother and faster you roll, the higher your score will be. But if you slip or fall, you’ll have to start again, so stay focused and keep rolling! How to Play Marble Run: Ultimate Race? The gameplay is simple: just keep your marble on the track, watch out for obstacles, and try not to fall off the edge. Finishing in the top 10 is cool, but it’s totally fine if you don’t. What matters most is making it to the end and having fun while collecting keys for awesome rewards. Roll, balance, win! Move: hold Left or Right Click & Move Mouse/ A & D / ⬅️➡️ Restart: SPACE For more game controls, please pay attention to the in-game instructions. Good to Know! Stay balanced: the faster you roll, the harder it gets to control the ball! Don’t skip your daily rewards! If you play on a daily basis, this will help you earn coins. Keys are magic tickets: use them to open chests full of surprises. A win is a win! Whether you finish first or not, collect coins to unlock new skins or fresh worlds to explore. Need a little boost? Watch ads to get more keys and skips, unlock new worlds, and double your points when you finish in the top. Spin it to win it! Go to the lucky wheel and spin it to see what cool rewards you can win. FAQs Will my progress be saved? Yes, your progress is saved, so you can keep playing from where you left off. You can also come back every day to claim your daily rewards and spin the wheel to earn extra coins or keys. Does the game get harder? Yes, it gets harder with every level. You might feel like you’re moving faster, facing more obstacles and ramps, and it gets tougher to stay in control for the whole race. What happens if I fall? You’ll lose and have to start again from the beginning, but that’s okay. It’s your chance to do better and beat your last score. Similar Games If you liked playing Marble Run: Ultimate Race , you might also enjoy Slope Run , another ball game where you race through the endless void of space. Give it a try and see if your skills are ready for this kind of cosmic fun!

title: Mob City
description: Are you confident enough to attack the mafia gang alone? Mob City is a 3D shooting game with many missions to complete. You have a tremendous responsibility. Because it is up to you to defeat the bad guys. They are more numerous than you, but they do not have the strategy skills you have. Try to beat them by using your tools in the best way possible! In the final episode, you will meet with the big boss. How to Play Mob City? Mob City is a game where you progress by completing missions. 30 missions are waiting to be completed, and all expect you to fulfill different responsibilities. The first mission asks you to defeat 100 mafia men. After successfully completing each task, the next mission is unlocked. And a different kind of duty awaits you. The 30-episode story ends with you eliminating the big boss. You can use cars and heavy weapons in the level by pressing the Enter key. As you pass each level, you will unlock achievements and earn money. You can buy tools that will strengthen you during the game from the Shop section with the money you make. There is even a god mode option. This means you are immortal! You should approach mafia men cautiously because they will attack you as more than one person. Move by paying attention to the health bar in the lower-left corner of the game screen. If you take too much damage, you die. As you defeat mafia men, things valuable to you will fall from them. Like money, like painkillers. Use them to your advantage. If the bad guys get too crowded, you can drag them towards a vehicle and blow up the car. But make sure you do not get hurt, either. Shop When you click on the "Shop" section in the menu, you will see many guns and tools you can use in Mob City. You need to earn money to get them. When you remove a bad guy, he will likely drop his money. You can progress by collecting them. Below, we will list a few power-ups that you can find in the shop section. Most of them are things that will interest you. Godmode: You can not die when you get this. It is created to make you immortal. Yes, it is a bit like cheating! You can get it for $999,999. Vehicle Generator: When you buy this for $250,000, you can spawn a car wherever you want. Press any key between 0 and 9, and the vehicle you want will appear. You even have a helicopter option! Unlimited Weapon Ammo: No more worrying about whether my bullets will be enough. This power-up gives you infinite ammo. You can buy it for $500.00. Controls Use your Mouse to aim Use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys to move Use the Space key or the J key to jump Use the Left Mouse button or the Z key to fire Use the Right Mouse button or the X key to throw a grenade Use the Left Shift or the C key to activate Hammer Time Use the Mouse wheel or Q or E keys to cycle weapons Use the Enter key to enter the vehicle Use ESC or the P key to pause the game Use the M key to mute the audio toggle Use the V key to change the camera view More Games Like Mob City Urban Sniper is a game similar to Mob City, where you are given tasks on eliminating bad guys with your sniper. title: Riddle School 3
description: Riddle School 3 is the sequel to Riddle School, one of the funniest point-and-click adventure game series around. Inspired by Tom Fulp’s Flash game Pico’s School, Riddle School 3 was released on March 16, 2008, for fans of clever puzzles and quirky humor. Phil Eggtree is now a high school student. Though he has grown, his determination to escape school remains strong. Pay attention to his remarks, gather hints from speech bubbles, and assist him in escaping Riddle High School. 🎓 Controls Left Mouse Button: To Interact Click & Drag: Combine Items How to Play Riddle School 3 Phil is determined to escape Riddle High School. While sitting in Mr. Soggy’s class, he looks for a way to leave the classroom and explore the halls. Check every object in each room to find useful items. Click speech balloons to continue conversations and pay close attention to Phil’s hints. Use your wits to solve the mysteries and help him find his way out. Collect $1 Worth of Pennies 💵 Wander the school hallways and scoop up every penny you see. Phil needs one dollar to escape. Do not forget the second floor. Just head upstairs. Find Richy, who is stuck in his locker. With a little help from Mrs. Oddverb, you can free Richy, and he will toss you some pennies. Remember, you need to convince Mrs. Oddverb to look for Richy’s combination first. Feed Chubb 🍫 To reach the principal’s office and grab the keys, you need to move Chubb out of the way. His huge appetite has him blocking the door, and the only thing that will move him is chocolate pudding from the lunchroom. That is why Phil is collecting a dollar. Big plans. Small dessert. Tips & Tricks for Riddle School 3 🖐 Grab all items. Phil’s pockets have no limits. 📏 Try combining items with each other. Funny things may happen. 👦 Think like a prank kid. Smart plans are good. Silly plans work too. 🚪 Check rooms twice. New stuff can appear later. 💬 Listen closely. Hints hide inside jokes. Developer JonBro, a Newgrounds creator, developed Riddle School 3. Other Games in This Series If Riddle School 3 made you laugh, try the rest of the series. Each game has funny puzzles, school secrets, and classic point and click fun. Riddle School Riddle School 2 Riddle School 3 Riddle School 4 Riddle School 5 Riddle Transfer Riddle Transfer 2 Play them all to see the full story and help Phil escape school again.

title: Bus Parking Out
description: Bus Parking Out is an online puzzle game where you need to strategically park buses to get all the passengers in. However, you have only 4 free spots for each movement. To complete a level, you must carry all the passengers in these colorful buses. Make sure that you leave no one behind. Enjoy the vibrant environment of Bus Parking Out! 🅿️ Controls Left Mouse Button: To Move Buses On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. How to Play Bus Parking Out There are 3 types of buses in 8 vibrant colors. They require careful planning to collect all the passengers. You need to operate the buses strategically to leave no one behind. To get all the passengers in, move the different-colored buses with their own sizes and movement directions. Keep in mind that you can only collect passengers with a matching bus. Clear the pathways if a selected bus is stuck between other buses to ensure they can operate properly! Clear the Pathways 🚍 Some buses can get stuck in the parking lot. You need to open ways to move them. Carefully plan which buses to move to clear the pathway for the selected bus. Our mascot, Gamie, says that checking the passengers' colors makes it easier for you to plan the operation. Matching the colors and the size of the bus is important for your strategic planning in this puzzle game. Shuffle and Sort 🔀 You have two options to make your operational planning easier: shuffling the buses and sorting the passengers. With the shuffle option, you can rearrange the buses' colors in the parking lot. On the other hand, the sorting option enables you to sort passengers by bus color. You can activate each of these two options for 500 in-game coins by clicking on the dark blue buttons located at the bottom. Tips & Tricks for Bus Parking Out 🚦 Think before you move. Buses hate traffic jams. 🎨 Colors matter. The wrong color means sad passengers. 🅿️ Four free spots only. Use them like gold. 🚌 If a bus is stuck, move its neighbors first. 🧠 Sort passengers to stay sane. Your brain will smile. Developer Inlogic Software developed the Bus Parking Out. More Games Like This Cupid Unchained is another puzzle game that suits your tastes well! Break the chains of the people with your arrows and make them free. title: GT Cars City Racing
description: GT Cars City Racing is a fun 3D driving game where you can race solo or compete with a friend in split-screen mode. The game packs up everything you love in car games: super sport GT cars, a sandbox mode with a great playground, head-to-head races and robot wars! In the sandbox mode, which is called Toy City, you drive through a colorful sandbox filled with fun mini-games like knocking over bowling pins, smashing robots, or jumping into pools. Face to Face is a competitive race mode where your car changes every lap, challenging you to adapt quickly and finish all five laps before your rivals. Mega Ramps throws you into a time-based race where a giant robot tries to destroy your car as you speed down massive ramps. GT Cars City Racing also lets you customize your GT car with different colors and effects. You can even paint the rims! With its bright 3D visuals, wild stunts, quick load times and fun challenges, GT Cars City Racing will be your next obsession! Controls Player 1: Move: WASD Nitro: Shift Repair: R Camera: C Player 2: Move: Arrow Keys Nitro: N Repair: U Camera: K Game Modes Explained There are three different game modes + customization garage in the GT Cars City Racing. Toy City This is where the real fun begins. Toy City is a sandbox-style mode full of short missions and mini-games. The entire map feels like a giant toy playset! Each mission in Toy City is designed to be quick, fun, and physics-based. These missions are all about experimenting, having fun, and earning money while doing fun stunts. You can play them at your own pace and replay your favorites. It's the perfect mode if you want to take a break from racing and just goof around in a fun, colorful world. Here's what you can expect: Destroy the Robot: You aim your car at a giant toy robot and slam into it until it breaks apart. Parts go flying everywhere! Jump into the Pool: There's a big ramp that sends your car soaring into a pool. If you land it right, you get a splashy reward. It's one of the funnier missions. Knock Over Buildings: Some missions have you crash into huge bouncy balls that knock over blocky toy buildings like dominoes. Collect Diamonds: You'll drive through paths filled with glowing, floating diamonds. The more you collect, the more in-game money you earn to customize your ride. Fly Through Rings: These rainbow-colored hoops are floating in the air. Use ramps to launch your car and steer through the rings in mid-air. Scatter Balloons: Hit special crates that explode with balloons when your car smashes into them. It's chaotic and colorful! Bowling Challenge: Try to push giant balls into bowling pins or just drive straight into them yourself. Either way, the goal is to knock them all down. Face to Face Race Mode Ready for a proper race? In this mode, you'll speed toward the finish line, and once you reach it, you'll switch cars (like a truck, mini SUV, or sports car), and your next lap begins instantly. You'll go through 5 vehicle swaps. First to complete all 5 wins! Mega Ramps In this time trial race mode, you drive down massive ramps while a giant robot tries to stop you. It might throw stuff at you or damage your car directly. If your health bar hits zero, your car falls off the edge or time runs out, you're out! Can you survive this madness and cross the finish line? Customize Your Ride If you want a fiery red GT over a glowing blue sports car with neon rims, it's all here. Now, head to the Customize tab on main menu and make your car look exactly how you want. You can: Change body paint, rim color, windows, and lights Pick cool nitro effects and flashy tail colors Watch ads to unlock gems or cash for upgrades Developer GT Cars City Racing is created by GameVGames, known for bright, accessible, and over-the-top driving games. More 3D Driving Games Online If you're into stunt driving and arcade-style races, you'll love Crazy Car Arena . It features massive jumps, tricky obstacle tracks, and weirdly fun cars to unlock. Perfect for fans of Mega Ramps or Toy City mayhem! With fun toylike maps, lots of game modes, and two player split-screen feature, GT Cars City Racing is your new go-to browser game for laughs, races, and stunt madness. So buckle up, customize your ride, and play it free now on OnlineGames.io!

title: Geometry Dash FreezeNova
description: Give yourself over to the beat of the song! Discover the FreezeNova difference while playing the well-known arcade game Geometry Dash. In Geometry Dash FreezeNova , the challenging arcade game, your goal is to keep the cube clear of every obstacle on the flowing surface. Like with the original Geometry Dash , playing this game is most enjoyable when you give in to the music's beat. Boost the music and make an effort to stay clear of the obstacles! How to Play Geometry Dash FreezeNova Selecting the game mode you wish to play is an excellent place to start. Geometry Dash FreezeNova provides you with various game modes, including different themes. Your objective in the game is to move the cube as far along the platform as possible after selecting a mode. The cube must not come into contact with anything sharp while doing this. Game Modes and Features of Geometry Dash FreezeNova Ten different game modes are available. The basic descriptions of various game modes will be provided to you below. The game's most fundamental mode is called Spikes Frenzy . Here, all you need to do is advance while dodging obstacles. There are luminous bounces scattered throughout the game, which sets Glowing Boost apart from the Spikes mode. These locations will cause the cube to bounce when you come into contact with them, enabling you to go farther. Similar to Glowing, there is a leaping mechanism in the Orbital Thrust , but it takes the shape of orbits. These orbits make it easy to get away from rows of sharp objects. One could argue that Gravity Chaos is the most challenging mode. As you move the cube forward on the platform, golden halos will meet you here. The cube rises and continues after passing through this halo, turning the platform upside down. Universe of Chaos encompasses the chaos universe, true to its name. Similar to Gravity, your attention will be diverted by numerous aspects; thus, it's imperative to defy gravity here as well. You are completely in the blue during the Blue Rush . There are some bounces and halos here, much like in the previous game modes, although some are not recommended. Because occasionally employing these will bring you straight up against the problem. You'll notice in Jumping that several obstacles have shifted to face the cube. Furthermore, it won't be charming because some spiky items are oriented directly toward the cube. You can play games in total black and white with the Black and White mode. You will observe direction arrows in Flash Frenzy . The cube moves swiftly across items when it comes into contact with them. In the Final Lap , the sum of all modes can be found. What is Geometry Dash FreezeNova? Geometry Dash FreezeNova is a 2D arcade game where you try to keep the cube away from the spiky objects on the platform. Contact with any pointed object returns the cube to the beginning. You must avoid obstacles as much as possible to get the highest score! Controls Press the W, Space, or upper arrow keys to make the cube jump over the obstacles. You can constantly find exciting and new games when you stay connected! Geometry Dash Logo created by OnlineGames.io team

title: 8 Ball Pool Billiard
description: Are you ready for your digital pool gaming experience? 8 Ball Pool Billiard is an online pool game where you can play with other players or against AI opponents. The idea of ​​playing billiards against artificial intelligence sounds intriguing. It can also be delightful to play billiards with online players. You can view online players on the right side of the screen. You can choose the game you want to play billiards on by pressing the "refresh" button. Decide who you will play with and dive into a pool marathon! How to Play 8 Ball Pool Billiard? You have decided who you will play with, and now it is time to start the game. If you press the "play" button written in the red box, the game begins. The game decides who will break the balls. It can start with you or your opponent. Whichever type of ball you pass through the pocket first, you try to pass those balls through the pocket throughout the game. The aim here is to pass all 8 balls through the pockets one by one and reach the black ball. You win the game if you pass the black ball through any pocket. How do I send the ball into the pocket? After aiming, press and hold the cue stick and pull it back. The further you pull back, the stronger the shot intensity will be. When you release it, you send the ball in your intended direction. What to avoid in 8 Ball Pool Billiard? If you send the cue ball into the pot instead of your own ball, or if it does not touch any of your balls, it becomes your opponent's turn. When the cue ball enters the hole, and it is your opponent's turn, your opponent has the right to position it wherever he wants. Additionally, if you put the black ball into a pot without sending all your balls into the pockets, you lose. Suggestions Choosing which type of balls you will play with before starting the game is wise. Make your job easier by selecting the type of ball, solid or striped, that has fewer obstacles. It may be beneficial to start sending the balls with easy shots. You can reduce the crowd on the billiard table by hitting the balls in the ideal place with no blocks in front of them. You may need to be strategic in this game. You can make it difficult for your opponent to prevent him from quickly sending his balls into the pots. Create obstacles for them. When you aim to hit the ball, a thin line will appear. This means that if you shoot in that direction, the ball will move accordingly. You can make more precise shots using this. You can consider making curve shots when your opponent's balls are in front of your balls, or there are other blockages. Customization 8 Ball Pool Billiard offers you a range of upgrading options. You can shape your billiard table and your cue according to your liking or strengthen the target line's length, making your playing easier. You may also change your avatar. Controls Use your mouse and left mouse buttons to move your cue and hit the ball. You May Also Like If you love playing 8 Ball Pool Billiard, you may also try Rummikub , an old Romanian tile game that you can play with 2, 3 or 4 people. title: Luxury Highway Cars
description: Luxury Highway Cars is an online driving game where you drive six luxury vehicles from top car brands. Start your engine, pick your car, and take on the highway to perform close overtakes for high scores. Inspired by Highway Traffic, this game adds luxurious vehicles to the excitement. 🏎 Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Drive/Steer/Brake F Key: Activate Nitro C Key: Change Camera View Luxury Highway Cars Overview With glamorous luxury cars in the garage, it is a bit shiny here! There are six super cars with insane speed limits to choose from. Your goal is the same as Highway Traffic: select your vehicle, get in the driver’s seat, and overtake other vehicles on the highway. However, you need to be careful all the time since other drivers are unpredictable. You must avoid crashing into any other vehicle so as not to get your car damaged. Keep checking the health bar of your car at the bottom of the screen. Luxury Cars to Unlock in Luxury Highway Cars 💎 In the garage, there are six luxury vehicles at your disposal. The Mercedes sedan model is accessible to all players. For the rest of them, you need to overtake cars and earn money to unlock them. Gamie has listed the car brands and their models below! Mercedes-Benz CLA 200: Free Porsche 911: Buy for＄5000 Cadillac Escalade: Buy for＄10000 Bentley Continental GT: Buy for＄15000 Rolls-Royce Phantom: Buy for＄20000 Mercedes G Wagon: Buy for＄25000 Perform Close Overtakes 👀 While each normal overtake earns you +100 points, a close overtake increases this number to +133 points. If you are able to leave vehicles behind one after another by creating combos, the points will double! Additionally, keep in mind that overtaking vehicles at high speeds also increases the points you get. Gamie suggests unlocking the nitro feature on your car. This way, you can easily speed up. Tips & Tricks for Luxury Highway Cars 🐢 Start slow. This is a highway, not a rocket launch. ❗ Stay in control. Your car is a luxury, not indestructible. 🤑 Create combos by overtaking many cars in a row. Easy money. 👽 Other drivers act weird. Trust nobody. 💥 Do not touch other cars. Luxury paint is expensive. Developer Fuego! Games developed Luxury Highway Cars. Similar Games Did you enjoy playing Luxury Highway Cars ? You may also try playing Street Traffic Racer ! title: Rummy
description: Rummy is the favorite of most card game players. Easy-to-understand rules and fast-speed gameplay make the game a top choice among other card games. Playing a card game online without the need for a fellow is the biggest flex of the Rummy game. If you're seasoned in Rummy, you can start to play directly, no login required. And the controls are intuitive drag and release mechanics. If you're new to Rummy, no worries! We'll explain the rules as simply as possible so as not to wreck your brain (we know learning card game rules is kind of torture sometimes). But first, let's get you acquainted with the controls. Controls Drag a card with your mouse to move it. Release to place the card. How to Play Rummy? Players use a standard 54-card deck, including 2 jokers. You'll be dealt 13 cards at first. At each turn, you'll draw cards from the face-down deck or discard pile. At the end of your turn, discard a card (pick from the ones that you think you'll not use later). Your aim is to create as many melds as possible. But what is a meld in Rummy? Melds: A meld is a combination of 3 or more cards. Examples include: Sequence (A♠️,2♠️,3♠️): Three cards in a row of the same suit. Set (A♣️,A♦️,A♥️): Three cards of the same rank but of different suits. Jokers: Act as wild cards and can replace any card within a meld. You can place your melds on the table and add to existing melds, including those of other players. Laying off cards practically means turning cards into scores. Round Win: You will win the round when you discard your last card. Game Win: Accumulate 500 points across all rounds, and you'll win the game. It's as simple as that. You can also find a tutorial in the game to see the rules in practice. Next, we'll explain how the score is calculated. Game Score Points are calculated based on the total score of melded cards minus the points for the remaining cards in hand. Each card has a distinct score in Rummy. So, try to discard or meld the cards with high score values first. Aces: 15 points Jokers: 15 points Face Cards: 10 points 2-9: Face Value Game Modes This Rummy game has 3 distinct game modes: 2 Player : Classic game against an AI opponent. 3 Player : Adds more melds to complete. Unlock this mode by watching an ad. Speed Mode : For experienced players who prefer faster gameplay. Unlock by watching a short ad. Developer MindWayTech created this game. More Card Games Aces, kings and queens... If you like the world of card games, you're in the right place. With smooth animations, easy-to-understand tutorials, and multiplayer options, OnlineGames.io will be your favorite spot to draw a card. What would you like to play next? Uno ? Or a single-player Klondike Solitaire ? Take a look and find your title.

title: Pool Club
description: Pool Club is an online pool game in which your goal is to shoot 15 balls into the 6 pockets of a billiard table in a given time. Aim, draw your billiard cue, and release to shoot. That’s it! Before time runs out, send all the balls into the pockets. Join the Pool Club, and show everyone your billiards skills. 🤩 Controls Drag & Drop: Hit the Balls On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. Pool Club Overview Pick up the cue stick, and let’s begin the eight-ball session! There are 15 balls placed on the billiard table. Each one has a different color and number. Your main objective is to shoot all the balls into the pockets of the table one by one. However, keep in mind that you have 90 seconds. Within this time frame, you should send as many balls as you can into any pocket. Try not to pocket the cue ball, you lose 20 points! Break Shot! 🎱 Select a ball, drag your cue stick, and drop it to shoot the ball. With your first shot, you should scatter solid balls and striped balls across the billiard table. It means “Break Shot” in the billiard glossary. After the break shot, you can start to hit the cue ball to hit your object balls. In the pool, you cannot hit the object ball directly. Pocket Object Balls 👊 In each eight-ball session, you have 90 seconds to pocket all the object balls. When you successfully pocket an object ball, you earn +50 points and +5 seconds. However, you should avoid pocketing the cue ball. Sending the cue ball into a pocket deducts -20 points from your overall score. Developer RavalMatic developed the Pool Club. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing Pool Club, you may also give 8 Ball Pool Billiard a try! Play pool solo or challenge yourself with players worldwide.
