title: Cop Simulator
description: Cop Simulator is an online simulator game where you are in the shoes of a policeman! As a law enforcer, you have complete freedom in the city. Turn on your siren and roam the streets freely or complete various missions to earn money. It will remind you of GTA: Vice City, but this time you are not a gangster! 🚨 Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Mouse: Camera View Spacebar: Jump C: Crouch F: Enter/Exit Car On smartphones and tablets, you can use the touch controls. Cop Simulator Overview In this GTA game, you will take on the role of a cop! As a policeman, you are responsible for the city’s safety. Turn on your sirens from the red button located on the upper right corner of the screen. Then, head to patrol all the streets of the city. Isn’t that cool? You can also complete missions to earn money! Drive over any mission point and accept the task that will earn you cash. Missions in Cop Simulator 👮 There are three different missions in Cop Simulator: Collect, Parking and Mega Ramp. In the Collect missions, you need to collect coins by following the yellow points on the map. Parking missions invite you to park your police car in a designated parking area. And Mega Ramp missions are for performing stunts with your vehicle. Each mission you complete will earn you +1000 in-game currency. Unlock New Police Vehicles 🚔 On the main menu, you will see a bunch of police vehicles to select from. At the beginning, you only have the old-school white police car. Use the money you earn from completing missions to unlock more advanced cars. Gamie’s favorite one is the armored SWAT vehicle! Developer Mirra Games developed the Cop Simulator. title: Worm Hunt Snake Game IO Zone
description: Worm Hunt Snake Game IO Zone is an online IO game where you try to grow your snake. Collect as much food as you can to be the biggest snake in the shrinking arena. Try not to bump into any other animals. Otherwise, they may eat you up! Play in the Timed mode, Endless mode, Gems Fever, or Gold Rush as you wish. 🐍 Controls Use the mouse to control the worm. Press the Spacebar or LMB to speed it up. Worm Hunt Snake Game IO Zone Overview Grow your worm into a snake by collecting the food in the play area. The more you collect, the bigger the size of your snake! However, keep in mind that if you touch any of the other snakes, you will be eliminated. So, these are the key rules : Dodge others and try to get the most food from the arena. Rule the arena by being the biggest snake! Game Modes of Worm Hunt Snake Game IO Zone 🎮 There are four game modes to choose from: Timed Mode: You have 5 minutes to defeat everyone in the Timed Mode. Push others into a corner and try to be the first one on the leaderboard. Endless Mode: There are no time restrictions in this mode. All you need to do is gain as much weight as possible by collecting food. Gems Fever: Your main aim in the Gems Fever mode is to collect as many gems as possible in 10 minutes. Gold Rush: You need to reach level 5 to unlock this mode. You need to collect the highest amount of gold in this mode. Improve Your Caterpillar 🐛 You can improve your caterpillar’s abilities from the “Improvements” section on the main menu. By enhancing its abilities, you can fight against other worms with more power. For example, improving Gluttony reduces weight loss in the red zone. Enhancing Ninja will also enable you to maneuver the worm fast. Developer Peaky Muzzle developed the Worm Hunt. title: Kick The Dummy
description: Sometimes, the stress of daily life overwhelms you, and you feel like punching the wall. All you need at that moment is to release that stress. There is just something for you here! Kick The Dummy is an action game where you punch, shoot, bomb and crash the robotic victim. In fact, this game is such a game that you can even throw a bench at the robot. The liquids on the screen, when you hit the robot and the sounds will help you a lot in satisfying your primitive emotions. We can understand you; this game was created with this motivation. Just enjoy the game and relieve your daily stress! How to Play Kick The Dummy? Kick The Dummy is a game where there are simple rules. When you tap the play button, the game will start. You will see a robot that you are going to beat badly and his bar showing the robot's durability at the bottom of the game screen. Just click the left mouse button to start slapping the robot. Weapons Kick The Dummy provides you lots of weapons to kick the Dummy's ass. You can view your weapon options from the upper side of the game screen. There, you will see six separate icons in a row, five giving you weapon options. The last button is to drop the weapon you picked up. You can find some weapon options listed below. Choose what you want and start relieving your stress! Gun Automatic Rifle Bomb Rocket Car Handcuffs Swords Hammer Suggestions This game offers you so many options... You can make your game very enjoyable by following the suggestions listed below! As you beat the robot and level up, you will earn coins. Spend these to buy new weapons for yourself. At first, you can only punch the robot, but your game will become more colorful as you get new weapons. For example, when you unlock the car, a car will appear on the screen and start crushing the robot to death. Amazing! You have the opportunity to change the background of the game. It would be more fun to beat the dummy in different places, right? Unlock new playgrounds and experience different environments with the coins you earn. Press the photo gallery icon on the game screen and select the background you want from the screen that appears. If blood effects and sounds bother you while playing the game, you can turn them off from the upper right corner of the game screen. Just click on the blood and sound icon to turn them off. Controls Using your mouse's left button is enough for you to enjoy Kick The Dummy. Similar Games If you like playing Kick The Dummy, you can also try Elastic Man , another stress reliever game where you pinch an elastic man, as the game's name indicates. title: Crazy Drifter
description: The streets are calling you! Crazy Drifter is a racing simulator game where you tend to drift often. This game is a different breath of racing games. I am sure you will be addicted to the adrenaline this game causes you to release! It offers you four different racing options with different gaming experiences: Drift, Time Attack, Knockout and Circuit. Choose the one that suits you the best and join the race! The streets have something to suffer from you… Game Controls Just like other racing games, Crazy Drifter is very simple and enjoyable to play. Use WASD keys or the Arrow keys to steer your car Use the Spacebar to use handbrake Use the Left Shift to boost Use the C key to change the camera view Use the R key to respawn Garage You will earn money as you play the game and win races. Your best investment option with the money you earn is to either buy a new car or modify your existing one. Or buy the most expensive car in the garage and change it. Crazy Drifter offers you five different vehicles and lots of modification features. Below, you will find what you can modify in Crazy Drifter: Paint Cage Hood Front Bumper Splitter Side Skirt Back Bumper Spoiler Exhaust Tips and Tricks This game will be competitive. Prepare yourself for this. There are some strategies to get ahead of other vehicles. You will be in the flowing traffic while racing with other cars on the streets. This is good on the one hand and bad on the other. You have a high risk of hitting other vehicles and getting left behind. However, you can also get ahead by squeezing the cars you are racing against with cars flowing in traffic. Since the game aims to drift, the vehicles are thrown a lot when maneuvered left and right. And the map you are racing on has some sharp twists and turns. It may be best for you to adjust your speed and steering wheel well around curves and slow down your speed from time to time. Remember that steering control is your biggest weapon in this game. Similar Games If you like playing Crazy Drifter, you should definitely try Drift Hunters Pro . Check out the Drift Games on OnlineGames.io for more options.

title: Idle Mining Empire
description: Idle Mining Empire is an idle game where you try to start a mining business from scratch. You will have very small profits at first. But over time, you can turn this mining investment into a giant business. Start from the bottom layer and get the mines from the soil. Bring these mines to the surface. You will soon be an idle tycoon miner! How to Play Idle Mining Empire You can start by purchasing your first mineshaft! Click on your worker to get mines from underground. The workers have to carry the coals they dug up using the elevator. Make sure the coals are brought to the surface. This job is a team effort. description: Take a walk in the city as a giant hole absorbs whatever you come across! You will start with a small black hole in Hole io . Start with consuming small objects and pedestrians. When you are big enough, you will be able to eat cars, blocks, and large buildings. You can chase after smaller holes to get even larger. Hang around high-traffic areas of urban streets to satisfy your hunger even more. Soon, you will be a horrifying disaster for both city-dwellers and other players. Tips and tricks for Hole io Here are some tips for becoming the ultimate hole on Hole io. Slow down a little when absorbing tall objects, especially poles. While going too fast, the objects will fall down to the ground, not into the hole. Keep an eye on the time clock on the upper left. Each session will only take two minutes. Get as big as you can in this period, and if you can't, no big deal. Wait for another round to take your revenge. Try to stay away from larger holes than you. Smaller holes drop into bigger ones. There is a way to consume more oversized objects than your hole since it's all about physics. If you approach one edge of the object and slightly slide to the other edge, you will see the objects dropping into the hole. It is much easier to grow by doing this. But be careful; it takes more time than the usual way. Features 4 game modes are available: Classic, BR, Teams, Solo Run Customizable skins 14 game maps ready to explore Developer Hole io was created by Voodoo. title: Wordle
description: Wordle is a daily word puzzle game that challenges you to guess a five-letter word in a maximum of six attempts. Each guess provides a color-coded feedback. Grey for incorrect letters, yellow for misplaced ones, and green for correct placements. Josh Wardle created this game as a personal gift to his word game fan girlfriend. And the game unexpectedly took over the internet, becoming a part of morning routines, Twitter, Facebook, WP group chats, and even friendly rivalries. You may be wondering what's the hype about (like me in three years ago). So here on this page, I'll do my best to explain Wordle's rules, scientific strategies, and my personal story on how I first stumbled upon Wordle. I Didn’t Plan to Play Wordle I don’t remember exactly when I first heard about Wordle, but I do remember the first time I played it. It was one of those nights in the pandemic years when I was mindlessly scrolling through my phone, half-listening to a YouTube video in the background. An account on Twitter had shared this weird little grid of green, yellow, and gray squares with a caption like, “Today’s was tough!” No link, no explanation. Just a bunch of squares. At first, I ignored it, but then I saw another one. And another. It was everywhere. People weren’t just playing this game, they were showing off their results like some kind of secret club. As I have more drive than a GPS on a road trip, curiosity got the best of me. So I Googled it. I remember clicking the link, staring at the empty grid, and thinking, “Alright, let’s see what all the fuss is about.” I typed in the first five-letter word that came to mind (probably something random like “PLANT” because why not?). Some letters turned yellow, and I felt a small rush, like I had cracked part of a puzzle (felt like Alan Turing for a sec, haha) The next few guesses were pure guesswork, but I somehow got the word in five tries: LATTE. And that was it. One game per day. Just a little word challenge and then… nothing. At first, I thought, “That’s it? Just one word?” And kept looking for a website where I could play unlimited wordle puzzles. It was not fair that we were limited to only one word. There should have been more. I know I sound like a crying baby, but I'm always craving for more when it comes to gaming. And if you're anything like me, this game is for you. Here is the unlimited Wordle on OnlineGames.io. No daily limits. Play as many times as you like. Controls On Computer Type your word using the keyboard. Press Enter to submit your guess. On Mobile Tap the on-screen keyboard to enter letters. Tap Enter to submit. How to Play Wordle Guess a five-letter word to start. You have max six guesses . So think carefully before submitting. Random words are not allowed. They should be valid five letter words. The game gives you color-coded feedback after submitting a valid word. Gray: Letter is not in the word . Yellow: Letter is in the word but in the wrong position . Green: Letter is in the correct position . Use the clues to refine your guesses within six attempts. First, focus on finding more and more letters, it doesn't matter if it's green or yellow. Then, focus on the letters' positions and find the word. If you solve it, great! If not, the game reveals the answer at the end. A Scientific Wordle Strategy I found an interesting article from Notre Dame University that dives into the frequency of letters in the English language using the Oxford Dictionary. It was originally used by Samuel Morse to create simpler codes for Morse code, but it’s also super useful for word games like Wordle. For example, E is by far the most common letter, showing up in over 11% of words, followed by A , R , I , and O . So, how does this connect to Wordle? Well, if you're like me, starting with the right letters can make all the difference. The game only lets you guess six times, so you want to make those guesses count. Knowing that letters like E and A are used so frequently, I try to include them in my first guess. Some solid starting words to try could be SLATE , CRANE, TRACE, AUDIO, ARISE, or ROAST —all use those common letters and give you a good shot at figuring things out early. By using the most frequent letters, you're stacking the odds in your favor right from the get-go. And there’s more to it than just picking the right letters; looking at common bigrams (pairs of letters) and trigrams (triples of letters) can really help you, too. Some of the most common bigrams are TH , HE , IN , and EN , which means that if you notice those letter pairs in your guesses, you’re likely onto something. The same goes for trigrams like THE , AND , and ING , which show up a lot in English words. So, when you’re stuck, keep these patterns in mind. In short, knowing the frequency of letters, bigrams, and trigrams can make your Wordle game a lot easier. By incorporating these insights into your guesses, you’re taking a more methodical approach and increasing your chances of solving the puzzle before your six guesses run out! It's kind of like how Morse made things easier by focusing on the most common letters. Same concept, just applied to figuring out words in Wordle! Who Created Wordle? Wordle was created by Josh Wardle, and acquired by The New York Times in early 2022.

description: Can't get enough of classic, nerve-wracking arcade games? Dive into the pixelated chaos of Flappy Bird , the legendary tap-to-fly game as addictive as ever! Weapons in Horse Riding Simulator We briefly talked about weapons in the section above, but we wanted to go into a little more detail here. You can even find a horse made of legos here. Choose the horse that appeals to you the most and jump on it. Enjoy the Wild West together. But be careful of what you encounter on the road! Controls Use the WASD or the Arrow keys to move your cowboy. Use the 1, 2 and 3 number keys to change your weapon. Press the F key to mount or dismount. Press the Space key to jump. Use the L shift to sprint. Press the right mouse button to aim. Press the left mouse button to shoot. Use the Tab key to get back to the main menu. title: Monopoly
description: Playing Monopoly Online: Strategies, Tips, and Fun Features Think of a game where you can bankrupt your family with real estate and still claim it was all in good fun. Yes, it’s Monopoly , the classic board game of real estate, which has been a beloved pastime for generations. It's been a game where friendships are tested, loans are leveraged, bankruptcies are celebrated, and life lessons are taken. Monopoly was originally created in the early 20th century as "The Landlord's Game" by Elizabeth Magie. Her goal was to illustrate the economic theories of Henry George. But Monopoly outperformed this mission and became a classic along the way. The transition from physical board to online platforms has opened up a universe of possibilities. For once, you'll deal with a banker who's genuinely honest (computers really don't cheat, promise!). Now, Monopoly is accessible anytime, anywhere, with anyone. In this guide, we'll explore everything you need to know about playing Monopoly Online , from the basic rules to expert strategies. What is Monopoly Online? Monopoly has been the king of board games since it was first introduced in the 1930s. The objective is simple: buy properties, collect rent, and bankrupt your opponents . But Monopoly online brings a new layer of fun and convenience. Whether you're playing with family, friends, or strangers from around the globe, the online version cuts out the hassle of shuffling cards, moving pieces and managing paper banknotes. It also eliminates rule squabbles and, best of all, requires no physical board. Online Monopoly runs in real-time, and everything is automated, so you can focus on your strategy more. Plus, the online format opens the door to exciting new features, from virtual board animations to special rule variations. How to Play Monopoly Online If you're new to online Monopoly, here's a quick guide to get you started: Game Setup To begin playing online, simply open OnlineGames.io and type Monopoly in the search bar. Once you've landed on the page, enter a nickname and click the play button. This version embraces a similar layout to the Monopoly World Tour. The game board features a total of 40 spaces, categorized as follows: 28 Property Spaces: Includes 8 countries (each with 2-3 cities), 4 airports, and 2 companies. 3 Treasure Spaces 3 Surprise Spaces 2 Tax Spaces 4 Corner Spaces: Start, Go to Prison, Prison, and Vacation. The Rules of Monopoly Online The rules of online Monopoly follow the traditional format with a few tweaks. Here's a quick refresher of the basics: Players take turns rolling the dice to move their tokens around the board. In the online version, you don't have to count squares; your token lands in the right spot all by itself. Landing on Treasure squares rewards you, while surprise squares may be a reward or a penalty. Every time you pass from the starting point , you’ll get 300$ . If you land on an unowned property, you can purchase it . If you land on a property owned by another player, you must pay rent . Once you own all the properties in a country set, you can build houses and hotels to increase rent. The goal is to bankrupt all your opponents by making them pay high rent on your properties and causing them to run out of money. To win, you need to bankrupt all other players. The last player standing with money and property is crowned the winner! Key Features of Online Monopoly Online Monopoly isn't just a digital version of the traditional game; it offers exciting new features that enhance the gaming experience: Play with your friends or join a match with strangers. The game offers real-time multiplayer games with up to 6 players. If you're short on time, the online version is a game-changer; it speeds things up with automatically dealt cards and distributed cash. It lets you tweak the rules to match your preferences, like playing with or without house rules or altering rent prices, vacation cash, auction rules and many more. The chat feature allows you to meet and discuss trades with other players. Customizable Rules You can turn on or off the following rules depending on your preferences in a private game room. x2 rent on full-set properties: If a player owns a full property set, the base rent payment will be doubled Vacation cash: If a player lands on Vacation Square, all collected money from taxes and bank payments will be earned Auction: If someone skips purchasing the property they landed on, it will be sold to the highest bidder. Don't collect rent while in prison: Rent will not be collected when landing on properties whose owners are in prison Mortgage: Mortgage properties to earn 50% of their cost, but you won't get paid rent when players land on them Even build: Houses and hotels must be built up and sold off evenly within a property set Starting cash: Adjust how much money players start the game with. The default is 1500$, but you can change it between 500$ and 3000$. Randomize player order: Randomly reorder players at the beginning of the game Maximum players: You can adjust how many players can join the game from 2 to six players. Private room: You can set your room to be private. So players cannot access it from the lobby. You need to send an invitation or URL to invite your friends if you choose this option. Strategies for Winning Monopoly Winning at Monopoly is all about strategy. Here are some key tips to help you become a real tycoon: Don't wait for the perfect property; grab what you can afford from the get-go. The more you own, the more control you have. Remember, even the less glamorous properties can become gold mines if managed well. Properties like New York and San Francisco are great investments in the game. You can also aim for airports and water and electric companies to build cash quickly early in the game. The most valuable properties on the board are often the ones with high traffic. Try to monopolize them early. Here's the rundown of the most sought-after countries: USA, England, France, Japan, Germany, Italy, Israel, and Brazil. Aim for complete color sets for higher rents . The moment you have all the properties in a country, start building. Houses increase rent exponentially, and hotels can be the final nail in your opponents' financial coffins. Trading is key to becoming a Monopoly. Always look for opportunities to strike deals with other players . But don't be too quick to part with properties that might bite you in the backside later. To trade, just click that 'Trade' button on the right side of your screen during your turn. You'll definitely need to know how to negotiate like a pro. Always maintain enough cash to cover rent or unexpected expenses, as running out of money can quickly lead to bankruptcy. At the same time, holding onto all your money without investing will not get you anywhere. Unlike real life, in Monopoly, money in the bank doesn't earn interest. Find a balance between spending and saving . If you're low on cash, you can mortgage properties you don't need to fund your needs. Familiarize yourself with which properties are most likely to be landed on based on dice probabilities . The spaces around Jail, for instance, are hotspots due to the chance of rolling doubles or not. Early in the game, get out of jail for the cost of 50$ because you need to be outside buying properties asap. However, later on in the game, you can use your jail time wisely to avoid expensive properties or to plan your next move. When you see a player on the verge, push for their bankruptcy . Remember, the game ends when all players are bankrupt, not when you've collected the most properties. Every game of Monopoly is unique. Be prepared to adjust your strategy depending on your property holdings, available cash, and your opponents' moves. Often, the smartest approach is to pivot your tactics mid-game . Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) Can I play Monopoly online for free? Yes , you can play Monopoly for free on OnlineGames.io. Can I play with friends on different devices? Yes ! Monopoly allows cross-platform play, meaning you can play with friends on PC or mobile. Is there an age restriction for playing Monopoly online? Monopoly is generally suitable for players above 7 . What is the starting money for monopoly? Starting money is 1500$ by default, but you can change it if you agree it with other players. Can I play Monopoly 2 players? Yes , you can play Monopoly online from 2 players up to 6 players. Do you have to pay 50 to get out of jail in Monopoly? You have to pay 50$ or roll a double dice to get out of jail. What happens on vacation in Monopoly? No action is required . Players who land on the Vacation space enjoy a rest from paying rent or penalties during their turn. They can still get rent or other income. What happens if a player runs out of money in Monopoly? A player can run out of money and still continue. mortgage their owned properties to the bank for cash, sell houses or hotels back to the bank for half their purchase price, negotiate with other players on money, bonus cards or properties, click on the bankruptcy button to claim it and withdraw from the game. Why is Monopoly Online Popular? Online Monopoly continues to be popular because it combines the classic strategy of the original board game with the convenience of digital play. It's easy to access, and offers endless hours of fun for people of all ages. Moving the Last Token Monopoly Online brings the beloved board game into the digital age, offering much faster gameplay, multiplayer options, and a variety of versions to suit every player's preferences. Whether you're an experienced Monopoly player or just starting, there's never been a better time to play. So, gather your friends and get ready for a fun-filled session of online Monopoly!

title: Backflip Challenge

It is your best friend. 💦 Hold the jump too long. Splash. Sea time. 🦴 Jump too short. Oops. Bones go boom. ✈️ Flip in the air. Spin like a noodle. 👣 Feet together, please. No silly poses. title: Car Stunt King
description: Ready for a stunt ride in a Dodge? Car Stunt King is a 3D driving game that offers an exhilarating driving experience on an obstacle course . It features various game modes, including racing and police chase . What you can do with these cars will blow your mind! How to Play Car Stunt King? Select a map among several options, such as Arizona, Port, Street, and Wasteland. Complete obstacle courses driving a crazy car. Drive through ramps, avoid wrecking balls, perform flips, and collect coins. Use your coins to buy new car parts, including an engine, suspension, and tires. Or upgrade the ones you have to increase horsepower. If the car still underperforms in races, buy a new car in the garage and max the speed up. Shop Besides collecting coins on the road, there is an in-game currency feature. You will earn passive income in both gold coins and dollars. If you'd like to exchange your CSK dollars for gold coins, you can buy 500 gold coins for 5 dollars, 5000 gold coins for 50 dollars, and 50000 gold coins for 500 dollars. Garage Eleven different vehicles, such as Dodge, school bus, minivan, Cooper, bike, and monster truck, are available in the garage. Apart from that, you can buy new car parts and tune them to 20th-level performance. These parts are as follows: Engine: 10 different engines, upgradable up to 1200 HP Exhaust Pipe: Eases the load on the engine. The maximum effect is +12 HP Tires: Choose between the coolest tires and rims and increase the friction up to 1980 F Suspension: Absorbs the shocks after obstacles on the way, making driving smoother on rough surfaces Paint Job: You can paint the car in the colors of the USA flag Maps and Game Modes Car Stunt King offers 5 different maps and 3 game modes in total. Game modes are solo race, police chase, and pair racing. Maps featuring fantastic landscapes are Arizona, Port, Street, Golden Gate, and Wasteland. Arizona: 23 challenging levels with various obstacles in the desert Port: Drive in the vast port, stunt over containers. 24 levels are available. Street: Escape from cops and jump over buses. 20 levels are available. Golden Gate: 20 levels filled with fire rings, barrels, bridge stunts, and many more. Wasteland: Post-apocalypse obstacle course, dark but fun! In Pair racing mode, there are 7 racetracks and 7 cars to unlock. Racing with a few of the vehicles mentioned below will be a true challenge. Mahoney McQueen Black Hall McGovern WeisNehher Cooper OttoMan Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Left shift: NOS What to Play Next? If you like crazy driving games with lots of tuning and customization options, our offer is Drift Hunters 2 . With a number of cars in the garage and more realistic graphics than ever, an epic playtime awaits you! For more options, take a look at our most popular category, car games online . We do our best to provide our community with the latest releases. Keep coming back for the coolest games online!

title: City Stunts
description: City Stunts is a 3D driving game where your main job is to perform spectacular stunts with the most exotic cars in the world. Test your driving skills on high ramps. Many platforms on the city map allow you to make acrobatic movements with your vehicle. Choose your favorite vehicle and challenge the sky in this thrilling stunt game ! How to Play City Stunts The game offers many luxurious vehicles. After deciding which one you will drive on the city streets from the car selection menu, you are ready to set! Enter the city and perform flyovers using the sky-high ramps of different kinds. Or, you can wander around the map if you want. Performing drifts is also at your disposal. Fly Me to the Moon The best way to enjoy this car game is to perform acrobatic movements in the air. You will encounter many ramps on the streets. Head towards them at high speed and fly to the moon, as Frank Sinatra said. Don't worry about damaging your vehicle. You won't even find a scratch on it after hitting the ground. You can continue your way as if nothing happened! Choose Your Car There are 7 elegant cars to choose from. And you have the option to drive a bus in the game. It is up to you which one you want to drive. Most of them are similar to renowned brands such as Ferrari, Aston Martin, and Jeep. There is no unlocking restriction, so you can go with any of them. But keep in mind that each has its own specific features regarding weight and speed limits. These differences may impact the act of performing the stunts. Tips for Cool Moves To make flyovers, you must choose the most optimal car among the options. Many of them will allow you to do a somersault. But, for example, the bus or the jeep may not be the best option to perform such movements as they are heavier than the others. After the selection, enter a ramp at high speed by centering it. And try not to lose the steering control while moving on it. Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Space Key: Brake Developer City Stunts was developed by FreezeNova. Similar Driving Games If you like playing City Stunts, you may also enjoy Highway Cars . You will drive your car on a highway in the flow of traffic. You must dodge other cars on the road to avoid any accidents. Try to pass the vehicles as close as possible to get the higher points! For further options, you may look for other online driving games on OnlineGames.io. Bookmark the website to access new games easily!

title: Craftnite
description: Ever pondered how long Minecraft Steve would last in Fortnite's battle royale chaos? Sure, he's the master of gathering tools and crafting, but when it comes to gunfights, would he be as skilled? There's only one way to find out: dive into Craftnite . This game is the ultimate crossover where Minecraft's blocky charm meets Fortnite's survival-of-the-fittest vibe. Imagine if your two favorite TV shows decided to have a crossover episode - that's Craftnite for you. Here, you're not just surviving; you're thriving in a voxel-based world where you jump, climb, gather and engage in multiplayer battles. So, load up this browser game and experience the thrill of being the last one standing in a world where blocks meet combat in the most fun way. Controls WASD: Move Space: Jump Left click: Use item 1, 2, 3, 4: Switch item Enter: Toggle Chat Tab: Inventory How to Play CraftNite Your journey begins with just a pickaxe. Explore this Minecraft-like world, where every block could hold the key to your next weapon. Look for blocks shaped like weapons. Break them to snag everything from pistols to ping pong balls, sniper rifles to swords. You have four quick-access item slots. Switch between tools and weapons using the number keys for tactical flexibility. If you'd like to check your full inventory, press the tab. Build and climb over walls and ramps. Shooting down on your foes gives you a tactical edge. It's not just about having the high ground; it's about owning it. Use your resources and wits to last longer than anyone else. More Minecraft Games Craftnite brings the best of both worlds: Minecraft's blocky, creative freedom with Fortnite's survival and combat action. If you love strategy, crafting, and fighting, this is the game for you. If you like the style of Craftnite, you might enjoy other blocky battle games like Krunker.io . It also delivers fun multiplayer battles on maps like CraftNite. Can I play Craftnite on mobile? Currently, Craftnite is available as a browser game on desktops and laptops. A mobile version is not yet available, but you can play it on devices like Chromebooks. How do I win Craftnite? To win in Craftnite, you need to be the last player standing. Gather weapons and outlast the other players in the battle royale-style game. You can check the leadeboard and kill counts on the topright corner of your screen. Can I play Craftnite for free? Yes, Craftnite is completely free to play in your browser, no downloads required. Release Date October 2019

title: Crazy Cattle 3D
description: Crazy Cattle 3D is a one-player battle royale game where you control a bouncy sheep and try to knock other sheep in the herd. The physics are strange. And the movement of other sheep is absolute comedy. With a third-person perspective, you'll try to be the last sheep standing in the herd, all while the sheep slides and bounces uncontrollably. And if you die... The sheep explodes. In the funniest way. There are three maps to unlock. You start in Ireland, racing over green fields and dodging wooden fences. Win a few rounds to unlock snowy Sweden, where ice makes every turn a challenge. Keep going to open Egypt's sandy dunes, full of hidden fences and new colors. Each victory drops a shiny trophy into your personal trophy room. After Anna Mayberry released this game as a donationware on itch.io in April 2025, it blew up almost immediately, becoming viral on the internet. Play Crazy Cattle 3D now on OnlineGames.io and learn what's all the frenzy is about. And hey, please tell us your opinions. Did you like the game? What was the funniest part? Or do you think it's overrated? Let's meet in the comments below. Controls W A S D: Move your sheep Space: Restart Esc: Pause and open menu How to Play Crazy Cattle 3D Pick one of the three maps: Ireland, Sweden or Egypt. At first, only Ireland is unlocked Use WASD keys to move around. Avoid hitting fences or getting hit by another sheep, as that will make your sheep explode. Literally. Keep an eye on the sheep counter in the corner to see how many opponents remain. Win the round to earn a trophy, then jump right back on a new map. Even though it sounds simple, few people who could complete all three maps in Crazy Cattle 3D. Try now and see if you can! Maps Ireland: Rolling green hills with clusters of wooden fences that test your skills. Sweden: Ice-covered slopes make you slide faster and it's perfect charge for knockouts. Egypt: Sandy dunes hide fences and corners, setting up surprise attacks. Be warned that Eygpt is the most difficult map. Crazy Cattle 3D Becoming Viral Crazy Cattle 3D showed up on itch.io on April 12, 2025, and within a week, it was everywhere. Anna Mayberry's sheep battle royale is far from fancy, but its crazy physics and fast rounds hooked players worldwide so much that TikTokers and YouTubers started posting clips of sheep rocketing into fences and flying off cliffs. The hashtag #CrazyCattle3D racked up millions of views on social media platforms within one month. Even gaming blogs took notice, praising its simple charm and nonstop fun. On Reddit, fans shared tips on the best maps: Ireland's green hills, Sweden's icy slopes, and Egypt's sandy dunes while talking about tense last-sheep-standing moments. A few viral YouTube videos surpassed 100,000 views, drawing more players into the frenzy. Today, Crazy Cattle 3D sits in itch.io's trending list and is playable on OnlineGames.io. What started as a small indie experiment has become a global laugh-fest, proving that simple ideas and silly physics can go viral overnight. Developer Crazy Cattle 3D is developed by Anna Mayberry. She crafted the game to run smoothly on any desktop or laptop browser; no download is needed to play Crazy Cattle 3D on OnlineGames.io. Just open your browser and start charging! More Free Games You'll Love If you enjoy the wild physics and quick rounds of Crazy Cattle 3D, check out Duck Life Battle , a free online game where you train your duck for upcoming battles. It's easy to jump into, packed with chaos, and guaranteed to deliver just as many laugh-out-loud moments.

title: Color Sand Puzzle
description: Color Sand Puzzle is a block puzzle game in which you try to create horizontal rows with sand blocks. Just like Tetris, you need to place the sand blocks on the grid with matching colors. Arrange the blocks strategically and clear the lines to earn points. Check the leaderboard to see your rank among worldwide players! 🧩 Controls Left Mouse Button: Select/Place Blocks On smartphones and tablets, use the touch controls to select and place blocks. How to Play Color Sand Puzzle Welcome to the new Tetris-styled block puzzle game! The gameplay is simple: sand blocks appear on the screen, and you need to place them on the grid. Choose whichever block you want to arrange, then form a horizontal row of matching colors. When you complete a row with the same color, it will disappear automatically and earn you points. As long as you keep removing the sand blocks, you can continue playing! Arrange the Sand Blocks 🎮 You should place the sand blocks on the grid so that you can form a horizontal line. However, this line should consist of sand blocks of the same color. From the bottom of the screen, you can see the blocks that you have. Combine them strategically and form a line with matching colors. They will disappear from the grid once you are able to create a line. Create Combo Streaks 👾 To create combo streaks, you need to clear three different colors of sand blocks with only one move! For example, you formed a line with blue sand blocks from left to right and caused the green & yellow sand blocks to disappear at once; this is called combo streaks. You get higher points by creating combos. FAQs What happens if the blocks reach the top? The game ends when there is no more space for new blocks to fall. Do all blocks have the same shape? No. There are different shapes. Each shape is made of sand, and they vary in color. How do I get a high score? Clear many lines and play longer without filling the grid. Creating combo streaks gives more points. Developer Bravestars Games developed the Color Sand Puzzle. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing block puzzle games like this, you may also try out Block Blast. Unlike Tetris, Block Blast has no limits. All you need to do is fill in blocks in a row or a column, without regard to color. Looking for more? Check out our Puzzle Games Online tag by following the link.

title: Rooftop Snipers
description: Are you ready to duel? Rooftop Snipers is a pixelated 2 player shooting game where your sanctuary is the rooftop. You must handle the conflict and try throwing your opponent off the roof. You have only 2 options: fall from the ceiling or eliminate the opponent. Stay above the top is the key strategy! You can play the Rooftop Snipers against a computer or a friend. It is up to you! Start playing Rooftop Snipers on OnlineGames.io now! How to play the Rooftop Snipers? Rooftop Snipers gives you minimal movement options. But this is what makes this game a thrilling experience. You can find the controls below. 1 Player Controls Use the W key to Jump Use the E key to Shoot 2 Player Controls Use the I key to Jump Use the O key to Shoot Tips and Tricks There are some handy tips to use while playing the Rooftop Snipers. Jump to dodge! You can make your opponent confused in the area with plenty of motions. Plus, you can move back and forth by jumping. When you come to the roof's edge, try to jump and move forward. Hold the shoot to raise the weapon. When you press E, the gun starts to move. Use your best aiming skills to shoot your opponent correctly. Let go to the shoot. After seeking your angle, press the E key again for shooting. And get them out of the roof! In order to increase the chaos of the gameplay, Rooftop Snipers offers a variety of environments to play in. Keep an eye on what comes from the air. Because they are the ones who will influence your actions. They may give rise to glides. Each round will get more complicated, from normal conditions to more specific combinations like falling civilians, beach balls or weapons. Various factors affect the round's difficulty, like map, weapon, fallings, weather and ability. When the enemy gets shot, they will drift slowly towards the end of the roof. But more than hitting your enemy is required. You need to make sure that they fall from the top! How to aim in the Rooftop Snipers? If you use the suggestions in the Tips & Tricks section, your job will be simpler. But, I would like to give you another insider tip. The enemy will rebound more forcefully if you shoot at their feet. So, give them your best shot! Similar Games Access to Sniper Games on OnlineGames.io to find additional games if you enjoy playing the Rooftop Snipers.

title: Skibidi Toilet Shooting
description: Your most important mission is to destroy all the Skibidi Toilets! Skibidi Toilet Shooting is a 3D shooting game where you fight with many heads popping out of the toilets. They are trying to invade the metropolitan city that you live in. Your job is to survive their attacks as a soldier and clear them all from your homeland. Keep in mind that they outnumber you! You must proceed carefully in this action game to survive. Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Left-Click: Shoot Right-Click: Aim Spacebar: Jump Left-Shift: Run T: Slow Motion R: Reload G: Grenade V: Melee H: Stand Tall Tab: Pause Mouse Scroll: Switch Weapons Overview of Skibidi Toilet Shooting Before they headbutt you, you must eliminate all the Skibidi Toilets coming towards you. Once they spot you, they will run to you nonstop. Remember that you are alone in this huge city, and you need to learn to protect yourself. In the beginning, you will have a gun in your hand. As you make progress, you will unlock new kinds of weapons . Destroy as many skibidis as you need to level up in this first-person shooter game. Keep Your Distance In Skibidi Toilet Shooting, you will encounter many toilet heads. The best strategy is to keep your distance and eliminate them from afar . Additionally, you will have a few grenades at your disposal. When they get too crowded, you can use your grenade to destroy more than one of them with a single shot. We recommend that you wait for the best time to throw the grenade because you have a limited number of them. Eliminate 25 Skibidis You must take down 25 toilet heads from the city streets at each level. Otherwise, you cannot pass to the next level. There are ten challenging levels, each with unique weapons ranging from a shotgun to a M4A1 . At level two, you will get a helmet. Luckily, this will protect you from headbutts a bit! Moreover, you can use the weapons you acquired at the previous level by scrolling your mouse at each level. Developer G55 developed Skibidi Toilet Shooting. You May Also Like Playing Time Shooter may also be of interest to you. In the game, you will be face-to-face with red enemies. They are made of glass. When you shoot them down, they will shatter into a million pieces! For additional options, look up other online Skibidi Toilet games on OnlineGames.io. We are constantly trying to expand our game range. Please contact us if you have any suggestions or a wishlist!

title: Knife io
description: Knife io is an online battle game where you will find yourself in the Red Hell full of enemies! Remember that, in this arena, you are all by yourself. Wander around the battlefield and when you see an enemy, do not hesitate! To live is to eliminate all your enemies in this battle royale game. Controls Single Player WASD or Mouse: Move Spacebar or Left Mouse Button: Attack Two Players Player 1 WASD: Move Spacebar: Attack Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move L: Attack How to Play Knife io Start with giving your warrior a name. Then you can continue with 1 Player or 2 Players options. You can invite a friend if you want. After you are done, you are ready for an exciting battle! You will be in an arena with your knives in your hand. You are supposed to attack your enemies with these knives. However, keep in mind that in each attack, you will lose one of them! So, you need to constantly wander around the battle arena and collect knives. Avoid Falling Meteors You will encounter falling meteors, from time to time. The meteors will start to fall abruptly while you are running after an enemy. If they fall on you, you will get hurt. So, you need to avoid the falling meteors for staying longer on the arena. Power Ups in Knife io Collect the Hearts: You will see heart-shaped power ups in the arena. When you collect them, your life bar gets higher. They enable your warrior to live longer. The Infinity Symbols: The Infinity power ups allow you to have unlimited knives. In a brief time, you can throw as many knives as you want. You have no limit regarding knives! Developer Mao Games developed Knife io. Similar Games If you enjoy playing this io game, you may also like State.io . It is one of the best real-time strategy war games. Increase the number of soldiers you have, seize the regions! You can also look for other online battle royale games that onlinegames.io offers you. There are a variety of free games at your disposal. Feel free to engage each one of them!

title: Geometry Vibes 3D
description: Welcome to Geometry Vibes 3D , where you need quick reactions and precise timing in order to survive. You’ll face many challenges and obstacles that will block your path and threaten to end your race. Can you stay in control long enough to reach the glowing portal? Game Overview Geometry Vibes 3D takes the fast-paced action of Geometry Vibes and pushes it into a new dimension. Guide your arrow through floating cubes, rotating spikes, and twisting tunnels. Unlock levels one by one, chase high scores in Endless Mode, or face off against your friends in a 1v1 race challenge. Game Features Level-Based Progression: Clear one stage to unlock the next and climb the ranks. Endless Mode: Survive as long as you can in an infinite 3D maze. Duo Mode: Partner up and see who can last longer. Difficulty Stages: Rookie, Pro, and Expert challenges for every type of player. Customization: Change your arrow’s color, shape, and trail effect. How to Play PC Controls Fly up: Hold Left Click Fly down: Release Left Click Mobile Controls Fly up: Tap the screen Fly down: Release Good to Know! Master the depth: With 3D paths, obstacles may appear closer or farther away than they really are. Judging distance is just as important as timing. Stay calm under pressure: Many traps are designed to trick you into reacting too quickly. Sometimes patience is the key. Memorize patterns: Many levels feature repeating obstacle sequences. Learning them helps you prepare your moves in advance. Similar Games Enjoyed Geometry Vibes 3D ? Explore our Clicker Games library, where similar challenges are waiting, including Geometry Vibes , very similar but in 2D form.

title: Grow a Garden: Online & Offline
description: Grow a Garden: Online & Offline is an online simulator game where you become a farmer. Plant seeds on your farm, wait for the harvest and sell your fruits and vegetables at the farmers' market. Unlock new kinds of plant seeds to increase your farm’s product diversity in this Roblox-inspired world! Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Character Space: Jump LMB: Plant Seeds RMB: Rotate the Camera E Key: Harvest Corps How to Play Grow a Garden: Online & Offline In this farming game, you have a small plot of land. You need to buy seeds from the seed seller. Start by planting carrot seeds in your garden. After purchasing the seeds, head to your land and find a spot to sow them. Then, wait for the seeds to grow. Finally, harvest the crops and sell them to the seller. Keep in mind that the bigger the products, the more money you earn! As you make progress, you will be able to unlock exotic seeds such as raspberries, tomatoes, bamboos and blossoms like lilacs. Seeds Shop If you want to buy seeds but they are out of stock, we suggest you wait approximately 5 minutes. Every 5 minutes, Seeds Shop refreshes its stocks. Additionally, there will be new seeds to explore after the refresh time. Keep checking your local Seeds Shop! Make Your Way to the Obby Tree There are lots of seeds to unlock. Begin farming by planting carrot seeds ($10), then move on to strawberries and blueberries. After that, you can get blossoms like lavender, manuka flowers, orange tulips, and roses. The most precious seed to sow in this simulation game is to reach the Obby Tree. It’s the final seed to unlock. Before the Obby Tree, there is Ember Lily, which costs 15 million dollars! Developer GamePush developed Grow a Garden: Online & Offline More Farming Games If you enjoyed playing Grow a Garden: Online & Offline, you may also like playing Farmer Craft . Feed your animals to get milk and eggs, craft tools and weapons and try to survive! Check our Farming Games Online library for diverse farm adventures! Also, we are waiting for your comments in the comments section below.

title: Slow Roads
description: The sun sets low on the horizon. The gentle sounds of the engine blend in with the chill music from the radio. The road stretches like a ribbon ahead of you. Wildflowers, trees, lakes, and even birds are in a serene stillness. This zen scene on the open road is what you'll experience playing Slow Roads. Slow Roads is a chill driving game where you take a break from reality and ride endlessly from hills to vast plains. Customize the surroundings to match your mood, turn on some peaceful music, and simulate a blissful road trip online ! How to Play Slow Roads? Slow Roads is a 3D driving simulator that provides a serene and relaxing escape from real life. There is no mission to complete and no destination to arrive at. Create your own world instantly by choosing among a variety of surrounding options. Select your vehicle and start driving using the WASD keys. You can even toggle on auto drive by pressing F and enjoy the landscape view while lying back on your couch. Remember, it’s not a game of speed, stunts or drift but for relaxing with a peaceful browser game in your spare time. Yet, you can still speed up to 160 km/h using the cruise control. Now, let's move on to how many different combinations of surroundings you create in this cozy simulation game. Earth Maps Starting at home planet Earth and over the hills, you have 4 choices of options by altering the hills by switching between seasons. Spring: Aesthetic scene with lakes and flowers Summer: Feel the warm breeze and enjoy the view of various trees Autumn: The green blends with orange in vast forests Winter: Slippery roads and Christmas spirit all along Off-World Maps Apart from Earth maps, you can switch between Mars, Venus and Moon maps. Keep in mind that off-world maps may have different day and night cycles. Mars Venus Moon You can drive endlessly on the surface of Mars, surrounded by shiny rocks on the road. That's an experience that no other game can offer. Day and Night Cycle You can switch between day and night manually, or you can use the cycle timer to switch between day and night automatically every 3, 8 or 15 minutes. Remember to turn on the headlights when it's night. Sunrise Noon Afternoon Sunset Night Vehicles Choose your favorite one over all three electric vehicles Slow Roads feature. Roaster Bike Coach Bus Road Complexity The customization options are near to the limitless in Slow Roads. You can select between 5 complexity levels of roads. While the straight offers an easy driving experience, the hard creates gorgeous landscapes around the road. Straight Casual Easy Normal Hard Keyboard Controls Forward: W Left: A Backward: S Right: D Boost: Left Shift Handbrake:S Toggle handbrake: B Auto drive: F Reset: R Headlights: H Steer lock (hold): V Next scene: E Previous scene: Q Change camera view: C Mute: M Pause: P Toggle UI: U Toggle free cam: T Toggle cruise control: Z Increase cruise speed: I Decrease cruise speed: K Mouse Controls Hover the mouse to steer Forward: Left Click Backward: Right Click Boost: Left Click Gamepad Controls Forward: R2 Backward L2 Steer: Left Ball L1: Handbrake Triangle: Respawn X: Toggle Autodrive Left and right: Change weather Up: Change Camera Down: Headlights Developer Anslo created Slow Roads io. He is passionate about functional art. His latest project, Slow Roads io, showcases the incredible potential of 3D development in JavaScript while also generating stunning, scenic views. He mentions that this game is a heartfelt tribute to the Peak District and classic arcade rally games. More Games Like This If you enjoy driving simulation games like Slow Roads io, you can play the Coach Bus Drive Simulator next. In case, you're interested in more chill games online , you can have a creative play session for free on OnlineGames.io!

title: Obby Survive Parkour
description: Do you have what it takes to traverse colorful yet dangerous landscapes? In Obby Survive Parkour , there is no time to think ⎼ only to act fast as you face thrilling challenges at every step. Enter the ultimate Squid Game -themed playground, packed with dangerous traps and obstacles, all brought to life with high-quality 3D graphics. Get ready to enter a high-stakes adventure where one wrong move could cost you everything! Game Overview Run, jump, parkour ⎼ survive! That’s all you need to do in Obby Survive Parkour . It might sound easy, but every step hides imminent danger. You’ll need sharp reflexes and the right skills to reach the finish line ⎼ and every coin you collect brings you closer to unlocking surprises. The games of life and death await! Whether you want to traverse dangerous landscapes alone to test and train your reflexes, or challenge a friend to prove who’s faster, this game has it all. Choose between single-player survival runs or offline multiplayer mode. Nevertheless, the goal remains the same: run, jump and survive! How to Play Obby Survive Parkour? Single Player Survival Run Start playing solo anytime to get used to the thrilling yet threatening, obstacle-filled race. Beware! The path to the finish line is packed with many hazards such as lava rivers, tsunami waves, avalanche storms, rolling snowballs, and the classics 'Red Light, Green Light.' The goal is simple: survive until the end without being hit by environmental threats, falling, or getting eliminated by hidden dangers. The gameplay is very intuitive. Parkour! ● Move: WASD ● Jump: SPACE Keep an eye out! Move the mouse to control the camera and look around. Two Player Survival Run Grab a friend and jump into this multiplayer mode, where you’ll go head-to-head in a game full of competitive excitement. Both of you will race through the same obstacle-filled landscape, facing the same traps. To spice things up, you’ll also get access to power-ups like Freeze , Bomb , and Fast Run . Controls First Player Controls Reach the finish line! ● Move: WASD ● Jump or double jump: SPACE Don’t forget your power-ups! ● Freeze Powerup: Q ● Bomb Powerup: E ● Speed Powerup: F Second Player Controls Reach the finish line! ● Move: Arrow Keys ● Jump or double jump: SPACE Don’t forget your power-ups! ● Freeze Powerup: H ● Bomb Powerup: K ● Speed Powerup: L Good to Know! Customize your character: make the game even more fun by unlocking skins with in-game coins or by watching ads. There are 7 skins in total for players to choose from. Keep in mind, however, that unlocking a skin will not provide any gameplay advantage over other players. Use the power-ups and special moves: there are a variety of power-ups available for the player to choose from in the game. Below is a list of some of them. Freeze Freezes your opponents for a short duration, preventing them from moving. Use this power-up at the start of the game to get a head start while your competitors are left behind. Bomb Detonates a bomb that eliminates nearby players. Only those within one block of you will be affected, but they will respawn after 3-4 seconds. Use this window to gain the upper hand in the race. Speed Doubles your running speed, allowing you to quickly get ahead of your competitors. Be careful! This power-up makes precise movements harder, especially when turning left or right. FAQs Is Obby Survive Parkour compatible with mobile devices? Obby Survive Parkour is compatible with both iOS and Android devices, allowing players to enjoy the game anywhere, anytime. How does the offline multiplayer mode work? The multiplayer mode is easy to set up. Players simply need a device such as a computer or laptop and select the two-player mode. This will create a split screen, allowing both players to enjoy the game using their own controls. Similar Games Already won the race? If you’re ready to take on new dangerous environments, there are plenty of options to choose from. Be sure to check out Stickman Parkour or Obby Tower Parkour Climb . Both games deliver adrenaline-filled parkour where one wrong move means it’s game over!

title: Urban Sniper
description: Urban Sniper is an online shooting game with straightforward controls and 3D mechanics. As a sniper on duty, you will be given certain tasks on eliminating thieves, snatchers, terrorists, and mafia lords. Take your position and kill them before they escape. Save the city and be an urban hero. Refrain from harming any civilians, as it will result in the immediate termination of your duty. Consider investing in better-quality weapons as you progress through levels and gain more experience and coins. There are 21 levels in Urban Sniper, starting off easy for you to settle into your position. However, the game will become more challenging as you deal with career criminals. How to Play Urban Sniper? Controls are a piece of cake in Urban Sniper, but the game itself is not. Use the following controls to play Urban Sniper. Right Click: Aim Left Click: Shoot Mouse: Navigate and choose between menus Which weapons are available in Urban Sniper? There are 4 kinds of rifles in Urban Sniper: Blood Wolf: Default rifle when beginning the game, low reload time, average zoom and stability functions. Storm Rage: Very good zooming and magazine size at its value. Lower stability compared to competitors. Hawk Eye: Exquisite design with camouflage paint and a high-performing sniper rifle with fire rate and stability. Desert Warrior: Simply a masterpiece. Great composition and performance. You might have a hard time controlling this monster. Where can I play Urban Sniper online? You can play Urban Sniper on OnlineGames.io on your browser without downloading anything for free. title: Burnout Drift Hunter
description: Burnout Drift Hunter is a free online game you can play in your browser through onlinegames.io. The game is filled with adrenaline and offers hours of furious driving for players of all skill levels. Give it a try and unleash your inner drift master! Burnout Drift Hunter Instructions Choose your car, modify it to your style, and get ready to show your ultimate drifting skills. There are three different tracks you can play in Burnout Drift Hunter: Appreciate mountain views and bends of Rocky Pass Road while racing with your friends 🌄 Improve your drifting skills in the wide-open spaces of the Port 🚢 Enjoy Night Desert if you are a night owl 🏜 Maintain a high speed throughout the trail, use your handbrake to initiate drifts, and don't be afraid to get a little bit reckless! Keep your drift as long as possible to rack up high scores and coins. Avoid hitting other cars or street barriers. That might reduce your speed or even cause an early finish if you bump into those very hard. Features Offering three different surrounding options of your choice Play in your private room with a party of up to 4 players Fully modify and customize your car to your liking Practice your racing and drifting skills offline Controls ⬆️ or W: Gas ⬇️ or S: Brake ⬅️ or A: Steer Left ➡️ or D: Steer Right Space: Handbrake Left Shift: Boost C: Change camera B: Look back Can I play Burnout Drift Hunter with my friends? Yes, you can play Burnout Drift Hunter with up to 4 players. Create your room and invite your friends to have fun together. You can also play offline to practice and earn cash before competing against your rivals. How do I earn coins in Burnout Drift Hunter? You can earn coins by playing Burnout Drift Hunter. Coins will escalate based on your crazy drifting performance. Can I play Burnout Drift Hunter in full-screen mode? Absolutely, you can play Burnout Drift Hunter in full-screen mode. Click the MAKE GAME FULL-SCREEN icon on the top of the screen and enjoy the ultimate full-screen drifting experience. Remember to set texture quality to "HIGH" in the options menu to get the most out of game visuals. Can I save progress in Burnout Drift Hunter ? Burnout Drift Hunter saves your game data within your browser cache. Unless you delete the browser cache, your progress will be saved.
