title: Fashion Holic
description: Fashion Holic is an online girl game where you are a fashionista. You have modelling tasks to accomplish. Check your emails and start to prepare your girl for an upcoming event. Read your mails carefully and dress up the fashionista according to the dress code. This way, you can get the highest scores in this dress-up game! Controls Click on: to Pick the Best Outfits Fashion Holic Overview Meet with Anastasiya! She is a gorgeous fashionista. She loves dressing up elegantly. And, she constantly posts her outfits on her Instagram. The number of followers is steadily increasing. She gets offers for various magazine photo shoots, fashion shows, and opening events. Get her new dresses and accessories, dress her up for each event, and post her looking her best on Instagram! Follow the Dress Codes Enter your email address and read each email carefully. The event details will be sent to you via email. It says what kind of event you are being called for, what the dress code is, and how you should dress, Anastasiya. It is important to follow social norms. It’s not appropriate to wear sportswear to an exquisite occasion. Instagram Likes To unlock new dresses, hairstyles and accessories, you need to successfully complete your quest. Moving to the next quest will enable you to unlock gorgeous and elegant outfits for the upcoming events. Anastasiya should be the one who attracts the most attention at an event! Don’t forget to check your Instagram likes from time to time to earn income from your posts. Developer Gameloft SE developed Fashion Holic. Similar Girl Games If you enjoy playing Fashion Holic, you may also try Frozen Sisters Dream Wedding . In the game, you need to prepare Princess Elsa and Anna of Frozen for their weddings! For more online games like this, feel free to visit our Girl Games Online game library. Don’t forget to leave game tips for other players in the comments section below!

title: Murder Stone Age
description: Murder Stone Age is a spooky puzzle game set in prehistoric times. Try to take the place of a tribal leader. Find a suitable time to attack and steal his sheepskin. Then, you will act in his shoes. However, this time, you are the one in danger. Other tribal members will follow you behind your back. Do not let them attack you! ☠ Controls Spacebar or LMB: Action On smartphones and tablets, use the touchscreen. The Story of Murder Stone Age You must trust your instincts to survive in the Stone Age! In the beginning, you are just an ordinary caveman who belongs to a tribe. You need to attack the tribal leader and get his sheepskin. Follow him behind his back with a bone in your hand while he moves forward. Then, secretly attack him without getting noticed. Seizing the lead is the only way to survive in the wild. However, the real story begins when you murder the leader! Watch Your Back! 👻 Once you become the chief, you need to be more careful! The mysterious figures will try to take the lead. They will follow you while you are walking to your cave, trying to find a way to murder you. Before they attack you, turn your face to them by pressing the left mouse button or the spacebar. Your guardians will throw them into a dark dungeon full of bones. Loyalty Wins 🤝 You need to keep your eyes wide shut; being a chief threatens some people in the Stone Age. But even so, not all freaky people are your enemy! Some of them are loyal to you. While a caveman protects you from a falling piece of rock, the other one may pay his respect to you. Find the ones who are trustworthy! Achievements in Murder Stone Age Scary Dinner - Kidnapped by a strange woman. Falling Hazard - Got killed by a falling rock. Tiger Kiss - Kissed by a tiger demon. Fresh Meat - Got killed by poisoned meat. Tiger Cub - Eaten by tiger cubs. Rock & Roll - Got killed by a rock. The Offering - Sacrificed to the dinosaurs. Sharp Spear - Got killed by a spear. The Party - Roasted by the cannibals. Old Sins - Frightened by the spirit of the old chief. Developer iClickGames developed the Murder Stone Age. You May Also Like Did you like Murder Stone Age? You may also try playing Five Nights at Freddy's . As a security guard of the Freddy Fazbear's Pizza restaurant, you must survive from animatronics for five consecutive nights! Visit our Horror Games Online game tag for more options.

title: Egg Car Racing
description: Egg Car Racing is an online car game where the goal is simple but quirky— keep a fragile egg safe while navigating a bumpy terrain. This free game will test your driving skills, timing, and ability to stay calm under pressure as you race across 30 challenging levels. Can you protect the egg through every twist and turn? Play now and find out! What is Egg Car Racing? Egg Car Racing combines the fun of racing with the challenge of keeping a delicate egg unbroken. Your job is to drive a wobbly car with an egg onboard through rough roads, making sure it doesn't crack. Every bump and obstacle presents a new challenge, requiring careful acceleration, braking, and jumping. Unlock Eggy Cars as you progress, and try your best to protect the egg at all costs! Let's get to the grips now. Controls For Computers: W or Up Arrow: Jump D or Right Arrow: Move forward A or Left Arrow: Brake / Move backward For Mobiles: Use on-screen buttons to control jumping, moving forward, and braking. How to Play Egg Car Racing When you first load Egg Car Racing, you'll see a menu with different levels to choose from. Start with the first level to get the hang of the controls and gameplay mechanics. When you start the level, use the right arrow key (or the Move Forward button on mobile) to begin accelerating. Make sure to avoid sudden sharp turns or jerky movements that could cause the egg to drop. As you move forward, you'll encounter hills, bumps, and various obstacles. It's important to maintain control, especially on steep slopes. When going downhill, slow down to avoid the egg falling out due to the car's fast speed. Similarly, go slow when crossing bridges or narrow paths. Press the jump button (W/Up Arrow) at the right moment to clear obstacles such as rocks, trees, or gaps in the road. Be careful when landing, as excessive speed after jumping may cause the egg to break. Sometimes, the car may tilt due to uneven ground. Try to keep the car balanced and avoid tipping over. The egg may fall out if the car flips, so be sure to control the car's movements carefully. As you progress and complete levels, you'll earn coins. Use these to unlock new vehicles that provide better protection for the egg. Each vehicle offers different strengths, such as more space or sturdier build. Try each car and see which one works best for you. Race with Friends One of the most exciting features of Egg Car Racing is the multiplayer mode, where you can race against up to 3 other players. From the level selection menu, click the Multiplayer button at the bottom. Wait for your friends to join the race. You can play across devices, meaning you can join the same game with friends on their computers while you play on your mobile. Once everyone has joined, press Start Race to begin. In multiplayer mode, all players race through the same challenging terrain while trying to protect their eggs. The first player to reach the finish line with their egg intact wins the race and gets the bonus coins. But beware, racing against friends means even more pressure to drive carefully and avoid collisions that could cause your egg to crack! Final Thoughts Egg Car Racing is a fun, challenging game that combines racing and physics puzzles. Whether you're playing solo or with friends in multiplayer mode, the objective remains the same: keep the fragile egg safe. With these tips and tricks, you'll improve your skills and master the game in no time. Good luck, and have fun racing! If you love the challenge and excitement of Egg Car Racing, check out more free games like this! Explore other physics-based driving games online and improve your precision as you navigate even trickier roads. Developer Egg Car Racing was created by FreezeNova.

title: Five Nights At Candy's
description: Enter the eerie world of Five Nights at Candy's, where a seemingly innocent restaurant hides terrifying secrets. After the thrills of Freddy Fazbear's fade, a new job opportunity at Candy's Burgers emerges: a night shift security guard position. You spot the ad in the newspaper and think, "What could possibly go wrong? This seems easy enough." HELP WANTED! Candy's Burgers & Fries Family restaurant seeking nightshift security guard. Hours: 12 AM to 6 AM Monitor security cameras Ensure safety of the facility, equipment, and animatronic characters Not responsible for any injuries or disappearances $100.50 per week To apply, call: 1-888-CAT-CANDY The job seems simple... until night falls. What begins as a typical security gig soon turns into a nightmare. With the restaurant cloaked in darkness, you'll need to use infrared cameras to monitor the bizarre and unsettling happenings around you. Can you survive the shift? Or will the sinister forces lurking in the shadows claim you as their next victim? The terror escalates with every passing hour; jumpscares are a step away... Controls Left Click: Select and view cameras. Double Click: Activate or deactivate the infrared mode on the selected camera. How to Play Five Nights at Candy's The restaurant is pitch black at night, but you have infrared technology to assist you. Click on a camera to view its feed and click again to activate infrared mode. This allows you to monitor the surroundings and detect any unusual movements. You can move between any cameras equipped with infrared. Turn it off by clicking the camera again when you're finished. Cameras CAM-04 and CAM-06 are positioned across from each door. Use infrared to keep a close eye on any activity near the doors and react quickly to potential threats. Each door has a button to shut them down and a corresponding power meter. Closing a door consumes energy, and the longer a door remains shut, the more energy it drains. Monitor the power levels to ensure you don't run out and get trapped! More Scary Games If you're into the chilling atmosphere and intense survival challenges of Five Nights at Candy's, you might want to try Five Nights at Freddy's 3 . It's another terrifying job at a haunted location, but this time, the danger comes from the deteriorating animatronics in a rundown attraction. If you're ready for more creepy nights, horror games online will keep you on the edge of your seat.

title: Papa's Sushiria
description: Ever accidentally broke something... and somehow ended up running a whole restaurant because of it? That's exactly what happens in Papa's Sushiria . One minute you're visiting the newest sushi place in town, and the next. BAM! You're rolling rice, slicing tuna, and shaking up bubble teas like a pro. Now it's on you to keep the sushi bar running smoothly. Take customer orders, cook everything just right, and don't forget the boba drinks. Whether you're into California rolls or loaded spicy combos, you'll get to build them all. It's fast, it's fun, and yeah, it gets a little chaotic, just like real food service. Controls Use your mouse to navigate menus, select ingredients, and complete all tasks. Click, drag, and hold to prepare food items step-by-step. How to Play Papa's Sushiria Running Papa's Sushiria might sound overwhelming at first, but once you get the hang of it, it's super satisfying. Everything starts when a customer walks in and places their order. You'll need to pay close attention to what they want—every little detail counts, from the type of rice to the fillings, sauces, and even their bubble tea preferences. Once you've got the order down, it's time to cook the rice. This part is all about timing. You scoop the right amount, start the cooker, and wait for it to finish. Don't leave it too long or it'll burn. While it cooks, you can get things ready for the next steps. Next comes the fun part: building the sushi roll. Lay out the seaweed, spread the rice, stack the fillings in the right order, then roll it up just right. It might take a couple tries to get perfect, but it feels great when you nail it. After rolling, you'll slice the sushi evenly and add any toppings or sauces the customer asked for. Presentation really matters here. Then it's off to the drink station. Most customers want a bubble tea to go with their food, so you'll need to pick the correct tea, the flavor, and how much ice and boba to add. It's a mini-game on its own and a fun way to break things up. Once everything's ready, hand the order over and see how you did. The customer will rate you based on accuracy, timing, and how neat everything looks. High scores mean bigger tips, which you can use for upgrades, new furniture, or snazzy uniforms. As you level up, more ingredients and customers unlock, making each day a little more exciting—and a little more hectic! Developer Papa's Sushiria was created by Flipline Studios, known for their entire lineup of fun restaurant and time management games. More Online Papa's Games to Play Next Love the satisfying rhythm of cooking and serving? You'll probably enjoy other Papa's titles like Papa's Burgeria and Papa's Pancakeria . All of these are browser-based, fun, and free to play online on OnlineGames.io!

title: Space Waves
description: Ride the waves of the galaxy in Space Waves ! In this online game, similar to Geometry Dash , you'll pilot a spacecraft through mesmerizing neon landscapes, dodging spikes, walls and other obstacles and collecting coins as you race through two vibrant worlds. With 20 levels of increasing difficulty, your reflexes will be tested to the max. The heart-pumping soundtrack adds so much to the gameplay that you will feel like you are drawing the beats! Your ink? It's the waves you left behind with your spacecraft. So let's see the skilled gamers, game on! Controls Computer Ascend: Hold the spacebar or left mouse button Descend: Release the spacebar or left mouse button Mobile Hold down your finger to rise, release to fall. How to Play Space Waves Guide your wave through futuristic neon landscapes, dodge obstacles, and collect stars to boost your score. Unlike Geometry Dash, you'll move in a zigzag pattern this time. If you hold the button, the wave will go upward. If you release the button, the waves will move downward. In case you need to go straight in a thigh corridor, click or tap quickly and repeatedly to create small zigzag movements. Made a mistake? It's okay. A time reversal feature gives you a second chance to get back on track. Complete two worlds, each including ten difficult levels. At the beginning, you can pick the first two levels of each world. You need to unlock the rest by completing previous levels. Space Waves Game Features Two unique worlds with 10 levels each Customizable wave with appearance and color options Neon-inspired environments and dynamic music Simple one-handed controls More Dash Games If you enjoyed Space Wave, check out other Dash games like Geometry Jump . The pace is even more faster than space waves but it has a reversed control mechanism. Play it on OnlineGames.io and let us know in the comments which dash game you liked more.

title: Flip Bottle
description: Flip Bottle is a fun and addictive physics-based platformer where you need to flip a plastic water bottle from one surface to another without falling. Jump across kitchens, living rooms, and more, using everyday objects like toasters, microwaves, shelves, TVs, and speakers as landing spots. Controls Just left-click on the mouse to flip the bottle and time your jumps perfectly. Tip : Be careful because some shelves might move from time to time. This way, your flips become even more challenging! As you progress, levels become trickier, each one a uniquely designed obstacle course. Plus, you can unlock new bottles like soda, champagne, and more to spice up your gameplay. Each completed level brings you 100 coins. Can you land the perfect flip or will you crash to the floor?

title: Back to School Uniforms Edition
description: Back to School: Uniforms Edition is an online fashion game where you prepare your girl for the new school semester. She must be the one who attracts all the attention in the school hallways. Pick a hairstyle, choose one of the most attractive uniforms and put your school bag on your shoulder now! Controls Mouse Click: to Pick Outfits Tap: on Virtual Buttons on the Smart Phones or Tablets Back to School: Uniforms Edition Overview The school bell will ring soon! Are you ready for the new school year? Spin the chart and start dressing up your girl. Choose a lovely hairstyle, and match the outfits to create the best school uniforms by mixing styles. Your main aim in this dress-up game is to prepare the girl in such a way that everyone will remember the school corridors with her. Inspired by Diverse Cultures You can unlock school uniforms from countries like the United States, the United Kingdom, France, Japan, and South Korea. Reflect the girl's culture through her outfits! Start by giving her a beautiful hairstyle, ranging from elegant straight long hair to fuzzy hair, cute braids, or cool waves! Then, you can continue with the school uniforms. Combine the Uniforms There are lots of school shirts and skirts to choose from. Try combinations by matching styles. Shirts with ties or warm, cozy wool sweaters are in the wardrobe. Cleverly choose among the tops to reflect the culture! After selecting a top, match it with a plaid skirt or a plain black skirt to create a sophisticated look. Make sure to reach the top of the heart parameter! Developer Gamerina developed Back to School: Uniforms Edition. More Games Like This If you like being in the spotlight, we recommend playing Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up . Prepare your doll for fashion contests or go for a livestream to earn stars! There are many free online dress-up games on OnlineGames.io that you can enjoy playing. Look for more options for exciting challenges!

title: Nuts and Bolts Puzzle
description: Ever gotten lost in a maze of planks and screws when trying to build an IKEA shelf? Well, Nuts and Bolts Puzzle is like the opposite of that! Instead of frantically trying to assemble stuff, you’re gleefully taking everything apart and the best part is: no confusing instructions required. In this fun online game on OnlineGames.io, you’ll see a board jampacked with wooden planks, each secured by bolts. Your mission is to unscrew every single bolt and move them around so all the planks come tumbling down. And there's also a race against the clock with silly and fast puzzle action. If you’ve ever secretly wished you could just toss that unreadable furniture manual out the window, then Nuts and Bolts Puzzle is your chance to feel like a master builder. Take everything apart and have a blast doing it! Controls Point-and-click (or tap) to screw or unscrew Unscrew Bolts When you open Nuts and Bolts Puzzle, you’ll notice several wooden planks secured with bolts. The goal is simple: remove and relocate these bolts so that every plank eventually falls off the board. You have to be mindful of time, space, and the chain reactions you create. Before making your first move, take a moment to see which bolts are essential for holding the planks. Removing the “wrong” bolt early can cause a plank to drop in a way that blocks a crucial hole. A quick scan of the situation can prevent last-minute scrambles. Each bolt you unscrew must go somewhere else. If you fill up the easy-to-reach holes right away, you might trap yourself later, especially when other planks fall and block certain spots. Try planning out two or three moves ahead. This small effort in thinking can make a huge difference. Remove Planks The clock adds an exciting rush to your moves. You can’t spend forever planning. If you realize you’re about to run out of seconds, make a decisive bolt switch to keep progressing. Sometimes it’s better to make a quick move rather than none at all. You might notice special tools at the bottom of your screen, like an extra hole generator or a handy timer freeze. These are your lifelines when things get messy. If a plank gets in the way, or you’re seconds away from a time-out, that’s when you pull out these game-changers. Sometimes, the best strategy is to remove a bolt that supports multiple planks at once. If you time it right, you can knock out several panels in one go. Just be sure you don’t block a bolt behind the fallen wood! Game Features Point and Click Mechanics Timer Challenge Power-Ups & Boosters Hundreds of Levels with Increasing Difficulty Free Online and Mobile Friendly on Web Browsers Give Nuts and Bolts Puzzle a try today and see if you can conquer the planks before the clock says “time’s up”! Enjoy this free online game on OnlineGames.io and experience the satisfying gameplay of clever bolt placement and top-notch puzzle-solving fun.

title: Five Nights At Cat Freddy
description: Meet Freddy the Cat , an adorable feline who needs your help! Freddy is no ordinary kitty; he comes from a haunted pet shop. So you better keep him happy by providing enough food and water in his bowl, a cozy bed, and plenty of playtime. If Freddy isn't cared for properly, he transforms into a terrifying monster, and your nights turn into a spooky survival game. In Five Nights at Cat Freddy, your mission is to survive through spooky nights where you'll solve puzzles and sneak past Freddy's monster form. In the meantime, you will figure out how to escape from this house on the fourth night. The night that is both adorable and thrilling awaits you. Outsmart Freddy the cat monster and make it to freedom! Five Nights at Cat Freddy is a spin-off version of the popular game Five Nights at Freddy's (FNaF), but with a twist of cats instead of animatronics. Controls Move: WASD Interact: E Leave Item: B Look around: Move mouse Step-by-Step Guide to Five Nights at Cat Freddy Get ready to jump into the action! Here's how to play, along with a step-by-step guide to help you succeed: Start your adventure by searching for money hidden in piggy banks, closets, drawers, or safe boxes. Move around the house using the WASD keys. Look for items you can interact with and use the E key to engage with them. When you have enough money, order your cat from the computer in your bedroom. Select either black Freddy or white Tom as your companion. Your cat will arrive in a box at the front door. Open the box and meet him. He might look just as usual as any other cat in the beginning. He will be hungry and thirsty soon. Order essential supplies like a cat bowl , cat food , toys, and a bed using your computer again. Feed him with the cat food you bought, and don't forget about water! If the faucet is broken, repair it first. Once it's fixed, find an empty bottle, fill it with water, and pour it into Freddy's bowl. Use items to solve puzzles and craft new to us at the bench. You can use the recipes in your crafting book. (yes, finding that is another challenge) Your ultimate goal is to make it through to the fourth day without being caught by Freddy's monstrous form . Take care of your pet, and keep him happy to avoid his transformation. When he transforms press R to run away from him. But remember, running will consume more energy. Energy is only filled via consuming food or drinks. When you finish all the food in the house, you can order from the internet once a day. Pay attention to your surroundings and, and remember where you left each tool. You can hide in closets when monster Freddy gets too close. Be strategic and use the items you've gathered to escape from this house! Game Levels In the beginning, you can select the Level of difficulty: Ghost Level: Freddy is completely unaware of your presence. Your energy drains slowly, and traps will not affect you. You carry a backpack with three sections for item storage. Easy Level: Freddy moves at a slow pace and is less vigilant. Your energy decreases gradually while running, but remember that losing a life reduces your maximum energy level. You have eight chances to escape, along with a backpack that has three sections. Normal Level: Freddy becomes faster and more perilous. Your energy heavily depends on stored food reserves and the number of lives you have lost. You have four escape opportunities, with a backpack that includes three sections. Hard Level: Freddy poses a serious threat! Your energy decreases rapidly, and dying will greatly reduce your maximum energy capacity. You have merely two opportunities to get away, and your backpack has only one compartment. Tips and Tricks Always be on the lookout for hidden items that can aid your escape. Craft wisely using your resources to create powerful tools. Don't forget to take care of Freddy; neglecting him can lead to scary consequences! More Escape Games If you like escape puzzle challenges, next play The House . It offers at least scary game experience as Five Nights at Cat Freddy but harder puzzles to solve. You can play many other escape games on OnlineGames.io.

title: Motor Tour
description: Let's rev up your engines and zoom into motorbike races! Motor Tour is a free premium browser game that lets you hop on powerful motorbikes and race through traffic, endless highways, and fierce one-on-one showdowns. If you love traffic games, electrifying near misses, and tons of upgrades, then this one is for you. Feel the rush as you weave through roads, collect cash, nitrous or XP points on the road and leave your rivals in the dust. If you are a speed demon, start playing Motor Tour and immerse yourself in this epic experience! Roll out your ride, rev that engine, and show off your mad skills in Motor Tour. It’s time to play this game online, take on races, and leave ordinary driving sims in the dust. Hit the road now, and get ready for the ride of your life! Other Bike Games If you enjoy Motor Tour, you might also like other highway traffic games online on our site. One of the most popular bike traffic games is Highway Moto . It really stands out with endless racing modes, cool bikes, premium 3d graphics and tight controls. Keep an eye on OnlineGames.io for more exciting titles to test your driving and reflexes! Controls W: Move Forward A: Turn Left D: Turn Right S: Brake Left Shift: Nitro Boost ESC: Go Back/Pause How to Play Motor Tour You can start by selecting your favorite game mode: Career, Special Event, Endless, or Race. For beginners, it’s a good idea to practice in endless mode first. You’ll cruise down a busy highway until you crash, so it’s perfect to get a feel for the bike’s handling. Or you can try career mode where you’ll tackle different missions under time pressure. It starts with relatively easy missions and the difficulty ramps up slowly. You can prove you can handle tight turns and avoid reckless drivers while collecting enough cash to unlock more upgrades. In Race mode, challenge tough AI opponents in an intense head-to-head showdown, collect nitrous on the road to gain an edge over your rival. Want something different? Special Event mode offers fun tasks and big loot rewards. Game Features 40 Motorbikes: With 40 different bikes in the garage, you won’t run out of choices. Each one has its own style, and you can show your personality by customizing your license plate. Represent your country with its flag, and write a cool message on the plate. Deep Upgrades: Boost power, turbo, brakes, acceleration, handling, and nitro. Each upgrade helps you handle your bike better and improve overall performance. The best way to dominate the road is to keep enhancing those stats. Multiple Game Modes: Pick from four main modes: Career, Special Event, Endless, or Race. Each one offers a new challenge, whether you love timed missions, intense races, or endless cruising. Premium 3D Graphics: The game sports impressive visuals that make every ride feel realistic. From the shine on your motorbike to the detailed cityscape, you’ll be drawn into the action. Online Rewards: Motor Tour lets you watch ads to earn quick cash, gold, or blueprints. It might be worth it if you’re in a hurry to get that new upgrade or unlock a new bike! Developer Motor Tour is developed by Wolves Interactive. They blended realistic bike physics, gorgeous 3D visuals offering a endless replay value.

title: Horror Granny
description: Do you think you are brave enough to escape the Horror Granny ? Play to find out if you are fast enough to run from the eyes of the Granny. It is dark and the old woman has the demonic spirit that can make you a victim. The music will make the atmosphere more terrifying that will challenge your mind to find the exit way and run for your life. There are 4 levels ready to be completed. Don't be scared, be smart and escape from the Horror Granny. • Level 1,2,4 Objective: You are in room, you have to go outside the hospital without making any noise. • Level 3 Objective: You are in ward, you have to go outside the hospital without making any noise. Features: Multiple levels Challenging gameplay Controls: WASD to move Space bar to jump Left Shift to run

title: Crazy Parking Fury
description: Imagine yourself driving in a coastal city with summer music in the air. You have only one thing to worry about in this heaven: cops! Crazy Parking Fury is a 3D parking game where you run away from cops and park cars in dedicated spots. In this GTA-like game, you can also steal parked cars if you are good at avoiding the police. Ten different levels with increasing difficulty wait to be explored. As you progress through the levels, the parking lots will become increasingly challenging. How to Play Crazy Parking Fury? Start from the first level by hitting the play button. Your duty is to park the car in the dedicated parking lots. To locate the parking lots and roaming police cars, follow the map on the top left of your screen. You can fill parking spots with any car you drive, even if it's some random car you stole on the road. When you find the lot, park the car inside the lines. Take your time until it fits perfectly. Pull the handbrake and wait in the lot for 3 seconds to complete the mission. When the parking signs turn green, head over to the new destination. Don't Get Busted You shouldn't seen by police since they are looking for stolen cars and suspects. If you spot a police car, find an alternative path and stay away from it. You can escape if the cops see you from a certain distance. However, if you get too close to a police car, you have to start over. Free Roam Parking You can choose the bonus level, "Free Roam", in the main menu. Drive through the roads of the town without any mission to complete. But be warned: police are seeking you even while you roam freely. Drive however you like, slow or fast, and you can even hit other cars as long as you don't create problems for boys in blue. How to steal cars in Crazy Parking Fury When you see a vacant car parked on the road, approach until you see the "Enter Car" icon. Press enter and start driving. Game Features 10 different levels Free Roam sandbox driving option Beachside town map with 3D visuals Straightforward HUD Low and high-quality graphics options Free to play Controls WASD or arrow keys: Move the car Spacebar: Handbrake Enter: Steal Car C: Change the Camera view Esc: Pause to menu Developer Crazy Parking Fury is created by FreezeNova. What is More? If you like playing Crazy Parking Fury, try Police Chase Drifter . Run away from the cops while collecting coins. The road is super slippery, allowing you to drift like crazy.
