title: Four Colors
description: Four Colors is a famous card game that brings fun to all ages. If you would like to play a game like UNO and have some fun in your free time, come grab your cards and prepare yourself for a win. How to Play Four Colors? Four Colors is inspired by the popular card game UNO. Rules and cards are very similar to that game. Unlike many other card games, this makes Four Colors a straightforward and easy-to-learn game. Basic Rules of Four Colors The key point of Four Colors is to match the cards by color or number . Each player will have 7 cards once the game starts. Get rid of all the cards you have to win the game. The cards' numbers range from 1 to 9. There are four distinct colors: blue, red, yellow, and green. When you are unable to make any move, draw a card. Action Cards There are also three action cards, making the game even more exciting. They are: Skip: Use it to skip the next player Reverse: This card reverses the game's direction Draw Two : The next player needs to draw two cards after playing this. Wild Cards These are 8 wild cards in a Four Colors deck with 2 distinct types. These are: Wild: Allows the player to change the color. Wild Draw Four: This card changes the color and forces the next player to draw 4 cards. You can only use this card when you don't have any alternative card to play. Tips and Strategies for Four Colors When you have only one card left, remember to say "Uno!" by clicking on the 1 icon on the screen. Otherwise, you need to draw two cards as a penalty. Try to anticipate what other players have in their hands. Make it difficult for other players to play and force them to draw more cards. Use your action cards wisely, and try to gain advantages. Pay attention to the other players' moves and strategize carefully. What happens when you play all the cards in Four Colors? When no card is left to play, scores are calculated and another round starts over. To score the points, sum the value of leftover cards. A number card's value is the digit on the card. Action cards are 20 points, and wild cards are 50 points. So, try to eliminate these cards before the round ends. Can 5-year-olds play Four Colors? Yes, they can. Four Colors is a very easy-to-learn game. All kids -who can recognize colors and count up to ten- can play Four Colors without any problems. This makes Four Colors a perfect option for family game nights. Can I play Four Colors on my mobile? Yes, you can play Four Colors , a very similar game to UNO, on your mobile, tablet, or any other smart device by browsing OnlineGames.io. Developer Four Colors was created by codethislab. Similar Games If you would like to play more card games like Four Colors, try UNO Online . In this game, you will also have a multiplayer option. You can play Uno Online with 2,3 or 4 friends. We'd like to hear from our gamers! Tell us your game night stories in the comment section below!

title: Taxi Simulator
description: Welcome to New York City! Being a taxi driver in a metropolitan city… Sounds challenging. Taxi Simulator is a driving game where you pick up your customers from a specific place and get them to their desired destination as soon as possible. It is a very addictive game, as its graphics and vivid traffic offer a real-time gaming experience. Start the engine and hit the streets! How to Play Taxi Simulator Select your level and start to drive your yellow cab. You can see the point where you will pick up and drop off your customer from the map provided in the upper right corner of the screen. The red circle shows where you will pick up your customer and the green circle shows where you will drop them off. Picking Up Customers Move on the map to the place where you will pick up the passenger. There will be green indicators to guide you as you move on the road. Pick up your passenger by following these. When you arrive at the area, stop the vehicle at the green ring that grows and shrinks, pick up your customers and take them wherever they want. When you arrive at the destination, you will leave the customer there, just like you picked them up, at the green halo. On some levels, you will need to serve more than one customer. You need to pick them all up from their places and carefully drop them off where they want to go. Parking the Taxi Your task here is not only to transport your customer from point A to point B but also to park the yellow cab as it should be at the place you are carrying. The trick here is to park the taxi by adjusting its direction correctly. Key Features of Taxi Simulator: High-Quality Graphics: Immerse yourself in stunning visuals that bring New York City to life. Fast-Paced Gameplay: Enjoy the excitement of quick-paced action as you navigate through the city's bustling streets. Detailed Map: Explore a meticulously designed map that replicates the heart of New York City. Unique Challenges: Each level presents distinct challenges, keeping the game fresh and engaging. Controls Use the WASD or the Arrow keys to steer the yellow cab Use the Space key to handbrake Use the C key to change the camera view Similar Games Try Taxi Driver , where you drive a taxi and serve your customers in a 2D game. Or you may look up other free driving games on OnlineGames.io for further alternatives.

title: Ultimate Robo Duel 3D
description: Are you ready to enter a world of mechanical marvels? Ultimate Robo Duel 3D is an action game where you will participate in wrestling matches between robots. Unlike regular wrestling matches, here you will fight with your opponent in the shoes of a high-tech robot. Of course, as you can guess, your opponent will also be made of metal. In this battle game, you can play against the AI, progress level by level or duel with a friend in two-player mode! Basics of Ultimate Robo Duel 3D It is possible to wrestle with robots in the 21st century with Ultimate Robo Duel 3D! Before entering the boxing arena, start by choosing the game mode you want to play. You can fight with a robot controlled by an AI in Battle mode. 2 Player mode will allow you to duel with your friend in the wrestling arena. Career mode allows you to make progress by leveling up. In all three modes, your main aim is to fight with your opponent by kicking, punching, hitting and grabbing him. This action game has various actions to take while trying to destroy the rival metal. The Golden Atomic You can find many high-tech robot characters in Ultimate Robo Duel 3D. But if this is your first time playing this battle game, you will start with the Golden Atomic. When you enter the wrestling arena, you must perform all the attacking styles to knock down your opponent. Punch your rival in the face or kick him, aiming for his legs. You can send bullets or use the Special Hit to hurt him tremendously. Don't forget to check your rival's and your health bars. Whoever's bar drops to zero first is defeated! Unlock New Giant Robots As you win battles, you will earn money. You can use this money to unlock new powerful robot characters. Each mechanic creature has unique battery power, bullet force and warm-up time. Consider these features before acquiring one of them. We will leave you the names of some of these metal marvels below! Double Kill (Cost: 750) Hell Bot (Cost: 1000) Twinc City (Cost: 1250) Hitman (Cost: 1500) Night Machine (Cost: 1750) Controls Player 1 WASD Keys: Move T: Bullet F/G: Punch H: Special Hit C/V: Kick B: Grab Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move M: Bullet U/I: Punch O: Special Hit J/K: Kick L: Grab Developer Ultimate Robo Duel 3D was developed by RHM Interactive. Similar Online Games If you enjoy wrestling games, you may also try playing Get on Top . In the game, you will wrestle with your opponent by controlling your stickman. If you make your opponent's head hit the ground, you will win the round! Another option for robot fans is playing Mech Shooter , engaging in robot wars, and taking down mechanical opponents. We are constantly trying to expand our game range. If you have any suggestions or a wish list, please contact us!

title: Zombie Apocalypse Shooter
description: The War of the Undead begins soon! Take your position in Zombie Apocalypse Shooter . You are humanity's last hope! Your enemies are not ordinary human beings. They are zombies with no conscience but an insatiable desire for brains. Zombie Apocalypse Shooter is a first-person shooter game where you eliminate zombies and complete missions one by one. Controls WASD or arrow keys : Move Left shift : Run Space : Jump 1-9 or mouse scroll : Change weapon G : Throw a grenade Left mouse click : Fire Right mouse click : Aim How to Play There are 2 worlds, each with 40 levels in Zombie Apocalypse Shooter . At each level, you'll be tasked with destroying a certain number of zombies using your handy gun. Start looking for the undead; make use of the red arrows on the map to find them. Shoot 'em all and complete the level. When you're hurt, try to find a healing kit to keep fighting. Use the shop section to buy more advanced guns and equipment. The first levels are suitable for players with no FPS experience at all, but things will get crazy as you progress through the second world. Guns Handgun : Simple to use firearm. Aim for the head for maximum effect. Cost : Free SMG : A lightweight automatic firearm designed for close-range combat, it can be fired from the hip or shoulder. Cost : 1000 coins Machete : A versatile broad blade used either as a chopping tool or in combat as a long knife. Cost : 1100 coins M14 : The M14, a select-fire battle rifle used by the United States, is chambered for 7.62 mm rounds. Cost : 1200 coins AK-47 : The AK-47, also known as the Kalashnikov Model 1947, is a Soviet-designed assault rifle and one of the most widely used shoulder-fired weapons. Cost : 1500 coins Grenade : An explosive device that is typically thrown by hand. Cost : 2500 coins 9mm : A semi-automatic firearm used for personal protection and special services. Cost : 3000 coins Scar-L : A highly accurate and fast-firing machine gun. Cost : 3500 coins UMG : An enhanced version of the standard machine gun. Cost : 4000 coins Bidenhander : A specialized infantry weapon designed for warfare. Cost : 5000 coins Shotgun : A firearm intended to be fired from the shoulder, commonly used for close-range targets. Cost : 7000 coins Developer FreezeNova created Zombie Apocalypse Shooter. More Online Zombie Games Oh, you like to fight against these brain-eaters, don't you? Go see all your alternatives on Zombie Games Online . For a more detailed game environment with a more difficult gameplay setting, our suggestion is the Realistic Zombie Survival Warfare .

title: Head Soccer 2022
description: Head Soccer 2022 is a 2D sports game in which you engage in football matches with a friend or against the CPU. The first thing to do is choose your beloved football player. You will take part in matches in his shoes! Be the one who scores the most and get your World Cup in this thrilling arcade game !⚽ How to Play Head Soccer 2022 Begin with determining which game mode you want to play in. You will see two modes on the menu: 1 Player and 2 Player. If you're going to play against the CPU, use the single-player option. Or, you can make football duels with a friend in 2 Player mode. After deciding on the game mode, it's time to choose your favorite football player. Then, you are all set to go! The Heads of the Football Players Whichever game mode you decide to play on, you have to choose the football player you will play with! Renowned players from Argentina, America, Brazil, Spain and many more are waiting for you to play with them. You will see their giant heads on a table before going to the football field. In 1P mode, use your mouse click to choose. Use the WASD and arrow keys to select the characters in 2P mode. A Match with the CPU Practice with matches against the CPU. Don't just call it a computer; it might be hard on you! The CPU will automatically choose its character. Remember that the challenging levels will increase in phases as you win matches. You have 45 seconds in the mode. Try to score as many goals as possible in this short period. Duello with a Friend Playing with a buddy will be very enjoyable! Once you both choose your football player, you are ready for a match. You have 60 seconds in the 2P mode. The one who scores the most is the winner! Controls 1P Arcade Arrow Keys: Move Z and X Keys: Shoot 2P Versus Player 1 WASD Keys: Move N and M Keys: Shoot Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move 1 and 2 Number Keys: Shoot Mobile Devices Touchscreen Buttons: Move and Shoot Can I play Head Soccer 2022 on my mobile? Yes, you can play Head Soccer 2022 on your mobile devices. However, some of the models may only support 1 player mode. Developer Head Soccer 2022 was developed by FreezeNova. Similar Sports Games If you enjoy playing Head Soccer 2022, you may also like playing Head Basketball . Choose your favorite NBA basketball player in the game, customize your game settings as you wish and go to the basketball court. Shoot as many baskets as you can! For more game options, you may look for other sports games on OnlineGames.io by following the link. Bookmark this website to access new games easily!

title: TapKO
description: TapKO is an online clicker game developed by the creators of Fruit Ninja and Jetpack Joyride. This one-tap fighter game places you in the shoes of a street fighter! Your goal is to punch your opponents in the face and knock out as many of them as you can. Train your fighter to become the ultimate boxer with the upgrades! 🥊 Controls Left Mouse Button: To Punch Hold LMB: To Block On Mobile Devices: Tap the screen to punch, then hold to block. How to Play TapKO You will play as a street fighter in a parking lot in this clicker game. Defeat your opponents with your relentless punches by pressing the left mouse button. Drop their health bar to zero to knock them out of the ring. However, keep in mind that to endure longer, you also need to block the attacks of the opponents. Hold down the left mouse button to defend yourself so as not to take damage. There are also upgrades for your fighter's abilities that can make your character stronger. Punch Nonstop To defeat your opponents, you need to punch them nonstop as their health bar is higher than yours. Knock them down with continuous attacks until their bar drops to zero. With each punch, you will earn stars. You can use the stars to upgrade your fighter’s strength, defence, health, and auto-punch speed for more profound attacks and defence. Upgrades for Your Fighter You will see the upgrade panel at the bottom of the screen. You can make your fighter endure longer to the attacks and enhance his abilities with the claimed stars. There are four main abilities to upgrade: Strength, Defence, Health, and Speed. Strength: Upgrades in strength increase the damage of punches. Defence: When blocking, it lowers the damage taken. Health: Increases the max health and regeneration amount. Speed: Allows increasing the speed of auto-punches. Tips & Tricks for TapKO 👊 Don’t only attack. Block enemy hits to reduce damage. 🥊 Attack as often as possible. Faster damage means faster knockouts. 💪 Strength increases punch damage. This helps you defeat opponents faster. ⭐ Use stars on upgrades regularly. Stronger stats make battles easier. 💡 Read your opponent’s rhythm to knock him out easily. Developer Yes2Games is the publisher of TapKO. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing TapKO , you may also try playing Fruit Ninja . Slice the fruits appearing on the screen with your blade. For more free online game options, visit our Clicker Games Online tag at the link. Leave a comment in the comments section below to share your gaming experiences with other players!

title: Troll Level
description: Okay, you asked for it! Playing Troll Level Online will be a humbling experience because this is the troll game ever. Get ready to feel like a complete failure while bursting into laughter! Not every game offers that kind of combo, right? At first, Troll Level might look like another same old platformer. Just a cute bunny trying to reach the gate. Yeah, yeah, blah blah… But hold on! This game loves to mess with you. Obstacles will move, disappear, and surprise you at every step. It's a wild ride across 80 levels of pure trolling! Why You'll Love Troll Level Think you can outsmart the tricky design? Some truths are hard to swallow, but here's one you need to accept: You won't pass a single level on your first try. Go ahead, shed that one tear. 💧 But then, get yourself together for epic fails and endless laughs (or maybe a few rage quits!). Troll Level perfectly mixes skill and humor, making it a blast for anyone who loves a challenge. Controls Computers Move: WASD or Arrow Keys Mobiles Tap the arrows to move Tap the jump icon to jump over traps How to Play Troll Level Every level has surprises waiting for you. Spikes may fall, floors might vanish, and the obstacles get crazier! Each level is designed to troll you in hilarious ways. You can try going cautiously just in case an unexpected obstacle appears in front of you. But beware: that will not work either! 😈 Keep your calm and think fast to survive the madness. If a level is too tough and you're raging into your computer, just watch a short ad to skip ahead! Tips and Tricks for Troll Level Jumping isn't always the answer! Sometimes, a well-timed duck or even standing still is what you need to dodge those sneaky traps. Just because it looks like a platform doesn't mean it's safe. Test the waters carefully—sometimes the floor will disappear, and sometimes it'll just troll you for fun! If something looks too easy, it probably isn't. Don't trust that perfectly placed platform or the conveniently placed block; there's probably a hidden trap waiting for you. In most of the levels, you'll need to memorize traps to survive. Take a moment to think before you act, as repeating the same mistake won't get you anywhere! Sometimes, the game tricks you into jumping into spikes or pits. If a jump feels "too obvious," consider another approach. It's called Troll Level for a reason! Don't let the game frustrate you too much. Take a deep breath, laugh it off, and try again. It's all part of the fun! And still, if you feel like you're about to throw your computer out the window, watch a short ad to skip the level and come back stronger. The game loves trolling, but you can outsmart it by keeping your cool! More To Know About Troll Level There are 80+ levels to conquer. Once you finish them, you can reset your progress and challenge yourself again! There's no time limit, so take your time to figure out the tricks. Play Troll Level Online on Android and iOS devices, too! Control your bunny with on-screen buttons. Your progress saves automatically as long as you keep your browser cache. Developer Troll Level was developed by FreezeNova, inspired by other hilarious troll games like Level Devil and Die Again. More Troll Games Troll Level stands out because it's not just about completing levels. You need to be ready for surprises and laugh at how the game tricks you. If you're looking for a similar game where you count failures next you can play Geometry Jump .

title: Soccer Masters
description: Did you know the first official soccer match was played in 1863? Back then, there were no shin guards, no fancy boots, and definitely no vuvuzelas echoing through the match. Soccer has evolved over time, and now you can bring the magic of this epic game to your fingertips. Soccer Masters is a funny soccer game guaranteed to have you and your friend laughing non-stop! With its cartoonish animations and unpredictable gameplay, every match feels like a highlight reel. Gave away a goal? Your player might cry a river in the middle of the pitch. Score a winner? Cue the victory dance! Choose between 1v1 or 2v2 matches against AI or a friend, and use power-ups for pitch-perfect moves. Controls 1 Player WASD: Move V: Supershot B: Shot 2 Player Arrow Keys: Move K: Supershot L: Shot How to Play Soccer Masters Choose your mode Euro 2020 Tournament or a quick friendly match. In tournament mode, you play a 2x2 match and work cooperatively with your friend to beat the opponent team. You can choose your team from among many Euro 2020 national teams, such as Spain, Ireland, Portugal, Italy, Turkey, and many others. If you win the first match, you'll play in the quarterfinals. That's what we call a fast progression, huh? Friendly Match Mode If you choose friendly match mode, you can choose between 1v1,2x2 or 2x2 against AI. Each player has a unique booster. One of them can teleport in the field, while the other can perform super shots. Pick your team and enter the arena. Control your players to jump, shoot and score before the clock runs out. Boosters will replenish every 5 seconds. Remember to use them to outplay your opponents and create epic soccer moments! Developer Soccer Masters was created by MadPuffers. More Soccer Games Soccer Masters is a great football game that takes the intensity of a real match and replaces it with laughters. It's the perfect choice for anyone looking for fun and laughter with friends, or even just to kill time between breaks. However, if you're in the mood for something more serious and realistic, play Soccer Simulator next. Dribble, pass and shoot with precision. Let's see those skills in action!

title: Moto Traffic Rider
description: Moto Traffic Rider is a first-person driving game. Get on your bike’s seat and move forward on an open highway. Flowing traffic has its own dangers. Avoid crashing with any of the vehicles on the way. Pass near other cars as close as possible to get the highest scores in this traffic rider game! 🏍 Controls WASD Keys or Arrow Keys: Drive/Steer/Brake F Key: Activate Nitro C Key: Change Cameraview How to Play Moto Traffic Rider Enter into the open highway with your precious motorbike! Your main aim in the game is to drive your bike without bumping into any other car on the road. Speed down the highway leaving all the cars behind you one by one. Try to go as near as possible to the vehicles to get the most points, just as you do in Highway Traffic. Additionally, keep your speed above 100 km/h for getting more rewards! Overtake Cars Closely 🛣 On the highway, try to overtake other cars closely. This way, you will experience the adrenaline rush at its peak. Moreover, close overtakings at higher speeds, especially above the 100 km/h, will earn you a lot of money in Moto Traffic Rider. You can use this money to invest in your bike. You can unlock advanced motorbikes or upgrade the one you have! Landscapes: Desert Valley, Grasslands and Snow City 🏜 There are three distinguishing landscapes to ride your bike: Desert Valley, Grasslands and Snow City. You can ride your motorbike along the highway stretching through the valley, navigate snowy roads in the city center, or steer your bike along a lush green road. Each landscape offers you a different kind of pleasure! Developer Fuego! Games published Moto Traffic Rider. More Games Like This Do you like driving in a flow of traffic? Highway Cars is another game that suits your tastes well! Steer your car on a one-way or two-way road without crashing with other cars. For more games, check out our Traffic Games Online game tag. Keep coming back to explore our newly added games!

title: Alien Sky Invasion
description: Alien Sky Invasion is an aircraft driving game where you steer a jet aircraft in the infinite void of Space. But you will not be alone in the sky. Aliens from different galactic races will accompany you, but not in a good way. They will try to attack your jet and shoot lasers. Avoid their assaults and try to survive in space in this shooting game! 👽 How to Play Alien Sky Invasion Welcome to the galactic arena! The aliens in Space will not let you feel alone. You will see their jets coming towards you from afar. You can detect their presence from the radar map in the upper right corner. Remember that they are not friends, and they will attack you with lasers and missiles. You need to protect your jet from taking damage from their assaults as much as possible. Your primary task is to survive in this empty arena by shooting the enemy ships while avoiding their attacks. Invasion or Campaign in Space? There are two game mods in Alien Sky Invasion: Invasion and Campaign. You can find a brief explanation for each below. Invasion: In the Invasion mode, you have missions that must be fulfilled. The aliens will try to invade your territory in Space. You must eliminate them one by one. Your first task is destroying 30 enemy ships. Campaign: There are 100 levels in Campaign mode. Missions in the Campaign mode seem more straightforward than Invasion mode. But as you level up, the tasks here will become more complex. You will need more powerful jets to cope with these challenges. Jet Aircrafts You can find six jet aircraft, each more potent than the other. View their fighter status from the menu. Each aircraft has damage, armor, energy, and speed status at a certain level. You will be able to access new jets as you level up in Campaign mode. Hover over a jet, and you can see at which level it can be unlocked. Jet’s Weapons Your jet has two distinct weapons. You can destroy your enemies’ ships by shooting them with lasers or launching a missile. Missiles are more advantageous as when you locate the ships and launch a missile, the missile automatically locks on to the enemy and hits it even if the enemy ship moves. But to be able to launch a rocket, you have to aim precisely at the enemy ship. Level Bonuses in Alien Sky Invasion Level 75: Your jet will have self-repairing armor. Level 100: All the jets you have will have max status. Level 125: Your jet’s energy regeneration ability will rise to +50%. Controls To control the jet, use the WASD keys. To boost the speed, use the Space or the Shift key. To shoot, use the left mouse click. To launch a missile, use the right mouse click. To pause, use the Tab key. Developer Alien Sky Invasion is created by FreezeNova. Explore More Airplane Games If you are an Alien Sky Invasion fan, you should check Starblast.io . There will be rocket ships that are battling in galactic spaces in the game. Every spaceship has the ability to shoot with lasers. Collect the crystals along the way and use them to upgrade your ship. Or, you may look up other airplane games on OnlineGames.io for further options by following the link. If you have any suggestions or wishes, please do not hesitate to contact us !

title: City Bus Driver
description: Would you like to be a bus driver in your own city ? City Bus Driver is the perfect simulator that gives you the chance drive a bus and to take the passengers to a specific destination on map. You have to always use different camera angles and don't hit with the trafic & passengers. First you need to start the engine to be able to drive and then follow the yellow dot on the map to find the stop station. There are 3 cars available to be bought. 1 is for free and others 2 can be bought with 20000 & 40000 cash. Have fun completing all 10 levels. City Bus Driver Controls: • WASD to control bus • C to change camera view

title: Catch a Fish Obby
description: Catch a Fish Obby is an online steal-a-brainrot game inspired by Roblox. The main goal is to collect the most exotic sea creatures into your base. Watch out for the raiders wandering around. They are always ready to hunt your precious fish sneakily. Make sure that your base is protected! You can also play with a friend in the 2-Player mode. 🐬 Controls Player 1: WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump E Key: Buy/Steal F Key or the LMB: Hit Left-Shift: Sprint Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move L Key: Jump O Key: Buy/Steal K Key: Hit J Key: Sprint How to Play Catch a Fish Obby Customize your Obby character and get ready to catch a fish! This time, instead of classic Italian brainrot characters, you will collect the most exotic underwater creatures in your base. Start with getting the common fish like sea star and salmon, and make your way to the exotic ones as you gain income. If you are impatient, just like Gamie , then keep your eyes wide! If their protection bars are down, sneak into the bases of other players to raid their valuable sea animals. Brainrot Fish Characters 🐟 Turn your base into a money-making machine by collecting the rarest brainrot fish characters. They are classified as Common, Uncommon, Deep, Oceanic, Exotic, Apex and many more to explore! If you are a newbie, start collecting the cheapest species, and over time, you can get oceanic and exotic animals. To pick a fish, go to the red carpet, choose your brainrot character, approach it, and press E to collect. Collect the Golden Tickets 🎫 You will see golden tickets on the playground. Collect them to unlock new outfits for your Obby character. Moreover, you can use these golden tickets on the vending machine that gives Omega and Mythic brainrot characters. To use them, you must collect 250 golden tickets. Don’t worry, it may sound a lot, but if you can catch the golden ticket rain, you can easily collect that amount of tickets. Developer GameVGames developed the Catch a Fish Obby. More Games Like This Steal Brainrot Heist is another steal-a-brainrot game that suits your tastes well! Raid other players' bases and collect the most valuable Italian brainrot characters. For additional options, you can check out our free online brainrot games by following the link. Keep coming back to explore newly added games!

title: Red Light Green Light
description: Red Light Green Light is a game from the famous TV series Squid Game, and it is definitely one of the most iconic scenes. In this children game, players stand behind a starting line and must reach a finish line at the far end of the field. A giant, creepy doll stands at the finish line. It turns its back to the players and says "Green light!" This means players can move. Then, when it suddenly says "Red light!" and turns around. And players must freeze immediately. If the doll sees someone still moving during "Red light," that player is eliminated (and in Squid Game, elimination is done by shooting the player). In this online video game version of Red Light Green Light on OnlineGames.io, you'll be put in the tracksuit of a numbered contestant and dropped into a deadly playground. Movement can mean either survival or death. Nothing in between. So hit the play button and enjoy the same thrill 456 lived in the first episode! Controls PC: Hold the Left Mouse Button or Spacebar to run Release to stop when the doll turns Mobile: Tap and hold to move, release to stop How to Play Red Light Green Light Start by entering your name to join the round. Line up with dozens of other players, all dressed in green tracksuits with their unique numbers. When the doll looks away, run toward the red line by tapping and holding. The moment she turns back release the tap and freeze instantly. If you get caught moving during "Red Light," and you're eliminated on the spot. Make it to the finish line within the time limit to win and play the next round until you win the big prize. If you want to stand out from the crowd, unlock different hats and headgears in the shop. Tips & Tricks for Red Light, Green Light Watch the doll's head closely; her body starts turning a second before she says, "Red Light." Stay calm when the timer is close to running out. Panic leads to mistakes. Don't try to sprint the whole way. Stop-start rhythm is your best strategy. Save up your coins to unlock cool hats that make your player stand out! Developer This game is a fan-made experience created in the spirit of Squid Game, designed for quick, casual fun. With a clean design and responsive movement, it's easy to pick up and play on your browser. Similar Games If you liked the tension and timing of Red Light Green Light, check out Squid Shooter on OnlineGames.io. It brings the Squid Game characters with a goofy style. Feel free to explore all other popular free games on our site.

title: The Last io
description: The Last io takes PUBG's battle royale experience to a new magical world filled with mythical creatures and intense survival challenges. Drop into a vast fantasy map with jungles, lakes, bases and more. Gather weapons, spells, and items, and fight to be the last one standing. Similar to Surviv.io , Last.io offers the fast-paced, top-down combat you love but adds a twist with dragons, enchanted gear, and special abilities. The vibrant fantasy setting will keep you hooked as you dodge, attack, and outsmart your opponents in every match. Remember, there's no respawn in the game. If you get killed, you can only spectate until the next round. Controls Movement: W: Move forward A: Move left S: Move backward D: Move right Spacebar: Jump to dodge attacks Hold spacebar: Free fall with the parachute (only at the start) E: to interact with objects and collect them. Attack: Aim moving your mouse. Left-click to attack. R to Reload your weapon. Activate special skills or abilities with Q, E, or other function keys (depending on the ability). Use number keys (1–6) to select items or weapons. Scroll the mouse wheel to cycle through your inventory. How to Play The Last io Drop into the battlefield by holding the spacebar. You’ll start with no weapons or gear. Quickly gather items by searching crates, buildings, or enemy corpses to find weapons, potions, and equipment. The goal is to survive until the end, but you’re not alone! Battle against other players who are also trying to be the last survivor. As the game progresses, the playable area shrinks, so stay alert and keep moving to avoid getting trapped outside the safe zone. Use your mouse to aim at enemies, then left-click to attack. Right-click to zoom or activate a scope if available. Use the W, A, S, D keys to move around the map, and jump with the spacebar to avoid attacks or gain height advantage. Use special abilities with the Q, E, or other function keys to unleash powerful skills that can turn the tide of battle. Item Management Collect a variety of items to give you the upper hand in battle. Weapons, armor, potions, and special items are scattered throughout the map. Press 1-6 to quickly select items from your inventory, and use the mouse wheel to cycle through them. Don’t forget to reload your weapon by pressing R. Items come in different qualities, indicated by colors. Higher-quality items will help you survive longer and deal more damage, so always keep an eye out for rare items. More BR Games Do you have what it takes to become the champion of The Last.io? Jump in and prove your skills! And, if you enjoy Last.io, you might also like Surviv Bros . You can also access tons of battle royale games with RPG mechanics, and you are free to explore and play them on OnlineGames.io.

title: Mini Cars Racing
description: Mini Cars Racing is a 2 player car racing game you can play free on OnlineGames.io! You can race against the clock or battle a friend on the same device. It's fast, fun, and feels just like playing with toy cars on your childhood road traffic rug. So, as you load the game, you have two options to choose from: Solo, where you race against CPU cars, or 2 Player (versus), a split-screen local multiplayer mode perfect for racing with a friend on the same keyboard. The controls are tight, the visuals are playful, and the tracks are wild and twisty. There are two race types to master: Arcade Mode: A classic 3-lap race against opponents. Outdrive them and cross the finish line first. Time Trial Mode: Race solo against the clock and beat your own record. No rivals here. You can also choose from three difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, and Expert. Expert mode will make the steering even more difficult in your mini car. Controls Player 1 Accelerate: W Brake: S Left / Right: A / D Respawn: C Player 2 Accelerate: Up Arrow Brake: Down Arrow Left / Right: Left Arrow / Right Arrow Respawn: Keypad 1 How to Play Mini Cars Racing Pick Solo or Versus mode from the main menu. Choose your car among 8 funky mini cars, each with a different color and shape. From mini trucks to sporty vans, find your signature mini car. Select your race mode: Arcade or Time Trial. Choose one of three cool tracks: Bridge Madness: Full of wild jumps and narrow bridges. Cactus County: Desert-themed track with sharp turns. Rock Island: A rocky, cliffside challenge with scenic views and deadly drops. Adjust your difficulty, then hit Start and race your way to the top! Expect obstacles like traffic cones and floating ramps. And don't worry, if you fall off the map, you'll respawn. And if you get stuck in a corner, just hit the respawn key and dive back into the race. Developer Mini Cars Racing was developed by FreezeNova, known for its fun and 2 player browser games . You can play this racing game online anytime on OnlineGames.io. More Car Games to Play Next If you enjoyed the two-player feature of Mini Cars Racing, you'll have a blast with Car Football . Yes, it's exactly what it sounds like: soccer, but with cars instead of players. Pick your side, start the engine, and smash the giant ball into the opponent's goal. Play solo or with your buddy, but know that oversized ball physics makes every match unpredictable. And hilarious. Just like in Mini Cars Racing, Car Football features local multiplayer, simple controls, and a fun cartoon style. But this time, it's about scoring goals and bumping your way to victory.

title: Papa's Cupcakeria
description: Papa's Cupcakeria is a time management game where the cupcakes are as sweet as your grandma's secret recipe! Here, you're not just baking cakes, but also frosting, sprinkles, serving and... maybe customer meltdown. So, if you're wondering what the deal is with Papa's Cupcakeria, You've just landed into the world of Papa Louie's latest franchise in Frostfield town. With Papa Louie's knack for turning misfortunes into business opportunities (and a little help from a car crash), you're now the newest employee at Papa's Cupcakeria. Your mission? To bake and decorate cupcakes that will make the customers forget all about their sugar cravings and maybe even their life's problems for a sweet moment. Let's get started with how you can play this game! Controls Use your mouse to play. How to Play Papa's Cupcakeria Hit the start, pick a character, give them a name and start your first day in Cupcakeria. You'll juggle between 4 stations as the crowd fills the shop. Order Station: Click to take down orders. Don't mess up; these customers can be as picky as a cat with a new toy. Batter Station: Click to fill those cupcake liners with batter. Too much or too little, and you'll have yourself a cupcake crisis. Bake Station: Just place the cupcakes into the oven by dragging them to their cozy spot! Keep an eye on the oven; timing is everything unless your customers enjoy the taste of charcoal. Once they're all baked to perfection, you can move them over to the finished counter. Build Station: The fun part! Click to add frosting, then go wild with toppings. Remember, precision is key unless you want to end up with a cupcake that looks like it survived a blender. When the cupcake is ready, drag the order ticket onto the plate and give the customer their cake. If they're happy with the results, they'll leave a good tip with a smile. More tips mean more upgrades, from new clothes for your character to fancy schmancy bakery equipment. More Papa's Games So, strap on your apron, grab your whisk, and get ready to turn Papa's Cupcakeria into the sweetest spot in town. Whether you're in it for the laughs, the love of the theme (or just to see how many sprinkles you can pile onto one cupcake,) Papa's Cupcakeria has got you covered in frosting and fun! And don't think Papa Louie would stop at cupcakes, would he? From sushis to tacos, there's a whole universe of Papa's games waiting on onlinegames.io. Next play, Papa's Burgeria . You'll flip burgers like a pro and serve them with a side of fries. Dive in for more yummy chaos!

title: Riddle School
description: Riddle School is a point-and-click adventure game series developed by Newgrounds creator JonBro. The series takes its inspiration heavily from Flash point-and-click games Pico’s School by Tom Fulp. The original Riddle School was the first game released in this series of adventure games on May 25, 2006. You have a very important task, which is to help Phil escape from his boring school. Walk around the school hallways and collect items that might be useful. You will feel the excitement at its peak and use your puzzle-solving skills to the fullest to solve the mysteries. 🎓 Controls Left Mouse Button: To Interact Pressing any keys during gameplay restarts the game. How to Play Riddle School Our protagonist Phil Eggtree is a student at Riddle Elementary School. After teasing another student in his regular classes, the school council sends Phil to the “Special Class for the Insane”. He decides to escape the school and tries to find a way to the exit. Help him escape from this boring and silly environment. Click on the speech balloons to advance whatever Phil says next. Wander around the school hallways and find items that might be useful to free him from his bird cage. Check Everything 🧐 Check all the objects and people in any room and pay attention to what Phil says. During his speeches, he gives you hints. There must be some things that you can use to his advantage. You need to solve the mysteries using the hints Phil gives with your puzzle-solving skills. Our mascot Gamie says that using the sharpener in the class of mathematics teacher Mr. Kahm has something to do with it! Walks off to Freedom 🐦 If you manage to get out of Mr. Kahm’s classroom, it is time to plan the escape. During school hours, the doors leading the way to the exit are shut. You need to find the keys. Head to the Principal’s Office using the hallways. Sneakily attempt to grab the keys from the headmaster, Mr. Cwesschyn. It may sound easy, but Phil must overcome a series of obstacles while trying to reach the office. Tips & Tricks for Riddle School 🖱 Click everything. Chairs, doors, posters and floors can hide clues. 💬 Talk to everyone. Some kids give hints. Some just joke. Read it all. 📏 Use items on people. Try using items on teachers and students. Funny stuff can happen. 🎨 Remember the colors. Color clues matter later. Pay attention to notes and posters. 🚪 Visit every room. Do not skip rooms. Some items show up after you do other things. Developer JonBro, a creator on Newgrounds, developed the Riddle School series. Other Games in This Series If you enjoy playing Riddle School , there are more games in the series that you can play. Each one has funny puzzles, school secrets, and a unique plot of classic point-and-click adventure games. Riddle School Riddle School 2 Riddle School 3 Riddle School 4 Riddle School 5 Riddle Transfer Riddle Transfer 2 Try them all to see the full story, and help Phil escape school again!

title: Fast Food Manager
description: Fast Food Manager is an online tycoon game where you play as the owner of a fast food restaurant. Welcome your customers with a warm smile and serve them your delicious hamburgers, Italian pizzas, and French fries. Try not to keep your customers waiting too long! Controls Mouse: To interact with customers. How to Play Fast Food Manager In this simulator game, you open your fast food restaurant in your neighborhood and start serving your customers with your special meals. You can deliver yummy hamburgers to them in the beginning. As you gain income, you can also take orders for pizzas and French fries. Hiring chefs and waiters to help your restaurant function properly is a great option! Additionally, you can earn money by watching ads. All you need to do is go over the YouTube sign and stay there for a couple of seconds. Then you are free to take your rewards and invest in your restaurant. Opening a VIP Section Your restaurant is starting to get a lot of attention, just like McDonald’s. You are making good money. Now, it’s time to offer VIP service for your special customers. They are willing to pay you more than necessary, but they need your valuable attention. Do not lose touch with them! Serving Beverages and Ice Cream Unlock new sections around your restaurant and begin serving beverages and ice creams to your customers. They really like your delicious fast food, and now they're asking for more! Drive Through Offer your customers a Drive-thru so they can order their meals and take them to go. This way, you can multiply your income, and customers will be able to place orders without getting out of their cars. Developer FreezeNova developed Fast Food Manager. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing Fast Food Manager and want to enhance your business management skills, you may also give My Tiny Market a try! In the game, you own a tiny market. Plant tomato seeds, raise chickens and restock your shelves! For further options, feel free to look for the Tycoon Games Online game tag. There are many free online games at your disposal. Find the ones that suit you best!

title: Boxing Stars
description: Ever been told by your mom that boxing inside is a no-go? Yeah, because who wants to explain how the living room became a demolition derby? Well, fret not; we have provided a solution! Enter the Boxing Stars game, where you and your brother can duke it out in the ring. Here, you play as wobbly boxers . And the only thing at risk is your dignity. No vases will shatter, no furniture will tremble, and most importantly, no tooth will be swallowed. So, go ahead, throw those punches, and let your mom marvel at the peace in her living room. Meanwhile, you two battle it out with the crowd's roar. Start playing Boxing Stars now! Controls Computers Player 1 Move: Use WASD Left Punch: Press F Right Punch: Press G Break a Guard: Press T Block: Press E Player 2 Move: Use Arrow Keys Left Punch: Press K Right Punch: Press L Break a Guard: Press O Block: Press I Mobile Devices Move: Use the virtual joystick on the screen. Punch: Tap on the touchscreen to attack. How to Play Boxing Stars If you're new to the ring, start with the tutorial. You'll be boxing with a scarecrow and learn to punch and dodge attacks for more intense fights in the arena. When you're ready to rumble, pick your fight - against the CPU or tag in a friend. Use F or left-click to left punch, and G or right-click to right punch. Press both mouse buttons simultaneously or the T key to break the opponent's guard. Defend like a champion. Retreat while tapping E to block those incoming blows. It's like putting up an invisible force field where you say, "I need to keep my face pretty." Duel a Friend in Boxing Stars Ready to test the bonds of friendship in the most civilized way possible - by virtually punching each other? Here's what you do: Choose the Two-Player Mode. You're either the blue boxer or the orange one. When the battle begins Player 1, you've got the WASD keys to move, F for a left hook, G for a right, T to shatter their guard like a finely crafted insult, and E to block because even in a fight, defense is key. Player 2, you're on the arrow keys, K for a left punch, L for a right, O to break through their defense, and I to block. There's something uniquely satisfying about knocking out your best mate in a game where the only thing bruised is their ego. Remember, in Boxing Stars, the only thing you'll lose is the match, not your friendship... hopefully. So, glove up, get in the ring, and may the best wobbly boxer win. After all, what's a friendship without a little healthy competition? Developer Zupga developed Boxing Stars. What's Next? Remember, in this boxing game, the only thing you'll need to worry about is not accidentally hitting the 'quit' button when you're on the ropes. So, if you would like a similar challenge, check out other local 2-player games we have.

title: Train Simulator
description: When you were a child, were you as curious about the train cockpit as we were? If you are passionate about trains, this game is perfect for you. Train Simulator is a 3D driving game where you become the conductor of a train. We need a skilled machinist, and that could be you. If you are ready, let's start driving! How to Play Train Simulator? Train Simulator offers two unique gaming experiences. You have the option to transport passengers or cargo with your train. The choice is yours. Before diving into the game, you can enhance your driving skills by selecting the "practice" option from the menu. If you feel confident, you can begin the game by choosing your preferred game mode: Passengers Train: Your primary task in the Passengers game mode is to pick up passengers from the station and safely deliver them to their destination station. Cargo Train: The Cargo game mode involves meeting logistics requirements. Some load needs to be delivered to specific locations, and you must transport them without causing any damage. Suggestions Trains are heavy and require time to slow down. When you approach your destination, make sure to position the train within the green zone without passing the "stop" sign. It is advisable to start slowing down before reaching this green area. Sometimes, you may encounter animals, like lambs, on the tracks. We do not want to harm them, so you can use the horn by holding down the 'H' key to gently push them away from the tracks. Occasionally, you will come across railway junctions leading in two different directions. Always follow the open path. When you reach a turning point, look for the blue "turn" icon on the right side of the game screen. Press the arrow key in the direction you need to head. Controls The game controls in Train Simulator are similar to those in other driving games: Use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys to steer the train. Use the 'H' key to sound the horn. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing Train Simulator, you might want to try our other free driving game, American Truck Car Driving . In this game, your mission is to deliver essential cargo to a designated destination using a truck. We recommend exploring the Driving Games and Simulator Games tags on OnlineGames.io for more free driving and simulation game options.

title: Rebel Forces
description: Get ready for action in Rebel Forces game.You have the opportunity to live your dream being a soldier who eliminates the enemies.The game offers you weapons and armor to help you in the battle zone. In the weapon section, you are provided with a range of purchasable and upgradable weapons which are unlocked at different levels. Rebel Forces Weapons are: • Deagle • Smg • Flamethrower • Shotgun • Minigun • Revolver • Slugger • Thompson Smg • Sniper • HMG • Grenade In the Armor Section, you are provided with a range of purchasable equipment that propects you from the bullet attacks. • Watchdog Armor • Hellbound Armor • Undefeated Armor • Night Armor • Supreme Armor • Death Mask • Cataclysm Mask • Domm Squad Mask • Unforgiven Mask • Vanquisher Mask Profile Section In the Profile Section you will see the following details: • Level • Xp • Kills • Money Dont forget to collect the daily gift reward ! The game also has a daily reward feature which gifts players cash and XP every 24 hours, also as your player level increases you get cash rewards, be sure to claim yours. Rebel Forces Gameplay The gameplay is intense as players are deployed into a map to battle and the player with the highest number of kills wins the match. You never know when your opponents may come, so keep moving, aim cautiously, and be vigilant. Special feature in the gameplay is the ability to pick up enemies’ weapons after knock down. In Campaign section you are offered a variety of missions with different objectives. In level 1, you have 3 active missions to choose from. Mission 1 is to win a death match; in this mission 6 players are deployed to battle and the first player with 15 kills wins the match. Mission 2 is to eliminate 3 enemies; in this mission, your objective is to eliminate 3 enemies to pass the mission. However, if your player kills 2 enemies and gets knocked down, you must restart the mission. So ensure you get that 3 kill streak to complete the mission. Mission 3 is to survive for 50 seconds; in this mission you have to survive for 50 seconds and the player’s movement and speed is reduced. To survive, either you take down your enemies or you find cover for 50 seconds. Rewards for completion are $250 and 1000 XP each. In level 2, the active missions are quite the same only that some active missions are still level 1 difficulty with the same cash and XP reward. But level 2 difficulty has a cash price of $300 and 1100 XP. Rebel Forces Level 2 active missions are: • Win a death match (level 1 difficulty) • Eliminate 3 enemies (level 1 difficulty) • Win a death match (level 2 difficulty) Rebel Forces Level 3 active missions are: • Win a death match (level 3 difficulty) • Eliminate 3 enemies (level 1 difficulty) • Survive for 50 seconds (level 1 difficulty) There are several fascinating missions and objectives to enjoy in this game, which will provide you with a realistic sense of being on the battlefield. Online PvP Mode In online PvP mode, a player can choose either to create a room or join an existing room. When creating a room, you get to choose the level and mode to play from. You can choose to select if you Speed x2, Jump force x2 and Armor x2. 16 is the maximum number of players that can join a room. Rebel Forces Levels are: • Garrison • Outpost • FactoryX • Towers • GasPlant • Arena Rebel Forces Modes are: • FFA • Teams • Doomsday Rebel Forces Display includes: • Kill feed (displayed on the top left) • HP and ammo (displayed on the bottom right) • Radar (displayed on the top right) Controls: WASD or arrow keys to move Left click to shoot Right click to aim R to reload Mouse wheel to cycle through weapons Space to jump F to pick up a weapon Tab to toggle pause menu

title: Fall Brainrots
description: Fall Brainrots is a multiplayer parkour game in which you try to survive in various tracks with your Italian brainrot character. Dodge obstacles and reach the finish line first in each course. You must avoid falling; otherwise, you will be eliminated! With its silly Brainrot characters, it’s a pretty enjoyable mix of platformer games and Italian brainrot games. 😆 Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump Mouse: Look Around ESC Key: Show Cursor Fall Brainrots Overview Fall Brainrots is a unique battle royale platformer inspired by Fall Guys. FreezeNova created an entertaining mix by combining Fall Guys-like game mechanics and Brainrot characters. Your main goal is to pass each obstacle on the course one by one and reach the finish point before any other players. The courses present various challenges. Navigate your silly Italian Brainrot and try not to fall from the platform. Otherwise, you may get disqualified! Explore Unusual Platforms 🤡 Unlike typical parkour games containing standard platform courses, Fall Brainrots offers you more than one challenging obstacle course. For example, in the Tor Hunger race, you need to find the fastest path while you have only 120 seconds. Take care of your timing! On the other hand, Bomb Challenge requires you to throw grenades at other players for survival by using the G key on your keyboard. Try not to get caught with a bomb when the tip is up! Unlock New Silly Brainrots 😋 With the coins you earn from the races, you can unlock new silly Brainrot characters from the “Home” page. There are 12 funny Italian Brainrots at your disposal. From Tung Tung Tung Sahur to Tralalero Tralala, each of these humorous characters is waiting for your attention! Gamie has listed some of them below for you: Tung Tung Tung Sahur Bobrito Bandito Tralalero Tralala Ballerina Capuccina Brr Brr Patapim Developer FreezeNova developed fall Brainrots. Similar Games Italian Brainrot Bike Rush is another option that fits your liking! Ride your bike with your Brainrot and overcome the obstacles that come your way on the parkour track. Additionally, feel free to check out our free online parkour games to explore more. There are dozens of online games at your disposal!

title: Champions FC
description: Champions FC is an online soccer game in which you take part in fast-paced football matches. For successful goal scoring, you must break through defenders by dribbling, passing, and timing your kicks! To dominate the match, including the two quick halves, you need to master quick turnovers. Try to win the World Cup and be the champion in this sports game! ⚽ Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Click & Drag the Mouse: Move LMB or Spacebar: Pass the Ball/Kick/Change the Player On Mobile Devices: Use the virtual joystick to interact. How to Play Champions FC Put on your soccer jersey and take your place on the soccer field. Engage in fast-paced football matches and dominate the field with your beloved team. You need to make smart passes to get the ball as close to the opposing team’s goal as possible, and kick it with all your strength to score. On your way to their goal, the opposing team will try to block you with dribbles. Do not let them take the ball! Perform Dribbles If the ball is frequently under the control of the opposing team, you can take it from them by dribbling. Run towards the opposing player with the ball, and the game automatically performs dribbling to take it. Keep in mind that you can press the spacebar or LMB to switch your player to the one closest to the opposing player. Win the World Cup There are two quick halves in each match in this football game. Once you move to the second half, the bases of the teams on the field change. No matter which side you use on the football field, if you manage to control your players successfully and dominate the field by scoring goals, you will be able to win the World Cup! Tips & Tricks for Champions FC 👟 Pass quickly to create chances. ⏱️ Time your shots for better goals. ⚽ Keep moving to beat defenders. 🏃 Win the ball back with dribbles. 💨 Master quick turnovers to control the match. Developer MarketJS is the publisher of Champions FC. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing Champions FC , you may also try playing Penalty King ! In Penalty King, you will play both as a penalty taker and a goalkeeper. For additional options, feel free to check out our Soccer Games Online category by following the link. Keep coming back to discover newly added games on www.onlinegames.io!

title: Dark Ninja Hanjo
description: The city was destroyed. Dark Ninja Hanjo is an adventure game where you explore and try to recover this ruined city. But it will take a lot of work. You need to recover the ancient scroll first to be able to make it happen. You must follow the clues, complete the missions and fight enemies when necessary. How to Play Dark Ninja Hanjo? Click on the "Play" pane from the main menu and proceed to the level selection section. There are 15 levels taking place in deserted areas. Then, start the game by choosing the level you want to play. Following the Sensei's Instructions Sensei will guide you along this path. He will send you to the destroyed city to find out what happened. He warns you to be aware of your surroundings because you never know what will happen in this deserted city. Purple Beams Following Sensei's instructions, you will encounter very high purple beams. Sensei will ask you to investigate these. The enemies cast spells to extract the scrolls. These purple beams belong to those spells. You have to stop the Extractor from extracting the scrolls. Free the Mythical Phoenix The enemies captured the soul core of the Mythical Phoenix. You need to get it back. To do this, you need to destroy 2 UzunaWolf. This will be a challenging war. Store Suppose you want to change your character's appearance and weapons or buy ammunition and energy. In that case, you can personalize your character and game by clicking on the "Store" section from the main menu. Especially, purchasing ammunition from here that you can attack from a distance, such as Shurikens, will make your job much easier on some levels. Characters Heavenly Wolf Flash Hayate Demon Tsukana Shinobi Ashura Weapons Katanas Dual Katanas Fists Arrow Bow Spear Controls Use the WASD or the arrow keys to move Use the Space key to jump Use the Left mouse button to attack Use the Right mouse button to use the projectile Use the R key to change the projectile Use the X key to Special Move Use the E key to change the weapon Use the T key to change the power Use the C key to change the camera view Use the P key to pause More Games Like This Give a chance to Blocky Parkour Ninja , where you jump between blocks as a ninja, if you love playing ninja games. Or, you may look for other adventure and action games on OnlineGames.io for more alternatives.

title: Sprunki Warm Like Fire
description: What happens when you combine two great games? You get Sprunki Warm Like Fire ! This unique game blends the charm of Sprunki with the fiery rhythms of the Incredibox mode Warm Like Fire. This game lets you channel your inner DJ by dressing up members of the quirky band, Sprunki with hot new accessories that bring the heat. Choose from Sprunks like Mr. Tree, Mr. Sun, Lime, Fun Bot, and Garnold. But with a twist: they also look like fiery stars from Warm Like Fire: Firaz, Bimby Baby, Smokey, Smoothring and Sunnder. Change their outfits and accessories to shake up the music. Every piece you add changes the tune, from deep bass to fiery melodies. Control the music with your style! Warning: Dragging the hat in the bottom right corner triggers a scary mode! For a light and fun experience, avoid clicking on it. Controls Computers: Click and drag to dress up the characters. How to Play Sprunki Warm Like Fire Choose from several unique characters, each with their own musical traits. Drag and drop different outfits and accessories at the bottom of your screen onto your chosen Sprunk. Each item alters the music in real-time. It might add beats, vocals, effects or melodies. Experiment with combinations to discover new beats and sounds. Placing the special hat (at the bottom right corner), switches the game to a spooky, horror-like theme. It becomes a whole new game after the hat. Go for it if you have the courage! Developer Sprunki Warm Like Fire is a fan-made reskin. Credits go to NyankoBFLoI for creating Sprunki and to HarryMations for developing Warm Like Fire. Explore Music Games Online If you're a fan of blending music with creativity, you have more fantastic options waiting for you! Alongside Sprunki Warm Like Fire, explore the original Sprunki game , where fashion meets rhythm in a delightful musical challenge. Or browse Blob Opera on OnlineGames.io, where you can create your own opera music using lovable, gelatinous characters. These games not only entertain but also inspire musical creativity and innovation. Don't miss out on the fun; start playing and make your own music online today!

title: Papa's Freezeria
description: Papa Louie is back, opening a brand new branch! In a very quiet town, he opens a freezeria business to sell delicious sundaes ! The place has an open position. You think you're perfect for this job: flexible hours, handsome tips, nice weather, and few customers. Perhaps you could go to the beach after work, huh? But wait, what is that? A cruise ship stops in a town full of thirsty passengers! Suddenly, all of them create a line in front of Papa's Freezeria , ready to sip their milkshakes. Roll up your sleeves; it's going to be a busy day at the freezeria. Controls Use your mouse How to Make Freezer Sundaes in Papa's Freezeria: Step-by-Step Guide Order Station Order Station is where the journey begins! This is where you take and deliver customers' orders. Carefully record each customer's order on an order ticket . Once you've noted the details, drag the tickets onto the ticket line to store and organize them as needed. When you're ready, click on the Build Station at the bottom to start preparing the orders. Build Station Now, the Build Station (where the magic happens)! Here, you start creating delicious sundaes with various syrups. Begin by filling a cup with ice cream and gathering the necessary ingredients to make a perfect freezer sundae. If you can't remember the order, don't worry! Simply drag the tickets to the side to read them easily. Watch the ice cream meter on the machine closely and try to wait until it's perfectly centered. Then, press the green button . Every sundae needs a mixable item from the machine. Strawberries, blueberries, and caramel come as default options, but you can unlock even more flavors as you progress. You'll also be adding syrups to the sundaes here. Vanilla, chocolate, and other delightful syrups are available on the syrup machine. Press the correct button to pour the right syrup . Mix Station The third station, it's time to blend everything together! Drag the cup to the blender machine and watch the magic happen. Each customer has different blending preferences, so watch the Blend Meter . Wait until it matches what they ordered on their ticket. Once it's ready, drag the cup onto the Topping Track . Topping Station Lastly, the Topping Station is the favorite part for many workers! Here, you add the finishing touches to the Freezer sundaes. Add toppings and extras in the order shown on the ticket. Click and drag the whipped cream bottle above the cup and release it to start pouring. Move your mouse left and right until it stops spraying whipped cream. Next, click and drag the syrup above the cup and release it to start pouring. If the order calls for sprinkles or nuts , click and drag from the sprinkles bin and release above the cup to start pouring sprinkles from the scooper. Try to spread them evenly to make the freezer sundae look lovely. For some orders, you must add a specific amount of cherries or Oreos . Carefully place them evenly to ensure the sundae looks as perfect as it tastes. Enjoy the process and have fun making those sundaes look irresistible! What is Papa's Freezeria? Papa's Freezeria is a flash game where you create freezer sundaes and collect tips based on your careful work. Developer Flipline Studios created this game. More Papa's Games If you enjoy Papa's games, you can check out Papa's Bakeria and bake delicious pies. Or else try Papa Louie When Pizzas Attack for a platformer challenge. All are free to play without any plugin needed on OnlineGames.io.

title: Airplane Racer
description: Fly through the arcades with Airplane Racer ! Airplane Racer is a vivid plane game you can play solo or with a friend. While solo mode makes you wander the sky alone, versus mode enables you to race with a friend. In this game, you have many options, like game modes, track options, and airplane alternatives. Diversity is the new luxury in the sphere. How to Play Airplane Racer? Player 1- Solo Use the Arrow keys to direct the plane. Activate booster using X. N can be used for changing the camera view. Activate power up by the Space. 2 Players-Versus Use WASD keys to direct the plane. Activate booster using H. Y can be used for changing the camera view. Activate power up by J. Also, you can make the game more fun by using your joystick. In the Settings > Inputs menu, you can adjust your settings by your own choice. Game Modes in The Airplane Racer You have lots of options in this game. As mentioned before, you can play by yourself in the solo mode or race with a friend in the versus mode. It is up to you! In the solo mode, you have 3 options. Championship Arcade Timetrial In the versus mode, you have 2 options. Championship Arcade Championship mode requires challenge. You are competing with others on the leaderboard in this mode. Use your guns & weapons, which you collect in the game, to climb up the ladder by tabbing the Space key! Arcade mode is very simple but not basic. You are flying with AI on the track that you choose. Technology has improved a lot, has not it? And the last one, Timetrial mode, is only available on the solo. You are challenging yourself in terms of time here. All alone against the clock! Track Selections in Airplane Racer In the Championship mode, you have the following track options: Rookie Challenge Pro Club - (To unlock it, you need to finish 3rd at the previous Championship.) Veteran Tour - (To unlock it, you need to finish 3rd at the previous Championship.) For Champions - (To unlock it, you need to finish 2nd at the previous Championship.) Legends Only - (To unlock it, you need to finish 1st at the previous Championship.) In the Arcade mode, you have the following Track options: The Dark Cave The Abandoned Factory Desert by Night Blazing Sun Unknown Sector The Ruins of The Sector Airplane Selection in Airplane Racer After choosing your game mode and track options, you now need to select which airplane you want to use! There are 5 alternatives for you, and each of them comes with its own unique features. Wind Hunter Flying Circus Blue Parrot Shark Lucky Plus, you have 3 other options with a price in the Garage menu. Similar Games If you like Airplane Racer, look at Racing Games , Simulator Games and Driving Games tags for more options.

title: Obby: Find 100 Cats
description: Have you heard of the Cat Distribution System before? The Cat Distribution System (CDS) is a mystical way cats find their humans. When the universe is convinced you're a good and caring person and the time is right, it rewards you with a stray cat. It's like a cosmic matchmaking service. Cats might unexpectedly hitch a ride in your car, appear in your garden, or even pop out from your shopping bag. They could show up at your doorstep, trail you home, or simply decide you're the one while at a shelter. The system is famously unpredictable, almost as if it has a mind of its own. Obby: Find 100 Cats is a purr-fectly crafted 3D adventure game where the Cat Distribution System literally fails. Normally, cats have a penchant for finding the best hiding spots, but in this game, something feels amiss. The magical system, matchmaking cats with humans, has gone haywire. Instead of those playful hide-and-seeks, cats are stuck in trees, trapped on roofs, or locked in rooms due to this cosmic glitch. Your mission is to locate and rescue all 100 of these misplaced felines spread across ten vividly themed maps. That's the only way to restore order to the universe's feline distribution. Each map is a puzzle of adorable hideaways and clever concealments. Find every last cat, using your wits and perhaps a bit of luck. Complete your task and set your cats free to choose their true, forever homes. Controls Move: WASD Jump: Spacebar Run: Left shift Look Around: Right-Click How to Play Obby: Find 100 Cats Explore 10 maps, each a playground filled with nooks, crannies, and clever hiding spots for 10 cats. Think you've got a cat's eye for detail? Prove it! Use arrow keys or WASD to move, Space to jump, and Shift to sprint. You can collect a cat by simply walking over the cat. Don't forget to swivel that camera! Right-click on PC or use the camera swipe on mobile to look around corners and under ledges. Keep track of your feline finds with the 'Cats' button at the top left corner. See which cats you've collected and how many are left to discover. Chubby, Snowy, Gloomy and Lazy are the common ones you can spot easily. But what about the rare ones hiding in most unthinkable places? You can switch between maps by walking or using the 'Maps' button. Each map offers new challenges and scenery, such as a temple, castle, beach, Christmas scenery, a desert maze and many more! If you're stuck or just want to get a better top-down view, hit the 'Jump' button to teleport to the top of the map. Feel like you're close but no cigar? Use the 'Radar' button to see if you're near a hidden cat. Follow your whiskers! The Tail End of the Cat Rescue Are you ready to comb through every inch of these maps to collect all 100 cats? The challenge is set, the cats are hidden – let the great cat hunt begin! Remember, in Obby: Find 100 Cats, every kitty counts! And, if you'd like to play more kitty adventures, we've got you covered. Head over to the cat games online page to find purrfect feline games, including Cat Simulators , where you get to be the cat itself. Have fun!

title: Police Stunt Cars
description: Test your driving skills in Police Stunt Cars . Take control of your police car and explore the empty streets. Make sure you have enough spped for the ramps and obstacles that are created to test your skills. Get off on stunts routes and drive wherever you want on the road. The excitement will never end because there will be always something new in every corner waiting to be explored. There are 10 awsome police cars including a limousine you can change them whenever you want. There are also 4 maps ready to be explored. Police Stunt Cars Display • Controls (displayed on the top left) • Speed km/h (displayed on the top right) • Stunt score (displayed on the top center) Controls WASD or arrow keys to drive Space key to handbrake Left Shift to boost car G key to unstuck car R key to reset scene C key to change view (camera) E key to turn on police lights X to hide instructions ‘1’ ‘2’ ‘3’ … ‘9’ ‘0’ to change car Tab or Esc to toggle pause

title: Brainrot Clicker
description: Have you ever dreamt of endless fun, Italian vibes, all wrapped in pure silliness? With Brainrot Clicker , the fun is just one click away! Discover which character will be unlocked next by simply clicking the one on your screen. Unlock boosters to automate the process, hit ridiculous milestones, and get surprised by the entire collection of AI-generated characters! Game Overview Brainrot Clicker is a modern clicker game designed to offer you endless fun by simply… clicking on the most popular wacky characters of TikTok: the Italian Brainrot creatures! The game includes a single-player mode with a classic clicker interface, featuring power-ups to boost your score and a two-player mode where you can challenge a friend and see who reveals the Italian Brainrot character first. How to Play Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals? Does brainrot have a limit? Single-player: W / Up Arrow / Left Click / Right Click / Middle Mouse Button Two-player: W / Up Arrow Tips & Tricks Click your way to a mountain of shiny coins! Once you’ve got enough, spend them on wacky boosters ⎼ they’ll click for you, add silly bonuses, and make every tap super strong. The more boosters you purchase, the faster you’ll swim in coins! FAQs How do I earn coins? Simple ⎼ just keep clicking! Every click gives you coins. Buy boosters to make coins rain even faster. What are boosters? Boosters are your secret weapons! They can click for you, give you silly bonuses, or make every tap mega powerful. Is there an end to brainrot? That’s the thing… nobody knows! The brainrot might be infinite! Continue your brainrot journey and discover what it takes to create silly AI-generated characters. Can you merge them wisely?

title: Drift Fury
description: Drift Fury is a 3D drift game where you participate in drift challenges and races with the most exotic sports cars. The winding road calls you to make the dust fly in one of the most enjoyable driving games ! How to Play Drift Fury You can enjoy your passion for speed in this car game. Increase your adrenaline level by pressing the gas pedal nonstop! Try to make the longest drags and break your records every time you set out on the road. The curves of the track will allow you to burn your tires freely. You can also engage in car races if you want. After you choose your vehicle, you will come to the game mode selection menu. Select "Race" mode to beat up another car in one of the 10 compelling races. Triple Your Drift Score Your vehicle's engine is moaning, and you are in the driver's seat to overcome dangerous turns. You must enter into the turns at certain speeds to perform perfect draggings. To do that, you need to steer your vehicle like a pro. The highest scores go to drivers who manage to continue drifting for a certain period. If you manage to drag it without losing control, you will triple your score by fulfilling the bar popping up on the screen. Unlock Your Dream Monster We all know that each of us has a car that he/she has dreamed of since childhood. You will find that car among the 9 vehicles. These cars are inspired by well-known brands' sports vehicles, such as the BMW i8 Spyder and Mclaren series. To unlock the last car, a Lamborghini Huracan, you must unlock 20 tasks from the "Achievements" section.
