title: Barbiemania
description: Hi Barbie! We have some makeover projects to do! Barbiemania is a fashion and makeup game with ultra-realistic visuals. Ellie is an iconic doll with stunning beauty. She needs help creating a style for three occasions: every day, work, and party. Barbiemania is a game with lifelike visuals that appeal to both kids and adult women. While you prepare her, Ellie will be patiently waiting for you to decide. She'll breathe slowly and look at the sides to give you little clues on which ones she likes the most. The visual effects are so realistic that you may find yourself reaching out, hoping to sense if her hair is as soft as it seems on the screen. Bring the best version of Ellie and let her shine on any occasion! If you're ready, pick up your makeup brushes; we're beginning! How to Play Barbiemania? Ellie needs help with the styling of her dresses, accessories, and makeup for three different events. In each part, you, as Ellie's stylist, will pick up between different sets of makeup tones and fashionable items. You will begin with a daily style, which will be followed by office and night out. In the first section, the style you create should be both comfortable and gorgeous. First, decide on the top she'll wear, then pick a hairstyle, the colors of her eyes, lip gloss, and eyeshadow. Add a touch of sparkle with jewelry. And try out colorful glasses to test which ones suit best to her beautiful eyes. Join the Fashion Craze Barbie Ellie is a picky girl; you should care for her preferences, too. Check the beauty bar on the left to see if she is satisfied with the results or not. When both of you have come to an end of the discussion on which suits her best, click on the checkmark icon on the bottom left to finish the look of that occasion. She is ready to grab a bite or have a cup of coffee with a friend in a lovely coffee. Follow the same steps for office and party occasions, choosing from a variety of different dresses and styles. Remember to complete her look for work with glasses or a notebook in her hand for an extra smart style. She should look professional at the office. On the other hand, she has the right to exaggerate the sparkle on the night-out events. Use your imagination and do your best to make her the most beautiful girl in the party. Capture the Magic When you finish up all three looks, don’t forget to send all three of the looks to the photoshoot event. We are sure you did a great job, and the results should be everlasting. Turn the spotlight on Ellie and capture her pictures to save to your device or share them with your friends. Controls Use your cursor or touchscreen to pick items. Drag makeup items to color eyes and lips Developer Barbiemania was developed by Gamerina. What is More for Girlies? We have wonderful games for girls and women on our website. To discover more of the makeover games and beauty games, navigate to the Girl Games page and explore which ones are your favorites.

title: Fancy Pants 3
description: The King summons our stick guy! Fancy Pants 3 is a 2D adventure game and the third title in the popular video game series. The Fancy Pants Adventure. Angry Bathtub Pirates are trying to seize the King's Royal Tub in the game. Set out and fight with the pirates to reclaim the Royal Tub for him. However, Angry Bathtub Pirates may try to hurt you by kidnapping your sister in this arcade game. Do your best, get the bathtub and save your sister! Controls Left Arrow: Move Left Right Arrow: Move Right Down Arrow: Duck Up Arrow: Open Doors S: Jump M: Mute Spacebar: Pause Basics of Fancy Pants 3 One day, the Mayor wakes you up from your sleep. And he gives you bad news. The King's Royal Tub has been stolen. He needs your help. You need to get it back! Bobble Head will take you through a short tutorial. He needs to ensure you are fit before you set off to get the Royal Tub back . The real adventure will begin in this escape game when you complete the tutorial. You must overcome all the obstacles at each level and find the exit room. Strive to survive from the spiders and snails on the way! Get the Royal Tub Back To get the bathtub back, you need to go to Squiggleville. On the way, you will encounter many dangers and obstacles. You must climb over the walls, pass the buildings and find the exit room . From time to time, there will be coils. You can use them to jump high altitudes. Stomp on Spiders On your way to the Royal Tub, you need to deal with many spiders, snails, crabs and mice with guns. You must learn how to defeat them. You can stomp on them to crash them. Alternatively, you can get rid of them by ducking under them. You should especially watch for the mice as they may shoot you once they see you. Don't forget that Fancy Pants Man has 3 lives in total! Levels in Fancy Pants 3 There are nine levels in this adventure game. Squiggleville The Royal Tub Outer Squiggleville Canopy Forest Bummin' It Beach Pirate Cove Piratey Princess Ship Misplaced Cave Island Express Developer Brad Borne developed Fancy Pants 3. More Games Like This If you have not tried the other games of the Fancy Pants World 1 , and Fancy Pants World 2 try playing it! You need to guide The Fancy Pants man in a maze. Make him move forward, climb over the hills and stomp on the evil creatures! You may look up the online adventure games tag on OnlineGames.io for more options. Please share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below! We want to know which level was the most challenging for you.

title: ShooterZ.io
description: ShooterZ.io is a strategic game where you test your shooting skills. You have the opportunity to play with people from all around the world in an online arena. Keep your attention on the map and train your soldier on the battlefield. Let's see what you need to do before you start the game. Create a room You can name the room, choose the maximum players that can join and select the game mode FFA or Team. You can also join other players' rooms. There are 11 maps : • Sanctum • Yarimar • Sumerra • Tabourma • Isaneya • Barricade • BunkerX • FactoryX • Freedom • Ship • Arena Weapons: • BallisticKnife • Deagle • MP5KA4 • STW-25 • M87T • Blaser R93 • RPG • M79 • M67 Statistics section : In statistics you will see the following details: • Number of games played • Number of wins • Number of kills • Score Controls: Left mouse button to shoot Right mouse button to aim R to reload C to crouch P to pause 1-9 key to change weapon T to open chat and enter to send Space bar to jump Hold shift to run Tab to open the menu

title: Tile Match
description: It’s late afternoon, and the sun is casting a soft golden glow through your little window. You’ve got your pumpkin spice latte in hand and a cozy plaid blanket draped over your chilly legs. Your laptop is resting nearby, waiting for you to chill out with something simple yet satisfying. You open a tile game on OnlineGames.io, ready for a bit of casual fun. As soon as the Tile Match loads, the board fills with colorful and yummy tiles, each one neatly stacked in layers. The goal is simple: match-3 of the same kind to clear them from the board. You start off with ease, picking out a few obvious matches: three ice cream cones. Click, click, click. 3 glazed donuts. Tap, tap, tap. Tiles disappear, and your board looks clearer already. But then, things get a little trickier. You leave your coffee mug on the table as if you're saying, "Hold my drink for a second," to a friend in a bar. The easy matches are gone, and now you need to think ahead. The slots at the bottom of the screen hold up to six tiles, but once they fill up, it’s game over. You hover over a tile, wondering if it’s the right move. Should you risk it? Will another match show up soon? You make your choice, and… yes! A perfect match. The tiles vanish, leaving more space to work with. Sparkling visual effects pour in front of your eyes. And let's not forget those ASMR sounds. There’s something so relaxing, comforting yet engaging about this little puzzle game online . It has just enough strategy to keep you thinking but never too stressful for a cozy gaming session . Minutes slip by, and before you know it, you’re lost in the game’s rhythm. One level down, another starts. Maybe you’ll just play one more, or maybe a few more. It’s the kind of game that lets you play at your own pace, whether you’ve got a few minutes or an entire cozy afternoon to spare. How to Play Tile Match Clear the board by matching tiles in groups of three. But there’s a catch: You have six slots to hold tiles. Once you collect three of the same kind, they disappear. If your slots fill up with unmatched tiles, the game is over. Clearing top layers first makes hidden tiles easier to reach. If you grab a tile too soon, you might run out of matching options. So avoid blocking further moves. Tile Match Boosters If you ever get stuck, four powerful boosters can help: ➕ Extra Slot – Gives you one more slot to hold tiles. 🔀 Shuffle – Rearranges the tiles to open up new possibilities. 💡 Hint – Instantly finds a match for you. ⏪ Undo – Rewinds your last move, perfect for fixing mistakes. Endless Fun with 1,200+ Levels Tile Match isn’t just a quick puzzle. You’ll never run out of levels with over 1,200 levels to explore! As you progress, new patterns and layouts keep things fresh, making every level a satisfying little brain teaser. Why Tile Match is the Perfect Cozy Game ✨ No timers, no rush: Play at your own pace, stress-free. 🧩 Satisfying puzzles: Easy to learn but keeps your mind engaged. 🎨 Beautiful, colorful tile designs: Each level brings something fresh. Some games are all about action, but Tile Match? It’s about slowing down and enjoying the little victories. Unwind, Relax, and Start Matching Some games make you rush and react, but Tile Match is different. It’s a game you can settle into, a puzzle you can enjoy without pressure. Whether you’re playing for a few minutes or an hour, it’s the perfect way to slow down and enjoy a moment for yourself. So grab your favorite drink, find a comfy spot, and start matching today! 😊

title: Coffee Color Blocks
description: Coffee Color Blocks is an online puzzle game where you guide colored blocks on the board to gates of the corresponding color. When you connect matching blocks and gates, coffee cups fill the blocks. Clear every block from the board and conquer all levels with your puzzle-solving skills. 🧩 Controls Click & Drag: Move Blocks On Mobile Devices: Tap and slide the blocks to move them. Coffee Color Blocks Overview When you begin the game, a board appears on the screen with blocks in different colors. Your objective is to move these blocks to the gates of the same color. Each successful match fills the block with coffee cups. To advance, remove every block from the board by filling it with coffee cups. Survey the entire board before moving any block, and determine which block to clear first. Think Ahead Before moving any blocks, study the board and examine every gate and block carefully. Identify which block obstructs others, and move the blocks accordingly. Connect the same-colored blocks and gates. Each correct match fills the cups inside the blocks. Fill the Cups Inside To remove a block from the board, fill it completely with coffee cups. Otherwise, it remains and may obstruct other blocks. Move blocks strategically toward their matching gates, fill them with cups, and watch them disappear! Tips & Tricks for Coffee Color Blocks 🎨 Match each block with the gate of the same color. 🧐 Scan the whole board before making your first move. ❗ Remove the most blocking shape first. 👀 Check which block is stopping the others. ☕ A block disappears only when it is fully filled with coffee cups. Developer Coffee Color Blocks is developed by GamePush. More Games Like This If you like Coffee Color Blocks , try Block Puzzle: Slide Block Jam , where you slide colored shapes on the grid to their matching exits! You can also explore more free online puzzle games at the link. Bookmark this site by pressing CTRL+D to return easily!

title: Vice City Driver
description: Vice City Driver is an online driving game inspired by GTA Vice City. Our protagonist is Tommy Vercetti with his unforgettable blue shirt. Take your puppy with you, get in your spectacular Ferrari-like sports car and start exploring the city. Make drifts and stunts to earn money to customize your car! Controls Arrow Keys or WASD Keys: Move / Drive E Key: Enter/Exit the Car C Key: Change Cameraview Left-Shift: Use Nitro Mouse: Look Around How to Play Vice City Driver The gameplay is simple in Vice City Driver: take your dog with you, get in the car and start the engine. Think of this game as a world built around driving a sports car, like GTA Vice City. There are two modes in this GTA game: Drift Mode and Stunt Mode. You need to perform drifts or stunts to make credits. Use the credits to customize and upgrade your car, and get fuel for it. Of course, Tommy Vercetti will need an energy drink from time to time. Vice City Driver: Game Modes Drift Mode In the Drift Mode, try to get the highest points by hitting the brakes while turning the car, left or right. Keep in mind that if you crash into something with your car while drifting, you will lose the drift score. Master avoiding any collisions with other vehicles or buildings. Also, there are Drift Trigger points in the city. Drive there and accept the task to gain money. For example, at one point, you gain +1000 CR by fulfilling the 4000 drifting points. Stunt Mode Be ready to jump your car off extremely high ramps in the Stunt Mode. If you can reach the yellow circles, you will earn +500 CR. Here is a pro tip: accelerate to high speed as you enter the ramps, and you'll pull off a successful stunt! Just like the Drift Trigger points, there are Speed Trigger points in the Stunt Mode. Reach 170 km/h and you'll get +1000 CR! Developer Fuego! Games developed Vice City Driver. Other GTA Games If you are into GTA Games, you may also try GTA Simulator . In the game, you have some tasks to accomplish. Defeat the gangsters and earn rewards and diamonds. For further options, check our GTA Games Online game tag, which includes free online games that you can enjoy playing.

title: Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly
description: Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly is a first-person horror game where you run a shawarma kiosk at night. Sell shawarma rolls and soda, but watch out for suspicious customers; anyone could be dangerous after dark. This psychological horror game pushes your endurance to the limit. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move E Key: Interact Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly Overview In Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly, you are in the shoes of a night-shift worker. Customers approach your small street kiosk and ask for shawarma rolls and a bottle of soda. You need to carefully examine the customers and decide who to serve. When you encounter a suspicious person, do not take their order, close the window and wait for them to leave. You will feel the thrill in your bones in this horror game! Examine the Customers When a customer comes near the street kiosk, you must examine him carefully. You need to pay attention to the customers’ appearance, behaviour, speech, and small oddities. If they seem suspicious, turn them away. Press the red button and close the window. After a couple of seconds, you will see that they leave. Read The Journal As you make progress and complete various tasks, you will unlock some parts of the journal in which your character writes his kiosk adventures every day. Press the Q key to open the journal and see your progress. You can click on the available entries to read the writings. You can unlock all the entries by accomplishing missions written in the journal. Tips & Tricks for Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly 👀 Watch customers closely before serving. ❌ Suspicious behavior means closing the window. 💡 Use the red button without hesitation. 📖 Read the journal for mission clues. 😱 Stay calm when nighttime customers arrive. Developer GamePush is the publisher of Scary Shawarma Kiosk: The Anomaly. Looking for More? If you take pleasure in playing survival horror games like this, check out Survive The Night! In Survive The Night , you try to escape from a haunted house in which you are trapped. For more alternatives, feel free to visit our online horror games by clicking on the link! There are dozens of free games at your disposal on this website to explore.

title: Idle Vlogger
description: Oh, who wouldn't want to be a famous vlogger with millions of subscribers on YouTube? For the ones who are too shy to upload their first-ever video on YouTube, here is a game where you can progress much faster and enjoy being a YouTuber! Idle Vlogger is a clicker game where you can live the high life of internet fame all by building your audience with strategic decisions! Create unique videos, follow trends, and watch your subscriber count soar. From tech tutorials to funny cat meme videos, the Idle Vlogger game offers a range of themes to build your brand. Don't forget that the best equipment and editing skills will set you apart from other creators. Reach for the top and see if you have what it takes to hit 1 billion subscribers! Controls Click or tap to play How to Play Idle Vlogger Start by selecting a theme for your video. From best games to cat vlogs or even absurd tutorials like How to Fold a Hat from a Paper Bag. It's all about capturing clicks. The more specific, the more views you attract. Use sliders to tweak your video's charm. Adjust sliders to control elements like content type, quality, and audience appeal. Each video requires a unique balance between conversation and visuals. Want your viewers to watch a video on epic fails in gaming? Adjust that 'funny' slider to the max! Some of the sliders will be unlocked as you progress in the game so you’ll be able to fine-tune your video. Edit your video to improve its appeal to the max and hit publish. Watch the views roll, and read the comments of your subscribers. You may encounter spam or harsh criticism; just don't get disappointed by trolls on YouTube. It’ll be worth all the effort in the end! Strategize Your YouTube Journey You can increase your subscribers by creating more content on the latest trends or collaborating with top creators for special boosts! Employ scriptwriters, managers, comment moderators, PR managers and more to improve the quality of your videos. As you start to make money from vlogging, your audience will ask for higher-quality videos. Go beyond 240p by upgrading your setup with better cameras, mics, and editing tools. From a potato camera to 8K superheroes, upgrade your gear up and over. As your channel grows, so does your ability to churn out content faster than a meme goes viral. Aim for that sweet 1 billion subscribers because why settle for a thousand when you can have a million times a thousand? Developer Created by PlayCroc. Explore Idle Games If you enjoyed Idle Vlogger, try exploring other clicker games like Idle Dev Startup , where you take on the role of a software developer trying to make and market applications and expand his business.

title: World Guesser
description: Put your geography knowledge to the test with World Guesser ! This fun and educational game drops you into random locations on the map, and your goal is to guess where you are. It's like the game developers' way of saying, "You think you know geography, huh? Let's see you pinpoint a random street in Kazakhstan!" It's a game where the world is your playground, and every click could lead you from the bustling streets of Tokyo to the serene landscapes of Patagonia. In this free online game similar to GeoGuessr , you're dropped into a random Google Street View location somewhere on Earth. Use your wit, knowledge, and a dash of luck to guess where you are on the globe. Seek visual clues like landmarks, road signs, or even the terrain to pinpoint your location. Each correct guess gets you closer to becoming a geography master. Explore the world, improve your map-reading skills, and have fun with World Guesser on OnlineGames.io! Perfect for explorers, trivia buffs, or anyone looking to spice up their geography knowledge with a game that's as educational as it is entertaining. Plus, it's the only place where getting lost feels like an achievement. Controls Computer Navigate the map with the mouse. Zoom in and out using the scroll wheel. Left-click to guess Smartphone Pinch to zoom in and out. Drag your finger across the screen to move the map. Tap to make your guess. How to Play World Guesser Pick your language solo or duel and start a round to get dropped into a random map location. Explore the area by moving around to gather clues. These clues can be in the form of anything, such as street signs, architectural style, people, terrain, vegetation, weather, mountains, rivers, lakes, and seas. You can take a hint from World Guesser, if you'd like narrow down the region to make the guess. When you have a guess, zoom in on the map and click to guess your location. After you make the guess you'll see how close your guess is to the actual location. (You can change units from meters to miles in-game settings.) At this point, you will earn points based on the accuracy. Each game has 5 rounds of exploring and guessing. The aim is to achieve 25,000 points in total. Play multiple rounds to improve your score and compete with friends! The Community Maps Bonanza! Dive into community-made maps for endless fun! These community maps are like the world's most chaotic treasure hunt, where every player is both the hunter and the creator of the chaos. Who knew geography could be this much of a party? Must-explores are as follows: Capitals of the World: Can you spot the difference between Washington D.C., and Ottawa? No? Good luck! Soccer Fields: Ever thought you could identify a stadium by the grass pattern? Now's your chance to prove it. Country Flags: Match the flag to the land unless you think the Swiss flag flies over Sydney. Airports: From LAX to LHR, see if you can navigate the world of aviation without a boarding pass. It's a brilliant mode for those who love to wander virtually but can't afford the plane tickets. 🤑 And More: From " Skibidi Ohio the Ultimate Map" to "Famous Street Food Stalls," the community's creativity knows no bounds. Duels in World Guesser Challenge your geography skills in thrilling online duels! World Guesser lets you compete head-to-head with players worldwide to see who can guess locations more accurately and faster. Here's how it works: Hit the duel button and let the game pair you with opponents of similar skill levels. Both players are dropped into the same location and must explore, analyze, and make their guesses before the timer runs out (15 seconds by default). Points are awarded based on the accuracy and speed of your guess. Outperform your opponent to win the round! Compete, climb the leaderboard, and prove you're the ultimate geography expert. World Guesser with Friends: Party Rooms You can also create custom party rooms to play with friends and set your own rules. Customize the experience by adjusting: The number of rounds. Time limits for each round. Movement options (allow or restrict movement). Zooming (enable or disable zooming and panning). Street name visibility (toggle on or off). Specific maps or themes to play on. Make every game unique and tailored to your preferences—perfect for friendly competitions or testing your skills! Developer World Guesser (WorldGuessr) is brought to you by Coder Gautam. Languages World Guesser is available in five languages, making it accessible to players worldwide: English Spanish Russian German French Is there a free version of GeoGuessr? Yes, World Guesser has similar mechanics to GeoGuessr and is completely free to play on OnlineGames.io. More Guess Games If you love the thrill of exploring and guessing, World Guesser is just the beginning! Discover more free games on OnlineGames.io, like Google Feud and dive into challenges that test your knowledge and intuition. Whether you're identifying patterns or making clever guesses, there's always something fun waiting for you. Explore now and expand your gaming adventure!

title: Lambo Traffic Racer
description: Lambo Traffic Racer is an online driving game where you overtake cars on a highway with a Lamborghini-like sports car. Drive this powerful car and try to pass others as close as possible to earn the highest points. However, other drivers are unpredictable! Avoid crashing with any of them in this Highway Traffic-inspired game. 🚦 Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Drive/Steer/Brake F Key: Activate Nitro C Key: Change Cameraview Lambo Traffic Racer Overview Ready to drive in a flow of traffic with your Lambo? Start the engine and head to the highway! You can choose the landscape you want to steer your car on. Would you rather explore Desert Dunes filled with cactus, the lush landscapes of Greenlands, or take a night tour of the city in Night City? The choice is yours! Then, you can get ready for driving your car in the busy traffic. Overtake the Cars 🚘 Your main aim in this car game is to overtake the cars on the highway one by one without crashing into them. The closer you pass, the more points you get! A simple overtake earns you +100 points while a close overtake adds +133 points to your overall score. If you manage to do combos, you will get even higher points. Here’s a pro tip for you: Speed up over 100 km/h and perform a close overtake to get the most scores in this Highway Traffic inspired game! Choose Your Lamborghini 🏎 Begin by driving the Vortex X1 at first. As you make progress and earn cash, you can upgrade your current Lamborghini or get new upgraded models. There are six vehicles varying in torque, handling, brake and speed functions. Pick up the one that suits you well and hit the roads! Below, you can find the vehicles that you can unlock listed. Inferno GT Oblivion SX Shadowstrike Phantom ZR Eclipse V12 Developer Fuego! Games developed Lambo Traffic Racer. Similar Driving Games You can also give Formula Traffic Racer a chance! This time, you will drive a Formula 1 vehicle on the endless highway. Furthermore, feel free to take a look at our Driving Games Online game library for more options.

title: Julio Police Cars
description: Get behind the wheel and speed up your car in Julio Police Cars game. With spectacular designed police cars you will experience the adrenaline rush while you are navigating the city roads. You can explore 3 maps with complete freedom. This will keep you entertained and you will never be bored. 10 cars including a limousine wait for you to be tested. Be the best driver and have the best stunt score while you drifting. Julio Police Cars Controls : WASD or arrow keys to drive Space key to handbrake Left Shift to boost car G key to unstuck car R key to reset scene C key to change view (camera) E key to turn on police lights X to hide instructions ‘1’ ‘2’ ‘3’ … ‘9’ ‘0’ to change car Tab or Esc to toggle pause

title: Papa's Cheeseria
description: The cheesy chaos of Papa's Cheeseria starts in a few moments. The delightful time-management game is now on OnlineGames.io! Set in the bustling town of Toastwood, this eleventh installment of the Papa Louie series will test your multitasking skills as you prepare awesome grilled cheese sandwiches and irresistible side dishes. The story kicks off with a twist: Scarlett and her band, Scarlett and the Shakers, are supposed to perform on opening night, but their music gear is stolen! To raise money for replacements, you step into the Cheeseria to whip up some sandwiches using a wide variety of breads, cheeses, and toppings. With dozens of ingredients to unlock and master, your job is to build the grilled cheese sandwiches and sides, one order at a time. From classic white bread to exotic rosemary focaccia, American cheese to aged gouda, and toppings like bacon, jalapeños, and sautéed onions, every detail counts. Don't forget the fries—curly, waffle, or sweet potato wedges—loaded with everything from nacho sauce to sour cream! So, why wait? Start playing Papa's Cheeseria now! Controls Use your mouse to interact with stations, drag ingredients, and deliver orders. Click and drag to arrange your sandwiches and fries with precision. How to Play Papa's Cheeseria Customers arrive with specific requests for grilled cheese sandwiches and fries. Note their preferences at the Order Station. Head to the Build Station to choose from a wide variety of breads, cheeses, and toppings: Breads: Start with white or multigrain bread, or unlock specialty options like ciabatta, pumpernickel, or pretzel bread. Cheeses: Layer your sandwich with classics like Swiss or pepper jack, or get fancy with asiago, gorgonzola, or Havarti. Toppings: Add crowd-pleasers like bacon, grilled chicken, and mushrooms, or go bold with lobster chunks and deep-fried pickles. Cook your creation to perfection at the Grill Station—light, regular, or well-done. Watch the meter closely to avoid overcooking! Fry up your customer's choice of sides, from traditional French fries to crinkle-cut or sweet potato wedges. Add toppings like cheddar, chili, or rosemary for extra flair. Assemble the dish, plate it with care, and serve your customer for tips and rewards! As you level up, gain access to premium ingredients like rosemary focaccia bread, asiago cheese, or wild onion sauce. Who Created Papa's Cheeseria? Papa's Cheeseria was created by Flipline Studios. They crafted this game to be a perfect blend of fun, strategy, and creativity. With endless ingredient combinations and challenging gameplay, it's a treat for players of all ages. Start crafting cheesy masterpieces today on OnlineGames.io and help Scarlett and the Shakers get their groove back! More Cooking Games If you enjoyed Papa's Cheeseria, try other time-management games on OnlineGames.io, like Papa's Bakeria . Each game offers new ingredients, stations, and challenges!

title: Organize It
description: The place is a mess. You're hired as a professional organizer. Tidy up the place, throw out the garbage, arrange drawers and put items in the closets. Give your client's home a breath of fresh air by getting rid of the overwhelming clutter. Come on, get to work! Organize It is a 2D puzzle game you can play on your browser on any smart device. In 5 unique levels, each taking place in a different room of the house, your job remains the same: organizing the place for a clean and tidy home . Learn how to play this game below. How to Play Organize It Cleaning and organizing is a job requiring physical effort. So you need energy. Start by filling up your energy in the main menu. Then, pass on to the levels. To complete a level, you should place all the items in the correct spots within the given time limit. If you feel stuck, no big deal; you can take a hint and see the complete version of the level. Wardrobe The first duty is the wardrobe. Hang the clothes, put the shoes on shelves. Fold the sheets neatly and organize the wardrobe up and over . Place the suitcases and purses where they belong. After all the work, the closet will much more spacious. Pet Room With lots of animals in this room, it is not surprising the place is a mess. Grab the furry friends and leave to designated spots . It is easy to guess which pet likes certain items for animal lovers. Cats and balls, birds and mirrors, hamsters and wheels get along, don't they? Give the furry friends a neat home. Toiletries Okay, we get it; girlies can be a little untidy while preparing for a big night. After all the rush of choosing a dress and doing your hair and make-up, toiletries might have scattered around a bit. But once you get in, it's all set. Arrange hair dryers, skincare products and lipsticks in boxes . Get the place ready for the next event. Kitchen Somebody had cooked here. The kitchen is one of the craziest levels of this game, as the number of items to place is the highest. Plates, knives, jars, and other utensils are dancing in the air. Throw the banana peels and other waste into the bin. Load the dishwasher and arrange the drawers . After you complete your work, you get the right to not let anyone in the kitchen, even for a glass of water! Kids Room This one is our favorite; the kids' room has a variety of toys around. Cars, dolls, balls, legos and paints are everywhere. It's challenging trying not to step on a lego piece in this room. But they will appreciate your efforts! Controls Use your mouse or touchscreen to drag items. Developer Yiv Games created this game. You May Also Like If you like organizing games online , we have a great catalog. Wear your gloves and goggles to clean the dirtiest places virtually! Get ready for gameplay like A Little to the Left on OnlineGames.io for free!

title: Ninja Obby Parkour
description: Fast reflexes and balance are everything when you’re a ninja on the run! In Ninja Obby Parkour , your goal is simple: reach the finish line without falling from the floating platforms. But it won’t be easy: laser bars, rotating batons, and other tricky obstacles are waiting to knock you down. Play solo or with a friend, and see how far your skills can take you in this endless parkour challenge! Game Overview You are a ninja, racing across floating platforms suspended in the sky. In Ninja Obby Parkour , each track pushes your agility to the limit. Jump, dodge, and weave past spinning traps and laser beams, while making sure you don’t fall off the platforms. After each finish line, a new track awaits. The parkour never ends, and your journey only gets harder. Play alone to sharpen your focus, or team up in 2-player mode for a thrilling race to the finish. Game Features Parkour racing gameplay: Run, jump, and dodge across floating platforms. Challenging obstacles: Avoid laser bars, rotating batons, and more. Single or duet mode: Play solo or race with a friend on the same screen. Infinite progression: Every finish line leads to a new track with fresh challenges. Customizable avatars: Personalize your ninja with different looks and styles. How to Play Ninja Obbi Parcour? 1 Player Mode Left: A Right: D Backward: S Forward: W Jump: SPACE Double Jump: 2X SPACE 2 Player Mode Player 1: A / D / W / S + SPACE Player 2: ⬅️ / ➡️ / ⬆️ / ⬇️ + L Good to Know! Falling off a platform ends your run. If you have to jump further, try double jump. Watch the timing of rotating batons and laser beams before you move. The further you go, the harder the parkour becomes. FAQs Can I block or slow down the other runners? No, you can only run and try to reach the finish line. Do I have infinite lives? No, you only have 3 lives. After losing them, you’ll have to start over from the first track. Similar Games If you enjoy tricky parcour challenges and obstacle-filled races, more Obby games are waiting for you. Try Obby: Find 100 Cats , a fun exploration game where you search for hidden cats in creative maps.

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 3: Ice Temple
description: Fireboy and Watergirl series steam ahead with a new challenge. This time, these two cuties are stuck in an ice temple, making it even more challenging for both characters. Cooperate, solve puzzles and escape from rooms one by one. Fireboy and Watergirl 3: Ice Temple is the third game of the two-player puzzle platformer game series. There are two characters of opposite elements: fire and water. One's strength is making up for the other's weaknesses. Cooperation is the key! Grab your friend, choose your element, and start solving 36 new levels in Ice Temple together! Controls Desktops and Laptops WASD Keys: Move Watergirl Arrow Keys: Move Fireboy Mobile Devices Use the arrows on the touchscreen to move the heroes. Switch between elements by tapping on them. How to Play Fireboy and Watergirl? Control Fireboy with the arrow keys and move Watergirl with the AWD keys. The aim is to arrive at the gate together. In the rooms of Ice Temple, there are flames, lakes, and green goos, as in previous games. Fireboy cannot touch water, while Watergirl cannot touch flames. And both sink in green goos. Jump over the obstacles, use buttons and levers, wait for each other and arrive at the gate. If one of the elements dies, both must start over from that level. One for all, all for one! Explore the ice temple up and over and find the exit from this labyrinth! What's New in Ice Temple? Freezing Waters and Snow: Freezing water is the biggest new challenge in this game. Fireboy can slide on the snow. However, snow slows Watergirl. Additionally, neither can jump on the ice. To melt the ice into the water, use the red light buttons. To freeze the water into ice, use the blue light buttons. Switches: Elements use these special switches to open doors, build bridges and change the environment. In this third game, new types of switches are added to the gameplay: timed buttons. These work for a few seconds, and you need to hurry up before the button loses its function. Increasing Complexity: Ice Temple brings a new level of complexity to puzzles. The challenges add to the fun, sense of accomplishment and gaming skills. Developer Oslo Albet created Fireboy and Watergirl: Ice Temple. What is Next? If you haven't played the first game yet, you should definitely go for it: Fireboy and Watergirl . Pass the lakes, lavas, and lots of obstacles while solving escape puzzles. View the other Co-Op games online on OnlineGames.io. We offer many free online games and constantly try to expand our library.

title: Police Traffic
description: Police Traffic is an online 3D game to experience driving in heavy traffic while being a police officer. You can speed up but be careful of the other cars that might stop suddenly. Get ready to become a master of speedy overtakes and tight turns. Escape from dangerous situations and collect money on the road without crashing your car. Before starting the game, you need to choose the police car. Each car has a different power of speed, handling and brake. Game Modes There are 4 modes of Police Traffic: One-Way Mode: Enjoy a more relaxed one way road. Nothing is upcoming to you. Two-Way Mode: We added a little spice to One-Way and created Two-Way Mode for you to feel the adrenaline rush. Speed between cars going opposite directions. Earn combo and wrong-way points. Time Attack Mode: Try if you can survive through the road until the time is up. Speed bomb: Time to be a bus driver. A bomb is activated and will explode if you slow down. You can crash over smaller vehicles at the cost of bomb health. But, better to stay away from trucks and buses. Any crash with bigger vehicles will slow you down. Bomb health rapidly drops in that case. Better to be vigilant about your speed, distance, score and warnings that will be displayed on your screen while driving your police car. How to Play Police Cars? Choose your car and game mode and start gliding on the road. Controls are similar to other driving games in our collection. WASD or arrow keys to drive Left Shift for NOS Space for handbrake Tab or Esc to toggle pause Which cars can I drive in Police Traffic? There are 8 police cars available: 2 cars are for free at the beginning and the rest you must buy. You can drive an armored jeep, a limo, a sports car or the other ones to your liking. Similar Games Did you like Police Traffic? Go on playing a similar game by browsing our Traffic Games .

title: Rome Simulator
description: How often do you think about the Roman Empire? The answer is every day for most men. It is interesting that such a historic figure lingers in our minds after centuries. While we leave this analysis to the experts, we're excited to present a great game for Roman Empire enthusiasts. Rome Simulator is a 3D action game where you are in the shoes of a gladiator in ancient Rome. You will find yourself in a mansion full of historic settings. Be careful while wandering the rooms, as you may encounter other guardians of the castle! They will attack you when they see you. Fight with them and continue roaming Rome in this simulator game!⚔️ How to Play Rome Simulator You will find yourself in a vast castle as a gladiator. You have nothing but your bare hands. Search the rooms to find a sword and shield to protect yourself from the guardians. When you face them, you need to save yourself from them by defending and attacking when necessary. Two unique maps belong to the castle. One of them is the interior of the map, while the other one is the exterior. Choose whichever you want to take place in and start battling with the guardians. Interior of the Castle It is a highly royal place. A wonderful place full of arches and statues awaits you to explore. You will walk on mosaic stone floors. It is impossible not to be captured by the magnificence of this mansion. Don’t forget to search for a weapon while touring the rooms with great excitement. The place is as dangerous as it is magnificent because gladiators protect it. Exterior of the Castle The exterior of the castle is also undoubtedly as spectacular as the interior. You will see many lined-up altars and gold-plated outer walls. This place may feel like an open-air museum. The things you come across in the mansion will give you great information about the ancient era. There are many protectors here. So, don’t lose focus while wandering around. Ancient Weapons You have the option to grab the Ironhand Sword, Katana, Viking Metal Shield, Viking Halberd, and Viking Sword. Pick up whichever you want by pressing the E key as a primary weapon. You can take a secondary weapon by using the R key. These weapons will help you a lot when dealing with the gladiators. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Left-Click: Attack Right-Click: Block Left Shift: Run Left-Click + Left Shift: Heavy attack X: Cancel trigger & cancel ledge / drop weapons C: Crouch Q: Jump Space: Dive roll 1-4 Number Keys: Switch weapons E: Take G: Draw / Sheathe weapon Tab: Pause Developer Rome Simulator was developed by FreezeNova. What is More? If you are a fan of Rome Simulator, you may also like Valkyrie RPG . You are embodying a Valkyrie character in the game. Choose the Knight or the Ranger according to their merits and set out for rural areas! For more game options, look up other online action games on OnlineGames.io. Keep coming back to discover new and thrilling games!

title: Survival Island
description: Imagine waking up on a sunny, deserted shore with the sound of waves gently rolling into pebbles on the beach. No buildings, no people, just sand, palm trees, and hidden secrets everywhere. Welcome to Survival Island , an exciting casual progression game where you gather, craft, explore, and survive. Play this browser-based free game right here on OnlineGames.io and see how resourceful you can be when left to your own devices. From chopping down swaying palm trees to building your own camp, every step moves you closer to mastering this tropical paradise. Controls Movement: Use the W, A, S, D keys, the arrow keys, or simply click and drag your mouse to move. Interact: Click the left mouse button when you’re near an interactive object. Survive on a Tropical Island You begin your adventure near a small crafting area in a tropical island. Walk around the immediate beach to find trees and rock deposits. Approach a palm tree to cut it and collect wood. Don't worry it'll grow back in a few secs. Craft Wood and Stone Move toward large stones to gather rocks. Your character automatically begins chopping or mining when you're near resources. Gather enough wood and stone, and a prompt will pop up to craft your first tool like scissors to clear out bushes in farming plots. This step is important because removing bushes grants berries that help you stay energized. Watch your resource numbers go up in the top or side panel. Build a Cooking Station After cleaning up bushes, you can craft a cooking area. From there, use your resources (berries, wild fruits, maybe some coconuts and fish later on) to make jam or other tasty treats. Eating well boosts your stamina, which you need for all that gathering! Build Shelters Once you have enough materials, build helpful structures like tents and storage boxes. A tent lets you upgrade your character’s speed, carry capacity, and gathering efficiency. Don’t ignore the first chance to build a tent. Upgrading your speed and carry capacity makes your survival progression way easier. Storage boxes help you keep track of your growing piles of resources. As you move farther inland, you’ll stumble upon other castaways who need rescuing. Free them, and they’ll help collect resources. Just make sure you have enough food in cooking station for everyone. Hungry helpers will just sleep all day without helping you. Unlock Bridges and Beyond Clear the bushes to expand your island. You never know what new materials or surprises you’ll find. If you see another island patch in the distance, craft bridges to reach new areas. Each new zone often hides advanced crafting materials or special items to boost your progress. Once you set up a trade booth or merchant station, you can sell extra items for coins. Use these coins to further upgrade your gear, build stronger facilities, or expand your territory. Developer This fun online game was crafted by FreezeNova, known for creating premium 3D games for browsers. Other Casual Games If you enjoy the laid-back gathering and building loop of Survival Island , you might also love other online craft-and-explore titles on OnlineGames.io. One great example is Paper Minecraft , which features a similar style of collecting resources, crafting tools, and venturing into unknown territories but with wild animals twist. Both games offer that “stranded adventurer” vibe, but each has its own unique spin on survival and progression. Land on the island, gather resources, rescue others, and transform a lonely beach into your dream tropical camp. Hit Play on OnlineGames.io and start exploring Survival Island!

title: Gangsters
description: A pixelated street fight begins! Gangsters is a two-player online game where two tiny gangs shuffle, leap, and blast each other with whatever falls from the sky. With only two buttons per player, it feels silly at first. But one round is all it takes to spark best-friend rivalries and endless rematches. Grab a crate, steady those shaky arms, and see who can fill the scoreboard first. Controls Player 1 W – Jump / step forward E – Raise arms & shoot Player 2 I – Jump / step forward O – Raise arms & shoot How to Play Pick a mode on the title screen: P1 vs CPU for solo practice or P1 vs P2 to battle a friend on the same keyboard. Each side begins with three blocky fighters lined up shoulder-to-shoulder. Press the jump key once, and the whole trio hops together, tilting left or right depending on their balance. They slide a short distance every time, so gentle taps work better than holding the key. Hunt the Crates Hold the shoot key to lift every arm at the same time. Release to fire; bullets travel in the direction the arms point when you let go. Because the gang sways, time your release for straight shots. Wooden boxes drift down on parachutes throughout each round. Touch a box to break it and auto-equip its surprise: pistols, machine guns, chainsaws, swords, or the crowd-favorite bazooka. Mind the Arena Early stages are flat city streets, but later maps add lava floors, rock piles, or tall water walls that block bullets. Falling into lava or water traps knocks a character out instantly, so jumping at the wrong moment can cost a round, even without gunfire. Win the match! When all three rivals drop, you score one point, and teams reset for the next skirmish. The scoreboard sits above each crew first to fill it (default is five points) and wins the match. One Player Mode In P1 vs CPU, hold jump without shooting to see how far your gang moves. Then, test arm-raising speed. Short taps send quick sprays; long holds can arc shots downward for tricky angles. Switch maps every couple of rounds for new hazards. Play best-of-three sets with different house rules: melee-only, no jumping, or first player to grab a bazooka wins. The whole loop jumps, grabs, shoots, and repeats takes seconds to learn but takes a long time to master. Because both gangs share the same two-button scheme, everyone plays on equal footing, and silliness stays high from the first crate drop to the final rocket splash. Developer Gangsters was created by Shared Dreams, the team behind several other two-player games hosted right here on OnlineGames.io .

title: Tap Tap Shots
description: T ap the screen, pals! Tap again! Send the balls to the basket and perform perfect shots! Tap Tap Shots is one button basketball game to play on your browser. Jump the ball by clicking on the screen. Adjust the right angle. Dunk the ball as many as possible in a limited amount of time. How to Play Tap Tap Shots? Tap on your screen to jump the ball. Dunk into the hoop by adjusting the speed and angle of the ball. If you miss it, the ball will return from the other side. If you score, a new net will be placed. Keep an eye on the timer at the top of the screen. Continue tapping and jumping the ball to make as many scores as possible until time runs out. Suppose you could not send the ball to the basket within time; start over and beat your own record. What happens if the ball drops? This is not a flappy bird. The ball can touch the ground. Continue tapping before the time is up. Do I need to tap on the ball? No, tap anywhere on the screen to jump the ball. Can I play Tap Tap Shots on mobile devices? Absolutely. Play Tap Tap Shots anywhere, including Android, iOS, Chromebook and PC. Controls Tap or click on the screen to jump the ball. Developer Tap Tap Shots was created by Qky Games. Explore Other Games If you like one player skill games like Tap Tap Shots, consider playing Flipping Gun Simulator . Fire the gun, flip it, and collect ammo and coins on your way to the top. Browse our Sports Games tag to find more titles like Tap Tap Shots. Tell us your thoughts about this game in the comment section below! Bookmark this website to come back for the newest free online games! Game Logo created by OnlineGames.io team

title: Rooftop Duel
description: Can you handle a rooftop shoot-out with gravity, ragdoll limbs, and a toybox of overpowered weapons? The recoil is wild here. Rooftop Duel piles all the goofy physics of classic ragdoll games. You'll try to knock off your opponent on a city rooftop. Press play and you hop straight into a duel; There are no downloads, no sign-ups; just jump, aim, and laugh as you and your opponent rocket each other off narrow city rooftops. Grab a friend or fly solo, hit Play, and see how long you can stay on the roof. Just don't blame the game when you're laughing too hard to aim straight! Let's get to the controls and game modes together: Controls Player 1 W / Right Mouse : Jump Hold E / Left Mouse : Aim Release E / Release Left-Mouse : Shoot Player 2 I : Jump Hold O : Aim Release O : Shoot How to Play Rooftop Duel Once the round loads, both ragdoll fighters try to balance on a rooftop. Tap jump, hold to aim, then let go to shoot. Every shot packs recoil, so a blast can rescue you from the edge or fling you into mid-air. Floaty jumps give you a moment to dodge an incoming bullet, or if you mistime things, you'll sail straight into the abyss. If you stay up while your opponent falls, you win the round, collect coins, and head back to the shop for an even sillier weapon before the next rooftop showdown. Game Modes Rooftop Duel has three main game modes that offer different ways to play depending on whether you're playing alone or with a friend. 2 Player Mode: local multiplayer mode where two players share the same keyboard. Each player uses their own set of keys to jump and shoot. First player uses W and E while the second uses I and O keys. The round continues until one player knocks the other off the rooftop. You'll play 5 rounds to complete a match. This mode is only available on devices with a keyboard, so it is best played on a laptop or desktop. If you're using a mobile, try other modes instead. Missions Mode: a series of short levels, each with a specific objective. It's a good place to start if you want to get used to the controls, learn how different weapons behave, and see new rooftops each round. Survivor Mode: the goal is to stay alive for as long as possible. You'll face a continuous wave of enemies. The difficulty increases the longer you last. This mode requires a bit quicker reactions and good control compared to other modes. It's recommended to unlock more powerful weapons before playing, as basic gear can make it difficult to survive for long. Developer Rooftop Duel is cooked up by FreezeNova, the studio behind a stack of popular unblocked ragdoll games like Soccer Random Pro . More Gun Games Online If you're hooked on floppy firefights, try Total Recoil next. In this game, you're a soldier fighting off waves of angry robots in a factory. Each time you shoot, recoil makes you bounce in the opposite direction. Survive 30 challenging levels, dodge falling rockets, and collect coins to unlock new characters. All gun games on OnlineGames.io are free and playable right in your browser perfect for quick, commitment free sessions. Give it a try if you're up for another chaotic shooter!

title: Penalty King
description: Penalty King is an online soccer game in which you take penalties and catch the ball to prevent your opponent from scoring a goal in turn! You play as both a penalty taker and a goalkeeper. Save all penalties the opponent takes, and shoot the ball into the goal to score. Win the shootout, defeat all other football teams and get the World Cup! ⚽ Controls Swipe the Mouse: Take Penalties Move the Mouse: Save the Ball On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls to take penalties and save the ball. Penalty King Overview Ready to take your place on the soccer pitch? Start by choosing a country for your team. There are the flags of 28 countries at your disposal. You will take to the field wearing the jersey of the team you have chosen. Your main goal in this football game is to score penalties and save the shots of your opponents as a goalkeeper. You will take turns with your opponent to both take penalties and try to prevent each other from scoring. There are 10 turns in total: five turns to take penalties and five turns to save the ball as a goalkeeper. The one who scores the most wins the match! Take Penalties 👟 To take the best penalties, find a good angle and kick the ball with intensity. You can try to confuse your opponent's mind to score a goal. If you are able to successfully score each penalty you take, you get closer to the World Cup step by step. However, keep in mind that your opponent is a good goalkeeper, and he can make solid saves. Save the Ball 🧤 When it is your opponent’s turn to take penalties, you need to save the ball before entering the goal. Observe your opponent's movements and try to predict where the ball may go to easily catch the penalty kickout. Move the gloves in the direction of the ball to save it. Prevent the opposite team from scoring by saving all their shots perfectly! Tips & Tricks for Penalty King 🦶 Shoot fast. Slow shots are easy snacks for the keeper. 🤡 Trick the keeper. Make him jump the wrong way and regret life. 👀 Watch the shooter carefully. His body tells the truth. 💔 Every save hurts the opponent’s feelings. Enjoy it. 🏆 Win matches. Collect victories. Take the World Cup home. Developer Penalty King is developed by FreezeNova. You May Also Like If you enjoy engaging in penalty challenge, you may also try playing Penalty Shootout ! The goalkeeper and the defenders are waiting for your penalty shootout. Make the ball leave them behind and enter the goal. For more game options, feel free to check out our free online soccer games by following the link.

Unlock new costumes and collect various fireballs to add an extra layer of excitement! 🔥 Controls Left Mouse Button: Shoot a Fireball Legend of Fireball Overview Your character has a special ability that he himself has just discovered. He can create fireballs with his hands! To master his fireball skills, he needs to practice with objects like mugs and table clocks. With each successful shot, you will earn coins to upgrade his skills. You can also unlock new outfits and collect diverse fireballs for him. Help him become a Legend of Fireball in this fun clicker game! Upgrade Fireball Skills 😃 Use your earned coins to upgrade your hero’s Fireball Power, Super Fireball Power, Super Fireball Probability, Stamina and Stamina Power. This way, you can create much more powerful fireballs to destroy the objects. In particular, you will not get tired easily by strengthening your character’s stamina. Also, you will earn more coins as you upgrade more! Open Random Boxes 🧙‍♀️ By fulfilling the tasks that you can see in the Achievements section, you can get diamonds as rewards. The best way to use these diamonds is to open random boxes. There are three different random boxes: Fireball Box, Costume Box and Relic Box. Each box you open will let you get new costumes and different kinds of fireballs to explore. Relic Boxes contain outfits that strengthen stamina. Developer TapNation developed the Legend of Fireball. title: Fort Drifter
description: Fort Drifter is a drift game where you can steer crazy cars on a platform full of jumping ramps, highway roads in different shapes, and castles. You will love the game's impressive graphics, reminding you of the Fortnite Drift. The game allows you to build tracks on the platform as you wish. It means that you can create your ramps and roads and drive on them in this splendid car game ! How to Play Fort Drifter The game challenges you to be the best Fortnite nitro drifter! You feel like driving a car on the red sands of the planet Mars. The game map contains the craziest roads and tracks you will ever see. Try each track and get the highest point by drifting and jumping with your vehicle. The game also allows you to craft your own tracks on the map. Ignite your vehicle's engine and dive into the drifters' adventure. Crazy Vehicles of Fort Drifter There are 10 mighty vehicles at your service. Each car has magnificent designs. You can access various styles of sports cars, monster trucks, and even trailer trucks. Press the E key to change your vehicle; using the left and the right arrows will make you switch between vehicles. You don't need to unlock them, and they are all accessible. Building Tracks The best part of this game is it enables you to create your own path. You will see track icons in the lower right corner of the screen. You can build your platforms by using these tracks in different shapes. Create a long route for yourself by joining these tracks together. Press the Q key to open the tracks section, and by using the WASD keys, you can select your preferred track. Press the Space key to build. Drive through Green Halos The green halos help you to get teleported. These halos send you to another part of the map. As it is a vast land, it will be a surprise where you show up. Drive your car, jump from the high places and make acrobatic movements. But also, do not skip trying these halos. They will be enjoyable. Controls To steer your vehicle, use the WASD or the Arrow keys. Press the Space key to use the booster. Press the Q key to create your tracks. Use the E key to change your car. To pause or go to the menu, press the ESC key. What is More? Try Drift Rider if you like playing Fort Drifter. You can customize your vehicle and then hit the road and start drifting on among 5 racetracks in the game. You may drive on a highway or in the streets of a city. Take control of your vehicle and test your driving skills! Or, you may look for other drift games on OnlineGames.io for more gaming options. title: Craftmine
description: How many nights can you endure in the wild? Craftmine is a 2D adventure game where you will find yourself in the wilderness. As you move forward in the wild, you will encounter many pigs, oxes, bears and snakes. Evade their attacks. Otherwise, you will lose one of your lives. You must avoid danger in this Minecraft game to survive as long as possible! How to Play Craftmine When you enter the game, you will find yourself in a Mario-like environment. Move through the wild nature and collect the things you need. You must take care of your avatar. Keep checking the temperature, health, thirst and hunger bars. Your avatar will gradually become thirsty and hungry over time. Collect the apples you see on the map by clicking on them. When the hunger bar drops, eat apples to get energy. In the meantime, you must avoid engaging with any of the animals. Because they will attack you when they see you. Stay away from them until you craft a weapon. Without a weapon, you are defenseless. View your crafting options by opening the Crafting Guide in the upper right corner of the screen. Craft Swords to Face Animals To survive in nature, you must acquire the necessary items. Go to the trees and collect wood. In the beginning, this wood will enable you to craft a Wood Sword and a Wood Pickaxe. You must get at least the Wood Sword to fight with the animals since you can't destroy them with your bare hands. This way, you can get their skin and flesh. Watch Out for the Zombies When the night comes, the environment will get more dangerous. The air temperature will drop. And zombies will start to appear. If you come into contact with zombies, they will hurt you. If you have any swords, you can hunt them. But if not, avoid them until you craft one. Collect Stones, Gold and Diamonds Pick up the mines you see on the ground. You will see stones, gold and diamonds. Mine and bring them to the surface. To craft more durable swords and pickaxes, you will need them. While wooden tools allow you to cause minimal damage, diamond ones can cause substantial harm. To create supreme damage, you will have to craft the Magma Sword. Controls Desktops and Computers A and D: Move W: Jump Left-Click: To dig and interact Mobile Devices Use the touchscreen buttons to move. Tap on the screen to mine and interact. Developer DAB3Games developed Craftmine. More Games Like This If you enjoy crafting, you may also try Paper Minecraft . In the survival game, you must craft tools to survive in raw nature. You must hunt and get yourself fresh meat! Look up other free crafting games on OnlineGames.io to view other game options. title: Summer Aesthetics
description: You'll find yourself in a group chat with 5 spirited girls in Summer Aesthetics. Each is having her best time with sun-kissed vibes of summer in different ways in various parts of the globe. One of your friends is celebrating the Olive Festival in Italy, while another is enjoying the tropical paradise of Bali. A third friend is having summer school adventures in London, UK, and the fourth is exploring the stunning bays and ancient wonders of Greece. Lastly, the fifth friend is enjoying the simple pleasures of rural life at Grandma's farm. As the chat lights up with each selfie, you'll be inspired to create a summer aesthetic that reflects their unique journeys. Capture the warmth of the season with gorgeous hairstyles and accessories. Get ready to create your ensemble and share your selfies with the group! Summer Aesthetics is an online dress-up game in which you prepare five girls to capture the best photos of them. Start playing it for free on OnlineGames.io now! Controls Left click or tap to pick items How to Play Summer Aesthetics? You'll prepare the girls one by one. Find the perfect outfit, hairstyle, and accessories to fit both the style and aesthetics of the place they've been in this summer. Start with Greece, and go on with Bali, London, Farm Life and Italy aesthetics. Each girl brings a fresh breath to the game with their physical appearance, wide wardrobe, and diverse backgrounds they're in. The most trendy tops, sundresses, glasses and bags await you. Dive into the aesthetics now, and you'll always be energized this summer! Developer Prinxy created this game. title: Papa's Pastaria
description: Papa's Pastaria takes you behind the counter of Papa Louie's pasta restaurant. As the head cook, waiter and the only employee of this restaurant, you're in charge of everything: Taking Customer Orders? That's you! Preparing and Cooking Pasta? All on you! Making the Sauces and Delivering Dishes? Yep, you handle it! Processing Payments? It's up to you! Upgrading the Restaurant with New Menus, Furniture, and Decorations? You've got it covered! The game's objective is to manage your time effectively while ensuring that each dish meets your customers' expectations. You'll need to cook pasta, add the right sauces, and include various toppings to create delicious meals. Each day at Pastaria brings new challenges, including different pasta types, complex orders, and increased customer expectations. Success is measured by your ability to keep up with orders and maintain high customer satisfaction, which in turn boosts your tips and helps grow your business. Controls Computers & Mobiles Click or tap to select items Drag and release to move items How to Play Papa's Pastaria Begin by taking customer orders. Start with classic pasta types like Macaroni and Spaghetti. As you progress, you'll have the opportunity to cook other options such as Gnocchi, Ravioli, Fettuccine, Bowtie, Penne, and Radiatori. Cook the pasta according to the type specified in the order: al-dente or regular? Different pasta types have unique cooking times, so make sure to get it right for each dish. Once the pasta is cooked, move it to the Build Station to add the requested sauces and toppings. Alfredo, marinara or Bolognese? Customize each dish based on the customer's preferences. Drag and release to pour the sauces. Prepare and serve complementary bread items to complete the meal. This adds an extra touch that helps keep your customers happy. Garlic sticks, focaccia, and many more to explore in this station. Handle multiple orders by balancing preparation times and moving between stations all the time. Keep customers satisfied to earn better tips. Achieve bonuses for perfect orders, high customer satisfaction, and efficient service. Unlock new recipes and features as you reach milestones. Upgrades Invest in kitchen upgrades, lobby decorations and many more to improve the efficiency, speed and waiting time of customers. Enhancements help you handle orders more effectively. Unlock new pasta types, ingredients, recipes, and restaurant decorations as you progress. Developer Flipline Studios created Papa's Pastaria. More Cooking Games You can play other Papa's games like Papa's Scooperia and Papa's Bakeria . Discover your options in restaurant games online . Enjoy fast-paced cooking games featuring a variety of dishes and time-management challenges.

title: Void City io

By absorbing cars, buildings, humans and even other black holes that are smaller than you. Keep in mind that you must gain a good score in a certain amount of time. title: Beat The Zombies
description: Beat the Zombies is an online adventure game where you defend your land against plant zombies. Attack the zombies with your blades, unlock new weapons to hit the zombies stronger by opening chests, and defeat them no matter what! Otherwise, these merciless creatures may eat you up and make you restart the level. Controls Left Mouse Button: Move the Hero On Mobile Devices: Swipe left or right to move the hero. Beat The Zombies Overview In Beat The Zombies, your main goal is to fight against plant zombies in each stage. You need to constantly shoot them up so that you can easily lower the zombie's health bar to zero. As you hit the special treasures among the creatures, you will get the chance to unlock new weapons or upgrade your current weapons’ attack power. Keep in mind that to complete a level successfully, you must wipe all the zombies from your land! Shoot the Plant Zombies When you enter a battle with plant zombies, you will see them as a long snake with numbers on them. Take these numbers as their health bar. You need to shoot them until the numbers drop to zero. You must constantly shoot them until all the plant zombies are defeated! Additionally, don’t let them get close to you. Once they reach you, it means you need to restart that level. Hit the Treasures Among the plant zombies, you will see treasures. These treasures also have numbers on them. Hit them until they unlock, and you will see three options displayed on the screen. Pick the upgrade that you want to get to attack the plant zombies more strongly. The treasures allow you to have advanced weapons or upgrade the current ones so that you can defeat the zombies effectively. Tips & Tricks for Beat The Zombies ⚔️ Keep shooting zombies to reduce health. 🧟 Avoid zombies getting too close. 🔥 Unlock weapons by hitting treasure chests. 🔫 Upgrade attacks to defeat zombies faster. 🧹 Clear all zombies to complete levels. Developer Guangzhou Yomitoo is the developer of Beat The Zombies. Looking for More? Did you like playing Beat The Zombies ? Guns vs Magic is another game that suits your tastes well! title: Obby: Parkour Lava
description: Obby: Parkour Lava is an online fun platformer game. The main goal is to guide your avatar through the obby parkour. The platform is slowly sinking as the lava is rising. So you'd better hurry up and reach the upper parts of the parkour before it's too late! Jump, climb and beat the heat in Obby Parkour Lava! Whether you're a fan of Roblox or just love parkour games, Obby: Parkour Lava will keep you hooked from start to finish! What Are Roblox Games? Roblox games are player-created experiences within the Roblox platform, offering a wide range of genres such as parkour, racing, simulations, and adventure. These games often encourage creativity and social interaction, allowing players to explore, build, and customize their worlds. Similar to Roblox's "Floor is Lava" mode, Obby: Parkour Lava brings the same energetic and fast-paced challenges right to your fingertips. If you enjoy Roblox, you'll find this game a familiar and fun experience. Controls On Computers: Move: WASD Jump: Spacebar Camera: Mouse movement Pause: Esc On Mobile Devices: Use the on-screen joystick to move your character. Swipe on the screen to adjust the camera for better navigation. How to Play Obby: Parkour Lava Run, jump and climb with precision to reach the checkpoints because lava is rising. If you fall into the lava, you need to start from the last checkpoint. Use WASD to move and spacebar to jump. Your goal is to collect coins scattered across the platforms. You can use your earnings to unlock skins in the shop and show off your style. A few of the available skins are Robbie, Stickman, Doge and Rainbow Friend. Features of Obby: Parkour Lava Parkour Challenges: Jump, climb, and race your way to the top before the lava consumes everything. Massive Map: Explore a sprawling map filled with tricky platforms and hidden coins. Roblox-Inspired Design: Fans of Roblox will appreciate the familiar aesthetic and gameplay elements. Developer Makhonin created Obby Parkour Lava. More Free Games If Obby: Parkour Lava is your jam, you'll love exploring other exciting parkour games like Only Up Obby . Dive into the world of blocky guys and the creativity that online Roblox games bring to your screen!

title: Dragon City
description: Dragon City is the game where you must protect your city from enemies. They will try to put you down by shooting but you are more powerful than them because you are shooting balls of fire. The dragon can also have other attack skills like fire breath and melee sweep. It can destroy the cars too. Test your power and fly with your dragon and dominate the city. There are 6 dragons you can choose from: • Volzid TheRedeemer • Irsho Eater of all (available to buy with 10000) • Osgu The Fierce (available to buy with 10000) • Taskath The Chosen (available at level 10) • Izorlu The Dark (available at level 20) • Askae The Insane (available at level 30) Dragon City Profile details: • Level • Xp • Kills • Money • Buy Gift Dont forget to collect the daily gift reward ! Dragon City Display : • Kill feed (displayed on the top left) • Controls (displayed on the left & right bottom ) • City Map (displayed on the top right) Controls: WASD or arrow keys to move the dragon Space to fly up Left shift to sprint Q to jump C to crouch R to dodge Shift + left mouse click for fire breath Left mouse click for fireball Right mouse click for melee attack Esc, tab for pause menu

title: We Become What We Behold
description: We Become What Behold is a point-and-click game with a strong message. As a player, you step into the shoes of a news reporter tasked with observing the lives of the people of a town. Inhabitants of the town are circles, squares , and even crickets. All are busy with their own lives, walking around the city square. Some are angry while some are loving. Your job is to catch interesting scenes and broadcast news on a jumbotron. But here is the twist: the people of this town do not appreciate peaceful news at all. So, capture minor misunderstandings , amplify them, and see how people react accordingly. We Become What Behold offers 5 minutes of playing time. However, what the game emphasizes is enormous. In We Become What Behold, you will experience a psychological phenomenon known as " negativity bias ". This concept was first proposed by two psychologists in 1982. They suggested that humans are more influenced by negative news revoking conflict, violence, and fear . We can say that this bias is deeply transfused in human cognition. The game's developer, Nicky Case, has masterfully incorporated this notion into the gameplay, allowing players to witness its effects firsthand in a tragicomic way. Controls Hover your mouse to move the camera Left click to capture How to Play We Become What Behold The scene is yours. Go and capture silly scenes of conflicts, exaggerate the news, and guide people to a craze. With a left click, take pictures of unusual events. Find the unhappy individuals walking around and observe them closely. When they take action (this might be yelling at someone or something bigger), picture them. Each piece of news will negatively influence and offend people. Soon they'll split into groups, increasing the conflict more and more. Repeat this vicious circle until the violence starts and see how the media corrupts and disrupts the peace in society. Despite all the negativity bias, WBWWB offers funny and entertaining gameplay. Developer Nicky Case created this game. Editor's Note What I love most about the game is how the developer, Nicky Case, kept the gameplay and visuals simple so as not to overshadow the game's thought-provoking concept. This is why he features people as small stickmen with circle and square heads. Despite the simplicity, the artworks and sounds of WBWWB are well-crafted. In conclusion, I think We Become What We Behold is a kind of game that many game designers might admire for its authenticity and regret not having thought of themselves. More Games Like This If you'd like to play games with a strong message behind them, we recommend playing Spend Elon Musk Money . It is a game that highlights the wealth of the world's top 0.001%. You get to be the multibillionaire Elon Musk and try to consume all the money in a virtual market. All are available on that single webpage, from a slice of pizza to mansions, yachts, and ultra-expensive artwork.

title: Elite Racing
description: Elite Racing is a 3D racing game where you can engage in races of many kinds against AI competitors. There are many race tracks, vehicle options and game modes to enjoy. All you need to do is select your car, choose your favorite track, and decide on your game mod. Then you can set off in one of the most exciting car games! How to Play Elite Racing In this racing game, you will create your gaming experience by your choices. Start by determining the race type and track in which you will participate. There are four amazing tracks, each with unique turning points and scenes. After the track selection, it's time to determine the game mode. The Circuit, LapKnockout, SpeedTrap, Elimination and Drift modes call you to experience each of them. You have the option to set the number of the laps and AI racers besides the difficulty level. If you've made all the settings, it's time to hit the track! Vehicle Selection: Inferno or Enigma? There are 13 sports cars in the car game. Each comes with unique features and names. Their top speed, acceleration, handling and braking powers are variable. The Lotus Sport, Vulture and Cobra are accessible in the beginning. But the remaining vehicles are waiting for you to unlock them. Be the winner of the races and get CRs to buy new cars. Our favorite? The Enigma is our most beloved car among the options, as we love not only its power but also its design. Track Selection: Five Game Modes The game offers you different racing experiences with its five unique game modes. Each comes with distinctive requirements. For example, you must break the highest drifting record among the other AI racers to be the winner of the Drift mode. On the other hand, the SpeedTrap mode requires you to pass the speed point at top speed. We will give you the names of the game modes below. Circuit LapKnockout SpeedTrap Elimination Drift Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Left-Shift: Nitro Spacebar: Brake Tab/ESC: Pause Q/E/C/V Keys: Change Camera View Developer Elite Racing was developed by FreezeNova. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing Elite Racing, you may also like Drift Fury . Your passion for speed reaches its peak in this driving game.
