title: 3D Dash
description: A spinning world, a shifting track, and one fragile cube! In 3D Dash , you need to race through the course without breaking. Every jump, every move, and every turn counts as the track rotates with a 3D perspective, revealing just enough of the path ahead to test your reflexes. Game Overview The challenge never ends in 3D Dash ! You’re a cube racing across dangerous tracks filled with sharp edges and deadly gaps. The camera shifts and the track rotates, giving you a 3D perspective that constantly changes what you see. You’ll need to survive each course and make it to the end in one piece. Are you up for the challenge or will you get dizzy? Game Features 3D rotating perspective: A unique twist on classic Geometry Dash-style gameplay. Challenging levels: Avoid gaps, sharp corners, and deadly falls. Progressive difficulty: Tracks get faster and more complex the further you go. Immersive visuals: Dynamic camera angles reveal the path as you play. How to Play 3D Dash? Jump: PC: SPACE / Click Mobile: Tap Time your jumps perfectly to avoid gaps, spikes, and falling off the track. FAQs Is 3D Dash endless or level-based? It’s level-based. You must complete a track to unlock the next one. Can I customize the cube? Yes, you can unlock different cube skins and effects as you advance. Similar Games If you’re a fan of 3D Dash ’s adrenaline rush, our Clicker Library is waiting for you. And if you need a break, dive into Idle Coffee Business . Instead of racing forward, you’ll be brewing coffee, serving customers, and expanding your shop.

title: Deer Hunter
description: Deer Hunter is a 2D shooting game where you play as a skilled deer huntsman. Using your sniper skills, you must shoot all the deer on the grass field. You must aim well and make precise shootings as you have a few ammo. As you level up, the number of deer will increase. So, use your bullets best and enjoy deer hunting to the fullest! 🦌 How to Play Deer Hunter You will see happy deer grazing on the grass in the forest area. You will be waiting with your sniper at a distance. When you find the appropriate moment, do not miss the chance to shoot them. If you miss shooting them in the first place, it will be more challenging to try to shoot them again. The sound of the sniper will make the animals uncomfortable, and they will start to run. Try to shoot them using just one bullet for each animal! You can view how many deer you must shoot from the sight icon in the upper section of the screen. Look for your bullet’s number from the bullet icon near the sight. Hunting the Deer The number of animals you must hunt will increase in the following levels. Precise aiming is the essential key here. In order to level up, you need to eliminate all the animals on the grass with your limited bullets. It is not an option to waste them. The other challenge is when you shoot a deer, the others will start to flee away because of the sound. Don’t let their movements impact your shootings! The Nature Photographers You will see photographers in the later levels. They will be there to take pictures of the animals and nature itself. You should not shoot them while trying to hunt the deer. Especially when they are fluttering around, they can pass behind photographers. Otherwise, you will lose the game. The Bombs on the Field After level 11, bombs will be placed in the green area. You can use these bombs to your benefit. When the deer are concentrated on a spot near a bomb, exploding it will help you to hunt them in just one move. Controls Right click to aim Left click to shoot Discover Other Games If you enjoy playing Deer Hunter, you may also try Sniper Elite . Your main mission in the game is to take down all the enemies. title: 2 Player Crazy Racer
description: Drive on the Streets of Long Island in the 60's Fancy of retro cars and surroundings? Want to take a ride with a classic car? Try 2 Player Crazy Racer , a fantastic 3D racing game that you can play with your friend using a single keyboard. Be the winner of the race, gather the coins and unlock your dream vintage car. 2 Player Crazy Racer lets you step into the vibrant world of the 60s. The visuals are not appealing just to beginners but also to seasoned gamers! This game's great selection of cars might evoke your memories of iconic video games like L.A. Noire and Mafia: Definitive Edition. How to Play 2 Player Crazy Racer Start with choosing the game mode. You have single-player and two-player options. Select between iconic classic cars from the garage. You can select the same car as your friend. You can distinguish your cars by their colors. 1st player takes the orange while the second gets the blue car. Pick a level and hit the start button. Use arrow keys and WASD to control your cars. Make use of boosts when you need to make stunts and jumps on this crazy road. To boost the speed, press left shift (1st player) or M key (2nd player). You can hit a tree, sign or fall down the road. And it doesn't have to be the end of the race for you. Just respawn by pressing the R or L key and continue where you left off. What Classic Cars Can I Drive in 2 Player Crazy Racer? Ford 1934 Model 40 V8 Cadillac Series 61 Tucker Torpedo 1948 Mercedes Benz 540 K Ford 1946 Coupe Ford 1932 Controls Player 1 Controls: WASD: Move Car Left-Shift: Speed Up R: Respawn Player 2 Controls: Arrow Keys: Move Car M: Speed Up L: Respawn Developer 2 Player Crazy Racer is developed by FreezeNova. title: School Bus
description: The school term has arrived. Everyone's eyes are on the school bus drivers. Your task is great. You will pick up students from their homes and drop them back home for a semester. School Bus is a 2D driving game with living graphics, which gives players an enjoyable gaming experience. Your driving abilities will be checked here. While taking the children to school, you must not get into any accidents or harm any of the children. If you are confident, start the engine. How to Play School Bus? The school term is starting. As a school bus driver, your job is to pick up students from their addresses and drop them off at school safely. While driving on the road, you should not hit any vehicle or obstacle. Otherwise, you will lose stars with each collision. And, of course, you should not knock over the children either! Otherwise, you will lose the game directly. Things will get more interesting as you pass each level. Just start your engine and hit the road. Students are waiting for you! Where to find the children waiting on the map? Following the yellow signs will lead you directly to the children waiting for you to pick them up. What happens if the school bus has an accident? Getting involved in minor accidents will cost you half a star point, while bigger accidents will remove the whole star. You have 3 stars for each level. It means that, you will not pass the level after 5 accidents. Features 20 challenging level Helps players develop driving and parking skills Controls Use the WASD keys or the arrow keys to steer the school bus Use the C key to change the camera view More Games Like This Try our other free driving game, Car Parking , if you like playing School Bus. title: StabFish io
description: Stabfish io is a fun multiplayer game where you swim as a little shark in the ocean, striving to stab more and more fish! Eat other fish with your weapon to earn points, rack up kills, and stay alive as long as possible. Unlock new tusks, fish families and gear up masks and hats in Stabfish io. Look unique in the ocean and intimidate your opponents with your style. Controls Computers Mouse: Move your fish Left Click: Speed boost Mobiles Swipe: Move your fish Hold two fingers: Speed boost How to Play StabFish.io Swim around the ocean, and use your weapon to stab other fish. Each kill adds points to your score and makes your melee grow longer. Stay alert, and avoid exposing fish's sides without the weapon. And use speed boosts to outmaneuver opponents. You can eliminate bigger fishes if you approach them behind or sides. You may encounter some random events, such as a dark arena for 30 seconds. Survive them to boost your score even more. Customize your fish with various bodies, weapons, masks, and hats to make your character stand out in the crowd and gain more powers. Gamie Suggests Kraken! Among all the great sea animals, one stands out with its extraordinary powers! Unlocking the Kraken is a fantastic boost in Stabfish.io! Its larger body size and extended weapon range make it easier to dominate the ocean. But, how to unlock Kraken? Here is the break-down: First, unlock Dumbo Octopus by achieving 4 kill streaks. Then perform 8 kill streaks while using Dumbo Octopus and unlock Octopus Lastly, make 20 kill streaks using Octopus . Ta Da! Go back to main menu and wear Kraken skin in the fish menu! Unlock New Fishes There are 15 sea animal families in StabFish io. 3 of them are unlocked by default. To acquire a certain animal, first, you need to unlock the family and complete certain quests to upgrade it. For example, you should eat 1500 pts of food to unlock whale family, then you can upgrade your whale to Blue Whale or Jo Mama. Lightning Rod: Master - The most powerful tusk in the game, delivering devastating lightning strikes that can strike down multiple enemies at once. Ideal for mastering the game and becoming a champ in Stabfish. Developer Stabfish.io is developed by Zytech AI. title: Escaping the Prison
description: Henry Stickmin: Escaping the Prison is a funny interactive free game where you help Henry Stickmin, a criminal stickman, escape from the West Mesa Prison. After breaking the bank by disguising it as a money bag and getting caught by security lasers in the bank's vault, Henry was sent to West Mesa Penitentiary. Now he's miserable, and since he was born a criminal, he's looking for ways to escape from this hell. It's up to you to guide him through his great escape, or watch him hilariously fail trying. This popular flash game is packed with funny moments, animations, surprising twists, and lots of replayability. Have fun escaping! Controls Mouse: Click to select choices and interact with items. How to Play Escaping the Prison Henry Stickmin has found himself stuck in jail, and things aren't looking good. Suddenly, police officers Dave Panpa and Rupert Price show up with a mysterious package. Rupert, confident and a bit mean, mocks Henry, saying there's no way the package can help him escape. Dave, the nervous officer, admits he might not have thoroughly checked the package, meaning Henry might have a chance after all! Inside the package is a cake. But not just any cake—this one has hidden tools inside! Your job is to: Click on an item inside the cake, like a nail file, teleporter, rocket launcher, or energy drink. Watch the funny cutscenes and outcomes. If your choice doesn't work out, no worries! Just click retry and try another way. Find multiple endings: escape quietly, break out loudly, or even get found not guilty in court! Try every option at least once, failing is part of the game! Remember your choices, so you don't repeat the same mistakes. Explore all endings for the full experience and unlock special moments. Features Multiple Endings: Try different ways to break out from prison, including sneaky escapes, bold breakouts, and legal twists. Funny Epic Fails: Even when Henry doesn't escape, the game's humorous animations make failing entertaining. One-Handed Play: Simple mouse-click controls make it perfect for players of all ages. Developer Henry Stickmin: Escaping the Prison was developed by PuffballsUnited, the creator of the popular Henry Stickmin game series. Henry Stickmin Games If you enjoy the fun choices and humorous outcomes in Henry Stickmin: Escaping the Prison, you'll love other games in the series like Stealing the Diamond and Fleeing the Complex.

title: Moto X3M Winter
description: Ride your bike on icy mountains this time! Moto X3M Winter is the 4th and the coldest game of the series. You'll take your bike to icy mountains , navigating through slippery roads, rocket boosters, and speedy saws chasing after you. With new obstacles and exciting features, this winter wonderland is anything but serene. We know playing the Moto X3M Spooky Land gave you chills, and we bet this one will leave you freezing. Controls Gas: W or Up Arrow Key Brake: S or Down Arrow Key Lift Front Wheel: A Lift Back Wheel: D How to Play Moto X3M Winter Start off with a wheelie and race to the finish line as fast as you can. Ride your bike through challenging obstacles with a snowy backdrop full of snowmen, festive trees, and the cheerful spirit of Christmas. Perform flips mid-air to trim half a second from your timer. Be careful to not to break the little rider's neck or explode the bike by crashing. The faster you complete the course, the more stars you earn. These stars are key to unlocking new levels and bikes, so aim for a high rating in each level. Challenge yourself to complete all 25 levels in under 15 minutes! How many levels are in Moto X3M 4: Winter? The game features 25 levels , each progressively more challenging with new obstacles to overcome. How do you go super fast in Moto X3M? Wheelies and boost charging ! Press the W, A, and D keys together to charge the boost and speed up simultaneously. How to flip faster in Moto X3M? Gain speed from a ramp and press the left or right arrow key while airborne to perform flips. For backflips, use A or the left arrow; for front flips, use D or the right arrow. Backflip when climbing up, and front flip when descending for better control. How do I perform wheelies in Moto X3M? Press A or the left arrow key to lift the bike’s front wheel—a move known as a wheelie. How do I make a boosted start in Moto X3M? To save time at checkpoints, press the gas and brake pedals (W and S keys) simultaneously for a speed boost before taking off. Developer Moto X3M 4: Winter was developed by MadPuffers , the creators behind the entire Moto X3M series. More Games Like This If you enjoy dirt biking games , check out the rest of the Moto X3M series at OnlineGames.io. Originally, there are 6 games of the MotoX3M series however, Moto X3M 2 and Moto X3M 3 games are no longer available in any platform. Each one of the remaining 4 games, embraces a different festive aesthetics such as summer pool party, Halloween and Christmas . Pick your season and start playing now! Moto X3M Moto X3M 5: Pool Party Moto X3M 6: Spooky Land

title: Soccer Random Pro
description: Let's kick off some fun. I want you to picture this: you're playing Soccer Random Pro on OnlineGames.io with your best buddy glued to your laptop, bursting into laughter every few seconds. This game is wild. You control your player with the 'W' key, making exaggerated jumping motions as if you could help his on-screen player jump higher. And your BFF, hitting the Up Arrow, shouts every time her player flips instead of kicking the ball. Watch this! your buddy yells, and his player does a wild backflip and accidentally scores an own goal. The soccer ball behaves more like a pinball here. Fast. Unpredictable. Barely controllable. You burst out laughing, pointing at the screen. "You scored for me! Best own goal ever!" Every goal, no matter who scores, brings a new round of laughter and playful teasing, making a simple game of soccer unexpectedly funny. Yes, Soccer Random Pro turns a soccer game on its head by swapping out typical gameplay for crazy moments. Here, it’s not just about scoring goals but how oddly you can score them. With a single button, you control players who flip, flop, and fling themselves around the soccer field. The soccer ball? It seems to have a mind of its own, bouncing and rolling in unexpected ways. Play this free game now on OnlineGames.io! Soccer Random Pro is just one of the many wacky sports games you can find in our free soccer games collection. Each game, from Football King to A Small World Cup , mixes simple controls with wild physics to make every game unpredictable and funny. Controls Computer Player 1: Press 'W' to make your player jump and kick. Player 2: Use the Up Arrow to jump and kick. Mobile Player 1: Swipe on the left side of the screen. Player 2: Swipe on the ride side of the screen. How to Play Soccer Random Pro Play by yourself against the computer or against a friend. Player 1 uses 'W' and player 2 hits the Up Arrow. Try to get the ball into the other team’s goalpost. The first player or team to score 5 goals wins. If you accidentally score an own goal (goal against yourself), just laugh it off and keep playing! Developer FreezeNova made Soccer Random Pro.

title: Cat Runner
description: A farmer is chasing you! What to do?! Only one solution: run, jump, and dash your way to freedom! In Cat Runner , you’re on the run, dodging obstacles, leaping over buses, and racing across trains to collect coins. Game Overview The chase never ends in Cat Runner ! You’re a cat on the run from a farmer, and your only hope is to stay ahead. The city is full of obstacles, from barriers to buses, but with quick reflexes, you can dodge, jump, and slide past them while collecting coins along the way. Coins let you customize your character with new disguises and upgrade your hoverboards for faster escapes. Whether you’re dashing through solo runs or mastering the board, the fun never stops! Game Features Endless runner gameplay: Similar to Subway Surfers, keep running as long as you can. Challenging obstacles: Dodge barriers, ride trains, and leap over buses. Customizable characters: Change your appearance with many disguises to avoid capture. Upgradeable boards: Travel faster and cooler with your own hoverboard. How to Play Cat Runner? Left: ⬅️ Right: ➡️ Jump: ⬆️ Slide: ⬇️ Equip / Use Board: SPACE Good to Know! Hitting an obstacle will slow you down … and the farmer will catch you! Collect coins to buy new disguises and boards. Using a board can save you from crashing once, so use it wisely. FAQs Is there a finish line? No, it’s an endless runner. You keep going until you hit an obstacle and get caught. Does the game get harder? Yes. The longer you run, the faster the game gets, and the more obstacles you’ll face. Similar Games Love endless runners? Try Bus Subway Runner for a similar city racing challenge, or check out Tunnel Road , where this time you’re running inside a tunnel filled with obstacles!

title: GunSpin
description: Howdy, amigo! Ready to spin some guns? Fire and ricochet guns in the air to reach as far as possible. Use power-ups, unlock pristine weapons, and explore new lands! GunSpin is a casual HTML5 game where you use the bouncing power of a gun to reach new heights! Whether on your mobile or computer, you'll get addicted to this game! Controls Computers Fire: Left click Mobiles Fire: Tap on screen How to Play GunSpin Start with a simple gun and 3 bullets in your ammo. Choose the right direction to use recoil momentum to get as far as possible before running out of ammo! The farther you reach, the more coins you'll earn. Use your coins to buy power-ups for your next play. Power-Ups Bullet Count: Increase your ammo with an extra bullet. Bullet Power: Increase recoil power by 5%. 1st Shot Power: The first shot matters a lot; increase the shot power by 5%. Ammo Boxes: Adds ammo boxes in the level. If you touch them, the gun will go further. Armory Shop You can find different guns in the armory shop, each with unique power-ups. Basic Guns Basic Gun: No power-ups. Outlaw: +10% bullet power. Alien Gun: +15% bullet power. Water Gun: +15% bullet count. Zapper Gun: +15% 1st shot power. Special Guns Armstrong: +15% 1st shot power, +15% ammo boxes. Corsair: +15% 1st shot power, +15% bullet power. Uzi Gun: +15% ammo boxes, +15% bullet count. Halo Gun: +15% ammo boxes, +15% bullet power. Bolt Gun: +15% bullet count, +15% bullet power. Rare Guns Soaker: +15% bullet count, +15% 1st shot power. Warlord: +15% bullet count, +15% bullet power, +15% 1st shot power. MIB Gun: +15% bullet power, +15% 1st shot power, +15% ammo boxes. Epic Guns Hell Gun: +15% bullet power, +15% 1st shot power, +15% ammo boxes, +15% bullet count. Shotgun: +15% bullet power, +15% 1st shot power, +15% ammo boxes, +15% bullet count. Solo Gun: +15% bullet power, +15% 1st shot power, +15% ammo boxes, +15% bullet count. Legendary Guns Gears Gun: +15% bullet power, +15% 1st shot power, +15% ammo boxes, +15% bullet count. Rainbow Gun: +15% bullet power, +15% 1st shot power, +15% ammo boxes, +15% bullet count. Developer Minijuegos developed GunSpin. More Games Like This If you count on your accuracy and precision skills, you might enjoy testing them in other challenging games. How about trying your hand at some exciting archery games online ? These games will test your aim and timing as you draw back your bow and release arrows to targets. Alternatively, if you prefer something a bit different, you could enjoy a game of darts. Dart games offer a fun and competitive way to practice your precision. Aim for the highest scores as you throw darts at the board.

title: Basketball Stars 2026
description: Basketball Stars 2026 is a web-based basketball game where you choose your favorite basketball team and step onto the basketball court. Join a tournament and help your beloved team win the final match. Perform perfect dunks and 3-point shots to outperform the opponent. Duel with a friend or play side-by-side in the 2 Players mode! 🏀 Controls 1 Player Mode WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Hold Down the W or Upper Arrow: Dunk Z Key: Supershot X Key: Steal the Ball S Key: Pump/Block Double A-D/Left-Right Arrow: Dash 2 Players Mode Player 1 WASD Keys: Move B Key: Steal the Ball V Key: Supershot S Key: Pump/Block Double A/D: Dash Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move L Key: Steal the Ball K Key: Supershot Down Arrow: Pump/Block Double Left/Right Arrow: Dash How to Play Basketball Stars 2026 Welcome to the 2026 version of Basketball Stars! Ready to challenge yourself on the basketball court? Grab the ball and enter the field. Perform successful dunks to the opponent’s hoop to score. You can use the supershot to make a hot special dunk once the bar at the top of the screen is fully loaded. Believe me, it never fails! Feel free to block your opponent and steal the ball from his hands by slapping him. In this basketball game, everything is possible. Join a Basketball Tournament ⛹ You can take part in challenging basketball tournaments. Firstly, choose your favorite team from the selection menu. You have the right to choose between the 1V1 and 2V2 options. Then, decide whether you want to play as a defender or attacker. Finalize customizing the tournament settings by selecting Normal or Hard for difficulty. After all is set up, you are ready to enter the basketball court! Enter a Random Match/Quick Match 🏆 If you are not willing to spare time adjusting settings, that’s okay! From the main menu, you can enter a quick match by clicking on the relevant button. The game automatically creates a match for you. Or, you can head to the random match if you are not in the mood for joining tournaments. 2 Players Match ⚔ 2 Player mode allows you to challenge yourself with a friend. Or, you can create a match where you can play with him/her side by side against the CPU. Before entering the court, both of you need to select a team with famous basketball players. Don’t forget to check out the controls of the 2 Players mode! 1 VS. 1 2 VS. 2 2 VS. CPU Developer Basketball Stars 2026 was published by MadPuffers. More Sports Games Looking for more? Basket Random also suits your tastes well! Navigate the swinging basketball players and score dunks to win each match. Additionally, you are always welcome to check out online sports games by following the link. There are dozens of free games at your disposal on onlinegames.io!

title: Ragdoll Fall
description: Ragdoll Fall is a 2D arcade game where the player tries to hit the ground with the ragdoll. The player's score rises in direct proportion to how many times the ragdoll hits the ground successfully. With every game, the players aim to break their own records; thus, the only person competing with them here is themselves. Try Ragdoll Fall and give in to the irresistible charm of falling with the added pleasure of sharp wheels! How to Play Ragdoll Fall Throw the ragdoll and start the game! Your main goal is to maneuver the ragdoll such that it hits the concrete platform. Don't let it sound easy to fool you. As you move forward, the spaces between the concrete pillars get wider, and you'll come across thin, unstable ones. A fall through the gaps will bring disaster and force you to restart. Sharp Wheels Along the path, there will be concrete surfaces with rotating wheels. Ragdoll will not be happy if it touches these wheels! The task is made more challenging by the occasional left and right movement of these wheels. Try to stay away from these as much as possible! Thin Columns While you may find wide columns throughout the platform, you will also encounter extremely narrow columns. When you come across these narrow columns, you must either hit the ragdoll to the column exactly in the middle or avoid those columns. If not, there's a chance the ragdoll will fall to the void, and you'll start over. FAQ On which devices can I play Ragdoll Fall? You can play Ragdoll Fall on your Android or IOS device, desktop, tablet or Chromebook. All you need to play this game for free on our site is a stable internet connection. Do I need to register on the site to play Ragdoll Fall? There is no need to register to play the game. Just enter our site by typing OnlineGames.io in your browser and start playing directly after searching for the game in the search area. Controls To earn the greatest score, click the mouse button to strike the ragdoll to the ground. Developer Ragdoll Fall was created by Qky Games. What is More? If you enjoy playing ragdoll games, you should give Stickman Ragdoll a try. In Stickman Ragdoll, you have to figure out the best poses and moves to perform in order to cause the ragdoll to leap. Use your creativity to find the perfect combination. Alternatively, browse through other carefully curated stickman games collection on OnlineGames.io. To ensure that you don't lose your gaming progress, please bookmark this page!

title: Red Stickman vs Monster School
description: Red Stickman vs Monster School is an online adventure game in which your main goal is to eliminate Minecraft mobs. Navigate your red stickman, clear the mobs and reach the purple portal at the end. Try to survive in this Minecraft-inspired world while fighting against the ugly creatures on the way! 👊 Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar or the E Key: Attack Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. Red Stickman vs Monster School Overview Help your red stickman survive the zombie apocalypse on 60 levels in this adventure game! Each level consists of sick creatures and mobs from Minecraft World. Eliminate all the deadly foes and reach the purple portal at the end. Avoid falling into the lava as you move forward. Jump over the wide gaps to cross without making contact with lava. Additionally, keep in mind that you need to fight a boss every four levels! Mobs from the Monster School 🧟‍♂️ The creatures that you need to fight against come from the Monster School. As you move forward to the purple portal, they will block you from getting there. Tarantulas, zombies, skeleton archers, and sick animals will cross your path. You must eliminate all of them in order to pass the portal successfully. From time to time, these creatures will reach enormous sizes. It will take longer to clear them from your way! Upgrade the Red Stickman 👑 As you eliminate mobs, they drop coins. Collect them to upgrade your red stickman’s health bar and attack power. Especially, fighting with the bosses requires advanced power. Additionally, as you make progress, you need to deal with more powerful mobs. Just when you think you have completely eliminated them, they can multiply! Developer Stickman vs Monster School Team developed the Red Stickman vs Monster School. Similar Games Did you like playing Red Stickman vs Monster School? You may also give Stick vs Monster School 2 a chance! This time, your stickman has a gun in his hands to fight with the mobs. For more options, feel free to check out our free online adventure games by following the link.

title: Funny Blade and Magic
description: Let's say, you’re a goblin hero, betrayed by your greedy uncle and kicked out of your rightful legacy. The godmother gifts you an axe and teaches you a little magic. What do you do? You’d start fighting your way back, goblin-style, right? Funny Blade and Magic is a first-person action game packed with fast-paced melee combat, crazy spells, and ridiculous enemies. One minute you’re swinging an axe, the next you’re freezing time and teleporting behind your enemies like a boss (or a goblin to be accurate). The graphics are goofy but cool, the action is nonstop, and the storyline? Totally wild, with cinematic cutscenes that actually make you care about your little green guy. Controls Move: WASD Run: Shift Jump: Spacebar Dash: WASD + C Attack: Left Click or Z Throw Axe: Right Click or R Use Ability: F Open Ability Menu: Tab Select Abilities: Keys 1–6 How to Play Funny Blade and Magic You start off as a betrayed goblin warrior an ex-king with nothing but your axe and a thirst for revenge. Explore wild levels filled with enemies, bosses, and magical energy. Eliminate all the enemies to complete levels. As you progress, collect weapons like swords, axes, and giant hammers. Then unlock awesome magical powers, think teleportation, time-slowing, and more. Your goal is to survive each fight, collect gear, and defeat unique bosses who all have their own tricks. Between battles, you’ll unlock story cutscenes that reveal the truth behind your betrayal. It’s like an action movie, but with goblins and goofy jokes. Developer Funny Blade and Magic was made by GoGoMan who loves combining action, humor, and fantasy into one chaotic ride. More Funny Action Games to Play Next Funny Blade and Magic hits that perfect mix of chaos, comedy, and cool powers. Whether you’re slicing enemies with a rusty sword or blasting them into another dimension, it’s always a good time. Perfect for quick sessions or longer binging, just don't blame us if you spend your whole lunch break trying to beat that next boss. If you liked Funny Blade and Magic, you’ll love our other funny games . For example, try Funny Shooter 2 next. There is no magic, but still funny! Crazy weapons and even crazier enemies await you there!

title: Immortal: Dark Slayer
description: Do you want to play a cool action RPG but don't want to spend thousands on gaming setups? It's totally fine! Now let us introduce you to Immortal: Dark Slayer , a free online RPG game where you fight, die, and rise again. You play as a fallen knight once mighty, now reborn. He's on a quest through cursed lands swarming with skeletons, beasts, and demons and creatures. Inspired by big games like Dark Souls and Elden Ring, but reimagined in a top-down style, this browser game brings deep fantasy vibes with easy controls. You don’t need to learn complicated combos in Immortal: Dark Slayer . Combat is automatic. Your role is to move wisely, dodge enemy strikes, pick your battles and make strategic upgrades. Every run helps you grow stronger. And every death sends you back home, where your real progress begins. Controls PC: Move: WASD or Arrow Keys Navigate menus: Mouse Mobile: Move with the virtual joystick (drag your finger anywhere on the screen) How to Play Immortal: Dark Slayer When you start a run, you’ll journey across narrow bridges, ruined villages, and other dark fantasy zones packed with enemies. Defeat them to collect coins and diamonds, which you’ll spend back at your base. When your health hits zero, you’re not gone for good. You’ll respawn in the circular home base, where a kind but mysterious old woman waits. Approach the old lady and spend gold and diamonds to upgrade: Health: Boost your max life. Damage: Increase how much pain you deal. Crit Damage: Unlockable with gems, boosts critical hits. Move Speed and Percent Health become available as you level up. Choose Your Skill Every few levels unlock new towns and perks. At Level 3, you’ll meet a robed priest who lets you choose a religion. This is a key turning point in your character’s journey. Each god offers a powerful passive skill: Dora, Goddess of Light: Gradual healing every 0.5 seconds. Vlac, God of Death: Regain 7% health when killing an enemy. Egoism: Boost all stats by 10%. (Costs 100 diamonds) As you climb the levels, you’ll also find stronger enemies and boss fights that truly test your upgrades. Expect to revisit earlier areas with your powered-up gear and turn former nightmares into loot piñatas. Choose Your Weapon You’ll come across various weapons as you progress like axes, hammers, twin blades, and more. Each one changes how your knight behaves in combat, making some better for fast dodges and others for heavy hits. Your gear matters especially when facing tougher enemy waves or elite bosses. If you want to check out your inventory, tap or click on the armor icon at the right of your screen. Here you can switch or upgrade your weapons, and armors. Other Online Dark Fantasy RPGs If you loved Immortal: Dark Slayer for dark and gritty vibes, you’ll enjoy Darkness Survivors too. It’s another action-RPG with indie pixel visuals, endless enemies, and a roguelike mechanic. Keep moving, shoot down hordes, and claim victory one room at a time. You don’t need a download, and you don’t need a powerful PC. Just jump into Immortal: Dark Slayer directly in your browser, right now on OnlineGames.io, and prove your will is stronger than death.

title: Solitaire Classic
description: Solitaire Classic is a single player card game where you try to remove all the cards on the table by sorting them according to the rules. There are many solitaire card games out there, but this one is customizable. The game has a basic gameplay that people of all ages can play. Master these basics and enjoy the game. How to Play Solitaire Classic This game aims to place all the cards on the table in the four foundations above. Before creating these four foundations, you must line up the cards below according to a particular rule. Later, when you complete the stacks, you can position these in the four foundations. Basics of Solitaire Classic The rule of the game is to create four stacks, starting with King and ending with Ace. You must create a stack of cards from different suits and colors. You can not put cards of the same color or the same suit under each other. The order of the cards must be one number lower than the number value of the card above. The order should be K, Q, J, 10, 9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2 and Ace. Only the top card in each column will be faced up. Others are faced down. Only these face-up cards can be moved. As long as they maintain the same order, the stacked cards can be moved to another column. You will see a deck in the upper right corner of the game. By clicking here, you can take a card to the playing field. If you have drawn a suitable card, drop it by dragging it directly to the relevant column. Customize the Theme You have many options to tailor your game the way you want. You can change the backdrop, card front and card back design by clicking on the Theme tab at the bottom of the game screen. There are gorgeous designs, especially for the card back. We recommend you take a look! Boosters That You Can Use There are two features that can help you in the game. If you tap the two-way arrow icon, the Card Shuffle, you will shuffle the hidden cards. Or, you can eliminate a hidden card by using the wand icon, the Magic Wand. These boosters are arranged one under the other at the bottom right of the screen. But remember that you have the right to use these advantages a few times. Hint and Undo Options If you want to get hints about what move you should make while playing the game, you can use the "Hint" option at the bottom of the screen. Likewise, you are free to use the "Undo" option to take back your move. Controls Click and drag cards to the desired column. Developer Solitaire Classic was created by Albayoo. What is More? You may try Klondike Solitaire if you are a fan of Solitaire games . The game involves using a conventional 52-card deck for single-player play. Plus, it's known for being the least successful game. It is even referred to as a game of patience in several locations. Look up the card games on OnlineGames.io for further options.

title: Gomu Goman
description: Gomu Goman is a humorous puzzle game where you try to solve problems by stretching your stickman’s body. He is like a chewing gum! Use this elasticity to your advantage to solve each challenging level. Levels require you to both laugh and think smart. Steal things without getting noticed, mess with other characters for fun and save the lovely chick from dangers! 🧩 Controls Hold down the mouse and drag to stretch your stickman. On smartphones and tablets, tap and drag. Gomu Goman Overview In each level, you need to find a way to reach a particular thing or solve a problem in this puzzle game! Most of the time, you will try to access an item without getting noticed or getting hurt. Simply tap and drag your character’s arm, leg, neck or any other part of his body to complete the tasks. Challenges are getting harder as you move to the following levels. Use your creativity to find a solution; don’t forget to laugh out loud while you're doing it! Perform Hilarious Actions 🤪 While grabbing an object from afar or stealing a kiss from a girl upstairs, you need to take funny actions with your stretchy hero! From time to time, you need to completely use the upper body of your stickman, which makes it look silly. Or you may need to stretch one leg out a mile. Use the Objects to Stretch 🍇 To avoid coming into contact with fire or lasers, you need to use objects to your advantage. Twist your arm or leg around an object, and you can reach a specific item to pass a level. For example, you must save your lover from the hands of a pirate on the 7th level. Stretch your leg and twist it around the rock. Then, you can kick the ass of the pirate! Developer Eyestorm Pte. LTD. published Gomu Goman. More Games Like This Egg Adventure is another funny puzzle game that you can enjoy playing. Help Mr. Egg reach the door at the end by drawing structures. For more options, check out our online puzzle games by following the link. Keep coming back to discover newly added games!

title: Papa's Bakeria
description: Papa Louie opened a brand new restaurant: Papa's Bakeria ! Cecilia and Timmy's first plans were to be dancers, but somehow they ended up managing this restaurant at Whiskfield Mall. Along this new career path, they will learn how to bake the perfect pie and explore new pie recipes. Customers are tough; so don't wait to help them to build a bakery kingdom! Controls Use left mouse button How to Play Papa's Bakeria Your mission is to take orders, bake perfect pies, add the topping according to the ticket orders. Deliver on time and get the handsome tips from customers! Papa Louie will help you with your first order and help you get accustomed to running a bakery. After that, you're on your own to managing this restaurant. Take Orders Customers have orders with many special requirements. Some like apple filling, while some are fond of chocolate pies. They might have extremely specific demands about the dough and toppings and decorations, such as only six slices of bananas on the inner ring of the pie. We know dealing with these picky customers is not an easy job, but that's the reason you were hired in the first place. Pay close attention to what the customers want in the first place and add the ingredients accordingly. Pop the pie out of the oven right on time, and we promise you'll multiply the earnings! Time Management As the business grows, customers will line up in front of Papa's Bakeria. You shouldn't make them wait for long. Take orders from all and start baking. You can decorate one while one order is in the oven. Deliver the orders in time for happy customers scoring big! Decorate the Bakery This job pays well! You'll get weekly paychecks. You can use your earnings to upgrade the bakery by buying new furniture or other tools that'll help you manage the restaurant. All the things you buy for the restaurant (even posters and wallpapers you hang on the wall in the lobby) serve a purpose such as making customers more content even they wait for too long. Play Mini Games After a long day at the bakery, you can blow off steam by playing mini-games to unlock new outfits and other items to customize your character. In conclusion, Papa's Bakeria is a game with a myriad of features and unlockable items, offering a high replayability value. If you'd like to come back to play again, there are three slots to save your progress. you can continue where you left off unless you delete browser cache. Developer Papa's Bakeria is developed by Flipline Studios. Do I need Flash Player to play Papa's Bakeria ? No you don't need flash player to play Papa's Bakeria. We use Ruffle emulation technology that works on our side, making flash games playable without installing any file! You May Also Like Yummy games do not end here, fellas! Play dozens of restaurant management games on OnlineGames.io. Build your food empire!

title: Burnout Racers
description: Burnout Racers is a 3D online car tuning game on OnlineGames.io. Start your car project, upgrade, and tune anything about your car that you like. You don't need to worry about in-game coins because you have unlimited money in this game. You can buy any car or upgrade you'd like. When you're done with configurations, take a ride with your car at vibrant maps to test if drift and grip levels suit you. If you'd like host a multiplayer game room and race with your friends. Show off with your spoilers, decals, and many more! Stay tuned to learn more about controls and how to play Burnout Racers! Controls Move: WASD or Arrow Keys Handbrake: Space NOS: Shift Change Camera: C Look Back: B Low Beam Lights: L High Beam Lights: K Indicator Hazard: Z Indicator Left: Q Indicator Right: E How to Play Burnout Racers Burnout Racers offers pure joy in each step of the game. First, buy and customize your car, decide whether you go offline or multiplayer, then choose a track and play. Here's a step-by-step guide. Customize the Car First, explore 7 unique cars in the garage. There are cars for every taste, from old vintage vehicles to sports cars like Porsche 993. Buy the one that suits your style. You have 100K $ initially, but you can add more money from the cheat buttons if you'd like. After the purchase, move on to upgrades section. Start by painting your car, change wheels, upgrade parts like the engine, brakes, handling and speed. Dine tune with adjusting cambers and heights. If you need some advice in this, check our tuning guide . Next, hands down in details like decals, colors of LED lights, spoilers and more. Offline or Multiplayer Rooms Leave the garage after the customizations and hit the play button. Pick between solo offline mode or multiplayer rooms. If you go solo, you can add some AI bots to the game to race with. But you won't be able to earn points. There are two maps you can jump: Dockside Night and Dockside Day. If you create a multiplayer room, you can pick between practice and race mode, adjust the number of laps in a race, add/remove bots. Finally, set the maximum number of players and create your own room. When all other players in the room press "ready," the host can start the race. 3..2..1... Race! Use WASD buttons to drive, and use the left shift to activate NOS. Pay attention to the turns and reach the finish first! If you can't send your car to trash, add some money using cheats and start all over again to catch the maximum speed you can achieve in Burnout Racers! Developer Bonecracker Games created Burnout Racers. More Games Like This If you enjoy multiplayer racing games, you should definitely check out Drift King ! It's the most popular car game on OnlineGames.io! Enjoy more models, maps and features!

title: Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker
description: This Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker turns the funny Italian brainrot meme into something super cute and fun. All the famous meme characters are now little baby versions, and by clicking on them, you can listen to a cute Italian brainrot song while unlocking more and more baby Italian brainrot characters. The game is full of silly faces, bright colors, and happy music that make playing it feel fun, cheerful, and full of good vibes for everyone. Game Overview Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker is a simple and funny clicker game. You just need to click or tap the screen to earn points. You can use those points to buy upgrades and make each click give you even more points. The game is easy to play and full of cute sounds and silly baby Italian brainrot characters that make it extra fun. How to Play Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker? The gameplay is simple: click or tap to earn points, play the cute brainrot music, and unlock more and more baby Italian brainrot characters. You can play alone or challenge a friend to see who is the first one to reveal the character. Tap Tap Tap Tap Tap Tap Sahur! One Player Earn Points: tap / click / SPACE Two Player First Player: W Second Player: ⬆️ Good to Know! Boring ads for extra points: even though watching ads means taking a boring break from brainrotting, we recommend watching one from time to time because you’ll get extra boosters that help you reach a higher score. FAQs Will my progress be saved? Yes, your progress stays saved so you can come back and keep playing later. What makes this game different? This baby version is even cuter than the classic Brainrot Clicker . Instead of pure chaos, it focuses on fun, bright colors, and adorable baby characters that will make you smile while you play. How do I unlock more characters? You just keep tapping, buy bonuses to increase your score, and wait for new baby characters to appear. Keep playing often because consistency is the key to unlocking them all! Similar Games If you want even more Italian brainrot fun and love chill gameplay, try the Italian Brainrot Clicker . It is the perfect mix of chaos and chill fun. If you feel like playing something new with the same cute style, try Capybara Clicker Pro . It is adorable and easy to play, and will keep you distracted for hours.

title: ATV Highway Traffic
description: Shall we tour the city with an ATV vehicle? It sounds like it could be a lot of fun. Atv Highway Traffic is a 3D driving game where you steer a 4-wheel vehicle. There are four maps to steer your car: a highway road, a desert road, a snowy road, and a city map. Choose your favorite track and start the engine in the simulator game. Overview If you are one of those who love using ATVs like us, choose your favorite game map and start using the four-wheel vehicle. Four maps range from a regular highway map to a city map. We recommend you try each of them. Every one of the maps will give you a different gaming experience. Additionally, you can access three game modes in the driving game: Time, Endless and Fuel. What all three have in common is to go as far as you can by dodging the cars. Don't forget to collect the coins on the way. Perform Close Calls Your objective in the simulator game is to avoid crashing into any vehicle on the road. Pass the levels by fulfilling the tasks you have been given while dodging the cars. Moving through bustling traffic will be a little challenging. Doing close calls will enable you to pass the vehicles at a high speed and earn you a certain amount of coins. Game Modes of Atv Highway Traffic Time Mode: You will have a short period in the mode. Fulfill the tasks in this short time. You can view how many coins you have collected from the upper left corner of the screen. Endless Mode: There are no restrictions on Endless mode. Your job is to perform close calls and collect coins on the road. Fuel Mode: Your vehicle has limited fuel in this mode. You must collect the fuel power-ups to fill the fuel bar. If the bar drops to zero, you will lose the game. Controls A/D or Left/Right Arrow Keys: Move W or Up Arrow Key: Activate Nitro S or Down Arrow Key: Brake Tab: Pause Developer FreezeNova created the Atv Highway Traffic. Similar Games Vehicles Simulator may draw your attention if you like playing Atv Highway Traffic. The game has seven vehicle options ranging from a regular car to a tank. Choose your favorite one and drive your car as you wish. Additionally, you may look up driving games online for more options. You will find many free online games in this category. Please share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below! We'd love to hear from you.

title: BFFs Retro Time Travel Fashion
description: If you love retro fashion, this is the perfect game for you. BFFs Retro Time Travel Fashion is your time machine ticket to an exciting fashion adventure. Join four stylish besties as they travel through time, facing the challenge of nailing iconic looks from the past. The catch? Every time you press the button on the time machine, one of the girls gets whisked away to a random era. And it’s up to YOU to make sure she’s dressed to impress! Wondering how to play? It's a piece of cake. Just use your mouse or tap if you’re on your phone. Choose a girl, hit the time machine button to find out where she's landed, and then pick out some clothes, hair, and accessories that scream the era. Once you've got one girl sorted, send the next one time-traveling. Keep going until all four are dressed to kill in their respective times. Controls Use your mouse or tap to play Other Fashion Games Dress-up games provide a stylish way to explore fashion history and let your imagination run wild. Plus, they are perfect to kill some time casually. So, if you enjoyed this game, feel free to explore the entire collection at OnlineGames.io for more online fashion games. Get creative and discover how a girl can become a trendsetter with the power of fashion! A Summary of Fashion Over the Decades BFFs Retro Time Travel Fashion is a dress up game where you’re not just picking outfits; you're diving into the fashion history books. Discover all from the pastel perfection of the 1950s to the neon explosion of the 1980s. You’ll need to bring your A game to pull together the perfect look for each girl. Every click on the time machine button sends a girl into one of these fabulous decades: 1950s: Classic Elegance Ah, the 50s, where every outfit says "classy"! Picture yourself in a chic polka dot dress, a cute cardigan draped over your shoulders, and soft victory rolls in your hair. It’s the epitome of ladylike charm. If you’re aiming for that retro, sophisticated vibe, this era is your playground. Just don’t forget the pearls, because no 50s look is complete without a touch of vintage glamour! 1960s: Bold and Beautiful Oh, 60s... where everything is big, bold, and beautiful. Think bright mini dresses with funky patterns and hair that reach for the sky in a sleek bouffant. The accessories? Think oversized sunglasses and chunky necklaces to match the colorful vibe. The 60s weren’t just about fashion; it was all about making a statement. 1970s: Boho Dreams If you're a free spirit at heart, the 70s were made for you. This era is all about flowy, bohemian hippie vibes think bell-bottoms, loose blouses, and earthy tones that scream “peace and love.” Feathered hair, flower crowns, and floral patterns are all part of the groovy mix. So, if you’re in the mood for some laid-back styling with a dash of hippie flair, the 70s will have you dancing in no time. 1980s: Power and Pop The 80s were as loud as they were bold, and the fashion followed suit. Neon colors, oversized jackets, and the most voluminous hair you could possibly imagine—this era wasn’t about blending in, it was all about standing out. Accessories like fingerless gloves, bright headbands, and chunky earrings took the outfit to a whole new level. If you’re ready to bring the drama and fun, the 80s will give you all the flair you need. Developer BFFs Retro Time Travel Fashion was developed by Fabbox Studios.

title: Masked Forces Crazy Mode
description: You are about to have fun while shooting in Masked Forces Crazy Mode game. The objective is simple, destroy every enemy and become the best warrior. You have plenty of levels, weapons and armor, everythinng is ready for you. The amazing graphics will keep you entertained and you will experience the intensity of the action. Before you start the battles, you get the opportunity to equip the soldier in the weapons and armor section. In the weapon section, you are provided with a range of purchasable and upgradable weapons. Masked Forces Crazy Mode Weapons are: • Deagle • Smg • Minigun • Shotgun • Revolver • Slugger • Thompson Smg • Sniper • HMG • Grenade In the armor section, you are provided with a range of purchasable equipment that propects you from the bullet attacks. Armor : • Watchdog Armor • Hellbound Armor • Undefeated Armor • Night Armor • Supreme Armor • Death Mask • Cataclysm Mask • Doom Squad Mask • Unforgiven Mask • Vanquisher Mask The game also has a daily reward feature which gifts players cash and XP every 24 hours, also as your player level increases you get cash rewards, be sure to claim yours. Masked Forces Crazy Mode Gameplay The gameplay is intense as players are deployed into a map to battle and the player with the highest number of kills wins the match. You never know when your opponents may come, so keep moving, aim cautiously, and be vigilant. Special feature in the gameplay is the ability to pick up enemies’ weapons after knock down. In this mode, you are offered a variety of missions with different objectives. In level 1, you have 3 active missions to choose from. Mission 1 is to win a death match; in this mission 6 players are deployed to battle and the first player with 15 kills wins the match. Mission 2 is to eliminate 3 enemies; in this mission, your objective is to eliminate 3 enemies to pass the mission. However, if your player kills 2 enemies and gets knocked down, you must restart the mission. So ensure you get that 3 kill streak to complete the mission. Mission 3 is to survive for 50 seconds; in this mission you have to survive for 50 seconds and the player’s movement and speed is reduced. To survive, either you take down your enemies or you find cover for 50 seconds. Rewards for completion are $250 and 1000 XP each. In level 2, the active missions are quite the same only that some active missions are still level 1 difficulty with the same cash and XP reward. But level 2 difficulty has a cash price of $300 and 1100 XP. Masked Forces Crazy Mode Level 2 active missions are: • Win a death match (level 1 difficulty) • Eliminate 3 enemies (level 1 difficulty) • Win a death match (level 2 difficulty) Masked Forces Crazy Mode Level 3 active missions are: • Win a death match (level 3 difficulty) • Eliminate 3 enemies (level 1 difficulty) • Survive for 50 seconds (level 1 difficulty) There are several fascinating missions and objectives to enjoy in this game, which will provide you with a realistic sense of being on the battlefield. Online PvP Mode In online PvP mode, a player can choose either to create a room or join an existing room. You can choose speedx2, jump forcex2, armorx2 and the maximum number of players is 16. When creating a room, you get to choose the level and mode to play from. Masked Forces Crazy Mode Levels are: • Factory • Bastion • Barricade • Blockade • Freedom • Arena • FactoryX • GasPlant • Towers Masked Forces Crazy Mode Modes are: • FFA (Free For All) • Teams • Doomsday Masked Forces Crazy Mode Display includes: • Kill feed (displayed on the top left) • HP and ammo (displayed on the bottom right) • Radar (displayed on the top right) • Leading player (displayed on the top center) Controls: WASD or arrow keys to move Left click to fire Right click to aim R to reload Mouse scroll to change weapons F to pick weapon Tab to open menu Developer Masked Forces Crazy Mode is created by FreezeNova.

title: Cat Escape
description: Ever wondered what it’s like to be a hunted cat? In Cat Escape , you sneak past guards, slip through tricky rooms, and try out tons of fun disguises. Just make it to the exit without getting caught, and taste that sweet freedom! Game Overview In Cat Escape , you take on the role of a little cat trying to outwit guards and find your way to freedom! Each room is a puzzle filled with obstacles, tricks, and surprises. Sneak past the guards, use the environment to your advantage, and discover new ways to escape. Along the way, you can customize your cat and trail with items unlocked as you progress through the game, making every escape uniquely yours. Game Features Interactive Environments: Use electric bars, portals, moving bands, and food power-ups to your advantage. Customization: Unlock skins and trails to make your cat stand out. Pet Companion Mode: Feed, pet, and care for a cozy cat outside of the action. Rewarding Progression: Earn food and items by completing levels. No shortcuts, just skillful play. How to Play Cat Escape? Controls Left: ⬅️ Right: ➡️ Up: ⬆️ Down: ⬇️ Or: Click + drag the mouse in the desired direction to move. Use the Environment Electric bars can trap guards or clear your path. Food makes your cat grow larger, giving you new ways to interact with obstacles. Portals and moving bands transport you to different parts of the room. Take Care of Your Cat Beyond the chase, you can also care for a cozy companion cat : Feed it Pet it Earn food for it only by playing and escaping—giving you even more reason to keep sneaking forward! Good to Know Some portals are one-way, so plan your escape route wisely. Feeding and petting your extra cat is optional , but it’s a rewarding way to enjoy your progress outside of the action. FAQs Can I attack the guard or jump over him? No, you can’t—you can only avoid him. Can I replay previous levels? No, once you pass a level, you can’t go back to it. You also can’t see a map with all the levels you’ve already completed. Does the game have infinite levels? Yes! The more you play, the more levels appear, making it a never-ending adventure. Similar Games If you like this game but cats aren’t your favorite, we have other options. If you want something more intense, try Escape Car , where you drive while being chased by the police. Or if you’d rather relax, check out Monster Escape , where you play as a monster trying to break free from dungeons.

title: Vex 7
description: Vex 7 is the newest addition to the super popular Vex series. It's a sidescrolling platformer game where you take control of a stickman and guide him through maze like levels filled with traps. Spikes, spinning blades, shurikens and new obstacles await you to attack. In this new installment of Vex, fresh mechanics like gliding enter the stage, making the acts even more dynamic. In essence, if you'd like to revoke memories of old 2D obstacle courses built in Flash, Vex 7 offers just what you've asked for. Plus, it's wrapped in a sleek, modern design that works on mobile devices too. But be warned: Vex is no walk in the park. The name comes from vexation for a reason! One small slip, and you could land on a spike or miss a crucial jump! It’s a game that can break beginners’ hearts with its sheer difficulty. If you’re faint-hearted, prepare to shed a tear or two! Plus it's wrapped in a modern design, compatible even with mobile devices. But just beware that Vex is not for beginners or sensitive players. If you're so, you may shed a tear or two. Controls Mastering the controls is the key to surviving in Vex 7. Here’s how it works: Left and Right Arrow Keys (or A and D): Move your character left or right. Up Arrow Key (or W): Jump to dodge traps, climb ledges, and reach higher places. Down Arrow Key (or S): Crouch to avoid low-hanging threats and sometimes slide or dive through narrow openings. Spacebar: Use it for special actions like breaking bricks. How to Play Vex 7 Vex 7 continues the classic run-and-jump style of the series but throws in new surprises. Here is how to play Vex 7. Once you begin, your character will spawn in a safe spot. You’ll see different paths and platforms to explore. Move carefully to avoid traps like spikes, spinning blades, and dangerous drop-offs. Look for safe ledges or hidden paths that might help you progress. Coins are often placed in tricky spots, so be ready for a challenge! Each act has a portal. Once you find the portal, jump through to move on to the level hub and enter the next act from there. Vex is hard but fair. Each level has checkpoint flags, so if you fail, you’ll return to the latest flag instead of starting over. Vex 7 has 9+1 acts with increasing difficulty. However, learning the pattern and timing of each trap will increase your chances of staying alive. Tips & Tricks Vex 7 might feel tough at first. But each level teaches you new tricks. Don’t worry if you fail. Just learn from your errors and keep going. After consecutive deaths, the game will ask you "Are you OK?". Press "No," and that'll put you into an invincibility bubble for a while. Pay attention to the way and timing of obstacles' movement. Some spikes pop up at regular intervals, while others trigger after you step on certain spots. Purple blocks drop after you stand on them. Always aim for the next checkpoint before attempting any risky moves. This way, you won’t lose all your progress if you fail. A perfectly timed jump can make a big difference. Try tapping the W just before you reach a ledge for a smooth vault over spikes. Developer Vex 7 is crafted by Amazing Adam (the mind behind the entire Vex series). With each new version, improvements and new challenges pop up, so there’s always a reason to come back. If you'd like to revisit prequels, you can play Vex 3 for free on OnlineGames.io Closing Thoughts Vex 7 is an awesome choice if you want a fun but challenging free online game . Whether you’re a big fan of the Vex series or new to the world of quick thinking platformers, you’re bound to have a blast. With sharp controls and creative level design, Vex 7 will keep you coming back for more. Head over to OnlineGames.io, fire up your browser, and play this free game today. You might just find your new favorite hobby: speedrunning those tricky acts on Vex!

title: Cars Simulator
description: Do you think you are a good driver who has car handling skills? If yes, Cars Simulator will give you the ultimate race experience. With no speed limits you have freedom of movement of your car. There are 3 landscapes created for you: • 1 Forest landscape • 2 industrial landscapes There are 3 cars: • Rally car • Police Car • Old Car Controls: WASD or arrow keys to drive car Space bar for handbrake C to change view (camera) Shift to boost car R to reset scene E to turn on police lights X to hide instructions 1, 2, 3 to change car TAB to exit main menu Developer Cars Simulator is created by FreezeNova.

title: Car Collision Master
description: Car Collision Master is an online battle game in which you fight against enemies with your car! Smash your enemy with your tires and win two rounds in a row to get the cups. This car game is a great blend of vehicles and battling. With its cartoonish graphics, you will laugh out loud a lot while trying to run over the opponent. You can also duel with a friend in the 2 Players mode! 💥 Controls 1 Player Mode A/D or Left/Right Arrow: Move Left or Right Spacebar: Jump 2 Players Mode Player 1 A/D: Move Left or Right W: Jump Player 2 Left/Right Arrow: Move Left or Right Upper Arrow: Jump Car Collision Master Overview You will find yourself in a desert with your jeep. Accept the battle requests and fight the opponent for 2 rounds. If you manage to win these rounds, you will earn cups that enable you to unlock new jeeps. The main aim of this driving game is to navigate the jeep toward your enemy and try to knock them down. If they get hit on the head, they will lose a lot of health! But of course, they will try to knock you out, too. Unlock New Jeeps 🔓 When you pass a level successfully, you will earn cups and coins in return. Use the cups to unlock new and more powerful jeeps. You must invest in your vehicle to make it stronger and more durable. As you make progress, your opponents also become difficult to knock out in the following levels. You can also get bigger tires for your Jeep from the customization section. Upgrade the Health and Attack Power 🧬 While you can use the cups to unlock new vehicles and tires, you can use the coins to upgrade the health and attack power. This way, you can make it harder for your opponents to knock you out. Especially the upgraded attack power will enable you to cause a harder impact on your enemies! Developer SecGame developed the Car Collision Master. Similar Games If you enjoy playing Car Collision Master, you may also give Survival Race a chance! In the game, you will attack other drivers in the arena with your car to survive. For more options, feel free to check out our Car Games Online game tag. Bookmark this website (CTRL + D) to access it easily next time!

title: Sprunked
description: Say hello to Sprunked , also called Sprunkin Sprunked 2.0 . It is a brand new remix of the beloved music game that puts you in the DJ chair with a twist. Just like before, you have seven awesome polo Sprunks to style and mix, but now the costumes are flashier, the music loops are smoother, and there are seven extra characters to spice things up! And the horror mode? Let’s just say you’ll have to see it to believe it. So you'll be able to create funky musical combos and discover new beats. And don't worry if you’re brand-new to the Sprunk universe, Sprunked always welcomes you. If you’re the kind of player who loves a colorful challenge, this online game will keep your creativity flowing. If you're into eeire music, horror themes, and getting chilled, Sprunbked will also grab your attention. Let's start! Warning: Horror Mode On the bottom right corner of your screen there’s a black button. If you hit that switch, you’ll enter Horror Mode, a spooky version of the game where the atmosphere, visuals, and sounds take a haunting turn. Younger players might find it a bit scary, so use it with caution. But if you’re into thrill and chills, it’s a perfect way to add an extra jolt of excitement to your track. Controls Use your mouse or trackpad to drag outfits or accessories, then drop them onto your chosen Sprunk. Click on the sprunk the remove the costume. How to Play Sprunked When you start, you’ll see seven polo Sprunks (without costumes) , each tied to a specific sound set. The twist is that every costume or outfit changes your Sprunk’s unique loop. It can add Beats , Effects , Melodies , or Vocals . Here’s the scoop on the categories: Beats : Characters like Orange (Oren), Red (Raddy), Silver (Clukr), Fun Bot, or Green (Vineria) set the steady rhythm of your tune. Effects : Sprunks such as Gray, brud (Brown), Gold (Garnold), Lime (OWAKCX), or Sky (Sky Blue) add quirky, unexpected sounds to your mix. Melodies : Create catchy hooks with Mr. Sun, Purple (String Durple), Mr. Tree, Yellow (Simon), or Tan (Tunner) for a memorable tune. Vocals : Bring your track to life with Mr. Fun Computer, Wenda (White), Pinki (Pink), Jevin (Blue), or Black for funky or spooky vocal lines. Alongside these main Sprunks, you can deck them out with seven bonus costumes: Draker , Woboloy Bop , bomb , mard , bren , toasted rainbow sandwich , and smol . Each offering its own special sound. Our favorite is Woboloy Bop rapping Developer Sprunked (Sprunkin Sprunked 2.0) is the brainchild of Draker , who took the original Sprunki concept and powered it up with extra polish and an expanded roster. Draker’s love for music and creative expression shines through in every note and animation. Other Sprunki Games If you’re looking for more ways to play and explore music-making, try out the original Sprunki , which started the cute and spooky journey. You could also give fan-made Incredibox mods like Sprunki Warm Like Fire a whirl if you enjoy music mixing. And if you want a 3D game but don't wanna leave Sprunks behind, play Obby: Find Sprunki . It's a mix of Roblox's obstacle challenges where you're on a mission to find hidden sprunks. Ready to test your creativity? Sprunked (Sprunkin Sprunked 2.0) and other music games offers fun tunes, scary twists, and a heap of fun. Dive in, drag those outfits, and become the DJ you’ve always dreamed of. Just watch out for that spooky black button!

title: Bob the Robber
description: Come, let me introduce you to robber Bob! Bob The Robber is an arcade crime game where you play as a cunning robber. You will face many obstacles while stealing. You have to dodge guards, laser sensors and, of course, the cameras. But remember, Bob is not yesterday's kid either! He is an extraordinary thief who has been training himself for a long time. Steal from the rich, give to the poor and keep the spirit of Robin Hood alive! To complete each heist successfully, move on tiptoe and never remove your mask even once. How to play Bob The Robber? Bob has a story. His deep admiration for Robin Hood since childhood led him to this path. He trained himself for years. And now he feels ready for more significant tasks. Now it is crusade time for him. He completed all his preparations. Now it is time to witness the 5 biggest robberies in the world. There are five major venues expected to be robbed in Bob The Robbery. There are different environments, from the most vulnerable to those with the most advanced technologies. First, you will start robbing a house. After completing this, it is time for the jewelry shop. You will finish the game by robbing a casino. Every place has its own defense system. You must overcome these obstacles one by one. For example, you can disable the laser defense system by cutting off the electricity. Or you can bypass security cameras by hiding in blind spots. If you encounter any guards, we recommend using your stick by pressing the Spacebar 😅. How to Escape from Cameras in Bob The Robber? Unfortunately, this game has no way to get rid of the cameras. You can disable the laser system by cutting off the power. Still, for the cameras, you can only follow the camera's direction and take shelter in blind spots. Taking shelter in the shadows or using the stairs to go up or down are good options to evade the cameras. Controls Use the A or D keys or the Left and Right Arrow keys to move Bob Use the W key or the Upper Arrow key to climb up a stair or use an elevator Press the W key or the Upper Arrow key to search for valuable items among the boxes or cases Press the W key or the Upper Arrow key and hold the key to open a locked door Press the W key or the Upper Arrow key to unlock a coded door by using the 0-9 numbers Press the W key or the Upper Arrow key to cut the power to disable the laser system Developer Bob the Robber was created by Funtomic. Similar Games For another funny adventure, give a chance to Poptropica , it will be your next obsession! For additional gaming options, we also advise following the links for more online crazy games and 2D games on OnlineGames.io.

title: Siegius
description: B e the commander of the legionnaire! Siegius is a 2D strategy game where you are in the shoes of Caesar. The most prominent battles of Roman times have come. You must train your soldiers. To win, you have to give accurate commands to your Roman Legion. Shape the course of history by taking down the Gallic Tribes in the defense game. Siegius Overview Your loyal soldiers are ready to fight until the last drop of their blood. As Caesar, you are responsible for their position in the wars. They will act according to your commands. You must make well-thought-out decisions for the Roman Empire's well-being. In the first stage, your opponents will be the Gallic Tribes, and their commander is Vercing. Use the tribe’s weaknesses to your advantage. Shape the battle's course according to your soldiers' power in this strategy game. The Roman Legion When you enter the battlefield, Gallics will come to your area across the map. You can view their positions on the map by using the WASD or the Arrow keys. The first thing to do is to place your swordsmen, the basic unit of the Roman Legion, on the battlefield. They are excellent at close combat. They can beat ax-wielding men in seconds. As you eliminate the adversaries, you will unlock the defenders and archers. What brings you victory in this defense game is to send your soldiers considering their strengths. For example, placing archers before enemies is not a good idea as they are good at distant attacks. The Gallic Tribes and Boarathians You can unlock new commanders from different tribes as you make progress. Vercing, the commander of the Gallic Tribe and Boaretheus from Boarathians are available in later stages. They all have unique powers. The Gallics are more potent than the Romans in terms of offense power. But on the other hand, they do not have the spell power of the Romans. Apart from these two tribes, the Boarathians' offense and defense power are the strongest among them. So, take these tribe's strengths and weaknesses into consideration before entering the battlefield. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move the map Mouse Click: To place the soldiers Developer Juice-Tin and Mike Sleva created Siegius. What is Next? Hero Rush Tower Defense is another defense game that you may enjoy playing. To guard your land, you must build towers across the map. Upgrading them will also enhance your defense capability. Protect your lands with all your might in the game. Additionally, you have many other strategy game options on OnlineGames.io. They are all accessible without requiring any registration or sign-up. Bookmark this site to continue your gaming adventure easily!

title: Snow Rider Obby Parkour
description: Snow Rider Obby Parkour is an online snowboard game set in a Roblox-like open world! Explore its multiple game modes and feel free to take on different snow challenges. You can take part in this fast-paced snowboard adventure solo, or you can duel with a friend in the 2-player mode. Hop on your ski, and start sliding now! 🎿 Controls Player 1 WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump C Key: Change Camera View R Key: Respawn Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move K Key: Jump L Key: Change Camera View U Key: Respawn On Mobile Devices: Use the intuitive touch controls. How to Play Snow Rider Obby Parkour Are you ready to show your snowboarding skills in one of the best Roblox games? Get your ski, and begin sliding through a freezing mountain scene. Whether you want to beat distance records, explore a massive Roblox-like open world, or race down dangerous mountains, this game offers a complete snowboarding experience. Collect coins on your way in each game mode to customize your Obby with shining outfits and accessories. Do not forget to spin the Lucky Spin to get extra coins! Game Modes in Snow Rider Obby Parkour Infinity Road The Infinity Road mode tests players’ snowboarding skills on its parkour challenges. Players should slide on their skis and try to cover the longest distance possible, avoiding obstacles along the way. They especially need to be cautious about the orange objects. Colliding with one of them results in failure! Open World In the Open World mode, players can freely slide around a massive snowy terrain. Additionally, there are racing challenges in this open world. Once the players move over the race flag and capture it, they can engage in short snowboarding races and earn coins through the races. Mountain Ride The Mountain Ride mode requires players to race with other players and be the one who reaches the finish line first in order to win. Players should race down a dangerous mountain by dodging obstacles on their way. Reflexes, timing and control matter the most in this racing mode. Developer Snow Rider Obby Parkour is released by GameVGames. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing Roblox games like this, you may also try playing Obby Rainbow Tower . Try to reach the 25th stage of the winter-themed tower. Beware of the snowstorms! Moreover, you can visit our Roblox Games Online category to reach games that are Roblox. Bookmark this website, and keep coming back to discover the best Roblox games on www.onlinegames.io.

title: Blob Opera
description: Ladies and Gentlemen! We introduce you to the best choir of all time. Meet the Blobs! An extremely talented opera choir who are able to sing any song you'd like with great harmony! Blob Opera is an experimental music game that allows you to create and play your own songs in your web browser. Blobs are so talented that they can sing any song, but it is not limited to that. They look so hilarious that you can even watch them breathe, each at their own speed, when they are silent. How to Play Blob Opera? You have 4 different opera singers: Bass, Tenor, Mezzo-Soprano and Soprano. To make the Blob sing at a higher pitch, drag them up. For a lower pitch, drag them down. If you'd like them to sing a certain vowel, drag the Blobs left and right. From left to right, you hear their voices making vowel sounds of a, e, i, o, and u, respectively. You can mute one (or more) of the Blobs by hitting on the mute button on the top of their heads. As you are the chef of this little orchestra, Blobs will follow your hand with their eyes. Move your mouse on the screen, and you will enjoy the silly faces of them. There are ready-to-listen songs in Blob Opera, too. Click on the button at the bottom right to listen to Jingle Bells, Joy to the World, and many other songs from Blobs. Who knows, they might inspire you to create a brand-new, excellent piece of art! Remember to record the song you created and share it with your loved ones. New Cities to Perform Blobs are taking a world tour! Other than the Blobpera House, you can create or listen to their performance in London, New York, Mexico City, Seoul, Cape Town, and Paris. In each city, they will sing re-owned songs of that culture. You should definitely see Blob Opera's performance of Carmen from Bizet in Paris. Another recommendation is listening to Hallelujah under the lights of London streets. Let us know which one is your favorite in the comment section below. Who created Blob Opera? Blob Opera is created by David Li in collaboration with Google Arts and Culture. You may have already known another work of David Li: Elastic Man Morty . If you haven't met him yet, we strongly recommend you play with Morty's face for a while. Enjoy the fantastic visuals and physics of the game. Who are the voices of Blob Opera? Bass: Frederick Tong Tenor: Christian Joel Mezzo‑soprano: Joanna Gamble Soprano: Olivia Doutney What to Play Next? OnlineGames.io has a lot of experimental and funny games for you. Explore all of the tags , and we are sure you will find a title that feels like it was created only for you. Please bookmark this website (Ctrl +D) to come back whenever you want. Then, you will always find the newest games online. created by Busra Gezen using Canva tools

title: BFFs Black Friday Collection
description: Hey girls! The Christmas season has begun already! And we're excited about Black Friday shopping, aren't we?
