Bustling malls, massive deals, shoppers zigzag with the energy, and the air buzzes with the sound of laughter and "did you see this?" Families wheel out carts piled high with bargains, and friends take selfies with giant store decorations. We took this festive frenzy to the virtual world and added the magic of dress-up games! BFFs Black Friday Collection is a fun fashion game where you help six stylish girls prepare for a day of Black Friday shopping. Each girl has her own unique style and personality, so it's up to you to create the perfect outfit and makeup look for each of them. The mall is waiting, and these BFFs are ready to score some amazing deals, but they need your help to look their best! Controls On Computer: Click and drag clothing items to dress up each girl Use the makeup tools by clicking on them to apply makeup Click on the check mark to confirm their looks On Mobile: Tap on clothing and makeup options to dress and style the girls Use the icons to apply makeup Tap the check mark to finish each look How to Play BFFs Black Friday Collection Start by choosing one of the six girls to style. Pick out her clothes from a variety of outfits. You can mix and match tops, pants, dresses, and accessories. Next, hairstyles! Choose from different hairstyles from French braids to buns and more. Once you're done with one girl, move on to the next! After styling all the girls, they'll be ready to head to the mall and enjoy their Black Friday shopping spree! Developer BFFs Black Friday Collection game was created by FreezeNova. More Fashion Games If you're a fan of dress-up games and enjoy the festive spirit of Thanksgiving, you won't want to miss Ellie's Thanksgiving Day . Join Ellie as she prepares for the perfect Thanksgiving celebration. From choosing stylish outfits for the big day to planning the event from start to finish, you'll help her with everything. Pick out the perfect dress for Ellie, design the invitations, and set up the beautiful Thanksgiving table. You can even decorate the porch to create a cozy welcome. OnlineGames.io is packed with fashion, creativity, and celebration games that capture the fun and joy of special occasions all year round.

title: Obby: Find Sprunki
description: Welcome to Obby: Find Sprunki , where the adventure kicks off with a mission to Track down every Sprunki hidden across the map. Each has its own peculiar charm and, sometimes, a bit of a spooky twist. It's all about exploring, finding, and playing through both bright, happy-go-lucky areas and darker, more mysterious zones where the vibe shifts to something a bit more... eerie. What is Sprunki? Sprunki began as a playful twist in the Incredibox universe, introducing quirky characters that added fun and personality to the popular music-making app. Over time, these charming Sprunks grew into something much bigger. Loved by fans, they now star in their own games, inspire fan fiction, and have undergone a fascinating evolution. What started as lighthearted and whimsical has taken on a darker, more surreal edge, transforming Sprunks into a horror phenomenon almost overnight. Today, you’ll find them featured in posters, games, and various multimedia projects—maybe even movies in the future. Each Sprunk has its own unique vibe, ranging from sunny and cheerful to downright mysterious, making them a captivating part of pop culture. In Obby: Find Sprunki you'll get to know about 40 distinct Sprunks scattered across the map, all while tackling an obstacle course. Run, jump, climb, and meet these quirky characters, collecting them all to complete your Sprunki collection. Controls Computer Controls: Move with WASD or arrow keys. Look around or rotate the camera with right mouse button Jump with spacebar. Explore Four Maps There are four maps in the Obby Find Sprunki game, each having 10 hidden Sprunks. Explore the place, spot the Sprunks, and walk over them to add them to your collection. Maps are as follows. Amusement Park: This is where you'll begin. A vibrant, fun-filled environment with rides, games, and possibly carnival challenges. The charm of the map looks like the first phase of the original Sprunki game. Farm Map: This map introduces a rural setting with farm animals and tractors, windmills and other vehicles. Sprunks can be anywhere; make sure you find them all. Satellite and Space Station: This map features a cosmic theme with satellites, space stations, and perhaps a creepy atmosphere. Encounter eerie, otherworldly elements, E.Ts, and horror vibes. On this map, spotting the Sprunkis is a piece of cake, but reaching that spot is not so. You need to put your obby skills in charge. Football Stadium: This map brings a sports theme into the Obby Find Sprunki. Navigate through a giant stadium, score goals or find Sprunks. It's probably the most difficult map, as Sprunks are hidden very well. Use Power-Ups to Find All Morphs You can click on the power-up icons on the left side when you are stuck. Radar: Think of it as your hint system. It'll nudge you towards where you might find the next Sprunk. Acceleration: When you need that extra speed to zip through maps faster. Double Jump: Because sometimes, you just need to reach a bit higher. More Free Games Sprunki Obby isn't just about finding characters; it's about diving into a world where each discovery changes how you play and what you feel. From light-hearted fun to spine-chilling mysteries, this game's got it all. Ready to uncover all the secrets and collect all the Sprunks? Let's dive in! And if you're craving for more, just browse the Roblox Games Online and you'll find dozens of Obby games there.

title: Backrooms Shooter
description: Wake up and find yourself in the backrooms of an abandoned hotel. You hear your own breath in the mask and that bloody weird song again. As you regain your senses, you remember everything: After Skibidi toilets go crazy and take over the hotel, you entered with your squad to save this place from toilet heads. With a kick to your head from a skibidi, you must have passed out. And now, your team has left, probably thinking you are already dead. You are the only one left in this scary place except for all the Skibidis running around. Get up; you must find the exit and escape this hell! Backrooms Shooter is 3D third person shooter game where players escape from a maze-like setting and shoot skibidis coming along the way. Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Left-Click: Shoot Right-Click: Aim Space Key: Jump Left-Shift Key: Run T Key: Slow Motion R Key: Reload G Key: Grenade V Key: Melee Tab Key: Pause Mouse Scroll: Switch Weapons Developer Backrooms Shooter was developed by G55. How to Play Backrooms Shooter Trapped in backrooms, find your way through the exit. Dozens of skibidis are attacking you. Shoot 'em all coming along your way. Check all the rooms to find the exit. Every time you find an exit, you'll level up, unlock new weapons and face with new challenges. Happy flushing! Exit Signs You will encounter green exit indicators as you navigate through rooms. While you feel completely lost in backrooms, locating the exit door will help you out. Follow the signs to find the exit. Shoot the Barrels You'll see barrels in scattered around. They are filled with explosives. Aim for the barrels to eliminate multiple skibidis at once! Change Weapons Use the mouse scroll to change between weapons. Choose your favorite: shotgun, rifle or melees. As you complete levels, new weapons will be unlocked. Other Games Like Backrooms Shooter If you like playing these crazy toilet games, take a look at all the Skibidi Toilet games online. Keep the dom dom yes yes spirit alive on OnlineGames.io! Please share your experience with us in the comments section below. Tips, tricks, and suggestions about the best weapons are very appreciated by other gamers!

title: Futuristic Racer
description: Welcome to the year 2149, where racing isn't just a sport, but a high-stakes, neon-fueled battle for supremacy across the galaxy. Futuristic Racer takes you into a world of adrenaline and luminous cityscapes. If you are a perfectionist who craves some intensity and precision handling, this game is definitely for you. Gameplay Your racing journey starts with a basic car. Complete each level, collect all gems and finish in the top 3 cars. There are 30 levels to beat, each one tougher than the last. Miss a top 3 place or crash out? You'll have to try again. Only the best racers will make it all the way. Controls Futuristic Racer is easy to pick up, but hard to master. Precision timing is everything when it comes to steering and nitro usage. WASD/Arrow Keys: Control the car Spacebar : Activate Nitro (when available) Car Collection & Upgrades As you progress and collect enough gems, you unlock a garage of nice futuristic vehicles. Prices range from affordable (150 gems) to elite (800 gems). Once you've picked your favourite car, spend gems wisely on various upgrades. Engine Upgrades improve speed and acceleration. Nitro Boosts give you more powerful bursts of speed. As expected, Futuristic Racer delivers a fun ride through a high-tech universe. Are you ready to hit the gas and leave the future in your dust? Developer Futuristic Racer was developed by JulGames, creators of fun and fast games for all skill levels. Try More Games Like This If you enjoyed Futuristic Racer , check out more in our Racing Games Online section. If you are looking for your next favorite game, try Mini Cars Racing . This is a fun twist on the genre where the races are just as intense, but the cars are mini-sized this time. It's a great game for fans of intense racing games.

title: Cookie Clicker Pro
description: Love cookies? Want to create the biggest cookie empire the internet has ever seen? Then Cookie Clicker Pro is exactly your game! It's a simple, addictively fun incremental game, packed with sweet strategies. Let’s dive right in! Cookie Clicker Pro is an idle clicker game where players click on the giant cookie to bake, invest in upgrades and buildings, and automate cookie production. The aim is to grow from a small bakery into a massive cookie tycoon with lots of buildings, achievements, upgrades, and many more. Control Use your mouse to play Cookie Clicker Pro. How To Play Cookie Clicker Pro Click on the giant cookie. Every click adds fresh-baked cookies to your stash. You can track the number of your cookies at the top of your screen. You can also read the news ticker with jokes about the impact you created by baking. Once you've clicked enough, buy your first buildings to automate cookie-making. Start with buying cursors, and they will keep clicking for you. Next, employ some Grandmas, they bake slowly but steadily. When you progress enough with cursors and grandmas, you'll open factories, farms, and even cookie mines to pump out mountains of cookies every second. Keep building and watch your cookie empire expand like crazy! Use your cookies to buy upgrades, doubling your baking pow(d)er. Upgrades turn your humble bakery into an unstoppable cookie-producing machine. Game Windows Mastering the game means knowing your windows. Here’s the quick scoop, you can access them at the bottom of your screen: Buildings: Purchase automated structures. Buy individually or bulk-buy with easy tabs. Upgrades: Boost your efficiency; every upgrade makes a specific type of building more productive. Stats: Track your achievements, cookies per second, and Sugar Lumps earned. Settings: Adjust sounds and visuals, and enter your secret bonus codes here. Mini Game: Access the games from the building window. Unlock and play mini-games for extra Sugar Lumps and fun twists that help your empire flourish even faster. Wack the mole, Cookieman trivia, and many more await you. Help: Need guidance? Read the quick tutorials to refresh your knowledge. Grab Golden Cookies Golden Cookies randomly appear on your screen. Spot one? Click fast! These magic cookies give you loads of bonus cookies. They're short-lived, so don't blink! Sugar Lumps Earn special Sugar Lumps by playing mini-games and staying active. Sugar Lumps are essential, they let you purchase Prestige Upgrades that permanently boost cookie production. Want to turbocharge your next playthrough? Save those Sugar Lumps! You can check Eat the Cookie After baking tons of cookies, you’ll unlock the option to ascend. Clicking the Eat the Cookie button resets your game progress. But don’t panic! You’ll earn Prestige points and permanent upgrades that make your next run even faster and bigger. Spend Sugar Lumps to unlock CookieMan's parts, such as heart, arms, and legs. Each provides huge permanent boosts. Strategic ascensions can make every new session super productive. Who's CookieMan in Cookie Clicker Pro? Long ago, there was a magical place called the Great Cookie Realm. Here, cookies grew on trees, milk flowed in rivers, and life was peaceful. CookieMan, a giant protector made from cookie dough, watched over this world. His job was to keep cookie-baking balanced so the magic wouldn’t disappear. One day, players from Cookie Clicker Pro found a portal to this peaceful land. They baked cookies too fast, building factories and machines, which threatened the realm’s magic. CookieMan warned them to slow down, but they didn’t listen. So, CookieMan entered the world of Cookie Clicker Pro to stop the cookie-making madness. You will fight against CookieMan by baking more and more. But be warned, he'll try to stop you! If you'd like to dive deeper into CookieMan lore, grab bonus codes, and learn about other features, read Cookie Clicker Pro Wiki . And if you subscribe to the FreezeNova Blog newsletter, you'll be given exclusive secret bonuses! The Original Cookie Clicking Game In 2013, the very first Cookie Clicker by Orteil, introduced players to a simple but strangely addictive concept of incremental games. In a very simple webpage, you click on a giant cookie, earn a few cookies, and spend them on new ways to produce more cookies. That original HTML game became a phenomenon, setting the stage for the entire “idle clicker” genre. Players loved how easy it was to learn: just keep clicking, and watch your cookie count skyrocket. What's new in Cookie Clicker Pro? Cookie Clicker Pro takes that original idea and cranks it up. Romanian indie game company FreezeNova developed Cookie Clicker Pro to make the cookie-clicking experience deeper and more interactive. This newer version, built in Unity , was released 11 years after the original. It keeps the original’s idea but adds more features, like an improved ascension system and mini-games like trivia, whackamole, and cookie runner, besides better graphics and a richer gameplay experience. Not only do you collect cookies and upgrades, but you also get a rich story involving CookieMan, who protects a magical cookie realm from unbalanced baking. In Cookie Clicker Pro, your progress feels more rewarding, thanks to additional upgrades and the Prestige system. Unlockable cheats give you quick boosts when you need them, and ascension mechanics let you start over with permanent bonuses, pushing you toward even bigger cookie counts. It’s like stepping into a sequel that takes everything you loved about the first Cookie Clicker and adds new layers of strategy, story, and creativity, and fun. Overall, it’s a fresh spin on the idle clicker genre for anyone who wants more variety and depth than the original. Cookieman Runner Mini Game in Cookie Clicker Pro Click and Bake! Overall, Cookie Clicker Pro blends easy clicking fun with strategic depth. From Golden Cookies and Sugar Lumps to quirky mini-games and powerful Prestige upgrades. There’s always something exciting waiting for you.🍪🚀 Technical Info Developer: FreezeNova Release Date: March 18, 2025 Engine: Unity Platform: Web (Desktop, Laptop, Mobile) Genre: Idle Clicker Mode: Single-player Languages: English Controls: Mouse click, Tap (mobile-friendly)

title: Moto X3M Pool Party
description: Welcome to the pool party version of the popular video game series Moto X3M! Moto X3M Pool Party is a 2D bike trial game in which you steer your motorcycle on the platforms around a pool. To reach the final point as quickly as possible, you must dodge all the obstacles on your way by performing stunts! Show your acrobatic movement skills in this bike game. Basics of Moto X3M Pool Party The rules are the same as in the original game Moto X3M. This time you will be near a sandy beach. Your main objective in this driving game is to overcome the obstacles on the road to reach the final zone. To get three stars, you must be quick to get there! The clock will begin counting when you start riding your bike. Strive to perform flipovers, as each stunt you make will earn you 0.5 seconds. Ride through giant green tubes at high speed. Dodge all the spiky globes coming towards you. When a platform throws you into the air, try not to lose your steering control. Get past the big pool under the sun and head to the final point! Reaching the checkpoints will also help you progress on the way to the end. Don't Break Your Neck There are 22 challenging levels in Moto X3M Pool Party. Strive to reach the final zone at each level, avoiding a crash within the shortest time. You must drive your bike at high speed to get three stars. However, you may trip over an obstacle and turn upside down, breaking your neck. You must be cautious while riding the motorcycle. The best strategy to save time is to perform stunts in these conditions. The Driver with Rooster Costume You are already familiar with the orange bike from the previous version of this driving game. Two new exotic motorcycles await you to unlock in this pool twist. There is a yellow cross bike, which you can unlock with 12 stars. On the other hand, collecting 35 stars will allow you to get the driver in a rooster costume. What a consequence: The driver's motorcycle also looks like a rooster! Controls Desktops and Laptops WASD Keys: Steer the Bike Mobile Devices Use the virtual buttons on the screen to steer the bike. Developer MadPuffers developed the Moto X3M Pool Party. Similar Online Games You may also enjoy playing Moto X3M Spooky Land , another version of the Moto X3M series. This time, you will ride your bike on spooky roads with lots of ghosts and pumpkins! View other online bike games on OnlineGames.io for more alternatives. Please share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below. We'd be very happy to hear from you!

title: Bandits Multiplayer PvP
description: There are no rules or order here. All the cowboys on the west side are fighting each other. Bandits Multiplayer PvP is a 3D action game where you, as the most dangerous bandit in the Wild West, try to survive among other bandits across the world or fight against zombies. The only thing you have is a warhorse that is loyal to you. You can't trust anyone. Just you and your horse. How to Play Bandits Multiplayer PvP? As you ride your horse through the sand and debris, you will encounter zombies and cowboys. While fighting your enemies, you can throw arrows or engage in close combat with your sword to eliminate them. Your loyal horse will fight alongside you. Other than him, you are all alone in this chaos. Game Modes There are 6 game modes you can join to play. The conditions of each game mode are different. For example, while you fight with a gun in Pistol DM, you only face zombies in Zombie mode. You can start the game by choosing the one that appeals to you the most. Deathmatch Team Deathmatch Battle Royale Zombie Arcade Pistol DM Game Options in Bandits Multiplayer PvP After you decide which game mode you want to play in, you can determine your game map and other details about the game. There are 3 maps: Wasteland, RedWaste and Dusty. Choose one and start wandering around with your horse. Apart from these, you can also determine the number of kill scores, select the number of players and consider the option of playing on the night map. Customize the Horse As you earn money from the game, you can unlock new horses. The beautiful brown Karma and the black Magnum in its most noble form are waiting for you. Controls Use the WASD keys to move Use the Space key to jump Use the Left Shift to run Use the 1 and 2 number keys to switch weapons Use the Tab key to go to the menu Use the Left mouse button to attack Similar Games You should definitely try Wasteland Shooters , another multiplayer shooting game where you fight against online players in the towns of the West, if you like playing Bandits Multiplayer PvP. Or you may look for other battle games on OnlineGames.io for further options. Stay connected, and you will always have something new and exciting to play!

title: FNF Funk 3D
description: FNF Funk 3D is an arcade game where you must lean on your musical ear to succeed. You will find yourself competing with a girl in music battles. The aim is to let yourself flow with the music’s rhythm. You will see arrow indicators representing the musical notes as the music plays. Tap on the relevant key when the proper time comes and beat the girl in this music game!🎶 How to Play FNF Funk 3D You will see a girl on the stage next to you. Just like you, this girl has an interest in funk music. She loves music very much. You will engage in rhythmic battles with her. But don’t underestimate her. She is a solid competitor with a strong ear. Each arrow symbol on the screen corresponds to a musical note. You must catch these symbols at the right moment to play the music and dance. Click on the proper arrow keys to make progress and beat the girl! You Go First! You will initiate dancing and singing. Pressing the correct key when the symbols show themselves is the primary key to making progress in the dance game. You will see a red & green bar on the top screen. This bar shows you who is winning the battle. If the green color takes up more space, the guy is ahead. Or vice versa. After you, the girl will take the microphone. Enhance Your Eye & Hand Coordination To succeed in the game, you must rely on your focus and eye & hand-coordination abilities. It may take some time to get used to playing the game. But as you practice, the game will enhance the abilities mentioned above. It will also strengthen motor skills. While trying to catch the musical notes, you realize these skills have improved. Controls Use the Arrow keys to control the boy. More Games Like This If you love playing FNF Funk 3D, you may also like Geometry Dash . No matter what you encounter on the platform, you must keep the cube away from the dangers in the game. You have to follow the rhythm in order to get the highest scores. Turn up the volume and trust your ear! For more options, you may look up other online arcade games on OnlineGames.io by following the link. If you have any suggestions or wishlist, don't hesitate to contact us!

title: Subway Idle 3D
description: Subway Idle 3D is an idle game where you try to run an underground network in New York City. You are in charge of all engineering work of this subway system. You will be the head of the construction. Can you imagine how much this system is needed in a crowded city like New York? People expect to be satisfied. Set up a system so that you can increase your profits and people can find what they are looking for in transportation. 🚇 How to Play Subway Idle 3D What you need to do when creating this subway system is to ensure their maintenance by skillfully connecting the railways to each other. In order to earn more money, you have to constantly update and improve this network. The game offers you many options to achieve these. You will start with NYC first, but in later levels, you can unlock other significant cities from the map section. When you level up, don't forget to get the leveling reward from the level bar at the top. You can also view how much cash and gems you have among the icons at the top screen. You can view your tasks by coming to the Missions icon and get rewards for completing them. When you reach the required levels, you can unlock other big cities from the Map section and install underground networks there. Golden Metros will pass through the railways from time to time. You can earn good money by clicking on them. Additionally, in order not to lose your game data, you can protect your progress by entering the level code in the game in the Code section. Get More Passengers The more passengers you carry, the more money you earn. Therefore, investing in the subway will be the best method. It is important to develop existing railways, but in order to grow, you also need to bring new subway lines to the city. Satisfying the passengers will be your most important job. Therefore, you should not allow delays and slowdowns. Subway Lines You will see 3 different sections at the bottom of the game screen. The last "Tracks" section allows you to increase your subway lines. From here, you will add new lines to the underground system. But just adding a line is not enough. It would also be a good move to increase the number of subways and stations following this route. Such actions soar your income considerably. Upgrade Your Station In addition to adding new lines to your system, updating the amount of money you will earn in the "Price" section and increasing the speed of your metros in the "Speed" section are also among the best strategies. Controls Simply use your mouse to create your subway system. Explore Other Idle Games Try Idle Dev Startup if you found Subway Idle 3D enjoyable. Playing as a software developer looking to create and sell apps in order to generate money is the focus of this idle clicker game. There will be no turning back from this financial venture. This means that as the business grows, you will need to be patient. Or, you may look for other free idle games on OnlineGames.io for further options. title: Army Combat
description: Whether you prefer defending or attacking, you can do both here! Army Combat is a 3D action game where you will engage with many trained soldiers. They are not like amateur fighters. They go all the way. Decide whether you will be the attacker or the defender. Go to the battlefield in the shooting game with your elite weapons! How to Play Army Combat The first thing to do is to determine whether you want to be the defender or the attacker. Make your selections from the main menu as you wish. You can also set the volume and mouse sensibility here. You will be alone on the battlefield. So, you must calculate every movement. Since there will be no one to watch your back. Moreover, your opponents are highly trained. They can be merciless. Try to eliminate all of them one by one by moving strategically. The more you eliminate, the higher the score you get! And for your information, if you go to the whitish areas, you will soon lose your life in the Defend mode. Try to stay in colored areas. Trained Soldiers Your opponents are members of a special team. They have been educated in private. They are ready for any attack. However, you are at least as experienced as them. The problem is that they outnumber you. Get in close to them slowly. Bring them down sneakily. Use your sniper rifle to your advantage when playing as an attacker. It will allow you to shoot them from afar without getting hurt in close combat. No Need to Rush! You will be in a very large forested area. It means there are lots of trees, bushes and army cars near you. Covering yourself with them before acting will greatly benefit you, especially in the Defender mode. Most probably, they will not be alone when attacking you. Don’t rush to them. Track the soldiers by monitoring the red arrow on top of them. Eliminate them individually. You will have many weapon options, from a shotgun to a sniper rifle. Move by picking up the most convenient weapon in this action game. Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Left-Click: Fire Right-Click: Aim Spacebar: Jump 1-6 Number Keys/Scroll Wheel: Switch Weapons Tab: Pause CTRL: Lean Left-Shift: Run Developer FreezeNova developed the Army Combat. Discover Other Games You may be interested in Subway Clash 2 , as well. You will be the commander of your team in the multiplayer game. Go through the labyrinthine tunnels. Catch your enemies at their most vulnerable. To discover other online shooting games , you may visit the related game tag. Don’t forget to bookmark this website to easily come back! You can continue playing where you left off whenever you want.

title: Word Connect
description: Word Connect is an online word-puzzle game where you try to guess words. Use your mind to create meaningful words and drag and drop the letters on the board. Fill in all the blank areas to get the highest scores in each level. Let’s see who is the real bookworm among us! 🔠 Controls Drag and Drop: Drag the letters to create a word. How to Play Word Connect Your main goal in this Scrabble-inspired puzzle game is to find the relevant words by using the given letters. Hold down the mouse button and combine the letters to form a meaningful word. However, keep in mind that you can not create a word with the letters that are not listed. For example, there are E, C, K, R, S, and A letters on the board. You cannot write “Say”, as there is no Y letter on the list. Stimulate Your Brain 🧠 You will be given a few letters on the game screen. Use these letters to form words that can fit into the blank areas. Try to guess the words according to the listed letters and the number of white blocks. Stimulate your brain for logical thinking and your vocabulary. As you make progress, you need to find much more complicated words! Use Hint, Letter and Word 👀 Having trouble finding the right word? Don’t worry! You have limited Hint, Word and Letter options to help you find the necessary words. The “ Hint ” option gives you a description for the related word, just like Tabu. And, you need to figure out the word by the description. The “ Letter ” section gives you one of the letters in a specific word. Finally, the “ Word ” option opens a complete world that is on the board. Developer Freezenova developed Word Connect. What is Next? If you enjoy playing Word Connect, you may also give Skribblio a chance! In the game, you need to choose a word and draw it on the board. Let other players guess the world. For more options, check out our extended selection of online puzzle games using the link!

title: Logistics Inc
description: Ever dreamed of turning a tiny delivery startup into a globe-spanning shipping empire? Logistics Inc lets you do just that, right in your browser. Logistic Inc is an online idle game where you begin with only five employees, ten bucks in the bank, and a single bicycle courier. From there, every hire, upgrade, and marketing push is up to you. Juggle staff recruitment, Research & Development breakthroughs, marketing campaigns, and greasy-handed mechanics while the orders keep rolling in. It's the kind of management simulation game that feels almost like running a real business. Jump in for a quick coffee-break click-fest, and the next minute you'll find yourself settled in for a full strategy session. This free online game offers a rich, in-depth management experience that should be taught and played in business schools. Controls Mouse / Touch: Click or tap buttons to play How to Play Logistics Inc Your first screen shows a single bicycle line with zero staff assigned, five fresh employees waiting in the wings, and a ten-dollar note in your pocket. Click the orange "BUY 1" button beside the bike row to purchase that initial ride. The moment you do, orders start to appear in the left-hand column, and the orange bar in the Status cell fills up with every completed delivery. Next, hit the plus sign in the Staff column to assign at least one worker to the bike. A staffed vehicle actually moves; an empty one just sits in the depot looking pretty. Expand the Fleet Bikes alone won't build an empire, so reinvest your earnings in new vehicle tiers. After buying 5 of a vehicle type, the next type unlocks. Vans, trucks, planes, and eventually ships appear. Buy at least one unit of a vehicle. Some vehicles, like planes and ships, require more than one worker to operate. Assign your workers, and watch the orders get completed. Remember that higher-tier vehicles accept bigger orders but drain more cash up front, so pace your purchases with your hiring rate. Manage Research and Development Staff are the game's true currency, and you'll juggle them constantly. Every employee you assign to a vehicle speeds up its order cycle, while those placed in departments unlock vital support systems. Early on, drop a worker into the HR panel. HR hires new staff automatically. Slower than you might like, but entirely free. When the orange timer under "STAFF RECRUIT" hits zero, a new recruit walks through the door. Decide where they'll work next. Don't leave any workers unassigned. If growth feels too slow, head into the Research & Development tree and increase the staff in the RD center to unlock the Contractors upgrade. Contractors allow you to trade cash for instant personnel. But they are not cheap! R&D is where the real snowball begins that deals with efficiencies that slash costs, speed up HR, and boost marketing power. Staff assigned here don't produce money directly, but every node they complete multiplies future income. It's usually smart to keep at least a small permanent team in R&D; the earlier you grab upgrades like Efficiency or Improved HR, the faster every other action in the game becomes. Hire Marketing Gurus Idle trucks mean lost profits, and the Marketing department makes sure that never happens. Open the Marketing Strategy window and drag staff into any of the colored bars representing bikes, vans, trucks, planes, or ships. Each marketing guru adds the order bonus written on the bar, and a running tally in the right-hand panel shows exactly what you're paying per staff member to double their output. Spreading a few people across multiple product lines keeps incoming orders balanced. Keep the Wheels Turning Vehicles wear down over time, and a sluggish fleet will choke profits. After hiring enough workers in the R&D center, you'll unlock Vehicle Maintenance. Here, hire mechanics by clicking plus signs beside empty slots. Each ride shows a maintenance fraction, bringing it to the maximum, and its speed instantly jumps to 100 percent. The Upskill buttons beside your mechanics let you train your mechanics to deal with more advanced vehicles. A bike mechanic cannot be tasked with planes without any training. They must be upskilled. But don't worry, training takes only a few seconds. An Idle Tycoon Business As revenues climb, swap the purchase multiplier at the top of the main board from x1 to x10 or MAX to buy vehicles in bulk. Your ultimate endgame is a perfectly balanced dashboard: zero idle staff, queues brimming with orders, every wrench icon bright green, and a money counter that refuses to stop spinning. Once you've hit that rhythm, the only question left is how many zeros you want on your company valuation. Developer Logistics Inc. is crafted by Kodiqi. More Online Management Games Feel like testing your inner CEO further? Jump into Idle Startup Tycoon , another free browser game where production lines, research labs, and shipment routes need your expert touch. It shares the same quick-click upgrades and money-management loops that make Logistics Inc. Have fun growing your empire, and don't forget to drop a comment down below if your shipping operation reaches billionaire status!

title: Drift Hunters 2

But what about the consequences, such as potential injuries, financial costs, or safety concerns? Not all of us have the money, courage or a safe environment to engage in highly dangerous extreme sports. But does that mean you won't feel that thrill ever? No, we don't think so. This is why we have brought the most exciting drift game to your door. Meet Drift Hunters 2, the second game of the fascinating game sequel. With enhanced graphics and more in-depth tuning, you will also be able to hunt for the highest drift scores. If you are ready, let's get into details! What is Drift Hunters 2? Drift Hunters 2 is a web-based driving game with premium 3D graphics and realistic physics. The game starts with a garage scene where you pick up your car, like in almost every other driving game. However, once you explore the vast number of vehicles, tuning, and map options, it will take you over for hours. 15 unique tracks, 26 epic cars in the garage and a very detailed tuning section are some of the awesome features the game offers. If you are familiar with the game and searching for a comprehensive guide on Drift Hunters 2 details, tricks and cheats, we covered all the aspects of the game, ranging from cheat codes, money hacks and garage options. How to Play Drift Hunters 2? You will start with a car similar to the Toyota Trueno (AE86) and 25K in your account at the beginning. You can use the money to buy a higher-performance car or tune the one you have. To see your options, head over to the cars section from the main menu. Tune your car as you like, pick a map and start drifting on the roads. You can view a list of garage and tuning options, maps and other features below. Tuning Options When you select the car, click on the tuning section. The tuning and customization section comprises 5 departments: Performance, stance, body paint, rims paint and wheels. Car Performance Upgrade your parts to experience the thrill on the track more. In the performance part, you can improve the most critical parts of your car: engine, turbo, gearbox, weight, suspension and brakes. Each has a vital role in performing a decent drift. You can see indicators of how much of the car's power, max speed, and shift time will change with each upgrade. So, you get to know exactly what you pay for. You can upgrade each part up to 4th level. These levels are stock, street, racing and pro, respectively. Some cars in the garage come with parts higher than the stock level. This means you can save tuning money by buying a better car. For example, R35 has a turbo on the 3rd level from the garage. A good option for those seeking power and speed in a car. Stance Shifting the weight on time is critical in drifting. So, adjusting the stance of a car will improve your performance in the game. For example, raise the rear height to gain more Wall Tap bonuses. Experiment with the following measures and angles. If you're wondering what is the best tuning in Drift Hunters , read the full guide on Drift Hunters . Lower offset levels, negative camber , and higher heights are usually favored in drifting settings. Front height Front camber Front offset Rear height Rear camber Rear offset Body and Rims Paint You may have customized a few cars in online games before. But we are sure you didn't have these many options. Choose a color for your car using the color picker with brightness and shadow options. Apply a glossy, metallic, matte or chromatic coat on top of that. Your vehicle will look gorgeous. It's not just the body. You can also paint rims and make them shine. Wheels The final part of the tuning section is the wheels. Choose rims that suit your car's style and your own. Sixteen different metallic rims are available. Drift Hunters Cars We already mentioned you could find epic cars in this game, but what are they, and which real-life car brands do they resemble? Here are the answers: AE86 - (Toyota Trueno GT-APEX) S30Z - (Datsun 240Z) S13 - (Nissan 240SX/180SX) E30 - (BMW E30 M3) GR - (Subaru Impreza WRX) EVO - (Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution VIII) E36 - (BMW E36 M3) 86 - (Toyota GT86) s2000 - (Honda S2000 AP1) S14 - (Nissan Silvia 240SX/200SX) E46 - (BMW E46 M3) S15 - (Nissan Silvia S15) G35 - (Infiniti G35 Coupé) FD3 - (Mazda RX-7 FD Type R FD3S) FRS - (Ford Fiesta ST) Z370 - (Nissan 370Z Coupé) JZ90 - (Toyota Supra MKIV – JZA80) E82 - (BMW 1M Coupé) CLA - (Mercedes Benz AMG CLA 45) GS - (Lexus GS) R34 - (Nissan Skyline R34 GT-R) GT500 - (Ford Mustang GT Fastback) SXT - (Dodge Challenger SRT Hellcat) F82 - (BMW 3-Series) R35 - (Nissan GTR) 993 - (RWB Porsche 911 993 GT) The Best Cars in Drift Hunters However, as gamers who spent many hours playing Drift Hunters 2, we decided to take it to the next level. We have calculated an index using the car's power, weight, max speed, score multiplier and price. The results are surprising. We have created a 2 list in terms of car performance solely and cost efficiency. When we took only the performance indicators into account, 5 high-performance cars stand out. Among these 5, the Porsche 993 outshines all cars with its low weight, engine power and acceleration speed. High-Performance Cars in Drift Hunters 2 Car Model Score MP Power(hp) Weight(kg) Max Speed(km/h) Price 993 3 440 1300 270 143,000 R35 3 506 1680 270 120,000 F82 2.8 485 1530 260 115,000 SXT 2.5 550 1650 270 95,000 FRS 2.1 274 1150 240 43,000 On the other hand, this list of cost-efficient cars proves that you don't need to spend thousands to perform a decent drift. You can have a good, lightweight car even with the initial 25K in your account. The Honda S2000 wins this race with its max speed power and low price. Here is a list of the most cost-effective cars worth every penny you pay. Cost-Effective Cars in Drift Hunters 2 Car Model Score MP Power(hp) Weight(kg) Max Speed(km/h) Price S2000 1.7 280 1240 255 20,000 86 1.6 275 1265 240 23,000 E36 1.5 270 1320 250 20,000 S30Z 1 215 1075 210 12,000 Drift Hunters 2 Tracks The game features 15 amazing tracks with unique views. We have divided tracks into 3 parts: playground, racetrack and touge. Playgrounds Playgrounds usually are flat surfaces with open fields where you can freely drive and drift. Perfect for training and experimenting with game physics. Among 5 playground maps, Countryside is the most convenient for a beginner. Nevada Countryside Ocean City City Streets Waterfront Racetracks Racetracks can be considered as 2nd level difficulty. You can come across a lot of hills and sharp turns on racetracks. 8 different racetracks are available in Drift Hunters 2; our favorite is definitely the slippery Icefield. Container Yard Fukushima Hills Karting Loop Icefield New Zealand Ohio Spain Green Stone Touge Touge is a Japanese term for passing a mountain. These roads are often narrow and created with S bends in a forest. Forest tracks are perfect for professional drifters seeking an extreme thrill. Akagi is the most difficult track in Drift Hunters according to many drifters. Fog Mountain Akagi Other Settings To have a captivating gaming experience, having the ideal settings is essential. Before hitting the curvy roads, make your decisions on gearbox, graphics and volume. Gearbox: You can switch between manual and automatic gearbox. While professional drifters always choose the manual, it's completely okay to prefer casually hanging out with an automatic gearbox. Volume: Drift Hunters 2 has great sound effects where you can enjoy the squeezing sounds of drifting, engine throttle, crashes and many more. You can max the volume and enjoy the sounds fully. Or lower the volume so that you can also hear the music playing on your PC. Graphics: This one is highly critical for a smooth experience. You can choose between 3 levels of graphics: Low, medium and high. We recommend adjusting this setting according to your CPU, graphic card performance and network speed. If highly detailed graphics cause hiccups in your device, try a low quality visuals to drift smoothly. C: Change the camera view Left-Shift: Gear up Left-Ctrl: Gear down Alt Gr: To switch rear gear I: Stop the engine Use your cursor to navigate in the menu Drift Hunters 2 Sum Up Drift Hunters 2 is a fascinating online game with a number of options and experiences it provides. title: Stunt Simulator
description: Stunt Simulator is the perfect game for racing and drifting. The cars are designed with realistic controls that will captivate you even if you are a beginner. The more speed you have, the more amazing drift you make and score big number. We have preapared 2 maps to show off your driving skills. title: Vex 9
description: In Vex 9 , all you need to do is run, jump, and survive tricky and challenging levels! It’s fast, cool, and full of action. It is a modern parkour game if you’d like. Test your reflexes, move carefully, and show your skills as you explore new routes full of traps and not-so-pleasant surprises. Ready to complete every level and become a pro? Let’s go! Game Overview Vex 9 is an exciting stickman parkour adventure game where you jump, slide, and climb through dangerous obstacle courses. Each level, called an Act , brings new traps, spikes, and moving blocks that test your timing and speed. Your goal is to reach the end of every level without falling into traps or getting hit. It’s a fun mix of quick thinking and skillful moves! How to Play Vex 9? The gameplay is simple: move your stickman hero through levels full of traps and obstacles. Jump over spikes, slide under walls, and climb walls to reach the finish. The faster you finish, the better your score! Get ready to jump into action! Move: WASD / ⬅️⬆️⬇️➡️ Game Modes Practice Mode Practice Mode is a great way to play without pressure and learn all the cool moves. You can explore random levels, test tricks, and get better at jumping, sliding, and climbing. It’s also an easy way to collect lots of coins while you practice, so you can get rich and ready for the real challenges! Good to Know! Get rich! During your parkour adventure, try to collect as many coins as possible. If you’re in for a rich thrill, you can win lots in Practice Mode or complete daily tasks to earn a good amount of money. Parkour in style: you have plenty of skins, so use your coins to unlock them all and play in style. Add that little extra fun to your adventure. You can choose from simple, colorful stickmen, cowboys, tigers, and even Italian Brainrot characters. FAQs Will my progress be saved? Yes! The game saves your progress, so you can come back later and keep playing where you stopped. All your coins and skins are also safe, so you won’t lose any of your rewards or cool looks. What if I get stuck on a level? No worries! You can restart the level anytime or switch to Practice Mode to train and learn cool new tricks. Similar Games If you love the fun challenges in Vex 9 , try OvO Online . It is another cool parkour-type game with a clean design, quick timing, and really interesting parkour moves that make every run thrilling and challenging. You can also customize your character, which makes it even cooler. Can you master it?

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 6: Fairy Tales
description: Fireboy and Watergirl 6: Fairy Tales takes you on another co-op adventure with the cute elemental duo, Fireboy and Watergirl. In this puzzle-platformer game, you’ll guide two characters through mysterious temples filled with tricky puzzles and obstacles. Plot twist: magical fairies join the quest to assist the duo in navigating through increasingly complex challenges. Drag sparkling fairies to push buttons use levers and more. Fireboy and Watergirl 6 is packed with teamwork-based gameplay, where two charachters unique abilities are key to solving each level. Play solo or grab a friend to enjoy this classic game right here on OnlineGames.io. Remember, teamwork makes the dream work! Controls Computer: Use the arrow keys to control Fireboy. Use the W, A, S, D keys to control Watergirl. Click and drag to direct fairies when needed. Smartphone: Use the on-screen buttons to control Fireboy and Watergirl. Tap and drag to move the fairies. How to Play Fireboy and Watergirl 6: Fairy Tales In Fireboy and Watergirl 6: Fairy Tales, co-operative playing is essential. Here’s a step-by-step guide to help you get started: Fireboy is immune to fire and lava, while Watergirl can handle water puddles with ease. However, neither can step on green goo, so plan your movements carefully. The magical fairies can move platforms, push buttons, or activate mechanisms. Drag them to the required spots to aid Fireboy and Watergirl. However, in some cases, you need to find the fairy with the correct color to activate mechanisms. Your aim is to collect all the red and blue gems and reach the exit gates. Blue (Watergirl's) and red (Fireboy's) gems are not only fun to grab but are also key to completing the levels with full success. Meanwhile, if you'd like to play casual and not interested in full success, you can collect only the white gems that are necessary to unlock new levels. So, go on and solve puzzles and unlock doors to lead the characters to their respective exits. Timing and coordination are crucial for success. The Magic of the Fairies A new twist in this sixth and last installment is the introduction of fairies. These glowing companions are more than just decorative—they’re your problem solvers. Fairies can: Move Platforms: Drag them to lift or lower platforms for better access. Push Buttons: Assign a fairy to hold down a button while you move your characters to new areas. Unlock New Paths: Direct them by dragging to activate levers or switches to create pathways. These fairies make gameplay more fun making the duo's adventures are like real Fairy Tales. Just when they don't think it's impossible for them to reach the exit gates, a fairy touch resolves their problem. How magical is that? Who Created Fireboy and Watergirl 6: Fairy Tales? This installment of the beloved Fireboy and Watergirl series was developed by Oslo Albet, a name well-known for crafting engaging co-op puzzle games. If you’re a fan of this series, you can explore all the previous titles for free on OnlineGames.io. Simply visit the Co-op Games Online page or type "Fireboy" in the search bar to access the entire collection. Looking for a recommendation? Play Fireboy and Watergirl 5: Elements —a thrilling game that combines the best features of the first four installments, offering a well-rounded mix of puzzles, challenges, and environments. It's the perfect warm-up before diving into Fairy Tales! Compatibility You can play Fireboy and Watergirl 6: Fairy Tales on: Desktops Laptops Chromebooks Android iOS

title: Stunt Simulator 2

Stunt Simulator 2 is a 3D driving game that provides free access to many kinds of cars. Choose the car you favor most and set for the road to perform stunts. title: Basketball Slam Dunk
description: The countdown has begun! Basketball Slam Dunk is a retro-styled web basketball game that you can play against a computer or against a friend. Be careful; arms will fly in the air! Your arms and your opponent’s arms can intertwine, and this may create confusion. Keep all eyes open. How to play Basketball Slam Dunk? 1 Player Controls: Use the W key to throw the ball Use the A key to move left Use the D key to move right 2 Player Controls: Use the Up Arrow key to throw the ball Use the Left Arrow key to move left Use the Right Arrow key to move right Tips and Tricks For a more convenient and enjoyable gaming experience, paying attention to a few things may be helpful. Adjusting the distance before trying to score a basket because the ball can go very fast, exceeding the hoop. Do not give up early. You can still take the ball from the opponent’s hand even when you are both on your basket hoop. You can do this even when you are jumping and in the air. Do not let the ball smash to the bucket harshly. It can hit the basket hard and come back. You may end up losing the chance while your opponent comes after you. What is Basketball Slam Dunk? Basketball Slam Dunk is a free 2D web browser scoring game you can play without downloading. You are supposed to make a scoring shot when a player leaps up and rams the ball into the hoop in this game. How to do a slam dunk in the Basketball Slam Dunk? Grab the ball from your opponent’s hand and go directly to their hoop. The best option is to throw the ball by keeping your distance without getting too close to the basketball hoop. Otherwise, you may lose your chance to dunk the ball. When will the game end? Hurry up! Whoever manages to complete their score of 3 will be the winner of the game. Where can I play the Basketball Slam Dunk? Basketball Slam Dunk is one of the best basketball web browser games with pixel graphics. You can freely enjoy it on OnlineGames.io. Is it playable on Chromebook? Yes, you can play the game on your Chromebook easily.
