title: Poly Racing Cars
description: Low poly is the new pixel! For the fans of these sharp and cornered designs, we have the perfect car game that you can design your own racetracks: Poly Racing Cars is a 3D racing game with diverse player settings that cater to all kinds of racing gamers. There are multiple modes you can enjoy. Race on ready-made tracks against AI opponents or take on the clock in time trials. You can also play in split-screen mode with a friend on the same device. For even more excitement, an online multiplayer mode is available where up to 8 players can race together on the same track. On top of everything, you can do all these on a unique track you designed or use pre-made tracks. Controls Car Racing Controls Move Forward: Use the W or Up arrow key Move Backward/Brake: Use the S or Down arrow key Turn Left: Use the A or Left arrow key Turn Right: Use the D or Right arrow key Split-Screen Two-Player Mode Controls Player 1: Arrow keys Player 2: WASD keys Track Editor Controls Right Click: Place an item Left Click: Drag an item How to Play Poly Racing Cars The game’s track editor allows you to design and save your own racetracks. Click on the track editor in the main menu, then place the roads and set the curves. You can add tents, grandstands or trees to make your track more visually appealing. Challenge your friends to see who performs best on your custom design. Feeling extra tricky? Add as many twists and turns as you want! If you’d instead jump straight into the action, select a pre-made track. You can race against AI opponents or try to beat the clock in a time trial. The first lap of Time Trial mode is the warm up session where you accustom to the track. After finishing the first lap, the clock starts ticking. You can also play Poly Cars Racing in 2-player mode. Race head-to-head with a friend in split-screen mode. This feature allows you to compete on the same screen, with each player controlling their car using separate controls, WASD or arrow keys. If you choose online multiplayer mode, you can race with up to 8 players in a single room. Compete against other players from around the world in high-speed online matches. You can create your own room, set the number of laps and even car colors, and invite friends for a private race. Game Features Low poly track editor and 3 slots to save your tracks 3 customizable sports car race against AI Time trial mode Online multiplayer rooms Local 2 player in split screen mode Developer FreezeNova developed Poly Racing Cars. More Games Like This If you love Poly Racing Cars, you might also enjoy games like Fort Drifter . The game offers great maps that you can customize by adding extra obstacles. The goal is to pull off stunts like drifts, spins, jumps and barrel rolls; follow the link and play it online now!

title: Motorbike Stunt Simulator
description: Motorbike Stunt Simulator is a free 3D motorcycle game where you can explore dynamic stunt maps and perform the craziest and impossible tricks with your motorbike. Choose from four exciting stunt arenas , each filled with ramps, loops, obstacles or challenging courses. Master your bike's controls and rack up your stunt score by nailing the craziest flips, spins, and jumps. Controls WASD / Arrow Keys: Drive the bike Spacebar : Handbrake Shift : Activate boost C : Switch camera views R : Reset scene G : Reset your bike E : Turn on police lights X : Hide instructions Tab : Return to main menu Tip: Want to switch bikes? Press the number keys (1–8) on your keyboard to choose from 8 different motorbike models, including a police motorcycle! Pick the one that suits your style best! Are you ready to ride your bike and become the king of the stunt world? You May Also Like Motorbike Stunt Simulator is the ultimate free online stunt simulator game for motorcycle lovers. If you enjoy this adrenaline-filled rides, we highly recommend trying another thrilling challenge on two wheels-this time on a BMX bike: Obby Bike Trials . Want to compete and show off your riding skills with other players? Go to the Multiplayer page, where you'll find a community of stunt fans just like you, ready to ride and dominate the leaderboard.

title: Taxi Driver
description: We're going back to the 80s! We were inspired by Taxi Driver, the most successful movie of your parents' time, and now we are here. Taxi Driver is a 2D driving game where you steer a yellow cab. You will get your customers and take them wherever they want to go with this cab. The taxi's engine's sound offers a lively gaming experience. How to Play Taxi Driver? Taxi Driver is a game where your primary duty is picking up passengers and delivering them safely to their desired destination. It sounds easy, but it will take a lot of work. Because you are in a metropolitan city and traffic is constantly moving. And most drivers in the city are highly impatient. If you make them wait even for 1 second, you will be exposed to their ugly horns. You will receive directions on where you need to go from the yellow arrows that appear at the top of the screen. Suppose you do not park the taxi in the order the yellow arrow indicates when it arrives at the parking area. In that case, the mission will not be completed. You must try to fulfill your duty without hitting any cars. You lose stars with each hit, and the game is over when you lose all 3 stars. And, of course, you shouldn't crush your customers either. If you hurt your customer, the game is over. You will serve two customers at each level. And there are 20 challenging levels. Perks of Playing Taxi Driver You will encounter many obstacles along the way. Overcoming these obstacles will directly help you improve your attention skills and reflexes . You will proceed by following the yellow arrows. Sometimes, there will be sudden turns and narrow streets. This is how you improve your hand-eye coordination. From time to time, you may be exposed to careless maneuvers by other drivers. Anticipating these will prevent any collision. This increases your processing speed. Is Taxi Driver playable on Chromebooks? Yes, Taxi Driver is accessible on Android and IOS mobile devices, Chromebooks, tablets and computers if proper internet is provided. You are free to experience the game in whichever options you want. Controls Use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys to steer the yellow cab. You May Also Like If you like playing Taxi Driver, you may try driving a school bus . Or you can look for other driving games io . You can find tons of options on OnlineGames.io stay tuned for new releases and upgrades.

title: Obby & Dead River
description: Obby & Dead River is an online adventure game in Roblox style, where you are a ship captain. There is a long river called Dead River ahead of you. Follow this river by steering your ship’s wheel, explore the castles and collect valuable items on the way. However, keep in mind that there are dangerous monsters and pirates along the river. This journey will not be that easy. Overcome challenging obstacles, take the farthest route and reach the boss at the end of the Dead River! ⛵ Controls WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump/Control the Ship Left-Shift: Accelerate TAB: Open Inventory P: Pause E: Buy Items Obby & Dead River Overview Ready to sail in the Dead River? As a ship captain, you are always face-to-face with danger. But this adventure is out of the ordinary. Start by getting coal for your ship, take control of it by pressing the Spacebar, and sail in the Dead River. You need to travel along the river, stop at certain points along the way to collect treasure and find things you can use as coal to power the ship. Your main goal is to survive the attacks of monsters and reach the end of the river to face the Boss. Visit Castle’s Stores 🏰 There are stores in any castle you reach. You can put pirates in jail in the Sheriff's, trade valuable items in the Trading Hut, and get coal to power your ship in the General Store. You can also get yourself health pots or bandages from the Hospital to increase your Obby character’s health bar. As you make progress and collect sufficient amounts of money, you can get a gun and ammunition from the Gun Store. Put Pirates in Jail ☠ Along the journey, zombies and pirates try to attack you when you are out of your ship. You need to eliminate them before they drop your health bar to zero. Put their bodies in your bag as they will be useful to you. You can use the zombies as coal power for your ship. On the other hand, Sheriffs reward you with money when you put a pirate in jail. You will need money to buy weapons and ammunition to fight back powerfully against the monsters and pirates! Tips & Tricks for Obby and Dead River 🚢 Always carry coal. Your ship eats coal like cookies. 🏴‍☠️ Explore every building along the journey. Treasures love hiding. 🪙 Jail pirates for money. Free cash delivery service. 🧟 Zombies make great fuel. Weird but useful. ☠️ Do not rush blindly. Surprise monsters love fast captains. Developer Mirra Games developed Obby & Dead River More Games Like This If you enjoy playing Obby & Dead River , you may also try playing Obby Rainbow Tower ! Create your Roblox-like character and head to the winter-themed tower by overcoming obstacles on the way. For additional options, you are always welcome to visit our Obby Games Online category. Keep coming back to discover newly added games!

title: Bubble Game 3
description: Bubble Game 3 is an online arcade game where you use a cannon to shoot bubbles. Match three or more bubbles of the same color to clear them, just like in classic Bubble Shooter. Try to clear as many bubbles as you can before they reach the bottom. Don’t forget to share your best scores in the comments! Controls Mouse: Move the Cannon Left Mouse Button: Shoot On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to interact. Bubble Game 3 Overview To play Bubble Game 3, aim and shoot bubbles from the cannon to match at least three of the same color. When you make a match, the bubbles burst and disappear. The goal is to clear all the bubbles from the screen by making these matches. Watch out—if you miss, all the bubbles move down. The game ends if any bubbles reach the bottom. Use the Walls If you need to reach hard-to-get or hidden bubbles, try bouncing your shots off the side walls. This lets you hit bubbles you can’t reach directly. Ricocheting your shots helps you clear the screen faster and find better angles. Use the arrow sign to see where your shot will go. Create Strategic Groups The game is over if any bubbles reach the bottom of the screen. To make space quickly, aim for the top clusters to pop or drop big groups of bubbles. Try to make smart matches to clear space before the bubbles get too low. Always look at the next bubble’s color so you can plan your moves. Tips & Tricks for Bubble Game 3 🎯 Aim carefully to maximize bounce shots. 💡 Clear top clusters to trigger massive drops. 🎨 Match colors strategically, avoid random shooting. 🧱 Use walls for angled shots and combos. 🧐 Prioritize difficult colors before they accumulate. Developer Bubble Game 3 is developed by Agame. You May Also Like Did you have fun with Bubble Game 3 ? Give Gummy Blocks a try—you fill rows or columns with candies to clear them. For even more games, visit our Puzzle Games Online section. Come back often to find new games to play.

title: Papa's Hot Doggeria
description: Papa’s Hot Doggeria is a time management game where serving the perfect hot dog combo is your mission. As the new hot dog vendor in the stadium, you’ll manage multiple stations, from grilling sausages to filling popcorn bags and soda cups. Every customer brings unique preferences, and it’s up to you to keep them happy while unlocking new ingredients, recipes, and challenges. Ready to prove you can handle the heat? Let’s start! Controls Use your mouse to interact with each station and prepare orders. Drag ingredients , flip sausages, and assemble combos with precision. How to Play Papa’s Hot Doggeria Start by noting down each customer’s detailed order from the order station. In grill station, drag the requested sausage (like Hot Dog, Italian Sausage, or Veggie Dog) onto the grill. Monitor the cooking timer, flip the sausage halfway, and grill it evenly. Each sausage has a unique cooking time, so keep an eye on the grill! Select the requested bun (such as Pretzel or Pumpernickel) and drag the sausage onto it. Learn the cooking times for each sausage to avoid overcooking or burning. Move on to build station and add toppings like ketchup, mustard, or onions in the right order. Pay attention to toppings and presentation for higher tips. Customers need a snack while watching the games in the stadium. So move on to pop station and fill a bag with popcorn, choosing from Buttered, Cheddar Corn, or Cotton Puffs. Pour the requested soda into the correct cup size (Small, Medium, or Large). Deliver the completed order to the customer and aim for high scores based on accuracy and timing. The higher the scores, the better tips you get. Using your tips, invest in tools to speed up cooking or decorate your stand to attract more customers. Expand The Menu The game features a rich variety of ingredients and upgrades that unlock as you level up: Sausages: Start with a classic Hot Dog and unlock premium options like Italian Sausage, Kielbasa, and Cheddarwurst. Each type adds a unique flavor and challenge to your grilling skills. Buns: Begin with Regular Buns and expand your menu with Pretzel Buns, Hoagie Rolls, and seasonal specialties like Lunar Loaf or Fruitcake Buns. Soft Drinks: Serve refreshing sodas such as Fizzo, Diet Fizzo, and exotic flavors like Tangerine Pop and Purple Burple. Popcorn: Start with Buttered Popcorn and upgrade to fun varieties like Candy Jack, Cinnamon Swirl, and Chocolate Popcorn. Every new ingredient adds more complexity to orders, so stay sharp! Unlock limited-time items during events like Halloween and Thanksgiving to add variety to your menu. Developer Papa’s Hot Doggeria is developed by Flipline Studios, known for their fun and addictive time-management games. If you enjoy managing fast-paced orders, check out another Flipline Studios title like Papa’s Cheeseria . All Papa's Games feature similar gameplay with unique twists!

title: Mr Racer
description: Maria invites you to be the Mr Racer ! Watch her announcements. Mr Racer is a 3D racing game where you can participate in various races with multiple game modes. Choose the game mode you want to play and set off in flowing traffic! Master steering your car without crashing with any other vehicles on the way. Earn money from the races to unlock new cars in this driving game! Or you can upgrade the vehicles you own. Controls Desktops and Laptops W/Up Arrow Key: Accelerate S/Down Arrow Key: Brake A/Left Arrow Key: Steer Left D/Right Arrow Key: Steer Right H: Horn ESC: Pause Mobile Devices Use the virtual buttons on the screen to control the car. Overview of Mr Racer Your assistant Maria will welcome you when you enter the game. She will guide you throughout the races. There are six different game modes in this racing game. And each of the modes offers you a different kind of gaming experience. Your job? Drive your car in various locations and win the races you participate in. The races will test your driving skills to the utmost! You will earn money in every race in which you come first. Use them to unlock new powerful sports vehicles or upgrade the ones you have. Game Modes: Challenge or Chase? This driving game offers you six unique game modes. Each comes with different purposes. However, note that you must unlock the Chase and Time Trial mode. We will leave you brief information about them below! Challenge: There are 100 levels to accomplish. You must reach the finish line in time. Career Race: You will race with master racers. This game mode has three categories: Beginner, Intermediate, Pro, Master and Legend. Endless: You can perform close overtakes like you do in Highway Traffic in the Endless Mode! Free Ride: Feel free to drive your car as you wish. There are no tasks in Free Ride. Chase: Unlock the Chase with 99,000 cash and chase your rivals! Time Trial: Unlock the Time Trial with 45,000 and race against time! Five Realistic Locations You will start driving your car in Farm Land. But 4 more different locations are waiting for you to unlock them! Remember that you have the right to choose the location in which you drive your car in Endless and Free Ride modes. Farm Land: Free City: Unlock with 19,000 cash Mountain Day: Unlock with 29,000 cash Mountain Night: Unlock with 49,000 cash Snow: Unlock with 99,000 cash Developer ChennaiGames Studio Private Limited developed the Mr Racer. You May Also Like Your next stop is Drift Hunters 2 , an ultra-realistic drift simulator game with an in-depth tuning mechanism. Don't wait; master controlling the car on sharp bends and be a drift hunter! You may look for racing games on OnlineGames.io for further gaming options. There are lots of free online games on your browser! Bookmark this website to access them easily.

title: Offroad Rally
description: This will be a bit of a muddy race! Prepare yourself for this! Offroad Rally is a 3D racing game where you race on an off-road racetrack full of bumps with driftwood and mud. Your ability to maneuver against these obstacles will be tested. Even the smallest piece of wood can put you in last place in the race. You should avoid them. How to Play Offroad Rally If you want to be first in Offroad Rally, all you need to do is know where to stop, how to avoid obstacles, where to accelerate and where to slow down. If you don't know these things, even if you drive the fastest car, it's in vain. Overcome obstacles and be the first to reach the finish line. Offroad Track There is no straight road here! In this racing area, you will encounter a lot of soil, rocks, wood pieces and similar obstacles. If you don't overcome these wisely, you will have difficulty finishing the race first. Using the Truck's Nitro You will see a lightning bolt icon on the left side of the screen. The nitro is fully charged and ready to use when this area is entirely turquoise. You can use this nitro by pressing the left shift key during the race and get ahead of your competitors. Collecting Blue F Coins Along the track, you will see blue coins with F written on them. You can save money by collecting them and winning races, and with this money, you can strengthen your existing truck or buy new ones. Upgrading Your Truck You can increase your vehicle's power by going to the garage section of the menu. You can change the wheels of your vehicle so that it can stand on the ground more firmly. Or you can have front protection installed to avoid collisions with minimal damage. Options for installing chimneys and top protection on your vehicle are available here. Controls WASD or the Arrow keys to steer the truck. Left shift key to boost speed R key to reset the car C key to change the camera view Explore More Games If playing Offroad Rally excites you, you should definitely try Monster Truck Dirt Rally . This is a game in which you are driving monster cars in mud. Or you can look for other racing game alternatives on OnlineGames.io by following the link.

title: Geometry Vibes X-Ball
description: Geometry Vibes: X-Ball is a platformer game where you guide a glowing ball on an obstacle course filled with some spiky traps using only one button. You'll try to keep the X-Ball alive as it zips through neon platformer levels filled with sharp corners, instant-death spikes, and giant slopes. All you can do is tap. Tap to go upwards, release to flip direction. But that's more than enough to keep your heart racing. With a slick, futuristic design, this game is a love letter to classic Geometry Dash games, modernized for today's quick-play on browsers. And we've kept the best part: you can race with your friends on the same device. Test your focus, reaction time, and sense of rhythm as a group this time. And give that one friend who always wins an award (or at least bragging rights). So tap and vibe your way through one of the slickest browser games of the year. Play Geometry Vibes: X-Ball now on OnlineGames.io! Controls Hold tap or click: Move upwards. Release tap or click: Move downwards. Game Modes Geometry Vibes: X-Ball offers four game modes, each with its own structure. Let's break down how each one works so you know what to expect when you press play. Classic Mode This is the core of the game: a single-player, level-based platformer challenge where your goal is to reach the finish line in one piece. There are 10 levels, each designed with precise layouts full of deadly spikes, angled walls, and narrow paths. The X-Ball moves forward on a straight trajectory. Guide it by tapping and releasing taps. The faster you tap, the straighter it goes. You'll have to time your taps carefully to avoid spikes along the top and bottom. Some levels also have square or triangle blocks positioned to trick your timing. The level previews show increasing complexity, tight corridors, sudden slope shifts, and spike traps placed directly above and below. The progression bar at the top shows how close you are to the end. Touch anything that's not the safe platform line, and it's an instant restart. Race Mode (2P–4P Local Multiplayer) Bring your friends in for some chaotic fun! In Race Mode, up to 4 players compete locally on the same keyboard or device. Each player selects their spinner from the customization menu, choosing both skin and trail effects for visual clarity. Controls are split: P1 uses Mouse or space. P2 uses Up arrow key P3 uses H P4 uses L You'll race across the same spike-filled levels seen in Classic Mode, but now it's about survival. Fall into a spike or mess up a turn, and you lose the match. There is no respawn. The goal is to reach the end of the level first. There are 10 levels, and each one increases the chaos. This mode turns Geometry Vibes: X-Ball into a party game, perfect for school breaks, family gaming sessions, or group challenges with friends. Endless Mode This mode is all about survival and distance. There's no ending: your job is to see how far you can go before you crash. Your score is measured in meters, and it's saved as your best record. The speed increases gradually the longer you survive, adding tension as you go. This mode is great for practicing your muscle memory. Challenge Mode This is where things get intense. You're given 5 unique levels with faster movement, tighter spaces, and shorter paths. Pressure gets even more intense here. Levels are locked behind progress, so you must beat the current one to unlock the next. The obstacles are denser here. Expect wall-to-wall spikes with minimal breathing room and fast direction changes. From normal difficulty to extreme and even "insane" levels, this mode will challenge even skilled gamers. Game Features 4 exciting modes: Classic, Endless, Challenge, and Local Multiplayer 10 levels in Classic and Race modes 5 extra-tough levels in Challenge mode One-button gameplay Unlockable skins and trail effects from the in-game shop Local multiplayer support for up to 4 players Language support for: English Turkish German Spanish Arabic Portuguese More Online Arcade Games If you liked this game, try out Geometry Dash , another rhythm platformer game where you jump, dodge, and groove to the beat. Or load Extreme Run 3D and tilt and dodge your way through neon obstacles at extreme speeds. These games will scratch that itch for high-energy, sharp-reflex gameplay. The same kind that makes Geometry Vibes: X-Ball so good!

title: Asian Cup Soccer
description: Score a game-winning goal with the whole stadium watching! Asian Cup Soccer is a free kick soccer game with one button control. In this stadium, the pressure is high, the crowd is loud, and every goal can decide the match. Pick one of Asia's top national teams like Japan, South Korea, India, Australia or UAE and step into the knockout round of a major tournament. It's fast, fun, and super easy to play. You don't need to know all the soccer rules. Just aim, shoot, and defend your goal when it's your turn. Controls Kick: Click 1 : Aim Click 2 : Set height Click 3 : Add curve (optional) Goalkeeper: Tap/click the gloves fast when they appear to block the shot! How to Play Asian Cup Soccer First, pick your favorite team from a lineup of 12, each wearing their country's colors. You'll play through the Round of 16 and try to make it all the way to the championship match. Shooting When it's your turn to shoot, you'll see an arrow on the field. Click once to choose the direction, again for the height, and one more time if you want to curve the ball around the defenders. It's kind of like a mix between aiming in basketball and flicking a paper football but on a real field! Goalkeeping When the other team is shooting, it's your time to shine as the goalie. You'll see gloves pop up showing where the ball is going—click there quickly to block the shot. Score and Win Each match is a showdown; whoever scores the most wins and moves on. Your score gets tracked, and you can earn cool trophies like: 1st Win Finalist Champion Golden Boot (for scoring 20 goals) Developer This game was made by Deusx. More Soccer Games for Sports Fans If Asian Cup Soccer has you yelling "GOOOAAAL" at your screen, check out Penalty Challenge to face off against others online. Or try Soccer Simulator for full-on team matches with awesome 3D movement.

title: LOL Surprise Style Studio
description: Ready to embark on fashion missions with Royal Bee, Neon Licious, Lady Diva, and Swag? L.O.L. Surprise! O.M.G. Style Studio is a 2D dress-up game in which you must prepare fantastic dolls for glamorous photo shoots. You must dress the girls according to the fashion tasks of Style Studio. Dress them up and complete the photo shoot in this fashion game to earn money. Try to get the most likes on social media !👠 About This Game Welcome to the Style Studio! There are many fashion tasks that will challenge even a stylist like you. Your main objective in this fashion game, which will remind you of Stardoll, is to dress up the dolls, starting with Royal Bee for a photo shoot. However, you must prepare them according to the unique fashion theme of the task you are dealing with. Otherwise, you may not get the necessary likes on social media. It would be a disaster for the girls! View which clothes and accessories you should dress your doll in the Style Missions menu. As you fulfill the tasks, you will be able to prepare 18 more L.O.L. dolls, in addition to Royal Bee, Neon Licious, Lady Diva, and Swag. Strike Your Favorite Pose! You must wear the doll as the task requires. You need to get the matching outfits from the store section using your in-game money. After purchasing, you will be in front of the cameras! Select a stunning background for your shooting. Then, strike your favorite pose for the cameras. Press the shutter button, and voila! Share your beautiful pics on social media channels to get likes and attract new followers! Create Your Fashion Style Besides styling 22 beautiful dolls, you can dress up your doll according to your own fashion style. The store sells many dresses, trousers, tops, and skirts. You can also access a wide range of accessories, such as sunglasses, from well-known brands. Of course, you need money to buy new outfits. That’s why we recommend you perform photoshoots on the catwalk! Become a social media influencer to expand your wardrobe. Controls Desktops and Laptops Mouse: To Interact Mobile Devices Use the touchscreen to photoshoot and purchase outfits. Developer M.G.A. developed L.O.L. Surprise! O.M.G. Style Studio. What’s More? You may also play Barbiemania if you enjoy styling. Your objective in the game is to prepare Ellie for three different occasions: Every Day, Work and Party. Help her select the dresses, accessories and makeup for each event! For further options, look for other online fashion games on OnlineGames.io. title: Bloons Tower Defense 3
description: Balloons will attack your tower! To protect it, do everything you can. Bloons Tower Defense 3 is a strategy game where your objective is to guard your land from red balloons. You will place tack shooters or road spikes on the track to do it. Strategically placing the defensive tools will enable you to win the rounds in the balloon tower defense game. How to Play Bloons Tower Defense 3 Prepare yourself to fight with balloons! Firstly, choose the track you want to take part in. You will find four tracks, each with many turning points. The balloons will try to move throughout the track. If you let them reach the exit point, you will lose your life count. You will fail to guard the fortress when your counts drop to zero from 100. To prevent them from invading the tower, get tools from the Stuff section. Place them on the track mindfully so that no balloon can escape. Bloons TD 3 offers you many stuff options. Pick the most convenient ones and deflate the balloons. Target the Balloons You must get the necessary stuff to eliminate the balloons. View your options from the stuff section. In the beginning, you will have limited money to buy the tools. It is very important to make good use of what you have. Get the ones you can afford and place them on the track. Prevent the invaders from moving on the road. If they manage to pass you, you will lose your life count. Therefore, utilize the entrance and exit sections carefully. You can get additional weapons as you get coins by successfully passing the next rounds. Upgrade Your Arsenals Each tool has specific features that you can get by upgrading them. For example, an upgraded boomerang will allow you to use the multi-target feature, increasing the number of balloons it will hit. Or, you can get sonic boomerangs that can smash through frozen bloons. Remember that as you enhance the power of your stuff, more formidable upgrades will emerge. Below, we leave the names of some of our favorite stuff. Boomerang (cost: 440) Spike-o-pult (cost: 510) Cannon (cost: 615) Monkey Beacon (cost: 850) Super Monkey (cost: 3400) Controls Mouse: Place Stuff Developer Ninja Kiwi developed Bloons Tower Defense 3. More Online Games Like This If you like playing this defense game, you may also like Fantasy Tower Defense . Many kinds of towers, like the Archer or Thunder tower, can be placed on the land. You will guard your land by building towers. Leave no room for the enemies to escape! Look for the best tower defense games on OnlineGames.io for further options. title: Xtreme Paintball Wars
description: Xtreme Paintball Wars is a 3D shooting game where you will engage in a colorful battle. There are many paintball guns here, each with a unique style. Pick up your favorite one and begin eliminating enemies. Paintball Wars definitely is not one of those same old shooting games. You will fight with cubic creatures by using paints as ammunition. Show your precise aiming skills in the paintball showdown! 🔫 How to Play Xtreme Paintball Wars You have two mode options: Multiplayer and Single Player. If you want to compete with online players worldwide, tap the “America” button. It will direct you to the lobby. You will see available servers here. Or, you may create a server for yourself by deciding on options like game map, game mode, number of players, and bots. The other option is Single Player mode. You can fight against bots and challenge your shooting abilities all alone. Stylistic Weapons There are 9 fantastic guns you may enjoy to the fullest. You will have the P22, a chameleon-like weapon, the Scrossbow, and the GRLauncher in the first place. But as you win battles, you will unlock new guns. You may also view the guns in the Weapon Manager section from the lobby. The following are the names of the guns you can find. P22 Scrossbow GRLauncher P90 MAC 10 Wildwing AK47 MP5 Grenade2 Game Modes in Xtreme Paintball Wars The game offers you 5 diverse game mode options. You can play in Deathmatch, Team Deathmatch, and Gungame, as with every shooting game. The Wave Survival and the Zombies modes are the distinctive modes. In The Wave Survival, you will fight with many zombies in wave attacks. When you kill the specified number of zombies, you will move to the new waves. On the other hand, in the Zombies mode you will engage with both bots and zombies. Change Your Character You may get yourself new characters by using your earned XPs. You will see three different character categories: Team 1, Team 2 and Zombies. You have the option to join one of the three categories when you enter any battlefield. There are 20 characters in each category. The hero you choose to play with for each category shows himself according to the team you decide to play. Controls To move, use the WASD or the Arrow keys. To fire, use the Left-Mouse click. To aim, use the Right-Mouse click. To reload, use the R key. To jump, use the Space key. To run, use the Shift key. To switch between weapons, use the number keys 1-9. Developer Xtreme Paintball Wars is created by FreezeNova. More Games Like This If you like playing Xtreme Paintball Wars, you may also like Pixel Battle Royale . It is another shooting game where you can choose your character from 6 different professions. You have the option to play the game in the sandbox or the battle royale mode. Play as you wish! For more options, look for other shooting games online on OnlineGames.io. title: Angela All Season Fashion
description: Angela, the cat would appreciate some style advice from you. In Angela All Season Fashion, you can enter her stylish wardrobe and become her personal fashion advisor. This free, browser-based dress-up game invites you to create seasonal styles, outfits and accessories for Angela to wear all year round. You will have the chance to create Angela's wardrobe for every season, from warm winter layers to breezy summer styles. Controls Use your mouse or touchscreen to pick items. How to Play Angela All Season Fashion You have 4 styles to complete for Angela. Starting with a spring party at the beach in summer. Then you'll decide on what to wear on the first day of school in the autumn. Finally, you'll pick warm layers to wear on winter holiday. Mix and match blouses, jeans, dresses, accessories, and hairstyles at each season section to craft a stunning look for any occasion. You should pick items considering the season. Angela would freeze up in t-shirts and shorts in winter. Whether she is skiing in a chic winter outfit or relaxing on the beach in a bright summer dress, it is your responsibility to ensure that Angela is comfortable and up to date with the latest fashion trends. As you enter into each level, you have 5 closets to open and pick items. Earrings Necklaces Glasses and Bags Hairstyle Outfit If you think an outfit doesn't go well with the previously picked accessories, you can always go back and change it. title: Squid Game Hunter
description: Squid Game Hunter is an online arcade game inspired by the popular drama series Squid Game streaming on Netflix. Your main aim is to eliminate all the enemies as a hunter with a deadly knife. Catch them from behind and eliminate them one by one. You must be very quiet and careful! Otherwise, the enemies will get their due. 🔪 Seems familiar, right? Squid Game Hunter will remind you of the 1980s popular arcade game Pac-Man, in which you try to escape from the ghosts! Read our blog post, which we dedicated to the 30th anniversary of the world’s well-known game. Controls Use your mouse to move your character. On Smartphones and tablets, you can use the touch controls. How to Play Squid Game Hunter In this action game, you will find yourself in a dark room. But you are not alone! There are enemies wearing red uniforms with triangular headgear. They have flashlights in their hands. You must stay away from their flashlights; otherwise, they will not let you live! Approach them from behind and use your knife to disqualify them. We suggest you eliminate each red character one by one, cornering him alone. Sneak Out of the Squid Game ⁉️ You need to escape from the dark room. But the first thing to do is to get rid of all the red-wearing characters. Don’t let them catch you with their flashlights. This is why we suggest you reach them from behind. Once you eliminate an enemy, the others will rush into the scene of the accident. It is a must to act quietly and strategically to survive under these circumstances! Unlock the Speed Shoes 👟 When you eliminate an enemy, he drops coins. And within some levels, you can collect the coins scattered around the room. You can use these coins to unlock speed shoes. Each new pair of shoes you unlock will enable you to move faster. With them, you can sneak out of the Squid Game and escape easily. Developer kiz10.com developed the Squid Game Hunter. title: Obby Pinata Party
description: Obby Pinata Party is a Roblox-like arcade game where you try to shoot down piñatas by firing your weapon. Keep in mind that you must crack the piñatas before your limited ammo runs out. Aim precisely, dodge obstacles that waste your ammo, and destroy the crazy piñatas. This game is one of the most entertaining Roblox games out there, thanks to its rich, cartoonish graphics! Controls LMB: To Shoot On Mobile Devices: Tap on the screen to shoot. How to Play Obby Pinata Party Get ready for the Piñata Party! In Obby Pinata Party, your main goal is to shoot down the piñatas in each level before your ammo runs out. Aim precisely, shoot the toy, and watch the pennies flying in the air. Collect as many pennies as you can to unlock new kinds of weapons from the menu. The weapons in this Obby game range from a katana to a laser gun. Try to unlock all the weapons and add pleasure to your gaming experience! Unlock New Weapons with the Pennies Once you collect 500 pennies, you can randomly unlock a new weapon. There are 12 weapons at your disposal, and each has a different damage value. Try to unlock all of them and find out which one has the most damage. Keep in mind that you can also upgrade the weapons’ damage and ammo with the pennies you earn. Katana Glock Bomb Water Gun Saw Shotgun Molotov Cocktail Thor’s Hammer Automatic Rifle AK47 Batman’s Batarang Laser Gun Use the Ammo Wisely You have a limited amount of ammo within every level. So, you must avoid wasting the ammo you have to destroy the piñata. In later levels, there will be obstacles that hinder your angle of aim. You must avoid shooting the obstacles; you will run out of ammo easily. Keep your eyes wide open, and take aim well! Tips & Tricks for Obby Pinata Party 🎯 Aim carefully, conserve your ammo. 🔫 Avoid obstacles, don’t waste shots. 💡 Crack pinatas before ammo runs. 🪙 Collect pennies to unlock weapons. 💀 Upgrade weapons for more serious damage. Developer kiz10.com is the publisher of Obby Pinata Party. Similar Arcade Games Did you enjoy playing Obby Pinata Party ? You may also give GunSpin a chance! title: Egg Adventure
description: Egg Adventure is a funny puzzle game where you manipulate the movements of an egg. He needs to reach the door on each level. Figure out a way to overcome the handicaps and draw structures in each round that make it easy to get the door. Help Mr. Egg overcome obstacles as it moves in the direction of the exit! 🥚 Controls Hold down the left mouse button and use your mouse to draw lines. How to Play Egg Adventure On every level, Mr. Egg needs to deal with different kinds of obstacles. Help him make his way to the door, bring him together with Mrs. Egg, or save him from the dangers ahead! Use your brush to draw lines to shape structures that can be useful for the egg. Try not to crack his shell. Make sure that he reaches the exit without getting hurt. Here is a clue for you: Use gravity to your advantage! However, keep in mind that each shape you draw will be subject to gravity. Use Your Creativity 🎨 This adventure game relies on your creativity! Protect Mr. Egg at all costs by drawing lines and shapes to overcome dangers. For example, you need to draw a shape to save him from being crushed by falling objects on the 5th level. Or, you may need to draw a weapon for him to survive the attacks of the enemy egg on the 8th level! Bring Lovers Together 💕 Mr. Egg and Mrs. Egg love each other deeply. On the Get Together levels, you need to find a way to bring the lovers together. However, try not to drop them into the water or crack their shells in any way. You know that eggs are very delicate! Developer Yizhiyuan Network Technology published Edd Adventure. You May Also Like If you enjoyed playing Egg Adventure, try playing Thief Puzzle . Play as a sneaky thief with a stretchy arm. title: Sprunky Incredibox Mods
description: Ever dreamed of being a DJ? Jump into the world of Sprunky Incredibox Mods and make your own funky music! Mix the unique sounds of each character and create fun songs your way. Try different combos and see what amazing beats you can come up with because the possibilities never end in this super fun and cool game! Game Overview Sprunky Incredibox Mods is a creative music experience that lets you explore different beats, genres, sounds, and effects. It’s not just about mixing sounds but about timing, layering, and experimenting. Try out different combinations, unlock special modes, and see what cool rhythms and visuals you can create! Collect points as you play your music and experiment with new songs to unlock even more cool mods! Choose from awesome themes like Icy , Acidic , Dark , Royal , Minecraft , Geometry Dash , Iridescent Friends , Among Us , Skibidi , and Squid Game ! How to Play Sprunky Incredibox Mods? The gameplay is simple: mix the mods and create your own crazy songs! Try different combos and see what sounds you can come up with. Now it’s your turn, DJ! Hit play and drop the beat! Select & drag characters: use your mouse to pick from the character icons and drag them onto your mix stage. Layer the music: each character makes a unique sound like a beat, melody, effect, or vocal. Combine them to build your perfect track. Reset anytime! Want to start over? Hit reset and make a brand-new mix! Good to Know! Take on more gigs! The more you mix, the more coins you earn. Coins mean new opportunities! Unlock awesome new scenes and themes to play in. Each theme comes with its own special mods, so you’ll discover fresh sounds and cool new effects every time you play! FAQs Will my creation be saved? Your mix won’t be saved, sadly, but don’t worry! All the scenes you unlock will stay ready for when you come back to mix again… as long as you don’t delete your cookies. Can I switch between mods? Yep! Just hover over the mod you want to remove and click the “X.” You can also mute or lock any mod anytime. Similar Games If you love music and want to have fun while creating beats, you’re in the right place. Explore our big collection of music games with something cool for everyone. title: Parkour Block 3D
description: The floor is lava! Parkour Block 3D is an arcade game where you strive to steer your character on platforms to reach the purple portal. Beneath these platforms is a sea of ​​lava. If you slip and fall from the bricks, you will lose your life! You can't let your character drown in lava. To prevent this, you must move cautiously. Try to pass 35 challenging levels and win in this parkour game, which is similar to Only Up or Lava ! Overview of Parkour Block 3D You will be in a Minecraft world when you enter this arcade game. There will be many bricks and stones of various sizes and heights. Your main objective is to pass these platforms by jumping without falling into the lava sea. Your final destination is the purple portal at the end of the route. Reaching the purple point won't be easy. You will direct your character in a first-person view. Defining your position will be challenging because of the view. If you fail precise jumping, you will find yourself in the beginning. Move forward step by step and try to overcome all 35 levels! The Purple Portal Before you start moving on the platforms, we recommend that you observe the route towards the portal. You will see a huge purple platform at the end of the parkour. No matter what, you must reach that point to pass each level. After overcoming all the brick platforms, jump into this purple point. If you get here as quickly as possible with the fewest attempts, you get three stars. If you slide off one of the platforms, you can end up in lava. Slippery Platforms The biggest hardship of this physics game is the slippery platforms. It is one thing to manage to jump on one of the platforms right in the middle, and it is another to land on platforms without slipping. If you move forward with excessive speed, your character can slip away, causing you to fall into the lava. You must find the appropriate speed to run and jump. To make precise jumps, you can use your character's hand to give him proper direction. Controls Desktops and Laptops Mouse: Look Around WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump Double ESC: Menu Left-Shift: Run Mobile Devices Use the virtual joystick and button on the touchscreen to move and jump. Developer Poly Games developed Parkour Block 3D. What is More? Only Up Parkour may also interest you. Jump on boxes, pipes, containers, and cars to climb to the top in the game. All these objects have been hung up in the air after an apocalypse. Let's see if you can solve the mystery of this apocalypse! To access more games, look for other online parkour games on OnlineGames.io. Keep coming back to discover new and thrilling online games!

title: Sandspiel
description: Sandspiel is a creative sandbox game that combines art and science. In this sand falling game, you can create environments by manipulating elements like water, sand, fire, and many more. Each element uniquely reacts with another. This results in a great variety of results with the 20 items at your disposal. The reactions they create arouse curiosity and allow you to trust your physical intuitions while having fun. A Canvas of Science You will begin with a sandbox environment where there is nothing but sand on the screen. Ignite fires and mix them with dust and oil, creating horrific chaos. Or plant seeds, build a lake and beautiful forest resembling pixel art. You can do infinite science experiments and observe chain reactions. Max Bittker, the visionary behind Sandspiel, captures his passion for Sandspiel, expressing, Sand falling games' mode of play is creative in a way that activates many parts of your imagination. Playing with the elements means asking questions, building experiments, and inventing stories and games of your own. He also mentions that dust is one of his favorite elements as he admires how it absorbs other materials and diffuses water into mud. Keep reading this post to learn how to play, elements, features and fun facts about Sandpiel. What is Sandspiel? Sandspiel is a pixelated sandbox game where players create different environments by drawing elements on a canvas. With 20 elements to choose from, each possessing its unique reaction, the game is rich in diverse outcomes that keep players engaged and curious. The game makes learning science fun and exciting. How to Play Sandspiel? Use the toolbox on the top right of your screen to select elements. Choose your preferred line size, and start drawing pixel art. Elements will fall down with gravity and begin to interact with each other immediately. Hit the pause button to prevent elements from falling and interacting with each other. You can draw objects both in play mode and pause mode. Some players prefer to draw when the pause toggle is on. And hit play at the end to see what interactions happen in their artwork. Undo an action when you misdraw. Imagine, play, and experiment with 20 different elements. Learn About the Elements We have explained the elements of this drawing game in a brief list below. However, there are thousands of possible reactions that wouldn't fit on any list. Learn the basics and dive into exploration. Fundamentals Sand: Sinks in water. Stone: Transforms into sand under pressure. Wall: Unbreakable. Wood: Durable. Empty: Erases. Water: Extinguishes fire. Ice: Freezes water and creates a slippery surface. Wind: Influences the movement of elements. Flammables Fire: Burns down wood and plants. Gas: Highly flammable! Transformatives Lava: Liquid fire, dense, and melts most objects. Cloner: Replicates the first object it touches. Acid: Erodes other elements. Explosives Dust: Explosive. Rocket: Explodes upon contact with the first element. Oil: Produces smoke when ignited. Living Entities Seed: Grows on sand, plant, and fungus. Plant: Thrives in sand and water. Fungus: Rapidly spreads. Mite: Consumes wood and plants. Share Your Creations People of all ages admire and enjoy Sandspiel. People have uploaded more than 70,000 creations with many different subjects. While some use the game as a paint-on browser and create artwork, some are more interested in the reactions elements bring. In this, if you'd like to get inspired and inspire others, remember to take pictures of your art and share it with your friends. Developer Sandspiel was created by Max Bittker. Last Word From Editor Our editor shares her fondness for Sandspiel in the following words: "When I first played Sandspiel, I was mesmerized by visual aesthetics. Beyond sparking my curiosity and urging me to do many experiments, what happens on the screen mostly has gone beyond my expectations. One of my top picks is exploring the interaction of flammable materials, such as dust, oil, fire, gas, and rocket. Sandspiel not only provides infinite opportunities for exploration but also has the answers to many questions I used to ponder as a child. It is a safe space for kids to quench their curiosity about nature while delivering a fun and relaxing experience for adults. More Art Games If you like to create artwork in open-world games, you can get to be a musician this time. Blob Opera might be your next destination, where you become an orchestra chef, compose your own song, and let the Blobs sing. To discover hundreds of free games, simply browse OnlineGames.io ! We are sure you will come along with your favorite game!

title: Only Up Parkour
description: An unknown disaster happened with bizarre consequences in Only Up Parkour game. Boxes, pipes, containers, cars, and even houses hang in the air after the apocalypse. An adventure in the skies awaits the only person who can solve the mystery of what happened. But she needs to climb to the top to reach this holy duty. Combine your parkour gaming skills with your character's agility. Then, you will be able to see things much more clearly from above. Now start climbing and enjoy this exciting journey surrounded by fluffy clouds. What is Only Up Parkour game? Only Up Parkour is a Web-GL platformer game with premium 3D graphics where you control a character and help her on the way to the skies. Only Up Parkour is a free to play game on a browser. How to Play Only Up? Begin your journey on a platform floating in the air. Use WASD keys to move and space to jump. Start climbing on boxes and jump to higher objects such as cars and houses. Remember to take a look around before making a move. Think about the closest and the most convenient way to your destination. You may need to perform long jumps. To perform this action, run fast by holding shift and jump. Keep Track of Your Achievements You can see your highest climb height at the top left of the screen. Check out the current height just below that. Press the ribbon button to see how far you got in Only Up Parkour. Aim to beat your own record and unlock all the achievements. What happens if I fall down in Only Up Parkour? If you fall down, you can press t and continue from where you left off. Otherwise, you need to start over from the beginning platform. Who developed Only Up Parkour? Only Up Parkour is developed by Craft Game World. When was Only Up Parkour released? Only Up Parkour was released in August 2023. Controls WASD or arrow keys: move Space: jump Hold left mouse: rotate/camera view Shift: fast run T: teleport ESC: open settings menu Similar Games If you like to run, jump and climb, we have a whole dedicated tag for parkour games . title: Time Shooter
description: Prepare to fight with glass-made enemies! Cut them into a thousand pieces with a single bullet. Time Shooter is a 3D shooting game where you will find yourself in a white room full of red enemies. You need to take them down using your gun. However, keep in mind that time flows differently here! If you move, the enemies will start to take action at normal speed. Develop a strategy and get rid of them immediately before time flows. This action game will feel like playing SuperHot! Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Left Mouse Button: Pick Up Weapon/Shoot Right Mouse Button: Throw a Weapon About Time Shooter When you enter the game, you will be in a room with white walls. There will be a gun in your hands. The red enemies in the room are waiting for you to move. Thus, they can attack you faster. Time passes very slowly here if you don't move. On the other hand, the slightest movement will allow all red creatures to shoot at you immediately. Create a strategy and eliminate them all to survive in this white room in this first-person shooter game. Glass-Made Enemies Your enemies are men made of glass . When you fire the gun, and the bullet hits them, you will hear glass-shattering sounds . Trust me, you will love these sounds. At every level, red men will outnumber you, so you should be careful about that. It would be beneficial for you to carry out planned and programmed attacks. Gamie recommends taking them down individually and hiding behind white walls if necessary. But if the bullet they shoot you or the gun they throw hits you, you lose the game. Tactics: Shoot and Run The most useful tactics in this action game can be shooting an enemy and running after that. In this way, you will deflect the bullet moving towards you in slow motion. You should try this on each red creature to experience how successful a strategy it is. We call this " Bending Time" . 😉 I'm trying to open the game but it doesn't open. What should I do? If you're using an adblocker, make sure it's turned off. Or you can try opening the game in incognito mode. If these suggestions are still not enough, check out our support page . Developer GoGoMan developed the Time Shooter. You May Also Like You may also enjoy playing Secret Sniper Agent . Your job is to shoot all the agents in suits one by one. However, you have a limited amount of bullets. So, precise shooting is a must. Additionally, try not to shoot the civilians in the park! For additional options, you may look up other online shooting games on OnlineGames.io. There are dozens of free online games at your disposal. Keep coming back to discover new arrivals!

title: Happy Crayons
description: Ladybug, doll, weather vane and caterpillar… And more are waiting for you to color them! Happy Crayons is a digital coloring game where you have an interactive book. This book consists of everything you can imagine that you can paint. Choose the picture that looks most pleasing to your eye and start painting. It's an excellent opportunity to use your creativity! Also no mess, no waste of paper! How To Play Happy Crayons? Search for OnlineGames.io on your web browser Look up to the Happy Crayons and enter the game Choose a picture from the menu and start coloring When you finish painting, you can save the picture By tapping next, you can move to the following picture Or tap to the home icon and get back to the menu Choose another image you want to color Color Range Happy Crayons offers you 13 various colors to choose from. Pink Red Orange Yellow Bright Green Dark Green Turquoise Blue Navy Blue Purple Light Brown Dark Brown Black Is it safe to play Happy Crayons? Yes, Happy Crayons is absolutely safe to play. Do not worry about your children while they are coloring. Benefits of Coloring Games Coloring games greatly benefit your child in recognizing and distinguishing colors. Happy Crayons contributes to your child's identification skills. Coloring games support children in expressing their creativity. Let your child color the pictures in Happy Crayons, whatever colors he/she wants to use. These games are also one of the best options for the child's ability to focus. Watch your child get carried away while coloring at Happy Crayons. Also, it encourages your child to develop patience and relaxation. Select the colored paints you want from the ones arranged at the bottom of the screen by pressing the left mouse button. title: Speedrun Parkour
description: Alex, a young boy with great athletic abilities, finds himself in a port. He is chased by the bad guys of the port. His only way out is to navigate a series of heart-pounding challenges, leaping, rolling, and climbing over containers, boxes, and various other objects scattered in the sky. Your mission is to guide him to safety. Ensure he completes each parkour with precision and speed because the clock is ticking. Speedrun Parkour , an online platformer game , invites you to join Alex in his sky-high adventures. With gameplay mechanics reminiscent of the beloved console game Only Up , Speedrun Parkour offers a light and accessible experience. Perfect to play on mobile devices during commutes or downtime. Desktop Controls Jump: W/ Up Arrow/Spacebar Move Forward: D or Right Arrow Move Backward: A or Left Arrow Mobile Controls Use arrow buttons on your screen to move and jump Move: Buttons on the left Jump: Button on the right How to Play Speedrun Parkour Guide Alex in his adventure up in the sky. Start running rightward, climb over the objects scattered in the air. Arrive at the finish line to complete a level. 30 unique levels with increasing difficulty are available in Speedrun Parkour. You can encounter extra large holes moving chainsaws to jump over on later levels. No matter what you do, be sure you're climbing only up ! Make Use of Elevators You may see some elevators and sliding floors on some levels. They're a bit trickier to climb over but they'll give you advantage in climbing higher. Show attention to how these elevators and floors move before jumping on them; timing is the key! Watch Out Chainsaws The sky is full of dangers. Alex can encounter some rolling chainsaws on the parkour. Avoid them at all costs. Otherwise, you need to start over from the beginning of that level. Developer Freezenova created Speedrun Parkour. title: Cosmo Void
description: Attention, pilot! You’ll need super quick reflexes to fly your spacecraft into the endless void. The cosmic path is full of tricky shapes and moving obstacles that keep changing. Cosmo Void is no easy ride ⎼ it will push your skills to the limit! Can you keep your ship safe from obstacles while flying super fast? We dare you to try! Game Overview In Cosmo Void , players control a futuristic spacecraft as it glides through an endless cosmic void. With each level, the challenge grows, obstacles multiply, speed increases, and the space to swerve away gets tighter. Quick thinking and sharp reflexes are the key to survival. The game shines with vibrant 3D graphics and smooth, responsive controls, perfectly tuned for instant play. Choose to fly solo or team up with a friend ⎼ the void feels a lot less lonely with a companion by your side! How to Play Cosmo Void? Get into the void alone or with a friend! With the built-in split-screen two-player mode, you can challenge a friend in a never-ending space adventure. Without boosters, dashes, or brakes, your piloting skills are put to the test. The first one to crash eats space dust, and the winner takes it all! This mode sharpens your control over the spacecraft and brings out your competitive instincts. The gameplay is simple. Just remember that Cosmo Void is divided into layers, with the difficulty rising as you cross each level and move to the next. Most levels have shifting obstacles, so staying focused and reacting quickly is the key to survival. Onboard, let’s go! Steer: A / D or Left / Right Arrow Keys Boost: W / Up Arrow Key Brake: S / Down Arrow Key Gameplay Mechanics Overheat Mechanic Brakes let players slow down their spacecraft when it reaches extreme speeds. However, holding them too long causes overheating, and once the bar fills up, the spacecraft is destroyed. Good to Know! Make your spaceship look cool: players can collect boosters and diamonds throughout their journey to unlock new ships from the in-game market, each crafted with unique aesthetics and flight styles that influence gameplay. Zoom, blast, and dash ⎼ but don’t crash! Hypermode activates automatically once you collect seven boosters, giving you a powerful burst across the terrain without taking damage. However, dashing with the W Key or Up Arrow doesn’t grant the same protection, so it must be used wisely in quick, controlled taps to stay safe and in control. FAQs Can I slow down my spacecraft? Yes, you can slow down your spacecraft, but only for a short time. A bar will quickly fill up as you slow down, causing the ship to overheat. If the meter fills completely, the spacecraft will explode. Does the game get harder over time? Yes, the game becomes harder as you progress. Each level introduces tougher obstacles and a slight increase in speed, making survival more challenging and raising the overall difficulty. Are there any checkpoints? No, the game doesn’t have checkpoints, since there’s no storyline. However, you can track your progress through your high score and by seeing how many levels and how much distance you covered before crashing. Similar Games Enjoyed the ride? Whether you’re speeding past obstacles or just chilling in the cold expanse of space, Cosmo Void gives players an experience they won’t forget. If you think your space trip was fun, maybe it’s time to land back on Earth and try Pixel Path . It looks simple, but don’t be fooled. The tricky gameplay will catch you off guard. Think your reflexes are sharp enough? We dare you to prove it!

title: Stickman Ragdoll
description: In Stickman Ragdoll you need to find the perfect combination of poses and moves for the ragdoll to jump. Use your creative thinking to find the perfect combination and unlock funny features. To start playing, you have to tap and hold the start button. A blue force bar appears around the start button which determines the speed at which the character is thrown. The higher the force bar, the higher the throw so be sure to aim for the highest bar for max damage at all times. There are multiple levels to play where you must earn coins depending on how much damage you put on the ragdoll. You will get air time, flip bone breaking and vehicle breaking scores. You can also play PVP mode where you can create your own space and room. Stickman Ragdoll Controls: Use mouse to play

title: Nova Craft
description: We're taking you back a billion years to the dawn of creation . Armed with only four basic elements— fire, water, earth, and air . You'll start the Big Bang from scratch. In this alchemy game , combine elements to create new ones and see history unfold. The fate of the universe is in your hands. What will you discover first: War or Peace? What is Nova Craft? Nova Craft is an online game where you combine basic elements to create more complex items, like science concepts, mythical creatures, high-tech machines, and much more. If you've ever wondered how everyday things come to be, this game will spark your curiosity. Want to know how islands form? Try combining lava and the ocean. How about creating towns? Combine two houses together. Curious about kingdoms? Add a castle to your town and see what happens! The possibilities are endless as you explore and unlock new discoveries. 3239 items are waiting to be discovered by your brilliant touch. Start playing Nova Craft now! Controls Nova Craft features one-handed gameplay with mouse-only controls: Click and drag: Move elements around the board. Combine elements: Drop one item on top of another to create something new. Right-click: Remove unwanted items from the board. How to Play Nova Craft Start with just the four elements: fire, water, earth, and air. Experiment by combining any two elements to see what they create. Mixing earth and water might create mud, a swamp, or even life! With over 3,200 items to discover, each combination opens a door to something new. You can watch your collection grow in the library on the left side of your screen. Organize your library with sorting options like name, date, or icon, or use the search bar to quickly find items. The fun lies in experimenting with elements finding unique objects at your own pace. Your progress will be saved in your browser cache, but another option is to download your progress in the settings menu. Attention, Eager Beavers! If you're more focused on expanding your library than crafting recipes , Nova Craft has a feature just for you. By turning the game into a clicker mode, you can speed up the discovery process. Simply drag an element into the creativity box and start clicking on the items on the left. This lets you experiment rapidly, making it perfect for players who are eager to unlock all 3,200+ items in record time! Editor's Review The best part about Nova Craft is the freedom to play at my own pace. The game doesn't rush you at all. It's just pure exploration . Also, it reminds me of those curious moments I had as a kid. I would wondered how things worked and came together. One of my biggest questions was how skyscrapers were built and stood so tall. So, every combination brings back that sense of wonder to me. I'd say Nova Craft offers a truly satisfying experience for anyone who has a strong passion for creating things. Developer FreezeNova developed Nova Craft. More Games to Poke Your Imagination If you love the idea of experimenting while playing a game, next you can play Blob Opera and play with sounds this time. Four funny singers await their opera conductor. And the best part; you can even record your own compositions! OnlineGames.io proudly provides a safe space to let your imagination run wild!

title: Among Impostor
description: Among Impostor is an exciting web browser game inspired by the popular multiplayer deception game Among Us . In this thrilling experience, you will be part of a crew. All the crewmates are busy diligently completing their tasks. But here is the twist: someone is there to kick it up a notch. You are among them to sabotage their efforts. The aim is to eliminate the crewmates without leaving any evidence. Only the victims should know what you did. But no one else should witness it. You will be an impostor in this game. You must act stealthily. Hit the button, and let's see how far you can go without any of the mates noticing that you are faking. How to Play Among Impostor? The crewmates mind their business and try to complete missions. Your aim is to prevent the crew from performing tasks. But no one knows that you are there to raise the devil. Act friendly and attempt to isolate crewmates in separate rooms. Keep an eye out to see if anyone is approaching. When you see an open window, make your move. To attack a crewmate, click on the sword icon . You can only see the sword icon when you draw near them. After the initial attack, eliminate all evidence. To clear the evidence, hit the shovel icon . Sweep all the evidence and clean up the room before anyone sees it. Repeat the process until bot a single crewmate is left. Tips for the Impostor Watch the progress bar above crewmates on duty. You should stop them before they complete the mission. You should make your moves when anyone is not watching you. In this fictional setting, it is much easier to catch the victim alone in the room to keep the crime undercover. It might not be possible since the crowd will increase as you level up. If you are going to attack a crewmate when you are not alone with them, you should ensure that everybody turns their back on you and cannot see what happens in the room. If anyone sees you attacking, you will be reported and fail the level. The crew will report you if they see a dead body, as well. So, erase all the traces. If you cannot find a perfect time to attack in a crowded room, you may build walls by hitting the red button. It will be visible in later levels. Among Impostor Elements Sword: A sword icon will only pop up when you are close enough to a crewmate. Click on the icon to take out him. Shovel: The Impostor should clear the crime scene to prevent other crewmates from seeing it. Click on the shovel icon after attacking. Grid: Grids are a great way to pass from one room to another immediately. Go near the grid and click on it. Red Button: If you need to be alone with a crewmate in a room, pushing a red button will create walls around you. Outfit: Hit the outfit button at the bottom right of the screen to wear crazy hats. You can buy it with the cash you earned after each elimination. Weapon: Your sword may lose its sharpness or become dull after a point. Press the weapon icon on the bottom left to buy new weapons. You can even buy a lightsaber. Controls WASD or the Arrow keys : to move your character Spacebar : to attack a crewmate You can also use your cursor to move and left-click to attack Similar Games Don't miss Mini Nova Shooters , an online shooting game allowing mini shooters to destroy each other on a larger map. Protect your home and be the Ultimate Nova Shooter. This game is perfect for fans of Among Us. If you like shady operations and being on tiptoe, try being a sneaky thief in Bob the Robber . For further options, browse our free action games on OnlineGames.io by following the link. We'd love to hear your thoughts on "Among Impostor." title: Wave Road 3D
description: Wave Road 3D is an online arcade game inspired by Geometry Dash. In the game, master navigating your arrow to pass through obstacles and reach the finish line in each level. You can customize your arrow and change its color before starting the game. Challenge your reflexes in this fast and dynamic experience! 👾 Controls 1 Player Mode W/Space/LMB: Navigate Arrow 2 Player Mode Player 1 Space/LMB: Navigate Arrow Player 2 Upper Arrow: Navigate Arrow How to Play Wave Road 3D When you enter the game, choose your desired game mode and start to play by clicking on the screen. Your arrow will automatically move in the course. The main goal of Wave Road 3D is to control the arrow to pass through as many obstacles as possible. There will be spiky objects, steep ramps, and giant blocks on the way. If the arrow touches any of these obstacles, you will have to start from the beginning! Game Modes in Wave Road 3D 🎮 There are 3 game modes in this arcade game: Classic Mode, Endless Mode and Two Player Mode. Choose whichever mode you want to play and master navigating your arrow to avoid obstacles on the way! Classic Mode : It’s a level-based mode. There are 20 challenging levels to conquer. You need to reach the finish line in each level by avoiding any contact with objects. Endless Mode : This mode is based on ranking the highest score in an endless route. Take the longest distance with your arrow as far as you can! 2 Player Mode : Duel with a friend in two-player mode. There will be two arrows on the screen to control. Let’s see who is gonna win? Golden Circles ⭕ Besides the obstacles, you will see golden circles on the way. When you manage to get through your arrow in five circles or more in a row, you will create combos. Your arrow will get a rainbow tail in this way! Also, the color of the circles will change and become purple. Developer gameVgames developed Wave Road 3D. Similar Games If you enjoy playing Wave Road 3D, you may also try playing Screamals . Stretch your character by dragging up and down and passing through the barriers in the game. title: Solitaire Adventure
description: Solitaire Adventure is a Tripeaks Solitaire game for everyone. There are ten islands with tripeaks puzzles waiting to be solved. Start with Bella's Island; she will guide you through this adventure. Collect cards and clear all the boards. What is Tripeaks? Tripeaks is a solitaire game invented by Robert Hogue, played with one deck. The goal is to clear all the cards on the tableau. The chances of winning are higher than other classic solitaire games, making the game a more fun pastime. Solitaire Adventure combines Tripeaks rules with bonus features such as combos, boosters, and plenty of themes to choose from. How To Play Solitaire Adventure? Start solving the first puzzle with Bella, and she will help you adjust the rules and gameplay. There are ten islands, each having 20 Tripeaks puzzles in them. Start with Basics: Game Rules There is a stockpile at the bottom. The last opened card in the stockpile is your hand. Suits and colors don't matter in Tripeaks. Focus on the numbers. Collect cards 1 higher or lower than your hand from the layout at the top. Send them to waste pile. You can only move face-up cards to the waste pile. As you collect, face down ones will flip. You will get coins for collecting each. When you have no moves to make, open up another card from the stockpile. Try to clear the board until all of them are collected. Undo and Add Cards Functions Use undo when you miss a playable card. The first undo move is 250 coins. The more you use undo, the more expensive it is to use. When you consumed all the stockpile but couldn't collect all the above, add 5 more cards by spending your coins. Getting Serious: Combos and Boosters Rocket & Wild Cards: Use these to collect any available card. Stars: To earn a Combo Star, collect 5 cards in a row. To earn a Second Combo Star, collect 5 in a row twice. Shell: Exchange the shells with any kind of boosters. Combo Doubler: Double the combos for every collection. Full Flip: Opens up all the pile. Bella's Wish: This will ease collecting for you. Bomb Defender: Clear all the bombs by using the defender. Candle: Some cards might get cobwebs all over them. Use a candle to clear the web. Hatchet: Clear all vines. Trident: Clears all snakes. No Up & Down: Clears up and down from all. Cheese Tactics : Clears mouse from all. If game rules seem complex to you, don't worry! A comprehensive tutorial in the game will adjust you slowly before diving into details. Solitaire Adventure Features Daily rewards, wheel spin and jackpot to multiply coins Hundreds of levels to complete Customize decks with themes of World Cup, Halloween, Christmas and Zuma Lovely visuals and engaging gameplay More Games Like This If you like single player card games, try your hand at the Klondike Solitaire . Or browse our card games tag to find more solitaire variants to play. If you have any thoughts or recommendations, please share them with us in the comment section below.

title: Jungle Mart
description: Jungle Mart is an online simulator game where you play in the shoes of a cute farmer monkey! This monkey has a farm planted with banana trees, and sells the bananas to his customers when they ripen. Help him expand his business by managing farm work effectively. Unlock new fields on the farm as you progress to maximize the profits! Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Around On Mobile Devices: Tap & drag to move around. You can also click the LMB and drag it to move. Jungle Mart Overview Jungle Mart puts you in the shoes of a farmer monkey! There are banana trees on the farm to cultivate bananas. Once they ripen, move towards the trees, collect the bananas and arrange them on the shelves so that your customers can buy them. Collect money to unlock new fields on the farm. You can grow corn, raise a chicken to get eggs, and get a cow for selling milk as you make progress. This tycoon game will definitely help you master business management skills in a fun cartoonish environment! Wake up the Employee Over time, you will be able to recruit monkey employees to help with farming work. However, keep in mind that they can fall asleep from time to time! You need to go near them and wake them up so that they can continue working. Act like a real boss in this simulator game and make your employees work efficiently on your farm. Repair the Alliance Expanding your business in Jungle Mart will double your profits. You can get a microwave to make popcorn and a yogurt machine in the future. By unlocking these machines, you can also serve your customers delicious popcorn and yogurt. Make sure that the machines you get work without any problems. If any error occurs, handle the repair promptly! Tips & Tricks for Jungle Mart 🍌 Harvest bananas quickly before customers arrive. 🐒 Keep employees awake to boost productivity. 🤑 Unlock new fields to increase profits. 🌽 Stock shelves neatly to attract customers. 🪛 Repair machines fast to avoid delays. Developer Jungle Mart is developed by FreezeNova. Similar Simulator Games Did you like playing Jungle Mart ? You may also check out Supermarket Simulator , in which you run your own Walmart! title: Sniper Elite
description: You take the role of an elite shooter in Sniper Elite , whose mission is to take down every enemy. The shooting precision skills are important to handle any situation against the ninja masters. Each level comes up with unique environments with growing difficulty that kill challenge your reaction and speed. The shooting precision is very important when you want to eliminate the enemy. title: Counter Craft
description: Counter Craft is an online third-person shooter game that's the perfect mashup of Counter-Strike and Minecraft . The map design is straight out of Counter-Strike, but the zombies? They look like they've escaped from Minecraft world, all voxelated and ready to bite. The moment they spot you, they'll chase you like it's Black Friday, and you're holding the last TV in your arms. But you're not running to the checkout this time. You will wipe them off the streets before they turn you into zombie chow. Controls Move: WASD or Arrow Keys Shoot: Left-Click Aim: Right-Click Jump: Space Run: Left-Shift Slow Motion: T Reload: R Grenade: G Melee: V Empty Hand: H Pause: Tab Switch Weapons: Mouse Scroll Crouch: CTRL How to Play Counter Craft You'll start at an abandoned street occupied by Minecraft zombies. It's a neighborhood you don't want to be in, but missions are missions, right? You'll be armed with only a pistol gun at the first level. The game controls are easy to adjust, just like in any other online shooter game: Move by WASD or arrow keys, and aim and shoot zombies with mouse buttons. So, if you get it all right, it's time to clear these city streets of zombie blockheads. Just like Counter-Strike, aiming is key, but don't let these cube-shaped creatures get too close; you have a health bar (displayed at the bottom) to protect from attacks! We know that success brings more work, not more time. So, as you clear levels, you will be tasked with eliminating more zombies. The good thing is that you will have more advanced weapons than a regular pistol. Switch between weapons with a quick scroll of your mouse, and don't forget to reload often! Good luck! Developer Counter Craft was crafted by the talented team at G55. Discover More Zombie Games If you love the Counter-Strike-meets-Minecraft vibe of Counter Craft, then you need to try Pixel Survival . For more online shooting games, head over to the tag and take your pick. And remember, the comment section is open—share your best zombie-slaying stories with us!

title: Football Soccer World Cup
