title: Limousine Simulator
description: Limousine Simulator is a 2D driving game with 25 levels where you experience being a limo driver. Become a private chauffeur and give your passengers a comfortable ride. Park the limo smoothly and get generous tips. From the Red Carpet to Stretch Limo Passengers are waiting for you to arrive at their destination. Drive the limousine and follow the yellow arrows to find the spots where they stand. Your passenger portfolio includes rich businesspersons, actresses, and even royalty. So, don't ruin your career by giving them a messy ride; they're influential. Take Care of Your Passengers Passengers prefer a safe trip. So stop at red lights and follow traffic rules. At each level, you'll begin with a full 3 stars. Every bump will cost you half a star. If you lose all 3 of them, you have to start over that level. God forbid, if you hit a passenger waiting for you, you lose all three stars at once. Parking Your Limo Not only you should arrive at the destination safe and sound but also park your car thoroughly in the designated spots. We bet parallel parking has never been this much challenging before. It's a true test for your driving skills. When you park inside the yellow lines, wait a few seconds. The lines turn into green meaning you can drop off the passenger. Some drop-off zones have arrows on them to indicate how you should position the limo's direction. You cannot complete the quest if you park in the wrong direction. 25 Unique Levels The game features 25 unique levels with increasing difficulty. The first few might come easy for you. However, as you progress, you'll face more tight turns, narrow streets, and longer wheelbase limousines. Also, the number of passengers to be taken increases at later levels. Being a limousine driver is a tough and decent job, but if you're up to this challenge, play it on OnlineGames.io now! Controls WASD or arrow keys to drive the limousine Developer FreezeNova created this game. More Parking Games If you look for more online parking games , you'll never get bored in OnlineGames.io. title: Blocky Combat Swat
description: Blocky Combat Swat is a 3D shooting game in which the player faces off against pixelated zombies. These zombies might arrive from anywhere and at any time. They may come up to you creeping, sprinting, or sneakily. Stop the zombies from attacking you and wipe them out. These zombies don't die quickly. Just when you think you've shot them and are safe, you'll notice them crawling towards you. You'll have a lot of fun playing this Minecraft-inspired game ! How to Play Blocky Combat Swat Zombies will start to appear in the area when you begin playing the game, coming from all directions. And it's your job to take them out one by one. These zombies are tough, so you have to exercise caution. You can play this game in single-player mode or with other players online, depending on your preference. Campaign Mode: Play as a single player and view the mission map by choosing the "Campaign" option from the main menu. Each assignment must be finished individually. You can select the team you want to play for when playing campaign mode. You are entitled, for instance, to play for either the first or the second team. Or, you can play as a zombie. Multiplayer Mode: Start a multiplayer game by selecting "Play in America" from the main menu. As a result, you will be brought to the lobby. From this page, you can view available servers or create a new one. Game Modes Blocky Combat Swat improves your gaming experience by offering a variety of game modes. The available game modes are given below. Deathmatch Team Deathmatch Wave Survival Zombies Gun Game Weapons to Choose The game gives you eighteen different weapon options. You start with five of them: Handgun, Rifle 1, SMG 1, Sniper 1, and Shotgun 1. You can acquire new weapons as your character levels up. While playing the game, use the numbers 1-5 for changing your weapon. Controls Press the WASD or Arrow keys to move your player. Space to jump C to crouch E to change weapon attachments To fire, use the left mouse button. Right-click to aim. Press the R key to reload. To pause, press the Tab key. To change the weapon, use the number keys or scroll the mouse. Press the Q key to change the appearance of the weapon. Press the E key to change the weapon's attachment. You May Also Like Try Realistic Zombie Survival Warfare , if you like playing Blocky Combat Swat. title: Skillful Finger
description: Skillful Finger is an online skill game where you control a ball on a course with lots of obstacles. Tap and drag the ball, guide it on the parkour, and try to reach the farthest place possible! Follow the line, avoid the edges to live. Collect coins on the way to customize your object as you wish from the market. Leave a comment in the comments section below about your personal best score! ☝ Controls LMB & Hold: Guide the Ball Release: Stop On Mobile Devices: Touch the screen and slide your finger. How to Play Skillful Finger Skillful Finger requires you to quickly react to the obstacles on the way while you are trying to take the farthest route with your ball. Tap the ball, drag it forward to move it, and release to stop. Keep in mind that you need to avoid touching the edges and dynamic obstacles on the way. The ball gets faster as you move forward on the course. It will be harder to control it as it gets faster! Stay Clear of The Edges 👀 Follow the line by guiding your ball on the parkour course. You need to go as far as you can in every attempt. Dodge all kinds of obstacles on the way that you may encounter. Above all, you must stay away from the edges. Even a slight touch restarts the game. As you make progress, you will be able to unlock new generated paths with different shapes. Customize the Ball and its Tail 🎨 Collecting the coins on the path enables you to unlock new kinds of objects, get colorful balls, and fancy tails. Visit the “Market” from the main page to see your customization options. You can find vivid balls with varying colors, tons of colored tails, and new background patterns from there. Adding tasty touches to this skill game will make it more exciting to play! Tips & Tricks for Skillful Finger 🔥 The edges are lava. Do not touch lava. 💰 Coins are shiny. Your ball wants a drip. 👀 Do not blink. Blinking is dangerous. 👆 Your finger is the boss. Do not let the ball rebel. 😨 Stop dragging when things look scary. Fear is wisdom. title: Papa's Pizzeria
description: Would you like to play the first gameria and have a trip down your memory lane? Have some nostalgia of the times you fought with your sibling for who'll bake the next pizza in Papa's Pizzeria ? Even though flash is dead, flash games are not. You can play Papa's Pizzeria online without any plugins on OnlineGames.io! In Papa's Pizzeria , you are left in charge of running Papa Louie's famous pizza restaurant while he's away (yes, he's an absent boss). As Roy (or Joy, the female employee), you will manage everything about this place, from taking customer orders to baking pizzas and serving them on time. It's no easy job! You must prepare the pizzas with the right toppings, bake them to perfection, and ensure that every customer is satisfied. (Even harder with picky customers always leaving poor tips) Each day, the orders will become more complex, and more customers you will serve. So try to keep up with the rush and improve your skills as a pizza chef... And a waiter... And a restaurant manager... Controls Mouse: Click to interact with customers, drag toppings, and manage the oven and pizzas. How to Play Papa’s Pizzeria Customers will enter the pizzeria and order pizzas. Click on them to receive their order ticket, which details exactly how they want their pizza made. Each customer may have specific requests for the amount of sauce, toppings, and how long the pizza should be baked. Yes, that's where the challenge begins. Move the second pizzeria station: Toppings. Use the order ticket to guide you in making the pizza. Place the toppings carefully. Toppings should be evenly spread across the pizza. After building the pizza, put it in the oven. Watch the timer to take it out just when it's crispy, crusty, golden brown. Once the pizza is done baking, move it to the cutting station. The number of slices and the way you cut the pizza can affect customer satisfaction. Serve the pizza to the customer and hope for a high score! High scores will bring handsome tips! Manage Multiple Orders As you progress through the game, more customers will arrive. This means you'll need to juggle multiple pizza orders at once. Keep track of who ordered what, manage oven timing, and deliver pizzas as quickly as possible to earn bigger tips. Over time, you'll earn tips that can be used to upgrade your pizzeria. Buy faster ovens, special ingredients, and kitchen tools that help you prepare pizzas more efficiently. You can also decorate the restaurant to make it more appealing to customers. What's the pizza Game called? The most famous pizza game Papa's Pizzeria, might be the game you're looking for. What's the cheat code for Papa's Pizzeria? Name your save slot "almostpapa" and see the magic. Does Papa's Pizzeria need wifi? Yes to play Papa's Pizzeria without any Flash plugin, you need a steady internet connection. Developer Flipline Studios is the developer behind Papa's Pizzeria. They're known for their time-management gameria series. More Games Like This If you enjoyed managing your pizzeria, you'll love Papa's Freezeria as well. In Papa's Freezeria, you take charge of an ice cream parlor on a tropical island. Just like in Papa's Pizzeria, you'll have to manage incoming orders, but instead of pizzas, you'll be crafting elaborate ice cream sundaes with a variety of flavors, toppings, and syrups.

title: Rally Champion
description: If you are ready to race, let's start, but this is not your typical racing game! Rally Champion is a racing game where you drive with only using two keys, left and right arrows. You can not do any movements other than these 2 ones. Interesting, right? It is as challenging as it is interesting. How to Play Rally Champion Rally Champion is an online racing platform consisting of 50 variable maps, each with a unique driving environment. The maps differ significantly from each other. But other than the first map you will race on, the other maps are locked. You need to finish at least third place in each race to unlock these. To Be in The Top Three These races will not be that easy. You will compete with 9 race cars other than yours. The only way to beat them all is to pass them while trying not to slow down. By not slowing down, We mean racing without hitting other race cars and entering the green area outside the road. These are the factors that will slow you down. After achieving these, getting into the top three is not hard. Compete for the Leaderboard After each race, you will see a leaderboard. In this table, you can view who finished the race in how many seconds and in what place. Getting New Cars in Rally Champion From the "Shop" section of the main menu, you can get new cars by using your money that you can win through races. The amount of money you earn also varies depending on your race finishing order. There are 19 cars ranging from tanks to Mustangs. You can even race with a school bus! Race Achievements You can also view the trophies you have obtained by going to the "Achievements" section from the main menu. As you acquire these trophies, you also earn money. White Indicators on The Track You'll see white indicators along the way as you race to help you speed up. If you pass over these, your car will accelerate and benefit you greatly in the race. Controls You can only use the left and right arrow keys to steer the vehicle. What is More? Try playing the off-road driving game Monster Truck Dirt Rally . title: Princess Wedding
description: Princess Wedding is a dress-up game in which the player prepares the bride for her royal ceremony. As a stylist, the player has a lot to do. Many wedding dresses, jewelry, shoes, and even flower bouquet options exist. Choosing the best among them for the bride is a challenging task. But as an experienced stylist, we believe you can handle this huge responsibility! How to Play Princess Wedding When you enter the game, you will be greeted by 4 beautiful women. You can start by deciding which one will be your bride. Then, it's time to prepare the bride. You will see categories in the column on the left side of the game screen. From here, you can proceed by opening the categories one by one and seeing the options you have for these categories on the right. Categories on the Left You will see the categories listed one under the other. From here, you will decide on the bride's hair, put her wedding dress and veil on, choose the flower bouquet and more. You have so many options in these categories that you will definitely find something the princess wants. Bridal Gown There are 25 unique gowns in the game. You can unlock some of them by watching short advertisement videos. The bridal gown is the most sacred part of ​​a ceremony. Therefore, this selection must be made in the most meticulous way! But you also have the option if you want to dress the princess in a top and a skirt rather than a gown. You can choose from categories. Fur and Gloves After her wedding dress, the princess's fur and gloves are the most important thing. These are the essentials for a royal wedding. Here, you will find furs and gloves in different styles. Make your choices to match the princess's wedding dress. Controls Use your mouse to choose the outfits and other stuff. title: Supercars Drift
description: Supercars Drift is a drift game where you level up by performing drifts. You will level up and unlock new sports cars every time you break a specific record. You have ten unique car options in this thrilling car game . Unlock each one to enjoy a different gaming experience. Fire up the exhaust and hit the twisty roads! How to Play Supercars Drift Your primary task in the game is to show off your driving skills on the racetracks. As you make progress and level up, more intense gaming experiences with brand-new cars will be waiting for you. Tap on the green “Play” button to select your vehicle. Only the blue sports car is available in the first place. By unlocking the other ones, enjoy it until its wheels are flat! Racetrack Options There are three different racetracks. But to unlock the other two, you have to reach specific levels. The second map will be available when you get to the 8th level. The 14th level will enable you to unlock the third map. Work hard on the first map until having access to these two maps. Break Your Record You have one minute and ten seconds to break the highest record in the first level. You must break your record every time you come across a winding road. The more you drift, the more you fill the level bar at the upper left corner of the screen. You can also view your remaining time in the upper right corner of the screen. You will be given much more time in later levels. Before the time runs out, perform the longest drifting that you can! Track Achievements You will see the “Achievements” section in the menu. By entering the section, you can view the duties performed in green. The gray ones show you what you need to do. Try your best until you see this section all green. Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Steer the car Space Key: Brake Developer Supercars Drift was developed by FreezeNova. title: Papa's Wingeria
description: Straight from the beloved Papa Louie game series comes Papa’s Wingeria , the thrilling cooking and restaurant management game! Take charge of your own wing restaurant in Starlight City, where you’ll be responsible for frying, saucing, and plating delicious chicken wings to satisfy hungry customers. What is special about Papa’s Wingeria is that it’s not just about serving customers. You’ll also earn rewards, receive your weekly paycheck, and truly feel like you’re working in a chicken wing restaurant, fully immersed in an authentic experience. Controls On a computer, simply use your mouse to select, drag, and interact with all the game elements. If you’re playing on a phone or tablet, just tap the screen - it’s that easy! There are four stations where you’ll manage your daily tasks: 📝Order Station 🍗Fry Station 🥫Sauce Station 🍽️Build Station Take customer orders, fry up wings to perfection, toss them in various delicious sauces, and carefully build each plate with sides and dips exactly how your customers like them. As you serve, you'll earn tips, unlock new ingredients, and upgrade your restaurant to attract even more customers. Choose to play as Chuck or Mandi, or create your own custom worker. Progress through each day and work your way up to become the top-wing chef in town. With vibrant graphics, fun characters, and addictive gameplay, Papa’s Wingeria is perfect for fans of time management, cooking or restaurant games of all ages. You can also upgrade nearly every aspect of your restaurant. Improving your equipment and decorating the "wingeria" will make your customers even happier and help you work faster and more efficiently. Tip: At the end of each day, you’ll get three free tickets to play fun mini-games with your character. Win fabulous prizes, like new t-shirts and more! Developer Papa’s Wingeria was created by Flipline Studios, the well-known masterminds behind the entire Papa’s game series. If you enjoy this game, many more are waiting for you on OnlineGames.io . Pick another awesome title from the Papa’s game series, like Papa's Sushiria or Papa's Burgeria, or maybe try something new and exciting from the world of restaurant or cooking online games!

title: Cool Archer
description: Cool Archer is a 3D shooter game where you aim for the target and shoot with your arrows. Try to hit a bullseye with precise aiming and timing. Draw your bow back, aim at the target and release to shoot. Try not to waste your arrows, as you have only three chances to hit the target board! 🏹 Controls Hold down the left mouse button and drag to aim, release to shoot. On smartphones and tablets, tap and drag. How to Play Cool Archer It’s time to show your archery skills in this sports game! You will see a target board in the distance when you enter the game. Your main aim is to perform shots to hit a bullseye (10 points)! At first, the board is at a standstill. However, the challenges get harder with each shot. The target will start to move, and the wind will blow forcefully, making you fail! Here is a tip for you: When it comes to the wind, watch its direction and speed. Moving Target Board 🎯 The most challenging part of this archery game is to hit the moving target. As you make successful shots, the game will get harder and harder. You need to watch the moving board closely to perform precise shots. It will move toward a specific shape. Calculate its movements for scoring the highest points! Three Attempts to Hit 💘 Try not to miss your shots! You have only three attempts to show off your excellent archery skills. If you fail to hit the target three times in total, the game is over. You are supposed to send your arrows directly to the target board in spite of all the challenging situations, like wind and a moving board, without missing. Developer Cool Archer was developed by MarketJS. Similar Games Did you like playing Cool Archer? Give Archers Random a chance! Take aim, draw the bow and shoot your opponents one by one. You are always welcome to visit our Archery Games Online game category for more options.

title: Jeep Driver
description: Buckle up and hit the gas in Jeep Driver , the ultimate cartoon-style driving game that’s all about balance, speed, and fun! Drive through bumpy desert roads, cross wobbly bridges, and unlock awesome new jeeps as you collect coins and try not to flip over! You’re behind the wheel of a tough little jeep, driving through wild off-road levels filled with hills, gaps, and tricky platforms. Your job? Keep moving forward without crashing. The game features 30 exciting levels, each more challenging than the last. From beginner-friendly tracks to wild, obstacle-packed terrain, there’s always a new test of skill waiting ahead. Can you beat them all? Controls The controls are simpler than ever! Just drive using WASD / Arrow Keys. Unlock New Vehicles and Upgrades The more coins you collect, the more awesome jeeps you can unlock. From sleek desert rides to rugged off-road monsters, there’s always something new to drive. And it doesn’t stop there! You can always upgrade your vehicle’s performance and change its color to match your style. If you’re ready for a fast and fun ride, Jeep Driver is waiting for you. Start your engine and see how far you can go! Developer Jeep Driver was created by JulGames. Loved this game? If you enjoy driving games, don't stop here. You can find a whole garage of awesome driving games waiting for you. On OnlineGames.io , we’ve got a huge collection of free online car games that are fun, fast, and super easy to play. Want to race against time? Drift around tight corners? Or fly off ramps doing crazy flips? There’s a game for every driving style.

title: Frozen Sisters Dream Wedding
description: Imagine a video game where you plan a dream wedding up and over. Responsibilities are endless, ranging from skincare to nail art for brides. Invitations, cakes and all the other aesthetics must be confirmed. On top of that, it's a double wedding. Do you know who is getting married? Princess Elsa and Anna of Frozen . Do we need to say more? Or do you want to dive into the most fun wedding game , Frozen Sisters Dream Wedding ? Play it instantly on your browser on OnlineGames.io! Controls Use your mouse or tap to pick items. How to Play Frozen Sisters' Dream Wedding Frozen Sisters are getting married , and they decided to have a double wedding. Start with Elsa's skincare routine first. Wash , rinse and put on a mask on her face to glow up all night. Clear the pimples , and use the tweezers for the eyebrows. Finally, a nose strip was put in place to get rid of blackheads. Then, move on to hair. Shampoo her hair, rinse it thoroughly, blow dry and comb it. It'll look gorgeous, after all. Time to go to the nail saloon . Trim the nails. Moisturize hands. Give them a perfect oval, almond or square shape. Pick a nail polish color to match their style. Furnish the bride's manicure with a nail art design. Have Elsa seated on the makeup chair. Make sure you choose the best colors for her skin tone . Pick among a myriad of items ranging from lipsticks , blushes to eyeshadows . And finally, the wedding dress . Choose the dress, veil , hairstyle and wedding hair crown for Princess Elsa. When you're done with the first bride, pass it on to Princess Anna for wedding preparations. Make her glow as much as her sister Elsa. Arrange the Wedding Bouquet Beautiful brides deserve wild flower bouquets . Choose between red roses and daisies. Add a bit of sparkle with cute ribbons . Invitation Cards A wedding couldn't be imagined without guests. They actually brought in Olaf for Wedding invitation cards. But he forgot all about it, as goofiness comes first for him. Now, you need to arrange the cards as well. The Frozen Sisters would like to have everything perfect at this wedding. Make sure you pick them an elegant card and an envelope . They'll send them to very precious guests. Wedding Cake Crown the wedding with a delicious cake. Choose the shape and icing of the wedding cake. Don't forget to add a wedding topper to the cake. Grooms Need Help As in most weddings, preparing the groom is the easiest part. Pick a hairstyle and a tuxedo for each groom and unleash their charisma. You can also add accessories if you'd like to. Boys don't want to be overshadowed by stunning brides. A Toast for the Wedding Organizer O-la-la! The perfect wedding is ready to be enjoyed! Remember to take pictures and share them with your friends. It seems you dealt with everything at the Frozen Sisters' wedding well enough. Would you like to try your hand at organizing other weddings ? Developer FreezeNova created this game.

title: Survival Karts
description: Looking for the coolest, most chaotic online racing game? Play Survival Karts on OnlineGames.io! It's a survival showdown on an icy, hole-riddled track! Imagine zooming around on an icy playground where the ground could swallow you up at any moment. Here's the deal: Navigate around giant, gaping holes, dodge and survive with your cool kart. Collect shiny coins to pimp your ride or grab cool power-ups! Everyone else on the arena is your rival, trying to push you off the track into oblivion. Let's see how long you can stay on that icy track in Survival Karts. Remember, in this game, it's not about finishing first; it's about not finishing last! Controls Computers Arrow Keys: Steer your kart Spacebar: Jump Double Press Spacebar: Toggle fly mode. Mobiles Use on screen buttons to drive your kart How to Play Survival Karts Choose your game mode and get ready to race! Compete with friends in private rooms or join public matches to make new rivals. Once you hit start, the round begins in just a few seconds. When the match starts, all players will dash to the center of the arena at full speed. Race to collect boosters and coins before your opponents can grab them! Each kart leaves colorful skid marks that temporarily erase parts of the ground, creating holes. You'll need to avoid these holes—whether they're made by you or others. As the gaps grow wider and the arena shrinks, the challenge intensifies, and more players tumble into the abyss. If you fall in a hole, you're out! Keep moving, dodging, and jumping to stay in the game. Stay sharp, dodge the hazards, and outlast your competitors. Be the last kart standing to claim victory and earn XP to level up! Style Your Kart Make your kart stand out: Pick from awesome karts that'll make you the coolest kid on ice. 6 bright colors to make your kart pop or blend in. Dress up your driver in one of 18 skins to look super cool or super funny. Top your driver's head with crazy hats – from a superhero mask to a chef's hat! Developers FreezeNova brought Survival Kart game. It's a frosty fun, where every race is a wild adventure. More Karts Games If you love the chaos of Survival Karts, why not explore other fun kart games? Enter Smash Karts , where the action is just as intense but with a twist: weapons! Instead of just racing to outlast your opponents, you'll arm your kart with powerful gear like rockets, grenades, and machine guns to wreak havoc on your rivals. This game brings a fresh layer of excitement as you balance racing skills with strategic combat to dominate the arena. Whether you prefer the icy survival strategy of Survival Karts or the explosive chaos of Smash Karts, there's always a karting adventure waiting for you on OnlineGames.io!

title: Snake Football
description: Slide your snake and score a goal! Snake Football is a 2D soccer game in which you direct a snake on a football field. Your cute animal is a footballer! Your main objective is to score as many goals as possible within 2 minutes. Slide the ball towards the opposite goal and kick it. Keep in mind that you can play this sports game with a friend in two-player mode. The person with the most scores at the end of the game wins! About Snake Football This game differs from other soccer games because your footballer is a snake here. And, of course, your opponent is a snake , too! You will be given two minutes for each match. In this short period of time, the one who scores most to his opponent’s goal wins the game. Dominate the field by keeping the ball in your hands, avoiding letting your opponent take it. When you get the chance, move forward to the goal with a high speed and kick! Four Unique Football Fields There are four fantastic football pitches in Snake Football. The first one is a standard grass pitch. Then, there is an utterly concrete field. The third field is a field that looks like a basketball court with its wooden grounds. The fourth and final field is the most exotic field of them all. It has an earth ground with two red goals. However, you must win five matches in each field to unlock another. Strive to unlock each pitch for extreme pleasure! Duel with a Friend Snake You can play this two-player game with a friend if you want. To open a match for two, click on the 1 VS 2 button from the level selection menu. Then, a character selection menu will open for your opponent to choose his character. Speaking of characters, you can unlock new snakes with the money you earn from the matches. Finally, select the soccer pitch you want to play among four fields. And you are ready for a tough match! Controls Player 1 Left/Right/Upper Arrow Keys: Move You may use your mouse to steer in single-player mode. Player 2 W/A/D Keys: Move Mobile Devices Use the touchscreen to move. Developer FreezeNova developed Snake Football. Similar Online Games Try playing Soccer Merge . In the game, you will try to assemble the perfect team for your football club. To do that, you must meet your footballers’ needs by merging items! For further options, look for other online sports games on OnlineGames.io. Please share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below! We’d be happy to hear from you.

title: Racing Ball Adventure
description: Racing Ball Adventure is an online running game where you steer a rolling ball to collect mystical crystals to save the world from an impending disaster. Guide the ball through uphills and downhills without crashing into any objects on the road. Try to reach the finish line by collecting crystals and coins on your way in this ball adventure! 🥎 Controls A or Left Arrow: Move Left D or Right Arrow: Move Right On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls to move left and right. How to Play Racing Ball Adventure To stop the catastrophe, you need to reach the mystical crystals with your ball. It automatically starts rolling down when you enter a level. All you need to do is steer it from left to right to avoid obstacles and traps to reach the mountain by collecting crystals. However, keep in mind that there are lots of ups and downs on the road. Try hard to avoid collisions and reach the finish line safely. Game Modes in Racing Ball Adventure Improve the Time Each level has different time requirements. According to their time record, players get one of the three medals: Gold, Silver, or Bronze. If you try hard but cannot get the gold medal, do not worry! The Improve the Time mode lets you replay the level you struggle with. Defeat the Enemy In Defeat the Enemy mode, you race with another ball. To defeat it, you need to get to the finish line first before your enemy does. You can buy improvements by using your in-game currencies from the main menu to easily defeat your opponent. Special Mission Special Mission mode requires you to complete a specific task successfully while trying to reach the finish line. For example, a special mission may task you with avoiding the bombs along the way. It means that any contact with a bomb results in failure. Developer Racing Ball Adventure was released by GameBiz. Similar Running Games Did you like playing Racing Ball Adventure ? You might also give Run FreezeNova a chance! Help the mascot of FreezeNova dodge through all obstacles in a tunnel. Moreover, you are always welcome to check out our free online running games by following the link. Keep coming back to explore newly added games on this site!

title: Frost Land Snow Survival
description: Frost Land Snow Survival is an online survival game in which you must survive through harsh winters and continuous snowfall. Build your shelter and expand it to stay warm. Use your flamethrower machine to uncover necessary resources. Try not to stay out of your base for too long, or you will get cold! ❄️ Controls WASD/Arrow Keys/Virtual Joystick: Move Mobile Controls: Move in all directions by dragging the joystick. How to Play Frost Land Snow Survival It’s freezing outside, and all you have is a small campfire and a little flamethrower machine. Use the flamethrower to melt the accumulated snow. It helps you to uncover hidden materials like wood and coal. You must build a shelter and expand the warm area by collecting these resources. Otherwise, you can not stay alive under the snowfall! Gamie suggests you do not remain outside the base for too long to avoid getting sick. The Flamethrower Machine 🔥 It’s true that the weather conditions outside are life-threatening in Frost Land Snow Survival. To stay alive, you must battle the harsh winter. Fortunately, you have the flamethrower machine! But it is powered by fuel. It means you can use it only for a limited time. When you run out of fuel, you cannot uncover the resources, and you get cold. So, the best thing you can do is to return to the warm area quickly. Expand the Warm Area 🔅 In the beginning, you only have one base to expand. However, as you make progress, there will be other base points to unlock. Each one of the points you unlock will be a small campfire. With the help of the resources you collect, you can expand these areas into vast warm lands with shelters. Having multiple expanded base points will allow you to go the furthest distance in the frozen zones. Developer Ultra Games Entertainment Private Limited developed the Frost Land Snow Survival. Similar Survival Games CubeCraft Survival is another online game for you to play! In the game, you must craft necessary tools to survive on the blocky island by collecting resources. For more options, check out our free online survival games by following the link!

title: Fun Party Makeup
description: Birthday or bachelorette? Engagement or baby shower? For all kinds of occasions, we have a fun party make-up game. You can glorify the looks and exaggerate the spark as much as you want because it's supposed to be fun. Fun Party Makeup is a free online makeup and dress-up game in which you prepare four girls for various occasions. You can be a hairdresser, makeup artist or stylist. What is more fun than these? Controls Use your cursor or touchscreen to pick items Press arrow buttons to navigate How to Play Fun Party Makeup In the Fun Party Makeup game, you get to be a skin care specialist, hairdresser, makeup artist and personal fashion advisor—all four in one. Only one person in the world can accomplish these four distinct jobs simultaneously, and that's a best friend. Four gorgeous girls are waiting for you, the skilled BFF, to prepare each of them uniquely. Start with skin care. Clean and peel off the dirt from the skin with a clay mask. Put on some aloe gel to soothe it out, and hydrate with moisturizer until the girls' skins glow naturally. When the skincare is complete, a face is ready for a makeup extravaganza. You will have access to a set of makeup supplies such as lipstick, eyeshadow, blush, and mascara. You can also choose eye colors, eyebrow shapes and hairstyles. Dress to Impress When you are done with the hair and make-up, walk to the wardrobe. At the end, Fun Party Mekeup is a game of choice. With a lot of options in wardrobe, dresses, pants, blouses, heels, and bags, aim for a tuneful look for the party. Once your models are ready, select a sticker for each girl and send them off to their respective occasions. They appreciate your efforts and may spill some party tea afterward. Developer FreezeNova created Fun Party Makeup. More Makeup Games As Fun Party Makeup is a game perfect for all ages and can turn even the dullest moment into a party, you should keep the vibe and play a few more makeup games . We got your back. Choose between tens of wonderful skincare and makeup games on OnlineGames.io! All are for free and require no installations.

title: Sudoku
description: Sudoku Online has long been one of the most beloved brain games, offering a perfect mix of logic and concentration. This online version of Sudoku helps both beginners and seasoned players improve their skills, with a sleek design and features. Online Sudoku is the perfect way to enjoy the classic puzzle. The charm of one-player puzzle games lies in their ability to adapt to your mood, offering both customization and a sense of comfort. What sets this Sudoku game apart is how effortlessly it fits into your routine. With its clean layout and multiple difficulty levels, it feels like a cozy game designed just for you. Whether you’re chilling on a slow afternoon, sipping coffee with your dog curled up beside you, or pushing yourself to beat your personal best. Controls Use your mouse or tap to play How to Play Sudoku You’ve got nine smaller 3x3 grids making up a 9x9 grid. Some numbers are already placed for you, and your job is to fill in the rest. The catch is each row, each column, and each of those 3x3 squares needs to contain the numbers 1 through 9 without repeating any. No guessing, no duplicates, just pure logic guiding every move. Some puzzles practically solve themselves, while others will have you staring at the screen, double-checking possibilities, and maybe even wondering if you made a mistake five moves ago. But when everything clicks into place? That’s the magic of Sudoku. A Clean Layout Sometimes the simplest things make the biggest impact. This Sudoku game’s clean and crisp design ensures there are no distractions as you solve the puzzle. The focus is entirely on the grid, so you can concentrate fully on each move you make. Whether you're playing on your phone or a tablet, the interface is smooth and easy to navigate, providing the perfect space to unwind or give your brain a workout. Match Your Skill Sudoku is all about progression, and this game does an excellent job of catering to players at every level. Choose from five difficulty settings: Easy, Medium, Hard, Expert, and Master. Each difficulty level has its own unique challenge, with fewer pre-filled numbers as you advance. Starting with the easy levels gives newcomers a chance to familiarize themselves with the rules. Your Rules, Your Play Style Not all players approach puzzles in the same way, and this game offers plenty of flexibility to suit different styles. Made a mistake? Hit the undo button and try again without penalty. Want to take a break but keep track of your progress? The pause and continue timer feature is perfect for short sessions or longer playtimes. Plus, if you need a little extra help, you can use one of the three hints available. For those who like to take a methodical approach to solving puzzles, the toggle notes feature is a game-changer. Instead of scribbling on paper, you can make notes directly in the game. This feature lets you jot down possible numbers in each cell, giving you the freedom to visualize potential solutions before committing. Limited Mistakes You get two mistakes, but on the third, it’s game over. This makes every move feel important and the perfect way to take your skills to the next level while testing your ability to solve puzzles under pressure. Fresh Puzzle Games Every Week If you're a Sudoku enthusiast or just looking for a fun brain challenge, this game is an excellent way to spend your time. From its simple, distraction-free interface to the wide range of difficulty levels and helpful features, it’s a puzzle game that meets you where you are in your journey. And if you're looking for fresh puzzle games to play online , don't forget to bookmark our site (Ctrl +D) because we regularly add new and fresh games every week.

title: SpartaHoppers
description: Have you heard about Sparta before? The ancient Roman city where warriors once clashed on grand stages. They were the coolest guys of their era. Only, in this online game, your gladiators can’t walk cuz they can only hop! Welcome gamer to SpartaHoppers , a free browser game where you play as a Rome Gladiator determined to win at all costs. Picture crowd cheers echoing across the arena as you bounce toward your enemy. You’ll feel the pride of being both an elite Spartan and a funny, clumsy hopper clown. Don’t let their funny movements fool you, though. These challenges are no joke. You must jump, slash, block, and dodge your rivals to earn that victory. So gird on your sword, Spartans, because the hopping battle starts soon! Controls 1 Player Mode: Move: WASD Attack: Arrow keys 2 Player Mode: Player 1: Move with WASD, attack with TFGH keys Player 2: Move with OKL; keys, attack with Arrow keys How to Play SpartaHoppers From the main menu, choose between Training Mode, Career Mode, or Quick Battle. If you’re new, s tart with Training to practice your hops and hits with a scarecrow. Learn your attack styles, and perfect your jump trajectory. You can also earn some coins to upgrade your gladiator before heading into harder matches. If you want a fast frantic fun, choose quick battle then select 1 player against AI or 2 player from the menu. One gets WASD and TFGH, while the second player plays with arrow keys and OKL; keys. It’s a blast if you just want a swift duel. And if you're into longer gameplay, career mode is where legends are made. Fight through consecutive waves of gladiators . Beware, your health carries over between battles. If you fall, you’ll need to start a new journey with another warrior. If you win, you get to upgrade your gladiator for the next match. Simply put, outlast your opponents by well-timed attacks and hops. Keep an eye on stamina (both yours and enemies') on the top of your screen. Watch your rivals’ moves, and look for the right moment to strike! Developer SpartaHoppers was crafted by the creative minds at FreezeNova. Similar Games If you’re obsessed with the chaotic fun of gladiator battles, check out other fighting games on OnlineGames.io. For more comedic ragdoll physics chaos, Drunken Duel might be right up your alley. Or explore a host of adventure and action games that feature everything from sword fighting to futuristic laser duels. You’ll find new genres to master and more ways to show off your skills against friends or players around the globe.

title: SWAT Cats Shooter
description: SWAT Cats Shooter is one of the coolest online shooting games with its cat soldiers. Grab your weapon and get ready to hunt your rivals, who are also battle cats. Join team deathmatches and take down these whiskered creatures side by side with your beloved SWAT team. Keep in mind that losing is not an option for the SWAT members! 😼 Controls WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump LMB: Shoot RMB: Aim R Key: Reload C Key: Crouch M Key: Toggle Map 1-5 Number Keys: Select Weapon T Key: Open Chat SWAT Cats Shooter Overview The SWAT Team welcomes you in the purr-fect way! This team consists of battle cats trained for special operations. Now, you are one of them, too. Take down all the enemies one by one to win. You have an AS7-Vanguard, a pistol, a knife, grenades, and energy drinks in your backpack. Take your part in the team deathmatches, and show everyone that no one can stand in your way! Game Modes in SWAT Cats Shooter Deathmatch Enter the battling field with your team. To win, all of you must score more points than the opposing team in the given time. The more you eliminate enemies, the more score you get. Try not to die and let the opposing team earn points. Good luck! Mayhem Mayhem is a free-for-all mode where players compete individually against each other. No teams, no allies. Be the last player to survive in the battling field. You will score points in the given time. It's real madness in SWAT Cats Shooter. Unlocked at 5th level. At Knifepoint It is also a free-for-all mode, just like Mayhem. There are no heavy weapons or pistols in the At Knifepoint mode. You have only a knife as a melee weapon. Silently approach your enemies and eliminate them in one attack. Unlocked at 8th level. Capture the Point Capture the Point is another team battle where players must capture as many strategic points as possible. Hold these points longer than the opposing team, and you are the winner. Unlocked at 10th level. Tips & Tricks for SWAT Cats Shooter ⚔ Stick with your team and win more fights. 👀 Crouch to aim better and stay hidden. 🔫 Pick the right weapon for the fight. 🔋 Drink energy when low. 🤫 Move quietly in the free-for-all modes. Developer LUCKY TRY developed the SWAT Cats Shooter. Similar Shooting Games If you enjoy playing SWAT Cats Shooter, you may also check out Kawaii Shooter ! Shoot down all the cute little characters in the whimsical land. For additional options, feel free to visit our Shooting Games Online category using the link.

title: Slope Run
description: Round and round and round you go - life as an astronaut isn’t easy! Especially when you’re in a spinning ball on a mission to explore distant planets and recover your lost memories. Slope Run might make you dizzy, but it could also help you discover who you really are. Good luck out there! Game Overview In Slope Run , you’ll journey through an endless tunnel as an astronaut in a spinning ball. Your goal is to reach distant planets to piece together your lost memories. But be careful around unstable tiles, large holes, and tricky paths that will try to stop you. There’s no turning back, so you’ll need quick reflexes and sharp focus to survive as the tunnel keeps shifting shape with every new level. How to Play Left: A / ⬅️ Right: D / ➡️ Jump: W / ⬆️ / SPACE Jump farther: hold W / ⬆️ / SPACE Good to Know! Beware of tough paths! If the road ahead looks too difficult, try rolling onto the side walls. Moving left or right lets you ride along the walls, where you might discover an easier route. Watch out for unstable tiles! If you hesitate for too long, they’ll collapse and you’ll fall. Be careful with wide gaps! Time your moves just right, or you won’t make it across. FAQs Can I slow down the ball or go backwards? No, once the ball starts rolling, there’s no slowing down or going back. Does the game get harder over time? Yes! Each level introduces new obstacles, more complex tunnels, and trickier wall paths. Are there checkpoints? There are no mid-level checkpoints, but your progress is automatically saved after each completed level. So you won’t lose what you’ve achieved. Similar Games Enjoyed the spin? If Slope Run had you hooked but left you a little dizzy, keep the adventure going as an alien racing through collapsing tunnels in Run 3 . Or dive into Cosmo Void , a thrilling journey across shifting space paths and endless challenges that will put your reflexes to the test.

title: Top Burger Cooking
description: You are now responsible for taking orders, frying burgers, and building them! Stand behind the counter and feed your customers with yummy burgers of yours. Don't make them wait; they are hungry! How to Play Top Burger Cooking Take your first order and follow the instructions on the screen. You'll start by taking the order. Add the customer's desired ingredients. At first, you have access to bread, patty cheese, and lettuce. Finalize the burger, put the top of the bread, and see the smile on your customer's face. Juggle your time efficiently as you advance. With each level, you'll encounter more complex orders from customers. Understand what they exactly want, know the ingredients like the back of your hand, and speed up. Balance your responsibilities, learn the timings, and get tips from your customers. Use your tips to buy upgrades for the restaurant. At the beginning of each level, buy a magnet to collect tips, make the customers more patient and improve customer waiting times. Three Game Modes You can choose between three game modes in the Top Burger Cooking game: career, chef championship and time attack. Learn about them below. Career Start from day 1 and pass all 150 levels, cook burgers in different branches all around the world. Unlock new ingredients and build the highest burgers to feed the line. In each branch, you will start to use new local ingredients. Time Attack If you're not interested in making a career in burger cooking but rather playing a quick, challenging cooking game, then choose time attack mode. In time attack mode, all of the ingredients are available to fulfill complex orders. You have only one minute, so speed up and collect tips. Chef Championship In case you'd like to create your own burgers instead of following orders, let your imagination run wild in chef championship mode. Join a competition to create the best burger in the world. No time limit or ingredients restrict you from cooking the perfect bite of burger. Ingredients You can use the following ingredients in Top Burger Cooking: Buns and Meats Regular Bun (World 1) Thyme buns (World 2) Rou Jia Mo (Chinese burger buns) (World 3) Patty Cheese Chicken Ham Bacon Sunnyside up Pork ribs (World 3) Sauces Ketchup Mustard (World 3) Ranch sauce (World 3) Matcha (World 3) Hot Sauce (World 2) Matcha (World 3) Vegetables Lettuce Onions Tomatoes Chilli peppers Cucumbers (World 2) Jalapenos (World 2) Mushrooms (World 2) Caramelized onions (World 2) Pickles (World 2) Avocados (World 3) Rocket salad (World 3) Spinach (World 3) Side Dishes Coke French fries Chicken balls Onion rings (World 3) Milkshake Controls Use your mouse button to select ingredients and build burgers. What Is More? If you enjoy playing Top Burger Cooking, we recommend trying our Pizza Party , where you bake fantastic pizzas to your customers while managing your own restaurant. Alternatively, explore other restaurant games on OnlineGames.io for more exciting options.

title: Slide io
description: Welcome to the captivating atmosphere in Slide io game. Enjoy twirling and spinning while having fun in the amusement park full of attractions and areas full of water. Here everybody is happy and having fun just like in the summer days. Slide around other players and reach the finish line first to celebrate by jumping in the swimming pool. Take a break from the daily routine and have some fun in this game. Features Simple & fun gameplay Good graphics Controls AD or left\right arrow keys to control rotation

title: Thief Stick Puzzle Man Escape
description: Thief Stick Puzzle Man Escape is a funny puzzle game in which you play as a sneaky stickman. Solve brain-twisting puzzles to escape from tricky situations! For example, grab the treasure from a labyrinth by finding the correct path, or save the puppy without touching the cutting machine. Outsmart all the puzzle levels by finding crazy solutions to the problems! 😈 Controls Use your mouse to solve tricky puzzles. On smartphones and tablets, you can use the touch controls. Thief Stick Puzzle Man Escape Overview Welcome to the brain-teasing puzzle adventure of Thief Stick Puzzle Man Escape! There are 314 challenging levels to pass. Each level requires you to solve a specific, but hilarious, task, such as stealing popcorn from the guy sitting near you in the movie theater. You will laugh and think a lot while trying to complete tricky scenarios! Let’s see if you will be able to complete each of the 314 levels successfully. Stretchy Arm 🤪 Your stickman is famous for its stretchy arm! Most of the time, you need to stretch his arm to grab an object. Simply click on his hand and drag it in a direction to pull the arm. However, watch out for potential dangers that may hurt him. Avoid coming into contact with any spiky or potentially harmful objects. Twist Around the Objects ☝ To reach a specific object to pass a level, you can use the other objects to your advantage. Analyze the environment carefully and find suitable objects to wrap around your stretchy arm. This way, you can escape from tricky situations by acting sneakily without getting noticed or hurt! Developer Thief Stick Puzzle Man Escape was developed by YAD.com. Similar Puzzle Games If you enjoy playing humorous games like this, you may also give Gomu Goman a chance! In the game, use your character’s elasticity to your benefit to solve clever puzzles. Moreover, you can visit our online puzzle games by following the link for further engagement!
