title: Wormmate.io
description: Are you ready to join the colorful world of reptiles? Wormmate.io is an arcade game with vivid graphics that you can play with other players on OnlineGames.io. You are born as a little worm, and your duty is to be a bigger boy! Eat your candles and grow your size. Be careful not to contact other big boys! They may smash you… How to play Wormmate.io? Playing Wormmate.io is very simple. Move your cursor and steer your worm. You can play as a guest or sign in for a more developed gaming experience. Plus, you have more than 30 variant outfits for your worm, but to unlock them, you are kindly asked to share the game on social media. Game Modes There are 2 different game modes in Wormmate.io: Arena and 2 Teams. In the Arena, you are all on your own. It is a very competitive environment. Try to evolve as much as possible without being smashed by any other player. In the 2 Teams, you are playing as teams. The Blue Team and Red Team are playing against each other. Tips and Tricks There are different methods to enhance your ability to enjoy the game. The following are recommended: When you are big enough, you have the advantage of circling the little worms and trapping them. Use this. When a worm is crushed, it drops all the candies it eats. When someone bumps into you, do not forget to take their candy. This is one of the most effective ways to grow fast. There are power-ups that you can use while playing. Make it easy for you to grow by using them. Power-Ups Use power-ups effectively because you have a short time (from 10 to 40 seconds) to use them. Each one of the power-ups has different qualities. Magnet: Magnet helps you to draw foods from a great distance. Lock: Lock provides you a great deal of candies. Crisscross: Crisscross helps you take sharper maneuvers. Speed Boost: Speed Boost makes you move faster. Magnifying Glass: Magnifying Glass zooms the viewfinder out for better visibility. Question Mark: Question Mark provides you with casual power-ups. Multiplier: Multipliers increase the nourishment the food delivers (2x, 5x, or 10x). Similar Games If you like playing Wormmate.io, there are many similar games available. On OnlineGames.io, you can try one of the following games: WormsZone io Cute Snake io TileMan.io

title: Tiny Crash Fighters
description: Tiny Crash Fighters is an action game where your most significant task is to build your robot to destroy the CPU's and other players' machines. Pick your vehicle, embody it with weapons and go to the battling arena. The robots will fight automatically. All you have to do is to create your mighty vehicle in this destroying game ! How to Play Tiny Crash Fighters There are 6 unique vehicles in the game. Choose one of them and begin putting weapons on it. In the beginning, only the drill is available. But in later levels, as you earn coins, you can unlock other weapons as you wish. Place the gun on your robot strategically. The weapons you put must aim well and contact your enemy's vehicle to destroy it. Your robot must be strong enough to endure the highest number of attacks in waves. In addition, the sawed walls will start to move after a while. Don't let them come into contact with your vehicle! Fight with CPU After creating your machine, you are ready for an intense battle. Click on the Quick Fight Go! button to engage in a battle with the CPU. There will be attacks in waves. The more waves you can withstand, the better. You don't have to control your vehicle. It will automatically move forward and start attacking the enemy. Keep an eye on the bars at the top to track the durability of the robots. Battle with Other Players Press on the Versus Go! button to fight with other players. You can take inspiration from their machines to enhance yours. Battling with them can be more challenging compared to fighting with the CPU. Test your robot's strength against theirs! Looking for a Tip? The best way to enhance your gaming experience is to create your machine in a well-thought-out way. Your vehicle must target its opponent well. Otherwise, it can't cause harm to the other vehicle. From time to time, they may tower over each other, disabling them to target. We recommend you adjust your vehicle's tires according to such cases. Placing a smaller wheel at the front of the vehicle can give it an inclination for better aiming. Controls Use your cursor t o craft the vehicle Developer Tiny Crash Fighters was developed by InfinitySoft. Similar Games If you enjoy playing Tiny Crash Fighters, you may also give a chance to Alien Sky Invasion . You will navigate an aircraft in the game. Many galactical aliens welcome you in the void of Space. But not in a good way! Dodge their attacks and try to survive in Space. For further options, you may look for action games online on OnlineGames.io by following the link. Keep coming back, and you will always find new and thrilling games on the site!

title: Shopping Mania
description: Shopping Mania is a fun dress up game where you go to the mall with Kendall Jenner on Black Friday to buy new stuff. You will purchase dressings and home decorations to create a new atmosphere. And this November is the perfect time for shopping. Do your make-up and get ready, we are going to the mall in this girl game ! How to Play Shopping Mania The calendar shows the month of November. The awaited moment has come. Every girl in the world has been waiting for Black Friday to take advantage of all the discounts! After getting ready, take your dearest friend Kendall Jenner with you to the mall. She will give you advice on what to buy. Your first task is getting new outfits and cosmetics! Buying new decoration items for your home will be the following task. Get Discounted Products When you arrive at the shopping center, the time will count down! You have to pick designated products as soon as possible. You can view their icons at the bottom of the screen. When you see these products on the shelves, you should buy them immediately. Otherwise, someone else can take them. You will be given a minute. Try to have all the products with discounting labels within this limited time. Home Decorations It is time to shop for your home! Redecorating your home will bring fresh air to your life. Change can be refreshing. Give a shape to your interior first with the items you have. After you have done your job, we will go to the mall for the home products. Get yourself new curtains, wall decorations and couches. Grab what you can from the shelves in a short time. Then, you can start placing the newly purchased items in your home. Controls Mouse or touchscreen: Navigate and interact Developer Shopping Mania was developed by Gamerina. Similar Games If you are a fan of Shopping Mania, you may also like Spend Elon Musk Money . You have access to all the money that this rich man has in the game. You can freely spend this money on whatever you want. Purchase the most expensive perfumes in the world, or get yourself a Nasa Spacesuit! The choice is yours.

title: Epic Basketball
description: Epic Basketball is a fun and quirky street-style sports game you can play right in your browser. It's all about how many baskets you can sink in just 60 seconds. If a basketball shootout game sounds too easy, think again because this hoop doesn't like to stay in one spot, and distractions are everywhere. Stay sharp, aim true, and shoot your shot! Controls Desktop: Hold down the left mouse button, drag to aim, and release to shoot. Mobile: Tap and drag on the screen to set your angle release to launch the ball. How to Play Epic Basketball You start by picking your player. At first, you'll play as Javi, a funky street baller with big hair and big dreams. Once you're on the court, you'll face a single hoop. You have 60 seconds to begin with. Your goal is to score as many points as possible before time runs out. Scoring isn't the only challenge. Each time you make a basket, the hoop moves. Sometimes farther, sometimes higher. You'll have to adjust your aim and force. The game uses a dotted arc to help you plan your shot, but mastering the rhythm takes practice. A small extra hoop sometimes appears on the screen. If you score while it's active, you get bonus time! Unlock Epic Basketball Players Start with Javi and unlock more colorful players like Plin Plin, Bubu, Patty Wally, Bruce, Alien, Neil, Imhotep and more. Each character has their own personality and look, but the real prize is Nona. She may look like a grandma, but she's the ultimate baller. To unlock Nona, you'll need to score 300 points. That's not easy, so get practicing! Next Play If you enjoyed Epic Basketball's energy and fun visuals, you'll love playing Basket Random . It's a 2-player basketball game with pixel characters and fast matches. Great for when you want to take your skills to an even funnier court with wicked physics.

title: ForceZ.io
description: In ForceZ.io the most important thing is the strategy that will be tested first. The game action will bring you the adrenaline as you shoot and run after the enemies. Jump, hide, hunt and find the best moment shoot with your weapon. The missions are getting harder as you upgrade your skills but you will never be bored. Before starting the game let's see the details for online pvp, missions, armor and profile. Online PvP Mode In online PvP mode, a player can choose either to create a room or join an existing room. When creating a room, you get to choose the level and mode to play from. You can select speedx2, jump forcex2, armorx2 and the maximum players (16). ForceZ.io Levels are: • Isaneya • Sanctum • Sumerra • Androli • Achilles ForceZ.io Game Modes • FFA (Free For All) • Teams • Doomsday Missions You are offered a variety of missions with different objectives. In level 1, you have 3 active missions to choose from. Mission 1 is to win a death match; in this mission 6 players are deployed to battle and the first player with 15 kills wins the match. Mission 2 is to eliminate 3 enemies; in this mission, your objective is to eliminate 3 enemies to pass the mission. However, if your player kills 2 enemies and gets knocked down, you must restart the mission. So ensure you get that 3 kill streak to complete the mission. Mission 3 is to survive for 50 seconds; in this mission you have to survive for 50 seconds and the player’s movement and speed is reduced. To survive, either you take down your enemies or you find cover for 50 seconds. Armor Section in ForceZ.io In the armor section, you are provided with a range of purchasable equipment that propects you from the bullet attacks: • Watchdog Armor • Hellbound Armor • Undefeated Armor • Night Armor • Supreme Armor • Death Mask • Cataclysm Mask • Doom Squad Mask • Unforgiven Mask • Vanquisher Mask In the profile section you will be able to see what level you have, Xp, the kills, money and the save code. ForceZ.io Display • Kill feed (displayed on the top left) • Leading team (displayed on the top center) • HP and ammo (displayed on the bottom right) • Radar (displayed on the top right) Controls WASD or arrow keys to move Left click to shoot Right click to aim R to reload 1, 2, 3 .. 9 or Mouse wheel to cycle through weapons Space to jump Tab to toggle pause menu Press T to open chat Developer ForceZ.io is created by FreezeNova.

title: Squid Shooter
description: If you’re a fan of the popular Netflix series Squid Game, then Squid Shooter on OnlineGames.io will feel like you’ve stepped right into that high-stakes world, but with a twist! This free online game uses the show’s iconic green tracksuits, pink-suited guards, and menacing giant dolls as your enemies. Except now, you’re heavily armed! Instead of playing children’s games with deadly twists, you’ll be in a frantic shooter, blasting away waves of enemies in a playground arena. It’s funny, a bit wild, but an awesome way to reimagine the show’s shocking moments in a more lighthearted style of video games. So don't wait, trade kids’ games for guns and grenades in this wild browser shooter. Colorful cartoon style, extremely fast pace rounds, and loads of weapons... Gather your courage, lock and load, and see if you can blast through the entire Squid army in this free online game ! Controls Mouse : Look around WASD : Move W + Shift : Sprint Space : Jump Left Mouse Button : Shoot Right Mouse Button (Hold) : Aim Mouse Wheel : Next/Previous Weapon 1-7 : Weapon hotkeys R : Reload F : Knife Attack 1 Q : Knife Attack 2 G : Throw Grenade T : Inspect Weapon E : Remove/Holster Weapon How to Play Squid Shooter You begin in a sandy playground setting, much like the memorable Red Light, Green Light arena from the show, but you’re armed to the teeth this time! Hordes of green-uniformed participants shuffle toward you, and pink-hooded guards step in to lend them support. Don’t forget the giant dolls, reminiscent of the enormous figure from the first episode. Your mission is to stay alive. Dodge side to side and jump over obstacles to avoid lumps of enemies. Shoot your foes before they overwhelm you, and dodge anything they throw your way like cash grenades and coffin crates that explode on impact. Run and jump around to avoid getting cornered, and switch your weapons with the mouse wheel or number keys for a perfect shot. Your arsenal includes everything from pistols and SMGs to full-blown bazookas! Lobbing a grenade (G) into a group of green suits can clear a path fast. When you spot a giant doll, use a bazooka or grenade launcher for maximum damage. They can soak up a lot of bullets! The game escalates in difficulty as you progress, with waves growing more intense, so keep your aim steady and your reflexes sharp. Features Comical shooter Inspired by Squid Game 18 Weapon choices including rifles, pistols, shotguns, sniper rifles, and even rocket launchers. Zany playground reminiscent of the show’s sets Levels ramp up quickly, Humorous chaos including explosions, confetti-like coffins, and silly, low poly characters. Developer GoGoMan cleverly mixes references from Squid Game with over-the-top shooter mechanics. There’s no official tie to the Netflix show, but the spirit of high-stakes survival is definitely here. If you like comedic shooters that tip their hat to popular TV series, you’ll appreciate the playful spin GoGoMan created. If you'd like to play more games by them, you can try Funny Shooter ! Editor’s Review I tried Squid Shooter after binge-watching the entire Squid Game series, and it felt oddly satisfying to finally fight back against those spooky giant dolls! Charging through an army of teal tracksuits while wielding a bazooka made me laugh out loud. Some might consider this brainrot, but in my opinion, it’s a prety neat combination of funny style, action, and a splash of pop culture references. Perfect for those times you want to let off steam and imagine you’re flipping the script on the show’s challenges.

title: Papa's Pancakeria
description: Get ready to stack, flip, and pour in Papa's Pancakeria ! This popular time-management game takes you to Maple Mountain, where the aroma of freshly made pancakes, waffles, and French toast fills the air. If you close your eyes, you can almost smell those aromas behind your screen. This free online game,the fifth installment in the iconic Papa Louie series, originally released on 2012, is now available without any downloads or flash plugins. You can enjoy it for free on OnlineGames.io, the ultimate hub for fun and free games. Controls Mouse: Interact with stations, drag items, and customize orders. Left Click: Pour batter, flip pancakes, and place toppings. How to Play Papa's Pancakeria You're tasked with running Papa Louie's Pancakeria after your pet goes missing. Papa leaves a note asking for your help while he's away. Master the cooking stations to get better and faster in Papa's Pancakeria. You'll follow a tutorial about serving a pancake in the beginning If you ever forget, come back here to remember how you'll use those four stations. Order Station: Take customer orders by clicking on them. Grill Station: Cook pancakes, waffles, or French toast. Flip them at the right moment. Build Station: Assemble orders with toppings, syrups, and whipped cream. Drink Station: Unlocked at Rank 15, this station lets you prepare beverages like coffee, tea, and juice to complete the meal. Satisfy your customers, earn tips, and receive weekly paychecks to unlock new ingredients, recipes, and upgrades. Play Foodini's mini-games, such as Pizza Pachinko and Breakfast Blast to earn tickets throughout the day. Winning prizes adds fun decorations to your lobby! Game Features 4 Exciting Stations: From flipping pancakes to blending drinks, each station brings a unique challenge. Unlockable Ingredients: Add blueberries, chocolate chips, whipped cream, and more to your culinary arsenal. Customizable Lobby: Use your hard-earned tips to decorate your space and keep customers happy. Mini-Games: Play 7 fun games for a chance to win over 95 exclusive prizes. Achievements: Earn up to 80 badges as you progress. Characters Galore: Serve over 50 unique customers, including special "Closers" with high standards. Developer This game was developed by Flipline Studios. More Cooking Games Online Papa's Pancakeria combines time management with a satisfying cooking saga. From the wacky characters to the endless customization options, every element in this game has been keeping us coming back for more so far. If you enjoy this game, you'll also love other Papa Louie games like Papa's Freezeria , where you create frozen treats with swirls of perfection. Explore all Papa's Games and more free games on OnlineGames.io, where fun is always a click away.

title: Awesome Pirates
description: Pirates are coming for your fortress! You have to keep it standing tall. Awesome Pirates is a 2D defense game where you must protect your castle and its valuable treasure from vulturous men. They will attack you with their cannons. You will attack them with yours. It is your duty to throw them into the sea in this action game. How to Play Awesome Pirates While you were sitting on the red sand, sipping your drink with pleasure, you saw the awesome pirates in your binoculars. They are coming after you and your treasure. By using their cannonballs, they will try to destroy your fort. You can’t let it happen. As this castle and the treasure are from your grandparents! These are the only memories left of them. Aim at the approaching ships and shoot on them. Send them off to the darkness of the sea in this pirate game! Face off The Pirates You will see that the bad guys are approaching you slowly. You will fire each other in turns with your cannons. The one whose health bar drops to zero is the loser. Try to aim precisely and fire your cannonballs in the most accurate direction. The quicker you send them to the sea, the more coins you earn. Pro tips! You can aim at their cannons. As they will try to fix the cannon, they cannot shoot you in that turn. Enforce Your Fort and Cannon Use your in-game currency to get more potent forts and upgrades for your cannon in this action game. In later levels, you will encounter many more pirates. They will outnumber you. So, your belongings must be powerful enough to beat them. Get new cannons, purchase advanced castles and upgrade your weapons from the menu. The seller will even give you a discount. Sniper Rifle or Angry Cannon The seller has many cannon options for you. There are 7 weapons costing from 350 to 4400 coins. The names of the weapons are Shotgun, Basic, Chain-shot, Sniper Rifle, Angry, Explosive, and Controlled Explosion. Each has unique features. For example, the Sniper Rifle will allow you to shoot with precision. On the other hand, Angry Cannon will fire furious cannonballs, causing great damage. Controls Mouse: Aim Left-click: Shoot Developer Awesome Pirates was developed by Alexander Gette. More Games If you enjoy playing Awesome Pirates, you may also try Pirate Adventure . Your mission is to solve the Blackbeard’s riddles in the game. This way, you will find Cristopher’s lost treasure. For more options, you may look up other online pirate games on OnlineGames.io. You can access them whenever you want without requiring any registration. In addition, we want to hear from you! Please share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below.

title: City Ambulance Driver
description: Test your precision and reflexes in City Ambulance Driver as you take the role of the savior of the people in need. Whether is an accident or another unexpected situations, people need help to be rescued. You rush with the ambulence or helicopter to the red pin placed on the map. Transport the patients to the hospital carefully and faster. Be a hero and save as many lives as you can. Select the level • There are 10 levels ready to completed. Follow the instructions and follow the red pin on the map. City Ambulance Driver Controls: • Use WASD to control ambulance

title: Agent Smith
description: Agent Smith is the guy who has the mission to take down targets shown in the map. This is a simulation full of shooting speed, weapons, enemies and items that will help gaining experience. Complete every mission before the time is up, gain the recommended score and find the package. You need to move very fast because the enemies are in big number trying to put you down. Be ready to enjoy the explore mode too. You can make your exploration easier if you enter vehicles to drive through the city. Shop section: In the Shop section you will find the following items to buy: • Jetpack - a game without a jetpack is barely a game at all • Unlimited Weapon Ammo - A must-have for every triggerhappy hitman! Fire away! • Unlimited grennade ammo - Taking down vehicles and building was never this easy! Stand clear! • Godmode - You cannot die. Like God. It's a bit like cheating. No wait. It IS cheating. • Vehicle Generator - You can spawn vehicles at will by pressing the 0-9 keys. No kore walking. • Outfits - You can now change your wardrobe at the outfit marked on your minimap! Kill in style why don't you. • Parking - New army vehicles have been added at a special parking spot marked on your minimap! • Loot detector - Your mini map now displays the location of saves! It's like taking candy from a baby! • Cash multiplier - We double every buck you make! Helps you save cash quicker for all the other stuff! • Rabbitsfoot - Good old lucky charm. It sill smells fresh. You know you want it. • Cold ine locator - Pinpoints all beverages and displays them on the minimap! Nifty! • Golden Gun - Replaces your regular gun. Everyone knows a golden gun shoots harder! • Shotgun - Own it at the start of each mission. • Machine gun - Own it at the start of each mission. • RPG - Own it at the start of each mission. Achievements section: Here you will find the progress of your Mini-shooter: • First Blood - complete 1 mission • Man Down - die once • Red Barrel Rage - destroy 100 red barrels • The Professional - drink 1000 cold ones • Tank Buster - destroy 50 tanks • The Butcher - kill 1000 bad guys • Destroyer of Worlds - destroy 100 buildings • Postman - find 30 hidden packages • Nission Master - complete 30 different missions • Money Man - own $ 1,000,000 Controls: WASD or arrow keys to move Space bar to jump Left mouse click or Z to fire Right mouse click to throw grenade Left Shift or C to activate Smith Time Mouse wheel, Q or E to change weapons E or Enter to enter vehicle Esc or P to pause M to mute audio toggle C to change camera view

title: Wedding Beauty Salon
description: There is a wedding coming up. Wedding preparations have already started. The organization team has been working well. Now it is the wedding day. It is time to dress the bride in her wedding dress. Wedding Beauty Salon is a dress-up game where you make a bride ready to marry. Your mission here is to be a stylist. Because no one can prepare the Bride better than you. Everyone's eyes will be on the bride as she descends the stairs with all her grace. The groom might be in a bit of trouble! How to play Wedding Beauty Salon? This is a three-stage preparation process. Start with makeup, do the Bride's hair, and complete the preparation by choosing the wedding dress. Makeup: The eyes are where it all begins. Put on the bride's eye makeup first. A palette of eyeshadows is presented to you. Pick the one that appeals most to you from this plate, then finish applying the makeup. Our preferred eyeshadow color is smokey. After eye shadowing, it is time to select lipstick. Use the one that complements the Bride's lip color the best. The blushes then have peach or pink hues to choose from. However, make sure it works with the lipstick. Glitter is an additional option to blush. Consider aesthetics while choosing eye color and brow shape. Hair: It is time to talk about hair now. Decide the bride's hairstyle and color here. You can give hair a second color layer if you'd like. Select the earrings and necklace the Bride will wear after getting the hair done. The making of jewelry is also finished. Dress Up: In the last part, make the Bride wear a magnificent wedding dress! Make the Bride put her high heels on. And, of course, the veil! There is no bride without a veil. You can also recommend wearing gloves to keep the Bride's hands stylish. Complete preparation by choosing the flower. The Bride is ready now! Controls Wedding Dress Salon is a straightforward game to play. There are no complicated rules. All you need is your computer mouse. While playing the game, press the next button when you complete each stage to move on to the next step. If you want to change your decision, you can click the back button. Then, you will come back to the previous stage and rearrange it. You May Also Like Playing Love Tester , a game where you gauge the degree of attraction between you and your crushes, can be fun if you like Wedding Beauty Salon. Also, check the kids games on OnlineGames.io for additional game choices.

title: Survival Craft
description: Survival Craft is a sandbox game where the player crafts tools such as an axe and a shovel, weapons and even wearables in order to survive in the jungle. Gather the necessary materials to craft any item. Do not forget to construct buildings for yourself to take shelter. Create an environment for yourself where you can survive under the harsh conditions of raw nature! How to Play Survival Craft You will find yourself with nothing in your pocket in an open world. In the forest, you can find oak trees, pine trees, rocks, flying birds, and lakes for fishing. Before crafting any necessary item for yourself, take a look around. Collect things that might be useful to you. The first thing you will need most is an axe. Open the crafting section by clicking on the icon in the lower-left corner of the screen. You will see many categories here. Learn which materials are needed to craft anything in this section. You can start by tapping on the tools section and choosing the axe. You need wood and a rock to craft it. Getting Started: Crafting Items Exploring the forest and gathering resources are your first tasks. Craft yourself an axe to obtain more wood from trees. You will also need to use the axe to get rocks from the small cliffs. So, your most fundamental tool is an axe to collect stuff. Other than these materials, collect grasses, blackberries, and corn. You may even catch fish from the lake. But you will need a fishing rod to do that. Check Out Farmer’s Needs Your character needs to sleep and eat well to stay alive like an ordinary human. Watch for the bars at the top right of the screen to follow his overall condition. The health bar especially must not fall to zero. Otherwise, he will lose his life. Build A Shelter Building a shelter is essential for your character's survival. A shelter will protect him from dangers and provide a safe place to rest. Before construction, you need to craft basic materials such as wood, stone, and grass. Obtain wood by chopping down trees with your trusty axe. Find stones by mining rocks with your pickaxe. And harvest grass from the ground using an axe. Once you have collected these materials, you can use them to build a shelter, hut, cabin, wood decks, and even an alchemy station. For a basic shelter, start by collecting 5 decks wood to create a foundation. Craft a rope made of grass. You will need it to combine parts of your shelter. As you progress in the game, you can upgrade your shelter. You can also build a proper house by crafting parts of walls and roofs. Master the art of building. Then you can make home as comfortable and functional as it can be for your character in this challenging wilderness. For example, you can build a furnace to cook food or construct a workshop station where you can craft more advanced tools and equipment. So gather your tools, collect resources. Let your creativity soar as you work on the perfect place in this vast and untamed world. Controls To move the farmer, use the WASD keys. Use your mouse to craft items. Use the right mouse click to equip, drop, or eat an item or sow seeds. Other Crafting Games If you love playing crafting games , you may give a chance to Colony Simulator . With the help of the villagers, the player crafts and builds tools. You have the complete control of the villagers. They are waiting for your commands! For further options, look up other survival games online on OnlineGames.io. If you have any suggestions or wishlist, please contact us!

title: Papa's Burgeria
description: Welcome to Papa's Burgeria Online , where the buns are fresh, the patties are sizzling, and every ingredient is at your fingertips! Your mission, should you choose to accept it, is to run the most beloved burger joint in town. Take orders, grill burgers, and stack them high with all the fixings! After the scorching success of Papa's Pizzeria , Papa Louie decided it was time to grill up some profits with Papa's Burgeria , the second installment in the beloved Papa's Gameria series. You can play as Marty, Rita or Papa Louie himself to create yummy burgers and serve to customers. Controls Use your mouse to play Papa's Burgeria How to Play Papa's Burgeria You'll begin by typing a name for a progress save slot. After watching cutscenes on how Marty or Rita ended up being an employee of this restaurant, you'll get on onboarding about stations. There are 3 stations in this game, unlike other gamerias: Order, Grill and Build. Start by listening carefully to what your customers crave. Get it wrong, and you'll hear about it in the form of a smaller tip. Next, time to grill those Hamburger Patties perfectly. Undercooked? Overcooked? No, thank you. We're aiming for burger perfection! Lastly, you will build burgers with the following ingredients. All of the ingredients are unlocked from the first day. Bottom Bun: The foundation of every burger dream. Hamburger Patty: The heart of the matter. Toppings: Choose from Cheese, Lettuce, Onion, Pickle, and Tomato to add flavor and texture. Sauces: Drizzle with BBQ Sauce, Ketchup, Mayo, or Mustard for that perfect taste. Top Bun: Crown your creation with this. After building the burger, drag the order ticket and present your masterpiece with a flourish. You'll repeat the same steps for different orders and customers. It might come easy at first, but soon, the restaurant will be bustling with hungry customers who hate waiting. So keep in mind that multitasking, speed and accuracy are your friends here. Extra Features Customizable Characters: Dress your avatar in chef's whites or go rogue with a burger suit. It's fashion week at the grill! Endless Fun: Each day brings new challenges, customers, and special orders. Can you handle the lunch rush with all the ingredients at your disposal? Achievements: Earn badges for everything from " Tomato Pro" to "Master of Mayo". If you be a nice kid, one day you can even see the "Better Than Papa" badge. Developer Papa's Burgeria is created by Flipline Studios. Get Flipping at OnlineGames.io! Dive into Papa's Burgeria now for a slice (or should we say a patty?) of burger-flipping fun with all ingredients unlocked. Just remember, in this game, the customer might not always be right, but they're always hungry! If you'd like to play another Papa's game, our recommendation is Papa's Pastaria . Try it now and let us know what you think in the comments section.

title: Skibidi Strike
description: Are you ready to fight with Skibidi toilets in Counter Strike maps? Skibidi Strike is a 3D shooting game where you fight with heads popping out of toilets at each level. You must eliminate a specific number of Skibidis to pass a level in this game. Once the toilet heads spot you, they will move toward you relentlessly. Keep in mind that they are very fast, and they headbutt you when they catch you. Try to survive by shooting them in the head in this action game! Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Space Key: Jump Left-Shift Key: Run Left-Click: Shoot Right-Click: Aim V Key: Melee T Key: Slow Motion R Key: Reload G Key: Grenade Tab Key: Pause Mouse Scroll: Switch Weapons About Skibidi Strike When you enter the game, you will find yourself in a deserted area as a soldier. On this map, you will encounter many Skibidi toilets. They invaded this place, and they didn't let anyone survive there. However, they haven't met a soldier like you yet! Use your pistol and take them down one by one. Don't let them get close to you, as they will headbutt you if they manage to get closer. Additionally, you will get new and powerful weapons as you make progress in this shooting game! Activate Slowdown Mode If they are moving fast and you have difficulty aiming them, you can activate the slowdown mode. When you press the "T Key," everything, including the Skibidis, will start to take action slowly. But, of course, you will slow down, too. Thus, it is possible for you to make more precise hits using your weapon. Dodge Their Headbutts Their attack styles are as crazy as they are. When they approach you, they try to hit you by sticking their heads out of the toilet. And this happens very quickly. You should be careful and attack them from a distance if possible. Because if they manage to hit you, they can seriously reduce your health bar. We even recommend using grenades to destroy them with a single shot from a distance. In later levels, you will already have more advanced weapons. Developer Skibidi Strike was developed by G55. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing Skibidi Strike, you may also like playing Toilets Attack . In the game, you will try to clear the Skibidi toilets from the streets of a metropolitan city. Eliminate all of them! For additional options, you may look for web based shooting games on OnlineGames.io. Please keep coming back to discover new and thrilling online games easily!

title: Restaurant Secret Kiss
description: Restaurant Secret Kiss is one of the most nail-biting kissing games where the two lovers try to steal kisses from each other in a fine restaurant. But, there are strangers and waiters near them. They shouldn't be caught kissing. They don't want to draw attention to themselves. The player must fill the love bar by making this couple kiss. In this way, the game will move to another level. Eros has already shot his arrows in this love game! How to Play Restaurant Secret Kiss Two young people very much in love have met in a restaurant. They want to kiss each other as a show of affection, but there are people around. You have to make the couple kiss without getting caught! Take advantage of the busyness of the waiter and make the couple kiss. There will be an exclamation point on the screen when the waitress turns to the couple. The waitress will soon make a turn. Be careful not to let him witness their kiss. You can advance to the following level when the love scale in the top left corner of the screen is filled. As the game progresses, more people will enter the restaurant, increasing the difficulty of your task. Finding times when the waitress and other people are distracted is important. Invisibility Bar The game will occasionally give you invisibility while making this couple kiss. A bar will appear above the couple, and their image will begin to flash. You can make the couple kiss as much as you want until this bar reaches zero. Because they will be invisible during this time! Is it free to play Restaurant Secret Kiss? Yes, you can play Restaurant Secret Kiss for free on OnlineGames.io. There is no need to download anything, and no registration is required. Simply navigate to the website and look for the game. Controls Use the mouse click to make the couple kiss each other. Discover Other Games Try Romantic Secret Kiss if you love playing kissing games. Romantic Secret Kiss is another love game in which two lovers kiss secretly near the Eiffel Tower. But use caution when playing this game. They should not let anyone see them kissing, especially the painter who is painting the Eiffel Tower. For more game options, look at the free online avoid games tag on OnlineGames.io. Visit our site regularly to discover new exciting games and endless fun!

title: Car Wash
description: Washing your car will become enjoyable with Car Wash! Car Wash is a car maintenance simulator you can play for free on OnlineGames.io. There are many cars available to you. Choose what you want and complete the maintenance of your vehicle. Remember that a car that is not maintained will rot quickly! Froth it up until it's all snow-white. Scrub it thoroughly, rinse and shine your car until you can see yourself on the windshield! Start playing Car Wash for free now! How to play Car Wash? Playing this game is very easy, very enjoyable and very simple. All you need is to use your cursor. Maintenance consists of two stages in Car Wash. The car is foamed and washed in the first stage, then the wheels are cleaned of mud. In the final stage, the car's tire pressure, gasoline needs or polishing are checked. After completing your car maintenance, an enjoyable ride with it awaits you! 🙂 What is Car Wash? Car Wash is a car game where you have lots of cars that need to be maintained. Choose your favorite car from the menu and start to renew it. Every vehicle's maintenance needs are different. You will have the tools to meet these needs within the game. Perks of Car Wash and Simulation Games One of the greatest benefits of playing simulation games is it allows the player to experience the real world. It increases the players’ critical thinking skills. Car Wash provides a rich and dynamic environment where participants can taste different scenarios. For example, vehicles in different conditions need different maintenance in Car Wash. Simulation games typically have an educational aspect to them, and Car Wash is no different. Car Wash aims to teach the player about the maintenance requirements of a car and what is necessary under different circumstances while having fun and the relief of cleaning . This means that you don't have to worry about calling your dad and asking him how to do something whenever you're uncertain. We have you covered on OnlineGames.io. Car Options Car Wash provides you a range of cars serving different purposes. You earn stars as you play the game and keep maintaining the vehicles. With these stars, you can unlock new cars for yourself. You can find the following vehicles in the menu and choose one before renewing. Volkswagen Beetle Police Car Tractor Fire Truck Jeep Minibus Dipper Dredger Sport Car Lorry Ice Truck Crane School Bus Colorful Beetle Ferrari Tank Monster Limousine Ambulance Oil Tanker Helicopter Spacecraft Similar Games Try one of the games below if you enjoy Car Wash, or look for tags like Kids Games and Simulator Games on OnlineGames.io.

title: Ellie Thanksgiving Day
description: Just when we're reeling from the end of Halloween is over, and Christmas is still an eternity away, Thanksgiving Day swoops in to save us from the monotony of November. It's a time to pause, reflect, and appreciate the simple joys – a cozy home, a loving family, and a table with hot soups, delicious turkey and warm apple pie on it. So why not take this great day to the virtual world? Ellie Thanksgiving Day is an online game where you assist a cute girl in orchestrating the perfect Thanksgiving party . Your journey through this game will take you from the tranquility of personal preparation to the hustle and bustle of a festive gathering . Controls Left-click to select items How To Play Ellie Thanksgiving Day Here's how you can help Ellie make this Thanksgiving memorable: Start by choosing from a palette of warm fall colors for Ellie's makeup . A smokey eye with burnt orange and a touch of gold glitter might just be the Thanksgiving glam Ellie needs. Remember, it's all about making Ellie feel both festive and fabulous. Move on to picking out Ellie's outfit . Options range from traditional Thanksgiving sweaters to chic, autumn-inspired dresses. Don't forget the accessories; a stylish scarf or a pair of glasses can really set the cozy mood for the holiday. If Ellie is ready, begin designing unique Thanksgiving invitations . You could opt for a classic design with leaves and pumpkins or go modern with minimalist fonts and simple envelopes. Once designed, help Ellie drop the cards in the Post Box to send these out. When Ellie is back home from sending the cards, it's time to decorate the front door and porch into a Thanksgiving wonderland. Hang wreaths made of autumn leaves, place pumpkins of various sizes, and maybe add some lights for that extra glow. Enter the house again last time to guide Ellie through cooking the Thanksgiving turkey . From cutting the seasoning rosemary, sage, and thyme to choosing the perfect stuffing recipe, every touch of yours adds to the feast's flavor. Use the Thanksgiving turkey cooking game to simulate basting, roasting, and even carving the turkey for an interactive experience. The final touch is setting the table with a Thanksgiving theme in mind. Choose between rustic runners or elegant, with fine china and crystal glasses. Arrange placeholders, choose centerpieces (how about a cornucopia?), and lay out the cutlery with precision. As Ellie's friends got the invitations, they also need your help to get ready. Each friend might have a different style or theme they're aiming for. Maybe one friend wants to channel a pilgrim vibe while another goes for a modern, chic look. Assist with their makeup too, ensuring everyone feels part of the Thanksgiving spirit. Be Thankful and Share The Joy After the party, Ellie and her friends gather around to share what they're thankful for, reflecting on the day's successes and fun moments created by the player. This heartwarming scene wraps up the game, leaving players with a cozy, grateful feeling. Take a screenshot of the outcome and share it with your loved ones for inspiration. After all, Ellie's Thanksgiving Day (just like Kiki's Pink Christmas ) isn't just about getting ready for a holiday; it's about crafting a memorable experience filled with style, warmth, and thanks. So, are you ready to make this Thanksgiving great with Ellie?

title: City Police Cars
description: City Police Cars is a fast-paced side-scrolling 2D action game where justice drives on four wheels! You are a talented police officer who patrols the streets and eliminates dangerous criminals. Collect coins to unlock new challenges and vehicles on your road to the finish line. With each mission, you'll face more challenging enemies and obstacles. Controls On PC WASD : Move the car Spacebar : Jump On Mobile Tap the on-screen buttons Gameplay Tips Jump on enemies to defeat them! Collect coins scattered throughout the levels. Perform flips in mid-air to earn bonus coins. Use your coins to upgrade your car and unlock powerful new vehicles. The game has 30 action-packed levels and a 3-star rating system. The road to justice is long, but you have the horsepower to make it! Can you earn all the stars and clean up the streets? Jump into your cruiser and find out. More Games Like City Police Cars Like this game or are you simply into police-themed adventures? Check out more in our Police Games Online section! Looking for something more intense? Explore our Action Games Online collection for even more thrilling gameplay!

title: Obby Yard Sale
description: Obby Yard Sale is an online Roblox game where you open your own trade in the yard of your house. Order boxes with mysterious goods, and unpack them before you put them up for sale. The items vary in value; they can be common, rare and legendary. Sell them to passers-by at a reasonable price in your yard and make profits! Controls E Key: To Interact V Key: To Complete WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. How to Play Obby Yard Sale The first step to start trading in the Obby Yard Sale is to order boxes. To order them, move towards the computer and use the machine. Then, collect the boxes in the storage room and carry them to the hologram. Afterwards, you can complete the ordering process by using the logistics machine. Finally, unpack the boxes one by one and put them up for sale in the yard! You can sell them to passers-by and earn money. Open Boxes Boxes contain mysterious items. Each box contains goods of varying value, making every purchase unique. The higher the value, the greater your profit. Start with common boxes and unlock exotic, legendary, and rare ones as you progress with upgrades! Watch out for the Thieves In the yard of your house, you will see many people wandering around and reviewing the items you put on sale. Some of them are real buyers, while others are not. There are thieves among them, and they look for opportunities to steal the items in secret. Keep your eyes open, and defeat the thieves before they steal. Tips & Tricks for Obby Yard Sale 📦 Order boxes often to keep inventory flowing. 👀 Watch closely for thieves stealing your items. 🏆 Upgrade boxes to unlock rarer, valuable goods. 💰 Use upgrades early to long-term earnings. 🌟 Keep your yard stocked to attract more customers. Developer Obby Yard Sale is published by Mirra Games. Similar Roblox Games If you enjoy Roblox games like this, try Dublix , where you explore a Roblox-inspired open world! For more choices, visit our Roblox Games Online page at the link. Share your gaming experiences with us in the comments!

title: Horse Family Animal Simulator
description: Horse Family Animal Simulator is an open-world horse game where you explore, complete quests, and build your own horse family. Experience the wild in cute 3D poly visuals, roam across a vast landscape, and enjoy the sounds of nature as you gallop through fields, forests, and rivers. Take on the role of a horse, complete missions to earn coins and XP, and protect your family from dangers lurking in the wild. Controls WASD / Arrow keys: Move Spacebar: Jump Shift: Run Left Click: Attack, pick up plants, start missions Complete Quests As you explore the vast open world, you’ll encounter other wild horses that offer quests. These missions can vary, but they generally fall into two categories: Item Collection: Some horses might ask you to find and bring them specific objects scattered across the land. This could include rare plants, lost items, or hidden treasures. Combat Challenges: Others may require you to defend the herd by fighting off predators like other horses, wolves, snakes, and spiders. These battles test your strength and ability to protect yourself and others. Completing quests rewards you with coins and XP, helping you level up and improve your abilities. Always check the map to see if there are any active quests nearby. Build Your Family Your journey isn’t just about survival, it’s also about building a family. As you roam the world, you’ll come across potential mates. Once you find a compatible female horse, you can form a bond and start your own herd. At level 3, you’ll unlock the ability to have a baby horse. Your foal will start small and weak, requiring food to grow. As you continue playing, your family will grow stronger, and you’ll need to protect and provide for them. Survive in the Wild Staying alive means constantly keeping an eye on your hunger and safety. Your horse needs to eat regularly to maintain energy. The energy levels drain more quickly especially while running. Food sources include: Grasses and plants found throughout the map. Special herbs that may offer additional benefits. Your foal and mate will also require food. If you don’t feed them, their health will decline, making them more vulnerable to attacks. Predators are always lurking, and you must stay alert. Wolves, rats, sheeps, snakes, and spiders roam the land, waiting for the right moment to strike. If an enemy approaches: Use quick movements to dodge attacks, use left click to attack back. Strike back using your horse’s strength. If outnumbered, consider retreating to safety by holding shift while walking. Manage & Upgrade Your horse family’s well-being depends on how well you manage their energy, attack power, and XP levels. Tap the heart icon at the top right of your screen to: Monitor each family member’s health and stamina. Check their attack strength to see if they can defend themselves. Track their XP to see when they’ll level up. To make your horse stronger, press the star icon to upgrade key abilities, including: Speed: Run faster to escape threats or reach destinations quicker. Strength: Increase attack damage to fight off enemies more effectively. Endurance: Improve stamina so you can run for longer periods without slowing down. Explore & Expand Your Family Your home is a safe place where you can rest, but you’re not limited to one area. By using the map, you can: See available quests and locate NPC horses who need help. Return home instantly if you need a break or to check on your family. Upgrade your home with useful items to make life easier for your herd. Expanding your home lets you raise a stronger family and prepare for future challenges. As you progress, you’ll unlock new areas to explore and additional achievements to complete. Stay focused on completing quests, protecting your family, and upgrading your horse to become the strongest in the wild! Who Created Horse Family Animal Simulator? The game was developed by CyberGoldfinch, known for creating immersive animal simulators. More Horse Games If you enjoy exploring nature, survival elements, and family-building mechanics, you might also like other horse games online . Ready to experience life as a wild horse? Start your journey now!

title: War of Tanks Paper Note
description: Grab your favorite doodle pen and dive straight into War of Tanks Paper Note . It's a free online tank game that looks like it was drawn during a very boring math class cuz this game is so FUN! Every line, laser fence, and armored turret is sketched on squared notebook paper. The action feels as intense as any full-blown arcade shooter. You'll guide a tiny hand-colored tank through mazes of spinning barriers, pencil-red laser grids, and enemy doodles that won't hesitate to erase you from the page. Plus, you can play against a friend on the same keyboard. This free game is wrapped in fun in a charming paper-craft style that makes the battlefield feel both nostalgic and brand-new. Controls Purple Tank (Player 1) Move W / A / S / D Shoot Space Restart R Green Tank (Player 2) Move Arrow Keys Shoot M Restart R How to Play War of Tanks Paper Note Choose between 1 P and 2 P on the title page. In single-player, you face an obstacle course broken into three main zones, each gated by glowing red laser doors. Destroy marked targets, tanks, turrets, or clusters of foot soldiers to shut those lasers down and unlock the next area. Your green health bar at the top left shows how much scribbled armor you have left. When it empties, your tank gets crunched into paper scraps and the run ends. Solo Campaign Each zone contains five high-value targets. Pick them off in any order while weaving through cross-shaped barriers and timing your moves past rotating cannons. Projectiles travel only in the direction your tank is facing, so line up your turret before shooting. Some walls are thin enough to fire through; others bounce shots back, turning the page into a ricochet puzzle. Clear all fifteen targets across the three zones to complete the mission and claim the ruler-of-the-paper-note title! Grab Power-Ups Colored icons dot the battlefield, each granting an instant upgrade when you roll over it. In two-player mode, these bonuses spawn more often, so snag them fast or watch your friend grab the upper hand. Armor adds a chunk to your health bar, letting you soak up extra damage. Repair fully restores your tank Bigger Bullet boosts shell size for wider impact. Triple Shots fires a spread of three doodle rounds at once. Rocket swaps your standard shell for a fast, splash-damage missile. Laser unleashes a piercing beam that carves clean lines through enemies. Freeze temporarily locks every hostile unit in place Laser Inactivation turns off certain red grids Developer War of Tanks Paper Note is created by NeplingameStudio.

title: State io Wars
description: Give commands to your mini soldiers and try to get new lands! State io Wars is a 2D war game where your objective is to conquer lands as much as possible. To do that, send your troops to a neutral or your opponent's area and take it. By directing your army wisely, you can achieve victory in this strategy game! Overview of State io Wars If you enjoy conquering new lands, this war game is just for you! In the game, you will see a vast country with its states. Your main aim in the game is to capture the states until you get the whole map. To conquer the states, you must send your troops to gray or red areas. The red ones belong to your opponent. Getting his states will be challenging as he will try to seize yours in the meantime. To capture a state, you need to deploy as many soldiers as the number written in that area. To win this strategy game, you must keep trying to get all the states your opponent has. There should be no red areas left! Different Colored States You will see states in three different colors. The states with neutral tones belong to none of you. They are available to be seized by either you or your opponent. On the other hand, the red states are your rival's territories. You must capture all the red areas by directing your troops on them to get the whole land. Finally, the blue ones are already yours. Keep in mind that while trying to expand your space, you can't let the red side take over areas that are already yours! Generate New Soldiers When you acquire states, they will produce new soldiers. More soldiers mean capturing provinces faster. Increase your soldiers' numbers to act more powerfully. To be able to seize an area, deploy troops to it as the exact numbers written on it. Otherwise, you will fail at getting it. As you pass levels successfully, you will gain coins. Use them to increase the attack speed of your army and increase their number at the beginning point. Additionally, you can raise the volume of your earned coins. Controls Desktops and Computers Left-Click and Drag: Send Troops Mobile Devices Use the touchscreen to send troops. Developer FreezeNova developed State io Wars. Similar Games Try Battleship War if you enjoy playing this game. You will try to sink your opponent's fleet by launching rockets. But first, you must guess the location of his hidden ships! For further options, you may look for other strategy games online on OnlineGames.io. Please share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below! We'd love to hear from you.

title: StabFish io 2
description: Dive into the ocean, but do not expect peace or tranquility. Chaos and a tusk-impaling frenzy welcome you into the water this time. Become a predator and start your marine adventure in StabFish.io 2 ! In this sequel to the StabFish game that offers a multiplayer challenge, you control a hungry shark that grows by eating smaller fish and avoiding dangerous opponents. Your goal is to become the mega-beast of the deep. The deeper you swim, the stronger you become, but watch out for larger enemies ready to turn the tables on you. Can you dominate the sea? Controls Computers Mouse: Move your fish Left Click: Use normal Skill Right Click: Use special Skill Spacebar: Use weapon skill S key: Switch Newer Weapon A key: Switch Older Weapon Mobiles Swipe: Move your fish Use buttons to activate skills How to Play StabFish io 2 Start as a small fish and swim around to eat smaller fish. Avoid bigger fish who will try to eat you! Use the boost to speed away from dangerous opponents. As you eat, you grow bigger, becoming more powerful. The numbers above each fish are their HP. Reduce them to 0 in order to impale the fish. Impale a fish by stabbing with your tusk. Crash the impaled fish into the wall or burn them on fire to get the XPs. Your goal is to become the biggest fish in the sea! Survive these events to get bigger and unlock other sea animals. Team Spirit, Solo Stab or Armageddon? Whether you're going solo or teaming up like a school of piranhas, Stabfish.io 2 offers both paths. It's a lesson in teamwork or the art of being a lone, deadly predator. In Armageddon mode, an hourly event shows up where you can go full apocalypse mode. In this, a red poison will expand over the map until a single player remains alive and all other players have died. Developer StabFish io 2 was developed by the team at Zytech AI. More .io Games If you find yourself utterly captivated by the oceanic chaos of StabFish.io 2, don't let your adventures end there. Here is another .io game you like: Mope.io is a game where you start as a small creature and eat your way up the food chain. From a mouse to a dragon, the journey is long, and survival is key. It's the evolutionary tale of StabFish.io 2, where you evolve rather than just stab, but the thrill of growing larger remains.

title: Unblock It 3D
description: Power up your logic and spatial skills in Unblock It 3D, a free browser puzzle game you can play online at OnlineGames.io. You face a giant cube made of arrow-marked bricks. Your goal is to slide each cube away without bumping into other blocks. Classic Mode offers unlimited moves and hundreds of handcrafted puzzles. In Adventure Mode, you travel through five historic worlds: Ancient Egypt, Medieval Europe, the Aztec Empire, Feudal Japan, and more, using only a set number of moves per level. Controls Click and drag (or swipe) the screen spin blocks. Click (or tap) it to slide a block Click on booster icons to activate power-ups How to Play At the start of each level, you see a large cluster made of smaller arrow-marked blocks. Your first task is to scan all six faces of this cluster by rotating the view. Look for blocks that are not blocked by any others in the direction their arrows point. When you find one, click (or swipe) it, and the block will slide off the cluster along that path. In Classic Mode, you can slide blocks at your own pace and take as many moves as you like until the cube is empty. The challenge grows as blocks come in different sizes, so you must think a few steps ahead to avoid creating dead ends. Adventure Mode Adventure Mode adds a move limit to each of its 25 levels. You begin in Ancient Egypt with simple, small clusters and plenty of moves. As you unlock new worlds—through Medieval Europe, the Aztec Empire, and Feudal Japan—the puzzles grow larger and more complex. Here, every swipe matters. You'll need to plan a sequence of slides that clears the cube without running out of moves. Watch the counter in the corner and map out your path before making your first slide. Some levels hide a key block deep inside the cluster; you may need to clear the outer layers first to free up space. This mode tests both your planning and your patience. Boosters If you get stuck, boosters can save the day. Unblock It 3D offers three handy power-ups you earn as you clear levels. The Arrow Switch lets you rotate any block's arrow, opening new paths. The Bomb removes a small cluster of blocks in one go, perfect when no slide will free a stubborn brick. The Hint highlights a single move you can make, guiding you out of tricky spots. Boosters refill slowly in Classic Mode but recharge faster in Adventure Mode when you finish a level under the move limit. Use them sparingly since your stock carries over between levels in Adventure Mode. Developer Azerion Casual Games built this 3D puzzle game to help players sharpen their minds without any complex rules. Their focus is simple: give you a clear goal, intuitive controls, and puzzles that grow with your skill. Similar Games If you enjoyed Unblock It 3D, then Bloxorz is perfect for you! This fun puzzle game presents a unique challenge where you move and tackle a rectangular block to fit it precisely into designated holes on the board. The gameplay is not only satisfying, but it also tests your spatial reasoning and problem-solving skills like Bloxorz. You can play this game without any cost, as all our puzzle games are completely free and accessible online. Plus, they can be played directly in your browser, making it easy to jump in and get started. Don't miss out on this fun opportunity to put your mind to the test!

title: Pixel Driver
description: Sometimes, you just crave something simple. Nothing fancy. No complicated missions or stressful tasks. Just a pixel car, a colorful city, and the freedom to roam. That's it. These are exactly what Pixel Driver is all about. In Pixel Driver, you'll hop into your pixel-style car and explore a colorful, bustling city made completely out of blocks. The city is lively with pixel police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances driving around, making the streets feel alive and busy. This simple driving game beautifully combines old-school pixel graphics with modern 3D visuals, creating a fun and nostalgic atmosphere. You can race to beat your best time or just cruise to relax like in Slow Roads . It keeps things easy and enjoyable. So jump in your car, hit the gas, and enjoy the simplicity of driving around in this charming pixel world! Controls Drive with WASD or Arrow Keys Use nitro with Shift Pause or open menu with Escape Game Modes In Pixel Driver, you have two fun ways to play: Racing Mode: Race around the pixel city as fast as you can. Your goal is to beat your best time! Watch out for other AI-controlled cars roaming around. Use nitro to speed up on straight roads, but slow down for tight corners so you don't crash. Free Drive Mode: Relax and explore the city without any pressure. Drive anywhere you like, check out cool spots, or practice your driving and drifting skills. You'll still see AI cars on the streets, adding life to your cruising experience. Developer Pixel Driver was created by FreezeNova, famous for fun and easy-to-play online games for players of all ages. Explore Free Driving Games If you love driving games, OnlineGames.io is the perfect place to explore. You can find tons of exciting online car games, ranging from realistic driving simulators to fun arcade-style adventures like Pixel Driver. If you're into racing, drifting, performing wild stunts, or simply cruising around open-world maps, OnlineGames.io has you covered. Our free driving games are great for practicing your driving skills, competing with friends, or just chilling out after a long day. So if Pixel Driver has sparked your interest, dive deeper into the world of online driving games and discover your new favorite today! If you need further help, our suggestion is Madalin Stunt Cars 2 . You'll get crazy stunts and fast cars. Start playing now!

title: Geometry Vibes Monster
description: The void is alive! In Geometry Vibes Monster , every obstacle wants you gone and the monsters won’t stop until you’re nothing but stardust. Game Overview Step into deep space, where survival means more than just timing your moves. In Geometry Vibes Monster , obstacles aren’t your only worry… When the cosmic beasts awaken, they unleash deadly laser beams and fire orbs, forcing you to dodge and weave with precision. Whether you’re battling to survive in Endless Mode or racing friends in thrilling multiplayer duels, only the quickest pilots will outfly the chaos and escape the monster’s wrath. Game Features Endless Survival Mode: Avoid obstacles and monster attacks. Multiplayer Race Mode: 2–4 players, with only one winner. Awakened Beasts: Dodge lasers and blazing fire orbs. Spaceship Customization: Colors, designs, and thruster trails. How to Play Geometry Vibes Monster? PC Controls Fly up: Hold Left Click Fly down: Release Left Click Mobile Fly up: Tap the screen Fly down: Release Good to Know! Pay attention to the monsters: They look different, making it easier to remember each one’s attack type. Adapt your strategy: Unlike static levels, every run feels different thanks to dynamic enemies and traps. Similar Games Enjoyed Geometry Vibes Monster ? Explore our Clicker Games library, where more challenges await, including Geometry Vibes X-Ball , where you control a spinning ball, dodging obstacles that appear in your path.

title: GTA Simulator
description: You know that famous GTA video game series, right? Well, meet its online and free version on OnlineGames.io. GTA Simulator is a simulator game that you can play on your web browser without the need to download. Just like in the original GTA game, you are given some tasks in GTA Simulator. As you fulfill these, you will earn rewards and diamonds. Defeat the gangsters and save the island! ⚠ Warning: Mature Content This game includes mature themes that may not be suitable for all players. It may contain strong language, violence, or other intense elements. If you prefer lighter games, we have plenty of free games available. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Left Shift (or tap on the running image): Run Fast E Key: Punch or Shoot F Key: Enter a Car Tap on the Aiming Icon: Punch and Kick Tap on the Flying Kick Image: Give a Flying Kick Tap on the Fist Icon: Change Your Weapons Tap on the Grocery Cart Image: To Shopping ESC Key: Menu How to play GTA Simulator? The whole story starts with Jackson texting you. He calls you to his side. You find his location on the small map and go to him. He found out that you are a shooter and will give you some missions. The mayor wants to sell the island they live on and for nothing. Someone has to stop this. Other parties are not in favor of the agreement either. They just kill. This is where you are needed. You will need a lot of guns and bullets in this game. Get yourself a gun and bullets by clicking on the grocery cart icon in the upper right corner of the screen. Throughout the game, Jackson will communicate with you and give you some tasks. He will introduce you to his acquaintances. When he contacts you, a text message will appear on the screen. You can move on to the following statement by clicking continue. You will need to cover the island from end to end. Therefore, you need a car. You can use Jackson's garage or commandeer any vehicle you see on the road. But be careful; car drivers carry guns. And they can use it against you! The places you will go will be marked on the map. You will see pink exclamation emoticons. Follow them! If you can not see the signs clearly on the map, you can enlarge it by clicking. If you click on the place you want to go on the map, you will place a green mark. When you minimize the map, you can easily follow that sign. As you complete the tasks in the game, you will level up, and each level will bring you more power. Empowerment You can strengthen the game experiences, health and stamina of your hero in the game. Open the power-up screen by clicking on the bar at the top left of the screen. Or press the human head image from the menu. You will see five different sections. The first one is related to your health and stamina. The second one is related to your defense mechanisms. The third and fourth ones are about your attack power with knives and guns. The last one is for strengthening driving skills and car acceleration. As you complete tasks and level up, you will have the right to improve each skill. Developer GTA Simulator was created by FreezeNova. title: Rainbow Survival
description: Rainbow Survival is a funny online FPS game that blends humor, color, and action in a wacky world. In this browser game, you'll be chased by quirky, colorful monsters that are more mischievous than they appear. Armed with a simple weapon, you'll need sharp reflexes and precision to defeat waves of foes and restore the rainbow to its rightful place in the sky! Controls WASD or Arrow Keys : Move Q / E : Lean Left / Right Mouse : Look Around Left-Click : Shoot Space : Jump R : Reload Left-Shift : Run P : Pause How to Play Rainbow Survival The colorful, once-beautiful rainbow is now cursed, and each color has transformed into a mischievous monster. As the brave hero of Pixelville, it's up to you to defeat these funny foes to restore the rainbow's beauty. Each level requires you to eliminate a set number of colorful enemies (starting with 10). Move by WASD and jump by pressing the spacebar. Use your mouse to aim and shoot and defeat monsters in no time. Check your health level often because it'll drain when you're near foes. With every level you complete, you unlock a new, more powerful weapon to help you in your quest. You'll start with a basic deagle and work your way up through more powerful weapons like Kriss Vector. As the enemies get tougher, so does your weaponry, giving you the firepower you need to defeat the rainbow foes. Keep moving, aim well, and eliminate them one by one. What is the Story of Rainbow Survival? Once upon a time, in the colorful world of Pixelville, there was a magical rainbow that stretched across the sky every day, spreading joy to everyone below. But one dark night, an evil wizard, tired of all the happiness, cast a curse on the rainbow. Each color of the rainbow turned into a monster! In this whimsical land, the colors took on their new, funny forms: Red became the Tomato Tango, hopping around with a mischievous grin, trying to squish you with tomato feet. Orange transformed into the Carrot Can-Can, spinning and dancing to confuse you. Yellow became the Banana Peel Pirate, sliding around on banana peels. Green morphed into the Pea Pod Popper, sneaking up to deliver powerful punches. Blue turned into the Blueberry Bouncer, bouncing toward you and threatening to flatten you like a pancake. Indigo was the Eggplant Egghead, and Violet became the Grape Grappler, tossing sticky grapes that could slow you down if they stuck. A brave kid (that's you!) with a big heart and an even bigger laugh decided to take action. Armed with a simple gun, which becomes more powerful as you progress, your mission is to defeat these colorful creatures and break the curse. With each defeated foe, the rainbow slowly returns to its former glory, restoring peace to Pixelville! Developer Rainbow Survival was developed by G55 CO. Similar Games If you enjoyed Rainbow Survival, be sure to check out Funny Shooter Bro , another funny FPS game. You can also find more funny games on OnlineGames.io and explore other browser games to enjoy!

title: Only Up or Lava
description: Only Up or Lava is a challenging arcade game where you move your character on various platforms, such as furniture items. You have to perform perfect jumps to avoid falling into the lava. Overcome each challenge one by one and reach the final gate. Every level comes with unique difficulties in this one of the most exciting parkour games.🌋 How to Only Up or Lava You are going on a very compelling adventure. You will encounter many obstacles while trying to avoid falling into the lava. You will see many platforms on the parkour. It could be a chair or an upside-down door. You must perform precise jumpings on these items to access the final gate. Otherwise, you lose the game by falling into the liquid. As you progress and go to the next level, you will face more complex hazards. Don't Rush If you rush, you won't get very far in this game. You must calculate every movement of your character to pass the obstacles individually. Move forward slowly but surely. The most essential key to achieving success is to master precise jumpings. When you jump, you must land in the middle of the platforms. Diverse Platforms There are many kinds of platforms in parkour. They will enable you to go to the final point. Use them as stair treads to pass the boiling liquid. Take your time. Find the most appropriate location to move to. From time to time, you will also see jumping platforms. These are platforms that will throw you very high. You must direct your character well while you are in the air so that you do not dive into the lava. Climb Up the Barriers You are wrong if you think the barriers you will encounter will be straight. They will be in different positions. There is a great chance you will come across many chairs or doors lying on their sides. Your character may not land right in the middle of one of them. You can try to grasp them from one end. Then, attempt to get to a proper place by climbing. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Space Key: Jump/Climb Shift Key: Walk/Drop to Ledge R Key: Pause/Game Menu Developer Only Up or Lava was developed by Nexus. Explore Other Games You may also try Only Up Parkour if you are an Only Up or Lava fan. After an apocalypse, many things, like pipes and houses, hung in the air. title: Oil Digging
description: Oil Digging is a 3D tycoon game where you mine oil in different locations around the world to make a profit. Search for an oil field, drill it, and then build an efficient pipe system. Collect the oil tanks and load them onto the truck. Once you have collected all the oil, you can move on to the following location. Build and operate your own oil rig now! ⛽ Controls Move the virtual joystick on the screen to navigate your character. On mobile devices , you can use the touch screen controls. How to Play Oil Digging Are you ready to build your oil rig? Let’s begin by finding an oil field. Once you spot a field rich in oil, drill it to extract the oil. Then, you need to build a pipeline system connecting the oil field and the oil rig. The oil rig will enable you to store all the oil in tanks. Transfer the oil tanks onto the truck waiting near the rig. When the truck is full of tanks, you can move on to the next location! Find Oil Fields 🔎 The first step in this simulation game is to find a suitable oil field to drill. Afterwards, drill it and connect the field with the rig by using pipes. Otherwise, you will not be able to store the oil in tanks. Also, keep in mind that every location has more than one oil field to drill. You must find other oil fields and connect them to the oil rig with the pipes, too! Load Oil Tanks onto the Truck 🚛 The oil rig enables you to store all the oil in tanks. This way, you can carry the tanks and load them onto the truck. There are numbers written on the vehicle. They mean that you must collect an exact number of oil tanks onto this truck to complete the mission. In later levels, helicopters can replace trucks! Developer Kwalee developed Oil Digging.
