title: Vex 3
description: Vex 3 is the third installment in the highly popular obstacle course series. First released in August 2014, this challenging platformer pushes players to their limits, as its name implies - Vex is derived from vexation, meaning annoyance. The game is set in a 2D stickman world filled with a black and red scheme; the game uses red to signal dangerous traps, while black zones indicate safety. Navigate through deadly environments filled with spikes, saw blades, smashing platforms, poles with ropes to hang on and slide and more as you race against the clock and aim for trophies and achievements. You can explore ten regular Vex acts (stages) and nine challenge acts where maze-like courses test your timing, precision, and problem-solving skills. Controls For Computers: Arrow Keys/WASD: Move and jump. Down Arrow/S: Slide, break glass blocks, or enter levels. For Mobile Devices: Use on-screen touch controls to move, jump, and interact with objects. How to Play Vex 3 Your objective in Vex 3 is to reach the green portal at the end of each level (or "Act") while avoiding the traps and hazards along the way. If you get caught in a trap, you'll respawn at the nearest checkpoint, which is marked by red flags. However, the game may tease you if you die consecutively in the same spot, posing the famous question: "Are you okay?" Here’s a step-by-step guide for Vex 3: Stand on the level block with "Act 1" on it and press the down arrow or "S" key to begin. Use WASD keys to jump over spikes, slide under walls, and climb walls by jumping from side to side. Study the timing of traps before attempting risky moves. Learn and use blocks strategically. Orange Blocks make you bounce to jump higher. Purple Blocks move quickly as they fall after being touched. Speed Blocks boost your speed for swift movements. Avoid sparks that move around electric blocks. To kick out a trapped block press S key while you're standing on the block. Progress through traps and reach the green portal to complete the level. Each act has a time limit for Gold, Silver and Bronze rankings. Finish faster than that to earn the trophy. If you complete the regular act, you can move on to the next act or try to get the hidden star in the completed level. Vex Acts Explained Standard Acts: There are 9 regular plus one Vexation act in this. Hardcore Acts: Complete challenge modes of 9 standard acts to unlock hardcore trophies. Challenges often include grabbing a hard to achieve and hidden star. Completion Trophies: There are four trophies you can claim in Vex 3. Olympian: Achieve gold or better on all acts. Perfectionist: Achieve perfect or better in all acts. Astronomer: Collect all stars across the acts. Winner: Complete all acts in challenge mode. Awesome Stuff: Other than completing acts and earning trophies, you can earn extra badges for performing awesome stuff in Vex 3. Perfect!: Complete an Act with Perfect ranking Caretaker: Hold four keys at once. Gasping: Surface from swimming with one bubble left. Time Flies V2.O: Play the game for over one hour. Heads Up: Get crushed by a pushable block. Obstacles Each act introduces unique challenges, ensuring gameplay stays fresh and exciting. Some of the obstacles you can encounter are as follows. Surprising Spikes: Activate when approached. Four-Spikes: Shoot spikes in all directions. Poles with Ropes: Swing across gaps. Cannons: Fire players in the direction of their choice. Red Key: Temporarily activates mechanisms for 5 seconds. Shuriken: A portal throws 3 shurikens for 5 secs. Pools: You can swim in the pool for a limited time. But you should manage the stickman's bubbles (oxygen level). The Vex Series Legacy Vex 3 builds upon the success of its predecessors while introducing new elements that make the gameplay more challenging and rewarding. If you’re looking for a fast-paced, skill-testing adventure, Vex 3 delivers in every way. With creative levels, varied obstacles, and rewarding achievements, this game keeps players coming back for more. Whether you’re a casual gamer or a hardcore platforming enthusiast, Vex 3 offers a perfect blend of challenge and fun. Play Vex3 or Stickman Parkour now on OnlineGames.io and see if you have what it takes to conquer the labyrinth of traps and reach the green portal! What makes Vex 3 unique? Unlike many platformers where levels feel repetitive, Vex 3 offers creative and varied challenges in each act, ensuring players stay engaged and entertained. Can I play Vex 3 on OnlineGames.io? Yes! You can enjoy Vex 3 unblocked on OnlineGames.io, where it’s free to play and accessible on multiple devices. No flash plugin needed. Can I play Vex 3 on mobile? Absolutely! Vex 3 works seamlessly on web browsers for desktops, laptops, Chromebooks, Android and iOS devices. What happens when I unlock Hard Mode? After earning the Gold Trophy for an act, Hard Mode becomes available, presenting even more difficult challenges.

title: Foot Doctor
description: Foot Doctor is a 2D doctor game where you have many patients with injured feet. They are waiting for you to cure them as soon as possible because they are hurting! You must take care of them with caution. They believe you will heal them. Take them to your clinic one by one and start to heal them using your medical stuff in this simulator game! How to Play Foot Doctor Many patients come from different countries and suffer from their feet. They know your reputation. Some of them flew for kilometers and came to you with solid faith. The first thing to do is examine them. Determine what procedure you will follow. You have all the medical equipment you need. Then, start operating them and send them to their country happily! Choose Your Patient Begin with deciding on which patient you will take your clinic first. There is a blonde girl with stunning beauty, an American boy, and even Santa Claus. All of them are here for you to heal their injuries. Pick your favorite patient and make a diagnosis. Then, you can start your operations. Approach them with care, and we don't want them to get hurt! Injured Feet It is possible that you will encounter many kinds of cases. You will deal with broken foot bones, glass cuts, open wounds and swollen toes. Use your X-ray device to detect the broken bones. Remove glass fragments with tweezers. Stitch open wounds and apply a compress with ice to swollen toes. Avoid Infections You must prevent your patient's feet from becoming infected in any way. The area in which you treat your patients needs to be highly sterile. Otherwise, things may get worse. Avoid these kinds of infections using your medical experience. You are a renowned doctor, and everything you do must be perfect. Use the relevant medical spray and ointment to the wounded areas when necessary. Controls Use your mouse to pick objects and cure your patients Developer Foot Doctor was developed by FreezeNova. What is More? If you are a fan of Foot Doctor, you may also try My Dentist . Your main task in the game is to perform dental procedures for your patients. They have oral health diseases and are waiting for your treatments. Do your examinations, operate on their mouth and send them to their home with a happy smile! For further options, you may look up the doctor games tag on OnlineGames.io by following the link. If you have any suggestions or wishlist, do not hesitate to contact us!

title: Merge Pixel
description: Merge Pixel is an online merge game where you combine two pixelated characters and create new ones. You will unlock new characters inspired by Greek Mythology as you continue merging. Start with Achilles, give a life to Hermias. Epiktetos, Alexandros, Antipatros and many more are waiting for you to create them by merging characters! 🐉 Controls Drag the Mouse: Merge Characters How to Play Merge Pixel When you enter the game, you will see a board. Every 6 seconds, a new character will spawn on this board in the beginning. Your main aim in this puzzle game is to merge two identical pixelated characters and create a whole new one. In each level, you will be able to unlock new mythological characters. Additionally, the characters you have will earn you idle coins! Use your coins to upgrade the features of the merging. Upgrades in Merge Pixel 〽️ Item Forge Level: To increase the level of spawning characters, you can upgrade the Item Forge Level. This way, you can easily unlock 80 new characters. Item Forge Rate: To lower the time length of spawning, you can upgrade the Item Forge Rate. In the beginning, it takes approximately 6 seconds to form a new item. You can lower this duration to 5 seconds. Double Chance: To increase the chance of appearing two identical characters with higher levels, you can upgrade the Double Chance. Level Up Chance: To increase the chance of one level up when spawning an item, you can upgrade the Level Up Chance. Unlock New Characters 🧙‍♂️ As you make progress by merging pixelated items, you will get new characters. There are 80 different pixelated items on Merge Pixel. If you merge two characters of the same level, you will automatically unlock the character at the next level. Below, you can find some of the items listed! Timophanes Nairos Eukrestes Daimos Kairos Rhodos Developer MOVISOFT developed Merge Pixel. You May Also Like Did you enjoy playing Merge Pixel? You may also try playing Merge Brainrot . title: Simple Loot Idle
description: Simple Loot Idle is a free online clicker game where you battle monsters, gather loot, and grow stronger with every stage. Your character fights automatically, but the real power comes from you You will click to deal extra damage and upgrade your gear to take on even tougher enemies. With each monster you defeat, new loot drops into your inventory. Equip better items, sell the weak ones, and climb the levels in this addictive idle RPG. Controls Mouse Click: Hit the red sword to land bonus strikes. Hover: Glance at any stat or item to see its exact bonus. How to Play Simple Loot Idle When the game starts, take a quick look around the screen. The red buttons on the left are your upgrades. The big area in the middle shows the fight. Your green bar is your health, and the red bar under it belongs to the monster. Right below those bars sits a large red sword icon. Clicking that sword makes your hero swing faster. On the right side you’ll see empty squares; that’s your backpack and the slots where your gear goes. Fight with Monsters Your hero attacks on its own, so you can just watch if you like. If you want the monster to fall quicker, tap the red sword as fast as you can. When the monster’s health reaches zero, it drops an item. The new item jumps straight into your backpack. Move your mouse over it to check its stats. Manage Inventory If it looks stronger than what you’re wearing, equip a stronger gear at the right. Better gear means more damage and tougher armor. Not every item is useful. Weak pieces can crowd your bag. Hit the Sell button, click the things you don’t need, and they turn into coins. Use those coins on the red upgrade buttons. A good first buy is “Loot Chance,” because more drops help you power up faster. Gather Loot Every time you beat five monsters, you move to a higher stage. Each new stage has tougher enemies, but they also drop better loot. If your green bar finally empties and you fall in battle, press “Start Over.” You’ll go back to Stage 1, but you keep all the upgrades and the gear you’re wearing. That makes the next run easier and quicker. So the loop is simple: fight, grab loot, equip the good stuff, sell the junk, buy upgrades, and climb to the next stage. Keep going and see how far you can get! Developer Simple Loot Idle was crafted by denisolenison. More Idle Games If you liked this game, next you can play Religious Idle where you grow a quirky cult, assign zealots, and rake in divine funds. Perfect if you enjoy upgrading followers as much as loot. All idle games online are playable straight from your browser, no installs. Suit up, start swinging, and see how far your idle hero can climb!

title: Guns vs Magic
description: Guns vs Magic is an online adventure game where you step into the shoes of Silvius, a courageous student of magic. After your former mentor, Lucius, unleashed dark powers, your biggest mission is to save the world now. Battle with Lucius’s enchanted creatures and confront him in the finale episode. Strengthen your hero to fight with Lucius mercilessly! 🧙‍♀️ Controls Mouse: To Interact WASD or the Arrow Keys: To Move On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. Guns vs Magic Overview Once a nice and benevolent wizard, Lucius has succumbed to the sinister influence of a cursed crystal, turning him into an evil sorcerer intent on dominating the world. He unleashed dark powers, which you must withstand to save the world. Move forward in a dark castle by destroying Lucius’ army, and manage to reach the final stage in each level. You will come across the final boss in the last stage. Once you eliminate the boss, you can get out of the castle! Fight with Enchanted Creatures When you enter the castle, the army of Lucius welcomes you! This army consists of enchanted creatures. You need to defeat them all in every stage, and reach the final one. Once you successfully battle the final boss in the last stage, it means that you have completed the level. Do not forget to take your rewards, since you need coins and scrolls to strengthen your hero Silvius! Strengthen Silvius As you make progress level by level, you will face much more powerful dark forces. To survive their attacks, you need to strengthen Silvius. Upgrade his attack power, attack speed, health, and other magical features to battle with enchanted creatures profoundly. You can also upgrade his equipment, including a pistol, armor, and belt for even more power! Tips & Tricks for Guns vs Magic 👣 Keep moving to avoid enemy attacks in the dark castle. 💪 Upgrade attack power and speed to defeat enemies faster. 🤑 Collect coins and scrolls to unlock stronger upgrades. 🧙 Clear every stage by defeating all enchanted creatures. 🔫 Upgrade your pistol and equipment for more damage. Developer Guns vs Magic is developed by SMOKOKO. Similar Adventure Games Did you enjoy playing Guns vs Magic ? title: Stick vs Monster School 2
description: Stick vs Monster School 2 is an online adventure game where your character fights against zombies and other creatures on the way. In a mix of Super Mario and Minecraft worlds, try to survive from the attacks and reach the door at the end of the levels! Don’t forget to collect the coins to upgrade your gun and stickman. 🧟‍♂️ Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar or the E Key: Shoot How to Play Stick vs Monster School 2 When you enter the game, you will find yourself in a Minecraft-themed parkour filled with foes. Your stickman needs to survive during the zombie apocalypse on 60 levels! Help him reach the purple portal at the end of each level. While moving forward, you will encounter zombies, sick creatures and bosses. Shoot them all without thinking twice, or they will turn your stickman into a zombie! Take Advantage of TNTs 💥 There are lots of deadly foes that you will bump into while you march on. You must eliminate all of them; otherwise, the purple portal will not get activated. With a simple gun, it may be a little bit hard to get rid of them. Sometimes you will see TNTs on the way. Use them to your advantage. Point your gun at one of them and shoot. Boom! All the sick creatures will be gone in a second. Watch out for the Poisons ☠ From time to time, you need to pass poisonous lakes. If your stickman comes into contact with this dirty water, he will lose his life. You can perform double jumps to go over them, as a simple jump may not be enough. Developer Stickman vs Monster School Team published Stick vs Monster School 2. More Games Like This Did you like playing Stick vs Monster School 2? You may also give Marco a chance! Help him survive through mushrooms, snails, and other creatures while moving forward with Marco. For more options, feel free to visit our online adventure games library!

title: Mathematical Crossword
description: Ready to give a twist to regular crossword? Play it with numbers and signs! Mathematical Crossword is an online game that challenges you to place numbers and arithmetic symbols on a crossword grid . Randomly generated puzzles offers infinite amount of levels. Set the difficulty based on your grade and decide whether to include arithmetic symbols or not. Get ready to challenge your math skills with Mathematical Crossword! Controls Computers: Drag numbers and symbols with the mouse. Click on an empty cell and then on the number or symbol to place it. Mobiles: Drag numbers and symbols with your finger. Tap an empty cell to highlight it, then tap the number or symbol to place it. How to Play Mathematical Crossword Fill in the empty boxes on the grid with numbers and arithmetic symbols given below your screen. Drag numbers and symbols. You can also click on an empty cell and select the number or symbol below. Feel free to swap numbers and symbols as needed. You must fill all the squares to complete a puzzle. Remember, calculations are from left to right and from top to bottom. As you fill up all empty spaces, the game will automatically check your answers for you. Hints and Helpers Remove: Remove numbers or symbols from a square by tappping on the basket icon. Sort: You can also sort numbers and symbols for a tidy screen. Hints: You have 5 hints for each puzzle. Hints will place a random number correctly when used. I am unable to open the game. How can I fix this? One common reason for this issue is the use of an ad blocker, which can make the game unplayable. To resolve this, try disabling the ad blocker in your browser's extensions menu. Then, refresh the page to open the game. If the problem continues, please feel free to visit our support page or leave a comment below. Developer Gamepush created Mathematical Crossword. title: Football King
description: Are you ready to shake things up in unique stadiums? Football King is a 2D sports game in which you direct your football player and try to score as many goals as you can. In the two-player mode, you can challenge your friend on the field. Or, play against the CPU in the single-player mode. Feel free to participate in quick matches or tournaments in each mode. All the choices are yours in this arcade game! Show your best footballer skills to your rivals. Controls Single Player WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Shoot B: Super Shoot Two Players Player 1 WASD Keys: Move V: Shoot B: Super Shoot Player 2 Arrow Keys: Move K: Shoot L: Super Shoot Mobile Devices Use the buttons on the screen to move, jump and shoot. About Football King The first thing to do in this sports game is to choose the game mode you want to engage in. You can play against the CPU in the single-player mode. On the other hand, you can duel with a friend in the two-player mode. Or, both of you can team up and play against the CPU-controlled footballers. After the game mode selection, choose the team you want to play on behalf of in the stadium. You can also change your footballer from the customization section. Next, decide if you wish to play in the quick matches or the tournaments. In quick matches, you can engage in 1v1 against the CPU, 2v2 against the CPU or 1v1, 2v2 and Co-Op 2v2 games. Select Your Favorite Stadium In each mode, you can choose between five unique stadiums to play on. Standard Stadium: A regular football field with big lights. Neighborhood Stadium: Located in a lively neighborhood. Desert Stadium: Play under the sun in a desert setting. Atlantic Stadium: Located near the Atlantic Ocean. Beach Stadium: Surrounded by palm trees on a beach. Perform Super Shoots Your main objective in this soccer game is to defend your goal post while trying to score as many goals as possible. Use your super shots to perform magnetic shots. You will see an icon with a flame in the lower-left corner of the screen. When this icon is fulfilled, you are free to perform super shoots. They will enable your footballer to shoot the ball fiercely! Compared to the regular shot, the super shot is more difficult for the opponent to block. Developer FreezeNova developed Football King. What is More? You may also enjoy playing Basket Random . Your basketball player is a ragdoll that can only lean forward and backward. Master controlling the ragdoll and dunk the ball as many as you can! For further options, look for other online World Cup games on OnlineGames.io. title: Galactic Sniper
description: The intergalactic race is heating up. You get to take the role of a member of an elite team that recently discovered a planet. Humanoid robots deployed by aliens are spying on your research base. As the skilled sniper of your squad, your task is to take down mechs one by one. Now, go hunt some humanoids on a planet you know very little about. A mission couldn’t be more exciting! Galactic Sniper is a free online shooting game with intuitive controls. Various types of mechs, 30 levels with increasing difficulty, and an exciting sniper duty await you. You can play the game for free on OnlineGames.io, on a mobile or a computer. Controls Computers Hold the left or right mouse button to aim and release to shoot Mobiles Tap and hold to aim, release to shoot How To Play Galactic Sniper? Start off with the first level, where you need to shoot one robot with 3 bullets in your pocket. Right-click to aim and release it to shoot. Take down spy robots in the first few levels until you adjust to the game. After the third level, you'll come across moving robots, which are more difficult to target. Tackling Moving Mechs Mechs are moving around, tracking your base and taking pictures of it. Some of them are very fast, so you should focus while targeting them. Observe their patterns and anticipate their paths. Lead your shots to intercept their paths. Try shooting a little ahead of their trajectory. In this way, until the bullet arrives, mechs will be in the spot you aimed. You can practice how far from the mechs to aim a few times to find the ideal length. Use Your Ammo Smart You have limited ammo; use your bullets efficiently and don't take any careless shots. Assess your targets and available ammo at the outset of each level, devising a strategy for maximum efficiency. You can check the number of bullets at the top of your screen. Developer FreezeNova created this game. Explore Further If you like mobile friendly sniper games like Galactic Sniper and enjoy gameplay without any complex controls, your next stop is Sniper Elite . With thousands of players online everyday, it's one of the fun and casual sniper games of ours. In case you're looking for a more in-depth experience with 3D realistic visuals, take a look at our vast FPS games catalogue to pick among great titles.

title: Mech Shooter
description: Mech Shooter is a 3D robot shooting game where you, in the shoes of Humanoid Mech, will deal with many robots trying to destroy you and your team. The game map can be a factory or somewhere in the city. No matter where you are, you will be with your teammates. Use your Minigun and eliminate all enemy forces in one of the most thrilling action games on Online Games! How to Play Mech Shooter An intense battle between robots is waiting for you to take part in! To be the winner of the fight, you must eliminate all the enemy robots you will encounter. Otherwise, they will do the same for you. This shooting game will open a game randomly when you click on the “Play” button. The map you will play the game on is a complete surprise. It may be a factory, city or garage. All the wars you will participate in are team death matches. You will not be alone! Enjoy fighting back-to-back with your teammates. Mechs to Unlock As you win robot battles, you will earn coins. Use these coins to unlock more powerful mechs. Enter the “Armory” section to view your choices. There are 4 mechs to be unlocked. Humanoid Mech is already yours. The others are accessible with the same prize: 5000 coins. These are all robots with very unusual appearances. Choose your favorite one and set out to crush other robots. We will leave the names of them below for you. Humanoid Mech Heavy Mech Light Mech Spider Mech Buggy Minigun or Launcher? Get new weapons for your robot’s giant arms! In the beginning, you will have a Minigun, which has a lower damage rate than other weapons. So, getting a powerful weapon will greatly benefit you in intense robot wars. All the weapons have three features: Damage Rate, Firing Rate and Capacity. You can consider these features when buying a new one. title: Watermelon Suika
description: Summer surrounds us with upcoming vacations, ice cream trucks on every corner and DELICOUS FRUITS! Everybody knows that fruits taste very different and come in various colors and shapes in the summertime, from berries to cherries, bananas to ananas, coconuts to WATERMELONS! If you're fond of summer fruits like us, you will love this game: Watermelon Suika is an online merging game. You start with tiny little blueberries, drop them into a box, and match them up with identical ones until they change into huge watermelons. Engage and merge, or challenge yourself with puzzle levels! Let's get started! Controls Mouse Controls Hold LMB to move and release to drop Keyboard Controls Use arrow keys to move Press the spacebar to drop Mobile Controls Drag your finger to move and release to drop How to Play Watermelon Suika It's easy to play but captivating. Start with a blueberry. Drop into the box . You have endless sources of fruits . A new one will be on your tweezers after dropping one. Drop them all in a way that identical fruits collide with each other. A new fruit will emerge when two of the same shape collide. For example, two blueberries can be transformed into one strawberry. Merge your way to much bigger fruits such as pears, kiwis, coconuts, and melons . Shake the Box Once in a while, fruits might use some help to reach each other. You can push the box by pressing the icons at the bottom of your screen. You have 5 push limits for each side in a game. But if you shake the box too hard, fruits may drop out of the box , leading to the end of the game. Star Suika and Cat Suika Star Suika: Suppose you'd like to play the game with star-shaped fruits. Open star mode on the main menu. Playing star mode is a bit harder as the fruits will not roll as much as in classic mode. Cat Suika: You can play the game with cats as well. From orange tabbies to chubby Persian cats, you can merge them until you get the Balinese Cat. You'll explore many cat species along the way. Adventure Levels Watermelon Suika is an online game offering diversity in gameplay. Adventure levels twist the game by adding a touch of logic problems . Puzzle levels offer physics puzzles , where you drop the fruit in specific locations to jump over a platform. On the other hand, draw levels involve drawing objects around the box to move fruits so that they merge into one another. More Online Merging Games If you like merging games, here is a great game that'll appetize you even more. Combine cakes to run a bakery and discover new recipes, such as cupcakes and donuts. Find more online puzzle games on OnlineGames.io by following the link.

title: Super Mini Racing
description: A super duper race is about to begin in just a few minutes! Choose your car and take your position behind the wheel for Super Mini Racing —a 3D racing game that offers both single-player and two-player modes. You'll be driving super mini cars across 10 different racetracks, competing to be the winner and claim the prize. Controls Single Player or Player 1 Steer: WASD keys Respawn: R Player 2 Steer: Arrow keys Respawn: M How to Play Super Mini Racing Select either single-player or 2-player mode. Choose from 10 unique maps and set the difficulty to easy, medium, or hard. Race through 10 challenging levels using your chosen vehicle. Play against bots or challenge a friend in split-screen mode . Use the arrow keys to drive and steer , and WASD keys along with arrow keys for split-screen mode. Press R or M to respawn as needed. Finishing in first place will earn you 1,000 coins and unlock new levels. Perform impressive maneuvers like drifts and airtime to multiply your earnings . Use the coins you earn to purchase new, faster vehicles and become the ultimate racing champion. Score Big! Boost your earnings by executing cool moves like drifts, jumps, and airtime . The crazier the stunt, the higher your score, bringing you closer to purchasing your dream car. In addition to the 1000 coins you earn for winning a race , you can enhance your score through maneuvers. The airborne tracks make it easy to get airtime and perform jumps, and the longer you stay airborne or the farther you jump, the more points you'll score. Drifting while steering will also earn you extra coins. Use your coins to buy faster and better vehicles, helping you become the fastest driver on the track. Developer Super Mini Racing was created by FreezeNova . More 2-Player Racing Games If you love the split-screen mode where you race with a friend on the same device, we recommend 2 Player Crazy Racer . Take the race to a retro town and enjoy pushing vintage cars to their speed limits. For more 2-player games , check out our catalog filled with co-op and competitive games that you can play with a friend on the same device.

title: Perfect First Date
description: Perfect First Date is one of the best dress up game for girls , where they, as fashion gurus, help the girls get ready for their first date! This is a big day. Because they will meet "the" lover candidate for the first time. And the first impression always matters. They need to be prepared carefully. Start this dress-up game with many options and get the girls ready for their perfect first date! How to Play Perfect First Date When you enter this dress up game, you will see 4 female figures lined up side by side. Start preparing them for their wonderful day by clicking on the top one. First, begin with skin cleansing. The best makeup is applied to clean skin! Cleaning the Skin First, clean the girl's skin with facial cleansing gel. Then, proceed to a deeper cleansing with a clay mask. Since the clay mask will dry the skin, it's time to use intense moisturizer! Use yellow cream with cucumber extract to support moisturizing. Do not forget to use under-eye patches to relieve eye fatigue. And finally, you can now complete the skincare routine by using the stick cream. She is ready for the makeup now! Applying the Makeup Now it's time for the makeup part. Start by choosing lipstick. Here, you can find pink, green, navy blue, red, purple, and dark pink tones. Let's choose eye shadow. Choosing shades that match the lips can give the girl a smooth look. Then, determine the eyebrow color and shape. Do you want her eyebrows to be thin or thick? If you want to use blush, you can choose between pink and peach tones among the colors. After determining the eye color, the preparation part of the face area is completed! Final Touches You are now in the final stage of preparing the girl. Give her a hairstyle and choose the hair's color. If you want, you can also give her hair a second color tone. Then, dress her up with one of the most stunning dresses and complete it with accessories. She is now completely ready for that big day! Controls Use your mouse click to prepare the girls for their first date. Other Girl Games If you enjoy playing dress-up games like Perfect First Date, we strongly recommend you check out the games below. Keep coming back to discover new dress-up games! Princess Influencer Salon : In the game Princess Influencer Salon, you assist a princess with skincare and outfit preparation for a night out or event. Princesses Prom Night : The prom night that the princesses have been waiting for is finally here. Getting these princesses ready for their wonderful prom night is your job in the game Princesses Prom Night.

title: Penalty Challenge
description: Penalty Challenge is a soccer game where you are playing both as a goalkeeper and a penalty taker. You are responsible for taking penalties into the goal and catching your opponent's penalties when it is their turn. Enjoy one of the most competitive football games, and don't let your opponent score. Win the shootout, and progress step by step to the World Cup final! How to Play Penalty Challenge First, you need to start by choosing your team. When you enter the game, you will see 32 countries and their flags, including the United States, Germany, and Argentina. You decide which one you want to be a player of. When it's your turn as a penalty taker, you must take all the penalties into the goal one by one. Each team has the right to score 5 penalties. You must not miss any penalty. When you move into the goalkeeper position, you must catch all the penalties your opponent scores. You can't let them get the golden cup! Initially, your team will start taking penalties. The rest will proceed in turn between the two teams. Team with the most goals wins the shootout. As you win matches, you will unlock new matches with more skilled opponents. Penalty Challenge offers 10 matches in total. Finish the tournament in first place and claim the World Cup! Go to the main menu if you want to restart with a different flag. To remove your progress, click the icon in the bottom-left. How can I send precise penalties? You can take the best penalties by determining your kick angle well. You also need to adjust the hitting intensity. If you move the mouse forward strongly, the ball's movement speed will also be hectic. Don't underestimate the other side's goalkeeper because he can make very solid saves. How can I save the ball? You scored the penalty, and now it's your turn to save the ball. You must prevent your opponent from scoring as much as possible. While taking the penalty kickout, carefully observe the player's movements and predict where the ball may go. Move the goalie's gloves in the direction of the ball to save it. Controls To shoot the ball, swipe the mouse. To catch the ball, move the mouse. Developer Penalty Challenge was created by Codethislab. Explore Other Soccer Games If you love playing penalty games, you may also like Penalty Kick . With amazing visuals, it's an online penalty shootout game. See how many kicks out of fifteen penalties you can make to score points. Play against a top goalkeeper and show off your soccer skills. Or, you may look for other online soccer games . You can find dozens of games on the website that you can access for free and enjoy. Feel free to leave a comment about your gaming experience in the comment section below!

title: Horse Rider
description: Horse Rider is the game where you take your horse to competitions. You can experience the chance to be an equestrian in horse sports. Begin the journey as you jump over hurdles and race against the rivals to win the courses. Try to complete the laps while you are increasing the speed of the horse to reach the first place. Championship Tournement There are 3 tournments and a lot of levels • New York Tournment • Oman Tournment • Dubai Tournment Select a player There are 5 players/horses, one better than other • John • Paul • PII • XLL • MML Select Laps • The laps can be easy/medium/expert. Level Up Knock Out • Complete the lap in a specific period of time Horse Rider Controls: • W or up arrow to speed up • Space to jump

title: BTS Signature Fashion Style
description: Wanna be the personal stylist for each member of BTS, the global K-pop band? Enter the world of fashion with BTS Signature Fashion Style, a dress-up game showing a unique blend of fandom and fashion. If you're a fan of BTS, you'll love engaging with BTS in the creative and interactive way that this game offers. This fashion game allows you to explore your fashion creativity by mixing and matching outfits for RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V, and Jungkook. We know that each of them are known for their distinct style. You'll find the fashion items suitable for each BTS member, from RM's often bold and eclectic choices to Jin's sophisticated elegance, Suga's laid-back cool, J-Hope's vibrant energy, Jimin's chic, V's artistic flair, and Jungkook's youthful vibe. This game not only tests your fashion sense but also deepens your connection with BTS members by understanding their style preferences. Whether you're styling them for a concert or a casual day out, your choices can bring out the unique style of each member. Controls Click or tap to play How to Play BTS Signature Fashion Style Start by selecting which BTS member you want to style. Each member has a default outfit that you can completely overhaul. Click through categories like tops, bottoms, shoes, jackets, hairstyles, hats, tattoos and accessories. You can even pick a mic for them to hold at the concert. Each has a range of items that reflect different styles and themes. Click on items to dress your chosen BTS member. You can mix and match until you find the perfect outfit. If you need to reset an outfit or start fresh, the "Remove All" button is your go-to. Feel free to try different combinations. The game encourages creativity, so there's no wrong way to style! Once happy with your creation, save it. You might also have options to share your styled look on social media or with friends. After styling one member, you can move on to another, exploring the diverse fashion tastes within BTS. More Dress-Up Game If you're enjoying the fashion aspect of BTS Signature Fashion Style, you might also like other free dress-up games on OnlineGames.io. From wedding fashion to street styles, you'll find dozens of options.

title: Mine Clone
description: Mine Clone is a 3D block game where you can build a home or a deluxe castle without limits. You have many block options, and they are unlimited in number. Use your imagination and build your dream world with the help of the blocks. Turn your dreams into reality in one of the most captivating Minecraft games ! How to Play Mine Clone Before starting to build anything, first design the building plan in your mind. How many floors will the thing you build have? Will there be a garden? What about the pool? Then, go to the highest place on the map and take a look around. Find the best place to build your dream environment. When you find the place, you are now ready to get to work! The best part of this game is its many block options with varying materials and textures. And you can use them unlimitedly. If you are ready, begin to give your virtual world shape! View Your Inventory To see your options, open your inventory by using the E key. A window will open, and you will see the blocks. There are 21 blocks, and each has a different material. Some of stone, some of wood and sand. There is this watery block that you can use to create a pool or lake. There is also one full of books for bookworms. The other 5 blocks consist of grasses, mushrooms and flowers. They are all at your disposal if you want to build a garden! First Break, Then Place You must clear the area from unnecessary things before implementing your building plan. You have to place your structure on a flat surface. To do that, clear away the trees and hills to make the place available for building. Create an area according to the size and length of your construction. If you want to make a pool or garden additionally, you should also take these into consideration. Controls WASD/Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump 1-9 Number Keys: Switch Blocks Left-Click: Remove Right-Click: Build E Key: Inventory ESC: Pause Developer Mine Clone was developed by FreezeNova. More Games Like This If you like playing Mine Clone, you may also try Minecraft Classic . The game allows you to dig, carve and build whatever you desire. It offers lots of block options, and you can use them without thinking about whether the blocks will be enough! For further options, you may look up other adventure games online . title: WarBrokers.io
description: WarBrokers.io is an online war game where your pixel becomes a shooter. Customize your player and control the vehicles to survive the missiles. The fights are not always easy but with the help of the team mates you can reach the victory. Join the adventure and make your pixel the best character in the game. There are 4 modes available: • Battle Royale - scramble to find the best loot and fight to be the last survivor. • Classic - Death Match, Escort, Package Drop, Missile Launch, Bomb Disposal • Dead End City - A blend of battle royale loot finding with classic deathmatch respawn • Competitive - Team up with your friends in a 4x4 match WarBrokers.io Controls: • WASD or arrow keys to move or drive • Left click to shoot • R to reload • Space bar to jump • M to access menu

title: Car Rush
description: Car Rush is a driving game in which you control a car alongside other automobiles and trucks on a highway. And your girlfriend is in the seat next to you. You must go cautiously on the roadway to ensure her and your own safety. You shouldn't collide with any automobiles while traveling forward. You must race this roadster to the finish line before time runs out. Enjoy one of the best driving games with excellent graphics! 🏁 How to Play Car Rush Your primary mission is to get this roadster to the finish line before time runs out. You must first choose the map you want to drive on. If this is your first time playing the game, you can only start with the first map. As you progress through the game, two other amazing maps will be unlocked. While you progress with the mountain view on the first map, you will see the Egyptian pyramids behind you on the second map. On the third map, you will travel with the city's lights at night. Basics of Car Rush Each track has a time constraint that you must adhere to. You will not be able to advance to the next level if you do not cross the finish line by the end of this period. In the upper central section of the game screen, you can see how much time is remaining. In order to access a new map, you have to finish every track on the one you are now driving on. The time limit is visible in the upper left corner of the screen. You can see how much time has passed since the start of the race, just below the time limit. You can see your speed in the bottom left corner of the screen. Avoid Collision with Any Vehicle You will see many vehicles and even trucks driving with you along the road. They also move with high speed and with maneuvers. Colliding with any of them will slow you down, and you will lose time. Avoid any collisions to reach the finish line on time. Don't Go Off the Path Like colliding with a car, going off the road also slows you down. You might even go off the highway and crash with a sign table or a tree. You may lose steering control, especially if you enter the turning points at a high speed. When making a sudden turn in such places, your vehicle may skid. Therefore, entering the turning points at an appropriate speed is essential. Controls To move the car, press the Arrow keys. To brake and accelerate, use the brake and gas pedals if you play on your phone or tablet. Use the left and right arrows to steer the car. Developer Car Rush is created by codethislab. You May Also Like If you like playing Car Rush, you may also like Rally Champion . You only need to use the left and right arrow keys to drive in this racing game. For more game options, you may look up other car games on OnlineGames.io. Please get in touch with us if you have any requests or recommendations!

title: Gigga io
description: It's an intense battle between tanks and geometric shapes! Gigga io is a 2D io game where you try to advance your tank by shooting various geometric shapes and projectiles. It is the fan-made version of Diep.io! In the meantime, there will be other tank pilots to deal with in the arena. Level up and enhance your tank's features to dominate the playing field in this strategy game! Enjoy playing each of the three modes. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Steer the Tank Left-Click or the Spacebar: Shoot Mouse: Look Around and Aim How to Play Gigga io The first thing to do is to determine which game mode you want to play. There are three unique game modes: Free For All, 2 Team Deathmatch and Domination. After all is set, you will find yourself on a dynamic battlefield. Your main objective in this io game is to direct your basic tank in this field and shoot the geometric shapes and projectiles to advance it up. Each shape and projectile you destroy will bring you upgrade points . Use them to enhance your tank's features and dominate the field! Slippery Shapes Shooting the shapes will not be that easy! Because they are slippery, they will begin sliding when you shoot them. You must develop precise aiming skills to clear them away from the playing field. Small ones are harder to target but easier to destroy. On the other hand, you can easily target larger ones, but it takes time to destroy them. Fortunately, each shape you destroy will earn you upgrade points. Other Tank Pilots There will also be other tank pilots on the battlefield. However, you should be careful! Not everyone may be friendly. Especially those who have a more advanced tank than yours have a high probability of destroying you. That's why it's important to upgrade your tank. You can increase its health, damage, speed, body damage, bullet damage and more … You must dominate the field for ultimate joy! Developer Gigga io was developed by Diep.io fans. Discover More Games For further options, you may look for the io games online tag on OnlineGames.io. We are constantly trying to expand our game range. If you have any suggestions or a wishes, please contact us!

title: Poptropica
description: Remember, all the kids in your class were obsessed with that book series called "Diary of a Wimpy Kid." Greg was big of a deal, wasn't he? Millions have loved middle schooler Greg's funny adventures since the release of the first best-selling book by Jeff Kinney. Wimpy Kid Greg's fame extended books and inspired an even more wonderful series in the virtual realm: Poptropica! Poptropica is an online adventure game in which kids play, travel, solve mysteries and complete quests on islands. At each level, islanders suffer from a shared problem and wait for their hero to rescue them. Some islanders complain about thieves, while others are looking for their lost kids. In each world, walk around, jump, climb, talk with locals, seek hints and solve puzzles. Endless possibilities are ahead of you. Now, hop onto your balloon! We will write a heroic tale of your adventures! Play the epic game Poptropica for free on OnlineGames.io now! How to Play Poptropica? In this game, everybody goes on their own adventure. You can take on a number of challenges and write your own story. First, you will spawn on the Home Island, where you can customize your avatar, purchase costumes, and even adopt pets. While you may encounter a few side quests at home, the adventures are mainly on other islands. Find the hot air balloons to travel to other worlds or click on the map from the menu. Pick an island from the map and fly there. Walk, jump and hide by using your mouse or WASD keys. Understand the islander's problem. Find hidden items, costumes, and jewelry. Get acquainted with NPCs, trade items, or solve mini puzzles for them to complete each quest. If you need further guidance, keep reading this post to learn Poptropica tips and tricks. Remember to create a Poptropican account if you'd like to save your progress and continue where you left off next time. Controls Move around: WASD or mouse Interact: Left Click Poptropica Islands Learn about levels, quests, and difficulty levels. choose the one that appeals to you and start your journey. Home Island Adopt a pet, customize your avatar, make a few friends and get a home. It's all chill here. Arabian Nights 1 & 2 Difficulty Level: Medium Find the thieves' cave and bring back his most cherished possession! Fairytale Islands Difficulty Level: Easy Someone has stolen the happy endings of the people. Solve the mystery and create new happy endings. 24 Carrot Difficulty Level: Easy Kids, carrots, and a cat have gone missing! Find the cat, and it'll help you rest! Poptropican 1 & 2 Difficulty Level: Medium PoptropiCon is the hottest ticket in town. It'll take all your wits- and a few masks to crash the party! Survival 1 & 2 Difficulty Level: Medium Night has fallen, and you're alone in the Yukon forest. You need to build a fire quickly as the temperature is dropping. Timmy Failure Difficulty Level: Medium If danger is lurking and criminals are hiding around every corner, you require the services of the most skilled detective money can buy. However, Timmy Failure is not the one you're looking for, even though he may disagree. You're on the verge of encountering the most bizarre group of individuals ever to appear on a Poptropica Island. Escape From Pelican Rock Difficulty Level: Hard Pelican Rock is the toughest prison ever built. And after you're framed for a crime you didn't commit, it's your new home! Use your wits to devise an escape plan and your nerve to pull it off. But getting out is just the beginning -- because the real criminal is still out there! Time Tangled Difficulty Level: Easy A malfunctioning time machine has messed up history! Go back in time and set things right. Because if you don't, who knows what the future will hold? Mythology Difficulty Level: Hard Zeus is seeking a champion for a mission to battle monsters, swim the ocean depths, and descend into the underworld. Will you be the hero of the Mythology island? Tips and Tricks Each move you make changes the ending of the game. A wrong choice, even at the early stages, might cause you to lose it in the end. Some of the missions might be very complex. However, following this guide will help you complete them easily. Meet with Islanders While seeking hints to solve out the quest, your primary source of information is islanders. Click on people, animals and even skeletons to interact with them. First, find out what the problem is and who may have caused it. After learning what's going on, seek guidance from some of them. Certain characters will help you a lot in this challenge. Take a Tour It is crucial to know which is where on the island. Explore the area thoroughly, and learn about certain places that might help you in this journey. While completing a quest, you need to re-visit certain areas a few times. For example, in Arabian Nights island, you should know how to go to the bazaar and the lady with the spyglass. Collect Items You will need a bunch of items to solve puzzles. Click on them to collect. Trade them with better items or use them strategically to achieve your goal. Some of the levels include roadmaps where you view which items to collect and steps to follow. Roadmaps are wonderful assistants in your journey. However, if there is no road map on the level you play, learn some tips from islanders about where you can find the necessary items. To access or use an item acquired before, click on the menu at the top right of the screen and pick the handbag. Gather All the Pieces Together All the pieces of information and items are meant to serve a certain purpose. Figure out how you can combine them. Put them in order. Gather all the pieces together to solve the mystery. Remember, the game has a massive playground and exploration takes time. Poptropica is not just about completing quests, but discovery, social interaction and unique stories you create. Have fun and enjoy your journey! Arcade Mode If you'd rather play a quick game instead of jumping into adventure, go home and select arcade from the main menu. You'll see a few multiplayer mini-games that you can play with online players. Sky Dive, Balloons, and Star Link are some of them. Play them all, chat and become friends with other Poptropicans. Is Poptropica safe for my kid? Poptropica is not only safe for kids of any age, but it also features great educational elements. The game allows kids to have fun while improving their cognitive skills. Solving puzzles improves kids' problem-solving skills and creativity, while completing quests provides a sense of accomplishment and self-confidence. On the top of that, social interactions develop kids' vocabulary and literacy skills. Developer Jeff Kinney Group created this game. Pearson Education published the game. Similar Games If you've completed all the levels, worry not! Poptropica gets regular updates and new levels. Keep coming back to see if anything is new. Until then, you can play other free adventure games online on our platform. For a quick, fun puzzle with an original storyline, visit Help the Hero !

title: My Tiny Market
description: My Tiny Market is an online tycoon game where you own a supermarket. Plant tomato seeds, raise chickens and sell your products to your beloved customers. Hire a cashier and market clerk to help you manage your business. Restock shelves and serve your customers to the best of your ability! Controls Tap and Hold: To Move My Tiny Market Overview You own a supermarket. And, it needs to function properly for your customers. Start by planting tomato seeds on your land and wait for the tomatoes to ripen. Then, move them to their shelves so that your customers can get them from there. In this idle game, make sure that your store keeps running at full speed! Raise Chickens To sell eggs, you need to get a chicken. Feed them with your tomatoes, and the chickens will give you fresh eggs. Afterwards, collect the eggs and move them to the egg shelf. You can also hire gardeners to do these jobs for you. This way, you can deal with other critical business management tasks. Plant Wheat Seeds Besides tomatoes, you can also plant wheat seeds in the green field. This way, you will also be selling wheat to your customers, and your income will multiply. Customers who know the freshness of your groceries will come straight to your store! FAQs Is it reasonable to hire more workers than necessary? We suggest you hire as many workers as necessary. Because if there are so many workers around the market, managing them will not be easy. Can I customize my avatar? Absolutely! You can customize your avatar and get great costumes for him from the Customization section. Will my progress be saved? Yes, your progress is saved automatically so that you can continue playing My Tiny Market any time you want. Developer Inlogic Software developed this tycoon game. Similar Games If you enjoy playing My Tiny Market, you may also give Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier a try. In the game, you will work as a cashier who scans the barcodes of the groceries, takes payments and stocks the shelves. Feel free to reach dozens of online tycoon games that onlinegames.io offers! Enhance your management skills by establishing your own business.

title: Dan the Man
description: Step into the shoes of Dan the Man , a fearless street fighter on a mission to protect villagers and take down enemies. Punch, kick, and gear up with weapons as you battle through action-packed levels, uncover hidden areas, and prove you’ve got what it takes to survive! Game Overview In Dan the Man , you play as Dan , a brave fighter on a mission to protect the villagers from the corrupted police. Each level is packed with enemies, traps, and secrets to uncover. Fight your way through with kicks, punches, weapons, and ninja stars, while keeping Dan safe from attacks. Along the way, you can heal with food, gear up with weapons, and even discover hidden areas filled with treasures, supplies, and danger. Game Features Action-Packed Combat: Kick, punch, shoot, and throw knives or ninja stars to defeat enemies. Weapons: Find or buy weapons from the village shop to gain the upper hand. Healing Items: Collect apples and other food to restore your health. Secret Areas: Discover hidden spots with treasure, supplies, and sometimes even tougher enemies. How to Play Controls Left: A or ⬅️ Right: D or ➡️ Jump: SPACE Attack (Kick/Shoot/Throw Knives or Ninja Stars): C / Left Click Use the Environment Food like apples restores health and keeps you fighting longer. Weapons can be found along the way or purchased from the village shop. Secret Areas may hide powerful items, but beware, they may also contain enemies! Good to Know Avoid getting shot or kicked, because each hit decreases your life bar. Keep an eye out for hidden paths, as they often lead to valuable treasures or supplies. FAQs Can I heal during a fight? Yes, eating apples or other food items restores health. Where do I get weapons? Weapons can be found as you progress or bought from the village shop. Similar Games If you like this game but fighters aren’t your favorite, we’ve got other options. If you want something more adventurous, try Marco , where you’re a traveler and must survive the wild.

title: Drac & Franc
description: In Drac & Franc , everything is about teamwork. Grab a friend and play together as a fun, spooky team. Help each other and try to finish all the levels as fast as you can. You are timed, so finish every level quickly to get a better score. Game Overview Drac & Franc is a fun puzzle and arcade adventure game where you control two cool monsters, a vampire and a Frankenstein buddy. You need to work together to pass each level. Each monster can do special things that the other can’t, so it is important to work as a team. You will solve fun puzzles, jump on platforms, and help each other reach the end of every level. The faster you finish, the better your score. How to Play Drac & Franc? The gameplay is simple: finish all the levels as fast as you can by reaching the big door. The two spooky friends have different powers, so you need to think smart and use both of them to get past the traps. Move, jump, collect items, and press buttons to open doors or reach new spots. You can play alone by switching between the two characters, or play with a friend and help each other. Team up, act fast, and spook on! Move Drac: WAD Move Franc: ⬅️⬆️➡️ Good to Know! title: Julie Beauty Salon
description: Julie Beauty Salon is a glam up makeover game where you run a beauty salon. Every makeover is a mini masterpiece in this fun, stylish browser game. You’re a beauty expert in charge of transforming a fabulous girl with bold makeup, trendy hairstyles, and colorful manicures. If you've ever dreamed of being a stylist or just love mixing and matching beauty looks, this free game is perfect for you. Controls Click or tap to select makeup tools, hairstyles, and nail polish. How to Play Julie Beauty Salon Ccomplete unique beauty routines one by one: makeup, hair styling, and nail art for three different girls. Start by selecting the first part from the intro screen. Our girl needs a full transformation! Start with Makeup Pick a lipstick, swipe on colorful blush, and choose stylish eyelashes from the right panel. Want soft glam or bold drama? You decide! If you complete the make up, move on to the next level: hair makeover! Give your client a fresh new hairstyle. You can switch cuts, change colors (even go two-tone like pink and blue), and make them shine! If she looks happy with the end result of her hair, next is NAILS! Manicure & Nail Art Make the manicure, and apply nail polish. Then add some glitter, french tips of your preferred color or some other nail art options. Finish it off with rings, bracelets or watches to complete the look. Once you've styled all three parts, you’ll see green checkmarks on each portrait, meaning your job is done! Take a screenshot of your makeover and share it with friends! If you want, you can always press the refresh button to go wild with new looks. Developer Julie Beauty Saloon is created by FreezeNova Games. Is Julie Beauty Saloon safe for kids? Yes! Julie Beauty Saloon is a kid-friendly makeover game with no violence or inappropriate content. title: Hover Racer Pro
description: Hover Racer Pro is a 3D racing game where the player steers a hover ship in a map full of jumping ramps. This ship can go almost as fast as an airplane . You must become an expert at driving it. Otherwise, it can easily get out of control. Perform jumps with your vehicle on the map's ramps. Create different gaming experiences for yourself by trying different moves with your ship in this hover game. How to Play Hover Racer Pro There is a map in the game. And this map is full of different platforms. You can try different moves with your ship on these platforms. Push the limits by testing how fast your ship can reach. Your ship also has a booster feature. You can even race a plane using this! Hover Ships You have 6 different hover options. All of them are in different shapes and colors. Try each one one by one and choose your favorite. Our favorite is green vehicle number 5. Every hover has a booster. Using this, you can increase the speed of vehicles up to 800 km/h. Pink Areas on the Map The red bar at the bottom right of the game screen shows the health of the vehicle, and the blue bar shows the booster power. Your vehicle may be damaged. Your booster also decreases as you use it. You need to refill it. You can fill both of these bars by hovering over the pink bar on the map. Your Options in the Hover Racer Pro In the game, you can make decisions about how you want to play your game. You have some options. You can determine your own game settings from the Options section. You can open the Options menu by pressing the double line icon on the right side of the screen. If you wish, you can remove the health limitation of your vehicle from here. You can use your booster and your vehicle's health bar as a single bar. Instead of going to the pink area and filling the booster bar, you can have it fill automatically by selecting the "Auto Boost Regeneration" option. Controls To steer the ship, use the WASD or the Arrow keys. To use the booster, press the Left-shift key. Press the Space key to use the brake. What is More? If you like playing Hover Racer Pro, you may also like the first game of the series, Hover Racer . In this sci-fi-themed 3D racing game, you take control of a hover. title: Dynamons World
description: Dynamons World is a popular online role-playing game. Here, you get to be a Dynamon Captain, catch, train, and lead your team of cute yet mighty creatures to victory. You'll meet extraordinary creatures like Robocanyx, Jaxaguar, Sauryx, Dagaryx, Tydonyx, and many more, all eager to join your ranks. Explore worlds filled with hidden gems, battle with rival trainers, and discover dozens of wild Dynamons with five elemental types. Fire, plant, water, electric, and shadow—you'll need to know your Dynamons team's strengths and weaknesses, think smart and plan cleverly, and use their special attacks and power-ups to win every battle. How to Play Dynamons World In Dynamons World, you'll begin your journey under the guidance of Jovani, a skilled Dynamons expert, who will teach you the basics of becoming a Dynamon captain. Your adventure kicks off with an important decision—choosing your first Dynamon! You have three exciting options: Flowingo (Plant type): A nature-based Dynamon with balanced abilities. Fengo (Fire type): A fiery companion with strong offensive moves. Tailton (Water type): A versatile Dynamon ideal for strategic gameplay. Soon, you'll start other wild Dynamons weaken them, then use your action cards to capture these mighty creatures and bring them on your team. Gather diamonds to level up your Dynamons, unlocking new action cards to bolster your strategy. Your backpack holds treasures, power-ups and boosters collected on your journey. Use these items in battles for a strategic advantage. Take on other trainers in Dynamons World, aiming to establish yourself as the strongest Dynamon Captain! Winning the Battles in Dynamons World Select the perfect action card for the moment to maximize your impact. Keep your backpack well-stocked with items that could turn the tide of battle. Only attempt to capture when the opponent is significantly weakened, otherwise your precious catch cards will be wasted. Craft a team where each Dynamon's abilities work in harmony with the others. Upgrade your Dynamons as soon as possible if they reach the required XP level. This will strengthen their attack, defense and aiming levels. Fun Features of Dynamons World Open-world RPG game with auto-saved progress directly in your browser cache Dozens of Dynamons, each with distinct abilities and elemental types like fire, water, plant, electric, and shadow. Journey through vibrant worlds, from the colorful Chinese Festival to the enigmatic Bonus Cave, packed with hidden treasures and challenges. You can compete with rival Dynamon trainers. Strategic battles where every turn provides an opportunity to outplay your opponent with the right action card or item. You can enjoy the game on web browsers and mobile devices without any cost on OnlineGames.io. Is Dynamons World online or offline? Dynamons World is an online game. You'll need an internet connection to play. Is Dynamons a Pokémon? No, Dynamons are not Pokémon. They are original creatures featured in the Dynamons game series, inspired by monster-catching RPGs like Pokémon. While they share similarities, such as elemental types and turn-based battles, Dynamons have their own unique designs, mechanics, and universe. Is Dynamons World a good game? Yes, Dynamons World is a great game, especially for fans of RPGs and monster-catching games. It combines exploration, strategy, and exciting battles with charming Dynamon designs. Its accessible gameplay and regular updates make it popular among players of all ages. How many types of Dynamons in the world are there? There are five elemental types in Dynamons World: fire, water, plant, electric, and shadow (dark). Each type has its own strengths and weaknesses. Which is the most powerful Dynamon? Players often consider Dynamons like Draxygus and Orquanys to be among the strongest. What are the legendary Dynamons? Legendary Dynamons are rare and exceptionally powerful creatures with unique abilities. Some well-known legendary Dynamons include Draxygus, Tholanyx, Krimson, Zomok, Kitine, Ramethyst, Jaxaguar, Amuranther, and Tydonyx.

description: Let's test how long you can withstand the attack waves. You can get help from 12 different heroes, each with different abilities, and fight side by side. They are compelling and ready to protect the land at any cost against any threat! You can start the game by finally determining the difficulty level of the game. Building Towers When you start the game, you will see a map and the game heroes on it. Build your towers by clicking on the circular areas. It would be in your best interest to strategically determine the areas where you will erect the towers. You can build the towers named below. Archer: It attacks enemies coming from land and air by sending arrows. Infantry: It sends armed infantry to intercept the enemies. Cannoneer: It eliminates enemies using the land route by throwing rocks at them. Magic Dragon: It fights ground enemies and air troops through magic. Facing Various Enemies You will fight different types of enemies. Some will come by land, while others will come by flying. There are pirates, barbosas and lupins. They all have their own features. For example, barbosas have maces to fight, and lupins can expertly evade melee attacks. As you progress through the game, you will unlock many different types of enemies. Heroes to Choose This game offers you a wide range of hero catalogs. Upgrading and strengthening them can make your game more enjoyable. Sir Galahad Ashi Wukong Jungle Lord Thor Power Ups in the Hero Rush Tower Defense You can obtain some booster items from the "Store" section of the main menu, such as the Frost Gem and the Meteor Call. You can help defend your lands by using them in addition to your towers. Controls Use your mouse to build towers and cast abilities. Use the WASD or the arrow keys to see the map and navigate. Use your mouse scroll to zoom in and out. Soon, the artist turns to the right. Make sure he doesn't see them kissing. When the love scale is filled in the upper left corner of the screen, you can move to the next level. In later levels, additional visitors will arrive at the park, making your mission even more challenging. Timing is crucial – look for moments when both the artist and the newcomers are preoccupied. title: Masked Forces
description: Masked Forces is the perfect game for shooter fans. Prepare yourself with the best weapons and enter the battlefield. Create your own strategy and start shooting the opponents. The armor will help you protect your body from the bullets. Make sure you win every battle and become victorious before anyone else. Before you start the battles, you get the opportunity to equip the soldier in the weapons and armor section. Weapons of Masked Forces Purchase or upgrade your weapons in the weapon menu. They will be unlocked as you progress through the game. A classic Deagle or heavier weapons such as Thompson SMG and HMG. You can even pick a grenade. Armors of Masked Forces A good armor will protect you from enemies' bullet attacks. Ensure you are well protected by buying a new one or upgrading the one you have. Select between Watchdog, Hellbound, Vanquisher and many more armors. Daily Rewards Masked Forces also has a daily reward feature that gifts players cash and XP every 24 hours, As you level up, you get more cash rewards. Remember to come back every day and claim yours. Masked Forces Gameplay The gameplay is intense as players are deployed into a map to battle, and the player with the highest number of kills wins the match. You never know when your opponents may come, so keep moving, aim cautiously, and be vigilant. While playing, you get to check your kill feed, HP, ammo and radar on your screen. A special feature in the gameplay is the ability to pick up enemies’ weapons after knockdown. In this mode, you are offered a variety of missions with different objectives. In level 1, you have 3 active tasks to choose from. Mission 1 is to win a death match; in this mission, 6 players are deployed to battle, and the first player with 15 kills wins the game. Mission 2 is to eliminate 3 enemies; in this mission, your objective is to eliminate 3 enemies to pass the mission. However, if your player kills 2 enemies and gets knocked down, you must restart the mission. So ensure you get that 3-kill streak to complete the task. Mission 3 is to survive for 50 seconds; in this mission, you have to survive for 50 seconds, and the player’s movement and speed are reduced. To survive, either you take down your enemies, or you find cover for 50 seconds. Rewards for completion are $250 and 1000 XP each. In level 2, the active missions are pretty the same, only that some active tasks are still level 1 difficulty with the same cash and XP reward. But level 2 difficulty has a cash price of $300 and 1100 XP. Masked Forces Level 2 active missions are: Win a death match (level 1 difficulty) Eliminate 3 enemies (level 1 difficulty) Win a death match (level 2 difficulty) Masked Forces Level 3 active missions are: Win a death match (level 3 difficulty) Eliminate 3 enemies (level 1 difficulty) Survive for 50 seconds (level 1 difficulty) There are several fascinating missions and objectives to enjoy in this game, providing you with a realistic sense of being on the battlefield. Online PvP Mode In online PvP mode, a player can choose to create a room or join an existing one. When creating a room, you get to choose the level and mode to play from. Controls WASD to move T to chat R to reload P to pause C to crouch Space to Jump Left mouse click to fire Mouse scroll to change weapons Features Different Game Modes: FFA (Free For All), Team Deathmatch and Doomsday 5 giant maps to discover: Factory, Bastion, Barricade, Blockade, Freedom Awesome weapon and armor selection with upgrade options Multiplayer mode in private or public rooms What is Masked Forces? title: Bullet Master
description: Bullet Master is a physics puzzle game where you clear enemies by indirect shooting. Take control of a special agent in his mission to clear streets from the bad guys. The special agent is a clever man. Even if the enemies are behind walls or hiding upstairs, he can figure out a way to eliminate them. He uses his knowledge of geometry and physics to do so. Create a path for his bullets. Make them hit the walls, and turn back so that the bullets somehow arrive in the enemies by hitting the objects. 40 fantastic levels await to be solved in Bullet Master. Let's see how far you can get! How to Play Bullet Master Take on your mission from level one. Aim and shoot with a left-click to eliminate targets directly in your line of sight At first levels, you will face targets just in front of you. They'll be easier to remove. As you progress through the game, the enemies will hide behind walls, in pits and on stairs. In order to shoot down enemies, estimate the path that bullets will draw. Bullets will bounce from the walls, make zigzags and find the true target. Think of Bullet Master as if it's a pool billiard game. Bullets will move just like balls on the pool table. Anticipate the path of the bullets accordingly. You kill multiple enemies at once. But no need to worry if the bullets bounce and neutralize your character. He is bulletproof. Use Your Bullets Wisely You will have 4 to 6 bullets in your ammo, depending on the level. Use them efficiently. Before you run out of bullets, you should clear all the targets in the level. Otherwise, you need to start over. At the end of each level, you will be rewarded with stars depending on how many bullets you consume. Make Use of TNTs In this fictional and funny setting of the Bullet Master game, shooting down the enemies is not the only way to remove them. You should think outside the box to pass some levels. Use your problem-solving skills when the enemies are out of sight. You can let the box drop on them. Or you can make use of TNTs that blow up when you shoot. More Games Like Bullet Master If you have completed all forty levels and are still hungry for more physics puzzles, try your hand at Mr. Dracula . In this game, you will help Mr. Dracula get rid of pumpkins and zombies who invaded his castle's garden. Mr Dracula is at least as funny and challenging as Bullet Master. title: Weird Dance on Wednesday
description: Weird Dance on Wednesday is a fantastic girl game where you are responsible for doing Wednesday's makeup for her high school prom . There will be a special dance show at the prom. Wednesday has been preparing for this for weeks. Give her such makeup for this dance performance that she will remain in everyone's memory for years to come. If you're ready, let's start preparing the goth daughter of the Addams family in one of the craziest girl games . 🪄 How to Play Weird Dance on Wednesday You will see Wednesday with three different makeup options when you enter the game. You will choose one and apply that makeup to Wednesday. All three makeup options are very gothic and extraordinary. Wednesday will be so attractive that all eyes will be on her at the prom, especially when it's time for that dance performance! Choose Wednesday's Makeup Start by choosing one of these three scary makeups the game gives you. The game will guide you with signs while applying makeup. You will perform the makeup by following these signs with the mouse. Sometimes, you will click where the arrow points; sometimes, you will complete the process by making different movements with your mouse. Each move will complete a specific makeup step. Depending on the makeup type you choose, you will give color to Wednesday's eyebrows and apply lipstick to her. Don't forget to apply eyeliner and contour to her face. You can even make freckles and moles on her face with eyeliner. Illuminating her face and giving it a completely white appearance makes things even more gothic. Finally, send her on stage by plumping her eyebrows and eyelashes. When the makeup process is completed, she will take the stage and be the most famous creature of the high school prom with all her self-confidence! title: Cat Doctor
description: Various animal health centers open their doors to you. Many cats are waiting to be cured. Cat Doctor is a medical simulation game where sick cats need your affectionate treatments, both physically and emotionally. This is a very delicate job as a vet doctor because their lives are entrusted to you, even though they have 9 lives... How to Play Cat Doctor? Many cats are injured and sick, and they need to be healed. And here you are, the veterinarian. Each cat has a different health complaint. The diagnosis needs to be done first. Afterwards, the treatment method should be decided carefully. Then, the cats need to be operated on. Some even require surgical intervention. Cat Doctor offers many facilities, from the most uncomplicated veterinary clinic to a fully equipped cat hospital. As you level up, you will unlock more advanced facilities. Then, you will have the opportunity to perform these surgical procedures. Medical Facilities As mentioned, there are various clinics and animal hospitals here. And some have more advanced medical technology. While some perform basic procedures such as taking temperature and removing splinters, the more advanced ones even perform tooth extraction. When choosing a hospital from the menu, you can view which hospital has the ability to perform which procedures. The most curious issue is the procedure with a question mark. We leave the honor of discovering it to you. In some cases, you may even need to invent a new medicine for your sick cat. There are medical facilities that will allow you to conduct chemical experiments and find this medicine. Controls Use your mouse to tap the relevant areas while operating on a cat. description: In Archer Hero , we give you the possibility to enter the world of mysticism and magic. Begin the journey by testing your archery abilities and eliminating potential enemies. You can select from a variety of bows, arrows, and targets in order to improve your shooting skills. Every level brings new challenges and rewards. description: Hotel Fever Tycoon is an online tycoon game where you manage your dream hotel! Welcome your special guests at the reception and arrange a room for them to spend the night. Making them comfortable is the most crucial task here! Are you ready to build your hotel empire by mastering hotel management? 🏨 Controls Use your mouse to complete the tasks. How to Play Hotel Fever Tycoon You own the Western Glamor Hotel located in a busy location. After the opening, your guests start to come for their vacation. Welcome your customers at the front desk with an elegant attitude. Arrange their rooms according to availability. Fulfill their orders and make sure that their vacation goes perfectly. Collect the payment when guests check out and ensure the room is clean for the next guests! Unlock the Cola Machine 🤩 As you fulfill the tasks and level up, you will be able to unlock the cola machine. This way, you can serve your customers a bottle of Coke and earn extra money to upgrade your hotel. However, keep in mind that the guests are impatient!
