title: Train Racing
description: Prepare for an adrenaline rush like no other in " Train Racing ," the ultimate high-speed train racing game! Put yourself in the shoes of a courageous locomotive conductor and take command of some of the world's fastest and most potent trains as you fight against rough roads with steep ups and downs. Collect the money while racing; thus, you can use those coins to buy the latest train models. How to Play Train Racing? There are 30 levels to unlock in Train racing. And each level has its own challenges. Take the helm. Let's see how far you can go? Steering the Train Since the track on which the train travels is full of ups and downs, it may be beneficial for you to slow down when you reach these areas. Otherwise, it is very possible for the train to turn upside down or flip over. In such cases, you can return the train to its previous state by bouncing it. A Challenging Map Your game map is rugged. Unfortunately, you won't progress in a straight line. That would be so simple. Upside Down Train There is a high probability that the train will turn upside down as you progress on this challenging map. To avoid this, proceed carefully. If the train gives signals of turning upside down, you can try to save the situation by jumping the train. Collecting Coins You will come across coins along the way. Collecting these to replace your train with a higher-level train is essential. Customization You can customize your selected train from the menu before starting the racing. Tap to the train icon on the menu and open the customize section. Here, you can buy a new train or personalize an existing one with the money you earn from races. You can also purchase upgrades to strengthen your train. Multiplayer You can play Train Racing with other online players. When you get to the level selection screen, if you click on the "Multiplayer" button at the bottom of the screen, the game will create a multiplayer room with four players. When the process of finding 4 players is completed, the room is created, and the game begins. Controls Use the A and D keys or the Left and Right arrow keys to steer the train. Use the W or Upper arrow keys to make the train jump. Or, you may use the Space key. More Free Games Try Train Simulator , where you become a train conductor if you love playing Train Racing. title: Stick Guys Defense
description: Protecting your towers is your most significant duty. Stick Guys Defense is a 3D tower defense game where you need to defend your castle with your stickman soldiers. There will be a non-stop invasion. Evil creatures are here to attack you by gathering everything they have. There will be no end to this invasion. You have to resist as much as you can. How to Play Stick Guys Defense You are under attack from all directions. And your mission is to slow down this attack as much as possible. The best thing you can do to protect your castle is to upgrade your units. As you strengthen them, they will be able to defend you more strongly. Remember that you will lose the game if 20 enemies enter the castle. Upgrading Units It would be in your greatest interest to upgrade your units as soon as possible. Because the attacks will get bigger and bigger as the game progresses. You will see 3 different icons at the bottom of the game screen. The first one is for you to strengthen your front-row sword units. The icon next to it is for the archer units in the back. And the last one increases the money you earn from killing enemies. Power Ups in Stick Guys Defense During the game, you will see a question mark at the top of the game screen. When the round blue bar around it is filled, it will give you a random power-up. This could be a poison, a soldier carrying a bomb, or a power-up that regenerates the health of all your soldiers. This is a complete surprise. Just trust your luck. Monster Girls Back to School is a dress-up game where players prepare gorgeous monster girls for the first day of school. The game celebrates acceptance and diversity in a high school. Go back to the wardrobe menu and decide what you'd like to select next. When you're done with the look, hit the checkmark button. Frankie Stein : Daughter of Frankenstein's Monster and his Bride. Draculaura : Daughter of Count Dracula. Clawdeen Wolf : Daughter of the Werewolf. Cleo de Nile : Daughter of the Mummy. title: Uphill Jeep Driver
description: Driving a jeep over a hill full of obstacles was never as fun as in Uphill Jeep Driver game. Enjoy the landspaces while you drive the passengers carefully to the destination. title: Basket Champs
description: Basket Champs , an online basketball game, is designed to test players' precision skills. In each match, you have 5 free throws to outscore your rival team. Step into the tournament, prove your skills, qualify out of the group, and earn your spot in the championship match! Controls Move your mouse to adjust the angle and speed Left-click to throw the ball How to Play Basket Champs At the beginning, choose the national team you'd like to represent. Twenty teams, including the US, UK, Australia, France, and Turkey, are available for the tournament. When the match starts, the ball will appear in random places on the court. Adjust the angle and speed, then throw the ball. Both you and your rival will take five free throws in turns. Score more than your opponent to win the match. Your first aim is to win at least 3 games to qualify out of the group. You'll play 4 matches in the group stage. If you win 3 matches in the group, you'll advance to the quarter-finals. Eliminate other teams one by one to reach the championship match. Take Extra Shots! If the match ends in a tie, each team will be given one extra shot, known as sudden death. This shot requires more precision and timing than any other in the game. Score it to see the smiles on your supporters' faces. Doge is On Your Side From time to time, you may see Doge on the screen cheering you on! It will say affirmations like "Amaze!" adding fun and humor to the game. Watch Out For Moving Hoops As you progress in Basket Champs, you'll face hoops that move up and down and forward and backward. Take a deep breath and aim for the shooter's box calmly! Understanding Arrows Before throwing the ball, you can see where and how fast you're aiming. Look at the arc on the screen. If it's long, the ball will be thrown very fast. If it's too short, the ball may not reach the hoop. You'll soon understand and enjoy the fun physics of Basket Champs. Developer RavalMatic created Basket Champs. title: Tank Driver Simulator
description: Tank Driver Simulator is a 3D tank driving game where you steer a tank in an inner city or an empty sandy area by the sea. While driving the heavy machine in the city, you will literally accompany the flowing life of the city, pedestrians and other drivers. You can even seize other drivers' vehicles, such as motorbikes and classic cars! Just like you did in the GTA game series . Enjoy this thrilling simulator war game to the fullest! How to Play Tank Driver Simulator The idea of ​​using a tank sounds very appealing, doesn't it? You will definitely taste what it feels like to drive this machine in this simulator game. Two different game maps were created for you. In the beginning, you have to choose which one you want to use your vehicle in. The rest is up to you! Enjoy the adventure of steering the huge machine. Wander in the City with the Tank You have two unique game map options. One of them is the city. You can wander with your machine in the city streets with the flowing traffic. If you want to explore other vehicles, you may use the car or the motorbike given to you at the beginning of the game, or you can take other vehicles on the road. Additionally, your machine can fire cannons! You can try some explosions by aiming at the red tip. But we recommend that you do not use this against pedestrians. Steer the Tank on the Sand Our second game map is the sandy area by the sea. There is no one here. You are all by yourself. This map exists so that you can move freely and explore the environment with your vehicle. When you start playing on the map, you will see a wooden plate on the platform in front of you. You may shoot on it. You can change the camera angle and aim better by using the C key. Since this map is full of sand and has ups and downs, it will not be easy to move the vehicle here! It's not like driving on asphalt. Controls Use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys to drive the tank. Use the LMB to shoot cannons. Use the C key to change the camera view. Use the F key to get on/off the vehicles. Use the K key to teleport in the tank. Use the Tab key to pause. Similar Simulator Games You may try Tank War Simulator , another tank game where you are in charge of a war tank, if you like playing Tank Driver Simulator. title: Funny Shooter
description: Funny Shooter is one of the best first person shooter games where the player tries to dodge the invasion of the relentless enemies. You will see many orange men. They will attack you in different sizes and with various weapons. Most of them will throw bombs and forks at you. Some will prefer close combat. Navigate them skillfully to avoid their attacks. Join the adventure of one of the FPS games online with the funniest graphics! How to Play Funny Shooter You're the only one left from your team. You have to resist the invasion of an entire enemy army alone. They outnumber you. In order to complete the mission successfully, you need to destroy each enemy one by one. They will try to attack you en masse. You must be agile. Remember that dodging is as essential a key here as attacking. Orange Men Your enemies are orange and have helmets on their heads. You'll encounter normal-sized enemies as well as giant orange men. It will take a little longer to destroy them as they have much more resilience. They will have different abilities and weapons. While there will be orange men throwing bombs at you from the rooftops, there will also be enemies throwing forks. You have to escape from these attacks. In addition, using weapons such as bombs against them will make your job easier since they will all chase after you as a group. Weapons in Funny Shooter You have many weapon options. You can see these options in the main menu. There are automatic weapons, pistols, snipers and even a bazooka that can create an immense shock. You will only have one automatic weapon and a pistol in the early game. You can unlock other weapons as you complete missions. Below, we list some of the weapons you can find. But remember that purchased weapons can only be used on one level. AK-47 FN-FNP45 Kriss Vector L42Enfield Launcher Controls To look around, use the mouse. To move, use the WASD or arrow keys. Run by pressing W+Shift. To jump, press the Space key. To fire, press the left mouse button. To aim, press and hold the right mouse button. To switch between weapons, use the mouse wheel. To switch weapons, use the 1-7 number keys. To reload, press R. To attack (1) with a knife by pressing the F key. To attack (2) with a knife, press the Q key. To toss a grenade, press the G key. In order to inspect the weapon, press the T key. Remove a weapon by using the E key. Developer Funny Shooter was created by GoGoMan. title: Block Puzzle: Slide Block Jam
description: Block Puzzle: Slide Block Jam is an online puzzle game in which your main goal is to slide the colorful blocks on the grid to their matching exits. Slide blocks left, right, up, or down to arrange them in the right place. This way, you need to clear the grid of blocks within a limited time. Move the blocks strategically before the timer runs out! 🧩 Controls Click & Drag: Slide the blocks on the grid. On Mobile Devices: Tap and drag the blocks to slide. Block Puzzle: Slide Block Jam Overview Ready for a colorful sliding puzzle adventure? Use your strategic thinking to guide the colored blocks to their matching exits. Then, you can watch them disappear from the board. However, keep in mind that you cannot bring red blocks into a blue-colored exit. Additionally, you have a limited time to remove all the blocks from the board. Before time runs out, match each block to its corresponding exit to move to the next level! Game Modes in Block Puzzle: Slide Block Jam Normal Mode Normal Mode requires the players to slide the blocks to the corresponding exits on the board before the timer runs out in each level. In this mode, players advance level by level. They can also get power-ups by using the in-game currencies to pass a specific level with ease. Time Attack Mode Time Attack Mode initially gives players 15 seconds to clear the board of the blocks in the first level. For every level they pass, an additional 15 seconds will be added to their remaining time. Players should pass as many levels as possible before their time is up. Tips & Tricks for Block Puzzle: Slide Block Jam 👀 Look at the entire board before making your first move. 🔑 Identify which blocks are blocking key paths. 🧠 Think 2-3 moves ahead instead of reacting move-by-move. 🎯 Focus on freeing up tight corners and edges first. 🧐 The more open space you have, the easier future moves become. Developer Bravestars Games developed Block Puzzle: Slide Block Jam. More Games Like This Did you enjoy playing Block Puzzle: Slide Block Jam ? You may also try out the Color Sand Puzzle ! title: Battleship War
description: Battleship War is an online board game in which you strive to locate your opponent's fleet and sink it deep into the ocean. Your adversary will also try to determine the location of your fleet and will launch missiles. Keep your fleet hidden well while you destroy your opponent's fleet! How to Play Battleship War Opening the game, a strategy panel will appear in front of you, with the coordinates visible. Drag the arrow to a certain place on the panel, and a missile will be launched by clicking. When you fire a shot and hit a ship in your opponent's fleet, you will see an explosion on the screen and debris left behind. This game will give you the excitement of the classic Admiral Sunk game! Classic Mode You need to carefully and tactically position your naval fleet in the grid area provided to you. The better your ships are disguised, the more difficult it will be for your opponent to find them! You can change the direction of your ships by pressing the direction change button on the right, or you can press the button at the top to have the game position your ships randomly from the menu. Advanced Mode The game's course is the same in advanced mode as it is in Classic mode. Differently, you can use two power-ups with the points you gather. Because the plane is half the price and can hit five squares at once, it is a better power-up to use early in the game than the sonar. A Tip for Battleship War Trace the opponent's ship's position using the wreckage and eliminate the whole hull of the ship. You can do this by estimating the length and width of the ships in the opposing fleet and shooting the relevant locations in the sea. Controls Use your mouse to launch missiles and destroy your opponent's fleet. Developer Battleship War was created by codethislab. What is More? title: Agent Walker vs Skibidi Toilets
description: Get ready for funny battles with Skibidi Toilets! Agent Walker vs Skibidi Toilets is a 3D action game where you fight with toilet heads as a four-armed mechanical Agent Walker. You need to eliminate a specific number of Skibidi Toilets to move to the next level. Try your best and clear all the toilet heads running towards you from the battling field in this shooting game! You will play as a mechanical being with four arms. His name is Agent Walker . And as you can guess, you can have four weapons for four arms. Yes, you have heard right! title: Monster Escape
description: Monster Escape is an online escape game where your main aim is to help the Green Monster regain its freedom. It is trapped inside a dungeon and needs your help. Rotate the rooms, dodge the deadly traps on your way and get the key to open the door to escape the room! Controls Click on-screen Buttons: Rotate the World Hold and Drag: Move the Monster How to Play Monster Escape The Green Monster gets stuck in a creepy dungeon. It needs your help finding a way to the locked door. You should rotate the world by clicking on the on-screen buttons to shift the gravity. Your goal is to make him move in the right direction. However, keep in mind that before reaching the door, you must get the key! Otherwise, the door will not open. Use your logic and help our little Green Monster escape. Spikes and Fallen Boxes As you make progress, the obstacles that come in your way will get harder. You must avoid getting in touch with any spikes, as they will hurt the monster. There will also be fallen boxes that can fall on the head of the beast. Make sure that when you shift the gravity, the monster is not under any of these boxes to prevent this from happening. Think Outside the Box You need to plan your moves carefully to overcome the obstacles. Create a way to unlock the door to escape. For example, there are spikes and a wooden box in Level 5. The first thing to do in this case is to rotate the dungeon to the right, then to the left, to cover the spikes with the box. That way, you can freely pass through there! FAQs Can I escape without the key? Unfortunately, you can’t. You need to grab the key to unlock the door. Does the game get harder over time? As you progress and pass levels one by one, the layout will get trickier, testing your skills. Developer GameBerry Studio developed Monster Escape. title: Boat Simulator
description: We have brought the coziest game to your door. Boat Simulator is a 3D simulator game where you steer a range of sea vehicles without any rules or restrictions. You are completely free here, and you decide what to do. It is entirely up to you which vessel you will drive and in which direction you will proceed. Put on your PJs or comfy clothes, play some relaxing music, and you are ready for a cozy gaming experience. Be the Captain of Your Own Boat Be ready to set sail! We're embarking on a journey along long rivers and open seas. Boat Simulator offers you a range of sea vehicles. You can access a yacht or cargo ship or even use a submarine here. To add excitement to your gaming experience, try something using the sea tracks. For example, jumping off the tracks at full speed on a jet ski can stimulate your adrenaline. You will be ready after choosing the viewpoint you will drive on from the menu. Using the Submarine One of the most extraordinary things Boat Simulator has to offer is the use of a submarine. Select your submarine by pressing V. Then, you can look for a way to the bottom of the sea by pulling down the "Submarine Depth" line on the game screen's left side. You decide how deep to go. But be careful not to hit any mounds. Hints for Boat Simulator Since the operating purpose of each marine vehicle offered in the game is different and their mass and weight also differ from each other, acceleration, deceleration and maneuvering speeds may vary depending on the vehicle type. We recommend that you keep this in mind when sailing offshore. Controls Use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys to steer the boat Use the V key to change the vessel Use the C key to change the camera view Hold the Right Mouse button to move the camera Use the Mouse Scroll to zoom in or out What to Play Next? title: Drag Racing Club
description: Drag Racing Club is a 2D racing game where you try to be a winner in drag races. There is no long road or twists and turns here. You only need to control your car on a straight road. You don't even have to worry about turning your car left and right. Just step on the gas, use nitrous and shift gears when the time is right. Enjoy one of the most quirky driving games ! How to Play Drag Racing Club The game will start you directly with a trial race. You can quickly learn the basics from here. For any race, it's important to get off to a good start. You need to closely follow the speedometer you see at the bottom of the game screen. Accelerate your vehicle by pressing the accelerator pedal and initiate the race by hitting the green area on the speedometer. This start gives you an excellent start and puts you ahead. You must change gear when the needle reaches the green zone on the speedometer. Because changing gears early or late will slow down your speed. Additionally, you can use nitro when you are behind your opponent or want to make a reasonable distance. Game Modes in Drag Racing Club There are 4 different racing modes you can access, and each has different purposes and requirements. Below, we leave brief information about the game modes for you. Graded Race: As you win races in this mode, you will face more challenging opponents in the next races. Crew Races: Here, you need to defeat the crew members one by one. And finally, you face the crew leader. Basic Race: This mode is the simplest racing mode. As the quality of your vehicle increases, the reward money you will receive from it also goes up. Races with Adjustable Difficulty: You determine the difficulty level of the race before you enter these races. As the difficulty level increases, the money you earn soars. Enhance Your Car or Get a New One By accessing the garage section from the main menu, you can improve your car's weight, nitro power, and engine output to control it better. You could increase the speed at which you swap gears. Alternatively, you may get a brand-new car. You have a wide choice of cars with prices ranging from $12,500 to $330,000. Controls To accelerate the car, use your mouse. To shift gear, use the Space key. To use nitro, press the N key. Developer Drag Racing Club is created by Inlogic Software. Similar Racing Games You may also like Car Rush if you enjoy playing Drag Racing Club. In this racing game, you take control of a car on a highway, among other cars and trucks. And the person in the seat beside you is your girlfriend. As you proceed, you should avoid running into any cars. Before the timer goes off, you have to race this roadster to the finish line. title: Waterpark Slide io
description: Ready to dive into the silliest water adventure? Slide down slippery waterslides in vibrant waterparks, but be careful not to bump into others! Duck around players and bots, hit every booster, and race to the finish line in the most colorful competition ever! Game Overview Waterpark Slide io is a fast-paced online racing game that makes every day feel like summer! All you have to do is race down vibrant, colorful water slides while competing against real players or clever bots. Whether you play for fun or to compete, the thrill of carelessly sliding makes this game endlessly enjoyable and addictive. How to Play Waterpark Slide io? Core Gameplay Features The game keeps controls smooth and simple: use the mouse, arrow keys, or touch (if you’re playing on a tablet) to slide left and right, slide past rivals, and grab boosters. You’ll race against a mix of real players and bots, so even if fewer players are online, the competition never stops. Simple, intuitive, and fun to play! Slide to win: hold the right mouse button and move your mouse to glide smoothly down the water slide, or use the arrow keys. Memorize the boosters: don’t stress if you drop from 1st to 10th place ⎼ remember where the boosters are and use them to get back on top! Use the crowd: crashing into others can slow you down, but get in their way and let them bump you for a quick speed boost! Double your points: watch ads to boost your score even higher. Stay motivated: complete tasks to unlock exciting rewards. Good to Know! Master the art of sliding! The game is simple: there’s no concept of one player being faster than another; the only way to overtake your opponents is by mastering the slide controls. Slide smoothly, avoid obstacles and other players that could slow you down, and make sure not to miss any speed boosters. Learn the slide layouts! The slide layouts may vary from level to level, but you will eventually notice boosts scattered at different points along the water slide. Memorizing their placement will help you make the most of them and get ahead of the competition. Use other players as speed boosts: if the area gets crowded, you can turn the chaos to your advantage: let yourself get bumped from behind to gain a short boost. FAQs What are the visuals like in the game? The game features a cartoonish 3D style with vibrant, colorful surroundings. Characters are intentionally designed to look a bit silly, adding extra fun to the experience. The water effects, slide designs, and character models create an immersive and visually appealing waterpark racing atmosphere. Are there different water parks or slides? Currently, players cannot choose different water parks or slides, as each level is uniquely preprogrammed with no customization options. How many players can race online at once? Typically, in a single level, 10 to 20 players can race online at the same time, including both bots and real-time players. What happens if you hit another player? If you hit another player from behind, your speed will instantly decrease. But if another player bumps into you from behind, you’ll gain a short speed boost. Similar Games Ready to slide into new adventures while keeping the aquapark vibe? title: Electric Man 2
description: Show your martial arts and street fighting skills in the Tournament of Voltagen! Electric Man 2 is a 2D stickman game in which you combat odd ragdolls in various environments. The ragdolls will try to attack you with all their might. Kick and punch them until their health bar drops to zero. Be the champion in this stickman universe in this action game! About This Game We recommend that you take part in tutorials if this is your first time playing. However, before entering the tutorials, you need to create your stickman! Choose a name for your character and then choose its color. Additionally, you can determine its skill level from easy to pro. Then press the "Enter" button to learn the basics of the Electric Man 2 in the Voltagen training course. After taking your lessons, you will see the Round 1 menu with four unique matches. You must pass each match successfully by defeating the electric fighters to unlock new rounds. Stickman's Attacking Figures Your stickman character has many attacking figures, which he has learned from the streets. He can perform severe punches and kicks. He also has the power to knock his opponents off their feet. Make him move by using the left and arrow keys. To dodge their attacks, press the down arrow key. We would also like to say that you can go for combinations in attack styles. For example, pressing the D key while running towards an electric fighter will throw him into the air. But make sure he doesn't fall on you when you throw him. Otherwise, he will hurt you by his weight. Moves in Slow-Motion Your stickman can perform slow-motion moves in combat in addition to regular attack moves. The Q, W and E keys allow you to act slowly. However, keep in mind that although such moves take more health, they consume battery points. It means that your character cannot take such actions all the time. He needs to wait until the battery is recharged. But it is worth waiting for the charging, thanks to the severe damage rate caused by slow actions. How many rounds are there in Electric Man 2? There are 19 rounds of combat in Electric Man 2. Each has unique electric fighters with different abilities. To win the Tournament of Voltagen, you must defeat them all in each match of 19 rounds. Controls Left-Right Arrows: Run Down Arrow: Dodge A: Punch S: Kick D: Grab Q: Slow-Motion Punch E: Slow-Motion Grab W: Slow-Motion Kick Developer Damien Clarke developed Electric Man 2. title: Mahjong
description: Mahjong Online is a game of patience, skill, and a bit of luck. In this version of a decades-old game, your goal will be to match identical tiles to remove them from the board until none remain. The difficulty comes with this rule: only free tiles can be picked. So, blocked tiles must be open on at least one side. While it mostly seems like a luck game and is often used for fortune telling, actually, this Mahjong rule adds a layer of strategy. So you need to think ahead rather than just clicking on every matching pair you see. Mahjong (麻将) translates to "sparrow" in Chinese. The name is inspired by the sound of shuffling tiles, which resembles birds chirping. The designers of this online Mahjong game haven't skipped a single detail. So you'll hear both relaxing birds chirping music and that satisfying tile-click sound effect when you pair two tiles. It's a nod to the physical feel of classic mahjong sets made from bone, bamboo, or resin. Plus, you have the option to switch between detailed, traditional tiles or a more minimalist, modern design with easier difficulty. No matter your preference, the result is the same: a soothing and rewarding experience. And if you ever find yourself stuck, shuffle, hint, and undo features are available to keep the game flowing smoothly. With full compatibility on Chromebooks, phones, tablets, and desktops, this version of Mahjong Online lets you have a cozy play session anywhere, anytime. Spent a rough day at work? Or, just want to hang out solo on a quiet weekend? Mahjong can be the perfect companion, sometimes even more soothing than a mother's lap (trust us on this one!) Controls Left-click or tap to select tiles. The Original Mahjong Game Many players don’t realize that Mahjong Online , which is the popular tile-matching puzzle played worldwide, is actually a simplified variant called Mahjong Solitaire. Unlike the classic four-player mahjong game that's been a cherished tradition in China for centuries, Mahjong Online was originally created as a computer puzzle game in the 1980s. Microsoft played a key role in popularizing it, bringing Mahjong Online into countless homes around the globe. Eventually, Mahjong Online became so beloved that it even overshadowed its traditional counterpart. Yet, despite their differences, both games share more than just beautiful tiles; each requires patience, careful strategy, and a keen eye for patterns. Hundreds of versions with old or new themes have been created and played so far. There's even a Christmas Mahjong where you pair tiles with sugar canes, gingerbreads, gift packages, Santas on them. So after learning the rules, it's just up to you to pick a theme for your mood and start playing. In conclusion, Mahjong Online’s everlasting popularity proves that sometimes, it's the simplest games that truly stand the test of time. The Lore Behind Mahjong Tiles Mahjong tiles are more than just game pieces, they carry deep cultural significance, representing elements of Chinese history, wealth, and philosophy. Every tile tells a story, reflecting ancient traditions that date back centuries. If you're curious, there's a great depth to explore in the symbolism of Mahjong tiles, and you can find them online. But we created a quick overview that can help players appreciate their beauty and delicate details. Here's what they mean: The Bamboo suit, for instance, symbolizes strings of old Chinese coins. In ancient times, copper coins had square holes in the center and were often strung together with rope. This is why the lowest tile in the bamboo suit, the one bamboo, is usually depicted as a bird. Originally, it was a single coin, but later, artistic variations transformed it into a sparrow. The Circle suit represents the coins themselves, depicting round, copper money in stacks, reinforcing themes of prosperity and commerce. Meanwhile, the Character suit reflects paper money, another key element of China's financial history, with inscriptions that resemble traditional calligraphy found on old banknotes. Among the most eye-catching tiles are the Dragon tiles, which hold special significance. The Red Dragon symbolizes power, luck, and success, qualities associated with the mythical dragons in Chinese folklore, often linked to emperors. The Green Dragon, which resembles the character for "發" (meaning "wealth" or "prosperity"), is considered a sign of financial fortune. The White Dragon, sometimes depicted as a blank tile or with a blue border, is often linked to purity and clarity, symbolizing a fresh start or wisdom in decision-making. Then there are the Wind tiles, representing the four cardinal directions—East, South, West, and North. These tiles carry deep meaning in feng shui, the Chinese practice of harmonizing space and energy. The East Wind is often seen as the most powerful because, in traditional Chinese culture, the sun rises in the east, bringing new beginnings and strength. This and some other versions of Mahjong also include Flower and Season tiles, which are purely decorative but add an extra layer of tradition. Flowers like plum blossoms, orchids, chrysanthemums, and bamboo represent the four noble plants in Chinese culture, symbolizing resilience, elegance, longevity, and strength. Understanding the symbolism behind the tiles makes playing Mahjong Online even more fascinating. Every match you make isn’t just about clearing the board, it’s a small connection to nature, beauty and centuries of history, wealth, and Chinese tradition. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) Can Mahjong always be solved? Not every Mahjong puzzle has a guaranteed solution. However, many Mahjong Online puzzles are specifically created to be solvable if played strategically, especially when features like shuffle or undo are available. Is Mahjong more difficult than chess? Mahjong and chess require different skills. Chess is about deep strategy and pure logic, while Mahjong combines strategy, pattern recognition, and some luck. Both have complexities, but Mahjong might feel more relaxed and approachable for beginners. Is Mahjong really good for your brain? Absolutely! Mahjong helps sharpen your mind by enhancing memory, pattern recognition, and strategic thinking. Regular play has even been shown to help maintain cognitive functions and reduce stress. What are the basic rules of Mahjong? In Mahjong Online (Mahjong Solitaire), the goal is simple: match pairs of identical free tiles to remove them from the board. Tiles are free if they're not covered and have at least one side (left or right) open. Clear all tiles to win! Do you need to speak Chinese to play Mahjong? Not at all. Mahjong tiles have symbols and numbers that anyone can easily learn, regardless of language. Mahjong Online is fully visual, making it universally playable. Is Mahjong luck or skill? Mahjong Online blends skill and luck. Successful play requires careful planning, strategic moves, and thoughtful tile selection—but occasionally, luck also plays its part. That's part of what makes it fun!

The police cars will try to hit your car but there is a repair bonus on the road that can save your car from destruction. Don't waste any second and come to play for fun and excitement. title: Evil Santa
description: Evil Santa is one of the most stress-relieving Christmas games out there in which the player tries to smash the virtual Santa. This man was once a good man who was giving children gifts. But, he has turned from a gift-giver into a mischief-maker. Now that Christmas is approaching, he will appear again and do ugly things. Beat him and stop him from misbehaving! Who is Santa Claus? Legend has it that Santa Claus lives at the North Pole with a mysterious troupe of elves who help him make toys and gifts for children around the world on Christmas Eve night. He rides a sleigh pulled by a pack of alligators, dropping many presents there under decorated Christmas trees. It is said to enter homes through chimneys. How to Play Evil Santa? Here's a Santa with a bad attitude. And there are many tools available to you to smash this man. You can use your bare hands, a gun, or run a train. Or, you can choose Christmas tree decorations. Keep checking his health from the bar at the bottom of the screen. Weapons with Christmas Theme This game is so crazy that it offers you many different Christmas-themed tools to beat the virtual ho-ho man. You have many options that you can not even imagine. There is a section at the top of the game screen where you can see the weapon options. There are six symbols in the row to choose from, five of which are your weapons of choice. Press the final button to release the weapon you just captured. Gift Packages Snowman Sleigh Pine tree Train Enhance Your Gaming Experience We can give you some advice to make your game more enjoyable. You will earn money as you level up and deal with Santa. Reveal your dark wit by using these coins with new weapons! If playing on the same background bores you, you can try different options. You have 4 different backgrounds. You may view these backgrounds by pressing the image icon at the bottom of the screen. Controls Use your mouse click to beat evil St. Claus and save the true spirit of Christmas. Other Crazy Games If you enjoy playing Evil Santa, you may try Pumpkin Monster . It is another crazy game where you can unleash your dark humor by messing up with a monster in pumpkin shape. Or, you can give a chance to Kick the Dummy , where you beat the virtual robot with nuclear tools. For further game options, look at other online crazy games on OnlineGames.io. title: Beach Club
description: In Beach Club , you’ll run your very own beachfront resort. Prepare lounge chairs with fresh towels and make sure every guest enjoys their day under the sun. Can you turn your small shore into the ultimate beach destination? Game Overview The sun is shining, the waves are rolling, and the guests are arriving! In Beach Club , your goal is to manage and expand your beach by keeping everything spotless and ready for customers. From washing towels to setting up chairs, your efforts will be rewarded with money that you can reinvest into upgrading your resort. Game Features Beach management gameplay: Clean, prepare chairs, and serve guests efficiently. Upgrades & expansion: Buy more resources, expand your territory, and grow your beach empire. Hire staff: Speed up your progress by hiring helpers to clean and prepare chairs. Progressive pricing: Each new purchase costs more, pushing you to plan wisely. How to Play Beach Club? Left: A / ⬅️ Right: D / ➡️ Up: W / ⬆️ Down: S / ⬇️ Good to Know Upgrading towels or washing machines helps you prepare more chairs faster. The more you buy, the higher the price will be for the next upgrade. FAQs Is Beach Club endless or level-based? It’s progressive. The more you expand, the more challenging it becomes to keep up with demand. Can I customize my character? Yes! You can customize your look by clicking on the small person icon. title: Crown Defense
description: The King loves to sit in his tower and drink tea, but funny red enemies are coming to bother him. In Crown Defense , your job is to protect the King and his tower. If you lose a few times, do not worry. Every time you play, you can earn coins and use them to make your tower stronger. Soon, you will build a tower that can stop any enemy. Game Overview Crown Defense is a fun strategy game where you protect your tower and the King from silly little enemies. You stay in one place while the enemies keep coming. You can use your coins to get defenders and upgrades that make your tower stronger. The more enemies you defeat, the more coins you earn, and you can use them to make your tower and its defenders even stronger. How to Play Crown Defense? The gameplay is simple: you fight and make your tower stronger. This game is all about upgrades, but you need to choose them wisely. Your strategy matters a lot. The better your strategy, the faster you will win, and the silly red enemies will become easier to defeat. Let’s defeat some enemies, but first, some tea! Drag & drop upgrades or abilities: use your mouse to play if you are on a computer, or tap if you are on a phone or tablet. Good to Know! Do not give up! At first, the game may seem hard, but you will see that attacking the enemies is the best way to protect your tower and earn more coins for upgrades. Even if your tower falls, you still earn coins. The longer you survive, the more coins you get. You can visit the upgrade menu after each battle to make your tower, helpers, and special powers even better. Prepare for the worst and also for the best! At first, you will see small red silly enemies that look like little beans. As you play, new types of enemies will appear. Some are faster, stronger, or have special powers like fire. To stop fire enemies, use thunderclouds to cool them down. Fasten things up: use the x2 game mode if you are in a hurry, or x1 if you are still enjoying your tea and have plenty of time to watch a real battle. FAQs Can I undo upgrades? Unfortunately, once you use your coins for an upgrade, you cannot get them back. Can I use more than one swordsman? Yes, you can add more swordsmen to help protect the tower. How do I make XP? You earn XP every time you defeat enemies and finish battles. The more enemies you defeat, the more XP you get. XP helps you level up and unlock new helpers and upgrades. How do I win? To win, you need to protect your tower and the King for as many days as possible without being defeated. The key is to resist and stay strong through every wave of enemies. What happens if my tower falls? The game restarts, but you still keep the coins you earned to buy upgrades for the next round. Similar Games If you enjoy chill strategy games, then you will love Fortress Defense because it shares the same goal of protecting your realm from waves of enemies, all brought to life in a fun and thrilling cartoonish style!

title: Xmas Cookie Clicker
description: Ho Ho Ho! It's the most wonderful time of the year! Start kneading the dough; everybody is waiting for their Christmas cookies. This is a job requiring speed. In Xmas Cookie Clicker, you will produce cute cookies with icing and Christmas-themed decorations on them. If you trust your clicking speed, strategize in a way to boost cookies per click. Otherwise, aim for an idle income by employing self-operating cookie producers. Click on the cookie once and see how this tiny cookie man will captivate you for hours! How to Play Xmas Cookie Clicker? Click on the cookie man to create your own very first cookie. This is just the beginning! Every time you click, you will see earnings increase accordingly. Xmas Cookie Clicker has a wide range of badges, skins and cookie makers to unlock. Employ cookie makers according to your strategy. You can choose the helpers boosting your cookies per click, such as bonus click, multiple clicks, droid, industrial center, and many more. Or else, you can focus on autonomous cookie makers. And employ unmanned systems, click farm, and other ones we'd like you to explore yourself. You can see the cookie makers on the right side of the screen. You can buy them one by one or in bulk by clicking on the x1, x10, and x100 buttons on the top right. If you make a streak, your clicking power doubles up. Check out the pink bar on the left and keep the bar full for faster cookie production. When you unlock all the materials, click on the ascend button and start from zero but with ascension multipliers. Tips and Other Game Features As you progress through the game, you will see the weather also changes. Unlock all the weathers by producing a certain amount of cookies. Then you can select the desired weather on your screen. Rainy, sunny, and even star rain is possible. The same rules apply to the cookie man's skins. You can unlock new skins with hilarious costumes and hats. Our favorite is Baby Cookie. He seems extremely cute with his pacifier in his mouth. You can see golden cookies passing through your screen randomly. Catch those guys by clicking on them because it will give you lots of $$$. Watch an ad to double up the production for 60 seconds or earn extra income. At the bottom of your screen, you will see how many cookies you produce per second autonomously and your clicking power. This will give you a clue on which cookie makers to buy more, depending on your strategy. Developer Xmas Cookie Clicker is created by FreezeNova. Controls Use your mouse to control Xmas Cookie Clicker, as the name of the game suggests. What to Play Next? Fan of clicking and going from 0 to 100? We are sure you will love Capybara Clicker Pro . Dive into the land of lovely Capybaras and keep clicking for fun. Or else, see more of the clicker games and decide which one is your cup of tea. We'd love to hear from you if you have any wishes or suggestions. Tell us how far you could get in Xmas Cookie Clicker in the comment section down below!

title: Mergest Kingdom
description: The magic number here is 3! Mergest Kingdom is a puzzle game played by merging stuff in groups of 3. This is a game where you need to establish your fairytale kingdom. You need to plant wheat so you can expand your empire. You are a farmer here, and your wheat is considered valuable. You can trade your harvested grain with keys and coins from your Hero. How to play Mergest Kingdom? This game aims to obtain more valuable things by producing and merging 3 items with each other. By combining them, you will build new places and plant wheat crops. You will level up by exchanging the wheat you obtain for keys and coins, and as you level up, your land will expand. The game provides various quests and rewards you with gold, gems, and new quests along the way. There is also a daily task that pays you with money and jewels. Quests This game will make you a duty person. You will have responsibilities depending on the size of the land you manage. You will be given some tasks, and when you complete them, you will get valuable things. You will see a map and a magnifying glass in the upper right corner of the game screen. When you click here, your task list will be listed in a letter to you. These missions are vital for you to expand your territory. Discover Mergest Kingdom When you level up, you will add new lands to your own lands. As you progress through the game, you will unlock new grounds with the keys you obtain. You will get the keys from the Hero. You need to grow crops to get keys from the heroes. Otherwise, they won't even look at your face! You need to convince them to give you the key. Each land contains different materials, such as wood and stone. By putting various materials into groups of three, other things will emerge. Surprise yourself! Game Controls All you need to have to play Mergest Kingdom is your mouse. Click and hold the left mouse button, then combine the object you selected with the other two, and the merging process is complete. What to Play Next? title: Wedding Planner
description: As an organizer, all wedding preparations are on your shoulders! Wedding Planner is a browser game where you are responsible for planning a wedding ceremony. You literally have to take care of everything. The bride's dress, veil, the groom's suit and even the wedding cake… Create your dream wedding! How to Play Wedding Planner? Take charge of every aspect of a wedding ceremony in Wedding Planner, the ultimate wedding preparation game! From choosing the perfect bridal attire to designing the wedding cake, create your dream wedding celebration. Preparing the Bride We will start by preparing the bride first and then move on to the groom. Priority goes to the queen of the night. We must choose the bride's dress and veil carefully. These will be the most eye-catching part of the wedding ceremony. The shoes and accessory choices that follow should also be compatible with the wedding dress. A suggestion from us: if the wedding dress is flashy, you can go for simple accessories! Then we came to the bride's head area. Give her hair an image and then put the crown on it. Finally, decide on the flower bouquet and proceed to prepare the groom. Preparing the Groom It's the groom's turn! First of all, decide which groom suits your bride. Then start preparing him Create a suit by choosing the groom's jacket and trousers. Also, choose a shirt that fits his suit. Complete the groom's preparation by choosing his shoes and tie. If you want, you can also select a bow tie instead of a regular tie. Wedding Cake Deciding on a wedding cake is even more complex than preparing the groom! You need to determine the cake's design and what it will be served with. Choose the cream between the layers and on top of the cake according to your taste. After determining the decorations and flowers you will place on the cake, you are now ready for the big day! Controls Simply use your mouse click to prepare the wedding. What is More? Try Wedding Beauty Salon , another wedding game where you make a bride to marry if you love playing Wedding Planner. You are the bride's stylist in this game, and she needs your taste in fashion. Alternatively, you can also check the kids games collection on OnlineGames.io for further options. To be able to find new games , keep coming back!

title: Fire and Water
description: Fire and Water is a challenging two-player game where you and your mate try to overcome all the obstacles in a temple, as in the most popular web browser game of the 2000s: Fireboy and Watergirl . It draws inspiration from the beloved game. Play as Fire and Water and collect all the stars in the game. For the gamers who finished all the versions of the original Fireboy and Watergirl game series and still hungry for further levels Fire and Water is your cup of tea. How to Play Fire and Water There are 30 challenging levels in Fire and Water. Decide which character you will play with and move forward in the temple. You need to progress according to which character you choose. On the track, you will see puddles and lava lakes in some places. Water should not enter the lava lake, and fire should not come into contact with puddles. Here, each character must act according to their nature. Otherwise, you will be back to your starting point. Co-operative Gameplay Fire and Water is a team game. When one of the characters does not move in the direction they should and cannot reach the final door, it becomes meaningless for the other character to have fulfilled its duty. Therefore, acting together is the basic principle in this game. Obstacles to Overcome in Fire and Water Apart from lava lakes and water puddles, which are obstacles to opposing elements, you will encounter lasers and rotating tracks. You need to act together, especially to overcome laser obstacles. Because it needs to be turned off by pressing the laser button. And while one holds down this button, the other must move forward. Reaching the Doors In order to end the game, both Fire and Water must fulfill their duties and finally reach their own door in the level. The game is thus completed, and the characters move to the next level. Helpful Tips to Master in Fire and Water Before beginning a stage, review all the buttons and barriers, and plan your actions before acting. It's important to plan which buttons to press and where and when to use the elevators on some floors. Leverage use is another crucial aspect of the game. The levers won't change once you leave them in that position. Since using the lever and riding in the elevator at the same time is not possible, Fire and Water will help one another ascend to different floors. Unlike levers, buttons won't remain pressed after you depart. To maintain the position of the switch-connected elevator, you must continue pressing the button. Controls Fire Controls: Use the A and D keys to move. Use the W key to jump. Water Controls: Use the Left and Right arrow keys to move. Use the Upper arrow key to jump. Explore More Options Consider playing the original Fireboy and Watergirl if you want to keep your gaming experience nostalgic. Or you can explore other online 2 player games on OnlineGames.io for more options.

title: Home Makeover 2: Hidden Object
description: Shall we awaken the Sherlock Holmes within you? Home Makeover 2: Hidden Object is a puzzle game where you find hidden objects and sell them in order to redecorate the heroine's dead uncle's home. If the nephew fails this task, the mayor will seize his uncle's house. So, help her get the house back and get the house deed! This game will truly test your ability to focus. The Story Years later, the nephew decides to visit her uncle's house, and what she encounters surprises her. She found out that her uncle had died long ago, and the mayor was trying to seize the house. Someone has to stop this. There needs to be more work. You have to start somewhere. How to play Home Makeover 2: Hidden Object? Think of a house that has yet to be stepped into for a long time. A lot of work falls on you in this house. You need to clean and redecorate the home before the municipal officials come to inspect it. This way, you will get a better income when you sell the house. The whole afternoon is yours. Start by cleaning the house thoroughly. Remove dirt and stains by clicking on them. After this process, it is time to make money. Collect unnecessary items from the home and sell them to buyers at the flea market. This will make you good money. But remember that you have limited time and impatient customers. You need to be quick. Additionally, if you are having trouble finding an item, you can get help by clicking on the hint option. You will start decorating the house with the money you earn. Replace the floors, walls and furniture, and the house will return to its former glory. You need to learn to manage money well. Because there are so many rooms in this house. Each one will be renewed from scratch. The bottom line is that a lot of money and good money management are the main points. As you complete the missions, the next mission will become more challenging. But, while performing all these tasks, remember the main job. You need to find the title deed of the house and submit it to the municipal officials. Benefits of playing Home Makeover 2: Hidden Object Playing this game contributes positively to the player's memory. Finding solutions to different scenarios in the game improves the player's problem-solving ability. It reduces stress levels, increases focus skills and enhances the mood of the person playing the game. It increases the attention of the person to details, which is one of the things we need most in daily life. Controls It is effortless! All you need for controls is a mouse. You do not need anything else. Developer Home Makeover 2: Hidden Object was created by Origaming Media. You may also like If you enjoy playing Home Makeover 2: Hidden Objects, you might also enjoy the puzzle game Mergest Kingdom , which is played by combining objects in groups of three. title: God Simulator
description: Be a strategist and forge your own religion on God Simulator! Inspire people to convert and witness the growth of religion in different lands across the globe. Experience different stages of the religion's history and evolution as you write holy scriptures, open temples, and convince more and more rulers. God Simulator is an idle strategy game where you learn new skills to unite various civilizations under the roof of faith. Manage the religion skillfully, increase the number of believers and become the winner of the game! With 10 different languages and diverse features to explore, God Simulator has a lot to offer gamers seeking in-depth scenarios. It is such a game that you'll not be the same person after playing. The game encourages players to reflect and question their beliefs. Controls Use your mouse to collect bubbles and navigate. The bubbles represent your followers, and by collecting them, you're spreading your religion. Navigating is crucial as you'll need to strategically choose the lands to spread your religion, considering their unique parameters and adapting your religion accordingly. Religions You'll start by selecting the religion you'd like to spread. Select one of the following. Each role has its own challenges and advantages. Monotheism: This is a well-organized and stable religion with potential for adaptation. Spiritualism: The cult is unstable, with multiple gods and beliefs, and its followers develop their religion quickly but chaotically. Pantheon: The ministers of this cult do not spread their beliefs. People join themselves. Paganism: The religion is very old and deeply ingrained in the minds of its followers. It is not easy to get rid of this faith, but it is also not easy to develop it. Shamanism: This particular religion is deeply rooted and resistant to change, making it difficult for new followers to bring fresh ideas. However, its teachings do not create any social division. Totalitarian Sect: A radical branch of a religion. It causes immediate alienation of society. The followers of this cult are unpredictable. Destructive Cult: A dangerous and extremely aggressive religion. Adherents become more and more fanatical. Choose Your Role After choosing the religion, you need to select your role among 3 of the following. Novice Mode for beginner preachers or for a quick developing game. Even the new believers improve your religion Religion develops easily. God helps you. Preacher For experienced strategists. People are trusting The world is relatively tolerant of any religion Scientists and philosophers do not seek to refute the dogmas of the church. Prophet For the true messengers of God. People do not tend to accept new ideas. The world is suspicious of major religions Every thinker seeks to doubt religion Select the Land to Spread Religion If you've decided on the religion and your role, give it a name and select a place to spread your religion. Remember that each country has its own peculiarities when it comes to adapting your religion. Pay attention to the parameters with colored icons. You'll soon see bubbles on the land you choose. There are 3 stages of members of the religion: believers, enlightened and fanatics. If you succeed in that, all inhabitants will become either fanatics or enlightened. If there happen to be many opponents of your religion in the world, and the idea of atheism gets 100% developed, then you lose the game. God Simulator offers high replayability, with different religions and roles to choose from, each offering a unique gameplay experience. So you can start again with another religion and role after winning or losing. Languages English Russian German Spanish French Portuguese Thai Turkish Korean Hindi Developer GameFirst created this game. More Games Like This If you like games with a strong message behind them, your next play should be We Become What We Behold . You will experience how mass media affects society firsthand. title: Hero Dragon Power
description: Hero Dragon Power will take you on an epic journey filled with exciting challenges that will test your skills. Activate heavy punches, cast special abilities, and master your way through fierce enemies with agile movements. There are a variety of characters available for you to select from. Additionally, 20 levels are prepared for you to conquer. In order to advance through the stages, you need to balance speed and power, as you only have three lives. Keep track of your characters' health and strength while playing. Upgrading each character can increase their damage and critical level to a maximum of five stars. How to Play Hero Dragon Power? • Arrow keys: Move • Space / Up arrow: Jump / Double jump • Z: Punch • X: Use the ability • C: Use ultimate ability • V: Recharge More Games Like This If you liked Hero Dragon Power, you might want to browse our other Action and Adventure games.

title: Idle Coffee Business
description: Ever since you were a kid, the smell of fresh coffee brewing in the morning has been your alarm clock. You've always had a soft spot for that perfect cup of joe, and let's be honest, who hasn't daydreamed about opening their own coffee shop? A cozy place where the aroma of coffee blends with the chatter of happy customers, where every corner tells a story, and where your passion for coffee turns into a booming business empire. If this dream is somewhat relatable to you, welcome my friend to Idle Coffee Business , where your caffeine-fueled dreams come to life! In this casual game online, you'll transform your humble coffee shop into a bustling empire of caffeine and cash. Start small by selling only single-shot espressos, but think big and plan your moves. Then, you'll watch as your profits brew to astronomical heights. Who knows, maybe you'll be the next Starbucks? Controls Computers: Click or drag to collect profits Smartphones: Tap and swipe to collect profits How to Play Idle Coffee Business Begin with your quaint little coffee shop. You'll serve only espressos to earn coins at the beginning. Your menu is expandable to up to 9 delicious drinks. Unlock a variety of coffee recipes to entice different kinds of customers. From classic espressos to fancy lattes, cappuccinos, and cold brews. The more you have, the more you earn. Use your earnings to upgrade your recipes, making them more profitable. Think of it as adding a shot of espresso to your income stream. Even when you're offline, your coffee shop isn't sleeping on the job. It keeps brewing profits, so you can come back to a pile of cash. Complete various barista milestones to earn rewards and show off your coffee-making prowess. Improve Coffee Bean Qualities Watch daily videos to get better beans, leading to higher profits. From average to top quality, each bean upgrade means more bucks in your coffee can. With these top-tier beans, you'll have the confidence to pitch like the pros at a chic coffeehouse, saying, "Would you like to try our blonde roast today? It's smooth, silky and easy to drink!" Speed Roast Don't forget to activate boosters that allow you to roast much faster than usual. You can also activate Social Media Booster by posting gorgeous latte art on your Instagram account. Developer Market JS created the Idle Coffee Business. More Idle Games If you love watching numbers grow while you do next to nothing, check out similar idle games like Idle Mining Empire . They're all about growing your empire with minimal effort, perfect for the lazy entrepreneur in all of us.

title: Skibidi Toilet io
description: Have you ever heard of a game called Skibidi Toilet io? It's a rather absurd concept - a battle royale game where toilets run around like crazy. The aim of the game is for the toilets to compete with each other by eating as much toilet paper and hot peppers as possible. As they consume more, they become bigger and stronger. Bigger toilets are able to push the smaller ones out of the platform. It's a hilarious and exciting game that will tickle your funny bones. If you're up for it, let's see if you can be the king of the toilets! What is Skibidi Toilet? Skibidi Toilet is a YouTube video series created by animator Alexey Gerasimov. In these short videos, heads popping out of toilets are fighting each other, bringing scary elements with a humorous sense. Skibidi Toilet short videos are loved by millions, so the idea behind them even inspired an io game. In the Skibidi Toilet io game, the player controls a toilet with a head popping out and fights in a battle royale on a platform to kick others out of the platform. To expand size and get stronger, toilets should eliminate more and more enemies besides consuming toilet paper and hot peppers. How to Play Skibidi Toilet io? Select the head of your character and get into to fight immediately! Your aim is to stay on the platform as long as possible. Use arrow keys or drag your mouse to move around. Collect toilet rolls and red peppers on your way to gain XP. Try to push other toilets down. Every kill will bring you points according to the enemies' size. If you fall off the arena you should start over. Tips for Skibidi Toilet io Pay attention to the holes on the platform where you can fall down. If a tile is flashing, it will soon disappear, creating a hole. Avoid the spikes that throw you away when you touch. Try to stay away from the edges so that you can be safer in the center. Play with a Friend You can play Skibidi Toilet io with a friend on the same device. You can co-operate or play against each other on the arena! Learn 2 player controls below! Desktop Controls Player 1 Controls: Use the WASD keys to move. Player 2 Controls: Use the Arrow keys to move. Mobile Controls Touch the left side of the screen to move player 1 Touch the right side of the screen to move player 2 Developer Skibidi Toilet io was created by Zupga.
