title: Crazy Moto Racing
description: Crazy Moto Racing is an online 3D motorcycle racing game that puts your speed and skill to the test. You might think that speed is your buddy here. But let me assure you; control is your actual buddy. You can enjoy competing against rivals or racing against time. This free online bike game delivers the action you've been craving across ten unique tracks. With two game modes, unlockable bikes, and a variety of achievements, every race feels like a new challenge. So, get ready to push your limits, avoid penalties, and aim for victory! If you love high-speed racing, Crazy Moto Racing delivers action-packed gameplay with realistic 3D visuals, multiple game modes, unlockable bikes, and achievements that will keep you coming back for more. To explore more online bike games , visit our full collection and let us know which one is your favorite. Controls Arrow keys / WASD: Steer your bike Spacebar: Brake Shift: Activate Nitro boost How to Play Crazy Moto Racing Select between Race Mode or Time Attack Mode. In race mode, compete against two rivals and aim for first place. The better your finish, the more coins you earn! In Time Attack mode, race against the clock! Avoid cutting corners in Time Attack Mode to prevent penalty time. Using nitro at the right moment can be the difference between first and second place. With ten different courses, each offering unique twists and turns, precision and strategy are key to winning. Use earned coins to buy two additional motorcycles for better speed and handling. The first bike costs 300 coins, and the best bike costs 2700 coins. Complete various achievements like winning races, setting records, and unlocking all bikes. Game Modes Race Mode: Face off against two AI opponents and aim to finish in first place. Consistently winning helps you progress through all ten tracks. Time Attack Mode: Speed through the track and set new records. Be mindful of penalties if you go off course! Achievements Test your skills by completing these milestones: Victory Lap – Finish in first place. Newcomer – Play Race Mode. Speedster – Play Time Attack Mode. Always Number 1 – Get three stars on all race levels. Racing Champion – Complete all ten Race Mode tracks. Time Champion – Complete all ten Time Attack Mode tracks. Fast as Lightning – Use nitro for the first time. Fast Qualifier – Set a new time record. Completionist – Finish all 20 levels across both modes. Making Progress – Complete five levels. Casual Racer – Win five races without using nitro. No Scratch – Win a race without colliding. Good Investment – Purchase a new motorcycle. Trifecta – Own all three bikes. Wreck – Complete all race tracks using only the first bike. Skilled Racer – Earn three stars on all Time Attack levels. Lost on Track – Drive the wrong way on the course. Speed Addict – Use nitro for a total of 1000 seconds. The First to Lose – Finish a race in second place. LOL n00b – Lose five races in a row. Who Created Crazy Moto Racing? This game was developed by FreezeNova.

title: Ludo Hero
description: Are you looking for a modern and engaging classic board game? Ludo Hero is a strategy board game which can be played with 2 or 4 players. The origin of this game goes back to the Indian game Pachisi. You can play Ludo Hero with online players worldwide or a Bot to have fun. It is your choice who you want to compete with. Roll the dice, start the game and be the Ludo King! How to Play Ludo Hero After choosing your avatar icon and entering your name in the box, decide whether you will play with online players or a Bot. You can view how many online players there are in the lower left corner of the screen. Then, select how many people you want to play with and start the game. Learn About the Ludo Board Bright yellow, gre­en, red, and blue are commonly chosen as colors for special locations on the Ludo board. In Ludo online game, each participant is assigned a color and given four toke­ns of that color. The board is typically square and features a playspace structured like a cross. The cross consists of three columns, with usually six squares per column on each arm of the cross. A player's home­ column consists of five colored squares located in the middle columns. The starting square­ for a player is the sixth colored square­, found outside their home­ column. In the center of the board sits a significant finishing square often composed of colore­d triangles atop each player's home­ columns. How to move tokens in Ludo Hero Players begin the game by rolling the dice­ to determine who goes first. The player with the highest number rolled gets the privilege of starting first. Each participant places their token on their own, starting square one at a time and racing it clockwise around the track. When playing the game, a player can move their tokens up the column and reach the ending square once they have reached the tile below their home­ column. The playe­r who successfully brings all their tokens to the finish line first is declared the winner and earns the title of Ludo King. Gameplay of Ludo Hero To specify who starts the game, each participant rolls a dice. The player with the highest roll starts first. Players then take turns in a clockwise order. A playe­r must roll a six to move a token from its yard to its starting square. If there are toke­ns in the home, players have the­ option to bring one out every time­ they roll a six or move one of their pieces six spaces forward. The start box contains two tokens of its own. If a player has no tokens and rolls a number other than six, the turn is passed to the next player. Players must always move a token according to the die-rolled value. Once a player has one or more tokens, they choose a token and move it the number of squares indicated by the die along the track. Controls Toss the dice, and then click on a piece to choose which you want to move. Similar Games Try Uno Online , a classic Uno game where you can play against CPU, if you enjoy playing Ludo Hero. Or you can explore other online board games on OnlineGames.io for further game alternatives.

title: War Simulator
description: A medieval war strategist commanding an army of diverse units such as archers, spearmen, and dwarves - that's who you get to be on War Simulator ! Deploy your warriors with a strategic formation and conquer new lands in this online game! Use your wits to outmaneuver your enemies and secure victory! Controls Left Click to place warriors on the battlefield. Hold right click to look around Scroll to zoom in/out to the scene How to Play War Simulator War Simulator features 10 challenging levels, with 4 set in dense forests and the remaining 6 in deserts. Each level presents unique terrain and enemy formations, requiring careful analysis and strategic planning. Position your warriors wisely, utilizing the terrain to your advantage. Once your units are in place, click the "Start Battle" button to watch the battle unfold in real-time. You can also speed up the action to 1.5X or 2X to see the outcome sooner. Understanding Soldier Stats In order to master War Simulator, it's crucial to understand the stats of your warriors. These stats will guide you in placing them effectively on the battlefield: Attack Power : The amount of damage a warrior can inflict on opponents. Health Points (HP) : The amount of damage a warrior can sustain before being defeated. Agility : The speed at which a warrior moves and reacts during combat. Energy : The stamina available for actions like running and performing special attacks. Meet the Warriors Dwarves Attack Power : 3.5 Health Points : 80 Agility : 1.7 Energy : 4 Dwarves are excellent in close combat, making them ideal for the front lines. With high HP, they can withstand significant damage, acting as the backbone of your defense. However, their lower agility means they are slower to react, so positioning them strategically is key. Spearmen Attack Power : 4 Health Points : 60 Agility : 2.5 Energy : 5 Spearmen are fast and agile, perfect for both the front and second lines. Their higher agility allows them to outmaneuver opponents, but their lower HP makes them less resilient to enemy attacks. Despite this, their balanced attack power and speed make them versatile mid-level soldiers. Archers Attack Power : 3 Health Points : 20 Agility : 20 Energy : 5 Archers excel at ranged combat and should always be placed at the back of your formation. Their high agility allows them to fire rapidly and move quickly, but their low HP makes them vulnerable in close combat. Use them to weaken enemies from a distance before engaging with your frontline units. Strategic Tips Understanding the strengths and weaknesses of each unit is essential to winning in War Simulator. Position your dwarves to absorb the brunt of the enemy's attack, use spearmen to outpace foes, and let your archers rain down arrows from a safe distance. Balance is key—deploying your units with a diverse approach will help you dominate the battlefield. Yes, you can enjoy dress up games for free on OnlineGames.io without any downloads. Can I share my designs? You can save your outfits and share screenshots with friends to show off your creativity. What makes this fashion game unique? The game combines stylish plaid fashion with a detailed makeup system, allowing endless possibilities for creating unique looks. Conclusion Trendy Plaid Outfit is a fun dress-up game that sparks your creativity. It's suitable for both adults and kids who want to experiment with different Parisian-inspired fashion styles. Play now on OnlineGames.io and bring your fashion dreams to life!

title: Tanks of the Galaxy
description: Tanks of the Galaxy is a top-down browser shooter game that you can play for free on OnlineGames.io. You steer one tank through a small maze-like arena, destroy enemy tanks and barrels, grab the coins they drop. Next, you spend those coins on better weapons and upgrades in the shop. Clear a level to unlock the next and keep pushing deeper into hostile space. 25 unique levels are awaiting you! Ready, Commander? Fire up the engines, load the cannons, and show the galaxy what one scrappy tank can do! Controls W A S D / Arrow Keys: Drive your tank Mouse Move: Rotate turret & aim (independent of the hull) Left-Click / Tap: Fire Spacebar: Cycle through unlocked weapons How to Play Tanks of the Galaxy You start with the first level. Finish it to reveal the next map. As you enter the map, look at the mini-radar in the top-right corner. Red dots are hostile tanks, green dots mark valuable crates. Grey blocks provide cover; red “B” barrels explode if they catch a shell. Enemy crews always outnumber you, so break them up. Peek around a corner, lure one tank into a line of fire, then duck back behind cover to reload. Shoot green supply crates to snag health packs, temporary shields, or extra coins. Clearing every crate often turns the tide when the map feels crowded. When you complete a level, tap the wrench icon to open the hangar. Spend coins on stronger weapons or on three permanent upgrades like Speed Boost (1500 c), Armor Plating (2000 c), Auto-Aim Servo (1250 c). Hit the big red FIGHT button when you’re ready to roll out again. Weapons & Prices In the Hangar, you can buy new weapons for your tank. Caliber Rounds: 200 coins, Fast, low-damage shots that are perfect for learning the game. Buckshot Scatter: 2 000 coins, Fires a wide cone of pellets. Great for close-range ambushes. Piercing Slugs: 3 000 coins, Three armor-piercing darts in a line. Punches straight through cover. AP Cannon: 4000 coins, One slow-loading heavy shell that hits like a truck. Two direct shots will shred most mid-tier tanks. Inferno Shells: 6000 coins, Sets targets ablaze, dealing burn damage over time. Cryo Darts: 8000 coins, A burst of icy needles that chill enemies, slowing their tracks just long enough for you to circle around. Rocket Pod: 12000 coins, Launches mini-rockets that home in on the nearest red dot. Cluster Bomb: 14000 coins, Lobs an explosive that fragments on impact Lightning Rail: 16000 coins, Fires a green energy bolt that chains between nearby tanks Developer Tanks of the Galaxy is crafted by 9Lives Games.

title: Stickman Swing
description: Stickman Swing is a 2D game where you control the iconic Stickman as he swings through challenging levels. You must guide Stickman through a series of tricky levels by swinging, using the rope's length and gravity to reach the end of the level. Make use of momentum, time your release and jump carefully to avoid falling into space. The game requires a solid understanding of physics, making it both fun and mind-stimulating. It's like someone took a physics textbook, threw it out the window, and said, "Let's make a game out of this." The way you have to calculate momentum, timing, and gravity? It's educational... if you squint hard enough. This simple 2D embodies the classic "easy to learn, hard to master" trope. The controls are straightforward – click, swing, release. Yet, mastering the art of the swing? That's where the real fun begins... Controls Swing: Hold the Left Mouse Button Jump: Release Left Mouse Button How to Play Stickman Swing You can hang your rope to the nearest hanger by clicking left mouse button. Use the momentum in time to move on the next hanger. Focus on the angle of your swing. Try to use the maximum length of your rope to build momentum. Always keep an eye on moving objects and spikes that can cause you to fall. Don’t forget to use gravity to your advantage when swinging to get more height and momentum. This game doesn't just ask for your attention; it demands it. Miss a swing, and you're plummeting to your doom faster than you can say, "I thought I had this." Obstacles As you progress, the game introduces various obstacles like spikes, moving platforms, circles to swing around and walls. These increase the difficulty of your swings and add a challenge to reaching the next platform. You will also encounter jumping pads, and other tools that will ease your journey to the finish line. New Stickman Skins To get different skins for Stickman, unlock new levels. Each costume adds a fun twist to the game. Skins include options like Ninja Stickman, Spiderman, Stickman King and more. Give the Stickman a wardrobe makeover he deserves! Editor's Review There's something about swinging from one point to another that's oddly satisfying. Once you get into the rhythm, it's like you're in a weird, stick-figure ballet. Stickman Swing is a free online game accessible on pretty much any device with a web browser, so I think it's perfect for those moments when you need a quick escape but can't access your usual gaming setup. Similar Games If you enjoy games where one misstep sends you careening into oblivion, then swing on over to Geometry Dash . Just remember, gravity isn't just a good idea; it's the law... in this game, at least.

title: Pets Beauty Salon
description: Are you ready to serve as a pet stylist? Pets Beauty Salon is a kid's game where you dress up cats and dogs with stunning outfits and accessories. You need to show your creativity here. With its mesmerizing graphics, Pets Beauty Salon offers you a delightful game environment. How to Play Pets Beauty Salon Welcome to Pets Beauty Salon, where you can unleash your inner pet stylist! This kids' game lets you dress up adorable cats and dogs with a wide range of stunning dresses. Show off your creativity in this fun game environment featuring dazzling graphics. When you enter the game, choose your first animal and start dressing it. This is your starting point. When all these preparation processes are completed, the spotlight will shine most on your pet. First, choose the color of your animal. Choose the colors that look most vivid to your eyes and that you think suit your pet. You will find golden yellow, orange, pink, brown, blue and black among the colors. Then, select your pet's eye color. There are some charming eye colors here. Our favorite colors are purple and pink. It's time to put stickers on your pet. Yes, stickers! You will find a heart, star, paw print and donut stickers. Place them in your pet's ear or backside. Do you want your pet to wear a crown or a beret? You can even find a fedora hat if you want it to be classy. Or even just a ribbon can make it look very stylish. Try on exclusive outfits for your pet. Here, you will find pleated skirts, sweaters and pullovers. Choose the most suitable one according to the weather conditions; we will be sorry if it gets sick. After that, pick a shoe that matches its top outfit. As for accessories, you can wear it with a collar and a scarf. Again, if you want, a pair of glasses would look great on her. Controls Use your mouse click to dress up your pet. Similar Games If you enjoy playing Pets Beauty Salon, you may try Wedding Beauty Salon , where you dress up a bride for her wedding. Or, try Cat Doctor to be a vet doctor and cure furry babies. You can look up other online kids games on OnlineGames.io. All the games on the website are handpicked and designed for you! Enjoy the ones that appeal to you the most. Keep coming back for new, exciting games!

title: The House
description: The House is an online escape game where you awake, disoriented, in a bedroom with no memory of how you got there. You sense that something is wrong. You drag yourself out of bed and glance out the window. Beyond it, chaos unfolds. Broken objects, buildings, trees and more float ominously in mid-air. Something feels unnatural in the atmosphere. In this adventure escape room game with a horror theme, you must search every corner of the house. Collect keys or seemingly ordinary items that hold the key to your freedom. The puzzles are not simple logic tests but they also unfold another layer of horror and mystery. You need to solve out visual and numerical challenges that will push your mind. The floor creaks as though someone—or something—is moving just beyond your sight. Time is running out, and the house is growing impatient. Will you escape, or will the house claim you as its latest victim? Controls Use your mouse to interact with the environment. How to Play The House You begin by waking up in a haunting bedroom alone. Explore the room for anything that might help you escape. Items are scattered around, some hidden in plain sight, others locked away in the most unexpected places. Collect these, as they'll be crucial to solving the house's puzzles. Some items are not collectible objects, but they'll help you understand the environment better in some way. You can see your backpack by clicking on the items icon on the top of your screen. You might need to write some notes down through the game to solve puzzles. Solve each puzzle to unlock new rooms and secrets. But beware, the house is not a passive observer. The more you solve, the weirder changes you'll notice around the house. What is The House? The House is an open-source escape puzzle with a scary theme. The game doesn't rely solely on jump scares. The music and art style of the House creates a chill atmosphere. If you attentively play it, you can escape the house and reach the game's end within roughly 30 minutes. Developer Artur Kot created The House. More Horror Games If the tension of The House had you on edge, you'll find Horror Granny just as thrilling. Horror Granny is another escape room-style scary game where you try to escape from a mental hospital. Outwit the granny who patrols the place all over.

title: Get Ready Summer Picnic
description: Summer is here, and it’s time for fun in the sun! In Get Ready Summer Picnic , you’ll join a group of four stylish besties as they prep for the ultimate beach picnic. From glowing makeup to cute sundresses and yummy baskets full of fruits and snacks, this free game is all about fashion, friendship, and good vibes. It’s colorful, creative, and super chill, just like a real summer day at the beach! Controls Mouse Click: Select items, apply makeup, and choose outfits Choose Your Girl Start by selecting the first of the four girls to GTWM first. Each one has a different hairstyle and personality. Pick the first girl to begin the makeover fun! As you complete, you'll unlock other girls. Makeup Time Apply bright and beachy makeup. There are several lipstick shades, eyeshadows, and blush options to experiment with. Want sparkly eyes and a glossy lip? Go for it! This is your chance to mix and match for that perfect summer glow. Dress Up Now it’s time to find the cutest picnic outfit! Try out a variety of dresses with polka dots, florals, and fresh summer vibes. Match the look with fun earrings and a necklace to complete the fit. Pick a Picnic Basket No picnic is complete without snacks! Choose from different picnic baskets, some with fruit, others with cameras, sunglasses, water bottles, or even sunflowers. Each basket matches the vibe of the outfit and adds charm to the whole look. Repeat for Each Friend Once your first girl is picnic-ready, go back and help the rest of the squad get dressed, too. You’ll unlock their stations one by one until all four are fully styled and beach-ready! Developer This stylish summer dress-up game is designed by FreezeNova for players who love fashion, creativity, and casual fun. It's one of many casual online games aimed at younger audiences, encouraging their inner fashionista! More Online Makeover Games You’ll Love If you like dress-up games full of tropical fashion and vacation vibes, check out our whole library at the fashion games online page. Our favorite is Barbiemania . It has a great wardrobe and makeup options. We bet you'll love it too. All our titles are free to play on OnlineGames.io and perfect for players who love makeovers and themed fashion challenges.

title: First Day of School
description: After a long holiday, the first day of school has arrived. Let's see how you will prepare the girls for this day. First Day of School is a 2D fashion game where you're that stylist who gets the girls ready for the first day of school. They are overly confident in you and your taste. Are you prepared to let your creative side run wild and style the ideal ensemble for the first day of classes? Now, go ahead and start having fun with fashion! How to Play First Day of School The girls are both a little stressed about the first day of school and very excited to meet their friends. They want to make a good impression on this day because they will also meet their new friends. It's up to you to prepare them carefully for the day. They knocked on the door of the beauty salon, trusting your stylist's personality, make-up skills and fashion vision. Start with the Make-up As with every make-up, let's start with the girls' eye make-up and adapt the rest of the make-up according to their eyes. The most crucial part of make-up is the eyes. Choose the most charming eyeshadow among the colors given to you. Then, let's complete the eyeshadow with a beautiful lipstick. You have 6 different color options here: dark pink, light, red, brown, light green and purple. Give shape to the girls' eyebrows a bit. Determine the most preferable eyebrow shape according to their facial features and choose the color of the eyebrow. Shall we put some blush on the girls' cheeks? You can match the blush color preference with eyeshadow. Choose the girls' eye color. You can find very strange colors here. Would you have thought that there would be purple and pink eye colors? Yes, there are. Accessories for the Girls Choosing a pair of glasses for girls can give them the image of a disciplined student. Choose the best option for them from the options given to you. Afterward, you can also choose a necklace and earrings for them. If you don't want it, you can skip the necklace. The decision is yours. Get Your Hands on Looks In this section, you are expected to decide on the girls' hair style and color. This part is the most striking part. You can even add a second color to the girls' hair from here if you want. Dressing the Girls Up Finally, choose a stunning dress for them and complete the process of preparing them with a pair of beautiful shoes. If you want, you can also choose a pair of socks under their dress or skirt. And of course, do not forget the school bag! Explore More Dress-up Games If you are into dress-up games like First Day of School, then you may give a chance to the games below. Princesses Prom Night : For the princesses, prom night has finally arrived, and the school year is coming to a conclusion. In the game Princesses Prom Night, your job is to get beautiful princesses ready for their fantastic prom night. Wedding Planner : In the browser game Wedding Planner, you are in charge of organizing a wedding. You literally have to handle every single thing. The wedding cake, the groom's attire, the bride's gown, and the veil… Online Fashion Game by JulGames

title: Winterella
description: Prepare your girls for the upcoming Winter Ball! Winterella is a 2D girl game in which you are responsible for the makeup of three queens of ice. They are excited about the prominent ball and need your assistance. Prepare their faces for the makeup and beautify them. Make them breathtaking under the cold of the winter breeze in this cozy game. How to Play Winterella Make the ladies ready for the ball in turn. Click on the first lady and start to prepare her face for a makeover. Apply moisturizer and serums to her face. This phase is essential to make makeup look better on the face. Then, you can begin applying cosmetics. Apply the proper foundation, sprinkle glitters on the eyebrows and do the eye makeup with the iciest blues. You can add glitter to the lady's neck area, as well. Select the favorable mascara for the eyelashes. Choose the shade of lipstick and come to the final section, the accessories. When you finish preparing them, click the arrow icon on the left. Three Queens of Ice There are three winter queens waiting for you to prepare them for the ball. The first lady is a brunette girl from Brazil. Our second lady is an Afro girl with dreadlocks. Finally, the lady at the end is a pure white woman with blond hair from cold lands. All three beautiful women have unique ethnic beauty in their own way. Icy Touches The colors and themes are primarily blue as you prepare the girls for a winter setting in this cozy game. When you apply these ice-like cosmetics to the girls, they will appear cold and rigid. But this is how they want to look. They want to suit the winter. Create the most beautiful ice queens of the prom from them! Controls Desktops and Computers Mouse : Apply Makeup Mobile Devices Use the touchscreen to apply makeup. Developer Gamerina developed Winterella. More Games Like This Try Kiki's Pink Christmas if you find playing Winterella enjoyable. In the game, you will help the Kiki to prepare for the upcoming Christmas season. She has invited her family and friends to her house. There are many scenes, such as the kitchen and living room, and you need to consider these scenes while preparing her. For more options, look for other girl games on OnlineGames.io. Numerous free browser games on the site will draw your attention. Also, please share your gaming experiences with us in the comment section below!

title: WormsZone.io
description: In WormsZone.io the main objective is to become as big as possible defeating other worms and eating their food. When your worm is growing larger it is easier to kill the rivals. Navigate on the ground and block their way to crush into you. You even have Worm wardrobe where you can choose the skin for your own worm. Also you can customize it choosing a color from the palette.You can use any number of colors at the same time. But of course you need to have coins to buy it. The face of the worm can be changed too. There are 12 mission ready to be completed. Every mission you need to solve a task. After 12 missions played you will be able to open a gift that contains 10 potions and 1 worm with special power-ups. Wheel of Fortune Get maximum weight in one game. The greater the worm's weight, the greater the reward. Watch the video to spin the wheel of fortune. Gourmet Activate the bonus to increase the points you receive for the collected food! Piggy Bank Fight battles and save your bonus coins in the Piggy Bank. Collect at least 750 coins to open the Piggy Bank! Select the game mode, save your bonus coins and open the Piggy Bank. Top Players Section Here you will find the list of the players global/local for: • Infinity • Time • Threasure hunter • St. Patrick's Day Profile Section Here are presented the details of the worm. • Best score • Best survival time • Defeated • Games Played • Total Play Time WormsZone.io Controls Use left or right mouse button to speed up Developer WormsZone.io was created by Wild Spike.

title: Moto Trials
description: Moto Trials is a 3D driving game where players try to engage with the ramps and obstacles on the platform. Here, the player's ability to control the motor will be tested to the utmost. As the levels progress, the platform will become increasingly difficult. Reflexes and hand-eye coordination are also of great importance because there will be places on the platform where the player must suddenly change direction. If you are ready, let's test your skills. How to Play Moto Trials Enter the world of Moto Trials, where thrilling challenges and an adrenaline rush are waiting for you. With every new level, the ever-changing platform will push you to the limit and present you with nerve-wracking ramps and hazards that will have you on the tip of your seat. When you enter the game, start playing from the first level by choosing your motorcycle. There are 3 motorcycles that the game offers you. A standard red sports motorcycle is given to you at the beginning. The other two are the ones you can unlock as you pass levels and earn money. Here's a little tip: If you want to earn money quickly and upgrade your motorcycle, you can play the levels you have passed over and over again. Moving Platforms As you level up, the platform will become more complex. The distance required to travel will become longer, obstacles will become denser, and some objects will even be in motion. All of this will require increased focus from you. Repositioning The game provides the right to reposition you; if you click on the direction symbol on the right side of the screen before it is too late when you fall off the platform, it will send you back to where you last left off on the platform. Controls Use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys to steer the motorcycle. Use the Space key to set the parking brake. Similar Games Try Moto X3M if you enjoy playing this game. A free online browser game, Moto X3M lets you ride a motorcycle over a lot of obstacles. The player must respond quickly because the game moves at a breakneck pace. Or, you may look up other free bike games on OnlineGames.io by following the link. Contact We absolutely love to hear from gamers! If you have any queries or would like to share any gaming stories, please leave a comment below or use our Contact Us link.

title: Hill Climb Cars
description: Hill Climb Cars is a 2D driving game where you steer your cute car on the road with many residences and shops on the wayside. Pass all of them and move forward until you reach the finish line. You will face many ups and downs along the track. Try not to lose steering control in this one of the coolest car games ! How to Play Hill Climb Cars There are 30 unique levels to complete. The difficulty of the levels will increase as you make progress. Your primary mission is to drive your vehicle to the finish line without any potential flipover. There will be many highs and lows along the way. So, you must move cautiously. Don’t lose your control over the car. If it flips over, you will have to play that level from the beginning. Give It a Style! The best part of this driving game is that you can customize your car as you wish. Enter the customization section by clicking on the wrench icon from the menu. You will see many cars here. You have the first two vehicles in the beginning. Other options are unlockable as you earn coins over time. Select your favorite one and tap on the arrow icon. It is time to choose the color of your vehicle in this section. You can also upgrade your vehicle’s engine and suspension features here for more power. Bounce the Car Your vehicle can flip while passing over a high place or entering a pothole while driving on the road. If it hits the ground severely, you will lose the game as the car will explode. You may try to bounce your vehicle to return it to its original state to prevent such cases. This game will put your driving skills to the ultimate test! Controls WASD / Arrow Keys: Steer the Car Spacebar: Bounce Developer Hill Climb Cars was developed by FreezeNova. What is More? If you are a Hill Climb Cars fan, you may also give Crazy Hill Climb a chance. You will control a cabriolet as an elephant driver in the game! You can choose your driver among many cartoon animals, such as a reindeer and a toucan to travel with. Reach the finish line without any accident.

title: Kick the Pirate
description: Ahoy matey! Pirates may be brave on the high seas, but they’ve never met you. In Kick the Pirate , your job is simple: turn this grumpy pirate into your personal punching bag. He’s muttering curses or just standing there looking smug. But it’s oddly satisfying to send him flying with a cannonball. Seriously. Bad day at school? Boss annoyed you? This destroy game is the perfect way to blow off some steam without flipping a table. Stress-Busting Clicker Game Some games make you think. Others make you feel. And this one? It just lets you kick a pirate with a cannon. And honestly, that’s all we needed today. In case you still have some steam left to blow off, we have a full collection of dummy games. You can kick the alien who tries to colonize your planet with some laser guns and sci-fi weapons. Or perhaps you may want to beat an Evil Santa who keeps the gifts to himself instead of giving them away. Oh, you still need more? Write "Kick the" in the search bar or go and explore all destroying games we have! Controls Click or tap to attack the pirate. Use earned coins to unlock more weapons. Toggle settings in the top right for sound and blood effects. How to Play Kick the Pirate Start by clicking or tapping the pirate as fast (or as furiously) as you like. Each hit earns you coins, which you’ll use to buy new weapons. Your goal is to deplete the pirate’s health bar ( at the bottom) to complete each level. As you progress, the levels get tougher and the pirate gets sassier. You can swap out the ship’s background if you want a change of scene. Click on the button on the bottom left corner to shop new backgrounds. If you’d prefer less graphic visuals, use the drop icon in the corner to toggle off the blood splatter. Weapons to Try There are tons of wacky weapons to unlock, each more satisfying than the last. You can switch between weapons using the buttons at the top of the screen. The stronger your weapons, the faster you can rack up coins and complete levels. Flintlock Pistol: Classic and simple. Bone Key Gun: Looks like it came straight out of a cursed treasure chest. Battle Axe: Heavy damage and major pirate pain. Ship Anchor: Watch him go flying. Cannon: Boom! Need we say more? TNT Barrel: Great for crowd control… or pirate control. Rifle: Unlockable after a few rounds of brutal beating. Developer Kick the Pirate was developed by FreezeNova with casual fun in mind. While it doesn’t take itself seriously, it delivers a surprisingly satisfying gameplay loop perfect for quick sessions or all-out pirate punishment marathons. Is Kick the Pirate Safe for Kids? While Kick the Pirate uses cartoon-style visuals and lets you toggle off blood effects, parents should know the core gameplay revolves around violence toward a pirate character. It’s meant to be humorous and exaggerated, not realistic. Recommended for players 10 and up with parental guidance if needed.

title: CobraZ.io Classic
description: CobraZ.io Classic is one of the most advanced FPS games where the player can customize his soldier and prepare himself for war with the best items. There are 4 game modes, each with unique features. It offers you Team Deathmatch, Free For All, Capture The Flag and Gun Game mode options. Decide which game mode you will play according to your mood and equip your weapon! Enjoy online battles with this game, which has the most magnificent graphics among battle games. How to Play CobraZ.io Classic? Before entering the war, you can customize your soldier's clothing, weapons, abilities, and even his dance routine after winning the battle. This game offers you many alternatives. Evaluating these alternatives makes the gaming experience much more delightful. You can find anything you can think of in the highly developed shop section. Game Modes in CobraZ.io Classic There are 4 different game modes with rich graphics and storylines. Try each of them and enjoy their different gaming experiences. You can choose which game mode you want to play by pressing the gear icon in the main menu. Or, you can directly set it to "All" and press the button below to have the game open a random mode for you. Team Deathmatch: In Team Deathmatch mode, the battle occurs between two teams. It can be called the most straightforward game mode. Free For All: Free For All mode is risky in which everyone fights alone. Capture The Flag: In Capture The Flag mode, you also fight in teams, but there are designated points for both teams. The flags here are captured and taken to the main base. Gun Game: In Gun Game mode, you start the game with a simple gun, and as you eliminate enemies, you level up and acquire more powerful weapons. Equipments Section In the Equipment section, you can view everything your soldier has. Here, you can find his heavy weapons, the gun and the axe. You can view the features of a weapon by tapping on it: Damage, Fire Rate, Accuracy Range, Ammunition and Mobility. Or you can look at the new weapons you may unlock. You can also create a new loadout for yourself. Change the Soldier's Appearance Change your soldier's appearance and clothing from the Equipment section. You can purchase a hat for him and choose his hairstyle and color. You might even find skull face paints. In short, be the architect of your own game with the many options offered to you. Skills in CobraZ.io Classic When you enter the game, the game will give you the chance to choose one of 4 skills. By choosing one of these, you determine a helping force for yourself. You activate these skills by pressing the Q key. Supply Drop: It allows you to obtain new weapons by dropping a chest. AOE Heal: It provides rapid recovery. Holo Soldier: It creates 3 holograms identical to your character and confuses your enemies. Dome Shield: It creates a circle of protection and protects you from bullets. Controls WASD or the Arrow keys to move. Left Mouse button to fire. Right Mouse button to aim. Space key to slide while moving. Left Shift key to run. 1-2-3 number keys to change weapons. E key or the F key to interact with a gun. G key to throw grenade. H key to use med kit. T key to chat. L key to toggle cursor lock. C key to crouch. Press the N key to show the scoreboard. ESC key to pause. Discover FPS Games If you are a fan of CobraZ.io Classic, you may try Crazy Strike Force . You can give your character a distinct look and make them resistant to enemies. You will be able to shoot every player in the game with an excellent assortment of weaponry. You have to defeat your rivals; don't be afraid of creating your own strategy. For more options, look up all FPS Games on OnlineGames.io by following the link. Share your gaming experience with fellow gamers in the comments section below.

title: Unicorn Dress Up
description: Unicorn Dress Up is a girl game where they create their virtual little pony by putting forward their creativity. There are a wide range of choices regarding horn, tail, hair and other outfits for the pony. You have so many colorful options here. We're sure you'll have a hard time deciding which one to choose! Bring together the best options and create a sweet combination in this unicorn dress-up game. How to Play Unicorn Dress Up Dressing up games like this offers you a million options in terms of styles and shapes. You will see 6 unicorns with different skin colors when you start to play the game. Once you choose the unicorn you want to customize, you will see categories lined up at the bottom of the screen. Click on one of these, and options will appear at the top. For example, when you click on the horn icon, different kinds of horns will appear right above with color options. Create your virtual pony by proceeding row by row and making choices! Head Area of the Pony Choose a horn for the unicorn from among the lively color options. Then, choose a hairstyle for her. You can find braided hair and curly hairstyles here. You can give her hair a single color, or you may consider two-color options. Optionally, you may also add an accessory to the pony's hair. You may put flowers or a veil in her hair. Pony's Body From here, you will select a tail for the pony. You may have the tail braided, just like the hair part. Also, you may decide whether the tail will be single or double-colored. Then, if you want, you have the chance to choose a tail accessory. Shouldn't we choose some stylish shoes for the pony? The glittery ones may suit her very well. Outfits and Accessories You have lots and lots of options for clothes, scarves, eye patches and even wings for your unicorn. We think you can create a great combination for her by choosing the coolest ones among them. Give her the best image using your creativity. Can I play Unicorn Dress Up on my tablet? Yes, you can play Unicorn Dress Up on your tablet. It is also accessible on mobile devices, desktops and Chromebooks. You can play this game on any device at any time as long as you have a reliable internet connection. Controls Just use your mouse click to create your virtual pony. What is More? If you love playing unicorn games, you may also try Little Unicorn . Little Unicorn is another kids game in which the player designs their own unicorn. The game includes a customizable unicorn that can be built from the very beginning. Or, you may look up other games for girls on OnlineGames.io for further options. Share your gaming experiences with us in the area provided for comments below!

title: Idle Pet Business
description: Are you ready to become a millionaire by managing your very own pet shop? It's the dream job you've been waiting for! Idle Pet Business is an idle game where you start nurturing pets with a cute hamster and develop your pet empire. In this game, you can step into the world of pet care and watch your empire grow from a tiny hamster to a thriving business. Take great care of your animals to earn coins and expand your pet kingdom. This game also serves as a realistic business management simulation, offering valuable insights into how such businesses operate. How to Play Idle Pet Business Your journey begins with caring for a tiny hamster; from there, you'll start making money. Upgrading your animals is crucial as it directly impacts your earnings. As you level up your pets, your income will increase, making it essential to invest in their growth. Unlocking New Types of Animals There are many kinds of animals here. As you earn money, you will be able to unlock new animals such as puppy, bunny, parrot, fish, chameleon, turtle and even a unicorn. When unlocking each new animal, you must collect the amount written on the square. Upgrading Pets The key to progress in this business is upgrading the pets. Thus, what you earn from your animals will also increase. When the bar under the animals is full, the money you make will be equal to the upgrade level of the animals. You can open the Upgrade Store by clicking on the shopping cart icon in the lower right corner of the screen. Achievements in Idle Pet Business There are some tasks here. As you fulfill these, you will unlock achievements. You can open the "Achievements" section by pressing the ribbon icon in the lower right corner of the game screen. Get your reward by pressing the "Claim" button next to the tasks you have completed. Pets on Social Media Sharing your pets on social media at regular intervals will increase your popularity. Share them on your social media by clicking on the phone that appears on the game screen! Controls Play Idle Pet Business using your mouse. Explore More Games If you enjoy playing Idle Pet Business, we recommend checking out Idle Restaurant . Invest in your restaurant and watch it grow. Or try Idle Startup Tycoon and become a successful entrepreneur. Both games provide a fun and exciting gaming experience. You can also explore other free strategy games and animal games on OnlineGames.io for even more options. Stay connected with us for a constant stream of new and exciting games to play.

title: You vs 100 Skibidi Toilets
description: Ok, cameraman! We hope you're ready for action! Because 100 Skibidi toilets wait for you to hunt you down. Arrange your loadout with shotguns, rifles, throwables, wear your best suit and enter the arena to flush them all. You vs 100 Skibidi Toilets is a 3D third person shooter game with funny visuals and engaging gameplay. Learn the controls below and start playing it on your browser right away. If you enjoy the chaotic fun of You vs 100 Skibidi Toilets, you'll love playing more Skibidi Toilet Games Online . These games offer wacky scenarios where you can continue your battle against the mischievous Skibidi toilets. Visit OnlineGames.io for a library of Skibidi games that will keep you entertained for hours with their humorous visuals. Controls Move : WASD or arrow keys Roll / Jump / Climb : Space Shoot : Left mouse button Aim : Right mouse button (hold) Reload : R Change Weapon : Mouse wheel Weapon Hotkeys : 1 - 6 How to Play You vs 100 Skibidi Toilets Arrange your loadout and make sure you have enough ammo for 100 skibidis hungry for the cameraman. Hit the play button and enter the field. Shoot'em all. You can explode barrels by shooting to clear multiple enemies at once. Check out the weapon and skin shops for more customized gameplay.
