title: Tapman
description: Ready to embark on a nostalgic journey of Pac-Man? Relieve the classic arcade experience! Tapman is another arcade game based on Pac-Man. The game mechanics are the same as in the original game. Steer your yellow character in the maze, which looks like a pizza with a missing slice. Collect all the dots while trying to avoid colorful ghosts in this version of the avoid game! What is Pac-Man? Pac-Man is a well-known maze action video game developed by Namco Limited in the 1980s. In many respects, this game is one of the firsts in the gaming industry. Around the world, it has gained a very good reputation. Eventually, it became an iconic part of popular culture. Please check out our Google Pacman 30th Anniversary blog post for further information, such as fun facts and Guinness world records! We wish you a good reading in advance. About Tapman Pac-Man inspired Tapman while it was being developed. Overall, there are no significant differences between these two arcade games. The rules are the same: steer your yellow character with an open mouth and collect the dots in the maze. However, you must move cautiously. You are not alone in this maze. Four ghosts are in it, and they will chase you through labyrinths. Their names are Shadow, Speedy, Bashful and Pokey. The colors they have are red, pink, turquoise and orange, respectively. You must escape from them to survive no matter what! You will have three Pac-Man lives. If any of the ghosts catch you, you will lose one of them! Collect the Power Pellets Besides the dots in the maze, you will see Power Pellets. They are bigger in size compared to the standard dots. Collecting them will enable you to turn the ghosts blue temporarily. Once you get one of the pellets, the tables will be turned! You can start to chase the ghosts this time. Eating one of them will bring you bonus scores. Getting the cherries on the screen will also get you bonuses. You can see them from time to time in the maze. Don't miss getting the cherries when you spot them! Guess the Movements of Ghosts To get the highest scores in Tapman, you must practice estimating the next step of the ghosts. Their only job is chasing you throughout the maze. They will come after you like they are your shadows wherever you go. Figuring out their movement style can allow you to dodge them easily. This way, you can stay one step ahead of them without worrying about being caught. Let's see if you can beat your highest score in Tapman! Controls Desktops and Laptops Arrow Keys: Move P: Pause Mobile Devices Use the directional buttons to move. Developer Lucio Panepinto developed Tapman. More Games Like This You may also try playing Geometry Rash . Let yourself surrender to the rhythm of the music and steer your cube on the platform. Avoid touching any of the obstacles on the road to survive! Look for other online arcade games on OnlineGames.io for further options. Additionally, please contact us if you have any suggestions or a wishlist. We would be happy to hear from you!

title: Duck Life Battle
description: Duck Life Battle is an arcade game where players embark on an adventure to train a duck for combat, turning them into invincible warriors. You should know that every duck can be customized with weapons, getting ready for the battles. The journey will begin at the training location, where the little duck will have an intense program to improve skills such as survival tactics and defense methods. Also, you can teach him about endurance and resilience, which are crucial for bearing up against the trials of combat. Create the duck's avatar The duck needs to have its personal style so you can choose from an impressive palette of unique colors. Also, you can pick the hairstyle and personality, this way making the most interesting look. You will have to give your pretty animal a name that expresses its spirit. Once you arrive at the Farm, you will meet various ducks who are looking to invite you to battles. But don't hurry things; just before joining the fights, it is necessary to pay a visit to the training dojo. This is the perfect place to improve the skills, making sure the little duck is prepared for future fights. You can let him explore the area, interact with other ducks, and do the training to become victorious in the battles. Controls Left-Click: To move, fight and interact Skills in Duck Life Battle When you enter the training, you will be presented with five distinct training courses to make your duck invincible in the action game. You must find an excellent strategy to increase the level up to 20 of the five skills: Defense: resist in front of the attack of other ducks Health: boost the hit points during the battles Power: create more damage to enemies Special: special effect on the attack meter Speed: boost the speed of the attack What is More? Duck Life 4 is part of an RPG game series. There are 4 Duck Life games available. If you haven't played the prequels play them all! Duck Life Duck Life 2 Duck Life 3

title: Baby Dragons
description: Giant magical lizards. Flying through the sky, exploring lands with shiny wings. Breathing fire. These are not just any creatures but dragons - the epitome of majesty and wonder. It's widely known that some dragons can be a bit grumpy and short-tempered. But have you ever considered the charm of newly hatched baby dragons? In our interactive online game, Baby Dragons , we invite you to experience the joy of these adorable creatures. Personalize your just-hatched babies with a range of colors, sparkling wings, or even horns. The power is in your hands. Let's begin this exciting journey together! Controls Use your mouse or touchscreen to pick items How to Play Baby Dragons Two dragon siblings are about to hatch from their shells. And they need your help to give them a unique and perfect appearance and personality. In Baby Dragons, you're not just a player but also a dragon caretaker who shapes their physical attributes and traits. To start, you need to choose the color of their skin. Next, you can pick the horn that suits their look. Add a shiny tail for extra flair. Most importantly, find vibrant wings that match their spirits. As you play and progress in the game, you'll unlock the second section, where you can choose the eye color, capes, and accessories for your baby dragon. Each choice you make brings you closer to creating a truly unique dragon. You can start creating your kind of baby dragon now for free! Is Baby Dragons safe for kids? Yes, Baby Dragons is a safe and interactive dress-up game without any harmful visuals. We diligently choose kids games to be extra safe for our little players. Can my 3-year-old play online games? Children over 2 can have supervised screen time where they can improve their sensory and motor skills with interactive and age-appropriate games. Baby Dragons is one such game that little kids aged 2 to 8 can enjoy, offering a creative experience while promoting cognitive development. Developer FreezeNova created this game. More Games Like This Fond of dragons? We have a dedicated section where you can play only dragon games online . If you're looking for kid-friendly alternatives, the next adventure awaits you in Angela All Season Fashion ! Dress the famous cat Angela for her date with Tom!

title: Bookworm
description: Bookworm is an online game where your vocabulary becomes your superpower! This addictive word puzzle game challenges you to connect letters on a grid to form impressive words. No timer means no rush, but don't get too comfortable—the fiery tiles are a real threat. Stop them before they reach the bottom, or it's game over! Test your wit and save the poor little Bookworm now! Let's get spelling! Controls Computers Click and drag across letters to form words, then release to submit. Mobiles Tap and drag on letters to create words, then release to confirm. How to Play Bookworm Online Start by connecting adjacent letters to spell valid words. Begin with shorter words to clear those pesky burning tiles. Scores depend on word length, rare letters, reward tiles, and your current level. In the most general way, the longer the word, the bigger your score just like in Scrabble! When you've formed a word, submit it by releasing your mouse or lifting your finger. You can also use the submit button on the left. Watch out for burning tiles! They appear randomly after the first level and must be cleared before they reach the bottom. Or else the game is over. If you cannot come up with a new word, try scrambling the grid by clicking on the bookworm. This feature comes with a price of new burning tiles on the grid! Earn Bonus Points After level one, bonus words will appear under the Bookworm. Treat those bonus words like they're your best mate who just shows up with your favorite pizza. They boost your score, so never ignore them. Green tiles boost your score, while gold tiles (earned by forming words with 5+ letters) multiply your rewards. As you level up, expect tougher bonus words with bigger rewards. Happy word hunting! Explore Smart Games Think your vocabulary skills are top-notch? Okay, but if you can spell it, can you draw it? Try Skribblio , a game where your vocabulary skills meet your artistic talents. This global guessing game tests your ability to sketch words. It's like Pictionary for the word-savvy, and it's definitely worth a shot.

title: Sniper Reloaded
description: Take positions as an eagle-eyed Sniper! Action starts soon! Sniper Reloaded is an online FPS game where your mission is to eliminate enemies from a long range. Keep your aim steady. The hunt is on! Controls Left Click: Shoot Right Click/Mouse Scroll: Zoom/aim WASD: Move Space: Jump R: Reload Esc/Tab: Pause How to Play Sniper Reloaded Choose from two distinct maps: one set in a rural landscape and the other perched atop a skyscraper in the heart of a city. Your mission is to take down enemies one by one with your sniper rifle. The accuracy of your shots matters—whether you land a headshot, body shot, or leg shot, you'll earn bonus points accordingly. Additionally, you'll score extra points for hitting long-distance targets. You start with 100 HP, and each time you're hit, your health decreases by 1 point. Aim to beat your own score before your HP runs out. Distant Battle to Intense Combats If you cleared all the enemies in your sight, jump down from the building to get closer to other enemies hiding between buildings. Beware that you'll be more open to any attacks in the streets. Fine Tune Your Aim To become a better sniper, it's important to understand how your H (Horizontal Angle) and V (Vertical Angle) work. These are your guides for adjusting your aim. You'll see these values when you zoom in with the rifle. Horizontal Angle (H): This tells you how far left or right your crosshair is from your target. Adjust the H value to keep up with running enemies, and make sure you're lined up for a perfect shot. Vertical Angle (V): V value shows how much you've moved your aim up or down. It's useful when aiming at enemies on different levels, like those on rooftops. Getting the right vertical angle is key for hitting targets that are far away or getting those headshots. By watching these angles, you can tweak your aim and improve your precision. Take your time, stay focused, and use these tips to get more accurate hits in Sniper Reloaded! Developer FreezeNova Games Studio developer Sniper Reloaded. More Sniper Games Online If you enjoyed Sniper Reloaded, there are plenty of online sniper games to explore on OnlineGames.io. Sharpen your skills with different duties, from urban missions to wild hunts. Each game offers unique maps, weapons, and scenarios that will test your accuracy and patience as a sniper. Head over to our dedicated tag Sniper Games Online to discover more sharpshooting action!

title: Draw Here
description: Draw Here is a physics puzzle game with 100 levels. Draw objects on the canvas to collect all the stars. Use your basic physics knowledge besides drawing skills. Gravity, motion and energy conversion are all in this game. Let's see how many stars you will collect! How To Play Draw Here? Aim to clear all the stars in each level. To clear a star, draw an object and make sure it touches the star while falling. You can use the dotted frames as your canvas. You can't draw anything outside of the boxes. You will encounter balls, pulleys and sticks in later levels. Interact with these drawn objects to clear stars in levels. Grey boxes are free of gravity. It means you can draw any shape, and it will stay still without falling. Use the drawings in grey boxes to create a platform for other objects falling on it. Collect Stars To pass a level, you should clear all the blue stars. If you complete the drawing but still have a few blue stars left on the screen, you can use the replay button (on the top right) to return to the initial state. When you are stuck with a level, you can claim a hint by tapping the bulb icon on the bottom right. Besides blue stars in the platforms, you will also get a score on how well you managed that specific puzzle. After each level, you will get between 0 and 3 stars, depending on your performance. Keep reading to learn about how to achieve a 3-star performance. Use Your Ink Wisely Resources are not limitless. You can see how much ink is left in the bottle on the top of the screen. Use less ink by drawing smaller objects to complete levels with three stars. You cannot get any stars if you over-scribble and consume all the ink. You can see how many stars you gained in each level in the main menu. Compatibility You can play Draw Here on a browser on the following devices: PC Laptop Chrome OS Mobile (iOS and Android) Controls Tap and hold or use your mouse click to draw. More Drawing Games If you enjoy solving physics puzzles, you can try your hand at Draw the Bridge , where you build bridges by drawing to create a proper path for a poor car left on its way. In case you heavily depend on drawing skills more than your physics knowledge, let's get you seated at the board of Skribblio . In this game, you will draw given words and make other online players guess them correctly. Try all our drawing games and decide which is your favorite. Our community is looking forward to hearing from you. Comment down what you like or dislike about Draw Here below.

title: The Smurfs: Village Cleaning
description: Jokey the Smurf has ruined the village with his never-ending pranks! Every house in the Smurf Village is a mess! No single item remained unbroken. Hefty, Smurfette, Vanity and Papa Smurf await your help cleaning their houses. In The Smurfs: Village Cleaning game, join the lovely Smurfs as they work together to clean and restore their village! In this fun game, you’ll help each Smurf tackle messy tasks and fix broken furniture. Use different tools like sponges, hammers, and glue to scrub, repair, and polish everything back to perfection. Controls Computer Click and drag tools to clean, repair, and rebuild furniture. Click on the house to start a level. Click on broken parts and drag them into place. Mobile Tap and drag tools to clean and repair items. Tap to select furniture or broken pieces. How to Play The Smurfs: Village Cleaning Start by selecting a house to clean. Inside, the Smurfs need your help to restore their furniture by cleaning and fixing it. Fix broken parts of the furniture by dragging them into place. Click and drag the cleaning tools to scrub away dirt, and glue or hammer everything back together. Try to earn 3 stars for completing tasks perfectly. After finishing a level, clean the roof of the house and claim your reward. Rewards are decoration items that you can use in your own Smurf house! Upgrade Your Tools There are 4 upgradable cleaning tools in the game. You will unlock and upgrade them as you progress. Sprayer: Spray items clean with a powerful water spray. Wiper: Use the wiper to wipe off excess water. Sponge: Apply soap to clean items. Beater: Beat dust off rugs and clean more items. Developer Smurfs Village Cleaning was created by LIC I.M.P.S. and officially licensed by PEYO. Languages Smurfs Village Cleaning is available in the following languages: English, Dutch, German, Norwegian, French, Spanish, Portuguese and Italian. What Games Are Safe for Kids? Smurfs Village Cleaning is a safe game for kids because it promotes creativity and problem-solving in a fun environment. The game encourages kids to help the Smurfs clean and repair their village, which teaches valuable lessons about responsibility. Additionally, the content is age-appropriate, with no violence or inappropriate themes. The colorful graphics and friendly Smurf characters make it enjoyable. Parents can feel assured in allowing their children to play this game and learn in a safe space. More Games Like This If you enjoyed helping the Smurfs, you might also love other kids games we have. Check out other online games on our site and keep the fun going!

title: Iconic Celebrity Look
description: OMG, have you ever wanted to be a celebrity stylist? In Iconic Celebrity Look , you get to glam up four superstars who look just like Selena Gomez, Demi Lovato, Ariana Grande, and Taylor Swift! Your job is to do their makeup, pick the perfect outfits, and make them the queens of the red carpet in Hollywood. It’s like having your own VIP styling salon, and the results are sooo fab—you won’t want to stop playing! Controls On Computers: Use your mouse to click on makeup tools, drag outfits onto the celebs, and select accessories. On Mobile: Tap and swipe to style, apply makeup, and choose the coolest outfits. How to Play Iconic Celebrity Look Start by choosing one of the four glamorous celebrities. Head to the makeup station and create a look! Pick eyeshadow, eyeliner, blush, and lipstick to make them shine. After makeup, it’s time for the wardrobe! Choose dresses, shoes, bags, and even sparkly jewelry to match their style. Add the final touches with a gorgeous hairstyle, then watch them strut their stuff on the red carpet! Don’t forget to replay with a different star to try new looks and styles! Dress Up Celebrities Iconic Celebrity Look has sooo many options! You can create endless combinations of outfits and makeup styles. There are glittery dresses, chic accessories, and trendy hairstyles. Plus, their reactions on the red carpet are so cute—it’s like they know they look amazing because of you! Developer Iconic Celebrity Look game was created by FreezeNova for everyone who loves fashion, makeup, and Hollywood glm. If you dream of being a stylist, this is totally for you! More Fashion Games If you loved giving these stars their glow-up, check out other fun games like Frozen Sisters Dream Wedding or Barbiemania . They’re perfect if you want to keep creating fabulous looks!

title: Crazy Car Arena
description: Crazy Car Arena is a free online game to experience the maximum. Seek top score by navigating through tight turns, inversions, steep slopes, and even fire rings. This game is filled with stunning 3D graphics, and the music adds to the excitement and the desire for speed. Challenges will put your wild driving skills to the test. An AI will chase after and combat you to do more fantastic drifts, jumps, and stunts. Buckle up for an exhilarating ride! 🚀 How to Play Crazy Car Arena? Choose the vehicle of your kind, and enter the Arena by hitting the play button. You can either choose to drive your way through ramps and obstacles on challenging roads and push yourself to the limit or play car ball in the stadium, find the net with the giant ball, and score a goal. You can spend your coins on new cars to hit the road in style. Controls ⬆️ or W: Gas ⬇️ or S: Brake ⬅️ or A: Steer Left ➡️ or D: Steer Right Space: Handbrake Shift: Boost B: Look back Hold E and use arrows: Choose another car R: Respawn car T: Reset car X: Jump when in the stadium How can I enter the Stadium in Crazy Car Arena? You can enter the stadium in the Arena. Follow the wrecking stones, and you will see the entrance from the goalpost of the field. What can I do to earn more points in Crazy Car Arena? You can increase your points and coins by maintaining a high speed while performing drifts and jumps, steering through the fantastic roads of Crazy Car Arena. You can utilize the boost feature to speed up even more to initiate the craziest drifts. Don't forget to collect power-ups along the way. Can I play Crazy Car Arena in full-screen mode? Absolutely, you can play Crazy Car Arena in full-screen mode. Simply click on the "MAKE GAME FULL-SCREEN" icon located at the top of your screen. For optimal visual quality, remember to adjust the texture settings to high. Who created Crazy Car Arena? Crazy Car Arena is created by FreezeNova. More Games Like This If you liked this game, you can check out our other games in the Driving category. Cars Simulator and Police Stunt Cars are some of them. There are also a lot of games you can enjoy on your own or with your friends in the Car and Drifting categories.

title: Skater Girl
description: Skater Girl is a 3D skateboarding game where you navigate your character on the road with many obstacles. You will encounter many potholes, tin cans, and collapsible barriers. There will even be cars coming towards you. Avoid crashing with any of them, and try to cover as much distance as possible. Reach the highest score possible in one of the most challenging skateboard games!🛹 How to Play Skater Girl You are a skater lady on a two-way road. There are many obstacles on the road which can affect you negatively. If you can’t avoid the objects on the road, you will fall from your skateboard, resulting in a game over. So, try to overcome each challenge by navigating your skateboard skillfully. J ump over the objects or pass them by bending. Go as far as possible, and remember to collect coins on the road! Vehicles in Motion In addition to encountering potholes, barriers, boxes, and other kinds of stuff on the road, vehicles are also in motion. Be careful while passing near them as they may throw you something, such as a pothole. Or, you may crash with one of them. It won’t be good if such cases arise. Because they make you stumble and fall. Unlock New Characters You can use your collected coins to unlock new skater ladies. There are four characters: Laura, Jessica, Carolyn and Olivia. Laura is your skater’s name. The other three skater girls are at your disposal. Each skater has a different colored jacket on. Select your favorite one and be the ruler of the roads! Power-ups in Skater Girl Power-ups are also accessible in the Store section from the main menu. Magnet Power, Multiplier, Shield Power and Boost Power are there for you to enhance your gaming experience in the game. Magnet Power: Increasing your magnet power helps you collect every coin on the road while you are moving. Multiplier: It multiplies the number of coins you collect. Shield Power: It prevents you from colliding with anything. Boost Power: It helps you to move faster. Controls To navigate the skateboard, use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys. On tablets and mobile devices, use the touchscreen. Developer Skater Girl is developed by FreezeNova. What is More? If you enjoy playing Skater Girl, you may also try Skateboard Master . Make progress on the tube parkour with your skateboard in the game by overcoming the obstacles on the road. There will be other skateboarders besides you trying to get ahead of you. Don’t let them. Additionally, you may look up other running games on OnlineGames.io for further game options by following the link. Keep coming back; you will always find new and thrilling games on the site!

title: Turbo Race 3D
description: Turbo Race 3D is a free online racing game that keeps things simple and fun. You don’t have to worry about pressing the gas. Instead, you focus on steering and braking to handle traffic and tight corners. You'll be dodging buses in the city or drifting on icy roads. Despite all the action, the pace feels just right, you learn and improve without feeling overwhelmed. With each win, you earn coins, unlock new tracks, and move closer to becoming the Turbo Race 3D champ. The game takes you through three totally different worlds: city streets, dusty desert highways, and icy snow roads. Each world has its own set of unique challenges and up to nine action-filled races. Whether you're dodging buses or flying past cars with nitro, it's all about quick reflexes and smart moves on just five keys on your keyboard. Let's get to the grips of controls now: Controls Arrow Keys : Steer left or right, and brake with the down arrow. Z : Activate invincibility when you need to avoid damage. X : Use nitro boost for a quick speed burst. How to Play Turbo Race 3D Begin in the city world. Choose a track and get ready. There’s a lot of traffic, and you can’t rely on a throttle pedal. Your main job is to keep the car stable and avoid collisions. You can see some construction on the roads resulting in other cars change lines unexpectedly. So watch the road closely. Less brake you use, the faster you finish the race. Depending on how fast you finish a race you'll be rewarded with coins. So aim fewer seconds can because coins are your ticket to better upgrades and items. Remember to cross the finish line in one piece. If you feel like you're on the verge of a crash, press Z to gain a brief invulnerability. Keep racing and unlocking new stages in each world. Once you’ve cleared all races in a world, you’ll earn a new ride that’s better in every way. World Races City World : The first set of races. You’ll navigate busy streets with plenty of everyday traffic. It’s a good place to practice and build basic skills. Desert World : Things get trickier with sandy roads and scorching sun. Watch for drifting around bends. The scenery is pretty cool, but don’t let it distract you. Snow World : Slippery roads and slower control. You need a higher grip stat or good timing on your steering. One wrong move, and you might slide into a wall. Each world has 8 or 9 tracks with different layouts. Once you conquer all the races in a world, you advance to a better car, and a chance to tackle the next set of tracks with more confidence. Boosters Invincibility Shield (Z) : For a limited time, your car becomes immune to crashes. It’s perfect when you see a cluster of trucks blocking your path. Nitro (X) : Gives a short burst of speed. Use it on straight roads or when you absolutely need to overtake another car. Just be cautious on curves, because extra speed can lead to a spin-out. You can purchase more boosters with coins, so remember to stock up if you’re struggling with traffic-heavy routes. Upgrades In the main menu you can improve your car's parts to perform better in races. There are 4 key upgrades you can make: Acceleration : Lets you reach top speed more quickly. Helpful on shorter tracks with lots of turns. Max Speed : Great for long, straight roads. Combine with nitro for big leaps. Grip : Keeps your car steady around corners, especially in the snow. Brakes : Makes slowing down more effective, reducing accidents on tricky bends. You can also buy cosmetic changes, like new wheels, rims, decals, spoilers, and paint jobs. They won’t necessarily help you win, but they can make you feel good about the car you’re driving. That’s all you need to know about Turbo Race 3D. Feel free to jump right in, race for coins, and customize your car however you like. It’s a browser game that’s easy to learn, and you’ll enjoy watching your car transform from a simple ride into a true racing machine. Enjoy your time behind the wheel, and keep an eye on that traffic! Similar Racing Games If you like the rush of Turbo Race 3D, try other free racing games at OnlineGames.io. Titles like Highway Racer or Super Car Driving might also scratch that itch for speed and challenge. There’s always a new road to conquer if you want more thrills.

title: Idle Craft 3D
description: Idle Craft 3D is more than an idle building game, it's a strategic journey where players monitor all the construction laborers and make crucial decisions to finish the building as soon as possible! What is the story of Idle Craft 3D? Middle, a determined individual, has spent years building his dream house. His sole purpose was to marry a wife and live happily ever after in that house. However, fate had other plans. An unexpected disaster, in the form of an aerolite, razed the house to the ground just as he completed construction. But Middle is not one to give up. With your invaluable assistance, he is restarting the construction. It's a journey of resilience and determination, where he needs to hire workers and dig all over the place to craft his dream house again. Controls Click or tap to control How to Play Idle Craft 3D In the beginning, you only have a pickaxe and a digger. As he digs, you'll get coins. Save your coins to invest in this construction business. You can use your coins to increase earnings, increase workers' speed and hire a new digger. Each purchase you make will increase the cost of new investments. So, make your decisions wisely. When you workers complete a certain portion of the work, you can add decorations such as doors, windows, roofs and gardens. Summon Elders to Wake Up Workers It's not easy to break sweat all day long. Workers may fall asleep from exhaustion. However, you'll not gain any income while they are sleeping. So wake them up. Or summon elders to supervise them. Summon Titan For Faster Digging Titan is a super powerful worker who will quicken the construction a lot. Summon Titan to enjoy the highest digging efficiency. He'll be an example to the other workers as well. Explore Other Maps Middle's little house in Jungle Manor is only the first step in the construction business. As you embark on other adventures, you'll discover a variety of maps to dig and craft in this game. Each map brings new surroundings and decorations. Jungle Manor Sand Shelter The Holy Land in Snow Country Deep Sand Japanese Scenery Fly to Mars Join Christmas Conclusion This game not only provides entertainment but also helps you appreciate the hard work of anonymous laborers! It's a fun way to learn about the challenges and rewards of construction workers. Play it on OnlineGames.io for free and add some fun to your day! Explore More Idle Games If you enjoy playing idle constructing games, why not try your hand at being a subway manager in NY City with Subway Idle 3D ? Set up a system to increase your profits and ensure the people of NY can find what they need in transportation.

title: Mad Doctor
description: Does beating up an angry virtual doctor make you feel better? Release the dark humor in you with the crazy hospital game. Mad Doctor is a crazy game where you try to mess with a virtual crazy doctor by using types of weapons, scalpels, and some medical chemicals. You can make the doctor even madder with anything that can be found in a hospital. Freedom is yours. Playing Mad Doctor is the best way to release daily stress! How to Play Mad Doctor? Choose your favorite tool and start smashing the mad doctor! This game is simple to play and extremely enjoyable. Just don't let him point the finger at you. You may use a gun or even a stretcher in this game. You'll be surprised to hear this, but your options even include using an ambulance. Get creative with the tools and try your best. Weapons in Mad Doctor Since you are in a hospital environment, you have many medical items at your disposal. Mad Doctor gives you an abundance of weaponry. The upper portion of the game screen is where you may see your available weapon options. There are six icons in a row that you can select from, five of which are your weapon options. Press the final button to let go of the weapon you just grabbed. The list of available weapons is below. Select your desired outcome and begin de-stressing! Stretcher Needle Surgeon’s Knife Pills A Little Advice for Mad Doctor You will get coins as you advance in level and defeat the doctor. Use these to get yourself new weapons. Your game will get more colorful as you acquire different weapons, but at the start, all you can do is use your bare hands. It is possible for you to alter the game's background. We mean, engaging with the doctor in different places would be more fun, right? With the coins you acquire, open up new playgrounds and explore other settings. On the game screen, press the photo gallery button, then choose your preferred background from the screen that displays. You can disable the game's effects and sounds in the upper right corner if they annoy you while you're playing. To turn them off, simply click the relevant icon s. Controls Use the left mouse button to mess with the mad doctor Explore More Games Try playing Kick The Dummy , another anti-stress game where you kick the robot until it falls to pieces if you like playing Mad Doctor. We also recommend you check out other free crazy games on OnlineGames.io for more options. There are dozens of games that you can access for free and have fun with. Bookmark this website to be able to easily access the new games!

title: Geometry Jump
description: For those players who are obsessed with Geometry Dash, we have another spin-off that will drive you mad! In Geometry Jump game, stop counting your attempts and focus on the rhythm instead. Break into the a world with all kinds of geometric shapes, spikes, chainsaws, rocket ships and many more. Seemingly, you have one job, and that's jumping! But it's hard to master. Let's see if you can handle this hurdle of obstacles! Controls Jump: Tap, click or press spacebar to jump over obstacles How to Play Geometry Jump Start the game and choose your level among 15 levels. As you progress, stay alert for obstacles in lots of shapes. Use quick taps to jump and avoid crashing into them. Keep practicing to learn how you can use portals, jump orbs, jump pads, spaceships and other game objects. Stages Overview Preamble: Start off easy and get a feel for the game mechanics. Here, you'll learn how to jump over basic obstacles such as single, double and triple spikes. Let's Go!: Step it up as you race through colorful blocks that need quick reactions. Gravitational: Experience jumps that feel like you're bending gravity. You can fly over tricky gaps using orbs and pads. Drought: In this desert-themed level, new jump patterns are introduced, testing your ability to adapt. Data After Data: A futuristic world filled with bright neon lights and little blocks. Never Give Up: This is a motivational stage and it's all about keeping at it. Don't get discouraged and keep moving forward. Step Jump: Time your jumps just right to hop up shifting platforms that add an extra challenge. Teleporter: Use teleportation devices (mirror portals) to zip between sections quickly while avoiding obstacles that come your way. Circulation: You will go upside down with a spaceship. Xpart: Tricky level with new complex obstacle patterns. Indiscriminate: Expect the unexpected in this stage full of randomly generated obstacles. Truth: Discover hidden secrets in the Geometry world as you tackle tough jumps that help reveal the game's backstory. Space Exploration: Explore a cosmic landscape filled with asteroids and alien structures that you'll navigate with the spaceship. Associations: Jump through levels that connect obstacles in clever ways. Planet Hunt: Wrap up your journey by chasing after planets while dodging space debris and going for high scores! Unlockable Characters Explore the in-game shop to discover 45 unlockable characters in Geometry Jump! Each character has a unique design and adds a fun twist to your gameplay. Collect them all as you progress through levels and customize your experience! Developer GM Media created Geometry Jump. Quick Reminder Geometry Jump is a great game to sharpen reflexes and improve spatial awareness and quick adaptation. But the difficult gameplay requires both intense focus and hand-eye coordination. So, we suggest you take breaks at least every 10 minutes to reduce the possibility of burnout and eye strain. More Dash Games If you enjoy Geometry Jump , you might also enjoy other obstacle games on OnlineGames.io. One alternative is Geometry Rash . Play it online, and let us know what you think in the comments section below!

title: Car Transform Racing
description: Fairplay is boring! Ready for a wicked race on the road? Car Transform Racing is a 3D HTML5 racing game where you can missile, bomb or punch your opponents. Fuel up your car and get ready to transform your car into a speedy racing machine. Controls Computers WASD: Move Car Space: Use any special skills Mobiles Use touchscreen controls to move the car How to Play Car Transform Racing? Looking for a quick casual race or a career in racing? There are two game modes in Car Transform Racing: Story and Challenge. Let's get to the grips of them first. Story Mode In story mode, you need to complete races successfully to pass a level. There are 40 levels in total, with increasing difficulty. You should tune your little car and refit your driver to keep up with the speed of later levels. Open the story mode in min menu and start off with the first level. Collect piggy banks, hearts and surprise boxes on the road. Use the boosters to cheat in the race and eliminate your opponents. Also, you might make use of speed strips on the road to accelerate. You will collect coins and earn diamonds after each race; they'll bring you closer to upgrading your car. Challenge Mode This is perfect if you'd like to give the game a quick chance and see if you enjoy it. If you're a little short in coins for a new car, challenge mode is perfect for earning cash faster. You need to arrive at the finish line within the time limit to race in the next lap. Boosters Each box you collect on the road will give you a special skill to eliminate an opponent. But be careful; they can use these skills to take you down. Some of the skills are as follows: Boxing Gloves: They will punch the cars near you and push them out of the race. Bomb: You can drop a bomb on front-runners. Banana Peel: Make the chasers slide on it. Turtle: Slow the race leaders down Transformer: Run over all your opponents as a transformer. Creates a huge advantage in the race. Shark: Hits the target in front of you. Lightning: This will hit any front runners, and they will need to wait a few seconds to recover from it. Nitro: Speeds up your car. You May Also Like If you like Car Transform Racing, you may also enjoy Smash Karts . It's a multiplayer racing game where you try to stand as the last kart in the map. Collect gift boxes, use your weapons against other players and survive in this crazy kart game. For more games like this one, we encourage you to explore our other online racing games . We do not ask for a single penny or any personal information from our players. All free and safe! Have fun!

title: Cookie Tap
description: Get ready to birth millions of cookies! Cookie Tap is an idle clicker game where you tap into the giant cookie and give birth to millions of cookies. You must bake cookies by clicking on this mother cookie. You can also spend your newborn cookies to get upgrades and make your gaming experience more fun. This game has addictive gameplay, allowing you to spend your free time leisurely. How to Play Cookie Tap Welcome to Cookie Tap, the ultimate idle clicker game that lets you create millions of cookies with a simple tap. Learn how to play, maximize your cookie output, and enjoy a deliciously addictive gaming experience. Begin your cookie journey by clicking on the enormous cookie. Each tap generates more cookies, and as your collection grows, you can use them to enhance your gaming experience. Your primary goal is to keep clicking the giant cookie, creating new ones, and using them to acquire powerful upgrades. Upgrades and Buildings in Cookie Tap Take your cookie-making to the next level with these essential upgrades and structures: Cookie Tapper: Increase your cookie production with each tap on the giant cookie by upgrading the Cookie Tapper. Cookie Grandma: Let Cookie Grandma lend a hand in cookie production. Boost this power-up for even more cookies per second. Cookie Farm: Just like Grandma, the Cookie Farm offers external support in producing cookies. Cookie Bakery: Watch as the Cookie Bakery churns out dozens of cookies with its efficient workforce. Cookie Factory Producing: The Cookie Factory Producing is the ultimate force among the buildings. Upgrade it to produce hundreds of cookies in no time. Idle Cookie Producing The best strategy you can use in this game is to build a solid base for yourself with the upgrades, factories and farms you have. After you do this, the tools under your order will continue to produce cookies and earn them for you, even if the game is not being played. This goes for all idle games! Cookie Multiplier As you click on the giant cookie and produce new cookies, you will see a bar on the cookie that says "Multiplier." This bar will fill as you grow cookies. As it fills, the number of cookies will increase in direct proportion to the number written on it. Controls Use your cursor and tap on the giant cookie to produce more cookies. Developer Cookie Tap was created by MarketJS. What Is More? If you love playing Cookie Tap, you should try Nova Idle Clicker , where you are trying to eliminate blocks by navigating pong balls. Or you may look up other arcade games on OnlineGames.io for further alternatives.

title: Cool Math
description: Love math but hate textbooks? Looking for an interactive way to improve your math skills while having fun? You’re in the right spot! Cool Math game is an easy mathematical operations game. Fill the blanks with the correct numbers and level up. Playing might seem easy, but mastering it isn't! Take the challenge now to beat the Cool Math questions! Controls Computers Left click: Select a number Mobile Tap: Select a number How to Play Cool Math Game You will see equations on the screen as you start the game. Fill in the blanks with the correct numbers or signs within the time limit. Each level has 10 random questions. If you answer all questions of that level correctly, you'll level up, facing off with more difficult questions. If you can not give the correct answer before time runs out, you need to start over! Developer TrendyGames created this game. It's their first game on OnlineGames.io. I cannot open this game. What Can I Do? If you're having trouble opening or loading the game, try disabling your adblocker and refreshing the page. If the problem persists, visit our support page for more answers. More Math Games Online We withstand you in your journey to get that A+ on the math exam. To surprise your teacher, classmates and parents, keep up the good work in Math Games Online . Play among a myriad of titles and improve your math skills, as well as gain speed in summing, multiplying, and extracting in your mind. No papers and pencils, just your trusty tablet and lots of colorful and engaging math games!

title: Darkness Survivors
description: Are you ready to battle with the darkness minions? Darkness Survivors is a 2D action game where you try to remove dark creatures from the battlefield. You have various hero characters to choose from. Just decide whether you want to slay them using a sword, boomerangs or other weapons. Then, choose your hero and enter the battlefield in this RPG game . Don’t forget to collect dropped diamonds on the field! Darkness Survivors Overview Your main objective in this action game is to clear as many dark minions from the arena as you can. However, before entering the arena, you must choose your hero from four unique protagonists, each with specific abilities. Select your preferred hero and begin slaying the evil creatures! When you enter the arena, all those creatures will start approaching you. Direct your hero and make him or her aim at these minions well. Your hero automatically attacks them. Remember that collecting the coins will enable you to get enhancements from the Amulet Shop. Lady Elowen or Daerian the Red? When you click the “Play” button, the hero selection menu will open. There are four protagonists here. Two of these heroes are women, and two are men. Their names are Lady Elowen, Rob the Ranger, Ravenna Fireheart and Daeriean the Red. Lady Elowen is a woman who loves her sword very much, especially at night. Rob the Ranger is a handsome man with his sharp knives. Ravenna Fireheart always looks for an opportunity to use her boomerangs. Daerian the Red is an old wise man who is into magic and spells. Level Up Your Hero As you slay the dark minions, they will drop diamonds and coins. You must collect them to level up your hero. When the level bar turns blue, you can proceed to the next level, which offers three perk options. These options can be Stoneward, Money Bag or Iron Arrow. You will see a brief information about them besides the perks. You can make your choice according to the features of them. Controls Desktops and Laptops WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Left-Click: To Select You can also use the mouse and drag your hero in any direction to move. Mobile Devices Use the virtual joystick to move your hero. Developer QKY Game Studios developed Darkness Survivors. What’s Next? Soul Essence Adventure may also draw your attention. In the game, you must help your hero to escape from a spooky castle full of enemies. Get rid of them and find the exit! Look up other online action games on OnlineGames.io for further options. Our community is constantly trying to add new thrilling games on the site. Please contact us if you have any suggestions or a wish list!

title: We Are In A Simulation Simulator
description: We Are In A Simulation Simulator is an online simulator game where you need to act like an insider! In this game, you must mimic every action to survive in a digital world. Copy the actions of men in suits with guns in their hands. Try not to give yourself away in order to survive! 🧐 Controls WASD: Move Spacebar: Jump C Key: Crouch P Key: Pause How to Play We Are In A Simulation Simulator Question nothing, mimic everything! Follow the crowd and act in synchronization with others. If you expose yourself, they understand that you are not one of them. So, move when they move, jump when they jump. Copy their actions without hesitation or any mistakes. Otherwise, all of them will beat you up and point their guns at you. Try not to reveal yourself as an outsider by blending in in each scenario! Go Unnoticed! 👀 You must avoid unnecessary movements that might draw attention. Observe closely and mimic the actions of others. If they get suspicious about you being different, you will not be able to survive in this simulator game! So, watch their behaviours closely and try to adapt quickly in a strange digital world. Become a Master of Mimicry 👤 To be successful in We Are In A Simulation Simulator, start by mastering the controls and familiarizing yourself with the environment. Other characters might move left or right abruptly, and they can jump or crouch without giving you any signals. You must catch their actions quickly with keen observation. Developer We Are In A Simulation Simulator was published by Playgama. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing thought-provoking games like this, you may also try playing We Become What We Behold . In the game, your main goal is to observe the lives of a town as a news reporter! For more options, feel free to check out our Simulator Games Online game category. If you have a wishlist or suggestions, do not hesitate to contact us .

title: Bouncy Musical Ball
description: Bouncy Musical Ball is a rhythm-based arcade game where you must master navigating a jumpy ball and move forward on the tiles. They will show themselves according to the rhythm of the music you have chosen to play with. Move forward, abandoning yourself to the rhythm of the music. This endless music game allows you to go beyond the tiles as far as possible!🎼 How to Play Bouncy Musical Balls You will see many songs listed on the menu. You have 15 song options, from slow music to music with faster rhythms. Our favorite one is the Potion from Chon. Make your choice and start to guide the ball on the blocks. Click on the screen to make it bounce in the beginning. Then, you can use W and D or left and right arrow keys to steer it. The blocks will take place as the music plays. Follow the rhythm and go the longest way you can! Do Not Fall Off ! Avoid falling from the blocks. If the ball falls, the game will be over. You must catch all the blocks to go forward. It automatically jumps while trying to guide it, making your job a bit challenging. Mastering it to navigate may take some time. The Moving Tiles There are standing and moving tiles on the road. The moving ones will make it hard for you to catch them. But if you can gather your concentration and move forward, you can easily overcome them. In addition, please do your best to place the ball right in the middle of the blocks, as it will enable you to collect bounce powers. Song Options The game offers you a variety of music alternatives. There are lively tracks here, as well as relatively slower ones. In upbeat music, catching the tiles will be more challenging as they will appear faster. We will list a few of the tracks you can find below. Andy Timmons - Resolution Daughter - Get Lucky Disclosure - Latch Feat. Sam Smith Oston - Bad Controls W / D or Left / Right Arrow Keys: Direct the ball Mouse: Bounce Mobile Devices Touchscreen: Direct the ball Developer Bouncy Musical Ball was developed by FreezeNova. What is More? If you are a fan of playing Bouncy Musical Ball, you should definitely try FNF Funk 3D . In the game, you will compete in musical battles with a girl. Follow the musical notes by catching the symbols on the screen. Each arrow sign corresponds to a specific note. Don’t miss any of them! You may look up other online arcade games on OnlineGames.io for more game options. If you stay tuned, you will always find new and thrilling game options!

title: Crazy Hill Climb
description: Crazy Hill Climb is a cartoon animal racing game where the player steers a car with a unique and very sweet animal in the driver's seat. Here, the player faces a distinct view of the road with mountains and its challenging climbs. Are you ready to hit the road with your driver animal that you chose from the animal family? How to Play Crazy Hill Climb? When you enter the game, the first thing you need to do is to choose among the cartoon animals that the game offers you. You will find unique and beautiful animals: an elephant, a crocodile, a reindeer, a giraffe, a wolf and a toucan. Choose the animal you will travel with finely. Vehicles in Crazy Hill Climb After deciding on your best driver, it is time to choose the vehicle. There are 6 cars in the garage. Initially, you can choose between two options given to you. You have the right to unlock the other 4 vehicles with the money you earn as you win the races. Make a thoughtful choice from a variety of unusual and exquisite creatures for your travel buddy. Customization of the Vehicle Pick your favorite color from a variety of selections, which range from soft pink to striking hues. For a better driving experience, bolster the suspension and engine power of your car. Once you have adjusted your car to your desire, go behind the wheel. Gas and Pedal If you are playing the game on your mobile phone, you can change the gas and pedal controls in the section under the triple wheel section in the customization section. Compelling Map You will encounter many obstacles as you progress along the way. The map contains very steep ascents and descents. This will make your job harder. It is better to be fast but cautious. Do not forget to collect coins on the road! How many levels are there in Crazy Hill Climb? There are 30 levels in Crazy Hill Climb. Each level has its own challenges. Reach the finish line without flipping the car. Is there a multiplayer mode option? Yes, you can join the online servers and compete against other people who want to start a race. Compare your abilities to those of other drivers and finish first. Controls Use the WASD or the Arrow keys to move the car. More Games Like Crazy Hill Climb If you enjoy playing trial games similar to Crazy Hill Climb, you can also take a look at the racing games given below. Train Racing : In Train Racing, you'll take on the role of a fearless locomotive conductor and steer some of the strongest and fastest trains in the world as you contend with challenging routes that have sharp ups and downs. F1 Racing : In the 2D driving game F1 Racing, you take against other F1 drivers in a stadium full of race fans. Throughout the entire race, everyone in the audience will be watching you! Try your hardest and cross the finish line first.

title: Hexotopia
description: Dorfromantik lovers out there! We have great news! Now, you can play your favorite board game online for free. Hexotopia is a city-building game that is very similar to the famous board game Dorfromantik. Become an urban planner and create your little utopian town in Hexotopia with a gorgeous landscape. Place hexagonal tiles with country houses, rivers, forests, and wheat fields on them. Find ease and relaxation in the cozy visuals and music of Hexotopia. Start laying the hexes down! What is Dorfromantik? Dorfromantik, also known as Village Romance, is a board game where players lay hexagonal tiles to create a beautiful landscape, fulfill population orders, and place long tracks and rivers for points. Hexotopia is a free browser game, just like Dorfromantik. The best part is that the 3D visuals of Hexotopia add even more to the charm of building a romantic city. Join us in the world of Hexotopia and let your imagination run wild! How to Play Hexotopia? You will have a deck of hexagon tiles (hexes) and a green base tile in the middle. You can lay a tile by connecting it to another tile. This means a single tile cannot be placed alone (as an island). Distribute tiles in your deck evenly and complete the missions. If you'd like to rotate a tile before placing it, double-click on it. Made a Mistake? It's all good if you misplace a tile. You can revert the situation with one of these three moves (which can be seen at the bottom right of the screen): Remove a Hex: It simply removes a formerly placed tile you select on the map. Swap Hexes: Swap adjacent hexes by using this booster. Replace the Top Hex: Replace the top tile in your deck with a random landscape. Game Modes of Hexotopia Two game modes are available in Hexotopia. Each has unique challenges. Play both and decide which one is your cup of tea. Learn about the modes below. Follow the Missions: Global Map Global Map consists of a series of puzzles where you need to complete all the tasks to complete a level. You will see the tasks to complete at the beginning of each level. If you forget the tasks, just click on the dart icon to see them. You will start with simple tasks such as making a chain of cities. In order to make a chain, you should connect the sides of the hexes with the same landscape. Let's say you have 2 identical tiles; half of the hex is houses, and the other half is forest. If you connect the house sides of these two tiles, then you make a chain of city. Suppose you combine them from the forest sides of hexes; then, it will be a chain of the forests. New tiles with different types of landscapes will be unlocked as you progress. Try to avoid accumulating the same type of tiles in a neighborhood. People will need green areas around them. Let Your Imagination Run Wild: Creative Mode In the Creative Mode, there are no missions to follow, and all types of tiles are unlocked. However, basic game rules apply in creative mode as well. These rules are You cannot place a tile without connecting to another. Rivers, roads, and railways can only be placed by connecting each to a chain of its own. Other than these two rules, you are free to build the city of your dreams. Just imagine and keep on constructing! Enjoy Seasons in Hexotopia We couldn't think of a town where no leaves drop in autumn, or no snowflake falls in the winter. This is why Hexotopia has 3 different seasonal decks: Summer, autumn and winter. Navigate to the deck menu on the main screen and choose the theme of the season you love. The colors and dynamics of each scene are fascinating to play. Controls WASD: Move camera Drag Mouse: Move tile Double Click: Rotate tile Scroll: Zoom in/out map Mobile Controls Drag: Move tile / Move camera Pinch: Zoom in/out map Tap: Rotate tile Developer Hexotopia was created by AA2G1. More Games Like This If you like building games, how does constructing a subways sound to you? Play Subway Idle 3D to run an underground network in New York City. Suppose you cannot make up your mind, play a random game by clicking on the link, and we'll select a game for you among dozens of games.

title: Guerrillas io
description: You are a particular elite team member and are called into battle. Your weapons are ready, and your equipment is prepared. All your team needs is you. Guerrillas io is a multiplayer battling game that you can play online. Game maps are inspired by Counter-Strike, the best-known video game, and may look familiar to you! Time is running out. If you are ready, let's start! How to Play Guerrillas io? Guerrillas io offers you an online battling environment. You participate in a game by joining one of the available rooms or by creating a new room in the online option. On the left side of the menu screen, you will see a box called "Rooms." You can see available rooms or open a new one when you click here. By creating a new room, you can choose how many players can join the battle, the game mode, the road time, the goal, the bots and the map. All is up to your vision! Also, from the menu, you can see and adjust your equipment by entering the "Armoury" section, obtain power-ups from the "Perks" section, or decide what to give as a death message from the "Kill Message." Game Modes Before we start, we need to choose a game mode. Game modes are as follows: Team Deathmatch: The players are divided into 2 teams in which they are battling against each other. Free for All: In this game mode, all players are alone. Create your own strategy to survive. Capture the Flag: This is, again, a teamwork gameplay. You must take the flag from the enemy's base and return it to your location. Gun Game: This game mode is a mode that allows new weapons to be unlocked. You start with the simplest weapon and continue by updating the weapons. Arcade Doom: You are invincible in Arcade Doom, as you can possess guns and grenade launchers. Customization Guerrillas io gives you the option to customize your weapons. You can view your guns by clicking the "Armoury" section from the menu. Choose the weapon you want to customize and start strengthening it. You can buy new weapons here and change the appearance and scope of your existing weapon. You can also get a silencer if you want. Controls Use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys to move Use the Left mouse click to fire Use the Right mouse click to aim Use the Space key to jump Use the Q key to slide while running Use the Left Shift to run Use 1, 2, 3 to change weapon Use the E or F key to interact/pick up a weapon Use the G key to throw available grenades Use the H key to use an available medkit Use the T key to chat Use the L key to toggle the cursor lock Use the C key to crouch Use the Hold Tab to show the scoreboard Use the ESC to pause Developer Guerrillas io was created by FreezeNova. Similar Games You may try another io game, Masked Special Forces , where you are a masked soldier who needs to beat the opponents if you enjoy playing Guerrillas io. You can also look up the io Games tag on OnlineGames.io for more free online shooting game alternatives.

title: Vex X3M
description: We're absolutely huge fans of the stickman adventures in Vex, where every level is a new challenge filled with precision platforming and clever puzzles. And who doesn't love the high-speed action of Moto X3M , where you ride through rough terrains on your bike? And let's not forget those flip stunts to cross the bridges. So, imagine the fun when these two classics come together under one roof! Vex X3M combines the iconic stickman style of Vex with the extreme bike ride of Moto X3M. It's a game where you tackle 30 daring levels, each packed with challenges like spikes, flying knives, rockets, laser beams and more! Our mission will be racing to the finish line, passing over checkpoint flags at full speed, and pulling off mind-blowing stunts. We'll claim our title as the ultimate VEX X3M Rider and have the bragging rights after! Let's begin! Controls Speed Up: Press UP or W Slow Down or Go Back: Press DOWN or S Lean Back: Press LEFT or A Lean Forward: Press RIGHT or D How to Play Vex X3M Start the game with the first level, and use WASD or arrow keys to ride your bike. Hit those checkpoint flags to save your spot. If you crash or get hit, you'll start from the last flag. Do flips in the air to cut down your time. Avoid Red Spikes. If you touch these, you're back to your last checkpoint. And fly over TNT Boxes. They blow up when you ride over them, so be quick! Tiles to Watch Out Other than spikes and boxes, you need to watch out for the color of the tiles on the track. Black: Normal ground. Blue: Breaks when you ride over it. Purple: Disappears for a bit, then comes back. Brown: You can move these around. There are 30 levels, and they get tougher as you go. You'll need to be quick, smart, and a bit lucky to beat them all. And if you like to ride in style, you can unlock 16 different skins for your bike. How to unlock skins? Of course, with your coins earned on the levels. The more you play, the more coins you collect, letting you deck out your bike in style. Wrap-Up VEX X3M is not just riding; it's an adventure where you'll flip, jump, and dodge your way through some wild courses. Whether you're into stunts or just love a good challenge, VEX X3M is the ride for you. So, start your bike and let's hit the tracks!

title: Agar.io
description: Are you ready to expand your cell among dozens of players? Agar.io is an online multiplayer game where you are born as a cell. The goal of Agar.io is to grow yourself by eating blobs without getting in contact with any other player in the game. You lose if you run into a bigger player and they catch you. How to play Agar.io? It is very straightforward to play Agar.io. You can control your cell with your mouse and press the Space key to split your cell into pieces. And use the W key to eject mass from your cell. Before starting the game, determine your nickname and create your skin. What is Agar.io? Agar.io is a trendy IO game you can play on OnlineGames.io freely. You are competing against other players in this game. There is a leaderboard; the only way to be at the top is to get bigger by eating as many cells and blobs as possible. But remember, as you grow, you lose your movement speed. Tips and Tricks Creating your own technique and strategy while playing this game is essential. And there are many ways to do it. You can split your own cell in half while trying to attack a cell smaller than you. This will help you surround the opponent and catch them easily. It may take some time to get used to it and use it to the best of your ability. You can lessen your body and spray a particular part of the cell to move faster. Use the W key and your cell's mass is thrown out toward the cursor. This is a great way to raise your speed in the game. You cannot eat a cell that is the same size as you. You can only attack those who are smaller than you. Make your attack when you are sure you are big enough to attack someone. Game Modes Agar.io provides five different game modes to its players. You can add a difference to your gaming experience by trying other modes. FFA (Free For All): You are on your all against other players in the game. Battle Royale: The area will be narrowed at certain intervals in this mode. If you stay out, you lose. Teams: There are blue, green and red teams in this mode. You and your team can work together to control the map by beating the other two teams. Experimental: It was built to allow the original developer to test new features. In this mode, players may experience some new mechanics. Party: This mode is for you to play with your friends. Create a room or join the one that your friend created. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing Agar.io, check on io Games tag or go directly to Paper io 2 and Void City io on OnlineGames.io.

title: Snow Hill Racing
description: Are you ready for an adrenaline-pumping adventure on snow-covered roads? Experience thrilling 3D racing on snowy tracks in Snow Hill Racing . Challenge your driving skills in harsh conditions. Learn how to play and avoid common mistakes for a competitive edge. Imagine navigating the latest race car model on slippery snowy forest routes. How to Play Snow Hill Racing? Snow Hill Racing has no complicated rules. All you have to do is open the game and start the race by hitting the "Play" button. title: Vex X3M 2
description: Vex X3M 2 is where the slick parkour madness of the original Vex meets the extreme bike stunts of Moto X3M. If you thought dodging spikes and leaping over saws was intense on foot, wait until you try it on two wheels! This parkour racing game takes the familiar Vex vibe, tight controls, and tricky traps such as spikes, explosives, guns and rolling platforms and throws in a turbocharged motorcycle. With new mechanics like kite gliding and teleportation portals, each level becomes a wild ride filled with action. You'll race through obstacle-packed tracks, soar across massive gaps, and flip your way through moving traps. Be warned! This game requires lots of gaming skills. But it's also rewarding if you dare to speed. So don't be afraid to take risks! Just be ready for the unexpected because platforms fall, walls move, and one wrong move could send you back to the last checkpoint flag. Controls Accelerate: W or Up Arrow Tilt Left/Right: A / D or Left and right arrow keys Brake/Reverse: S or Down Arrow How to Play Vex X3M 2 Start by choosing a level track from the map. There are 30 tracks with increasing difficulty. Use your bike to ride through each level as fast as you can. Watch out for deadly traps like spikes, saws, swinging axes, and crumbling platforms. Use new tools like kite gliders to fly over gaps and teleporters (green zones) to zap across dangerous areas. Complete the level to earn up to 3 stars based on your time. Toggle the hard mode on the top right of the level select menu to replay levels with an extra challenge and more stars. Unlock custom bike skins with the stars you collect! Tips & Tricks for Parkour Games In parkour games like Vex X3M 2, it's usually a bad idea to speed through a level on your first try. Trust me, you probably won't be able to make it to the end at the first trial in this kind of skill games. So, take a moment to study the traps and obstacles; you'll save yourself a lot of restarts. If the game gives you special movement tools like gliders or teleporters like this one, spend some time getting used to how they work. They can really help, but they're not always easy to control at first. Pay attention to the rhythm of moving traps just like you did in Geometry Dash. Most of them follow predictable patterns because the obstacles and timing are usually fine-tuned by game designers. So once you get the timing down, dodging becomes much easier. And if you crash? Don't sweat it. Quickly restart from your last checkpoint and try again. The faster you finish, the better your score or star rating will be. Also, don't ignore unlockable items like skins. They might seem cosmetic, but in a lot of these games, unlocking new gear is a sign that you've really mastered the course. It's a fun way to show off your progress. Developer Azerion Casual Games created Vex X3M 2, bringing together the best of both worlds in a fan-favorite hybrid. It's perfect for players who love action platformers and stunt challenges. More Online Stunt Games to Try Love flipping over danger and racing against the clock? Check these out next: Moto X3M Online is a classic bike stunt action game with beachy explosions and sharp curves. Or try Vex 7 , the latest parkour challenge through lasers, traps, and sneaky surprises. All games are online, free to play, and smooth in your browser! So dive in!
