Create Combos Like in Candy Crush Matching more than 3 candies of the same color will eliminate those candies on the board and create a striped candy for you in the meantime. If you match this special candy with two other candies of the same color, it will destroy an entire row. If you bring 5 candies together to form a T or L shape, you will create a wrapped candy. This wrapped candy makes an explosion to clear nine candies around it. If you bring 5 candies from the same family together on a line, you create a candy bomb. Bringing this bomb, the Multicolor, into contact with any color will eliminate all of those colors on the board. We leave the excitement to you to experience what can happen by bringing two or more combos together! Boosters on Sweet Sugar Match Extra Moves: It gives you 5 extra moves. Free Move: This booster allows you to switch items without the cost of a move. Explode Area: You can destroy the items in an area. How many levels in Sweet Sugar Match Candy? Sweet Sugar Match, another match-3 game like Candy Crush Saga, offers 100 unique levels to its players. Controls Use your mouse and swipe the candies. title: Sprunki
description: Sprunki is a fun and creative music game where you can become a DJ. Dress up characters from a quirky band called the Sprunki by dragging and dropping cool clothes and accessories onto them. Each costume or accessory you choose adds a different musical sound, such as bass, melody, or drums. Enter the world of colorful Sprunkis, like Mr. Tree, Mr Sun, Lime and Garnold. If you're feeling extra whimsical, put the black hat on any member. And things will take a spooky turn. The theme gets darker, and visuals and sounds get scarier. Each hat and each accessory you put on makes the Sprunkis feel like they ran away from a horror movie. Controls Computers: Use your mouse to drag and drop accessories Mobiles: Drag and drop accessories by tapping How to Play Sprunki Begin by picking a fun character from the lineup, each with its own special sound. You'll see different outfits or accessories at the bottom. Dress each of the Sprunks to give them unique sound elements. You'll encounter quirky items like devil horns, tree and sun costumes, bunny ears and even satellite dishes along the way. You cannot use an item on multiple Sprunks. If you'd like to reset the band, click on the replay button on the top right. Mix and match different music loops and sounds to create beautiful melodies or experimental tracks. If you want to concentrate on one character's sound, just hover over them and click the headphone icon to mute the others. Similarly, you can mute one's sound by hovering over them and clicking the mute icon. Don't be afraid to experiment with different outfits to discover hidden musical surprises! What Is Sprunki Incredibox? Incredibox is a unique experimental music app that lets you conduct a group of beatboxers. Sprunki Incredibox originated as a fun, fan-made mode created by a 15-year-old Incredibox user named NyankoBfLol. It skyrocketed and quickly gained popularity, attracting an audience twice the size of the original Incredibox. What makes Sprunki truly unique is its shift from a joyful music game to a more eerie experience. The bright colors slowly change to darker shades, and your characters gain spooky looks. This creepy twist of this mode captured the imagination of users, leading to its own standalone game. Even more surprisingly, Sprunki characters have emerged as new horror mascots, joining the ranks of figures like the Rainbow Friends, Freddy Fazbear, Granny, and Poppy. Fans all around the world have contributed to the Sprunki hype in a way. Today, you can find Sprunks not only in online music-making games but also across various genres, such as horror games, platformers, trivia games, and more. For example, in Obby: Find Sprunki game, you can go for a Sprunki hunt and find hidden characters on an obstacle course. There are even fan fiction stories that explore themes around Sprunkis being orphans or having disabilities, adding depth to their intriguing lore. Developer The original Incredibox mode was created by NyankoBfLol. This version of Sprunki game was created by Sprunki Games.

title: Block Sniper

Get close to them sneakily, since there are more of them than there are of you. Try not to die before completing all the missions in a level. Time to show your sniper skills! So, you need to get close to them in a sneaky way. You can use the box to disguise yourself. But you have a limited time in that box. After a while, you will be visible to the gang members. Use the Weapons Strategically There is a sniper rifle, pistol, shotgun, and crossbow at your disposal. We recommend you use the weapons strategically. Using the sniper rifle most of the time is the best option, as it lets you shoot enemies from afar without getting shot. Once the gang members get close to you, they start to shoot at you, causing you to lose your health. Disguise Yourself with the Box If you want to sneak up on the gang members, press the 5th numeric key on your keyboard and hide in the box. Get in the box, and move forward in it. However, you have a limited time in that box. So, you should mindfully use it to reach your destination by dodging enemies while in it. Tips & Tricks for Block Sniper 👻 Stay hidden, strike enemies from afar. 📦 Use the box disguise to approach safely. ⚔️ Switch weapons depending on enemy distance. 🔥 Keep moving to avoid enemy fire. 🎯 Aim carefully before every single shot. Developer GamePush is the developer of Block Sniper. The first thing to do is to clean the junkyard before unlocking a gasoline pump. Then, you are free to set up your gas refill business by mastering your business management skills in this simulator game! 💼 Controls WASD/Arrow Keys/Mouse: Move Around On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls to move around. Gas Station: Junkyard Tycoon Overview Begin by clearing your junkyard, and unlock a gasoline pump to sell gas to your customers. Once you get rid of all the rubbish in a specific area in your junkyard, you will be able to get a pump. Keep in mind that you need to collect money from passing-by vehicles to unlock more gasoline pumps. However, before each attempt to unlock a new pump, you must clear the area in which the pump will be built. Gas Refill Vehicles will constantly stop at your gas station to refuel. When a vehicle stops in front of the gasoline pump, go to the circle area and stay there for a while to fully refuel the customer’s vehicle. You will see cars coming one after another to get gas at your gas station! Open a Market As you progress level by level, you will be able to open a market in your gas station. There, you can sell junk food to your customers, such as chips and other snacks. Build up shelves with irons and arrange the food on them to sell. Do not forget to take payments from customers in the cash register! Tips & Tricks for Gas Station: Junkyard Tycoon 🗑️ Clear junkyard areas to unlock pumps first. ⛽ Unlock your first gasoline pump as soon as possible. 🚘 Serve cars quickly to keep money flowing. 💰 Do not forget to collect payments. 🚧 Expand your business by opening new areas. Developer StoreRider developed Gas Station: Junkyard Tycoon. Similar Simulator Games If you like playing Gas Station: Junkyard Tycoon , you may also give Oil Digging a chance! Search for an oil field, drill it, and then build an efficient pipe system to sell oil worldwide. For more game options, you are always welcome to check out free online simulator games on www.onlinegames.io by following the link!

title: Kawaii Shooter
description: Cuteness overload sometimes may turn into a battle with foes! Kawaii Shooter is an online FPS game that takes place in an adorable world where cuteness meets action! In this whimsical landscape, cute little characters known as Kawaiis are haunted by evil spirits. Despite their lovable appearance, these Kawaiis will attack as soon as they sense your presence in their charming land. You have no option other than fending them off! Blast your way through waves of kawaii enemies! Good luck, brave shooter! Controls Movement Controls WASD / Arrow Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump C: Crouch Left Shift: Run Combat Controls Left-click: Fire Right-click: Aim G: Throw a grenade X Key / Mouse Scroll / Number Keys: Change weapons How to Play Kawaii Shooter Click "Play" to enter the kawaii world from stage 1. Use the arrow keys to move around the map. Right-click to aim and left click to shoot at incoming Kawaii enemies. Grab coins after clearing enemies to upgrade your health, speed and jumping skills later. Complete levels to unlock new challenges and environments. After each level, don't forget to spend on your skills in the upgrade section or unlock more advanced weapons with high damage ratios. Each season in Kawaii Shooter is 9 increasingly difficult levels plus one boss fight. Conquer them all and unlock the next season. More Games Like This If you enjoyed Kawaii Shooter, you will love You vs 100 Skibidi Toilets on OnlineGames.io! In this funny game, you battle against a wild group of Skibidi Toilets. Use your shooting skills to outsmart these silly enemies. You'll have a lot of fun trying to defeat as many Skibidi Toilets as you can. Jump into the game and see how many of those Skibidis you can take down! Developer Kawaii Shooter was developed by FreezeNova. Game Features Enjoy adorable graphics and maps filled with cute characters. Experience a fun mix of FPS mechanics and charming aesthetics. Various weapons to choose from, including shotguns, rifles, and machine guns. Upgrade your character to improve health, speed, and jump height. Level-based gameplay where you face waves of Kawaiis and exciting boss battles. Free online access where you can play anywhere on a web browser.

title: Army Driver
description: Customizing a jeep truck and getting in the driver's seat sounds cool, right? This jeep truck is embarking on a harrowing journey and must be prepared for anything. Because there are no good guys on the road. Army Driver is a gripping fusion of war games and car games where the player will progress through 30 levels. The men who will block the path are armed on this road. And they will not hesitate to shoot at the jeep truck. Getting rid of them by driving the vehicle is a main mission. How to Play Army Driver? Start your adventure by customizing a jeep truck and battle with the armed forces. Tap to the "truck" icon in the menu and choose which vehicle you want to use. You can pick your favorite color among the range of car color options. You can also upgrade the engine and suspension power using your collected coins during the game. Press the next button and proceed to the level selection section. There are 30 levels. After choosing the level, you are ready to combat! As you progress with the jeep truck, you will encounter armed men, and their target will be you! You must try to crush them without letting them hit you; otherwise, your jeep will be damaged. Keep an eye on the health bar of the vehicle at the top of the screen. Graphics The game has rich graphics, which makes the game more enjoyable. An attempt was made to create a realistic environment, from mud splashing on the jeep to the fire opened by the soldiers. Just enjoy this adrenaline-filled game with its vivid animations. Controls Use the Left arrow to move backward Use the Right arrow to move forward Use the Upper arrow key or the Space to jump Similar Games If you like Army Driver, you might like Uphill Jeep Driver , a free driving game in which you transport passengers in a jeep. You may also search for additional game options on OnlineGames.io using the tags Car Games and Driving Games .

title: Hill Racing Egg Drop!
description: Hill Racing Egg Drop! is an online driving game where you drive a red truck through harsh terrains. There is an egg in the trunk. While moving forward, you should not drop the egg! No matter what, you need to reach the final destination without a slight crack in the egg. Let’s see how far you can go without breaking the egg. 🚚 Controls Tap & Hold: Accelerate Drop: Slow Down On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls. How to Play Hill Racing Egg Drop! Start the engine of your pickup truck! We are going for a ride with an egg. Drive the truck through the uphills without dropping the egg in the trunk. You must drive your car as far as possible in a limited time frame. Take control of the truck when you encounter a hill. Additionally, try to collect the coins on the road to unlock new vehicles and scenes. Each try is an opportunity to break your last high score! Watch out for the Hills 🥚 You will encounter many uphills and downhills as you drive. You may need to slow down a bit so you don't drop the egg as you enter the hills. You must take control of the truck when encountering rough terrain. However, if you go too slowly, you may not be able to cover enough ground within the limited time available. Unlock New Vehicles 🚗 With the coins you collected on the road, you can unlock new vehicles, such as a sedan or a flat truck. Each car you unlock is more potent than the previous one. You may try a little bit harder to take control of the new vehicle that you unlocked to avoid dropping the egg. Gamie has listed the cars below for you! Pickup Truck Sedan Flat Truck Cadillac Cyber Car Dump Truck Monster Truck Developer PHATCAT Games developed the Hill Racing Egg Drop. You May Also Like If you enjoy playing Hill Racing Egg Drop!, you may also give Eggy Car a chance. Drive the car along a hilly road and try not to drop the egg. For more options, you can check out our free online driving games by following the link. Do not forget to leave a comment in the comments section below!

title: Fantasy Tower Defense
description: Guard up! The first thing to do is protect your land at all costs. These ugly creatures will try to destroy your spot. They will try their best to get there. While they are on their way, build towers by using your coins. Place them mindfully so that there will be no room for the enemies to escape any blind spot. For each enemy that reaches the area, you lose a heart. Lose all your hearts, and you are done… There will be attacks in waves. When a wave ends, another begins in seconds... Be prepared! Each wave is getting harder and harder. How to Play Fantasy Tower Defense? Tap to start. Select your level in the "Level Select" section. Choose your difficulty level. Click to start. When you tap on the skull image, enemies begin to run. Defend your towers from enemies in your way. Controls Use your cursor to play. Difficulty Options You can select the appropriate difficulty option on the starting screen when you tap on the level you play. It's up to you. For your information, you earn more gems in the nightmare mode! The harder it is, the more fun it will be. Normal Hard (You need 3 stars to unlock it.) Nightmare (You need 3 stars to unlock it.) Towers and Weapons Build towers, and eliminate enemies. Seven different tower alternatives exist, but you can only access four. The rest will unlock themselves when you level up accordingly. If you say, "I am impatient; I can't wait to level up!" you can instantly unlock them using your diamonds from the shop section. You may upgrade your towers with your coins or sell them and place new ones in another direction while battling enemies. Tab a tower for selling or upgrading it. Do whatever you have to do, and do not let them cross the line. Use them strategically. Your tower options are: Archer Tower – Use this tower to attack enemies with arrows. Thunder Tower – Crash them under the lightning rays. Gunmen's Tower – Shoot them, kill them. Mage's Tower – Are you fond of creating magic with fireballs? Poison Tower – There will be no antidote. Rocket Launcher – Missiles are ready for your command. Cannoner – Stone balls are flying everywhere. Power-Ups Besides building towers, there are power-ups. But they are limited. You can use them by clicking on the bag on the right side of the screen while playing. They work like aid forces. You choose an option from the bag section, then place it by tabbing anywhere enemies come. When you are out of your limit, you can use your stars to get power-ups from the shop. Likewise, by using your stars, you can upgrade their efficiency from the upgrade section. You have 5 alternatives: Reinforcement – Your soldiers will eat them up. The Power of Frost – Freeze them by leaps and bounds. The Lord's Fire – Burn, burn, burn them, and bury them into the ground. Mines on the Road – Some explosions may occur. Toxic Mud – Lower the blood pressure. More Games Like This If you like Fantasy Tower Defense, look at Strategy Games tag for more options.

title: Dream Restaurant
description: Have you ever thought you could create your dream restaurant? Dream Restaurant is a 3D restaurant management game where you serve burgers or sandwiches as a waitress to your customers. As you deliver services to customers, you will earn money, and you will be able to expand your restaurant with the money you make. When you increase the number of tables in the restaurant, your customers will also increase. And, of course, the money you earn will rise. It is a game where growth is inevitable if you serve the customers as they deserve. How to Play Dream Restaurant? When customers arrive, they sit at a table and ask you for a hamburger or a sandwich. You can tell which meal they want by the bubble above their head. After they decide what they want, go to the kitchen and get the burgers and sandwiches by standing in front of the stove. The longer you stand in front of the furnace, the more food you get. You need to earn money so you can expand your restaurant, and for now, there is only you as a waiter. Therefore, all the workload is on you. It is your responsibility to satisfy your customers. Your customers increase by expanding the restaurant. This means that the popularity of the restaurant also increases. You will see a dollar sign and an amount written on the restaurant floor. You can add new tables and chairs to the restaurant or open a garden section by paying these fees. You can even start serving coffee by opening the coffee section. You will need to hire a cashier and have him do the accounting. To make these happen, hover over the dollar sign and stay there for a while. Game Features Vivid 3D graphics Strategic thinking Addictive gameplay Training management skills Controls When you press the screen, you will see a white circle. You can direct the waiter by pressing and holding this circle and moving it back and forth. What to Play Next? Try out Mergest Kingdom , where you build your kingdom, if you like to play expanding games. Or you may look for other free games from our simulator and mobile game collections on OnlineGames.io by following the links.

title: Stunt Crasher
description: Speed up the car and overjump to crash into obstacles to gain a big score. The more speed you have the more points of destruction you will win. Play Stunt Crasher now and have fun destroy everything in the way! There are 3 cars available that you can select. There are 3 scenes available: • Stadium • Bridge • Mountain To become more powerful in destruction you can upgrade Engine, the Boost and Bonus with cash. Each one can be upgraded until level 100. After every crash you will see the score details : • Launch Speed • Distance • Destruction • Bonus Controls: W/S or up/down arrows to control car

title: Quordle Today
description: Quordle Today is a word puzzle game with 9 tries to guess the hidden target words. You can determine how many letters the target word has from 4 to 6. If you set it to 5, you must enter a 5-character word into the lines. The game will give you colored hints as you enter each word to find the target words. It may sound like a complicated puzzle game , but it is an engaging one! 🔡 How to Play Quordle Today You must find the hidden 4 words in order to achieve success. You will do this by trying to guess the words. You have 9 chances. Start with entering the term you have in mind using your device’s keyboard or the virtual one. Press the Space key when you are done writing. The terms you write must have the number of characters you set initially. The stopwatch starts to count the time when you enter the first word into the playing field. You can disable it by tapping on the relevant icon from the top section. If you find guessing the phrases difficult, you may tap on the Give up button on the upper left side of the screen. Then, you can start a new game. As you try to guess the phrases, the letters on the keyboard, which are also divided into 4 sections, may also change their colors. For example, if the 2 hidden terms have the exact letter in the exact place you register, that letter on the keyboard will have two green hints. Set the Number of Letters The first thing to do is to determine the number of letters each phrase will have. You can choose between 4, 5 or 6. Set it by clicking on the circle with the number at the top of the screen. You must enter the proper words according to your setting. For example, if you set the character number to 4, you cannot register the word “Arena” as it has 5 letters. Or, you can not enter a phrase with fewer letters than the determined number. Color Hints The game will give you colorful hints each time you register a phrase into the playing fields. These hints will give you clues about what the 4 hidden terms might be. Gray Hints: When you see gray cues on the fields, this means that the given letter is not in existence in the hidden words. Yellow Hints: Yellow cues mean that the letters in yellow occur in the target words but are placed elsewhere. Green Hints: These are the most favorable cues! As they indicate that you guessed the letters right. The letters that have green cues exist in the hidden words. 4 Playing Fields You will have 4 playing fields, each with unique hidden words. In total, you must find 4 target phrases by guessing. Whenever you register a phrase, you will see different colored hints in each field. You will have 9 chances to get clues about the target words. Controls Use your device’s or on-screen virtual keyboard to enter your guesses. Other Word Games Try Wordmeister if you love playing Quordle Today. Your opponent in the game is a computer. You will try to create phrases by using the letter tiles. The longer the phrases you create, the more points you get! Or, you may look up other word games online on OnlineGames.io for more options. If you want to share your gaming experience with us, please leave a comment in the comment section below!

title: Valkyrie RPG
description: Valkyrie RPG is a role-playing adventure game where you, as a valkyria, open up to different adventures in rural areas by taking tasks from the people of that region and fulfilling these tasks. Here, you will meet people doing a wide variety of jobs. Some of them are merchants, and some are event makers and crafters. Strengthen your communication with them and open the doors of a fantastic world in one of the most thrilling action adventure games! How to Play Valkyrie RPG? When you first enter the game, proceed by pressing the "New Game" button at the top of the main menu. Then, you need to choose your character. Press the Empty Slot text, and you will see two different characters. They both have various merits. You can also choose your character's name yourself. Once you decide to play with one of them, you can find yourself in the countryside. Characters in Valkyrie RPG You will find two valkyries in the game. Their names are Knight and Ranger. We would like to tell you about their merits below. Knight: Knight has balance status and is a loyal fighter. She may strike foes and raise her status by using both magic and physical abilities. Ranger: Ranger depends on the force of nature. She has the ability to call the animals to battle with her. However, she is not resistant to fire. Get Quests from the Villagers When you enter the game, you will see villagers doing different professions. Direct yourself to the person you want to take charge of and communicate with her. They will give you exciting quests and rewards afterward. For example, when you go to Event Maker, the task she will give you is to kill 2 Angry Slimes. Once you complete the quest, she will provide you with +100 Cash and +100 EXP. Check Health Bar In some missions, they will ask you to kill giant creatures, like Hobgoblin. Such creatures cause a lot of damage and are difficult to kill. Don't forget to check your health bar in the upper left corner of the screen while fighting them! When you get too low on health, you need to run away. We all do escape when we are stuck. So, do not be ashamed! 😀 Controls WASD keys or the Arrow keys to move. Space to jump. Left Mouse to attack. Right Mouse to block. 1-8 number keys to use skill. C key to view status Window. I key to open inventory. K key to view the skill tree. Q key to open quest log. Hold Shift to sprint. Double tap to WASD for a dodge roll. ESC to go to the main menu. R key to switch weapons. H key to getting help. What is More? Try Jack's Village , a 3D combat game where you, as a Jack, need to defend your town against giant creatures with the help of villagers. Or, you may look up online adventure games on OnlineGames.io for more game options. You will always find new games if you visit our site regularly!

title: Classic Minesweeper
description: Classic Minesweeper is a 2D puzzle game where you try to uncover tiles without letting any mine explode. You seem to know this game from somewhere, right? Yes! This game is the modern version of the classic Microsoft Minesweeper of the 90s. Your job? To uncover all the cells that have no mine under them within the shortest time. Consider the numbers on the cells so as not to cause any explosion in this board game! Additionally, keep in mind that you can set the difficulty level as you wish. Controls Desktops and Laptops Left-Click: Uncover Hold the Left Mouse Button: Mark a Flag Mobile Devices Use the touchscreen to uncover tiles and hold onto a tile to mark a flag. About Classic Minesweeper This arcade game will remind you of the Microsoft Minesweeper that your older sister and brother played when they were young. Classic Minesweeper is the modern take on this popular game of the 90s. Your main objective is to uncover all the tiles that have no mines . If you touch any of the mines, it will explode. And this explosion will defuse all the mines on the board. Before starting to uncover the tiles, set your desired difficulty level from the menu. There are three level modes to choose from: Easy, Medium and Hard. Easy, Medium or Hard? Each of the three modes has a unique difficulty. In the Easy mode, you will see a board with 81 cells and 20 mines. On the other hand, the Medium mode has a 10x12 mode with 40 mines. Finally, you will deal with 80 mines on a 12x14 board. Keep practicing the game before you play in the Hard mode because you have a 50% chance of not detonating any bombs . Understanding the Numbers Some of the tiles on the board have numbers under them, while others have mines. The numbers indicate that there are a number of mines near those tiles. You can use them to uncover the cells strategically. If you think that there is definitely a mine under a specific cell, you can mark that cell with a flag . You will win the game when you successfully uncover all the cells without defusing any mine. The game does not open. What can I do? Please make sure you disable your adblocker . You can also try opening the game in an incognito tab. If you still need help, check out the support guide . Developer RavalMatic developed Classic Minesweeper. Similar Online Games Tetris may also draw your attention. It is one of the other popular games of the 90s era. In the game, you will try to put the falling shapes side by side with the perfect angle without leaving a gap between them. For further options, look up other online puzzle games on OnlineGames.io. If you have suggestions or a wishlist, please contact us! We would be very happy to hear from you.

title: Idle Restaurant
description: How does the idea of ​​running a restaurant sound to you? Idle Restaurant is an idle game where you operate a restaurant starting from the basics. Starting from scratch is never easy. But growing your restaurant is possible if you know how to manage well and take the proper steps. As this game is an excellent simulation example regarding business management, it will help you get some ideas about how such companies work in real life. How to Play Idle Restaurant? Start with unlocking a floor by tapping to the relevant area. There will be people you need to employ. These can be listed as a cook, server, manager and elevator operator. All of them have essential duties within the section. If even one person disrupts the work, the operation of the entire restaurant slows down. Therefore, you should not allow such incidents to occur. That's why working with managers will be of great benefit to you. Improving Your Restaurant’s Business We can give you some suggestions to help you manage this restaurant better and more effectively. It is crucial for the efficiency of your restaurant that you keep each employee under supervision and work them effectively. For this, you can employ managers for each floor. This will increase the work efficiency of the employees working in that department. Another important thing is to increase the workability of each of your employees. Allowing them to level up as you earn income from the restaurant will let them take on more workload. The secret lies in expanding your business. As you earn enough coins, unlock new floors and directly increase your earnings by putting them into service. Since this is an idle game, your restaurant will continue to operate even when you are not playing online. You can see how much passive income you earn per second from the "Idle Cash" section in the upper left corner of the game screen. Boosts in Idle Restaurant Simplify your management tasks. In later stages of the game, managing multiple administrators can be overwhelming. The fork-spoon icon streamlines this process, allowing you to activate all administrators at once. What Does the Fork-Spoon Icon Do? This part is there to make your job easier. In the game's later stages, you will employ many managers under your organization. "Activating" them all one by one may tire you. When you open this section, all your administrators will be listed one under the other. When you click on the activate button, it will activate them all. Controls Click and drag the mouse over the necessary places to perform. Press and hold the screen while navigating up and down to see the upper working portions after unlocking numerous floors. Similar Games If you enjoy playing Idle Restaurant, you should try Idle Startup Tycoon , another business management game where you run a startup idea. Or you may look up free strategy game collections on OnlineGames.io for further options.

title: Egg Helix
description: Egg Helix is an arcade game where you steer a trunk adorned with many tennis rackets. There will be an easter egg bouncing up and down. Your main purpose is to take this egg to the top. Make eggcelent steering movements to achieve it. Remember, you are not controlling the egg, and you are in charge of steering the trunk in one of the most challenging easter games! 🥚 How to Play Egg Helix You will see a hopping egg on the racket net. You must make the egg reach the top to pass the level successfully. You will make it by moving the spiraled trunk with many rackets. Navigate the egg from one racket to another in order to climb it up. You will use the rackets like stair steps. While moving forward, do not forget to collect the golden diamonds. Your Easter holiday will be delightful with this addictive arcade game! Catch the Right Moment Finding the proper moment to navigate the trunk is the most crucial thing. The best time to maneuver the trunk is when the egg is in the air. Because the higher the egg is in the air, the more time you have to direct the trunk until it falls. Use the law of gravitation! Orange Rackets You will see orange rackets from time to time when you progress on the trunk. These rackets will help you climb many rockets at once by making you bounce higher. This way, you can reach the end of the trunk faster. When the sky gets darker, be happy as it means that you are close to the end. Do Not Be Afraid to Fall Do not be afraid to fall if you believe in your reflexes and hand-eye coordination. Navigating the lower rockets allows you to save the egg from falling completely. When you find the rhythm of the egg, you can easily climb it up to the top again. Trust your reflexes and instincts! Controls Use the A/D or the Left and Right arrow keys to steer the trunk. Alternatively, you may use your mouse to direct the trunk. Developer Egg Helix is created by FreezeNova. What is More? If you love playing Egg Helix, you may also try Stack Fire Ball . Help the ball reach the end by guiding it in the game. Avoid the dark tiles and knock down the colorful tiles as fast as possible. Use your reflexes and focus well in order to make progress! Or, you may look up other free arcade games on OnlineGames.io for more options by following the link. Please share your gaming experience with us in the comment sections below!

title: FNaF Shooter
description: No longer just hiding from the creepy animatronics. No more worrying if your flashlight's battery will die before you spend the night safe and sound. You have the weapons to fight them head-on now! FNaF Shooter is a 3D first-person shooter game where you must eliminate an army of animatronics in a mall. Inspired by the popular Five Nights at Freddy's (FNaF) series, this game puts a new twist on the horror franchise. Shoot 'em all and save the supermarket from haunted animatronics. Controls Mouse: Look around WASD: Move W + Shift: Run Left Mouse Button: Shoot Hold Right Mouse Button: Aim Mouse Wheel: Next/Leading weapon 1-7: Weapon hotkeys R: Reload F: Knife attack G: Throw grenade T: Inspect weapon How to Play FNAF Shooter In FNaF Shooter, your objective is to survive waves of animatronics as you explore mall at night. These enemies, recognizable from the FNaF universe, will keep coming at you. Use an array of weapons, from shotguns to grenades, to fend off them. In this big mall, check inside every shop, under counters, behind ATMs, and even inside the toilets. Find all the animatronics hiding. See how many animatronics are left on the map by checking on the top left. In first level, you need to clear 16 of them, but it'll gradually increase as you level up. If there's an animatronics nearby, you'll see red circles on the map on the top left. So check out the map often so as not to get caught flat-footed. Remember to reload often and throw if multiple animatronics approach at the sam time. Even if you break their arm or legs, they will crawl over you! So aim for headshots! Danger lurks around every corner; have fun at the mall in an unusual way! What is FNaF? The FNaF ( Five Nights at Freddy's ) series is a game series renowned for its horror theme. The original games take place in Freddy Fazbear's Pizza. In this haunted pizzeria, players control a night guard and try to survive from animatronics roaming at night. In FNaF shooter, Freddy Fazbear has expanded the business and opened a giant shopping mall named Pacific Palm Mall. But you have also more tools to fight them now. Arrange your loadout; it's up to you to stop them. Which animatronics are there in FnaF Shooter? You can encounter Freddy Fazbear, Bonnie and a few others as you progress through the game. Can I play FNaF Shooter on my browser? Yes, FNaF Shooter is playable on web browsers, making it easily accessible. You can also play te originals FNaF 1 and FNAF2 on OnlineGames.io for free. How do I switch weapons in the game? You can switch weapons using the mouse wheel or the weapon hotkeys (1-7) for quick access to your arsenal. How to walk backwards in FNaF shooter game? While running away from animatronics, it's important not to turn your back on them. Walk backward by pressing S or down arrow key and keep shooting while running away. Check your health bar at the bottom left and stay safe. Developer GoGoMan developed FNaF Shooter. Release Date FnaF shooter was released on March 2022, and last updated in November 2023. More Horror Games If you enjoy the weird horror of FNaF Shooter or the thrill of first-person shooters, you'll find plenty of online horror games that test your nerves.

title: Geometry Rash
description: The little square loves to dance! Dangerous obstacles keep coming on his way. Follow the rhythm, let him jump over the obstacles, and keep him out of trouble! It may sound simple, but Geometry Rash is a 2D action platformer game requiring very fast response. Sound on and put your reflexes to a high-stakes test in this game inspired by Geometry Dash! Enjoy the challenge, and see how far you can go in Geometry Rash! Share your high scores with us in the comment section below. How to Play Geometry Rash The dash immediately starts after you hit the play button, launching the little square into action. So get your fingertips ready. You can use space, W, up arrow or left-click to jump. All these keys will do the same work. You need to jump over triangles; any collision with them will bring you back to the starting point. You can jump on flat surfaces, but do not hit them on the side. Collect stars on your way, and always keep an eye on the right to see what obstacles are coming along. The game will be more challenging as you progres. You will face different kinds of obstacles and a higher speed run. Give yourself some time to adjust to Geometry Rash since your first ride may not go as you expected. After a couple of trials, most players start to run better and enjoy the game. All About Timing Since Geometry Rash is a one-button game, there is only one aspect you should pay close attention to when to jump. Jumping too early will make your square fall on spikes. If you wait too long before moving, then you will hit an obstacle. The game will speed up as you progress. You should be constantly adjusting to speed and various kinds of obstacles. The Square Comes in Various Skins You can customize the square character as you like. There are 20 different skins that you can unlock. Each one costs 50 stars. You can collect while running. What you will unlock is a surprise. But here is a little secret for you. You may even come across a Spiderman square. Controls Use left-click, spacebar, W or up arrow key to jump. Who developed Geometry Rash? Freezenova developed Geometry Rash. More Games Like This If you're a fan of the popular Geometry Dash game, check out the Scratch version of it: Geometry Dash Scratch , which is another exciting running game. In this game, you'll find yourself in a universe filled with obstacles that you'll need to overcome. The game also features a rhythm-based setting that adds to the overall challenge and excitement. If you're looking for more running games online, head over to running games tag, where you'll find a variety of options to choose from. Don't forget to visit us again, as we're constantly updating our selection of web games with new and captivating titles!

title: Storm City Mafia
description: Welcome to the world of cyberpunk! Storm City Mafia is a themed mafia game with many missions. Each task must be accomplished successfully. You are the key in this cyber world. It is your primary mission to defeat the enemies. But be careful because they are much more than you. Make each of them, including the big boss, history using your strategy skills! How to Play Storm City Mafia In the game Storm City Mafia, you advance by finishing objectives. There are thirty missions to complete, each requiring you to carry out distinct tasks. The goal of the first mission is to take out 100 adversaries. The next mission becomes available once each assignment has been completed satisfactorily. And you're in for a different kind of obligation. At the end of the thirty-episode story, you defeat the Big Boss. Power-ups in Storm City Mafia You can open the section with power-ups by clicking on the label icon from the main menu. You need to save money by collecting the money dropped by the enemies you eliminate in the games, and the best place to use them is power-ups. We have compiled a few of the best power-ups for you below. Godmode: You can not die when god mode is activated. Jetpack: Fly over the whole city with your jetpack without the need for a car. Golden Gun: Reflect the splendor of gold on your weapon. Unlimited Grenade Ammo: Your grenades will never ever run out. Vehicle Generator: Use the number keys between 0 and 9 to land the vehicle you want on the street. Master the Controls Use your Mouse to aim Use the WASD keys or the Arrow keys to move Use the Space key or the J key to jump Use the Left Mouse button or the Z key to fire Use the X key to throw a grenade Use the Left Shift or the C key to activate Hammer Time Use the Mouse wheel or Q or E keys to cycle weapons Use the Enter key to enter the vehicle Use ESC or the P key to pause the game Use the M key to mute the audio toggle Games Similar to Storm City Mafia Mob City is a game similar to Storm City Mafia. title: Vega Mix: Sea Adventures
description: Remember walking past your mom’s phone and seeing her nail the 1612th level of Candy Crush, combo, fireworks, cheers, the whole couch shaking with a mini victory dance? That quick burst of color pop satisfaction is what draws everyone back. Now, Vega Mix: Sea Adventures taps the same feel-good reflex, but it swaps sugar for seashells and drops the action to the ocean floor. You slide two clams together, bubbles rush upward, a Rocket power-up skims across the board, and suddenly you’re pocketing treasure to rebuild an old lighthouse before the kettle even whistles. Load it up in a five-mins break at work, or play it for an hour; zero downloads, no commitment, five-second learning curve, endless “just one more” dives, perfect for anyone who still owes Mom a few extra lives in Candy Crush. Controls Click and drag to swap two adjacent pieces. Esc to pause the game, adjust sound, or head back to the map. How to Play Vega Mix: Sea Adventures Scan the board and look for rows or columns where two matching shells or pearls sit beside an outsider. Drag that outsider into place to make a line of three, four, five or even more. They pop and score earned! Create power-ups. 4 in a straight line creates Rocket (clears a full row or column). 4 in a square creates Spinner (zaps one level target). 5 in a T or L creates Bomb (big splash explosion). 5 in a straight line creates Rainbow Flower (wipes every piece of the same color). Beat the level goal like collect seashells, break wooden blocks, untie ropes, drop keys, or hit a score before moves run out. Keep an eye on the move counter on the left. Running out means starting over! Each victory moves the story from wrecked galleon to coral city and finally the lonely island lighthouse. Features Hundreds of Colorful Levels Unique Boosters like four power-ups that chain together for giant board clears. Story Mode where you explore a sunken ship, an ancient sea city, and the lighthouse island. Daily Log-In Rewards Kid-Safe Art Developer Broccoli Games crafted Vega Mix with Unity. More Online Puzzle Games You’ll Love If you enjoy match-3 but want a gentle story push, this browser game is worth adding to your bookmarks bar. If you're looking for more satisfying games with different themes take a look at our puzzle games online you'll find that cforting game that'll accompany while you're drinking your warm tea.

title: Pill Soccer
description: Ole, ole, ole! Here is a soccer game with a wacky sports showdown: Pill Soccer . This unique 2-player game features cute 3D characters shaped like pills (yes, you read it right), bringing a fun twist to the traditional 1v1 soccer games . As you can guess, the aim is to score more goals than your opponent win matches and tournaments to earn diamonds! 1 Player Controls W / Up Arrow Key: Jump A / Left Arrow Key: Move left D / Right Arrow Key: Move right S / Down Arrow Key: Kick K / Z: Special move 2 Player Controls Player 1: W: Jump A: Move left D: Move right S: Kick Z: Special move Player 2: Up Arrow Key: Jump Left Arrow Key: Move left Right Arrow Key: Move right Down Arrow Key: Kick K: Special move How to Play Pill Soccer Choose your game mode: quick match against online players, local two-player match, or tournament. Control your pill character to move around the field. Push the ball into the opponent's goal to score. Use jumping and headbutting to gain an advantage. Earn diamonds by winning matches, tournaments or completing achievements to customize your pill, ball and unlock new tournaments. Tips for Success in Pill Soccer Get comfy with those controls! Whether you're using WASD or the arrow keys, being quick on your feet is key. It helps you dodge your opponents and get into the right spot to score. When you kick the ball by pressing K or Z, aim for mid-height. That way, you'll send it flying with more power, making it tough for your opponent to block. If the ball gets behind you, backtrack to set yourself as a goalie. It's one of the trickiest spots because if you wait in front of the post too long, a bolt of lightning may hit you! You can catch some powerups during the game! Powerups like speed boosts, extra kicking power, freezing opponents can really give you an advantage. Before jumping into tournaments, you may make use of quick matches against online players to sharpen your skills. How do I get diamonds in Pill Soccer? You earn diamonds mainly by playing in tournaments and completing achievements. Winning matches in tournaments or quick matches also adds a bit to your diamond collection. You can use your diamonds to unlock new players, ball skins, and outfits, as well as pay tournament entry fees. Can I customize my pill character in Pill Soccer? Yes, you can! Click on the shop icon on the main menu. In the shop, you can unlock new skins such as Batman, Pirate or even Minion pills. You can also unlock new balls from this menu. Can I play Pill Soccer on mobile devices? Unfortunately, you cannot play Pill Soccer on mobile devices. The game is available for desktop browsers, meaning you can only play on desktops, laptops and Chromebooks. What Tournaments Are Available in Pill Soccer? In Pill Soccer, you can unlock several tournaments, each with its own entrance fee and rewards. Amateur League: Entrance fee is 500 diamonds, winning prize is 900 diamonds. Semi-Professional League: Entrance fee is 700 diamonds, winning prize is 2,100 diamonds. Super League: Entrance fee is 1,500 diamonds, winning prize is 4,500 diamonds. Professional League: The entrance fee is 4,000 diamonds, winning prize is 12,000 diamonds. Elite League: Entrance fee is 10,000 diamonds, and the winning prize is 30,000 diamonds. Epic League: The entrance fee is 20,000 diamonds, winning prize is 60,000 diamonds. More Soccer Games Online If you're a fan of Pill Soccer, you'll love exploring similar fun sports games that are available! Just browse the World Cup Games tag and see all the great soccer games available at the heart of online entertainment: OnlineGames.io!

title: Vehicles Simulator
description: Vehicles Simulator is a simulator game where you can get in the driver’s seat of seven excellent vehicles ranging from a sedan to a monster truck. Drive your preferred car on the city streets or a sandy beach near the sea. Or in an area full of buildings. Enjoy driving your vehicle in one of the most enjoyable driving games on Online Games! How to Play Vehicles Simulator Select your desired map to begin driving. If you want to cruise over the hills with your monster truck by the sea, the first map is for you. The other two maps provide city streets and empty areas with buildings. You are free to do whatever you want! Use your access to seven awesome cars with diverse purposes: city bus, sedan, sports car, truck, tank, military 8x8, and monster truck. No restrictions, just pure driving enjoyment! Settings of the Vehicles The best part of this car game is that you can customize your vehicle’s settings as you wish. All you need to do is to choose your favorite vehicle among seven options. Then click on the “Settings” section on the right side of the screen. Many adjustment options exist here, such as engine, transmission, and steering. There are even driving assists that you can activate. These adjustments will double the pleasure you will get while driving! Engine Transmission Steering Driving Assists Drift Assist Axle 0 Axle 1 Drive Military Vehicles You have the option to drive a tank and a military 8x8 vehicle. Unbelievable, isn’t it? The idea of ​​driving a tank through the city streets is crazy. With these two huge vehicles, you are free to wander around the map as you wish. You can even use a truck that carries a trailer. Get in the driver’s seat and go near the trailer. Press the T key to attach it to the truck. All is done! Controls WASD/Arrow Keys: Move C Key: Change Camera View V Key: Enter/Change Vehicle Spacebar: Handbrake T Key: Attach Trailer Developer Vehicles Simulator was developed by FreezeNova. What is More? If you are a Vehicles Simulator fan, you may also enjoy playing GTA Simulator . You will have some important tasks in the game. Follow the instructions of Jackson. Find his place and fulfill the tasks he gives. Save the island from the greedy Mayor! For more options, take a look at the simulator games on OnlineGames.io by following the link. title: Archery Apple Shooter
description: We are going out hunting for apples in the middle of the desert! Archery Apple Shooter is an addictive shooting game that requires aiming solid skill. A man is standing motionless in front of you. And you need to shoot the apple on this guy's head. Or is a new William Tell being born? How to play Archery Apple Shooter? Playing this game is incredibly simple and fun. A mouse is all that is required to play the game. Use your cursor to aim, then click the mouse to send the arrow. If your cursor's visibility affects your aiming, press the "L" key to toggle the cursor lock. What is Archery Apple Shooter? Archery Apple Shooter is a web game with excellent graphics that you can play for free on OnlineGames.io! The aim of this game is to shoot the apple on the guy's head. Do not be afraid! This guy is immortal; even if the arrow hits him, this man will not die. He may be a little shaken, but he will gather himself back. But, you have been given limited arrows, so when you miss hitting the apple, the number of arrows given to you will also decrease. When you run out of arrows, you lose. Use your best shot! Tips and Tricks We can provide you with some advice on how to improve your gaming experience. Take a look at the suggestions below: You must be patient and careful as your aim with the arrow will be affected by your body movements caused by breathing in and out. After each apple you hit, the distance you must stop to hit the next one will be longer. And this will make things more exciting! The more you stretch the bow, the more power the bow releases from the arrow. You must adjust this power well according to the distance between you and the apple. If the appearance of the cursor on the game screen prevents you from aiming, shoot using the L key. Additionally, playing by enlarging the screen makes the game more enjoyable. Enlarge the screen by clicking the two-way arrow in the lower right corner. Alike Games If you enjoy the Archery Apple Shooter Game, you may try Age of War and Archer Hero as well or look for the Shooting Games tag on OnlineGames.io.

title: The Farmer
description: The Farmer is a 3D farming simulator game where the player cultivates the field, sows the seeds, waters them and carries out pesticide operations with a tractor. It is a game where the players can perform every operation they can think of in the field of farming. It is also a realistic simulation game for those who want to enter this field in real life. Get in the seat of your tractor, take the necessary farm tools and head to your land in this virtual farming world! How to Play The Farmer Start the game by choosing your tractor. There are 4 different tractors here. You have the option to unlock the blue one in the last option with the money you earn by getting the tasks done. Once you choose your vehicle, you are ready. Step into your field by starting at the first level. Enjoy your farming adventure! Cultivate the Farm After attaching the cultivator to the tractor, follow the arrow signs on the map and move toward the area you will cultivate. When you arrive at the field, you must make sure that you have cultivated the entire land with your vehicle. Look at how much you have completed cultivating the field from the round bar in the upper right corner of the screen. Sow the Seeds Just like in the cultivating process, you will start by attaching the necessary vehicle to the tractor. The machine you need here is the seed drill. After attaching it, head to the land and start planting the seeds. You should carefully sow the seeds throughout the area to get good crops. Final Part: Selling the Crops In The Farmer game, which has 15 different levels, you will be expected to perform all the operations you can think of regarding the field of farming. In the last part, you will take the crops you have obtained to the city and sell them! Isn't it pleasant to be rewarded for your efforts? Controls Use the WASD or the Arrow keys to steer the tractor. Press the C key to change the camera view. The process of attaching the machine to the tractor occurs automatically when the tractor is carefully approached. Discover More Games You may check The Farmer Craft if you found The Farmer enjoyable. In The Farmer Craft , you will be responsible for all the work that needs to be done on the farm, such as taking care of the animals . For more game options, look up other free online simulator games on OnlineGames.io.

title: Fisherman
description: How about fishing? Fisherman is a funny fishing game where you try to put fish on your hook and try to catch them as much as possible. The types and weights of fish vary. The money you earn from that fish increases in direct proportion to the weight of the fish. Cast your rod and wait for a fish to be caught on your hook! How to Play Fisherman Experience fishing like never before with Fisherman, a humorously addictive game where successful fishing yields large rewards! Press the game screen and send your fishing rod to the open sea. The hook will slowly descend into the depths of the sea. A fish will definitely get caught on your hook. The main thing is to slowly pull the fish back on the hook. Because fish can be easily unhooked. Take the fish and set it aside. That's it! Fishing Locations Fisherman offers you four different locations to fish: Calm Pond Forest Lake Lost in Egypt Alaska Extrim All of them are very fascinating places for fishing, and it is very possible for you to encounter different fish species specific to each location. We recommend you try each of them. Time Constraint While Fishing You are given a certain amount of time to fish. The more fish you can catch during this time, the better it will be for you. You can see how much time you have at the top of the screen. Additionally, every fish you catch gives you extra time. Tips for Fishing It may be more logical to try to catch fish with high value and weight in order to earn the highest earning. Catching small fish will make you money, but focusing on the big ones is better. When the fish is caught in the net, it will slip off the hook if you try to pull it quickly. It is useful to be careful and careful when pulling the fish to the surface, especially when you cast the fishing rod deep. Controls Use your mouse button to reel in those valuable fish. Games Similar to Fisherman If you find Fisherman enjoyable, you should try Penguin Fishing , where a little penguin is very hungry, and you need to feed him with fish. title: Subway Clash 2
description: Subway Clash 2 is a multiplayer shooting game where you, as the commander, fight with the enemy forces along with your soldiers. You and your army will take place in the dark, labyrinthine tunnels of the subway in Moscow. Here, your enemies can appear from anywhere. Keep your eyes wide open and be ready for any attack in one of the coolest action games on Online Games! How to Play Subway Clash 2 When you enter the game, you will open your eyes in the subway with many tunnels and sanctuaries. There are lots of huge circular doors and rails. The subway is a very dark and large area. Anything can happen at any moment as you move forward. You are the commander of the green team. And you will deal with red enemy forces. Lead your soldiers strategically. Try eliminating as many opponents as possible to get the highest kill/death rate. The less you die, the higher the rate. View the scoreboard by pressing the Tab key. Three Minute Battles You have three minutes in each battle with the red forces. In this short period of time, you are expected to kill more and die less. At the end of this time, the team with the highest kill score wins the game. And a new game begins shortly after. Your objective is the same in every war: move silently through the tunnels, catch your opponents off guard, or fight side by side with your team against enemies in the square! Pick Up Dropped Weapons There are many weapons at your disposal. Your options are an AK47, sniper rifle, shotgun, and grenade launcher. The AK47 and shotgun are preferable in close combat than the other weapons. Meanwhile, the Sniper Rifle will allow you to shoot down your enemies from afar. The best place to use the grenade launcher is the area where the enemy is large in number. Apart from these weapons, you are free to pick up the guns on the floor dropped from your enemies. Controls WASD/Arrow Keys: Move C: Crouch G: Grenade L: Lock/Unlock Mouse Tab: Scoreboard Number Keys: Switch Weapons Left-Click: Shoot Right-Click: Aim Spacebar: Jump Use screen buttons on mobile devices Developer Subway Clash 2 was developed by Freeway Interactive. title: Studios Pupil
description: Guitars, keyboards, drums, and recording machines... The instruments create the beautiful melodies we listen to with our headphones all day. Listening to music is fun, but have you ever considered producing it? Here is a game to understand how fun (and challenging at the same time) running a music business. Studio's Pupil is an idle music studio simulation game where you make strategic decisions to be the music empire. Start with producing cassettes with only a single singer. Employ workers, open new stages, and make your way up to a high-tech music studio with the best instruments and musicians in the world. How to Play Studio's Pupil? Start with an empty studio with zero income. You are the pupil of the studio; you're responsible for everything here. Before building your first stage, you need cassettes to record music. Buy a cassette producer and employ your first singer. The musicians need cassettes to keep singing and recording. You will be the one providing them with what they need. As they sing, money will pile up next to the musicians. Collect money to unlock new stages, recorders and other assets. Get in Sync with Your Team Initially, you need to run back and forth a bit to bring cassettes and collect money. When you are not able to catch up with all the singers, hire new employees by consulting the HR department on the left of the studio. Share your tasks with newbies and improve their capacity and movement speed to raise your earnings faster. Remember self-growth, as well. Ask your manager for additional responsibilities and skills. Upgrade your capacity and collect speed under the guidance of your manager. Open the Big Stage for the Band Once you have enough earnings, unlock the big stage to host a band and start producing records. Use these records to hire a CEO and expand by opening another studio where you produce CDs instead of records. Unlock New Music Genres In your first studio, you will only have mostly rappers. As you unlock new studios, you will discover new music genres, such as pop and rock bands, who will load your pockets with money! Keep the Rhythm Stay in the rhythm of this music game ; your expenses will increase as you earn more. Make strategic decisions, bring world-class musicians, and reach the high notes! Make your path to building a music empire from the ground. Developer RHM Interactive developed Studio's Pupil. Controls Arrow keys / WASD / drag the left mouse button: Move around. You May Also Like So, you trust your managing skills? We have more challenging companies ranging from restaurants to farming businesses waiting to be managed. So why wait? Try your hand at other tycoon games online . Let's see if you can become the talented CEO in these games, too.

title: Squad Shooter
description: Looking for a free game like Brawl Stars to play on your browser? Look no more. Squad Shooter is your cup of tea. Grab your gear and step into the boots of a lone hero in the Squad Shooter. Navigate through a dangerous mining field where outlaws run rampant. You must be ready to take them down. With no complex controls to slow you down, you’ll find yourself in the action from the very first click. Your weapon auto-targets and fires whenever enemies are within range. This lets you focus on your strategic movements and collecting loots. Over 40 great levels, Brawl Stars style 3D graphics, arenas filled with loots, character cards and various weapons... all for free and online. Controls Move: WASD or arrow key Use virtual joystick to move on mobile devices How to Play Squad Shooter Start your game by entering the arena filled with places to hide and spots to find enemies. As you walk around, you'll see different bad guys. Don't worry about aiming because your gun does that for you! When you get close enough to a bad guy, your gun starts shooting all by itself. Every time you defeat an enemy, they drop items like coins and health packs. Make sure to walk over these items to pick them up. They help you get stronger and keep playing longer! After you beat all the enemies, look for a treasure chest. Stand in front of it and wait a little bit. It will open up and give you more cool stuff! Now, find the way out to finish the level. When you find it, you'll finish the game round. Every level you play is a bit different and might be a little harder. This makes it super fun because you get to keep learning and getting better at the game! Make Your Character Stronger You can make your character stronger so they can survive longer in the game and beat more enemies! Every time you play, you can earn coins. You can use these coins to make your character tougher. This means they won’t get knocked out as quickly! Cool Weapons to Arm You start the game with a basic minigun, but as you play, you can upgrade it or unlock cooler guns that are way more powerful. Here’s how you can get new weapons: Collect Cards: When you defeat enemies, they might drop special cards. Collect these cards to unlock better weapons! Use Coins: You also get coins from defeating enemies. Save your coins because you can use them to upgrade your guns. Awesome Guns Minigun: This is your first gun. It shoots really fast! Shotgun: You can unlock this gun by collecting 5 cards. It’s great for hitting enemies that are close to you. Lavagun: You need 10 cards for this gun. It shoots fire and is super strong. Tesla Gun: This is another cool gun you can get with 10 cards. It zaps enemies with electricity! Developed By This game is developed by Watermelon Games.

title: Pirate Shootout
description: Ahoy matey! Ricochet bullets off the wall to hit all your targets in this pirate game. Grab your shotgun, bounce the bullets and be the cowboy of the open seas! Pirate Shootout is a 2D physics puzzle game with 50 unique levels. As in the reminiscent of Bullet Master game, players clear enemies by indirect shooting and collect loots as a sea rover. Whether you're on your mobile or your computer, you can play Pirate Shootout on your browser without downloading a single file. Here is how you can play the game: Controls Computers Aim: Hold left click Shoot: Release left click Mobiles Aim: Hold tap Shoot: Release How to Play Pirate Shootout Start off with level one. Hold the left click while aiming and release it to shoot. You have 5 bullets to clear all your enemies. Do not waste a single bullet to get 3 stars. Anticipate the angle and shoot the side walls to hit the enemies with bouncing bullets. The good news is you can shoot multiple enemies at once. And even better, you're protected from your own bullets. Clear the scene to collect the loot as a pirate and take on the next challenge. We suggest you turn on the sounds because you'll love the SFX when you hit a target. Hit the Buttons On some levels, enemies hide behind bars and gates. To open these gates, aim for the buttons. If the button turns green, the gates will open. Moving Obstacles There are some moving obstacles that blocks your sight. First understand their cycle and how they move. Anticipate when they will go down or up. Send the bullets in the perfect timing to headshot them all. Wrecking Balls and TNTs Bullets are not the only way to eliminate an enemy. Aim for TNTs to explode and clear multiple at once. You can also aim for wrecking balls, let them drop onto enemies and smash them. More Physics Games If you have completed all 50 levels and are looking for more online physics games , please check out the related page. We are committed to providing our community with the highest quality games for free. Stay connected and continue to enjoy hundreds of games online!

title: Monster Truck Racing
description: Giant wheels and incredible engine power—Monster Trucks are amazing machines built for high performance on rough terrains. In this mini-game, players race to the finish line with monster trucks on an obstacle course. Drive your truck, perform jumps and flips, and be the first to reach the flag. Monster Truck Racing is a 2D single-player racing game where you'll strive to outpace opponents on steep tracks. Complete all 30 racetracks, and you'll likely end up covered in mud! Controls Desktop Move forward: D or right arrow Move backward: A or left arrow Jump: W or up arrow Mobiles Move forward: Tap on the gas pedal button on the bottom right corner Move backward: Tap on the brake pedal button on the bottom left corner Jump: Tap on the jump icon in the bottom How to Play Monster Truck Racing? Hit the button and start the race in the first level. Move with WASD or arrow keys. Your aim is to arrive at the finish flag first without exploding the car. Strategize your race by collecting coins on the way for later purchases. These coins are your key to unlocking new monster trucks and gaining an edge over your opponents. Perform flips to earn extra coins. Each flip brings you 3 bonus coins. Don't Flip Over Monster cars are extremely durable in tough conditions off-road. So, minor crashes won't harm them. But if you crash while flipping over, the vehicle will explode, and you'll start over from that level. Unlock New Monster Trucks The coins you collect and flips you perform on the road are essential for buying even bigger trucks. Unlock your favorite among 5 crazy monster trucks in the garage. The bigger the truck, the more advantage you have over your race opponents. Jump to Get Ahead Jumping on the road will get you ahead of other racers. Be careful not to flip over to the ground while jumping. Also, you might miss some of the coins on the road if you try to finish the track only by jumping. But mostly, this trick will work out well in reaching the flag first. Developer FreezeNova created this game. More Monster Truck Games If you enjoyed Monster Truck Racing, check out these other online truck games for even more high-octane action and exciting stunts. From extreme off-road challenges to crazy obstacle courses, these games will keep you revved up and racing! Our Gamie suggests Monster Cars: Ultimate Simulator for those who prefer more immersive graphics of 3D games. Check it out and let us know your opinion in the comments.

title: Mini Nova Shooters
description: Mini Nova Shooters is an online multiplayer, third-person shooting (TPS) game where you defend your tiny little fighter from enemies. Don't judge these little soldiers by their size. They carry big and heavy guns with their small arms. Protect the territory by yourself or teamplay via multiplayer mode. Either way, you will have lots of fun playing Mini Nova Shooters. Start playing Mini Nova Shooters on Online Games.io for free. Before you go, read about how to play and what to watch out for in Mini Nova Shooters. The Mini Nova Shooter has to protect his house from the other mini soldiers. It's wild out there. All the shooters are crawling around with the rifles. Either stay in your house to guard it or invade others to eliminate more shooters and collect loot. Loots might be in the shape of new guns, coins, or power-ups. Some power-ups may create a shield around you, making you dive into a crowd of enemies. Some increase the hit rate. There are 30 levels in total in Mini Nova Shooters. The first ones may come easy for some, but it will get difficult rapidly. How to Play Mini Nova Shooters? WASD or arrow keys: Move Left Click: Shoot Mouse Scroll: Zoom in/out Space: Pick up weapons 1-4: Use power-ups What are some tips for Mini Nova Shooters? Follow the red arrows to find enemies. Collect power-ups along your way. Keep an eye on the health bar on the top left of the screen. You should use a power-up when it's too low. Collect the coins to buy new skins. Can I Play Mini Nova Shooters on my mobile? Yes, you can play Mini Nova Shooters on your phone or tablet. Use the touch buttons to control the mini shooter and enjoy playing it without downloading. Can I Play Mini Nova Shooters with my friends? Absolutely. Try the multiplayer mode and rip through the round with your friends. Similar Games Did you know Mini Nova Shooters is a part of the game series? Try out Mini Shooters now and have at least the same amount of fun with different features. Do you want to try something further? Take a look at our Shooting Games , Action Games and Car Games .

title: Formula 1 Driver
description: Would you like to kick off some dust here? Formula 1 Driver is a 2D driving game where all the race spectators' eyes are on you while driving an F1 vehicle. Collect all the coins you encounter along the way and reach the finish line without flipping your F1 vehicle. How to Play Formula 1 Driver? You are in the driver's seat of one of the most magnificent Formula 1 vehicles. And you are expected to reach the finish line safely. Your goal is to collect coins and reach the finish line without crashing. Customize your vehicle's color, engine and suspension power before starting the race. You can shape your vehicle according to your taste, making the game more exciting. Customizing the F1 Vehicle Before pressing the play button from the main menu, you can open the customization section by clicking on the steering wheel-shaped icon. You will do all your vehicle customization work from here. Choose the color of your vehicle, increase engine and suspension power and unlock new vehicles as you earn money from races. It is vital to collect coins along your way during the race so that you can personalize your vehicles and unlock new ones. Challenging Race Track If you're expecting the racing map to be flat, we will surprise you a bit. This map is a rough map with lots of ups and downs. If you enter any uphill section with your vehicle quickly, your vehicle will face the danger of flipping over. To avoid this, try to drive without losing steering control. Play in Multiplayer Mode You can play Formula 1 Driver with other online players. When you come to the level selection screen, click on the "Multiplayer" button to create a room. Maximum number of players in a room is 4. When you find an opponent, hit the button and start racing! Controls Use the A and D keys or the left and right arrow keys to steer the F1. Use the Space key, W key or the upper arrow key to make the vehicle jump. Explore Similar Games If you love playing Formula 1 racing games , you may also try F1 Racing , another 2D driving game where you compete with other F1 racers in the presence of audiences.

title: Mad Truck Challenge Special
description: Mad Truck Challenge Special is a 2D racing game where you navigate your monster truck, Monstro, on the desert sands of Egypt. Step on the gas pedal and knock them out of the race by launching rockets. Time to leave all the other racers in the dust. Be the driver who reaches the finish line first with his massive off-road vehicle! 😈 Controls A or Left Arrow: Navigate Left D or Right Arrow: Navigate Right Spacebar: Activate Nitro X Key: Launch Rockets Mad Truck Challenge Special Overview Egypt welcomes your Monstro’s big tires! Here, you race with other off-road drivers in a race track located near the Pyramids. But this race is not for soft-hearted people. Things can get easily uglier within the race. Be prepared for anything. Keep in mind that you can knock the monster trucks out of the race to get ahead of them by using your rockets. Press the X key, and it launches a rocket to the driver who is ahead of you! All is fair in love and war. title: Fish Soccer
description: Fish Soccer is a bright and goofy free online game where football turns fin-tastic! Two chunky koi swim across a green pitch hidden under shallow surf, trying to bump a wibbly bubbly ball into the other net before the 60-second buzzer. Every tap of the ball sets off tiny plop! Sounds, and goals explode with a high-pitched cheer that feels like cheering dolphins. It’s light, it’s quick, and those cute little sound effects make each match feel like an aquarium party you can play online anytime. If you need a break and spectate only, click Watch the Match on the menu and the game will play itself while you just enjoy the bubbly audio show. Nudging the ball is all about angles: slide in from the side, flick your tail, and let momentum carry the ball toward goal line. Because water has its own drag, the ball never rockets straight. You know the struggle if you ever played waterball. Snacks add chaos. Tap T or P to drop a pellet near the rival’s little helpers. They’ll swarm it with eager nom-nom pops, leaving their goal momentarily exposed. Matches last one minute. Highest score when the clock hits zero wins. Developer Fish Soccer created by Neplin Game Studio. Similar Soccer Games Dive into Soccer Random for equally silly physics kicks, or try Pill Soccer if you crave bigger arenas and power-ups. title: Religious Idle
description: Forge a fresh faith and watch it bloom! Religious Idle is a free online idle game that lets you start a brand-new religion from a single believer and grow it into a globe-spanning movement (and you won’t need to part seas to make it happen!) Click to recruit some followers, find a catchy name for the religion, choose a sacred symbol, and write the holy sacred words. As donations roll in, you’ll build temples, shrines, mega-temples, and even a towering Divine Monument. Every upgrade attracts more curious souls, turning your clicker into a self-sustaining empire of belief. If you love watching numbers rise while tweaking strategy on the side, this game delivers that satisfying idle loop with a playful twist on spirituality. Controls Desktop: Left-click to press any on-screen button (Recruit, Build, Assign, etc.). Mobile: Tap those same buttons with your finger—perfect for quick blessings on the go. How to Play Religious Idle Hit Recruit Followers to convince your inner circle. The moment you cross the first milestone, give your movement a name, choose a logo, and pen some sacred words. Those touches boost morale and donations. Build Holy Ground Followers tithe automatically, so keep an eye on the green money counter. Spend cash on buildings that scale your reach: Gathering Spot → Shrine → House of Worship → Mega Temple → Divine Monument. Each tier increases follower capacity and unlocks new gameplay layers but you'll need to assign praichers to build temples. Train Your Zealots With bigger buildings come dedicated roles. Assign unclaimed zealots as: Recruiters: bring in 1 % extra believers each cycle. Fundraisers: squeeze a few extra coins from every tithe. Preachers: keep the faith alive inside large structures such as worship houses and mega temples. Crusaders: they'll embark on expeditions for precious relics. Relics act like power-ups: double XP, speed up tithes, or flood your roster with bonus zealots. Use them wisely for explosive growth. Explore Mail Feed Pop open the little envelope in the corner and you’ll find a stream of quirky headlines, miracle reports, and fan or foe letters. It's like Twitter for prophets. World news flashes like “The Sign of Maneizm Appears on a Piece of Toast in Georgia” or “Children Everywhere Look Forward to Annual Holy Day.” These short blurbs hint at your creed’s growing cultural footprint. Followers gush about everyday blessings, from finding lost keys to a balding believer who swears his hair grew back once he started tithing. Each feel-good story boosts the impact. And n ot everyone’s on board. Expect the odd grumpy letter about loud chanting at 3 a.m. or worries that your zealots are getting “too enthusiastic.” Negative press may slow recruitment, so keep the faithful happy. Developer Religious Idle is crafted by Kodiqi, the indie studio behind several cult-favorite clicker titles. Their trademark: clean UI, steady progression, and clever humor that keeps you grinning between clicks. More Idle Clicker Games You’ll Love If watching followers and funds snowball made your day, fire up Logistics Inc next. This free online game swaps holy buildings for delivery vehicles, letting you recruit staff, juggle budgets, and scale a transport empire from ten bucks to market dominance.
