It's a great pass time when you are bored in school, at work, or on the road. In the beginning, each player gets dealt with 7 random cards from a shuffled deck of 108 cards. You will be playing cards in turns. The aim is to get rid of all the cards in your hand before anyone does. We have explained all you must know before playing Uno Online below. If it seems complicated, don't worry! The best way to learn card games is through playing them. How to Play Uno Online? There are number cards , making most of the deck, action cards and wild cards . Number cards have a face value of 0 to 9. You will be dealt 7 cards at first. You have to get rid of all cards in your hand to win the game. The card you play must match the last card placed down in number, color, or symbol . You must draw a random card from the draw pile if you do not have a card matching one of these criteria. Action Cards of Uno Online There are 3 types of action cards: Draw 2, reverse and skip. Draw 2 : The next player gets 2 cards from the draw pile, and they skip their turn. Reverse : Reverses the direction of the game wise. For example, if you are playing in clockwise rotation, it reverses into counter-clockwise. Skip : The next player misses their turn Wild Cards of Uno Online There are 2 types of wild cards. You can use wild cards anytime in the game. You don't have to match wild cards with the last card played. Wild card : this will allow the player to choose what color to play on. Wild draw 4: The player decides the next color to play on and makes the next player draw 4 cards. Learn More About UNO Online When was UNO invented? Uno is not as old as other classic card games. The game was invented in 1971 by Merle Robbins in Ohio. How many cards are there in UNO? In a typical UNO deck, there are 108 cards and four colors. Each color has 19 cards, summing up to 76 number cards. Also, 24 action cards and 8 wild cards are in a Four Colors deck. Can I play Uno Online on mobile? Yes, you can play Uno Online on mobile without downloading any files on OnlineGames.io. Games Like Uno Online Four Colors is a card game that is very similar to Uno Online. If you would like to spend more time playing Card Games to inject some fun, you are welcome to have a look at our fantastic collection by following the link.

title: Stick Fighter 3D
description: Stick Fighter 3D is a neon-style, 1v1 fighting game where two glowing stick figures duke it out in a side-view arena. You can play solo against the CPU or locally with a friend on the same keyboard. Control stickman in combat, punch, kick, and perform special moves to knock your opponent out! Each player has a health bar and the round ends when one player's health is fully depleted. Flashy design, smooth animations, and a glowing aesthetic will catch your attention from the start. It's stickmen like you've never seen them before! Grab your keyboard, sit next to your buddy and start the battle! Controls Player 1 (Orange Stickman) Move Left: A Move Right: D Jump: W Punch: F Kick: G Special: R Player 2 (Blue Stickman) Move Left: Left Arrow Move Right: Right Arrow Jump: Up Arrow Punch: K Kick: L Special: O How to Play Stick Fighter 3D Choose between solo (1P) or versus (2P) mode from the main screen. Once you're in: Your goal is to finish your opponent's health bar by punching, kicking, and powerful specials. The fight is over when one player's health bar is completely drained. Mix punches and kicks in combos for maximum damage. Special moves give you an edge, but they take time to recharge! Score points each time you win a round. Special Moves Every fighter has a powerful Special Move that can instantly take out their opponent, no matter how much health is left. But there's a catch: you can only use it when the bar above is fully charged. Watch both your own bar and your opponent's. When it fills up, a flash appears. That's your signal. Time it right, hit the special button, and instant KO. Just remember: if your rival's bar is full, you're the one in danger. Watch their movements and stay on guard, because one wrong step could mean a lost score. Similar 2P Games If you enjoyed the back-and-forth dueling of Stick Fighter 3D, you'll probably love Drunken Duel . It's another head-to-head fighting game, but this time, ragdolls are drunk. Choose your side and start dueling with your friend!

title: Time Shooter 3: SWAT
description: Time Shooter 3: SWAT is the new sequel to the first-person shooter series where time only moves when you do, inspired by the SuperHot game and designed by GoGoMan. You'll be in charge of the time again. If you move fast, time also moves fast and vice versa. We know that Einstein proved that time is relative. But this game interprets the whole relativity theory in a new and fun way. Time Shooter 3 SWAT is a game where developers took the Matrix's bullet time and said, "Let's make this into a game where your every twitch controls the flow of time !" In this new chapter of Time Shooter, you will be a SWAT(Special Weapons And Tactics) operative tasked with a dangerous mission. Terrorists have stolen SWAT gear and taken hostages. Now, it's your job to breach their hideout and eliminate the terrorists. So far, the main goal may seem familiar from the other Time Shooter games. But there's an added challenge: rescuing the hostages without a scratch. You cannot harm any hostage while battling with the terrorists, heavily armed than ever, wearing body armor and helmets and using shields to protect themselves. And, if you count on the core mechanic where time only moves when you do, beware that is both a blessing and a curse. So, you'll need to move carefully and plan your shots to avoid hitting any hostages, as even one mistake will force you to restart. Switch between pistols, machine guns, and shotguns like a PRO and bring down the enemy while dodging bullets in slow motion. More Games Like This If you enjoyed Time Shooter 3: SWAT, you might also like other Shoot'Em All style games. For example, FNAF Shooter might be just what you've been looking for if you want whimsical chaos. You will hunt down haunted animatronics in a shopping mall. The horror theme and chaotic gameplay will keep you hooked from the beginning. Controls Move Mouse: Aim WASD: Movement LMB: Shoot RMB: Throw F: Pick Up How to Play Time Shooter 3: SWAT Start the mission by pressing Start and prepare for action. As a SWAT operative whose gear is stolen, you'll start without any gun. Move around using WASD and find the desk with stolen weapons. Make your choice among them wisely; you can carry only one weapon at a time. Aim with the mouse and shoot with the left mouse button. When you run out of ammo, look for another weapon in the arena to keep defending yourself. You can pick up weapons dropped by enemies to stay armed. Watch out for enemies using shields or wearing armor as they approach. To breach doors, use the right mouse button to throw a battering ram. Be strategic and aim carefully – if you accidentally shoot a hostage, you'll have to restart the level. Use the Shift key to sprint, but keep your movements calculated to avoid triggering enemy fire. While playing defensive, the slower, the better. Dodge Bullets in Slow Motion Use slow motion to dodge bullets, and make your moves more precise. When facing armored enemies, aim for their weak spots to take them down faster. You have 3 shields at each level, protecting you from enemy attacks. If you consume them, all you need to do is repeat that level. You can grab invulnerability or endless ammo boosters in the main menu by watching a short ad. The major difference in this sequel of Time Shooter is the hostages. Always be mindful of hostages if you accidentally hit one of them; the game is over. Use your environment to your advantage. Throw objects or breach doors with the battering ram to change the flow of battle. As you progress, terrorists will become more aggressive and use advanced tactics. Stay alert! Developer Time Shooter 3: SWAT was developed by GoGoMan, known for its creative shooters. You can also play Time Shooter 1 and Time Shooter 2 games on OnlineGames.io.

title: Stunt Rider
description: Are you fond of driving the best cars in the world and performing backflips? Stunt Rider is a 3D driving game where your main aim is to jump from sky-high ramps. Get on the pedal and move quickly towards platforms. Turn your car entirely by maneuvering left or right while in the air. What a trembling car game, isn’t it? Top View of Stunt Rider There are four playgrounds to participate in: the city center, the rural road, and the industrial and snowy area. All the maps have many ramps, tunnels and crashing platforms. Your job is to take pleasure while moving into these at high speed. Earn points by performing spectacular jumps or drifts. Don’t forget to collect the F points on the road, as they earn you a certain amount of points. Feel free to do the craziest things with your car! Don’t worry about whether it gets scratched. You can always fix it by using the F key. Try Acrobatic Moves The best part of this car game is that you can perform barrel rolls and somersaults with your car. The only thing you need to do is use the ramps. Have your eye on one of them and drive your car on it at a killing pace. While your vehicle is in the air, give it a direction. You can even test what the car can do by combining different maneuvers. For example, try turning it full circle and see what happens. Objects that Crash None of us wants our cars to get damaged. But this stunt game allows you to wreck your vehicle as you wish. No matter what you do with it, you can return it to its original state with one click. In each map, there are lots of crashing objects lined up. Release your daily stress by letting these wild crashing platforms oppress your car. title: Nova Clicker
description: Nova Clicker is an online idle game which starts you off with a single, smiley Nova, its name is FreezeNova. A simple tap or click on FreezeNova produces your first handful of stars. But don't be fooled, this clicker game quickly grows beyond basic tapping. Soon, you'll be managing an entire universe of quirky characters and powerful upgrades, all designed to make you the ultimate star tycoon. Controls On a Computer: Click on FreezeNova to earn stars. On a Mobile Device: Tap the character to begin generating stars. Start Your Star Journey Begin by clicking (or tapping) FreezeNova, your first Nova character. Each click earns you stars, the main currency of Nova Clicker. It starts off simple, but trust me, the clicking is just the beginning of your cosmic empire. Keep tapping regularly to build your star supply quickly, especially at the start. Explore the Nova Shop To the right of your screen, you'll notice the Nova Shop. This shop is your gateway to a variety of powerful tools and upgrades. As you gather more stars, invest them wisely here. Some essential early upgrades include: nova atom booster, bomb and asteroid. Later, you can even unlock an earth destroyer. Regularly check the shop on the right side as new, more powerful items unlock when you achieve star milestones. Unlock New Novas As your star empire grows, you'll unlock brand-new Novas, each with its own unique personality and star-generating power. Characters such as Police Nova, King Nova, Baby Nova, and even the funky Immortal Nova are waiting to be discovered. Every Nova you unlock boosts your clicking power and star generation significantly, helping you speed up your progress and make star-collecting even more exciting. If you like one of them and don't want to change it, no worries. Just click the t-shirt icon on the top and choose your character. Catch Golden Novas Occasionally, Golden Novas drift quickly across your screen, and they're your golden ticket to massive star bonuses. These Novas appear randomly, so keep your eyes open and your fingers ready. Clicking a Golden Nova provides a big influx of stars, sometimes enough to instantly purchase a much-needed upgrade. Missing one isn't the end of the world; just watch for the next one! Activate the x2 Speed Boost Feeling impatient or looking for rapid progress? Nova Clicker provides an amazing speed-up feature called the x2 Speed Boost. Activating this boost doubles your clicking speed and passive star generation for 60 seconds. You only need to watch a brief ad to activate it. To maximize efficiency, consider using this booster strategically: you can use it when you're close to unlocking a new Nova character or powerful upgrade. Or perhaps you can combine it with your strongest passive upgrades to collect stars even quicker. Travel to New Cosmic Backgrounds As you progress through Nova Clicker, your space journey will take you beyond your initial location. You'll travel through new cosmic settings such as the moon, mars, star rain, outer space and galaxy. Access them by clicking on the cloud icon on the top of your screen. Prestige for Even Bigger Rewards Once you've collected tons of stars, unlocked most of the available upgrades, and explored various backgrounds, it's time for the prestige upgrade, also called ascension. Ascending resets all your income and Nova universe but grants you permanent bonuses and a multiplier effect on your next run. Use Ascension when your progress slows down or when you're ready to achieve higher goals faster. It's like starting a new game, but with incredible power-ups already in your pocket. Here's how it works: You'll restart with your initial Nova but keep valuable bonuses. Each ascension provides a cumulative multiplier, meaning you'll generate stars much faster with every reset. Track the multiplier on the ascension button. Strategic ascensions allow you to unlock powerful upgrades even quicker each time. Developer FreezeNova Game Studio is the mastermind behind Nova Clicker. This creative studio is known for crafting addictive games. Their cheerful mascot, FreezeNova , inspired not only the main character but also lent his name to the game itself, making Nova Clicker a signature title from this popular studio. More Casual Clickers to Explore Craving even more idle goodness? Try Cookie Clicker Pro , where you can bake, upgrade, and devour your way to sugary success. Much like Nova Clicker, Cookie Clicker Pro uses a simple click-to-earn mechanic at its core but piles on fun twists and outrageous upgrades. Jump in, let your cookies multiply, and see if you can reach record-breaking levels of sweetness!

title: Suroi
description: In a post-apocalyptic 2D world, you awaken with nothing in your pockets but the will to survive in your heart. Wander around the arena for anything that might help you survive in a place swarming with enemies. Found a bottle of cola? Toss it in your backpack. Did you see a vest and helmet? Gear up for protection. Come across an MP40 or a box of grenades? Consider yourself lucky; you're making progress! Suroi io is an online multiplayer survival game inspired by Surviv.io. Your mission: gather loot, chests, weapons, medkits, and whatever else you can find to survive in this hostile environment. Explore, avoid enemies, and that toxic orange gas. Collect your essentials and eliminate opponents. Soon, they'll be the ones fleeing from you. Dominate the field and carve your name on the leaderboard. Controls Movement: WASD or Arrow Keys Aim: Mouse Attack: Left-Click Change Weapons: 1,2,3 or Mouse Scroll Pickup/Interact: F Reload: R Use Healing Item: Left-Click on the item or 7-0 Cancel Action: X Toggle Fullscreen Map: G or M Toggle Minimap: N Use Emote Wheel: Hold Right-Click, drag, and release Team Ping: Hold Right-Click and C, drag, and release Request Item: Hold C and click on the item Drop Item: Right-click on the item Equip Last Item: Q Swap Gun Slots: T Equip Other Gun: Space Change Scope Zoom: Left-Click on Scope How to Play Suroi is a battle royale io game where strategic thinking is key to survival. First, collect armor, weapons, medikits, and ammo. To find them, enter abandoned houses, break into closets, or open boxes by left-clicking—press F to equip your findings. Once you're armed enough, defend your team and take down opponents. Dodge enemy attacks and send them to spectator mode to watch how you've got there! Healing Items In duo mode, you can revive your teammate, and they can revive you. In solo mode, you're on your own, so stock up on healing items. Save especially the Medikits for an emergency when you need it. Here's what you need to know to stay in the fight: Gauze: Restores 15 health Medikit: Restores 100 health Cola: Restores 25 adrenaline Tablets: Restore 50 adrenaline Beware the Orange Gas Enemies aren't your only threat. In this post-apocalyptic world, a toxic orange gas spreads across the map, killing anyone who breathes it in. Keep an eye on the map in the top-left corner of your screen. When you see the orange shadow, run. As the game progresses, the gas will cover more of the map, shrinking the safe zone. Now you're ready to survive in Suroi.io! May your health bar stay full, and good luck out there! Developer Hasanger Games created Suroi.io Similar Games If you've enjoyed browser-based battle royales like Surviv.io and ZombsRoyale.io, you'll feel right at home here. Keep the adventure alive by playing other battle royale games on OnlineGames.io! What about forming a squad with pets in Taming io next?
