title: Tetris
description: Have you ever played Pentomino? You might have without even noticing! Yes, that's true. The well-known tiling puzzle game Tetris has its roots in a lesser-known called Pentominos. Pentomino is a word derived from two Greek words, " pento " and " domino ," meaning a shape that is composed of 5 squares . Developer Alexey Pajitnov once came up with a brilliant idea: "What if Pentominos had dominos consisting of 4 blocks instead of 5?" And thus, the concept of Tetraminos (commercially known as Tetris) came to life. As of June 6, 2024, Tetris is 40 years old . Needless to say, the game proved itself to be timeless, with millions of users still playing it. OnlineGames.io is celebrating the 40th anniversary of Tetris by offering an HTML5 version. If you're new to Tetris (or have forgotten about the rules a long time ago), here is the ultimate guide to becoming a Tetris master . Controls Desktops and Laptops Move: A/D or Left/Right Arrow Keys Drop: S or Down Arrow Rotate: W or Upper Arrow X: Skip block Mobile Devices Drag blocks to move. Tap on a block to rotate. How to Play Tetris? Tetris is a game where you stack colorful blocks in a 20x10 grid. Shapes resembling I, J, L, O, S, T, and Z letters (also known as Tetriminoes ) fall slowly from the top of the screen. While the shapes are falling, you can move them to the sides or rotate them to find the ideal angle and location to make the blocks perfectly fit into your grid . When you fill a line completely , all the blocks in that line will disappear. Your main goal is to clear as much as lines as possible before the tetriminoes start falling at a crazy speed. Get the highest score and win this game before all the blocks pile up in a single column. What is different in HTML5 Tetris? Tetris on OnlineGames.io has several differences and improvements compared to the version released in 1984. Unlike the original, this version is compatible with all kinds of smart devices, meaning you can play Tetris on your mobile, tablet, desktop, or laptop for free . Secondly, this version embraces a neon theme , making it more colorful and futuristic compared to the original. Lastly, this version has a bonus score mechanism . Some tetriminoes have stars on them, bringing bonus scores when players clear them away. More Arcade Games If you enjoy reminiscing about old-school arcade games, try Pacman's 30th anniversary . It's a remake of the original Pacman by Google. For more puzzle games, check out the logic games online tag to find hundreds of free online games.

title: Dragon Simulator Multiplayer
description: Dragon Simulator Multiplayer is the type of game that allows you feel the thrill of flight as you spread your dragon wings above the buildings. Let the fireballs hit the enemies and experience the fantasy of being in the Dragons world. If you want to enter Dragon Simulator Multiplayer you must select a dragon first. • Soteonth The Warrior • Fyminth The Chosen (available at level 10) • Gossalo Eater of Sheep (available at level 20) • Piessierth The Eternal One (available at level 30) • Marvolth The White One (available at level 40) After choosing the Dragon, you will need to find a room to join a battle or to create one. Available modes: • DM • TDM • Battle Royale Levels: • Wastesland • RedWaste • WasteTwon Select the maximum players that can join and the type of room can be private/night. You also have the chance to play the Battle Royale that has a rating of 1500. Dragon Profile details: • Level • Xp • Kills • Money • Buy Gift Dont forget to collect the daily gift reward ! Dragon Simulator Multiplayer Display: • Kill feed (displayed on the top left) • Controls (displayed on the left & right bottom ) • City Map & HP (displayed on the top right) Controls WASD or arrow keys: move Space: fly up L Shift: sprint Q: jump C: down R: dodge Shift + Left mouse click: fire breath Left mouse click: fireball Right mouse click: melee attack T: chat M: map Esc: pause menu

title: Super Hero Driving School
description: Being a superhero is tough. They get tired of flying through the air using only their arm strength. Perhaps flying a car would be easier. But hey! You know what? Authorities require superheroes to have a driver's license, too. How uncool is that? Superheroes shouldn't have to deal with paperwork, but alas, rules are rules. You'll need to complete the course… As we have heard from Superman, there is some kind of strange driving school exclusively for superheroes. It has the craziest airborne tracks you can ever see in any other driving school. Anyway, you don't have many options if you're a superhero trying to learn how to fly cars, huh? Give this driving school a shot, and we guarantee you'll love performing stunts, barrel rolls, and flips in mid-air. Controls Use your left mouse button to speed up How to Play Super Hero Driving School Forget everything you know about conventional driving schools with their mundane traffic drills. Here, you start from the top of a hill. Slam the pedal to the metal and take off! Reach and crash through the finish wall! (Yes, it's a wall, not a line! We told you it's only for people with superpowers) Earn lots of coins for a safe landing. No worries if you crash; upgrade your car's power and boost, then fly again. Master car control through practice. Save Up Some Boost Power It's hard resisting to use all your boost right from the start for a lightning-fast ride. But, you might need to save some of the boost for later. Use just enough boost to reach your desired point. Make use of speed booster pads along the way and push your car's limits to complete each level. But beware, because superheroes can have super crashes! What is Super Hero Driving School? Super Hero Driving School is an online 3D driving game where you race downhill, perform stunts, and crash through the finish line. Explore 12 uniquely designed tracks filled with bizarre elements like giant cans, balls, wrecking balls, and other crazy obstacles. Unlock 9 amazing vehicles, including a school bus, motorbike, and even a jet! Can't open the game. How can I fix it? Ad blockers can cause this issue. Try disabling the ad blocker and refreshing the page. If it continues, visit our support page or leave a comment. Developer Boombit S.A. developed the Super Hero Driving School. More Flying Games Online What is that thing flying around? Is it a bird? Or a plane? Maybe it's a dragon. On OnlineGames.io, you choose what you'd like to fly. Pick among many titles on the Flying Games Online page and go on your adventure with a new vehicle (or an animal).

title: Cat Girl Fashion Challenge
description: Angela the Cat has always loved two things: trying on cute outfits and showing them off to anyone who will watch. Cat Girl Fashion Challenge lets you enter Angela's wardrobe and her world of friendly rivalry and glittering spotlights. Each round pairs Angela with a stylish challenger on a runway. You become Angela's personal stylist, digging through closets packed with dresses, shoes, and sparkly accessories. Submit the look and see how your opponent dressed. Three judges wave their paws in approval or disappointment), declare a winner, and push Angela on to fresh fashion themes: Evening Elegance, Casual Chill, Back-to-School, E-Girl, Christmas sparkle, spooky Halloween, pastel Easter, and even a few secrets that unlock later. It's a quick, upbeat girl game, and the best part is that you can hop in for a few minutes or binge through every theme without downloads, sign-ups, or surprise paywalls. Controls Mouse or Touch: Tap icons, drag clothing onto Angela, and hit the big Preview button to present your look. How to Play Cat Girl Fashion Challenge When the round starts, you'll be matched with an opponent. The level tells the current theme, so keep those colors and vibes in mind while you browse in your wardrobe. The vertical toolbar at the right opens earrings, necklaces, bags, shoes, and full outfits; swipe the item carousel if you need more choices. Select pieces to put onto Angela, and they snap perfectly into place. Feel free to mix, match, and swap as much as you like because nothing locks in until you click preview. Once both stylists are ready, the pink platforms glide into a backyard catwalk (or snowy plaza or neon club; each level looks different). The judging trio then flips their score paddles. A thumbs-up lights a star under Angela's name; a thumbs-down does nothing. Collect more stars than the opponent to win the round. Keep winning, and Angela will strut through every season in the calendar, all the way to the secret Galaxy Gala finale. Developer Created and published by FreezeNova, specialists in quick-load, kid-friendly web games that work smoothly on desktops, tablets, and phones. More Fashion Games for Angela Fans If one runway isn't enough, check out Angela All Season Fashion on OnlineGames.io. Instead of facing rivals, you guide Angela through a year-round makeover spree, spring florals, summer beachwear, autumn sweaters, and winter sparkles, unlocking new wardrobes as you progress. It's the perfect sequel once you've mastered every challenge in the Cat Girl Fashion Challenge and still crave fresh outfits for everyone's favorite pink-furred style star.

title: Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour
description: Are you silly enough to survive the madness? In Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour , there’s no time to overthink ⎼ just run, jump, and pray you don’t mess up. Every step is pure chaos, every corner hides nonsense, and one wrong move will send you straight back to the start. This isn’t just parkour, it’s brainrot parkour: loud, goofy, and a little unhinged. From colorful maps to ridiculous traps, it’s the ultimate playground of chaos. Play solo to prove your reflexes, or bring a friend and see who fails worse. Collect coins, unlock goofy skins, and embrace the madness. The only rule? Run silly, jump silly, survive silly. Game Overview Run, jump, parkour ⎼ survive the nonsense! That’s the only rule in Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour . Sounds simple? Think again. Every step hides chaotic surprises, and only the silliest will make it to the finish line. Collect coins along the way to unlock goofy skins and silly rewards that make failing even funnier. The brain-rotting games of survival await! Play solo to test your reflexes against pure chaos, or grab a friend in offline multiplayer and see who fails first. Whether you’re skipping madness alone or sabotaging your buddy with power-ups, the goal stays the same: run silly, jump silly, and survive (if you can)! How to Play Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour? Single Player Survival Run Play solo and try to survive the nonsense! In this silly, brain-rotting parkour race, every step could be your last. The goal is simple: don’t fall, don’t fail, and definitely don’t get eliminated by the chaos around you. The gameplay is quick to learn but hard to survive: Goofy parkour! ● Move: WASD ● Jump: SPACE Keep an eye out! Move the mouse to control the camera and look around. Two Player Survival Run Grab a friend and dive into the silliness! In this chaotic multiplayer mode, you’ll both race through the same ridiculous obstacle-filled course, avoiding the same traps. To make things even wilder, you can unleash power-ups like Freeze , Bomb , and Fast Run ⎼ because surviving is funny, but sabotaging your friend is even funnier! Controls First Player Controls How to run, jump, and look as silly as possible: ● Move: WASD ● Jump or double jump: SPACE Don’t forget your goofy power-ups! ● Freeze Power-up: Q ● Bomb Power-up: E ● Speed Power-up: F Second Player Controls Think you can out-silly Player 1? Prove it! ● Move: Arrow Keys ● Jump or double jump: SPACE Don’t forget your goofy power-ups! ● Freeze Power-up: H ● Bomb Power-up: K ● Speed Power-up: L Good to Know! Grab power-ups before you even start! Want a little boost? You can unlock power-ups at the beginning of the game… but only if you’re brave enough to sit through those boring ads. Worth it? That’s up to you. Pick your silly style! With 11 Italian Brainrot skins to choose from, you won’t get any special powers… just extra goofiness while you try not to fail. Collect coins to buy them, or unlock them the painful way ⎼ by watching boring ads. Boring ads mean extra lives! As much as we all hate them, ads are indispensable: they can even revive you when you fail. Annoying? Yes. Useful? Absolutely. Powerups and Special Moves Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour brings you the classic survival game power-ups, but twisted into pure silliness. Use them to survive, sabotage, or just cause chaos ⎼ the choice is yours. Freeze Lock your opponents in place like statues. Use it early and watch them stand there useless while you speed off. Bomb Throw it at nearby players to send them flying! They’ll come back after a few seconds, giving you time to get ahead. Speed Feel the brainrot boost! Run twice as fast and speed past everyone… but careful, controlling your jumps gets way trickier when you’re this quick. FAQs Is Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour compatible with mobile devices? Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour is compatible with both iOS and Android devices, allowing players to enjoy the game anywhere, anytime. What devices does Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour support? Any modern smartphone or tablet running iOS or Android with a browser should work. It also plays great on PC. Similar Games Survived the silliness of Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour ? If you’re ready to give this type of game a second chance, the classic Obby Survive Parkour is always waiting! Test your skills in TV-show-style, Squid Game-like environments where every jump could be your last.

title: Vegas Crime City
description: Welcome to the crime-ridden city of Vegas! With bad guys lurking around every corner, the streets are far from safe. As a skilled and athletic female spy with exceptional shooting abilities, your mission is to clear the mafia in Vegas. Don't delay - it's time to take action and make this city a safer place for all. Vegas Crime City is a GTA-inspired mission-based shooting and driving game. Walk, ride or drive to certain destinations, eliminate the targets and pass levels. The game has good-quality 3D graphics and realistic sound effects. The difficulty of the levels is adjusted so as not to exhaust or deter any gamer. Controls WASD: to move Left Shift: Sprint Space to jump Q to roll E or 1 to change weapon Left mouse click to shoot Right mouse click to aim Tab to toggle pause How To Play Complete the task within the time limit to pass each level. In the first few levels, you will learn to steer a motorbike or car and practice shooting. After that, you will be given more challenging tasks to complete within a specific time limit. As the clock is ticking, don't forget to sprint by pressing the left shift key while walking. As you progress through the levels, the number of enemies will increase, so it is essential to get accustomed to the available weapons. You can change weapons by pressing the E key when you need to. Try to find the ideal weapon for each task. For instance, with sniper rifles, it takes a few bullets to eliminate an enemy, whereas using a bazooka, one shot is enough to clear a few of them. GTA-like Missions You may encounter levels where you drive or ride to a certain stop and engage in battles on various parts of the city. Make use of the red dots on the map and try to arrive early using shortcuts. More Games Like This If you enjoy GTA games, where you complete missions and collect bonuses, our recommendation is GTA Simulator . That game will give you a more in-depth storyline, city traffic, pedestrians coming along your way, and more complex duties to complete. GTA Simulator is one of the most played games on OnlineGames.io in its category, but not your only alternative. Take a look at the shooting games to pick among hundreds of titles appealing to many gamers every day.

title: Car Parking
description: Car Parking is a 2D online game that lets you experience being a skillful parking valet. Drive different cars and vans and park them in designated places suitably. There are 20 levels ready to be completed. In each level, 3 vehicles are waiting to be parked in yellow spots. It is okay to bump into obstacles a little. Who doesn't, huh? But crashes will be deducted from your stars. And if you lose all 3 stars before completing the level, you need to start over. How to Play Car Parking? Control the car using WASD or arrow keys. Follow the yellow arrows to find the specific parking spot to enter. Park the vehicle in the desired direction properly. The car shouldn't cross the lines even a little bit. Pay attention to the indicators: You may sometimes need to reverse park. Complete the level without hitting the obstacles around the parking lot to get the 3 stars. Learn How to Park a Car Precisely If you are a newbie in driving, a great way to learn how to park a car is by playing car parking games. This way, you will know which way to head and when exactly you should turn the steer when parking your car in a real-life situation. Online Car Parking game offers a safe environment for inexperienced drivers to adjust to driving and parking without risking their health, their car, and others'. You have the freedom to bump into obstacles or other vehicles parked while playing a parking game. Still, the consequences would be slightly frustrating in a similar real-life situation. Car Parking Tips and Tricks Acknowledge the car's size you're driving. This is crucial for you to avoid any obstacles while making maneuvers. For example, it is more challenging to park a van than a small sports car. Don't hit the gas too suddenly. You need to be patient and avoid any sudden moves while parking a car. Make a quick plan on the best way to park the vehicle in the desired area and divide your plan into several simple steps. Make as many maneuvers as you need to fit in the spot properly. Align your tires with the parking lines and finish parking Controls in Car Parking Use WASD or arrow keys Use your cursor to navigate on the menu Similar Games If you like car parking games, you may challenge yourself more in any online parking games on OnlineGames.io.

title: Kick the Alien
description: Kick the Alien is a wacky clicker game where an evil alien has just arrived to colonize your planet. And your job is to give a sneaky alien the pounding it deserves. Every click you make sends the alien flying, earns you coins, and pushes you closer to the next level. Use those coins to unlock wild weapons, new battlegrounds, and more. This isn’t just about smashing, it’s about upgrading, customizing, and having fun while destroying it. Ready to unleash intergalactic mayhem? Hop in, click away, and kick that alien across the stars! 👽💥 Controls Left Click: Hit the alien using your equipped weapon How to Play Kick the Alien Your goal is to defeat the alien by hitting it repeatedly until its health bar (at the bottom) runs out. Every time you strike, you earn coins. These coins add up fast, and once you’ve got enough, you can dive into the weapon shop and unlock stronger gear. Click the weapon icons at the top to switch between tools like ray guns, hammers, and other sci-fi madness. Each weapon has a price, so choose wisely and save up! When the alien’s health reaches zero, you move on to the next level and earn a coin bonus. The alien might get tougher, but so do your weapons, so keep upgrading! Customize Your Background Want a new vibe? You can also spend your hard-earned coins on awesome new backgrounds. Whether it’s a planet-side bedroom, a lava moon, or a neon-blue alien city, just head to the environment selection screen and unlock fresh looks for your battle arena. Backgrounds cost coins, and each one brings a totally different feel to your alien-smashing sessions. Visual Effects Toggle If you want a softer experience, you can turn off impact effects with a single click. This option is found at the top right of the screen and is perfect if you prefer things with a little less intense, less violent gameplay. You can also mute sound effects right next to it. Developer Kick the Alien is developed by FreezeNova, the team behind many other addictive online games you’ll find on OnlineGames.io. Their games are built to be smooth, fun, and accessible on school and home computers alike. More Clicker Games Online If you enjoyed the coin-collecting chaos of Kick the Alien, check out our full list of free clicker games for more easy-to-play online fun. Love sci-fi themes and upgrades? Our space games section will keep you blasting through space. For a creative twist, try funny destruction games that mix humor with chaos.

title: Parkour Rooftop
description: Parkour Rooftop is a 2D running game in which you run on rooftops! It will remind you of the popular video game Rooftops & Alleys: The Parkour Game. Avoid crashing into any obstacles and try to run as far as you can. Running on rooftops will challenge your skills to the utmost, as you never know what you will encounter. Watch out for hazards on your way! 🏃 Controls Tap or use the spacebar to jump. Tap longer to jump higher. On smartphones and tablets, you can use the touch controls. Parkour Rooftop Overview Ready to dive into the excitement of jumping from one rooftop to another? This adrenaline-pumping running game will test your reflexes! You must not come into contact with any obstacles while running forward. Your main aim is to avoid all the obstacles on your way and take the longest route as you can. With each try, attempt to break your own highest record. While trying to do that, try not to fall down! Satellite Dishes, Chimneys and Boxes 📡 You will encounter satellite dishes, chimneys, boxes, and air conditioning motors while you are running on the roofs. If you trip over them, you will slow down. These obstacles may even cause you to fall. Jump over them to dodge. You can tap longer to jump higher to surpass them completely. Limited Visibility 🌫 The leaves of large trees and cranes may obstruct your view. They may prevent you from seeing the gaps between buildings while running and jumping. Before taking action, you must calculate all the possible risks that you can encounter. We suggest you open your eyes wide! Developer Parkour Rooftop was developed by MarketJS. More Games Like This If you enjoyed playing Parkour Rooftop, we invite you to try out Rooftop Run ! With its 3D graphics, it will feel real to jump from the roof of one skyscraper to another. For more options, feel free to check out our Running Games Online game category.

title: Obby Football Soccer 3D
description: Obby Football Soccer 3D is a browser-friendly soccer game in which you join football matches with your Obby character. Take your place in the stadium, dominate the match, and score goals to win the World Cup. Run on the football pitch tirelessly, and score one goal after another! Play this game with friends or random opponents with its colorful 3D graphics and the atmosphere of a real stadium. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move LMB: Kick the Ball Left-Shift: Speedrun E: Steal Q: Dribble On Mobile Devices: Use the virtual buttons on the screen. How to Play Obby Football Soccer 3D Guide your Obby character in the football pitch, take control of the ball, and head to the rival’s goal to score! Avoid losing the ball to the opposing team by performing dribbles. If the ball is in their hands, run towards them and press E to steal the ball. Once you get the ball, speedrun and kick the ball to score a goal. Watch out for the football obstacles while running on the pitch! Tackle the Ball If the opposing team has possession of the ball, you need to take it away from them. To do it, run towards the player with the ball, and press the E key to steal it. However, when you get the ball, you need to protect it so it doesn’t go back to the opposing team. If one of the opposing team’s players gets close to you, press Q to dribble. Football Obstacles While on the football pitch, you will encounter some football obstacles, such as meteorite rain and tornadoes. These kinds of obstacles affect your performance in matches by making your job harder. Our mascot, Gamie, suggests you upgrade Obby’s footballer skills and increase his endurance during matches. Tips & Tricks for Obby Football Soccer 3D 👟 Sprint fast, reach the goal before defenders. ⚽ Steal the ball quickly by using the E key. 💡 Dribble smart to avoid losing possession. 💥 Watch obstacles like tornadoes and meteors. 👥 Play with teammates, dominate stadium matches. Developer Obby Football Soccer 3D is developed by Welwise Studio. Similar Soccer Games Looking for more? Champions FC is another game that suits your tastes well! In it, you will take your part in fast-paced football matches. For additional options, you are always welcome to visit our Soccer Games Online page at the link. Share your gaming experiences with us in the comments section below!

title: Cool Brainrot Clicker
description: More ways to click your way to endless fun? Is it even possible? Of course it is! With Cool Brainrot Clicker , you get to play the chill brainrot-themed game with extra power-ups, easier ways to grow your score, and new brainrot characters. Game Overview Cool Brainrot Clicker is a silly and fun clicker game where you just click or tap to earn points and unlock brainrot-themed items. You can buy and sell power-ups, so you get to think a little while still having lots of fun. It’s easy to play but still gives you cool ways to grow your score faster. How to Play Cool Brainrot Clicker? The gameplay is simple: click as much as you can to grow your score. The higher your score, the more fun things you can unlock. Use your coins to buy and sell power-ups to make your game even sillier and more fun. Silliness is one click away! Grow your score: Click, tap, or press SPACE. Good to Know! Earn them all! Once you make enough coins, you can unlock new brainrot characters that help you earn even more coins with every click. Sell them all! If you want to try new upgrades, you can sell your power-ups anytime to rebuild your coin army. FAQs Will my progress be saved? Yes! Your progress is saved automatically, so you can come back anytime and keep clicking from where you left off. Does it cost anything to play? Nope! Cool Brainrot Clicker is free to play. All upgrades are bought with the coins you earn by clicking in the game. Do the brainrot characters help me in the game? Yes! Each brainrot character gives you coins every time you click. Some characters give you a few coins per click, while others give you a lot more, so try to unlock them all! Similar Games If you like these games and you’re in for more nonsense and chaotic fun, then you should pay our Italian Brainrot library a visit! Here you can find even more chill clicker games like Italian Brainrot Baby Clicker , a cute version of the classic Brainrot Clicker . Or if you’re ready for some serious adventure, jump straight into the action with Italian Brainrot Survive Parkour . Whatever you choose, each game is silly, fun, and full of endless good vibes!

title: Draw the Car Path
description: Draw the Car Path is an online puzzle game where you guide cars to their parking spots by drawing their paths. It sounds simple, but as you progress, the difficulty of solving the tangled cars increases. You'll start with a single car in an empty parking lot, but soon, you'll have to manage multiple vehicles, all while making sure they don’t crash into each other or the walls. With 30 levels to complete, strategic thinking and precise drawing skills will be your best buddies! Other Drawing Games The game was developed by FreezeNova. You can play their other great puzzle games of "Draw the" series on OnlineGames.io. Check them out now! Draw the Bridge Draw the Truck Bridge Draw the Bird Path Controls For Computers: Click on the car and drag to draw a path for each car. For Mobiles: Tap and drag to draw a path for the car. How to Play Draw the Car Path Click or tap on a car and drag to draw a path leading to its designated parking spot. The drawing lines' color will match with the car's color. As levels progress, more cars appear. Plan carefully to prevent crashes. Cars shouldn’t crash into each other or walls. Adjust paths and draw smoother curves if needed. Some levels have obstacles, so use open spaces wisely. Try to collect all three stars on the level by drawing the path over the stars. Sometimes, cars need to be parked in a specific direction. Pay attention to the arrows on the parking spot. Once satisfied with your paths, hit the play button on the top right, start the movement and see if your plan works. Tips and Tricks Before drawing, take a few seconds to analyze the level layout. Some obstacles may not be obvious at first glance. Use smooth curves instead of sharp turns. Cars move more naturally with curved paths. Sharp turns can lead to unexpected collisions. Consider how cars will interact with each other once they start moving. Will one block another’s path? Adjust accordingly. Draw longer paths for some cars. If multiple cars are moving, staggering their start times by making some travel longer distances can prevent crashes. Try using S-shaped paths, loops, or extra turns to delay their arrival, ensuring they don’t block or crash into others. Don't always take the shortest path; sometimes, a longer but safer route is the best option. If you notice a potential mistake before pressing play, erase and redraw instead of relying on luck. Avoid making paths that barely squeeze past obstacles. A slight misalignment can lead to a crash. If cars need to park in a sequence, make sure the first one reaches its spot before the second blocks the way. Use walls and star locations to guide cars into correct positions, but make sure they don’t become obstacles themselves.

title: Idle Town Billionaire
description: Idle Town Billionaire is a clicker game where you start as a small-town entrepreneur and work your way up to becoming a business tycoon. Tap or click to invest in businesses, buy and upgrade shops, hire building managers and expand your empire. Watch your town grow as you generate income even while you're away, unlock new towns, and automate your earnings. Can you build the ultimate billionaire town? And if you have that tycoon spirit, you might like other idle games like Idle Vlogger , where you get to be a YouTuber and grow your channel slowly. A great choice for fans of idle business games with fresh concepts! Controls On Computers: Click to invest and upgrade businesses. On Mobiles: Tap to interact with businesses and manage your town. How to Play Idle Town Billionaire Begin with a single business and generate income by tapping. Each tap earns money, which you can use to reinvest in your town. Hire a manager for your business to collect profits automatically. Without a manager, you'll need to tap regularly to gather income. Use your earnings to unlock and buy new buildings like a pet store, apartment complex, pizzeria, and more. Each new business adds to your total income stream. Every new building requires its own manager for automation. If you don't hire one, you'll need to manually collect profits by clicking on each business. Invest in business upgrades to increase revenue and make your managers more efficient. Upgrades boost income rates and reduce collection times. As you accumulate wealth, you can unlock additional land in the town. But that's not all because you can venture into neighboring towns to expand your empire even further. There are five towns to unlock, each with rising land costs. Plan your investments wisely to expand strategically and dominate the business world. Keep upgrading, hiring, and strategizing to maximize earnings and build the ultimate business empire. Will you become the richest idle town billionaire? Who Created Idle Town Billionaire? The game was developed by Market JS. Share Your Progress! How far have you expanded your business empire? Have you unlocked all five towns? Share your progress, favorite strategies, and the most profitable business you've built in the comments! Let's see who's on their way to becoming the ultimate billionaire! 💰🚀

title: Kikis Pink Christmas
description: Kikis Pink Christmas is a dress up game where you prepare a gorgeous lady, Kiki, for the upcoming holiday. She wants to spend New Year's Day with her family and friends. She wants every moment of that day to be perfect. That's why it's up to you to prepare her for this day. She has already decorated the house and made it for Christmas, and now it's time to dress her up! 🎄 How to Play Kikis Pink Christmas Kiki has 4 different looks in mind. Each look covers a different time period of New Year's Day. Therefore, the background of each scene is also variable depending on the time of the day. You need to choose her outfit and do her make-up in accordance with the scene. For example, she will want to feel comfortable and sweet inside the house. She prefers to be more casual when cooking for her guests in the kitchen. Kiki's look will change as the day goes on based on your decisions. Prepare Kiki for Four Scene Kiki will want to be as cozy as possible on Christmas morning and will want to adorn the pine tree with her beloved pet. Select the hoodie or sweater that she will most comfortably fit into. After that, she'll go get something less fancy and head to the kitchen to make cookies. She can even be forced to wear a scarf over her hair since she might get splashed by goods while preparing meals in the kitchen. Once she finishes up in the kitchen, you have to make her the most fashionable person at the dinner party. Her gaze should be on everyone. For the evening, get her something a little louder. Finally, you've reached the stage where you need to dress her warmly so that when they go outside in the snow , she won't be cold. Here, choose a ski jacket for her if you want. Controls Use your mouse click to prepare the Kiki for Christmas. Developer Kikis Pink Christmas is created by Gamerina. Other Christmas Games If you like playing Christmas games like Kikis Pink Christmas, you may try Christmas Mahjong . Up until there are no more tiles in the game, the player's goal is to match each tile with its pair. It is the goal to clear the board of all tiles with Christmas themes. However, you're running out of time, so you need to be quick. Or, you may look up other free Christmas games on OnlineGames.io for more options. Please contact us at any time with any requests or recommendations!

title: Run 3D
description: A group of aliens has set out on a crazy mission. And that is to reach the Sun! Their journey takes them through a series of mysterious space tunnels floating between the stars and planets. These tunnels hold unknown dangers, such as unstable tiles, unexpected gaps, and gravity-bending walls. The alien must keep running, jumping, and adapting to survive and reach their ultimate goal: the Sun. Every step brings them closer to the goal. But one wrong move and you send the alien into the void. Do you have what it takes to guide them through this endless cosmic game? If yes, start playing Run 3D now! Controls Arrow Keys / WASD: Move left, right, and jump Spacebar: Jump How to Play Run 3D? Start running automatically through the space tunnel. Use the controls to jump over gaps and avoid falling into space. Rotate the tunnel by moving into walls, changing the direction of gravity. Watch out for unstable tiles that disappear when you step on them. Unlock new characters, each with a wacky alien look. Keep running and see how far you can go! Gravity Rotation One of the most interesting part of Run 3D is the gravity rotation. Unlike standard platformers, this game allows you to shift gravity by running into the tunnel walls . When you move left or right and reach a wall, the entire tunnel rotates, making that surface the new floor. This feature opens up endless ways to navigate obstacles, avoid gaps, and find the safest route forward. Secondly, the tunnel itself constantly changes shape. You won’t just be running through simple square corridors. Some tunnels have pentagons, hexagons, octagons, and even 10-sided polygons. As the number of sides increases, the tunnel feels wider and more unpredictable, making gravity rotation even more important. Some shapes offer easier paths, while others require precise movement to survive. Mastering gravity shifts and adapting to different tunnel shapes is key to lasting longer in Run 3D! More Running Games If you enjoy Run 3D, you might also like endless running and platforming games that test your reflexes. Keep moving, keep jumping, and reach for the stars! Release Date 15 October, 2024 Who Created Run 3D? GM created run 3D. Can I play Run 3D for free? Yes, Run 3D is completely free to play!

title: BFFs Summer Aesthetic
description: It's the middle of summer, and the BFFs still haven't tried the latest summer collections! BFFs Summer Aesthetic is a 2D girl game where you help the six girls refresh their summer wardrobe. They want to dress up in colorful clothes and dresses. Choose earrings and necklaces for them, style their hair and dress them in the most beautiful outfits. Then, they will head to the beach hand in hand in this fashion game! Controls Desktops and Laptops Left-Click: To Pick Items Mobile Devices Tap on the touchscreen to pick items. About BFFs Summer Aesthetic After chatting on WhatsApp, the girls decide to try different things for the summer in this fashion game. They need your help! They count on your experience in the fashion industry. They know they can trust you with their eyes closed. If you are ready, let's prepare them! There are six girls to prepare. Starting with the first girl, make each of them one of the most beautiful girls in the beach clubs . Begin by choosing earrings for her. Then, choose a necklace and sunglasses . Next, you need to pick a purse. In the last two stages, determine her hairstyle and outfit . Voila! She's ready to shine. Summer Outfits In the outfit selection stage, you will find the most precious clothes, shorts and dresses from famous designers. Polka dot and one-shoulder dresses , denim shorts and bustier tops are among your options. You can also wear a T-shirt and a dress underneath. Whether it's a T-shirt and dress combo or something else, every choice looks fabulous on these beautiful girls. Braided Hair or Straight Hair? The hair selection section offers many hairstyles to choose from. You can braid girls' hair or leave it straight. Ponytail or bun models may also be favorable for them in the summer heat. No Without Glasses! Girls cannot walk without glasses under the scorching heat of the sun. They definitely need glasses. You will find four unique models from the relevant stage. There are designer polarized sunglasses to choose from. If you like Ray-Ban glasses, you will love them. Developer FreezeNova developed this game. What is Next? If you like playing BFFs Summer Aesthetic, you may also enjoy playing Design With Me Fall Sweater . In the game, you help the girls to design their own sweatshirts for the upcoming autumn season! You may look up other online girl games on OnlineGames.io for further options. Additionally, our community is trying to expand its online game range. Please bookmark this website to discover new and thrilling online games easily!

title: Crazy Karts
description: Did you know that most Formula 1 drivers started their careers with Karting? These tiny four-wheeled machines can reach speeds of up to 100 mph. Even though karting is an adrenaline-pumping experience as you drive a lightweight vehicle on a crazy circuit, drivers are open to many safety risks. That's why we bring this experience to the virtual realm. Meet Crazy Karts , a game where you can enjoy the thrill of a speedy race, collect weapons and smash karts of other players. Controls Drive the kart: WASD or the Arrow Keys Fire: Spacebar Multiplayer Karting Adventure You can play Crazy Karts against bots in single-player mode and multiplayer in private and public rooms. To join an existing room, simply enter multiplayer mode and click on join button. Drive through the arena and collect gift boxes to acquire weapons. Weapons can be used only once. And you cannot collect another weapon without using the one you have. Stay safe by avoiding other karts if you don't have any weapon at hand. Eliminate all other karts until you win the game and get to the next level with winners. Create Your Room For a more customized experience, you can create a room. Choose game mode between Free For All Gem Collector Crown Holder You can set either a time limit or score target to rule out how the session will end. Select the preferred number of bots and actual players. Pick a map that suits your taste. Unique maps with excellent themes of Crazy Karts are named as follows: Base Camp Fort Yard Cemetery Ice Rink Customize Karts Each kart smashing will load your pockets with money. Take your coins and head over to the marketplace to customize your driver. Unlock new skins and hats and paint your kart. Keep in mind that crazy hats and skins instinctively intimidate other online players, giving you a great chance to write your name on the leaderboard in future races! Developer FreezeNova created this game. Explore More Games Explore more free online games like Crazy Karts on the driving games page. From transformers to simulators, unique speedy journeys await you on OnlineGames.io! Community Features We value your feedback! Leave an emoji or a comment about what you like or dislike about this game. Share your experience and discuss with fellow gamers all around the world. Contact us via email if you have any issues with loading or gameplay.

title: Papa's Taco Mia
description: What’s a town without a spicy spot? This Papa Louie Arcade adventure puts you behind the counter of Papa’s Taco Mia , where every order is a fiesta. Luckily (or maybe not), you won the taco-eating contest and earned yourself a brand-new job. Now the question is: can you keep up with the hungry crowd and serve tacos good enough to impress every customer? Game Overview In Papa’s Taco Mia , you’ll step into the shoes of Mitch or Maggie in a classic Papa Louie Arcade story: being unlucky by getting lucky! After winning a taco-eating contest, your grand prize is none other than running Papa’s Taco Mia restaurant. Ain’t that something? Now it’s up to you to grill the meat, fill the tortillas, and serve tacos so tasty they’ll make your customers feel like they’re in the heart of Mexico. Upgrade your shop to make cooking easier and faster, unlock fresh ingredients, toppings, and sauces, and meet a colorful cast of customers who will keep you busy with their unique tastes. But be careful ⎼ some picky eaters are harder to please! Make sure their orders are done just right to earn tips. Use that money to buy upgrades, tools, and lobby decorations that make your work smoother and your shop more welcoming. Step by step, you’ll turn Papa’s Taco Mia into the spiciest spot in town! How to Play Papa’s Taco Mia? This game is all about clicking… and tacos! Pay attention to the in-game instructions! Completing the basic training is essential to learn how to grill, fill, and serve the most authentic Mexican tacos. Good to Know! Earn tips and upgrade your kitchen! Extra stoves for faster taco delivery, alarms, and other cooking boosters will make the gameplay smoother. Invest wisely and you’ll see how quickly you can complete your orders. Decorate your shop to improve waiting time! Posters, plants, and other decorative items will help the minutes pass unnoticed. Your customers will be charmed by the amazing ambiance while you cook in peace. Get styled! You can also buy wearables, but these are just for flex and won’t grant you any bonus. Get close to the “Closers”! They’re very picky customers who, if not satisfied, will have the nerve to leave your shop without leaving any tips! Don’t taco ’bout mistakes with the critic! Jojo , the well-known critic, can’t walk past Papa’s taco shop without tasting the food! He’ll notice even the tiniest flaws, so be sure to prepare his order perfectly. Do it right, and you’ll earn a Blue Ribbon that proves your taco shop serves nothing but the finest cuisine! FAQs Will my game progress be saved? Beautiful things take time, just as building your taco empire does! Luckily, the program is flexible, so you can leave the shop anytime and continue right where you left off. All your progress will stay intact, just like the best tacos keep all their tasty layers together! Similar Games If you’re looking to add some sweetness to your life, then we have a question for you: what looks like a taco tortilla but is sweet? Exactly ⎼ a pancake. Luckily, Papa’s Pancakeria is already waiting for you to start a new culinary journey. And if your curiosity knows no limits, our Papa’s Games library is always there to teach you new recipes!

title: World's Hardest Game
description: Oh, you are courageous, aren't you? Well, avid gamer, you asked for it. Here is the World's Hardest Game ever. It's almost impossible to finish all levels. Be warned: You might rage at your keyboard and break a few things after the first hundred attempts. But winning even a few levels feels like... Actually, we don't know how it feels to win the World's Hardest Game (burst into tears), so we cannot describe you. If you trust your gaming skills, maybe you can tell us in the comments, huh? 🥲 What is the World's Hardest Game? World's Hardest Game is a fast-paced obstacle game where you guide a square to the end of the level while avoiding obstacles. The game mechanics are designed to make you rage and quit, so it's better to keep calm and move cautiously. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Navigate the Square How To Play World's Hardest Game Guide the red square to the end of the maze. Use WASD or arrow keys to move the square. Do not touch any obstacles on the way. Collect all yellow coins to complete a level. Analyze patterns of obstacle movements and find the ideal timing to act. Find safe spots to give the square a short break. You'll see some funny discouraging messages between attempts; ignore them for your own sake. The Hardest Level of World's Hardest Game There are 30 levels in World's Hardest Game. Most would say the 30th is the boss level. However, in our opinion, the 26th level is the one that'll cause the most deaths in the game. The obstacles' speed is at its highest at that level. Here is a screenshot of what the hardest level looks like from someone who managed to play all levels. Developer Stephen Critoph created World's Hardest Game. What is Next? If you're wondering what's next, well, the answer depends on how your play went. Did you manage to win or not? A.) I won the World's Hardest Game... Congratulations! Even the game gods worship you! Send us a screenshot and tell us how you managed to defeat it in the comments. We'll grab our popcorn and be ready to read your backstory. We will also give you a crown badge in Disqus if you share the screenshots with us in the comments! (No cheating, guys!) B.) Please Take Me To An Easy Game What were you thinking anyway? We told you it's a hard game. But you were up for sitting on the edge of your seat for hours, breaking keyboards and punching the screen in rage. Anyway, we have dozens of games to relieve the stress on your shoulders. How about a Minecraft session in creative mode or an idle game to regain your self-esteem?

title: Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier
description: Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier is an online simulator game where you can work as a store cashier! When we went to the market as children, we all definitely admired the cashiers who worked there. Now, you can be one of them. Go to the cash register, scan the product barcodes, and take payments in this casual game. Controls Tap and Hold: To scan groceries. Drag: To clean floors, organize shelves. How to Play Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier When you first enter this simulator game, you need to choose a cashier. After your selection, you can go to the cashier’s side! Here, you will scan your customers’ product barcodes and collect the payments. They can pay in cash or by card. But of course, you are not just responsible for the cash register. You are also responsible for the supermarket's order and cleanliness. Manually Enter the Codes When a customer comes to you with his/her shopping cart, take all the groceries from the cart one by one. Scan the barcodes of the products and enter their codes without any mistakes. Don’t worry! You do not need to memorize the codes of each product. You can see their codes on the screen when you scan the barcodes. Arrange the Shelves From time to time, you need to arrange the shelves of many aisles. Especially the fruit and vegetable section. As it is one of the most used sections and needs to be in order. Make sure the watermelons, pears, and apples are where they should be! Shopping Carts After using the shopping carts, most of your customers usually leave the shopping carts in the middle of the parking lot. You need to collect all the shopping carts and return them to their designated areas. Developer Sunday GmbH developed Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier. More Simulator Games If you enjoy playing Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier, you may also like Zero to Millionaire . It is a life simulator game where you need to work hard to get rich. Start from zero, earn money and rise in status by opening businesses. There are many free online games at your disposal on onlinegames.io ! Feel free to look for the simulator games library to try other exciting ones.

title: Sort Resort
description: Pouring colorful liquids from one flask to another all day like a mad scientist… yeah, that’s pretty much what Sort Resort feels like. It’s a satisfying puzzle game where your main goal is to organize messy flasks filled with different colored liquids. These liquids don’t mix —kind of like oil and water— so it’s all about stacking the same colors together until every flask is clean and neat. With increasing difficulties, each level has a special goal. Maybe you'll need to dig a star out from the bottom of a flask, or fill exactly two flasks with purple liquid. That little extra task keeps things interesting and makes you think before you pour. Sort Resort is casual, colorful, family-friendly and super satisfying when everything clicks into place. This is the kind of game that makes sorting oddly fun. Ready to start pouring like a pro? You can play Sort Resort right here at OnlineGames.io. It’s free, it’s online, and it’s perfect when you want a break that still makes your brain work a little. Give it a try, sorting has never been this fun. Controls On Computer: Click a flask to pick it up Click another flask to pour the top liquid into it On Mobile: Tap to select a flask Tap another flask to pour into it How to Play Sort Resort Start with a bunch of flasks filled with layers of liquid in different colors Your job is to group the same colors into one flask without mixing them You can only pour on top of the same color or into an empty flask Some levels add fun goals like freeing hidden objects or filling specific flasks Think a few steps ahead and try not to block yourself Use undo when needed. you can also buy boosters like removing a flask or adding an empty flask. Always look for flasks that are easy wins like ones with the two colors Try to create an empty flask early on. It gives you space to move things around More Relaxing Puzzle Games If you liked this satisfying sorting game, check out other puzzle games like Nuts and Bolts where you remove bolts to drop planks from the platform. It offers that same relaxing-but-addictive puzzle feeling.

title: Fleeing the Complex
description: Henry Stickmin: Fleeing the Complex is a funny adventure story game packed with action, humor, and loads of unexpected twists. It’s the fifth game in the Henry Stickmin series and continues right after Infiltrating the Airship . This time, things get more intense as Henry wakes up inside The Wall (no, not the one on Game of Thrones, but similar concepts) It’s a cold, high-security prison set in the snowy mountains of Canada. This place isn't just any prison. It's where the world’s most dangerous criminals are locked away, and guess what? Henry's just joined them. Honestly, what did he expect? After breaking into a bank, escaping from prison, and stealing a priceless Tunisian diamond, he wasn’t exactly headed for a beach vacation. A cold, heavily-guarded prison complex? Yeah… that sounds about right. But it’s Henry. He cannot wait, hands tied. He must find a way to flee from the complex. And that’s where you start to guide him and determine his fate with your choices. Let’s take a look at how this fifth game starts: The warden, Dmitri J. Petrov, sees Henry as a serious threat in the complex. So he and his right-hand man Grigori toss him into a transfer cell. That’s when the fun begins. With nothing to lose, Henry must figure out how to escape. You, the player, get to make every key decision. Will Henry tackle guards, play dead, call in some big favors, or maybe team up with fellow inmate Ellie Rose? Every choice you make could lead to success... or complete failure (with funny results). Controls Mouse click to choose actions and make decisions How to Play Fleeing the Complex Watch the short intro cutscene. Henry has just arrived at The Wall. When a decision point appears, pick one of the available options. Each choice takes the story in a different direction. Some paths lead to freedom, others to funny fail moments of Henry. If you fail, no worries! You can go back and try a different choice without restarting the whole game. Keep experimenting with different choices to unlock all five main endings: Ghost Inmate, Convict Allies, Presumed Dead, International Rescue Operative, and The Betrayed. Plus, there are over 60 funny fail moments to discover along the way. Who Made Fleeing the Complex? Fleeing the Complex was created by PuffballsUnited, the same developer behind the entire Henry Stickmin series. The game later became part of The Henry Stickmin Collection on PC and consoles, but you can still play this version free online on your browser without flash plugins! All Henry Stickmin Games Online If you want to experience the full Henry Stickmin saga, here’s the official game order. Each game builds on the last, with returning characters, fun callbacks, and evolving storylines based on your choices. Breaking the Bank Where it all begins. Henry tries (and fails) to rob a bank. It’s short, simple, and sets the tone for the series' funny trial-and-error style. Escaping the Prison : After getting caught, Henry finds himself behind bars. Your choices will help him break out. Stealing the Diamond : With freedom comes ambition. Henry sets out to steal a huge diamond from a museum. Expect ridiculous gadgets and even more ridiculous outcomes. Infiltrating the Airship : Henry is hired by the government to take down a group of air pirates. Will he succeed or betray them? You decide. Fleeing the Complex (You're here): Captured again and locked away in a frozen prison fortress, Henry must plan his boldest escape yet. All of these were later combined in The Henry Stickmin Collection for PC, which includes a final sixth game, Completing the Mission, only available in the paid collection. It ties together all your previous choices into one big, action-packed finale. But if you're just looking to play the classic flash games for free, you're in luck! The first five Henry Stickmin games are available to play online for free right here on OnlineGames.io. No download, no cost, just pure chaotic fun. Whether you're here for the crazy escape plans, the funny animations, or just want to see all the ways things can go wrong, Fleeing the Complex is one of the best online games to play for free. Try every path and see if you can help Henry pull off the perfect escape!

title: Davo
description: Davo is an online platformer game where you need to make sudden maneuvers on challenging courses. There are 30 levels, and each is harder than the previous one. If you count on your sharp reflexes and parkouring skills, Davo is the best option for you among many free stickman games online ! Controls W: Jump S: Slide A: Move Left D: Move Right Or, you can use; Up Arrow Key: Jump Down Arrow Key: Slide Left Arrow Key: Move Left Right Arrow Key: Move Right Davo Overview Welcome! It is time to meet with Davo. It’s a stick man. You will be playing the game in its shoes. Take control of the Davo and overcome all obstacles across 30 exciting courses. Keep in mind that the difficulty levels of the courses will increase progressively. You will encounter sharp objects on the road. Davo is very sensitive to the spikes. Even the slightest touch will be enough to start that level from the beginning! Parkour within Davo You will see that each parkour is made with black linings and blocks. Sometimes there will be gaps between two blocks, and you will need to jump over them. Otherwise, you can fall from these gaps into the mystery… And sometimes, a block is covered with sharp points on all sides. Be careful and avoid any contact with the spikes! Customize Your Davo As you run, you will see coins on your way. Collecting them will unlock new costumes for your stickman. There is a menu button with four squares. Click on them to see crazy costumes like Alien Davo, Burning Davo, Davo with a Pumpkin Head, and more. Pick a Crazy Nickname Besides the costumes, you can also pick a nickname for your stickman. With your in-game currencies, you are able to choose one of the craziest player names for Davo. Some of the nicknames are listed below for you! MidnightJellyfish ForsakenFly Sassassin MajesticOwlet ShadyFowl Developer FreezeNova developed Davo. Similar Parkour Games If you enjoy testing your parkour skills, we also recommend checking out Stickman Parkour . Swing on ropes, swim like an Olympian and get the keys at the end of each parkour! For further parkour games online , you’re invited to view our specially created game library.

title: Mope io
description: Survival of the fittest is summed up in a game! Mope.io is a multiplayer survival game where you start as a tiny lil' mouse and work your way up the food chain. 🐭 This io game lets you evolve into stronger animals by eating food and smaller creatures. Becoming the ultimate predator and writing your name on the leaderboard requires survival skills and strategy. The game’s colorful world resembling Taming io is filled with different species, each with its own abilities. Controls Move: Move your mouse. Run: Hold LMB Chat: Enter Dive: W key How to Play Mope io Pick a username, an animal and enter the map. At first, you can only choose small animals like a mouse, desert rat, shrimp, chipmunk or a tarsier. After entering the map, use your mouse to move your animal. Click and hold the left mouse button to boost your speed, which is essential for escaping larger predators or catching smaller prey. Start by consuming food items, such as fruits, meats and smaller animals. Each bite contributes to your XP bar. When your XP bar is full, you can evolve into a stronger species. Over 117 different animals are waiting to be unlocked. And it's not just the skin. Each species has unique abilities that can aid in hunting or running away from danger. Tips and Tricks for Mope io You will consume water as a living animal in Mope io. Keep an eye on your water bar. To refill it, stay in lakes and oceans. Be cautious of animals outlined in red, as they are bigger and pose a threat. If you see one, it's often best to flee. Use your animal's special ability by pressing the 'W key' to gain advantages in hunting. You can hide in holes as temporary shelters, such as underwater or near trees, from predators. However, keep in mind that some stronger animals can force you out. Teaming up can enhance your chances. Press 'Enter' to chat with other players, especially in team mode. Developer Mope io was released in October 2016 by indie developer Stan Tatarnykov. More io Games If you enjoy Mope.io, you might also like EvoWorld.io , which is a similar survival game where you evolve by eating food and other players.

title: Monster Survivors
description: Monster Survivors is an free online survival game with a minimalistic design and roguelite elements. The monsters are here, and you must survive! Aggressive crabs, eerie pumpkins, flesh-eating plants and yes, even evil bees! But on a vast open land, there's no place to run or hide. All you can do is survive as long as you can until waves of monsters end your struggles. Gather loot in each run to buy upgrades, strengthen your survivor and help the next survivor stand longer. Controls Movement: Simply drag your mouse to move around the battlefield. How to Play Monster Survivors At the beginning of Monster Survivors, choose your weapon based on your preferred playstyle: Steel Sword: Ideal for those who like to be in the thick of the action, slashing through enemies up close. Wooden Wand: Perfect for players who prefer to attack from a distance with magical blasts. Survival involves more than just fighting; you must also collect loot dropped by defeated enemies to gain experience and power up. Standing still isn't an option, as you need to continuously move to scoop up valuable XP and avoid getting overwhelmed. You can choose to run in big circles to keep enemies at bay while allowing you to collect XP efficiently. When boss enemies appear, the play area will shrink. Be ready to dodge and fight in tighter spaces. Monster Survivors features two distinct maps, each populated with unique monsters: Dreamy Woods: Start your survival quest among hauntingly beautiful yet dangerous paths. Shade Palace: Unlock this map by advancing far enough in Dreamy Woods, where even greater threats await. When you get defeated, don’t worry, not everything goes to waste. Grab your gold coins and upgrade the survivors' armor, healing, damage and health levels in the main menu. These upgrades will stay persistent between sessions. The upgraded skills pass the next survivor to start a game strong. You can also unlock new characters, such as mages and warriors with higher health and damage ratios in the main menu. Game Features Rogulite Gameplay: Engage in non-stop action where every move and decision impacts your survival. Upgrade System: During the game, as you collect XP, unlock enhancements that improve your attack power, speed, and survivor durability. Boss Fights: Encounter intense boss battles that force you into close combat, testing your dodging skills and strategy in restricted spaces. Developer Monster Survivors is brought to you by FreezeNova. More Survival Games Online If you're looking for a casual roguelike RPG, Monster Survivors is the game you should play. In case you already played it and craving for more, try our new online survival games where strategy and quick decisions are key to surviving endless waves of enemies.

title: Merge Brainrot
description: How many Italian Brainrot characters can fit in a glass tank? Play and find out for yourself! Get ready to be brain-rotted: drop characters, merge them, and create even more absurd and hilarious ones, while also learning some fun Italian words. See how two Cappuccino Assassinos create a Boneca Ambalabu , and keep discovering even more crazy combinations ⎼ but be careful to not overflow the tank! Game Overview Merge Brainrot is a game that captures the viral TikTok brainrot meme vibe and turns it into fun merging gameplay. How to Play Merge Brainrot? Grab a character and drag it: click and hold the left mouse button. Release it: let go of the mouse button to drop the character. Merge identical characters, unlock surprises and score points: when two identical characters collide, they create a new, bigger and sillier one. The more merges you make, the higher your score will get. Merging Mechanics Explained Merging games are simple yet strategic: grab a character, drag and drop it, then watch identical ones collide and merge into something bigger. Plan your moves carefully, keep an eye on the next character in line, and if the container gets too full, use the Shake feature (if available) to rearrange the characters and trigger new merges. Good to Know! Follow the evolution ladder: use it as a guide to see what comes next (e.g., two Frigo Camelos merge into a Trulimero Trulichina ). Be careful! Don’t let the characters overflow the glass tank. Place characters wisely to make room for future merges. To avoid filling the glass tank to the limit, you can click the Shake feature to rearrange the existing characters. And if you still lose, you can click Revive and keep growing your score! Notable Brainrot Icons The game features a wide variety of Italian Brainrot icons, but some of the most notable include: Tralalero Tralala – a three-legged shark in blue Nike sneakers, the genre’s mascot. Cappuccino Assassino – a cappuccino cup wielding twin katanas. Tung Tung Tung Sahur – a bat-shaped Ramadan night caller with a bat. Bombardiro Crocodilo – a WWII bomber with a crocodile’s head. Boneca Ambalabu – a frog with a car tire body, no arms, and human legs. Frigo Camelo – a camel with a fridge body and oversized boots. La Vaca Saturno – a surreal cow with cosmic, Saturn-like features. FAQs Is Merge Brainrot safe for kids? There may be mentions of violence, but trust us, Merge Brainrot is safe for kids and consists of humor revolving around these animal-object hybrids. Does the game need WiFi? The game needs WiFi to start; however, once it has been loaded on your browser, it is not required to keep the connection running. However, you will not be able to use the revive or shake features without WiFi. Will there be more characters in the game, or just the ones we see on the ladder? Kudos to you if you recognize the iconic Italian Brainrot characters featured in the game ⎼ but don’t worry, there’s more! New surprises are loaded within the game, with colorful graphics, lively animations, and each merged character bringing its own unique voice and sound. Similar Games Love that easy merge gameplay? Then Watermelon Game is the perfect way to test your skills with a new game ⎼ and the best part is, you can enjoy it all year long, because who says watermelon is only for summer?

title: Solitaire
description: "Emma's afternoon hit a wall at exactly 3:17 PM. Her inbox chimed again, another urgent task from her manager. Minimized the spreadsheet and opened Solitaire on OnlineGames.io. The familiar green-felt background blinked to life. She took a slow sip of her iced latte from Dunkin'. The first shuffle felt like a deep breath. One by one, she moved cards to the foundation, each small stack a tiny win. Outside the window, a freight train rumbled past, and she almost missed it, lost in the shuffle of aces and kings. Her coworker, Max, dropped by with a question about quarterly targets. Emma smiled politely, trying to cover his screen, handed off the task, and then slipped back to her game. She tapped the screen faster now, racing to clear the deck before her fifteen-minute break ended. Her heart gave a little skip when the last card flipped into place. A perfect sweep. She leaned back, chest light as if she'd conquered something bigger than a simple deal. Back at her desk, she reopened that spreadsheet. The numbers looked friendlier now." This story comes from one of our players on OnlineGames.io (we've tweaked names and a few details to keep her privacy, but the feeling is all theirs). As she says, "Sometimes, all it takes is a quiet moment and a deck of cards to turn the tide of a long workday." Just like Emma, you can step away from the buzz and dive into that calming world of solitaire cards. Head over to OnlineGames.io to deal with your first hand and see how a simple deck of cards can brighten any day. Solitaire is a fun card game where you sort all 52 cards into four piles, one for each suit, from Ace up to King. Every time you clear a card, it feels like a small victory, just like Emma felt when she finished her break. If you're a newbie, it's okay. We explained everything you must know as simply as possible. Keep reading to learn the rules. Controls Click the stock pile (top left) to flip a new card. Click or drag cards to move them between piles. Double-click a card to send it to its foundation pile if it fits. Rules Make four foundations, one per suit (♥♦♣♠), stacking Aces first, then 2, 3, and so on up to King. On the tableau (the seven columns in the center), build downward in numbers and alternate colors (red on black, black on red). Only a King (or a stack starting with a King) can go into an empty column slot. Use the stock (face-down deck) to draw new cards when you can't move on the tableau. Win by moving every card into the four foundation piles. How to Play Solitaire Look at the cards you can see on the table and in the flipped pile. Move cards by clicking or dragging: you can only put a red card on a black card or a black on a red, and the numbers must go down by one (for example, put a red 5 on a black 6). If you uncover an Ace, it 'll be automatically moved to one of the four empty spots at the top. When you flip a card from the face-down deck, look if it fits on the table or on the foundations. If it fits, click or drag it there. If you clear a whole column, only a King (or a King-led stack) can go into that empty spot. Keep doing this: flip cards, move cards, and sort them into the top piles. You win when all cards end up in the four piles, from Ace up to King. If you get stuck, click on the undo button to try a new approach or click on the new game to start fresh. Make a Wish Have you ever heard that each round of Solitaire is a small test of fate? Before you start the game, think of one simple wish. Anything from "I hope I ace tomorrow's presentation" to "I wish for a sunny weekend." Then play as you normally would. If you clear the deck, legend says your wish is on its way to coming true. If you get stuck and can't finish, well… maybe it's a gentle nudge to try again later. Give it a go and see what the cards decide. You can even play Loves Me Loves Me Not with your solitaire outcome. It's up to your creativity to make the game even more exciting. And hey, please let us know Solitaire knew your fate in the comments below! In case you enjoy this card-sorting game but need a fresh twist, try Klondike Solitaire on OnlineGames.io a free browser game that uses the same green felt backdrop, familiar rules, and one-deck shuffle to deliver endless relaxing fun. What is Solitaire? Solitaire is a one player card game. You start with a shuffled deck and move cards between piles following simple rules. Your goal is to build four piles from Ace up to King. How do I play Solitaire on OnlineGames.io? Click “New Game” to shuffle and lay out seven tableau piles. Drag a face-up card (or a group in sequence) onto another tableau pile if it alternates color and steps down in rank (for example, red 6 on black 7). Click Aces to move them to the top (or use auto collect), then add 2, 3, 4 up to King in each suit. Click the stock pile to reveal new cards one by one. Keep going until all cards are in the foundation piles or no more moves are possible. How do I win at Solitaire? You win by moving every card into the four foundation piles (one per suit), each stacked from Ace through King. A game ends when no cards remain on the tableau, stock, or waste. Is Solitaire a game of skill or luck? Solitaire combines both.It takes skills as deciding which moves to make, when to draw from the stock, and how to uncover hidden cards. But it also takes some luck as the initial shuffle affects how many cards are accessible early on. If one of your aces are stuck deep in the tableu, it's hard to win such a round. But you can improve solitaire skills to overcome tough shuffles. How Can I win more often in Solitaire ? First try to find the aces and twos. Then move cards that uncover face-down cards first. Try not to empty a pile if you don't have a King ready to place. Use the undo button and try different moves and backtrack if you get stuck. What does Draw 1 and Draw 3 mean? Draw 1: Clicking the stock deals one card to the waste at a time. Draw 3: Clicking the stock deals three cards at once in a small stack. Only the top card is playable until you draw again. Draw 1 is easier; Draw 3 is more challenging. The Solitaire version on this page uses Draw 1 approach, so you can clear cards easier. Can I undo a move? Yes. Click the Undo button at any time to reverse your last move. Click on redo move it again. Is Solitaire free to play? Yes, Solitaire on OnlineGames.io is 100 % free. And OnlineGames.io doesn't ask for sign-ups or downloads. Just load the page and click “New Game.” Do I need an internet connection? You need an internet connection to pay the Solitaire Online game. Can I play Solitaire on my phone or tablet? Yes, our Solitaire game is responsive to both desktop and mobile. Use touch or mouse controls exactly the same way.

You can even build a shelter with wood to protect yourself. Gather the necessary things from the playground and try to survive in this scratch game version of the popular Fortnite! Or hang out on the Exploration and Online Playground maps freely. 🗡️ How to Play Fortnite Z? There are 3 game modes in Fortnite Z: Exploration Mode, Online Playground and Battle Royale. Each comes with unique features. Choose the game mode you want to play, and go have fun! When you start to play, you will be flying over the game map you choose in the Tac-Z. Press the Space key to leave the Tac-Z and land somewhere on the ground using your glider. Exploration Mode If this is your first time playing Fortnite Z, this is the perfect place to start. Exploration mode enables you to act freely as there are no enemies. You do not need to protect yourself here. Explore the cartoonish game map, weapons and other tools. You need to be fast in order to find weapons and ammo; otherwise, the other players will not let you get the things that will keep you alive! Search the buildings to find useful stuff, and open the chests to get ammo. You may find some chests locked. Open them by using your gun. Eliminate enemies one by one with your weapons when you encounter them. But be careful not to die. Check your health bar in the upper right corner. If this bar drops to zero, you will be eliminated. If you get hit, use the fish and fruits to replenish your health. Using wood, you can turn some areas in the map into a shelter. You must chop logs with a sword or hammer to do that. Press the F key to build a shelter when you find a proper place. Remember that you can not stay in the purple zone. Your health drops in this area. Avoid this zone as much as possible. Buy the ones you love the most. Our favorite skin is the Oreo-shaped avatar. You can find other skins like an ice cube, 8-ball or a lightbulb. You can also renew the glide you use to land on the game maps from this section. You may find a Raven glider, a Mini Tac-Z, a Gold Bar, and other creative gliders at your disposal. You have the option to sell your purchased outfits. Controls To move, use the WASD keys. To look around, use the mouse. To shoot, use the mouse click. To pick up things, use the E key. To build shelter, use the F key. Developer Fortnite Z is created by FunnyAnimatorJimTV. Similar Scratch Games If you are a fan of Fortnite Z, you will love Getting Over It . title: Geometry Escape
description: Geometry Escape is an excellent choice for gamers looking for a skill game challenge, especially if you enjoy fast-paced platformers similar to Geometry Dash. It's an online platformer game where you guide a cube on an obstacle course. The cube moves automatically at a certain speed, and you'll control the jumps and flights to avoid obstacles on your path. In this, you will need right-in-time jumps and quick reflexes. The absence of checkpoints makes every level a test of skill and patience, pushing you to learn from each attempt rather than just progressing through trial and error. Controls Computers: Press or hold the spacebar or left-click to jump and fly. Mobile: Tap and hold the screen to jump and fly. How to Play Geometry Escape Your cube moves forward automatically. Your role is to control the vertical movement. Stay alert. The game doesn't wait for you, so quick reactions to changing environments are essential. Avoid obstacles like spikes, pits and chainsaws. Time your jumps to avoid these. Practice levels to understand the rhythm of obstacles. Each level might introduce new mechanics or combine them in unique ways. Adaptability is crucial. In rocket sections, hold to fly through narrow corridors, dodging obstacles. The game flips the gravity on some levels, requiring you to adapt your jumping strategy. Speed Boosts will increase your speed, making timing even more critical. Collect coins to customize your skin, rocket and more. 30 levels with increasing difficulty are waiting to be conquered! Have fun dashing! Editor's Review In summary, Geometry Escape would be particularly appealing if you're in the mood for something that tests your timing and reflexes without letting up. It's a game that rewards persistence and precision, potentially leading to that rewarding "one more try" loop where each successful level feels like an achievement. If you're looking for a game to sharpen your reaction times or just need a good stress test for your focus, this could be your next obsession. Developer Geometry Escape is developed by FreezeNova. title: Paper Planets
description: Paper Planets is an IO game where you, as a colorful cube, try to establish your territory as much as possible by sliding on the playing field. There will also be many players near you.
