Controls To move your planet, use the WASD keys or the arrow keys. You can also use your mouse cursor to navigate the planet. Use your touchscreen to steer the planet on your mobile. How to Play Paper Planets First, you will need a unique name to play the game. Insert your nickname into the empty box on the main menu. Now, you are ready to get your territory by drawing lines and establishing the area. You will have a small planet. Master navigating your planet and establish your kingdom by drawing lines. You must get back to your starting point to claim your territory. Basics of the Paper Planets You must circle back to your starting point to claim your territory. Conquering more areas is the key to getting the highest score in the game. When you eliminate rivals, their territory disappears automatically. Do not let other players bite your tail, or you will be eliminated. When you get the chance, catch your rivals' tails to wipe them out. Also, you should not bite your tail. Or else you will take your own life. You can change your controls in the settings section from the menu. Establish Your Paper Kingdom Use your mouse to direct your square. You must determine your area. Your planet will leave traces as it is moving. Mark your territory by returning your starting point. A pro tip from us: move cautiously without going too far in the beginning, as you will be open to attacks from other squares. Guard Your Tail When a square touches your tail, you will fail the game. So, give weight to not expose your tail too long outside your land. But, likewise, when you catch an enemy whose tail is out, use your chance to eliminate him from the playing field. Do Not Swallow Your Tail As other players can catch your tail, you may also accidentally swallow your own! Biting your tail will cause you to lose the game. Therefore, we recommend that you do not let this happen. Do not swallow your tail! Explore Other IO Games If you enjoy playing Paper Planets IO, you may also like WormsZone.io . Perform front or back flips during big jumps to earn 3 bonus coins for each one. If your truck lands upside down and stays flipped, your health bar drains fast. title: Race Clicker: Drift Max
description: Click! Click the gas in Race Clicker: DRIFT MAX ! And watch your car rocket off the line! In this wild drift game, the formula is simple: tapping speed = car's speed . So go click to build up speed, drift through corners, and knock down rivals! This free online game is a curious mash-up of a racing simulator and a clicker mechanic, and it actually works surprisingly well. It's all about racking up speed with frantic clicks (or space bar taps) before each race, then diving headlong into high-octane drifts to knock rivals off the road. And please, please believe us, one second you’re tapping your mouse, thinking this is just another mid clicker game. And the next thing you know, you're drifting around corners like some over-caffeinated stunt driver. If you love browser games that let you earn, upgrade, and race like there's no tomorrow, you're in for a real treat at OnlineGames.io. Controls Click or tap to speed up Press AD or the left and right arrow keys to steer How to Play Race Clicker: DRIFT MAX To jump right in, start by clicking on your car repeatedly or hitting space. Each click increases your speed for the upcoming race and also earns you some money. This is the core of the clicker style. Once you're ready, hit the race button. Now, your car zooms onto the track, and you'll see rival racers fighting for the top spot. Steer your car with the A and D keys, drift around corners, and try to crash into your opponents to gain the upper hand. Enemies will also aim your car, catch up to you, and knock you down. So show them who's boss on the track. The faster you go, the more likely you'll knock down other racers and score big bonuses. After each race, you can use your earnings to buy upgrades that will help you race even better next round. Keep an eye on your fuel tank, boost your top speed, and raise your income multiplier so you can earn more money from each click. Tips for Race Clicker: DRIFT MAX Clicking faster at the start means a huge speed boost. Don't be shy about hammering that mouse or space bar. Just, just don't break it, okay? You might need that keyboard later. It's tempting to go straight for speed, but don't forget your fuel tank and income multiplier. You need enough stamina to finish the race and enough profit to keep leveling up. Target racers that are slower or closer to you first. Building confidence by knocking a few off the track can give you the momentum you need for the rest. You can track enemies on the bar at the top of the screen. The races mostly take place on straight tracks, so you'll not need intense formula-like steering anyway. Try gentle taps on the A and D keys to find the sweet spot around each turn. Or you might crash and slow down. Developer Race Clicker: DRIFT MAX was created by DAPALAB and released in 2024. Drift Games Get your engine fired up, click your way to unstoppable speed, and show the competition who rules the track in Race Clicker: DRIFT MAX. title: F1 Drift Racer

In our opinion, utilizing the drift points strategically to leave your competitors behind is one of the best tactics. You can avoid them by passing through these places in a controlled but fast manner. Since these points are slowing points, you can turn them to your advantage. title: Run Away 3
description: Are you ready to run unlimitedly in space as a little alien? Run Away 3 is a 3D running game where you run endlessly as an extraterrestrial in a galactic tunnel full of hazards. title: 12 MiniBattles
description: We often get stuck in never-ending debates with no one willing to back down. Think about how many times you've heard these familiar phrases until today: You've had the computer for hours. It's my turn! It's your turn to take out the trash, I did it last time! You said you'd walk the dog today! I turned off the lights last night; it's your turn tonight. No, not burgers again. Let's try something new! And how do you settle these decisions? By playing the same old rock-paper-scissors? We have a better idea! Enter 12 MiniBattles ! This online 2-player game allows you to resolve any debate in minutes. You'll play a random game among 42 mini-games, each testing different skills: speed, button-bashing, accuracy, timing, and precision. And if you think it's unfair because one of you has more gaming skills, think again! Because no one can master them all! Every game is quick, 1v1, and controlled with just one button. Ready to settle the score once and for all? This is the game for you! Play 12 MiniBattles now on OnlineGames.io! Controls Computers: Player 1: Press A to control your character. Player 2: Press L to control your character. Mobiles: Player 1: Tap the A button on the screen. Player 2: Tap the L button on the screen. How to Play 12 Mini Battles Start by clicking Play to begin a random mini-game. The game will choose one among 42 mini-games. Each game challenges you in different ways. Some of them are as follows: Copters: Race to rescue survivors—precision matters because copters move so fickle! Zombies: Be the first to reach the humans—button-mashing is key. Almost like a clicker game. Paintball and Duel: Test your aim and accuracy. Golf and Swords: Master timing and precision. Red Hands: Slap your opponent's hand at just the right moment. Arrows: Be the first to pop 5 balloons with sharp precision and timing. Pac Battle: Eat all the fruits faster than your friend. Win as many mini-games as you can to settle the score once and for all! Developer 12 MiniBattles was developed by Shared Dreams. More Games Like This If you love 1vs1 games online we have a whole section for it. Have a look at the 2 Player games online and pick a title among soccer, wrestling matches, racing and duels. The boredom gets the back seat here. Have fun! title: Rainbow Obby Parkour
description: Rainbow Obby Parkour is a platformer game that has the wackiest, most colorful obstacle courses ever. With four hilariously fun modules that'll keep you on your toes (or wheels or ball, depending on the level). It's like Roblox's greatest hits wrapped up in one wild ride. And you can dive into it play right here on OnlineGames.io for free! Controls On PC: Use the WASD keys to move your character around. Press the spacebar to jump over hurdles. Move your mouse to look around. M key to access to skin shop R key to refresh your position Q key to mute/unmute sounds Hit the Escape key to pause or access the menu. On Mobile: Use the joystick on the left side to move your character around. Swipe on the right side to control the camera view. Tap the jump button in the bottom-right corner to leap over obstacles. Access the menu or pause by tapping the button in the top-left corner. How To Play Rainbow Obby Parkour As you load the game, you'll see four different mods: classic, car, bike and ball obstacle courses. Pick one and get playing. Run, drive or climb and jump over hurdles to reach the last flag. If you fall off from the platform, you'll start from the previous checkpoint. You can track how much of the courses you completed on the main menu. Obby, But Are You a Ball, Car or a Bike? Each of the game modes offers a different kind of challenge on Rainbow Obby Parkour. They are as follows: Classic Obby: A good ol' throwback to classic Roblox parkour. It's all about timing your jumps and anticipating traps. Dodge traps, leap over obstacles and keep your cool as the platform cranks up the difficulty. You've got this... maybe. Car Obby: Strap in and brace yourself for insane tracks filled with sharp turns, crazy jumps, and more surprises than your favorite mystery movie. Can you drive your way to victory without flipping over? (Spoiler: probably not on the first try.) Bike Obby: Channel your inner stunt pro as you pedal, jump, and trick your way through a long and tough course. Don't forget to adjust your camera view strategically to plan your next move. Rolling Ball Obby: Become a rolling champion! Navigate tracks as a physics-defying ball, bouncing, zooming, and occasionally flinging yourself into the void. (Pro tip: watch out for the edges.) Here, speed is your friend, but control is your bestie. The best part is the ball looks like the head of your avatar. How wacky is that? More Roblox Games Not only is Rainbow Obby Parkour a blast, but it's also free to play. Whether you're just looking for the perfect way to procrastinate or need a break between all your chores, OnlineGames.io is where it's at. Plus, if you're a fan of Roblox-like games online , this one is sure to hit the spot. So, are you ready to conquer every wacky course this game throws at you? Jump in now and show the world what you've got! 🌈

title: Neon Racer
description: Neon Racer is the perfect game you are addicted to adrenaline. We have prepared 30 levels and modern neon visuals that will give you the ultimate racer experience. Complete the levels by overcoming the obstacles, collecting diamonds and without crushing the bike. Change the speed depending on what's coming next on your way. You have the opportunity to buy different types of motorbikes with the collected diamonds. Neon Racer Controls A/D or left/right arrows to control bike W or up arrow to jump

title: Baby Doll House Cleaning
description: Toys are scattered around. Dust, stains, and cobwebs are everywhere. You know how hard it is to live with a toddler. They have made quite a mess of the house! Cleaning up after a baby is a full-time job with overtime and no breaks. So do not waste your time! Give it a thorough rub, wipe and tidy up the space. Start with the babies' room and clean up, declutter and organize the whole house step by step. Baby Doll House Cleaning is a decluttering and organizing game for all ages. The doll house has 8 rooms: a bathroom, kitchen and playrooms included. Tap on brushes and sponges to clean, throw away trash, and drag every item to its own place. Start sweeping in the Baby Doll House Cleaning game! How to Play Baby Doll House Cleaning Eight levels with cleaning and organizing puzzles are available in the Baby Doll House Cleaning game. Levels are the kids' bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living room, study room, playroom, closets and toiletries, respectively. Start Cleaning You will see a sponge, brush and wipe cloth on the left of your screen. Scrub floors, wipe dust, and clean cobwebs with cleaning tools. Throw away the trash by dragging items to the bin. Tidy Up the Mess Hang or fold the clothes and place them in drawers or closets. When the closets are full, the doors will close. Every item has its own place. Place all in the correct spots to finish a level. The clock is ticking. Finish all the cleaning tasks in a room before time runs out. Tips for a Clean House As you clean each room, make sure to pay attention to detail and get rid of any unnecessary items. Fix uneven picture frames and lamps. Organize toys, clothes, and other belongings in their designated spots to create a neat and tidy living space. Don't forget to clean the windows, wipe down surfaces, and vacuum the floors for a sparkling finish. With each room you clean, you'll feel a sense of accomplishment. So roll up your sleeves, grab a sponge, and get ready to make the baby doll house shine! Check how many tasks are left on the sidebar. When you get stuck, tap on the hint button to see a picture of the room's final version. Baby Doll House Cleaning is not just a game but a fun way to practice cleaning habits. This game will guide you on how to declutter and clean a home and help you keep your living space in order. Remember to enjoy the refreshing feel of cleaning a house up and over while playing this organizing game. Controls Mouse: Click and drag items Touchscreen: Tap and drag items More Organizing Games A clean home is a happy home. If you like cleaning games online, head over to Unpacking for more puzzles similar to Baby Doll House Cleaning. Great puzzle games await you at OnlineGames.io; feel free to discover other games and tags, play, have fun and share the joy with others!

title: Burger Empire
description: Burger Empire is a 3D tycoon game where you build up your own restaurant chain! Start from scratch and create your own McDonald’s by mastering restaurant management skills. Hire employees, get new seats for your customers and serve the best hamburgers in your town. Expand your restaurant to accommodate more customers! 🍔 Controls WASD/Arrow Keys: Move Your Character To move, you can also use the virtual joystick on the screen. On smartphones and tablets, you can use the touch screen controls. Burger Empire Overview Ready to dive into building up your hamburger restaurant? Start by getting an oven to prepare hamburgers. Then, head to have seats for your customers. As you make progress, place tables and chairs in the suitable areas. This way you can accept more customers! The more customers you have, the more money you will make in this business management simulator game. Your priority is to increase the profits while serving the juicy burgers. Hire Waiters 👨‍🍳 You must hire waiters after talking with your accountant. As your customer count increases, you need help delivering hamburgers and throwing trash into the trash can. As you know, customers generally do not like being waited on! They get impatient easily. You will see an angry face emoji in a bubble above their heads when their patience runs out. Unlock the Courier 🚲 Unlocking the Courier section for home delivery doubles your earnings. When you have this section, another employee will deliver orders on time by motorbike. Do not forget to prepare the hamburgers and hand them over to the courier for home delivery! Upgrade the Move Speed & Capacity 👟 To increase your employees' serving capacity and speed, talk to your accountant. You can also upgrade your own player’s serving abilities. Thus, your customers’ orders will be fulfilled without any delay. And, they will leave your restaurant with a big smile on their faces! Developer NovaSky published the Burger Empire. More Games Like This If you enjoy playing business management games like this, you may also try playing Fast Food Manager . This time, you will not only prepare juicy burgers but also delicious Italian pizzas and French fries! For more options, feel free to visit our Tycoon Games Online game category.

title: Doggo Clicker
description: Your little puppy needs a cozy home, and guess what? You're the one to build a nice kennel! Doggo Clicker is a 2D idle game where you shower an adorable doggo with love as you click to boost his mood. It's all about collecting those bark coins. Use your coins to pamper your pet with new accessories like new hats, glasses, and shoes. Plus, you can design the perfect home for your furry friend. Doggo Clicker is an idle game that animal lovers have been waiting for since forever! Controls Computers Mouse click to earn bark coins and interact Mobiles Tap on the doggo to collect bark coins and interact with upgrades. How to Play Doggo Clicker In Doggo Clicker, your main job is to click on your dog to improve their mood and earn coins. Use these coins to purchase fun accessories like eyeglasses, hats and even tiny little shoes for the cutest paws ever. Increase your coin per click (CPC) and coins per second (CPS) with upgrades on the right side. There are over 50 upgrades that you can buy one buy one or in bulk. When your dog reaches level 100, unlock Prestige, which resets some progress but boosts future earnings. Want to go further? Rebirth your dog and reset after earning massive amounts of coins for even more power. Build a Kennel Lil' pup deserves the perfect home. You'll make that happen with your hard-earned bark coins! To start building, simply click on the house icon located at the bottom right of your dog. From there, every time you click on the build icon, you will buy materials one by one. But, each purchase will make the next one more expensive. So you need to work hard. Begin by constructing walls to give your pup a safe space, then add a roof to keep them dry and cozy. Finish it off with a welcoming door to complete your kennel. Once you complete the dog house, you can change its look. Completing the dog house boosts your doggo's mood and improves your earnings even further. Developer Doggo Clicker was developed by Denis Olenison. Can I play Doggo Clicker on mobiles? Yes, you can play Doggo Clicker on mobiles, including iOS, Android, ChromeOS. More Games Like This If you enjoy Doggo Clicker, try other fun idle games like Capybara Clicker Pro , where you unlock all kinds of cute little Capybaras!

title: Barry Prison Christmas Adventure
description: Barry Prison Christmas Adventure is an online escape game in which you take the role of either the hider or the seeker. Choose your preferred game scenario: Chase Mode or Evade Mode. Find such a perfect spot to hide that the seeker is not able to find you! Or you may try to identify all the players as the seeker. 🤫 Controls WASD Keys: Move Spacebar: Jump E Key: Switch/Attack R Key: View Left-Shift: Run How to Play Barry Prison Christmas Adventure In this escape game, you will either be the one chasing or the one running and hiding! There are two game modes to choose from: the Chase Mode and the Evade Mode. In the Chase Mode, you need to find a spot to hide from the seeker. You will take the shape of an object to hide. Press the E key to switch between the object and the character. In the Evade Mode, you are the seeker who tries to find the players. Once you spot a player, press E to attack them. Transform into an Object 👁 Chase Mode requires you to take the form of a specific object, such as a garbage bin or a gift box. Try to find a place to fit in properly and cover yourself up from the seeker. The seeker should not be able to find you easily! Otherwise, they attack to eliminate you. To confuse the seeker’s mind, you can change the object you fit in. Click on the “Transform” button to change it. Collect the Seals 🧙‍♂️ There are seals on the floors to collect. Move towards any seal and wait for 3 seconds before picking it up. Meanwhile, make sure that the boss is far away from you. As long as you collect all three seals, you can seal up the boss! Press the “Seal” button on the lower right corner of the screen. Once the seal-up process is complete, you have defeated the seeker. Developer YAD.com developed the Barry Prison Christmas Adventure. You May Also Like If you enjoyed playing Barry Prison Christmas Adventure, you may also try Obby Prison Escape . Help Noob break away from the prison of Barry. For additional options, please visit our Escape Games Online game category by following the link! If you have a wishlist or suggestions, do not hesitate to contact us .

title: VSCO Girl Aesthetic
description: VSCO Girl Aesthetic is a fun makeup and dress-up game where you can create the popular VSCO looks! Inspired by the popular photo editing and sharing app VSCO’s chic, minimalist style, this game lets you transform four cute girls into fashion icons. Each model features trendy VSCO aesthetics—think oversized sweaters, scrunchies, and a polished but effortless vibe. Unlock models one by one by completing stylish transformations and showcase your flair for the latest fashion trends! Controls Computers Click to select and apply makeup and clothing. Mobiles Tap to choose makeup, outfits, and accessories. How To Play VSCO Girl Aesthetic Begin by choosing the first model to style. Each model reflects a different aspect of the VSCO aesthetic. Use a variety of makeup options, including foundation, eyeshadow, eyeliner, and lipstick, to achieve a flawless look that complements their VSCO style. Each girl has a different skin tone and hair color, so pay attention to their color pallet during the makeup. Pick from a selection of trendy outfits and accessories, such as oversized sweaters, graphic tees, overalls, and colorful scrunchies. Drag and drop these items onto the model to create a complete outfit. Access all VSCO-inspired outfits and accessories with each new model, including trendy hats, layered necklaces, and cute backpacks. Complete the look for the first model to unlock the next one. Each new model introduces new fashion statement. Stay on-trend with VSCO fashion. Share With Us We’d love to see your stylish creations! Save your favorite looks by taking a screenshot. Then, share screenshots of your favorite looks in the comments section and show off your VSCO fashion expertise. Developer FreezeNova created this game. More Fashion Games Online Enjoy more fashion and makeup fun with concepts such as first date, back-to-school, insta influencers and many more.. Explore all dress-up games online that you can play right on your browser without downloading!

title: What Should I Play?
description: Do you ever feel overwhelmed when you need to make a decision among hundreds of options? It's completely understandable to hesitate to pick a title in a sea of online games. That's why we've created a simple seven-question quiz to understand your gaming preferences and suggest one that perfectly suits your gamer personality. We're excited to help you discover the perfect game that matches your unique style and preferences. This " What Game Should I Play? " quiz will point you to a game that you'll love, whether you're into action games, puzzles, creative building games, or high-speed racing. How It Works This quiz is designed to be quick, fun, and easy to navigate. You'll answer a series of questions about your habits and preferences. Each question will help us narrow down the type of game that's perfect for you. Simply click the "Next" and "Previous" buttons to move through the questions. Once you've answered all the questions, we'll provide you with a game recommendation that suits your preferences. Each recommendation comes with a link that you can click to start playing the game right away. Our quiz is a fun and engaging way to find new games that you might not have discovered otherwise. Enjoy taking the quiz and happy gaming! How to Find A Game That Perfectly Suits You In case you'd like to keep searching for your perfect title without holding onto quiz results, here is what you should pay attention to before making any decision about your next play. Gameplay Preferences First, decide on the genre you're seeking. Do you love fast-paced action and explosions? Or do you prefer games that make you think and strategize? Perhaps you are into sandbox games where you build and create. You can see all genres on this page to get an idea. While answering this, it's also important to understand your preferences in game settings, such as sci-fi, fantasy, realistic and others. Playing Alone or with Others The second question to ask yourself is whether you want to play solo, a local two-player game or an online multiplayer game. Keep in mind that some games can be enjoyed both ways. Narrow down your options after deciding on this. If all options work for you, skip this step and answer the following question. Session Length Session length is one of the most crucial questions to ask yourself. What are your plans for next few hours? How much time you usually spend time on gaming on a typical day? 5-10 mins: If you're up for a fun and short game that you'll grasp the gameplay in seconds, you should search some casual and fun games or destruction games. These games mostly showcases arcade characteristics and they are fun and easy to play in a short break. 30 minutes - 1 hour: This is a great period of time for a couple of rounds in an immersive shooter game . Just enough to play in an arcade doom, FFA or Gun Game room. If you'd like to build a character where you unlock new weapons and armor, you might need a little more time than 1 hour. 1-2 hours: Perfect amount of time for puzzles and strategy games . You can also make a good start in an idle game in 1-2 hours. +2 hours: Wonderful, avid gamer! You're probably ready for an intense building session in a Minecraft game where you discover new worlds, explore new crafting recipes and build a dream castle! Graphics Choice Finally, make a decision on your preference for game graphics. Do you prefer 2D or 3D graphics, or are you comfortable with either? This decision also highly depends on the device you're playing. Is it a mobile device or a computer? Is your internet connection speed enough for realistic 3D visuals? Your answer will ensure you find a game with the visual style you enjoy. What’s More? Feel free to explore our website for more exciting games and content. If you'd like to play a random game, open the menu bar from the left side of your screen and click random game at the bottom. And our Gamie will pick a random game with over 500 titles on OnlineGames.io. We are constantly updating our collection to bring you the best online gaming experiences. Keep coming back to find fresh games each week!

title: TileMan.io
description: TileMan.io is a multiplayer strategy game where you begin with a small territory. You need to navigate the map, convert the blocks into the same color as you and make yourself bigger. It will be like a snake body behind you, if somebody hit you, the game is over for you. There are 3 servers : • America • Europe • East Asia There are 5 game modes : • Classic • Extreme speed • No kills • Rats • Arena TileMan.io Controls : • WASD or arrow keys to move • E, P, or numpad 5 to stop the movement • Space, Z, X to communication signals • F to alternative fullscreen • Esc - Exit game

title: Rummy Multiplayer
description: Rummy Multiplayer is a card game you can play with friends up to 4 people. You will be dealt a certain number of cards once the game starts. Create valid sets or sequences with all your cards, place them down and be the winner! It is as simple as that! Follow through the tutorial or read the guidelines below to adjust into Rummy! Basic Rummy Rules You can play Rummy Multiplayer with 2,3 or 4 players. The cards are Ace,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9, Jack, Queen and King. The game is played with 2 decks of cards. If there are two players, 10 cards will be distributed to each player. If you play with 3 or more people, you will get 7 cards. How to Play Rummy Multiplayer? When it's your turn, take one card from the upper deck or waste pile. The waste card is a face up card discarded by the left player. Form valid sets or sequences and lay a meld down. We will explain how to create sets below. Discard one card from your hand after your move. You can directly discard a card if you don't have any sets or sequences. You can also add cards to other players' melds from the cards in your hand. For example, one player laid off these cards: 6♦️,7♦️,8♦️. You can add 5♦️ or ♦️9 to the sequence. You can also lay off more than one card. Continue playing until one of the players eliminates all of the hand cards. Calculate the score and start over. The player who has a certain number of points (this number can be 100, 150, or 200, depending on the number of players) wins the game. Sets and Sequences You can form sets consisting of 3 same numbers (or faces) of different suits. For example, all of the sets given below are valid. A♣️,A♦️,A♥️,A♠️ 3♣️,3♦️,3♥️,3♠️ 7♠️,7♥️,7♦️,7♣️ Q♣️,Q♦️Q♥️ You can also form sequences of a single suit. To create a sequence, you need to have at least 3 consecutive cards of the same suit. For instance, these sequences can be formed. J♦️,Q♦️,K♦️,A♦️ A♠️,2♠️,3♠️ 9♥️,10♥️,J♥️ 4♣️,5♣️,6♣️,7♣️ Scoring Points in Rummy When a player gets rid of all the cards in his hands, the round is over. The sum of the remaining cards' value is the winner's score. So, keeping low-value cards in your hand would be wise. Number cards (2-9) have a value the same as the digit on the card. Ace values 1 point. All face cards (King, Queen and Jack) value 10 points. Move of the Daredevils: Going Rummy As in almost every other card game, Rummy rules reward risky plays. You can double your scores by "going Rummy". To do that, wait to lay off any cards until the end. When you are ready, remove all your hand cards in one turn. Be cautious while going Rummy since another player can go Rummy before you! Language Rummy Multiplayer is available in English, French, Spanish, German, Portuguese, Italian and Russian. Developer Rummy Multiplayer was created by CodeThisLab. Similar Games If you like board games requiring strategy, try Rummikub to flip some tiles. For the ones who want to stick to card games, we have many Solitaire variants free to play. Follow the links and find a game to play on your break.

title: Legends Arena
description: Legends Arena is an online shooting game where you battle with your enemies as a team. There are many game options. You can play in 2v2, 3v3 and 5v5 modes. The 5v5 option is exclusively on the Battle Stage map. Pick up your guns and walk side by side with your team in this battle game! It will be delightful to team up. ⚔️ How to Play Legends Arena You will be teamed up with other online players worldwide in the game. Choose the game map and the game mode option you want to battle in. You will see maps and mode options when you tap on the “Play” button. Make your choices, and you will find yourself in the selected arena as you wish. When you get shot, we recommend you go to the green cubes with a plus symbol to recover. Heroes to Unlock View the heroes by clicking on the “Heroes” section from the main menu. You will see many fantastic characters. They are waiting to be unlocked. As you win battles, you can access them easily. You will start playing with Jane first. She is an energetic girl, and her favorite color is pink. You can see some of the heroes below, who are our favorites. Maya Luke Lily Pofy Battling Arenas There are 3 unique maps: Justice Plaza, Chaos Square and Battle Stage. Each has specific environments to offer. Only the Battle Stage provides you with a deathmatch with teams of five. More people means more contentious battles! Show everyone that you are invincible. Justice Plaza features a vibrant, colorful arena with many futuristic structures. Chaos Square is a place where you will find factory-like buildings. Scientific experiments are carried out here. Battle Stage is a large map with a recycling area. You may find many places to hide and seek quickly. Use Your Chance View the boxes you have earned from the Loots section. Opening the loot boxes will earn you rewards such as legend coins and character upgrades. You may also participate in sweepstakes and unlock new heroes by using your diamonds. Controls To move, use the WASD keys. To reload bullets, use the R key. To bend down, use the C key. To jump, use the Space key. To run, use the Left-Shift key. To change between weapons 1,2,3,4 or scroll Developer Legends Arena is created by FreezeNova. Similar Shooting Games If you enjoy playing Legends Arena, you may also try Crazy Strike Force . You have many weapon options in the game. You can also customize your character with unique outfits. Create your own strategy to wipe out all the enemies from the battlefield. For more options, you may look up other shooting games online on OnlineGames.io by clicking on the link. If you have any suggestions or wishes, please do not hesitate to contact us!

title: Math Trivia
description: Math Trivia is a multiplayer math game where you engage in problem-solving battles with online players or against the computer. There are 10 questions in each round. You must answer them as quickly as possible to beat your opponent. We'll put your fast computing abilities to the test! Pass the quizzes and show everyone who is the most intelligent person in this puzzle game .➕➖ How to Play Math Trivia Are you someone who loves mathematics? We are sure you will love this brain game. If this is your first time to play the game, you can start with the Practice option from the menu. You will compete against the AI. You can see what type of questions you will come across in the Practice mode before battling with a real player. Your job? Answer 10 questions you will see on the screen respectively. The same goes for your opponent. To win the game, you must solve the problems in the quickest way and correctly! Create Your Avatar Before engaging in a battle, start by giving a name to your player and choose an avatar for yourself. Enter your name in the box written "Player Name". Then, view the avatar options using the left and right arrows on the box. There are girls and boys who have unique physical appearances. Choose your favorite one, and now you are ready! Calculate Quickly! You will have a limited time to solve the problems. Don't forget to check the time bar at the top of the screen. Remember that answering the questions quickly you see on the screen will bring you success in this math game. The quicker you solve them, the more points you will get. But there will need to be more! You must calculate the numbers correctly. The Blue and Red Circles There are two bars; one is red, and the other is blue. The red bar shows you your progress. The same goes with your opponent with the blue bar. You will see circles under each bar that have numbers in them. These numbers indicate your scores. You can understand who is ahead from these numbers. Controls Use your mouse or touchscreen to mark the answer Developer Math Trivia was developed by MarketJS. Similar Online Games If you like playing Math Trivia, you may also try Hexologic . You will see many hexagons side by side in the game. Your objective is to place dots in these shapes. You must reach the numbers on the edges to make progress. Things intensify in later levels! For further options, you may look up other free math games on OnlineGames.io by clicking on the link. Please bookmark the website to access new games easily.

title: Swing Monkey
description: Let's get the monkey on the trampoline! Swing Monkey is a fun skill game where you swing the monkey through rings by tapping and holding the mouse button. Your primary mission here is to move the monkey between the rings and get it to the finish line. You will reach the next level as you get the monkey to the finish line. How to Play Swing Monkey With Swing Monkey, a delightful swinging game, you'll go on an exciting adventure as you swing through rings to cross a jungle. As you learn the skills of accuracy and momentum, your goal is to lead the monkey to the finish line. When you start the game, the monkey will automatically fall towards the trampoline and start moving through the forest by gaining speed. You need to hold the monkey to the rings using this speed. Afterward, you must use the other rings on the game screen to accelerate the monkey and move forward to reach the finish. Bouncing the Monkey Trampolines that you can use to bounce off and generate speed are your starting point. Make sure to seize a ring as soon as possible because the trampoline's air time, the momentum's effectiveness you get by bouncing from the trampoline, is limited. Grabbing the Rings The move that will take you forward is to hold on to the rings and gain momentum. In order to gain momentum, precise grabbing is the key element. Holding on to the rings with a short rope wouldn't make much sense. Because this won't give you much speed. The longer the rope you hold on to the ring, the greater the intensity of the swing. Soaring in the Air If you swing or bounce high enough, you can fly across much of the course without holding onto any rings. At the beginning of the level, gather as much speed as you can to make navigating the obstacles a pleasure. Controls Use the left mouse button to make the monkey swing through the rings. Developer Swing Monkey was created by MarketJS. Similar Games Try Flipping Gun Simulator if you enjoy playing Swing Monkey. Flipping Gun Simulator is another skill game you can find on OnlineGames.io. In this online game you try to shoot down to flip the gun in the air. Alternatively, you may look up other arcade games for more gaming options.

title: Soul Essence Adventure
description: Soul Essence Adventure is a 2D adventure game where you are stuck in a dark and gloomy castle and try to get out. You will encounter many enemies while trying to get out of this castle. They will try to harm you. You need to prepare yourself for all kinds of attacks and obstacles. From time to time, you will need to collect some clues and solve puzzles. This online adventure game will give you the peak of excitement. If you're ready, let's get started! How to Play Soul Essence Adventure? If you like classic games, Soul Essence will give you that pleasure. It is a game very similar to Super Mario, and it is just as exciting. You will find yourself in a pixelated castle. Move forward by overcoming obstacles. You may also find treasures in some places. Grab the loot from these treasures and then use them to buy yourself new tools. You can also improve your character's skills from the inventory section. Red Cloaked Enemies You will encounter red-cloaked enemies along the platform. They will do their best to harm you. You may take damage while fighting them. But don't worry. You can find potions to replenish your health on the platform. You can check your character's health status from the red bar at the top left of the screen. Inventory in Soul Essence You can spend the coins you earn to improve your character's skills from the inventory section in the upper right corner. You can also view your equipment here. Your character can improve based on the skills we give below. Strength Life Defense Dodge Agility Magic Crit Chance Boss Room You will see the "Boss Room" button in the main menu. Boss Room is an exceptional mode in the game. The enemies you will encounter here are stronger and more dangerous than the red cloaks. You are facing a severe challenge. Here, you are directly in the territory of the Final Boss, and eventually, you will meet him. But keep in mind, if you lose the game, you can enter the Boss Room again after 5 hours. Controls A/D or Left/Right arrow keys to move. W or the Upper arrow key to jump. S or Down arrow key to roll. Spacebar key to attack. T key to transform the character. E key to interact. Tab key to open the inventory. Games Like Soul Essence If you enjoy playing Soul Essence Adventure, you should give Marco a chance. You will travel back in time to the 1990s with this unique adventure game. Super Mario Bros, an arcade game that was hugely successful when it was first launched in 1985, served as Marco's inspiration. Help a traditional hero with his red cap and pixelated look make it past tiny snails, birds, rhinoceros, and mushrooms. You will find a carefully curated collection of games on OnlineGames.io. Visit us often so you can always find new games online !

title: Granny 2
description: Get ready for another scary adventure in Granny 2 where the fear and suspense are amped up in a new, eerie location. You wake up in a dark, damp room in Grandpa's house, disoriented and with a headache. The house is filled with traps, mysterious items, and the constant threat of Granny and Grandpa. While Granny's hearing is as sharp as ever, Grandpa is a bit slower, but his eyesight is just as deadly. If he spots you, you better run fast! Escape the Haunted House The main door is locked with multiple locks, and you must explore the house to find clues and items that will help you escape. If you make a sound by dropping something or stepping on a creaky floorboard, Granny will come running. Be sure to hide under beds or in wardrobes, but remember, they can still spot you if you're not careful! In addition to escaping the main door, there's another way out through the house's basement. A rusty boat lies waiting in the sewer, and if you can start it and unlock the gate, you might make your escape that way. You can also protect yourself with weapons you find around the house. These can temporarily stop Granny and Grandpa, giving you a brief window to move forward, but don't rely on them too long—they only buy you time. You have five days to escape, but the longer you stay, the harder it gets. Each night, the house becomes more dangerous, and by the second night, you'll start limping. Can you escape before time runs out? Controls WASD: Move Mouse: Look around E: Interact C: Sit/Stand R: Hide Space: Throw items Hold F key: Escape traps How to Play Granny 2 As you did in the first game of Granny , your objective is to escape the house within 5 days. Check every room for useful items, and be strategic with your choices. Search for items to unlock the main door or use the sewer to escape via the boat. Avoid making noise—Granny and Grandpa will hear you and come after you. Hide under beds or in wardrobes if they get too close. Use hiding spots wisely—if you're caught, it's game over. Watch out for traps—they can slow you down or leave you vulnerable. If you fall for a bear trap, hold the F key to to get away from it. Use weapons to temporarily stop them, but they'll recover quickly. Solve puzzles to progress and unlock new areas. You can restart your attempts after each failed night, but the house only gets harder the longer you stay. Difficulty Levels Granny 2 offers five difficulty levels: Extreme, Hard, Normal, Easy, and Practice. Practice mode This mode lets you explore without the danger of Granny and Grandpa, giving you a chance to plan your escape. But be warned, the house is never entirely safe, even in this mode. Easy mode In this mode, Granny and Grandpa are a little slower, making it easier to outrun them. You also don't have to worry about creaky floors, which means you can move around the house without triggering Granny's hearing. While this mode still offers a challenge, it's more forgiving than the others, giving you a bit more breathing room. Perfect if you want to enjoy the puzzle-solving without too much stress. Normal mode Normal mode is the baseline for Granny 2. Here, Granny and Grandpa move at their usual pace, making the game a true test of your stealth, strategy, and quick thinking. Creaking floors will be a constant threat, so every step matters. This mode is ideal for players looking for a balanced experience. Hard Mode In Hard mode, Granny and Grandpa step up their game. They move faster, which means you'll need to be quick on your feet and think fast to avoid being caught. The added difficulty doesn't stop there, though—there's an extra lock on the main door, making your escape even more challenging. If you're up for a real test of your survival instincts, this is the mode to choose. Extreme Mode Extreme mode is not for the faint-hearted. Granny and Grandpa move faster than you, and they'll relentlessly pursue you throughout the house. On top of that, there are two extra locks on the main door, adding even more pressure to your escape. This mode is designed for experienced players who thrive under intense pressure and want to push their nerves and survival skills to the limit. More Jumpscare Games If you love Granny 2 and want to keep testing your survival skills, check out more of our free horror games . Each game will push your wits and nerves to the limit, with new challenges to overcome. Let us know which one scares you the most in the comments!

title: Tank Racing
description: Welcome to Tank Racing! Tank Racing is a 2D driving game where you steer a tank on tough roads with abrupt ups and downs in a military area. The road will be a little challenging. You will see coins along the way. Collect them and use them to unlock new tanks. Thus, you can enrich your gaming experience. How to Play Tank Racing You can first start by customizing your tank. Open the customization page by clicking the tank icon in the main menu. Choose which tank you want to use, then select the color of the tank. You have a wide range of color palettes. When you complete this process, you can start the race by pressing the play button. There are 30 levels to unlock and each level has its own hardships. It is your duty to overcome them all one by one. Mastering the Tank Driving There are lots of ups and downs on the road. You need to slow down when you approach these areas because the tank's track contains height changes. If something goes wrong, there's a good chance the tank may flip over. Under these circumstances, you cannot bounce it back to its initial condition. Dealing with a Flipped Tank On this challenging map, there is a good chance that the tank will roll over as you progress. To prevent this, move cautiously. If the tank indicates that it is about to go over, you may attempt to rescue the situation by hopping it. Compete with Online Players Online players can compete against you in Tank Racing. The game will create a room with four players if you click the "Multiplayer" button at the bottom of the screen when you open the level selection screen. The game starts once the room is set up and when all four players are ready. Controls Use the left and right arrow keys to move the tank. Use the up arrow key or the space key to jump the tank. Alternatively, you can use A and D keys to move the tank and use the W key to jump it. What is More? If you love trial games like Tank Racing, try out Moto X3M , where you ride a motorbike over a bumpy route. You may also search OnlineGames.io for additional racing games if you'd prefer. Set this page as a favorite so you can quickly return!

title: AI Chat
description: Got questions or need a nerdy buddy? Say less. This brainy pal has answers for most of your curiosities, schoolwork struggles, and those random “how does this even work?” moments, whether you’re grinding through homework or taking a break from gaming. Say Hi to Your New Clever Companion! Created by the super smart team at FreezeNova, this AI Chat is your friendly guide and clever new buddy. He can help you with your homework, explain hard things, or tell you cool facts about almost anything. He’s like a fun classmate who loves to help and never gets tired of questions. You can ask him about space, animals, games, history, or even how to make your favorite snack because he always has something interesting to say. He’s kind, funny, and ready to teach you new things in a fun way every time you chat. How to Use AI Chat? Just type whatever pops into your head and watch our AI Chat jump in with answers. FAQs Stuck on what to ask? No worries! Hit one of the ready-made questions or shuffle the suggestions and let your brainy buddy surprise you with something new to learn.

title: Worms Zone a Slithery Snake
description: Worms Zone a Slithery Snake modernizes the classic arcade game with advanced graphics and multiplayer options. Grow your worm into an enormous snake by collecting food pellets. Eat as much as you can to make your worm bigger. Avoid crashing into other snakes while hunting for food! Controls Mouse: Control the Worm Spacebar or LMB: Speed Up On Mobile Devices: Use the touch controls to play. Worms Zone a Slithery Snake Overview In Worms Zone a Slithery Snake, your goal is to grow your worm by collecting food pellets. Use your mouse to guide the worm and eat food like cakes and fruits. Each pellet adds calories, making your worm heavier. The heavier you are, the higher your chances of being on the leaderboard! Game Modes in Worms Zone a Slithery Snake Infinity Mode Infinity Mode requires players to focus on growing their worms by taking food on the ground as long as possible without any time limit. The players should avoid contact with any other worm on the field; otherwise, they lose the game. Time Mode In the Time Mode, all players have 7 minutes. Within this time frame, they need to collect as many food pellets and coins as they can. The player with the highest score is the leaderboard winner. This mode features double points and coins. Treasure Hunter Mode The Treasure Hunter Mode allows players to hunt for treasures on the map, earning them a great amount of coins. This mode also has a time limit: players have 5 minutes to hunt as many treasures as they can. Developer Worms Zone a Slithery Snake is developed by Peaky Muzzle. Looking for More? If you enjoy playing snake games like this, Worm Hunt Snake Game IO Zone is another game that suits your tastes well! Play in its Timed Mode, Endless Mode, Gems Fever, and Gold Rush. For more, view our Snake Games Online tag at the link. Share your best records with other online players in the comments section below!

title: Formula Traffic Racer
description: Formula Traffic Racer is an online racing game where you can drive your modern Formula 1 car on the highway. As someone who enjoys driving at high speeds, driving in heavy traffic can sound boring. Let’s see how many kilometers you can drive your Formula 1 car without hitting any other vehicles! Controls WASD or Arrow Keys: Drive/Steer/Brake F Key: Use Nitro C Key: Change Cameraview Formula Traffic Racer Overview Get in your Formula 1 racing car and head for the highway! Your main goal in this car game is to avoid hitting any vehicles in the flowing traffic on the road. Just as you do in Highway Traffic , it may sound easy, but can you imagine driving an F1 car on a highway? With such a strong car like this, it will be hard for you not to collide with any other vehicles. However, that’s the point of Formula Traffic Racer! Avoid Accidents As you drive Velocity X1 on the highway, it will not be surprising that there are lots of other vehicles on your way. There will be drivers suddenly trying to change lanes, taxis, ambulances and many more. You should avoid an accident; otherwise, your precious car may be damaged or even catch fire. Dodge the Vehicles Here, the point is to drive the car as close as possible to other vehicles at high speeds and earn points by leaving them behind. You should adjust the proximity so that you don’t hit it, but stay very close. That’s how you can earn the highest points in this Highway Traffic-like racing game. Game Modes in Formula Traffic Racer One-Way: There is no traffic hazard coming from the opposite direction in this mode. Traffic is one-way here. Two-Way: Unlike One-Way mode, traffic flows in the opposite direction. Time Attack: You have 100 seconds to complete the Time Attack mode without crashing into any other vehicles. Developer Fuego! Games developed Formula Traffic Racer. Other Racing Games Did you like playing Formula Traffic Racer? You may also try F1 Drift Racer . Race with other F1 drivers on a curved map. Complete 2 laps and be the one who reaches the finish line first! There are dozens of games at your disposal on OnlineGames.io ! Look at our Racing Games Online for further racing experiences.

title: Tiny Fishing
description: We are not here to give you fish but teach you fishing so you will be fed for a lifetime. Tiny Fishing is a great online game with effortless controls and charming visuals. The game is also suitable for all ages and skill levels since it has casual, nonviolent gameplay with colorful visual elements. Choose your fishing tackle, rods, lines and hooks. Then, chase after big, rare and exotic fishes. Get to know more about sea animals by playing Tiny Fishing for free on OnlineGames.io. How to Play Tiny Fishing? You will be given a standard fishing tackle that you can customize later with the coins you earned. Cast your line by hitting the play button and catch the fishes you like. Move the hook near to fish with mouse or swipe with your finger on tablet. Sell the fish and earn coins to buy more fishing equipment. The hook has a catch quota, a maximum number of fish that can carry. The line length is also essential because there are rarer fish in deep waters. Increase line length and catch quota to hunt down more valuable fish. How do I earn coins in Tiny Fishing? There are two ways of income in Tiny Fishing. The first one is by catching fish and selling them. Second is passive income, which you earn while offline. Either can be raised by buying boosters. Can I play Tiny Fishing on my tablet? Yes, you can play Tiny Fishing on your tablet by swiping your finger to move the hook. What are some tips for Tiny Fishing? Here are some tips for mastering Tiny Fishing: Go deeper to find more precious fish by upgrading your line. Buy new hooks to attract more fish. Hit the play button when the indicator is at max. Go after uncommon fish Boost your catch quota and offline income rates. Are there any sharks in Tiny Fishing? Stay loose! Tiny Fishing has no sharks, but you will find very interesting sea animals deeper in the water. You may come across octopuses, dolphins and seahorses Controls Drag the left mouse button to move the hook in the water. Developer Tiny Fishing was created by Mad Buffer. What to play next? Ready to meet new sea animals? More fishing games await you on OnlineGames.io.

title: Coach Bus Drive Simulator
description: Would you like to become a bus driver in the future ? Coach Bus Drive Simulator is the best game to try and experience the transportation of passengers to different stations. You have 3 models of buses that you can take a ride and practive bus driving. Be careful not to damage the bus on the road. Mode game: • Classic - 10 levels • Time Challenge - 10 levels • Free Roam Coach Bus Drive Simulator Controls: • WASD or arrow keys to move • Space bar to use handbrake • C to change camera view

title: Riddle School 5
description: Riddle School 5 , which is the fifth installment of the point-and-click adventure game series Riddle School, was released on April 2, 2010. Taking its inspiration from Tom Fulp’s flash game Pico’s School, our protagonist Phil Eggtree’s escape adventures contain humorous plots and puzzle-solving. In this installment, Phil was captured by Viz, a red alien living in space. Phil wakes up in an unknown white room. Follow the speech bubbles, get the hints and help him rescue his friends Phred Whistler, Smiley Sundae, and Zach Kelvin. 👽 Controls Left Mouse Button: To Interact Click & Drag: Combine Items How to Play Riddle School 5 Once you grasp the controls, your mission is to help Phil and his three friends, who were taken to an alien space station by the red alien Viz. He needs to find a way to exit the white room and reach his friends. Search for items that might be useful and manage to exit the room. However, keep in mind that the real story begins when you get out! To rescue his friends, you must help Phil overcome a series of obstacles. Read the speech bubbles carefully; each sentence Phil says is a matter of escaping the alien space station. Enter Their Dreams 💤 After looking around the space station, Phil sees that his friends are in a deep sleep. When he tries to touch them, he gets electric shocks. The only way to rescue them is to kill them in their dreams by using the machine. It connects to people’s minds. This machine also states that if a person dies in their dreams, they will wake up. Help Phil to enter his friends’ dreams, and kill them to wake them up! Find the hidden room to reach the machine. Here is a hint: you must get rid of the monster alien to find it! Return to Earth 🌎 The master plan of the Viz is to use Zack’s freezing genes to freeze Earth. According to Viz, humans are evil. Before Viz achieves its goals, Phil's friends need to wake up. There are four escape pods in the station. When you finally help Phil to enter his friends’ dreams and wake them up, they need to use these escape pods to return to Earth. Keep in mind that you cannot use the pods before you rescue Phil’s friends. Tips & Tricks for Riddle School 5 🖱 Click and explore everything. Every object can help. 💬 Read all speech bubbles carefully. Phil gives hints in his speech. 🔩 Use and combine items. Items are the key to escaping the space station. 😴 Use the special machine to rescue Phil. They are in deep sleep. 🧐 Check rooms again if you are stuck. New things can appear after you solve puzzles. Developer JonBro, who is a Newgrounds creator, developed Riddle School 5. Other Games in This Series If Riddle School 5 brought a smile to your face, dive into the rest of the Flash game series. Each game is packed with quirky puzzles, hidden school secrets, and classic point-and-click charm. Riddle School Riddle School 2 Riddle School 3 Riddle School 4 Riddle School 5 Riddle Transfer Riddle Transfer 2 Play every game to watch the full story unfold and join Phil on his wild escapes again and again.

title: Taming io
description: Ready for an exciting online adventure? Taming io is an online survival game where you start from scratch in the jungle with your one and only pet. Travel across the wilderness and go on an adventure to see your capabilities. Don't waste your time just looking around- begin harvesting fruits, lumbering, mining, and crafting tools immediately. Remember to build your own windmill to forge your own gold. You will need them to survive and outlast. Teamwork makes the dream work! Tame wild animals and start your own survival squad. Alliance with your friends and their pets to expand your team even further. As you level up, you will have the option to select items like weapons, tools, and food. Choose wisely to be the ultimate tamer worldwide and climb the leaderboard. Taming io offers countless features awaiting to be explored and advanced. Shape your unique way of playing Taming io, discover uncharted territories, and let your imagination run wild. How to Play Taming.io? Select between paw, weapons, fire and others on the top-left of your screen with your cursor. Hit trees, stones, and bushes to harvest or mine. Collect the generated items and level up. To earn Golden Apples, locate chests on the map. Approach sleeping animals to try to tame them. Join a clan to fight with your gang. Customize your character in the shop. Use your imagination and have fun exploring through play. Controls Use arrow keys to move around and left-click to hit. Use your cursor to navigate and interact. Who created Taming io? Taming io was created by LapaMauve and released in October 2020. More Games Like Taming io If you like the concept of Taming io, try something similar. We encourage you to play our other io Games .

title: Sword Play Ninja Slice Runner
description: Grab your katana and get ready to slice your way through waves of enemies! Sword Play Ninja Slice Runner is an action runner game where you become a blade-wielding ninja on a high platform filled with enemies. You'll be slicing flying shurikens, bullets, shields or dodging massive bullets, just with your fingers moving. The game throws you into a simple but colorful 3D world that changes in each level. Complete sword fights, slicing action, and enjoy satisfying slow-motion effects. It’s a mix of Fruit Ninja’s slicing satisfaction and the fun of endless runners. Controls Swipe on the screen to slash enemies and obstacles. Hold and drag to control your sword’s direction. Timing and precision are everything! How to Play Sword Play Ninja Slice Runner Online Start running down a path filled with enemies. As you move, swipe to slice through foes who rush at you with weapons. Time your moves to dodge traps like swinging axes or bullets. Finish each level by defeating the final enemy or completing a stylish slow-motion slash. Along the way, you'll face: Shielded enemies who need multiple hits. Special weapons like dual katanas or energy blades. Satisfying cinematic slow-mo kills that make you feel like a true ninja. Customize Your Blade and Style Your Swings One of the coolest parts of Sword Play! Ninja Slice Runner is the wide range of sword skins and trail effects you can unlock in the shop. They make your slicing feel even more fun and rewarding. Here’s what you’ll find: Sword Skins You can unlock random swords with 700 coins or collect specific ones by leveling up or completing challenges. Change up your blade with unique weapons, from classic katanas to quirky alternatives: A jagged flame-shaped sword (your default) A giant black cleaver A sci-fi energy blade (pixel-style!) A chainsaw sword for intense slicing A key-shaped sword (unlock it with keys from gameplay) Even a hockey stick or a curved fantasy bow at higher levels Sword Trails Leave a mark, literally. Leave a trail when you swing your sword. These visual effects make every attack more exciting, especially during slow-mo moments.Trails add an extra flair to every slash. Unlock them in the shop and have trail effects like: Smooth white arcs or star-studded slashes Bubble trails or lightning-style swings Colorful effects like glowing pink trails (unlocked at level 10) Fiery orange swings (unlocked at level 20) Tip: Trails don’t change gameplay but they do make every hit more stylish and VR-like experience. Try combining swords and trails to match your ninja vibe! Developer Sword Play! Ninja Slice Runner game was developed by PlayGama for quick fun. More Ninja Games Await If you're craving more stealthy swordplay, check out Blocky Parkour Ninja . It’s a 3D ninja platformer where you sneak through enemy bases, dodge traps with swift precision. With its blocky visuals and fun gameplay, it’s a great pick for players who enjoy ninja games online .

title: Stunt Simulator Multiplayer
description: Perform flyover with real players in Stunt Simulator Multiplayer ! It is a multiplayer stunt game where your aim is to make acrobatic flying across a map. There are many jumping ramps and hilly and grassy roads. Use them and perform the craziest flyovers to earn points. Unlock ten new cars with your money and experience the excitement of driving each one in this multiplayer car game . About This Game Create a private room or join one of the available ones and take your place on one of the thrilling maps. All of them offer sky-high jumping platforms and rolling terrains. Press the gas pedal with all your strength and move forward at full speed. Use one of the platforms or the terrains and fly with your car. While high, try to make flipovers and perform a variety of stunts. You will earn points in this way. Use them to unlock new kinds of compact vehicles. Hazelgreen, Silverstone and Ironbark The stunt game has three unique maps: Hazelgreen, Silverstone and Ironbark. Hazelgreen is a map with futuristic touches. It includes modern jumping ramps. Also, driving on this map has an extremely soothing effect. On the other hand, the Silverstone map combines a forestry road with mountains. You will find many trees and rocks near the ramps. This map is the most special map for those who want to be in touch with nature. And the third map is the Ironbark. Ironbark is a map with lots of shipments by sea. You are free to do whatever you want in this huge plain area. Compact Cars There are ten unique cars at your disposal. But in the beginning, the Compact Car, Coupe Car and Pickup are accessible. As you perform flyovers, you will gain points. Use them to unlock the other ones. There are many vehicles that catch your attention, and the Concept Car is one of them. If you want something crazier, we recommend you try the 6-wheeled Car. Night Drives Some people are crazy for night drives. If you are one of them, you have the option to drive your vehicle at night. You only need to join one of the rooms with the night mode or create a private room by clicking on the "Night" option. This way, you can enjoy your dark rides. Don't forget to turn on the headlights by pressing the F key. Controls WASD or the Arrow Keys: Move Space: Brake Left-Shift: Nitro R: Reset T: Chat Tab: Pause F: Headlights Developer FreezeNova created the Stunt Simulator Multiplayer. Explore Other Games You may also try Ultimate Flying Car . In the game, you will find many cars with wings—yes, they can fly! You can freely roam the city streets or engage in races with other supercars. View other stunt games online on OnlineGames.io. The collection includes a wide range of games. Additionally, if you stay tuned, you will always find new and thrilling games on the site.

title: Bus Subway Runner
description: There is no end to this chase… Bus Subway Runner is an enjoyable runner game where you are being chased by a policeman. You remember Subway Surfer, right? There you were racing against trains. In Bus Subway Runner, you will be facing buses! Be prepared to encounter many obstacles on your way while escaping from the police. Dozens of buses want to crush you in this subway. Trust your reflexes when dodging them! How to play Bus Subway Runner? When you open the game and start to play it, your hero automatically runs. All you need to do is steer his direction throughout the chase, just like Subway Surfer. Occasionally, you will need to use your hoverboard as you cannot overcome some obstacles just by jumping. Hoverboard will be your best tool to overcome all challenges by going higher in this game. Also, remember to collect the coins while trying to escape the police. Because later, you will use these coins to buy new items, change your character and improve your existing auxiliary materials. Tips and Tricks to Master in Bus Subway Runner There are things we can suggest to you to make your game more enjoyable. It is a smart move to use your hover by double-clicking the left mouse button when you are most stuck. The game will offer you some power-ups as you run along the road. Using them adds liveliness and movement to your game. It makes you more agile. These power-ups are Jetpack, Super Sneaker, Coin Magnet, 2x Multiplier, Hoverbike and Hoverboard. You can upgrade their power by using your collected coins. Watch out for balloons. Be sure to get them. They are the ones who will fly you to other dimensions. Does Bus Subway Runner have an end? No, Bus Subway Runner doesn't have an end. It's an endless game where you run to beat your best score and obtain new characters and hoverboards. You can also challenge your family and friends to beat your score in Bus Subway Runner. Meet the Runners of Bus Subway Runner You will begin Max , a cute boy who is 14 years old and fond of running in parkours. If you'd like to run around with colorful hats and mini-shorts, Stella should be your runner on the subway. Stella is an adorable runner with ocean blue eyes and a ponytail shaking while running. She is great at dancing. This means you may see her doing some awesome dance moves after an achievement if you are lucky enough. You need to have 5000 coins to unlock Stella. Meet the cool American Rock Star . She will blow your mind with her moves on the runway. She is a real slay queen! Her guitar is on flame. It is only 10000 coins to unlock her. It's nothing compared to her ability to run away from cops. Meet the ultimate runner Tadita ! She is a 13 years old native American. Very agile and strong and definitely a live wire. She also looks terrific in her unique ethnic outfit. She'll be your best friend on the roads. You need to submit 25000 coins to unlock her. We believe you can do this if you start running now! Controls Use the A key or the Left arrow key to move left Use the D key or the Right arrow key to move right Use the W key or the Up arrow key to jump Use the S key or the Down arrow key to slide Use the left mouse button twice to use your hoverboard Similar Games If you enjoy parkour style running games, you might also enjoy LOLBeans io , in which you will be race-running over crazy obstacles with funky bean characters. For more options similar to Bus Subway Runner, browse Adventure Games tag on OnlineGames.io.

title: Jet Ski Boat Race
description: If you are fond of Jet Skis, this game is perfect for you. Because you are invited to race with them. Jet Ski Boat Race is a 3D racing game where you and your opponents are driving jet skis instead of cars, as in classic racing games. This time, the race is on the water. How to Play Jet Ski Boat Race? The first thing you want to do is create your profile after entering your name and age in the "Guest" section from the menu. You can then start the game by selecting the mode you want to play. Jet Ski Boat Race provides you with 4 game options: Time Attack, Quick Race, Championship and Knock Out. Each one of them has their unique features. For example, while you race against time in Time Attack mode, you have to eliminate the competitors in Knock Out to get ahead. Following the mode selection, you need to determine the game setting, such as the number of players and laps, the difficulty level of the game and the map you will compete on. And finally, it is time to select your rider and jet ski. When all is done, you can start making people swallow the seawater! Game Modes There are 4 different game modes in this game. Each has unique rules. Time Attack Quick Race Championship Knock Out Upgrades Jet Ski Boat Race allows you to upgrade the features and abilities of the jet ski and the player. While you can increase the jet ski's nitro, speed, braking and steering abilities, you can also improve the player's experience points, winning rate and abilities. You can do these with the money you earn from races. Controls Use the WASD or the Arrow keys to move Use the Left Shift key to use nitro Use the Tab to pause Use the C key to change the camera view Similar Games If playing the Jet Ski Boat Race gives you pleasure, we recommend that you also play our other racing game, Hover Racer . We are sure it will be interesting to race with hoverboards in this game. For our other free game collections, visit our racing games and driving games tags on OnlineGames.io.

title: Highway Racer 2
description: Are you ready to raise clouds of dust on the highway? Highway Racer 2 is a 3D car driving game where your main goal is passing by sharp maneuvers as close as possible to the sides of cars on the highway. I know this is very dangerous, but it makes your adrenaline skyrocket! How to Play Highway Racer 2? Playing Highway Racer 2 is no different from playing other car games. You can find the controls below: Use WASD or the Arrow keys to steer the car Use the Left Shift to boost your car Use the Space key to use the handbrake Use the C key to change the camera view What is Highway Racer 2? Highway Racer 2 is an online car game you can play on OnlineGames.io freely. You earn money for every vehicle you get past very closely in this game. With the money you make, you can unlock new cars or upgrade existing vehicles. You have given 6 different car options in the beginning. You can choose whichever you want and start to wander on the highway. Game Modes After selecting your car on the menu, you must choose the game mode you want to play. Highway Racer 2 offers you 5 different modes. These are: One Way: As the name suggests, the highway is one-way in the One Way mode. All cars move in the same direction. Two Way: In the Two Way mode, cars move in both directions. So you have to think twice when driving on the two-way highway. Time Attack: In the Time Attack mode, you are given a certain amount of time and have to pass as close to the vehicle as you can during this time. Speed Bomb: In the Speed Bomb mode, a speed bomb is attached to the car. If you hit a vehicle, the health of the bomb will decrease, and if it reaches zero, it will explode... You need to be careful! Multiplayer: In the Multiplayer mode, you can play the game with more than one person. To do this, you only have to set up a room or enter an existing one. Upgrades and Modifications Highway Racer 2 allows you to tune your car as you wish. You can increase the torque power of the car, change its color, and strengthen the brake settings. You can change the color of your vehicle and add a spoiler to it and more... All is up to you! Similar Games If you enjoy Highway Racer 2, try playing Racing Horizon, Drift Hunters Pro and Highway Traffic .

title: Viola the Bird
description: Jam with the world's first bird-tuoso! Meet Viola the Bird , a feathered musician (okay, she's actually an ostrich!). She loves plucking strings and playing cellos. In this online music game created by David Li and Google collaboratively, you'll help Viola play famous classical songs on her cello. She might sometimes flub a note or two—but hey, it's in her bird instincts! 😄 Viola always says that her goal is to go from chirping in the wild to rocking out in the Broadway Concerts. So, help her spread her wings, pluck those strings! Whether you're into composing or just love making noise, Viola the Bird will give you the fun and sounds you've been looking for! The game is like an experimental lab for music, and it is definitely a must-play! Controls Mouse: Drag slowly and steadily left and right to play How to Play You'll help Viola the Bird strum her cello-inspired instrument. In the tutorial, you'll be guided on how you can play Beethoven's Ode to Joy. Just click and drag with your mouse left and right to play the notes. Make your moves slow and steady for smooth tunes. Then try another song or go freestyle and make your own music. Every move you make creates unique sounds, so feel free to get creative and see what melodies you can create! Maestro! Songs You Can Play in Viola the Bird Viola the Bird isn't just about random chirps and tweets; you can play some seriously epic songs! Here's a list of songs you can perform in the game: Beethoven: Ode to Joy Pachelbel: Canon in D Holst: Theme from Jupiter Schubert: Ave Maria Irish Traditional: Londonderry Air J.S. Bach: Air on the G String, Cello Suite No. 1 Prelude Mozart: Eine Kleine Nachtmusik Rossini: William Tell Overture Maurice Ravel: Pavane Edward Elgar: Salut d'amour Johann Strauss II: The Blue Danube Claude Debussy: La fille aux cheveux de lin Vivaldi: Winter Largo Dvořák: New World Symphony Traditional: Amazing Grace And if you're feeling creative, you can go freestyle by pressing the button at the top of your screen! Experiment with different notes to create your own masterpiece. Ostrichs, unfortunately, cannot fly, but you can let your imagination fly! Fun Facts Viola the Bird was created by David Li, the same genius who brought Blob Opera and Elastic Man . If you'd like to play those games for free and enjoy fluid visuals and strange sounds, follow the links! Musicians from all over the world teamed up to help Viola play, making this one smart and stylish bird. The music came from cellists and violinists Ashok Klouda, Dave Larkin, Elizabeth Goble, Peter Wilson, Zhivko Georgiev, and music arrangers Charles Mauleverer and Martin Batchelar. Together, they taught a neural network to chirp out some seriously cool string sounds! That's the wonder of machine learning! How cool is that? Developer Viola the Bird was created by David Li and Google Arts & Culture. Release Date July 2023

title: Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals
description: Have you heard of Ballerina Cappuccina ? Yep, the ballerina with a coffee cup instead of a head. She’s just one of the many silly characters in the Italian Brainrot meme world. Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals is exactly what the title promises: it wants you to guess wacky TikTok AI-generated meme celebrities by tossing absurd pics and emoji mashups your way for a nonstop guessing party. Game Overview Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals is a silly guessing game where absurd pics and emoji combos turn into wacky TikTok AI meme celebrities like Ballerina Cappuccina or Bombardino Crocodilo . Play solo to chase high scores or team up in multiplayer for chaotic brainrot fun. Get points for right answers, strikes for wrong ones, and see who survives the nonsense the longest! How to Play Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals? Look at the silly pics, mash the clues together in your brain, and guess the goofy Italian brainrot creature ⎼ whether it’s Bombardino Crocodilo , Tralalero Tralala , or even tiny Cappuccino Assassino . Collect points for correct answers and try to beat your high score in solo mode, or bring friends into multiplayer for pure chaos. In multiplayer, take turns, swap players after a strike, and race to guess first. Whoever’s right scores a point, wrong guesses get a strike, and five strikes means game over. If both guess right, both score ⎼ keeping the madness going! Let’s get brainrotted! Single-player: choose the correct answer using W / A / D or simply click on it. Two-player: use the Arrow Keys (Up / Left / Right). Tips & Tricks Practice makes brainrot! Before you jump into multiplayer chaos, warm up in time mode as much as you can. It’s the best way to boost your meme knowledge and train your brain to spot those weird characters, especially the ones that only make sense if you already know the nonsense. FAQs How many brainrot characters are included in this game? The game includes over 50 brainrot characters, each with unique sounds and visuals that keep the guessing fun and surprising. Can I play Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals offline? No, the game cannot be played offline, as it requires a stable Wi-Fi connection at all times. Does the game have dynamic difficulty? Yes, some characters are easy, others are pure nonsense, and sometimes you’ve got to think quick with three pictures at once. Is there a hint system? Nope! There are no hints in the game, and players have to rely on their general knowledge to find the right answer. What happens if I guess the wrong character in offline mode? If you guess the wrong character in offline mode, your game will instantly end. However, players can use up to three retries, which are rewarded after watching a short ad. More Fun Awaits Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals is a game where you’ve got to think quick and guess before it’s too late. It’s silly, it’s fun, and it’s pure brainrot vibes.
